476. Vile Temper,4.8
#Your body is tempered by the Vile. When you are afflicted by diseases or poisons, your body uses them as fuel to become stronger and develop a stronger immune system. The stronger and more exotic disease or poison you are inflicted with, the faster your body will increase its physical stats and develop its immune system.
477. Glowing One,5.0
#You passively absorb radiation with your body like a sponge, using it to fuel your body and energy and consuming it in the process. Absorbing enough radiation, such as Gamma Radiation, X-rays, and even ultraviolet radiation, will have an effect of permanently increasing your physical stats and energy reserves proportional to how much you absorb. You are also immune to the negative effects of radiation and recover stamina and energy faster when exposed to it. While sunlight would have a negligible effect, eating some radium chips would probably act like cultivation pills for you.

649. Accelerated Development,5.4
#You improve your natural abilities far faster and far further than any of your peers, your body keeping pace with your mind at a genetic level so you can endure training that would cripple or kill an ordinary person. Latent superpowers awaken much more easily under your regimen, and your intellect can grow well past human limits, though you still need time and, eventually, a teacher capable of pushing you further.
650. Accelerated Forces,3.2
#Forces like gravity and friction affect you at an accelerated rate, allowing you to control your movements with absurd precision even at high speeds. This is the reason speedsters can jump and fall normally instead of being launched into orbit.
651. Accelerated Maturity,2.9
#You mature mentally, intellectually, and emotionally at an accelerated rate, granting you wisdom and emotional control far beyond your biological age. Sadly this does not exempt you from age restriction laws.
652. Accelerated Muscle Development,3.5
#Your muscles develop at an explosive rate, gaining in hours what would normally take days of training. With consistent exercise you can reach physiques and strength levels that should be impossible for your frame.
653. Accelerated System Development,4.2
#All of your bodily systems grow stronger, tougher, and faster at an accelerated rate as your body matures. Your nervous, skeletal, muscular, immune, and digestive systems all improve far beyond what should be biologically possible, compounding over your lifetime.
654. Accelerated Youth and Adult Longevity,3.5
#You age at an accelerated rate until you reach maturity, then your aging slows dramatically and you gain a greatly extended lifespan. You get to skip the awkward years and enjoy centuries of adulthood.
655. Accelerated Youth and Immortality,5.4
#You age rapidly until you reach physical maturity, at which point your aging halts entirely and you become biologically immortal. You can still be killed by violence or other means, but old age will never claim you.
656. Accelerated Youth,2.6
#You accelerate through childhood and adolescence, reaching full physical and emotional maturity in only a few years before your aging slows down to a normal pace. A blessing if you hated being a kid, a curse if you loved it.
657. Accelerating Regeneration,5.2
#Your regenerative healing factor grows stronger and faster the more punishment you take, both adapting to the severity of your wounds and improving each time you are injured and heal. Push it too far however and a single overwhelming blow may still finish you off.
658. Acceleration Defiance,3.7
#You can ignore the physical laws and effects of acceleration, shrugging off g-forces, sudden stops, and the violence of rapid motion. You can still be affected by raw physical impacts, but the forces themselves no longer chain you.
659. Acceleration Immunity,3.9
#You are completely unharmed by the various effects of rapid acceleration, including air resistance, dynamic shock, breathing difficulties, and the violence of contact at high speed. Essential equipment for any aspiring speedster.
660. Acceleration Maneuverability,3.4
#Your maneuverability is incredible in environments with high acceleration and fictitious forces. Whether running on walls, ceilings, or being thrown around inside a moving vehicle, you can navigate effortlessly regardless of inertial frames.
661. Enhanced Accuracy,3.6
#Your brain's aim and targeting centers are drastically heightened. You need only an instant to line up a shot before nailing distant or moving targets, instinctively calculating range, wind and lead. Still, you can miss, and supernatural agility can dodge you.
662. Supernatural Accuracy,5.4
#Your accuracy approaches that of a god of archery. You can hit a target moving faster than light from the surface of the moon, never lose focus, and never lose your mark. Only those with Absolute Agility or Reflexes are safe from your aim.
663. Peak Accuracy,2.6
#Your aim is at the peak of human capability, beyond any master archer or marksman. You can kill a man from a kilometer away with a standard handgun, or pin a fly to the wall with a thrown toothpick. Enhanced or supernatural targets can still slip past you.
664. Acid Empowerment,3.2
#You become stronger, faster and more durable when in contact with acid, and may even draw sustenance or slowed aging from it. Spend too long bathing in the stuff and you may develop a dependency.
665. Acid Immunity,2.5
#You are immune to acid. Caustic substances, corrosives and even most acid-based powers slide off you with no effect. Ultimate Acid and power-bypassing abilities can still get through.
666. Acid Trail,1.9
#Wherever you walk, you leave behind a trail of acid that sizzles and corrodes the ground beneath you. Excellent for ruining floors and discouraging anyone from following you.
667. Acidic Blood,2.7
#Your blood is acidic and pressurized, spurting out under force whenever your skin is pierced. Great deterrent against anyone who tries to cut you, less great when you're trying to bandage a paper cut without melting your furniture.
668. Acidic Bodily Fluids,3.0
#All of your bodily fluids - blood, mucus, saliva, sebum, sweat, urine - are acidic to varying degrees. You may need a specific diet to maintain the corrosive potency, and you'll need to invest heavily in acid-proof clothing.
669. Acidic Mucus,1.4
#Your snot is acidic. Sneezing in public has now become a war crime, and you'll need to invest in a lot of acid-resistant tissues.
670. Acidic Saliva,2.1
#Your saliva is acidic, allowing you to spit corrosive globs at enemies or simply ruin every meal you eat. You may not be fully immune to your own bile, so be careful when biting your tongue.
671. Acidic Slime Mimicry,4.4
#Your body is made of, or can transform completely into, acidic slime. In this form you can squeeze through small gaps, reform from being splattered, and dissolve anything that comes into contact with you, but you carry the standard weaknesses of regular slime.
672. Acidic Sweat,1.7
#Your sweat has corrosive properties, eating through clothing and slowly damaging anything you touch when you perspire. The hotter it gets, the more dangerous you become, but staying hydrated is critical.
673. Acne Mimicry,3.1
#Your body is made of, or can transform completely into, acne. You may transform into an anatomically identical version of yourself made entirely of pimples, or into a homogeneous mass of pus and boils. Vulnerable to popping and acne medication.
674. Acquired Immunity,5.7
#You develop immunity to harmful factors (elements, effects, powers, objects) through exposure. The more you suffer through something, the more resistant you become, and with enough time you may become entirely invulnerable to it. The catch is that the initial exposure must not kill you outright.
675. Action Embodiment,6.6
#You are the living embodiment of the action genre, the concept and conveyance of excitement found in fiction. Explosions happen behind you on cue, you never miss a one-liner, your stunts always succeed, and the laws of physics bend slightly to give you the cooler outcome.
676. Action Empowerment,5.8
#Any action you perform, voluntary or involuntary, makes you stronger, faster, smarter, and more durable. Breathing, blinking, walking, talking, eating, even sneezing all empower you. Given enough time and consistent activity, your growth is functionally unlimited.
677. Adaptation Immunity,5.0
#You are immune to all forms of adaptation powers used against you. Combat adaptation, adaptive attacks, preemptive adaptation and similar powers cannot key into you, leaving even hyper-evolving opponents unable to gain any traction. Does not affect skill-based learning that doesn't physically modify the user.
678. Adaptive Appearance,4.2
#Your appearance shifts based on your adaptations, your form changing to match whatever you have evolved to handle. After enough adaptations you may forget what you originally looked like entirely. Vulnerable to mode lock and shapeshifting negation.
679. Adaptive Augmentation,5.5
#Your body, whether through genetics or cybernetics, is built to adapt. You evolve to overcome whatever situation you find yourself in, your physical form reshaping to better survive whatever environment or threat is testing you.
680. Adaptive Defense,6.4
#Your defenses scale endlessly upward in response to attacks, raising your durability to outscale whatever threat is hitting you and developing immunities to anything used against you twice. With enough time, you become functionally invulnerable to everything you have ever faced, but you must survive the first strike.
681. Adaptive Development,6.0
#You possess a rapid development rate, permanently pushing past your limits within minutes of reaching them. Physical, mental and supernatural growth all stack up endlessly over your lifetime, though the rate slows as your limits become harder to reach. Vulnerable to being defeated quickly before the gap can close.
682. Adaptive Metabolism,5.8
#Your metabolism is supernaturally adaptive, letting you withstand toxins, survive harsh conditions and recover from lethal damage. You learn faster, build muscle faster, and incorporate enhancing drugs permanently into your body. Gradual exposure builds powerful elemental immunities, though truly transcendent threats can still kill you.
683. Adaptive Mind,5.4
#Your mind instantly analyses any environment or situation and deduces the optimal course of action. You are never caught off guard, sudden changes only sharpen you, and you always know the right call to make. Requires sufficient baseline intelligence to actually execute on the conclusions it hands you.
684. Adaptive Movement,3.6
#Your body automatically adjusts the way it moves to fit any environment or situation. Climbing, swimming, sprinting on ice, scrambling across rubble; whatever the terrain demands, your gait, footing and balance shift to match it without thought.
685. Adaptive Power Level,7.4
#Your power level spontaneously rises to match any superior opponent or hardship in front of you. Raw power, speed, durability and skill all keep climbing until the opposition is severely outmatched, and at extreme breaking points you shed into a new super-powerful form entirely. Will not work against true Singularity or Indeterminacy.
686. Adaptive Regeneration,6.8
#You regenerate from injury and adapt against whatever caused it. A scratch makes you harder to scratch, a poison teaches your body to resist that poison, a stronger blow only makes you tougher and possibly stronger. Given enough exposure you become impossible to kill the same way twice, though the regeneration must complete before you can adapt, and instant death effects can still bypass it.
687. Adaptive Resurrection,5.7
#Whenever you are killed, you resurrect with a resistance or outright immunity to whatever method killed you. Each death teaches your body and soul a new lesson, though the effect may not always be permanent and you can still be locked into a deathless vegetative state without ever triggering the resurrection.
688. Adar Llwch Gwin Physiology,4.1
#Welsh Mythology - You either are or can transform into an Adar Llwch Gwin, an enormous raptor of Welsh legend capable of understanding human language and obeying its master without question. Larger and far stronger than any mortal hawk or falcon, though still mortal enough to be wounded like any other great bird.
689. Adaro Physiology,4.0
#Solomon Islands Folklore - You are or can transform into an Adaro, a malevolent shark-like merman born from the wicked half of a soul. You possess gills behind your ears, finned feet, a dorsal horn and a swordfish-like spear growing from your head, along with the lethal aquatic prowess of the spirit itself.
690. Additional Bones,2.8
#Your body has more bones than a regular person. The extra skeletal mass grants greater strength and durability, and can even take the form of new appendages, though hiding them under normal clothing isn't always possible and your organs have to make room.
691. Additional Limbs,3.0
#You possess or can grow additional limbs, extra arms, legs, or even heads. Useful for multitasking, combat and grappling, though depending on how they manifest you may not be able to retract them.
692. Additional Muscles,2.9
#Your body has more muscles than a regular person. The extra musculature grants greater strength and durability, and can even support new appendages, though it makes your build difficult to hide and crowds the organs around it.
693. Adhesion Immunity,1.6
#You are immune to adhesives and adhesion. Glue, tape, sticky webbing, none of it can stick to you, and adhesive-based attacks slide off your body harmlessly.
694. Adhesive Bodily Fluids,2.3
#Your bodily fluids, blood, sweat, saliva, all of it, are powerfully adhesive. Anything they touch ends up stuck, which is excellent for combat and climbing and inconvenient for almost everything else.
695. Adhesive Mimicry,4.1
#Your body is made of, or can transform completely into, adhesive substance. In homogeneous form there is no vital point to strike and damage simply rearranges your mass, though inexperienced users may struggle to return to their original shape.
696. Adhesive Saliva,1.7
#Your saliva is powerfully adhesive. You can spit to stick small objects to surfaces, glue an enemy's hand to their weapon, or seal wounds in a pinch. Limited by how much spit you can produce in a sitting.
697. Adhesive Skin,2.1
#Your skin is sticky on command, letting you climb walls and ceilings like a gecko or hold onto objects without effort. You can toggle the stickiness so you don't get glued to your own bedsheets.
698. Adhesive Tongue,1.6
#Your tongue is long and sticky like a frog's, capable of snatching objects from a distance and holding them firm. Great for grabbing the remote or catching flies mid-air.
699. Adlet Physiology,3.3
#You possess the body of an Adlet, a dog-human hybrid from Inuit legend. You are faster and stronger than any normal human with heightened canine senses, but you are still mortal and vulnerable to Inuit relics and rituals.
700. Advanced Technology Self-Restoration,6.2
#Your body is rebuilt by advanced nanomachines whenever it is damaged, regenerating from cuts, broken bones, lost limbs or even complete physical destruction. Vulnerable to crash codes, malware and EMP-based attacks that can corrupt the rebuilding data.
701. Adventure Embodiment,5.7
#You are the embodiment of adventure itself, the avatar of bold undertakings and the thrill of the unknown. Reality bends to give you new horizons, lucky discoveries and dramatic challenges to overcome. Lose your will for adventure and the power abandons you.
702. Aerial Adaptation,2.6
#Your body is adapted to extreme high or low air pressures, never suffering from altitude sickness, oxygen deprivation or wind buffeting. You are also fully immune to vertigo and any fear of heights.
703. Aerial Balance,2.3
#You possess perfect balance while airborne, never being knocked askew by gusts of wind or sudden impacts. You can stand on a tightrope in a hurricane or stay upright mid-flight no matter what hits you.
704. Aerokinetic Immunity,2.0
#You are completely immune to air and wind, no matter how concentrated. Hurricanes pass over you without ruffling your hair, and pressurized air attacks simply don't register.
705. Aerokinetic Regeneration,4.3
#Your wounds knit themselves back together as long as you can breathe, drawing on the oxygen and nitrogen in the air around you. The richer the atmosphere, the faster you heal; in a vacuum, you're as fragile as anyone else.
706. Aerokinetic Senses,3.5
#Your senses are carried and sharpened by the air itself, letting you hear, smell and feel currents, vibrations and pressure shifts with absolute clarity. Magic and certain drugs can scramble the effect.
707. Aerokinetically Enhanced Agility,2.6
#Air currents subtly buoy and redirect your movements, making you more agile than your body should allow. You twist, dodge and land impossible jumps as the wind itself adjusts under you.
708. Aerokinetically Enhanced Condition,3.5
#Your physical condition is augmented across the board by air manipulation, letting you jump farther, react faster and hit harder than your frame should allow. Pushing the enhancement too long can leave you battered by the very forces enhancing you.
709. Aerokinetically Enhanced Durability,3.4
#Your body is constantly buffered by an invisible layer of pressurized air that absorbs and deflects incoming blows. Hits that should shatter bones get cushioned into bruises, although durability negation cuts straight through.
710. Aerokinetically Enhanced Speed,3.2
#Air parts around you and propels you forward, dropping your wind resistance to nothing and adding jet-like thrust to your stride. Take you out of contact with open air and you're back to your baseline.
711. Aerokinetically Enhanced Stamina,2.5
#The air around you feeds your endurance, letting you exert yourself far longer than your lungs and muscles should allow. As long as you can breathe, you can keep going.
712. Aerokinetically Enhanced Strength,3.3
#Air pressure and currents amplify your muscles whenever you exert yourself, letting you tear open massive objects and land wind-aided blows that hit far harder than your frame should allow.
713. Aeroscience,5.4
#You possess complete omniscience over everything related to the air, the skies, gases, vacuums, weather and the atmosphere. Any secret carried on the wind or hidden in the sky is laid bare to you, although your knowledge stops where the air ends.
714. Aesthetic Activity,2.8
#Every motion you make carries an inherent grace and beauty that draws the eye. Onlookers find themselves entranced by the way you move, fight and act, although your joints still get tired and sore like anyone else's.
715. Aether Embodiment,8.5
#You are the Aether incarnate, the living celestial element itself. You have limitless control over Aether and can manifest it in any form you wish, from elemental forces to spiritual essence to primordial creation. Your only true weakness is the Nether, the antithesis of what you embody.
716. Aether Empowerment,3.6
#You become stronger, faster and more durable when in contact with Aether, with the celestial element potentially unlocking new abilities related to your affinity. With enough exposure, you may even draw sustenance from it and slow your aging significantly.
717. Aether Physiology,7.8
#Your body is made of Aether itself, the celestial element that binds the universe together. You can transform fully or partially into pure quintessence and wield divine abilities involving the elements, the cosmos, the spiritual and the primordial. To most beings you are essentially invincible.
718. Afanc Physiology,3.2
#You are or can transform into an Afanc, a Welsh lake monster variously described as resembling a crocodile, beaver, dwarf-like creature or platypus. You possess enhanced aquatic physical abilities and a demonic edge, though you remain vulnerable to monster slayers.
719. African Wild Dog Physiology,2.8
#You are or can transform into an African wild dog, gaining their lean musculature, incredible stamina and pack-hunting instincts. Few land predators can outlast you in a chase, and your bite force is disproportionate to your size.
720. Afrosoricida Physiology,1.9
#You are or can transform into an afrosoricid such as a tenrec, otter shrew or golden mole. You gain their burrowing instincts and surprising resilience for their size, but you are limited by being small, often nocturnal and rather poor of eyesight.
721. Afterlife Embodiment,7.3
#You are the afterlife made flesh, heaven, hell, limbo and purgatory all walking around in one body. The dead are drawn to you, the laws of the hereafter bend around your presence, and wherever you stand can become the final resting place of anything that dies there.
722. Afterlife Transcendence,8.1
#You have ascended past the afterlife itself into a state of true liberation, a place of perfect rest and freedom beyond heaven, hell, and everything between. Untethered from the borders of life and death, you can travel freely through either and even back to the original source of existence itself.
723. Agathodaemon Physiology,5.7
#You are or can transform into an agathodaemon, a noble Greek companion spirit tied to personal destinies, good fortune, wealth, health, harvests, and the home. As a guardian spirit you bring luck and protection to those in your charge, though your eternal enemies the cacodemons exist to undo everything you build.
724. Age Empowerment,6.3
#You grow exponentially stronger with every year you're alive, your body and skills sharpening on their own as time passes. Without some form of immortality you'll still die of natural causes eventually, but if you last, your ceiling climbs forever.
725. Agile Body Parts,2.3
#Your limbs and body parts can change direction and speed with absurd ease, allowing unpredictable attack angles and strange, jerky motions. May need reinforced muscle bonds to keep the parts from flying off entirely when you whip them around.
726. Agility/Absolute,9.0
#Your agility, reflexes, and motor coordination are infinite. You stand at the pinnacle of every being in the multiverse when it comes to movement, and actually landing a hit on you is virtually impossible. Only another with agility of the same tier could ever hope to touch you.
727. Agility/Supernatural,5.6
#Your agility, reflexes, balance, and coordination are vastly beyond human, enough to dodge projectiles moving several times faster than light. You are one of the most agile beings in your verse, though absolute-tier attacks and Absolute Agility users will still outmaneuver you.
728. Agility,3.3
#Your agility surpasses Olympic-level athletes across the board, with flexibility, balance, coordination, reflexes, and speed all pushed to the top of human capability. You could be the world's finest dancer, martial artist, or gymnast with the proper training.
729. Aging Immunity,4.3
#You are immune to the negative effects of aging, your body staying at its physical prime regardless of the years. You still technically grow older and can still be pushed past your lifespan by outside forces, but the slow decay of time itself no longer touches you.
730. Agropelter Physiology,3.2
#You are or can transform into an Agropelter, an ape-like cryptid with long prehensile limbs that haunts the woods of North America. You possess the arm strength to tear branches from trees and hurl them with devastating accuracy. Highly territorial, especially toward lumberjacks.
731. Ahkiyyini Physiology,5.7
#Inuit Mythology - You are or can transform into an Ahkiyyini, a destructive sea-demon resembling a giant skeleton that beats upon mystic drums to summon tidal waves and earthquakes. You embody the ocean's most violent and unpredictable nature. Vulnerable to certain Inuit rituals and prayers.
732. Ahuizotl Physiology,4.6
#Aztec Mythology - You are or can transform into an Ahuizotl, a water dog-like being with waterproof fur that clumps into spikes. You possess hands on your limbs and an additional grasping hand on your tail, perfect for snatching prey and dragging them into the depths. You hunger for human flesh, especially nails, eyes and teeth.
733. Aigamuxa Physiology,4.1
#African Folklore - You are or can transform into an Aigamuxa, a horrific desert-dwelling monster with eyes on the soles of its feet. You possess immense strength, terrifying speed, and long deadly teeth, but to see your prey you must stand on your hands. Aggressive, cruel, and easily outwitted by clever opponents.
734. Air Consumption,2.7
#You can consume and digest air to sustain your body and fuel your powers. You'll never need to eat again, but if you're sealed in a vacuum, you'll starve just like anyone else.
735. Air Embodiment,7.5
#You are the physical manifestation of the element of air itself. The Wind made flesh. Your control over air, wind, and atmosphere is essentially limitless, bound only by your knowledge and skill. May be weak against earth-aligned beings of equivalent rank.
736. Air Empowerment,3.6
#You become stronger, faster, and more durable when in contact with air or wind, unlocking and amplifying related abilities. Some users can even draw sustenance from the air itself or slow their aging in windy environments.
737. Air Soul,4.4
#Your very soul is made of air. You can manifest it outside your body, channel its winds into various aerokinetic abilities, and tap into the affinities of elemental spirits, sylphs and sky deities. Vulnerable to soul-based attacks like any other soul.
738. Air Symbiosis,4.2
#You play host to an air-based being or wind force inside your body, gaining powerful aerokinetic abilities from the bond. The entity may try to take over your mind or body, and the airy force itself can become overwhelming if not properly managed.
739. Aka Manto Physiology,4.6
#You either are or can mimic the traits of an Aka Manto, a malevolent toilet-demon from Japanese folklore who haunts cursed bathroom stalls in a red cape. You possess immense supernatural strength within your stall and can offer cruel choices to victims who enter, but you are powerless outside of designated bathrooms and vulnerable to Shinto rites.
740. Aka Shita Physiology,4.3
#You either are or can transform into an Aka Shita, a vengeful spirit with a monstrous red tongue, sharp fangs and claws, the rest of your body obscured by a dark cloud you can dwell within. You manifest to punish those who steal water during droughts, lapping it up with your enormous tongue, but you are bound by your role as a spirit of vengeance.
741. Akaei Physiology,5.7
#You either are or can transform into an Akaei, a colossal stingray sea-monster from Japanese folklore that can reach 12 kilometers in length. Your sheer size lets sailors mistake your back for an island, and your every movement creates whirlpools strong enough to sink fleets, though you are not malicious by nature.
742. Akaname Physiology,2.2
#You either are or can transform into an Akaname, an ugly little yokai with a horrendously elongated tongue used to lap up filth in neglected bathrooms. You are a harbinger of disease and misfortune but are easily warded off by basic hygiene.
743. Akhlut Physiology,4.7
#You either are or can transform into an Akhlut, a man-eating sea-demon from Inuit folklore that takes the form of an orca, a wolf, or a fearsome hybrid of both. Intelligent, ruthless and built to hunt humans across both land and sea, but vulnerable to Inuit rites.
744. Akkorokamui Physiology,6.6
#You either are or can transform into Akkorokamui, a divine octopus-monster from Ainu folklore reaching 120 meters in length, your striking red body glowing like the setting sun on water. Your enormous staring eyes and noxious dark ink make you a terror of the deep, and your divine nature grants you reverence as well as power.
745. Akuchu Physiology,1.4
#You either are or can transform into an Akuchu, a microscopic insect-like yokai with six sharp claws used to grasp a victim's spleen and steal the nourishment from their food. Useful for sabotaging diets, easily cured by Chinese thistle medicine.
746. Al-Mi'raj Physiology,3.0
#You either are or can transform into Al-Mi'raj, a carnivorous rabbit from Arabian mythology with a sharp unicorn-like horn. Surprisingly aggressive and far stronger than a rabbit has any right to be.
747. Ala Physiology,5.4
#You either are or can transform into an Ala, a female storm-demon from Slavic mythology who leads hailstorms and thunderclouds to ruin crops and devour children. Your gluttony extends to the heavens, and you have been known to try and swallow the Sun or Moon, but you are the sworn enemy of dragons and dragon-blooded men.
748. Alan Physiology,3.3
#You either are or can transform into an alan, a deformed avian trickster spirit with backwards-pointing fingers and toes. You raise abandoned children and even shape miscarried fetuses into kin of your own, though you can be controlled by wielders of Mythical Beast Manipulation.
749. Alces Physiology,2.3
#You either are or can transform into an Alces, also known as a moose or Eurasian elk. Imposing antlers, surprising speed, and the kind of stubborn weight that wins arguments with cars.
750. Alchemic Symbiosis,5.0
#You host an alchemy-based entity within yourself, a homunculus, a transmutation spirit, or even an embodiment of alchemy itself, gaining its power as your own. Be warned that powerful alchemic entities may try to take over your body, or simply burn it out from the inside.
751. Alchemical Dragon Physiology,6.4
#You either are or can transform into an Alchemical Dragon, a rare breed of dragon either created through alchemy or born with mastery over it. You possess all the standard might of a dragon plus the ability to transmute matter, brew vital essences, and reshape your own body through hermetic art.
752. Alchemical Symbol Empowerment,3.6
#You become stronger, faster and more durable in the presence of alchemical symbols, possibly drawing sustenance from them or unlocking related abilities. Without symbols nearby you are merely your baseline self.
753. Alchemy Empowerment,3.7
#You grow stronger, faster and more durable in the presence of alchemy and alchemic substances, possibly drawing sustenance from them or even slowing your aging. Without a hermetic source nearby, you are reduced to your baseline self.
754. Alcohol Empowerment,3.2
#Drunken Master - You become stronger, faster and more durable when alcohol is in your system or nearby, and your sloshed movements throw enemies off balance. The deeper you drink the stronger you get, but you are very likely to develop alcoholism and may lose yourself entirely in the bender.
755. Alcohol Immunity,1.5
#You cannot get drunk, no matter how much you put away. Hangovers, alcoholism and liver damage simply do not apply to you. Truly tragic if you actually enjoy the buzz.
756. Alcohol Mimicry,3.5
#Your body is made of alcohol, or can transform into it at will. You can shift between human form and homogeneous liquor, becoming wine, vodka or even rubbing alcohol. Just be careful not to get drunk by someone.
757. Alebrije Physiology,4.6
#You are or can transform into an alebrije, a brightly colored mixed-animal hybrid beast from Mexican folklore. Your form combines traits from multiple animals into a single vibrant supernatural creature, granting you a chimeric mix of physical abilities and a mystical presence.
758. Algal Physiology,2.8
#Your body is made of or can transform into algal matter. You can shift into a homogeneous slime form or retain your shape with all organs intact, just made of green photosynthetic muck.
759. Alicorn Physiology,5.8
#You are or can transform into an alicorn, a winged unicorn possessing the powers of both pegasi and unicorns. You can fly, channel horn-magic, and embody the regal presence of mythological royalty all at once.
760. Alien Animal Physiology,4.8
#You are or can transform into an extraterrestrial animal of nearly any conceivable design. Given the infinite variety of alien fauna in fiction, your possible powers are absurdly broad, but the form you mimic may need a specific environment to survive and may not have human intelligence.
761. Alien Blood,3.0
#Your blood is of extraterrestrial origin, sometimes possessing strange and unpredictable properties along with unusual coloration like green, blue, purple or black. The exact effects depend on what kind of alien you are descended from.
762. Alien Canine Physiology,4.4
#You are or can transform into an extraterrestrial canine, possessing whatever traits your specific alien-dog form provides. May need a particular environment to survive long term and the form may not retain human intelligence.
763. Alien Crustacean Physiology,4.3
#You are or can transform into an extraterrestrial crustacean, a chitin-plated horror from beyond the stars. Whatever exotic traits your alien shell carries are yours to wield, though Alien Slayers and Alien Manipulators are your natural enemies.
764. Alien Dinosaur Physiology,5.4
#You are or can transform into an extraterrestrial dinosaur. Given the infinite possibilities of alien evolution, your form could possess nearly any trait, from acid blood to gravity-defying scales, alongside the raw physical might of a prehistoric apex predator. May require a specific atmosphere to thrive.
765. Alien Divinity,7.8
#You possess an eldritch form of divinity, your divine source foreign to any pantheon known to this cosmos. You wield raw divine power untethered from the rules that bind local gods, making you an alien holy being whose very nature warps the expectations of mortals and immortals alike. Vulnerable to divine slayers.
766. Alien Dragon Physiology,6.2
#You are or can transform into an alien dragon, a creature whose draconic majesty was forged on a world that never knew Earth. Your combat instincts are razor-sharp, your genes are pristine, and you can evolve in beneficial directions far faster than any normal beast. Your powers and weaknesses differ wildly from any dragon of legend.
767. Alien Feline Physiology,4.3
#You are or can transform into an extraterrestrial feline. Imagine a tiger from a world with twice Earth's gravity and venom in its claws, then keep going. Your specific traits depend on which alien feline you embody.
768. Alien Hybrid Physiology,5.0
#You are the offspring of two or more alien species, whether through mating or genetic experimentation. You inherit a mixed bag of traits and powers from your alien parents, though you may also inherit some of their weaknesses.
769. Alien Insect Physiology,4.5
#You are or can transform into an extraterrestrial being that fuses alien biology with insectoid traits. Chitin from another star, compound eyes that see frequencies no Earth bug ever could, and the tireless drone of a hive carved by an alien evolution.
770. Alien Kaiju Physiology,7.0
#You are or can transform into an alien kaiju, a colossal monster born of extraterrestrial origin. Your size, raw destructive power, and otherworldly biology make you a city-leveler at minimum, with specific traits varying based on which alien titan you embody.
771. Alien Mind,5.7
#Your mind is wired in a way no human, demon or god would call sane. Telepathy bounces off, mind control fizzles, and anyone foolish enough to peek inside your psyche risks their own sanity shattering against the eldritch geometry of your thoughts. Indomitable will users may endure briefly before breaking.
772. Alien Monster Physiology,5.6
#You are or can transform into an extraterrestrial monstrosity. Your form is something between predator and nightmare, drawn from a biology that simply has nothing to compare with on Earth, making you both terrifying and incredibly difficult to predict in combat.
773. Alien Physiology,5.3
#You are or can transform into an alien, a life form that originates from beyond Earth. Given the near-infinite variety of possible extraterrestrials, your specific powers and traits could be almost anything, from acidic blood to psionic dominion to silicon-based immortality.
774. Alien Reincarnation,5.4
#You are the reincarnation of an alien entity, inheriting some of the extraterrestrial powers of your previous incarnation. The further you push, the more you may unlock memories and abilities from the being you used to be.
775. Alien Reptile Physiology,4.4
#You are or can transform into a reptilian alien. Cold-blooded does not begin to describe what evolved on whatever distant world you were modelled after, your scales housing biology that no Earth herpetologist could even begin to classify.
776. Alien Soul,5.6
#Your soul, or souls, belong to various alien beings, each one carrying a different set of abilities. Your spirit is layered like a chorus of foreign minds, granting you a versatility that mortal souls simply cannot match. Vulnerable to soul absorption.
777. All-Terrain Mobility,2.3
#You move across any terrain with perfect traction, whether it is loose sand, sheer ice, mud, gravel, or dense undergrowth. Slopes, slippery surfaces and unstable footing simply do not affect your balance, making you a natural at parkour and off-road traversal.
778. Alloy Mimicry,3.9
#You can transform your body partially or fully into any alloy of your choosing, gaining the physical properties of whatever metal you choose. A steel form makes you blade-resistant, a brass form makes you corrosion-resistant, but you also inherit the weaknesses of whatever you become.
779. Ally Empowerment,3.7
#The closer your allies are to you, the stronger you become. Standing next to a friend boosts your strength, speed and durability, and a full team beside you can amplify your abilities to several times their baseline. The bond has to be real though, mere acquaintances barely count.
780. Almighty Object Fusion,8.0
#You can permanently fuse with any almighty artifact, relic, or supremely powerful object, gaining its powers as your own forever. The catch is that the fusion may feed on your life force, and you can never separate yourself from the object once the bond is made.
781. Almighty Symbiosis,8.6
#You host or are bonded to an almighty entity, gaining virtually unlimited power within your universe through the connection. The entity provides the strength, but as with most symbiosis, there is always a price, whether it be your soul, your body, or pieces of your identity over time.
782. Alp-Luachra Physiology,3.1
#Celtic Mythology - You are or can transform into an alp-luachra, a newt-like fairy that crawls into sleeping people's mouths and eats half the essence of the food they have eaten. You sustain yourself by leeching nutrition from others without them knowing, though salted meat near a stream can lure you out against your will.
783. Alraune Physiology,3.3
#You are or can transform into an alraune, a plant monster shaped like a human woman with floral traits, born from the blood of executed men soaked into fertile soil. You possess the alraune's amorous, soulless nature and plant-based body, vulnerable to fire and blades but capable of seducing nearly anyone who crosses your path.
784. Altered Chemistry,4.5
#Your body is governed by an entirely different set of chemical laws than the rest of the universe. Your atomic structure, biochemistry, and the way matter reacts with you all work on rules nobody else can predict. You might generate impossible compounds just by sweating, or be utterly immune to substances that would kill anyone else, but you may also have bizarre weaknesses you do not yet understand.
785. Altered Interaction,5.2
#You interact with reality differently than everyone else around you. Friction speeds you up instead of slowing you down, hard surfaces feel soft when you touch them, gravity might pull you sideways, and so on. The exact rules are unique to you and not always under your control, which can be both a blessing and a serious hazard.
786. Altered Physics,6.6
#You are governed by entirely different physical laws than the rest of the universe. Conservation of energy, inertia, gravity, the math behind kinetic energy, all of these apply to you in ways nobody can predict. You might fall up, accelerate without effort, or shrug off impacts that would flatten a tank, but the rules are not always under your control.
787. Alternate Digestion,1.6
#You can digest food through body parts other than your mouth and stomach, like your ears, your skin, or whatever else you fancy. Useful for eating discreetly or surviving when your normal digestive system is compromised, though some foods may not break down properly through unconventional channels.
788. Alternate Respiration,1.6
#You can breathe through means other than your mouth or nostrils, such as your skin or ears. Useful when gagged, drowning, or in a smoky room, though you may only be able to sustain it for limited periods.
789. Alternate-Self Consistency,3.2
#You and every alternate version of yourself across the multiverse share the same personality, appearance, powers, ambitions and desires regardless of the world they were born into. This makes Alternate-Self Mimicry and Transformation effectively useless against you, but your alternates can never grow too far from the core that binds you all.
790. Alternative Communication,3.0
#Your method of communication is so radically alien that outsiders find it physically impossible to understand, overhear or reproduce. You may speak through dreams, memories, natural phenomena or means with no basis in the physical world at all. Users of Telepathic Translation or Linguistic Assimilation may eventually crack it.
791. Alternative Medicine Empowerment,3.9
#You become stronger, faster and more durable in the presence of alternative medicine, possibly drawing nourishment from it or slowing your aging. Without a source of alternative medicine to feed on, you may grow noticeably weaker.
792. Alternative Sustenance,3.1
#You can sustain yourself through unusual means rather than the traditional eating, drinking and sleeping. Sunlight, moonlight, fire, metal, or simply standing inverted in meditation can all keep you going, depending on what your body has adapted to.
793. Alternative Thinking,3.6
#Your way of thinking is so radically different from the norm that you process information in ways no one else would consider, often coming off as insane or nonsensical. You can solve puzzles others can't, formulate strategies they'd never see coming, and catch opponents completely off guard, though your alien thought process may also work against you in mundane life.
794. Amabie Physiology,4.5
#You either are or can transform into an Amabie, a long-haired mermaid-like yōkai with a scaly body, beak-like mouth and three legs. When you emerge from the sea you can prophesize abundant harvests or coming epidemics, and likenesses of you ward off illness.
795. Amanojaku Physiology,4.1
#You are an Amanojaku, a malevolent little demon from Japanese folklore that delights in corrupting humans into wickedness. You possess minor physical enhancements, a knack for tempting others toward evil deeds and a talent for mischief, but you are vulnerable to Shinto rituals and prayers.
796. Amazake Baba Physiology,3.2
#You are an Amazake Baba, an ugly yokai-hag who wanders door to door begging for sake. Anyone who answers your call is struck with illness and misfortune, typically a lingering common cold, though your curses can be warded off by cedar branches and proper signs.
797. Amazon Physiology,4.7
#Greek Mythology - You are an Amazon, a member of the legendary all-female warrior race blessed by the gods. You possess enhanced strength, speed, durability and reflexes well beyond any human, alongside an intuitive aptitude for archery, horsemanship, swordsmanship and hand-to-hand combat.
798. Ambition Embodiment,6.3
#You embody the very concept of Ambition, the burning drive for success and greatness. Your words sway hearts with frightening ease, you naturally gather loyal followers and armies to your banner, and your strength grows the higher you set your sights. Without ambition of your own, however, the power gives you nothing.
799. Ambition Empowerment,4.0
#You grow stronger, faster and more durable in proportion to the ambition burning within yourself and those around you. The grander your goals, the more your existing powers flourish, and some of the most ambitious users have been said to slow or even stop their own aging.
800. Ame Onna Physiology,3.4
#You are an Ame Onna, a malicious yokai-hag from Japanese folklore who appears only during rainstorms. You lap rainwater from your hands like an animal, possess minor weather influence over rain, and carry a large sack to spirit away children, though Shinto prayers and rituals can drive you off.
801. Amefuri Kozo Physiology,3.3
#You are an Amefuri Kozo, a small ugly-cute child-like yokai serving the Japanese god of rain. You can summon rainfall in localised areas, are well liked by kitsune and other rain-aligned spirits, and have an irresistible compulsion to steal umbrellas and wear them on your head.
802. Amesha Spenta Physiology,6.5
#You possess the traits and abilities of an Amesha Spenta, one of the seven divine emanations of Ahura Mazda from Zoroastrian myth. You are the equivalent of an archangel, wielding sacred authority, immense divine power and dominion over a particular aspect of creation such as truth, devotion or immortality.
803. Amorphous Physiology,5.3
#Your body is composed of a flexible amorphous substance with no vital organs or fixed shape. Physical attacks merely reorganise your form harmlessly, since every part of your mass is molecularly identical, and with practice you can change your shape, density and texture at will.
804. Amphibian Adaptation,2.3
#Your body is adapted to thrive in both water and on land. You can breathe underwater indefinitely, swim with ease, and your skin handles the transition between wet and dry environments without any of the usual problems that plague land or water dwellers.
805. Amphibian Physiology,2.9
#You are or can transform into an amphibian, such as a frog, toad, salamander or caecilian. You gain their natural abilities including moist skin breathing, powerful jumping legs or a long sticky tongue, though your eating habits and need for ambient warmth will likely change in unpleasant ways.
806. Amphibianoid Physiology,3.0
#You are an amphibianoid, a humanoid with the traits of frogs, toads or other amphibians. You possess a powerful tongue, sticky pads on your fingers, can breathe through your skin and swim with ease. You must keep your skin moist or you will suffer.
807. Amphiptere Physiology,4.6
#You are or can transform into an amphiptere, a winged serpent that can range from the size of a regular snake to something closely resembling a dragon. You possess potent venom, scales harder than steel and the ability to fly, though your flight may be clumsy and you grow sluggish in the cold.
808. Anachronism,5.7
#You are a temporal anomaly, born into the wrong era or timeline as if it were your proper place. You age and move at a pace that defies the normal flow of time, are highly resistant to temporal abilities and can survive in time-irregular dimensions. You may also have intuitive flashes of knowledge from your true era.
809. Ancestral Paradox Immunity,6.2
#You exist independent of your own history. If someone were to travel back in time and kill your ancestors, you would still exist as if nothing had changed. You are immune to grandfather paradoxes and other temporal tampering with your lineage, though others may forget you exist as a side effect.
810. Ancestral Reincarnation,4.3
#You are the reincarnation of one of your own ancestors. The memories, skills and powers of your past life are far easier to access than they would be otherwise, given the shared blood. You may have to retrain your body to handle abilities your past self once wielded.
811. Ancient Alien Physiology,5.3
#You are an ancient alien, an unearthly creature from a long-forgotten era of the cosmos. Your physiology is wholly inhuman and grants you traits no Earthly biology could match, the exact nature of which depends on what kind of ancient star-being you happen to be.
812. Ancient Arthropod Physiology,3.6
#You are or have the traits of an ancient arthropod, possibly a meter-long centipede, a sea scorpion the size of a man, or a giant prehistoric dragonfly. You possess chitinous armor, multiple limbs and the brutal lethality of creatures from a time when bugs ruled the Earth.
813. Ancient Cephalopod Physiology,3.7
#You are or have the traits of an ancient cephalopod, perhaps an ammonite or one of the towering orthocones that once ruled the prehistoric seas. You possess powerful tentacles, a sharp beak, jet propulsion and the alien intelligence of one of nature's strangest predators.
814. Ancient Echinoderm Physiology,3.0
#You are or have the traits of an ancient echinoderm, such as a sea urchin, sea star, or sea lily from a forgotten era. You possess radial symmetry, regenerative limbs and a hardened exoskeleton, your body alien even by Earth standards.
815. Ancient Fish Physiology,3.4
#You are or have the traits of an ancient fish, perhaps a Dunkleosteus with armored plating and bone-crushing jaws, or a leviathan-sized Megalodon. You possess incredible strength, an aquatic body and the predatory instincts of an apex hunter from forgotten seas.
816. Ancient Mammal Physiology,4.0
#You are or can turn into an ancient mammal, ranging from a sabertooth tiger to a woolly mammoth or a giant ground sloth. You gain the physical might, fur, tusks, claws and survival instincts of creatures that once dominated the Ice Age.
817. Ancient Reptile Physiology,4.8
#You are or can turn into an ancient reptile, possibly a dinosaur, pterosaur or marine reptile from the prehistoric past. The exact form varies wildly, but each grants apex-predator physiology, devastating natural weapons and the raw power of a creature that once ruled the world.
818. Ancient Robot Physiology,4.2
#You are or can transform into an ancient robot, built with bygone mechanics, primitive fuel sources and predetermined operation sequences. Despite the archaic design, some primordial models rival or surpass modern machines, possessing surprising durability and self-operating routines.
819. Android Physiology,4.0
#You are or can transform into an android, a robotic being designed to imitate organic human life. Your synthetic frame is built from artificial organic-like material, granting you mechanical reliability while still allowing you to pass for human in most interactions.
820. Anemoi Physiology,6.6
#Greek Mythology - You are or can transform into an Anemoi, a Greco-Roman wind deity embodying the four directional winds and their associated seasons. You wield divine authority over air, weather phenomena and the changing of seasons, ruling spring, summer, autumn or winter as a god.
821. Angel Dragon Physiology,6.0
#You are or can transform into an angelic dragon, a hybrid of dragon and angel possessing the abilities of both. Your presence radiates a surreal, holy and benevolent atmosphere, making you rarer and more mystical than a standard dragon, but you remain vulnerable to unholy forces and the risk of falling.
822. Angel Machine Physiology,6.3
#You are or can transform into a bionic being infused with angelic power, an android or cyborg of celestial origin. Your divine machinery allows you to level entire areas and overwhelm foes with holy firepower, though demonic forces remain a threat.
823. Angel Physiology Superior,6.2
#You are an empowered angel, granted brand new abilities on top of your already coexisting angelic power set. As a Superangel you wield powers far beyond a normal angel and possess the intellect to use them constructively, placing you well above the standard celestial host.
824. Angel Physiology Transcendent,8.4
#You are an angelic being of godly power, the absolute pinnacle of the heavenly host. No ordinary angel could ever hope to equal you, granting you the highest rank in Heaven and the potential to rule entire universes single-handedly, or even forge your own creation parallel to the existing one.
825. Angel Physiology,5.4
#You possess the traits and abilities of an angel, a being connected to higher powers. You manifest the typical wings, inner glow and halo, with enhanced strength, divine senses and holy energy, though you remain vulnerable to falling from grace and to demonic forces.
826. Angel Soul,4.7
#Your spiritual essence is angelic, your very soul that of an angel walking among men. This grants you supernatural abilities on an angelic level, though some of your powers may lie dormant under the suppression of a higher authority until they are unlocked.
827. Angelic Beast Physiology,5.3
#You are or can transform into an angelic beast, an animal of divine origin or an angel permanently in beast form. Your natural traits are written supernaturally large with vast size and divine reinforcement, you do not die of natural causes, and you often possess holy powers tied to nature.
828. Angelic Beauty,5.1
#You are an angelic being of supernatural beauty, your human or winged form embodying celestial perfection that draws all eyes. In your true form, however, your beauty becomes so overwhelming that mortals cannot gaze upon you without harm, reflecting both holy fear and love.
829. Angelic Power Immunity,5.4
#You are immune to angelic powers and effects, allowing you to go toe-to-toe with angels without fear of their holy abilities. However, archangels and transcendent angels may still be able to push through, and Power Negation can bypass it entirely.
830. Angelic Power Link,4.0
#Your angelic nature is directly linked to your powers, fueling and amplifying them through your sacred essence. The stronger your divine grace, the stronger your abilities, but if your angelic nature destabilizes, your powers may go out of control.
831. Angelic Source,6.6
#You possess the divine grace of an angel, granting you raw holy power far beyond the mundane. This makes you a divine being by nature, whether by birth, ancestry, transformation, or evolution into angelhood. Vulnerable to Divine Slayers and Divinity Nullification.
832. Angelic Wings,5.0
#You possess one or more pairs of angelic wings that you can manifest at will. Beyond flight, they let you teleport between dimensions, channel healing and magic, aid in combat, and serve as the vessel for your angelic power. In some worlds, losing them would render you mortal.
833. Angelic-Alien Physiology,6.4
#You are a cosmic angel, a being that fuses the holy grace of angelhood with the otherworldly nature of an alien species. You possess the powers and traits of both, though you may also inherit the weaknesses of each. Demonic-Alien hybrids are your natural rivals.
834. Angelic-Undead Physiology,6.5
#You are an angelic undead, fusing the raw holy power of an angel with the relentless resilience of the undead. Your presence purifies all around you both physically and spiritually, and you can blend angelic and necrotic energies for hybrid effects no pure being could replicate. Falling from grace would be catastrophic.
835. Anger Empowerment,4.3
#Your strength, speed, durability and powers all increase the angrier you become, whether the rage is your own or drawn from those around you. At the highest levels of fury you can suppress pain entirely and even negate weaker abilities, though you may lash out at allies if you lose control.
836. Angular Adaptation,2.6
#Your body adapts perfectly to any angle, allowing you to run, fight, and act with full proficiency while tilted in positions that would topple anyone else. Combine with Positional Adaptation for true freedom of movement.
837. Anima-Dragon Physiology,6.8
#You are or can transform into an Anima Dragon, a rare breed of dragon that embodies life force itself. You possess all the standard might of a dragon, scales, claws, breath weapon, alongside potent life-force manipulation, healing, and life energy generation. Vulnerable to anti-life and death force powers.
838. Animal Hybrid Physiology,4.3
#You are a hybrid born of two or more animal species, blending the traits and capabilities of each into a single body. Your specific powers depend on the parentage, and you may inherit weaknesses alongside the strengths.
839. Animal Life-Force,4.0
#Your very life essence is animalistic, making you an animal among men. You possess supernatural abilities on a beastly level, with sharper instincts, raw vitality, and a primal edge to everything you do. Unlike Animal Soul, this is not necessarily spiritual in nature.
840. Animal Power Link,3.3
#Your powers are linked to an internal animal force that fuels and amplifies them. The stronger your bond with your inner beast, the stronger your abilities become.
841. Animal Senses,3.5
#You possess the combined senses of all animals in human form, letting you switch between the night vision of an owl, the smell of a bloodhound, the hearing of a bat and so on. Strong scents and sounds can overwhelm you if you're not careful.
842. Animal Soul,3.2
#Your soul is animal in origin, even though your body is human. You possess subtle traits and instincts of your inner beast and may need time to learn to control them.
843. Animal Speed,3.6
#You possess the speed of all animals in human form, able to dash like a cheetah, dart like a hummingbird, and react with the reflexes of a mantis shrimp. Your maximum speed scales with your physical condition.
844. Animal Speedster Physiology,5.1
#You possess the physiology of a speedster animal, a humanoid beast built for unnatural speed. Your body is optimized for movement at speeds that would tear a normal creature apart, though you may share some weaknesses of the animal you embody.
845. Animal Strength,3.8
#You possess the strength of all animals in human form, channeling the might of elephants, the bite of crocodiles, the grip of gorillas and more. Your durability does not scale with your strength, so you can still hurt yourself swinging too hard.
846. Animalia Symbiosis,4.4
#Your body hosts an animal symbiote, a living creature that grants you bestial powers, enhanced instincts, shapeshifting and a sturdier physique in exchange for sharing your body. The symbiote is intelligent and usually cooperative, but its weaknesses become yours and it may try to take over if mistreated.
847. Animation Retention,3.6
#You retain your ability to live, think and act even when transformed into stone, ice, glass or any other inanimate substance. Being frozen solid or petrified will not stop you from moving or thinking, though you may still inherit the weaknesses of whatever you've been turned into.
848. Anime and Manga Physics,5.7
#The laws of physics around you are quietly rewritten to follow anime and manga logic. Hair defies gravity, dramatic speeches slow time, training arcs actually work, wounds heal between scenes and impossible feats become possible if your spirit is high enough. The downside is that you also inherit anime weaknesses like nosebleeds at inopportune moments.
849. Aniwye Physiology,4.6
#You are or can transform into an Aniwye, the monstrous primordial giant skunk of Native American legend. In this form you possess immense size, predatory strength and a stench so foul it can kill a victim instantly. Be warned that the Aniwye's hunger for human flesh comes with the body.
850. Ankle Wing Manifestation,3.0
#You manifest small wings on your ankles, allowing you to fly while also enhancing your speed, balance and agility on the ground. They can be retracted at will and look properly mythic, like something Hermes would wear.
851. Annelidanoid Physiology,3.3
#You are an annelidanoid, a humanoid race descended from or related to annelid worms. You possess regenerative segmentation, a flexible boneless body that can squeeze through narrow gaps, and burrowing capabilities.
852. Anomalocaris Physiology,3.4
#You possess the traits of Anomalocaris, the apex super-predator of the Cambrian seas. You have a streamlined armored body, powerful swimming lobes, large compound eyes for sharp vision, and a circular grasping mouth lined with hooked appendages perfect for crushing prey.
853. Anseriformoid Physiology,2.9
#You are an anseriformoid, a humanoid waterfowl race. You possess a beak, webbed feet, water-resistant feathers and the ability to swim and dive with ease. Some lineages can also fly short distances.
854. Antenna Protrusion,2.2
#You can manifest antennae from your head, granting enhanced sensory detection of smells, movement and air pressure. Some users can also use them as telepathic focuses or to channel energy attacks.
855. Antfolk Physiology,3.5
#You are an antfolk, a humanoid ant hybrid race. You possess chitinous armor, mandibles, multiple times your bodyweight in lifting strength, pheromone communication and the strict hive-mindset that comes with being descended from the most successful colonial insects on Earth.
856. Anthozoa Physiology,3.2
#You possess the body of an anthozoa, with polyps that can divide and grow rapidly across your body. These polyps can support symbiotic sea-life and you regenerate easily by budding new tissue. You are essentially part coral, part anemone and part something stranger.
857. Anthrocephalic Physiology,2.6
#You are an animal with a human head and face. You retain the body and instincts of your animal form but have a fully human face capable of speech and expression. Talking horse, talking owl, your call.
858. Anthropophagist Monster Physiology,4.2
#You are or can transform into a cannibal monster, the kind born from the curse of eating human flesh. Wendigo, ghoul, jikininki, take your pick. You possess immense physical abilities and supernatural hunger but are often feral and impulsive, with each subspecies carrying its own unique weakness.
859. Anti-Adhesion,2.3
#Nothing sticks to you. Sand, paint, tar, water, glue, all of it slides right off your body. You can also disrupt the adhesion of others, making wallcrawlers slip and sticky things fail. Surprisingly useful for keeping a clean shirt.
860. Anti-Energy Empowerment,4.8
#You become stronger, faster and more durable in the presence of anti-energy. You can draw sustenance from anti-energetic forces and your existing powers may be enhanced or unlocked further by sustained exposure. Slows your aging the more anti-energy you absorb.
861. Anti-Energy Mimicry,6.0
#Your body is or can transform into anti-energy, allowing you to flow through the world as a being of pure energy annihilation. In your transformed state you are almost intangible to energy-based attacks and your touch erases any form of energy. Takes time to fully control your new form.
862. Anti-Force Empowerment,5.0
#Your strength, speed and durability are amplified in the presence of anti-forces, and contact with them may unlock related abilities. You can draw sustenance from anti-forces and slow your own aging, though overuse may induce dependency.
863. Anti-Gravity Defiance,2.8
#You can ignore anti-gravity, staying firmly planted on the ground regardless of how much repulsive force is being applied to you. Useful in the niche scenario where someone is trying to fling you into the sky, useless otherwise.
864. Anti-Magic Empowerment,3.8
#Contact with anti-magic makes you stronger, faster, more durable and sharper. In an area thick with magic-negating energy you may even slow your aging or draw sustenance from it, making you a terror to mages on their home turf.
865. Anti-Magic Mimicry,5.4
#Your body is made of or can transform into anti-magic. In your transformed state you negate spells through mere proximity, your blood disrupts enchantments and your touch peels magic off of any target. Vulnerable to mundane attacks and energy absorbers.
866. Anti-Power Empowerment,3.8
#You become stronger, faster and more durable in the presence of anti-power, possibly unlocking new abilities related to your affinity. In areas saturated with anti-power you may even draw sustenance from it or slow your aging.
867. Anti-Power Immunity,5.6
#You are completely immune to abilities that negate, weaken, neutralise or otherwise limit your powers. Power negators stare at you in confusion as their dampening fields slide off your aura. Still vulnerable to Power Reversal and Superpower Replication.
868. Anti-Predator Adaptation,3.2
#Your body has developed or can develop adaptations that help prey escape predators, such as camouflage, warning coloration, mimicry, defensive secretions, startle displays, and burst speed. The exact set of adaptations adjusts itself based on what kind of predator is currently hunting you.
869. Anti-Psychic Presence,5.2
#You constantly project an aura that weakens psychic powers in your vicinity. Telepaths cannot read you, telekinetics struggle to grip objects near you, and any psionic energy entering your field is absorbed or annihilated outright. Useless against omni-tier psychics but devastating to most mind-users.
870. Anti-Spell Empowerment,4.9
#When you come into contact with anti-spells you grow stronger, faster, tougher and more resilient. Standing in a region saturated with anti-magic turns you into a juggernaut, and prolonged exposure can even slow your aging, although overuse may breed dependency.
871. Anti-Storage,7.6
#You cannot be sealed, absorbed, banished, imprisoned, consumed, or contained by any storage-type ability. Cages dissolve, sealing arrays misfire, soul jars shatter trying to hold you, and pocket dimensions spit you back out. Some say you simply cannot fit inside anything that isn't reality itself.
872. Antibiotic System,3.6
#Your body produces a constant stream of supernatural antibiotics, making you immune to all diseases regardless of nature, including supernatural plagues and conversion-type infections. You can wade through biohazards untouched and even bleed your antibodies into others to cure them.
873. Antimatter Embodiment,8.7
#You are the living embodiment of antimatter itself. You possess supreme control over all antimatter in existence and your mere presence is enough to unmake matter. Anything you wish to annihilate, simply ceases.
874. Antimatter Empowerment,4.0
#When in contact with antimatter you become stronger, faster and more durable, and any antimatter-related powers you possess are amplified. You can even draw sustenance from it, although finding antimatter outside of laboratories is its own challenge.
875. Antimatter Immunity,5.2
#You are completely unaffected by antimatter and the annihilation reactions it causes. You could swim through a sea of antimatter without so much as a tingle, although secondary effects like radiation and shockwaves may still get through depending on your durability.
876. Antiparticle Empowerment,3.9
#Antiparticles make you stronger, faster and more durable, and may unlock related abilities or amplify your existing ones. You can even draw sustenance from them and slow your aging if exposed to enough.
877. Antiparticle Power Link,5.0
#Your antiparticle nature is linked to your powers, fueling and strengthening them with the counter particulate essence flowing through you. May go out of control if your antiparticle nature becomes unstable, and users of charged particle absorption can disrupt the link entirely.
878. Antithetical Power Link,5.4
#Your antithetical aspect is linked to your powers, fueling and strengthening them through the friction of opposing natures within you. May go out of control if the antithetical aspect becomes unstable, and users of Yin & Yang Manipulation can sever the link entirely.
879. Antler Protrusion,1.9
#You can grow and retract antlers from your head, useful for goring and bashing things. They can be broken though, and you have to put your head right next to whatever you want to stab.
880. Antlion Physiology,2.6
#You are or can transform into an antlion, in either larval or adult form. As a larva you can dig sand pits to ambush prey and possess powerful pincers, as an adult you gain wings and far better mobility. You may feel an instinctive hostility towards anything resembling an ant.

#You are or can become one of the Anunnaki, the ancient Mesopotamian deities who descended from the heavens to shape civilization. You possess immense divine physical and magical power, longevity beyond reckoning, and the authority of one of mankind's oldest pantheons.

#You are or can become a tadpole. You are a tiny wiggling thing in a pond. Hopefully you grow up before something eats you.

#You are or can transform into a frog or toad, partially or fully. You gain a powerful jump, a sticky tongue, the ability to breathe through your skin and swim well. Your eating habits will change considerably and you may need outside heat to stay active.

#You are or can become an anuranoid, a humanoid frog or toad-folk. You retain a humanoid shape and intelligence while gaining the leaping power, sticky tongue, amphibious lungs and tough mucous-coated skin of your amphibian heritage.

#Mesopotamian Mythology - You are or can transform into Anzu, the massive storm-bird of Sumerian myth. You possess immense size, powerful wings, and can breathe both fire and water. #You are or can become an Ao Andon, a spirit born from the collective terror of a hundred ghost stories told in candlelight. #(Nsfw) Every fluid your body produces - sweat, saliva, tears, blood, semen, vaginal fluid, even your natural oils - is laced with potent aphrodisiac properties. 985. Automated Body,4.9

986. Automatic Mobility,4.5

987. Automatic Power Use,4.7

988. Automatic Self-Preservation,5.6
#You possess an innate, instinctive aptitude for self-preservation, automatically identifying and escaping danger by any means necessary. #Your body can flawlessly perform and complete any task or job automatically, without requiring your mind to focus on it. You can write a novel, perform surgery and cook a five-course meal all while your mind is free to wander. Mistakes still happen when your body decides for you.
990. Automaton Physiology,4.2
#You are or can transform into a fully mechanical automaton with no organic components. You possess disease immunity, enhanced strength and durability, faster processing speeds and the standard machine perks, but you are also vulnerable to hacking, EMPs and tech-based powers.
991. Autumn Embodiment,6.6
#You are autumn itself, the falling leaves, the cool breeze and the gentle pouring rain answer to you. You hold divine authority over the season of harvest and reflection, and where you walk the world turns golden.
992. Auxiliary Condition,5.4
#You possess a supporting condition that holds reserve copies of your powers, skills and attributes in a backup state. Should your primary abilities be stolen, negated, transferred or sealed, the auxiliary condition activates and grants you a backup version, ensuring you are never truly disarmed.
993. Auxiliary Organs,4.2
#You possess a second set of vital organs - heart, brain, lungs, nervous system - tucked away inside you. Should the primary fail or be destroyed, the backup takes over instantly. Also grants enhanced physical durability and survivability.
994. Avatar Empowerment,6.0
#You become stronger, faster and more durable in the presence of avatars, drawing power and even sustenance from incarnations near you. With enough avatars to feed on you may stop aging, but cut off from them you wither back toward baseline.
995. Avatar Symbiosis,6.6
#You share your body with an existential being - an avatar of a god, angel, demon or other supernatural force - that has been reborn into your mortal form. The bond grants you potent abilities tied to its nature, but the entity may try to take over your mind, and its power may be more than your body can safely hold.
996. Avian Physiology,3.3
#You possess the traits, attributes and abilities of birds, whether through full or partial transformation or by simply being a bird in human shape. Hollow bones, sharp eyes, flight if you have wings - the package depends on the species. Beginners may struggle to revert to a fully human form.
997. Axe Power Link,4.0
#Your powers are intrinsically tied to your axe-based nature, with the bladed essence within you fueling and amplifying everything you do. The stronger your bond with the axe, the stronger your abilities, but if your axe-essence destabilizes, so do you.
998. Azuki Arai Physiology,3.0
#You are an Azuki Arai, a mountain yokai often found near streams washing red beans in a bag and singing morbid little songs about eating humans, despite being completely harmless. You have a mischievous nature, a dark sense of humor, and a strange affinity for luck and pranks.
999. Azuki Baba Physiology,4.2
#You are an Azuki Baba, a man-eating Japanese hag-yokai dressed all in white who appears in the rainy twilight singing a husky, ugly song. Unlike your prankster cousins, you actually do catch and devour the humans you sing about. Vulnerable to divine magic and prayer.
1000. Baccoo Physiology,4.3
#You are a Baccoo, a Caribbean folkloric demon-creature, often a short ugly humanoid whose body is a strange merging of flesh and wood. You can turn invisible, throw stones, start fires, and pass secret messages, all in exchange for a steady diet of milk and bananas.
1001. Backed-Up Physiology,4.6
#You have no vital organs, every part of your body is capable of taking over the function of any other part. Lose a heart and your liver picks up the slack. To kill you for good, every single organ must be destroyed.
1002. Bacteria Kingdom Embodiment,7.0
#You are the embodiment of the bacteria kingdom, the natural force of all single-celled prokaryotic life across every phylum from Cyanobacteria onward. Every microbe in existence is an extension of your will, and the oldest, most numerous lineage of life on this planet recognizes you as its avatar.
1003. Badalisc Physiology,3.8
#You are or can transform into the Badalisc, an Italian alpine creature with a great goat-skinned head, small horns, a huge mouth and glowing red eyes. You traditionally play the role of an Epiphany Eve trickster, exposing the secrets and gossip of the village in your wake.
1004. Badger Physiology,2.3
#Allows you to become or mimic a badger, gaining its tenacity, digging claws, thick hide, and famously bad temper. Compact, surprisingly tough, and absolutely will not back down from a fight.
1005. Badgerfolk Physiology,2.8
#You are a badgerfolk, an anthropomorphic badger-humanoid common to the fantasy genre. You combine the size and dexterity of a humanoid with badger claws, thick hide, and a grumpy stubbornness that makes you hard to budge from any position you take.
1006. Bag Monster Physiology,2.6
#You are a bag monster, a living sack creature whose true self is the hoard of objects stuffed inside. You can stretch, swallow and store an absurd amount of stuff in your bag-body, and you instinctively crave to add more to your collection. If your contents spill out, so does your consciousness.
1007. Bahamut Physiology,8.6
#You are Bahamut, the colossal primordial whale of Arabian myth that bears upon its back a four-thousand-eyed bull, a ruby mountain, and the angel that holds the heavens, hells and earth. Your scale is cosmic and your existence anchors layers of reality. Most physical threats simply cannot reach you.
1008. Bai Ze Physiology,6.5
#You are or can transform into Bai Ze, the auspicious Chinese beast that knows everything that ever was and ever will be. With nine eyes and six horns, you can look upon any person, thing or phenomenon and instinctively understand its nature, history and secrets. Not built for combat, but few minds in existence can rival yours.
1009. Bakekujira Physiology,5.4
#You are or can transform into a Bakekujira, the vengeful skeletal whale of Japanese folklore. Your massive bone-form drags with it swarms of ghostly fish and birds, and your presence brings curses of disease, famine and fire upon those you target. You are a vessel of oceanic vengeance.
1010. Bakeneko Physiology,3.6
#You are or can become a bakeneko, a cat yokai with a forked tail and the ability to walk upright. You can shapeshift between human and feline forms, hold supernatural grudges, and your curses linger long after your prey thinks they've escaped you.
1011. Bakezori Physiology,1.8
#You are a Bakezori, a tsukumogami born from a neglected straw sandal that has reached a hundred years of age. You can scuttle around, sing eerie songs and haunt households like a minor poltergeist. Mostly harmless, mostly annoying, and tied for life to the sandal you came from.
1012. Balance Embodiment,7.6
#You are the living embodiment of balance and stability between all things. You can convert balance itself into raw energy, fuelling your lifespan or weaponising it against those who tip the scales too far in any direction. Beings of pure extremes find you naturally antithetical.
1013. Balanced Specialization,3.3
#You possess a perfectly balanced and versatile skill set. Every attribute, ability and stat you have is in good proportion - not too strong, not too weak, but just right. A jack of all trades by birth, equally competent in any field you put your mind to.
1014. Balaur Physiology,6.0
#You are or can transform into a Balaur, the Romanian dragon with multiple heads, steely serpentine scales, wings, fins and legs. With anywhere from three to twelve heads, you are vast enough to plant your footprints on mountains and brush the violet sky with your crest. Stealth is not your strong suit.
1015. Baldness Detection,0.4
#You are supernaturally alerted to the presence of bald people, even through hats, masks and wigs. You may experience chills or goosebumps as the sensation hits. Useless against anyone with even a little hair.
1016. Balloon Mimicry,2.2
#Your body is or can become balloons, either retaining your normal anatomy in inflated rubber form or transforming into homogeneous balloon-matter. Deflation inducement is your perfect counter and you should avoid pins.
1017. Bamboo Mimicry,2.9
#Your body is or can transform into bamboo, either retaining your anatomy in jointed wooden form or becoming homogeneous bamboo-matter. Surprisingly tough for a plant but still wood at the end of the day.
1018. Banana Mimicry,1.4
#Your body is or can become a banana, either retaining your anatomy in fruit form or transforming into homogeneous banana-matter. The user might get eaten.
1019. Bandage Mimicry,3.0
#Your body is or can transform into bandages, either retaining your normal anatomy in wrapped form or becoming homogeneous bandage-matter. You are affected by anything ordinary bandages would be, and some users find it hard to fully unwrap.
1020. Bandersnatch Physiology,4.5
#You are or can transform into a Bandersnatch, the ferocious beast from Lewis Carroll's looking-glass world. Your form has a long snapping-jawed neck, terrifying speed, and a savage temperament that has no equal in the mundane world.
1021. Bandicoot Physiology,2.4
#You are or can transform into a bandicoot or bilby, gaining the burrowing claws, twitching nose and surprising agility of these Australian marsupials. Crash not included.
1022. Bannik Physiology,4.3
#You are a Bannik, the guardian spirit of the bathhouse from Slavic folklore. Within steamy or watery places of tradition you wield potent spirit magic, can commune with forest spirits and perform divinations, but you are deeply offended by Christian iconography and weakened by cold iron.
1023. Banshee Physiology,5.2
