#You are a banshee, the wailing woman of the fairy mounds. You can sense impending death, your wails carry omens that strike fear into mortal hearts, and at full force your scream can shatter bone, rupture organs, and outright kill the weak willed.
1024. Baobhan Sith Physiology,5.4
#You are a Baobhan Sith of Scottish folklore, appearing as a beautiful woman who lures men with dance and song before transforming into a hag-like predator with inhuman strength and a thirst for blood. You cannot manifest in sunlight and are vulnerable to cold iron and holy relics.
1025. Barbegazi Physiology,4.0
#You are a Barbegazi, a benevolent ice gnome with a great white beard and oversized feet built for sliding across avalanches. You possess potent ice and snow abilities and can survive in the harshest cold, but you must hibernate during warm months in deep caves.
1026. Barbel Protrusion,1.1
#You have whisker-like sensory barbels growing near your mouth, granting you a heightened sense of touch and taste in your immediate surroundings. Useful for navigating murky water, somewhat awkward at dinner parties.
1027. Barnacle Physiology,1.0
#Allows you to transform partially or fully into a barnacle. You can latch onto surfaces with unbreakable grip and survive in harsh tidal conditions, but in full form you are basically a rock.
1028. Basajaun Physiology,4.5
#You are a Basajaun, the Lord of the Woods from Basque mythology. A massive hairy hominid of immense strength, you can build megaliths, protect flocks, and wield ancient knowledge of agriculture and ironworking. Despite your intimidating bulk, you are a benevolent guardian of the wilds.
1029. Basan Physiology,3.6
#You are a Basan, a nocturnal fowl-like yokai that breathes ghostly cold flames that do not burn. You feed on charred wood and embers, and your beating wings produce the distinctive basabasa rustling that warns of your presence.
1030. Base Form,1.5
#You possess a base or default form that you remain in most of the time when not actively shapeshifting. It may be your true form, or simply the appearance you prefer to wear when interacting with others. Mostly relevant if you already had shapeshifting.
1031. Bashe Physiology,5.7
#You are or can transform into a Bashe, a colossal serpent from Chinese mythology infamous for devouring elephants whole. Your immense size, crushing coils, and unending appetite make you a terror, though you embody the sin of greed and are vulnerable to ancient Chinese rites.
1032. Basilisk Physiology,5.4
#You are or can transform into a Basilisk, the king of serpents. Your gaze is lethal, your venom leaves a deadly trail in your wake, and even your hiss can kill the unwary. Weasels are immune to your venom and a rooster's crow can kill you.
1033. Bat Monster Physiology,4.5
#You are or can transform into a monstrous bat, a hulking nightmare with leathery wings, fanged maw, and horrifying screech. Your physical abilities are monstrously enhanced and your sonar can pierce darkness and shatter eardrums.
1034. Bat Physiology,2.9
#Allows you to transform into a bat or take on bat-like traits, granting you flight, echolocation, and night-sight. You are vulnerable to bat-related diseases and may struggle in direct sunlight.
1035. Batfolk Physiology,3.8
#You are a batfolk, a humanoid bat with leathery wings, sharp fangs, keen echolocation and the dexterity of a person combined with the agility of a bat. You can fly, climb sheer surfaces and hunt in pitch darkness.
1036. Batibat Physiology,5.2
#You are or can transform into a Batibat, the grotesque demon-hag of Philippine folklore born from the slaughter of an old tree. You can invade dreams, induce crushing nightmares, and suffocate sleeping victims with your massive form. Vulnerable to holy rites and demon slayers.
1037. Batoidea Physiology,3.3
#Allows you to transform into a batoid like a manta ray, stingray or skate. You gain graceful aquatic flight underwater, electroreception, and in some forms a venomous barb. You may struggle outside of water.
1038. Batoideanoid Physiology,3.9
#You are a batoideanoid, a humanoid ray-person with broad wing-like fins, electroreceptive senses, and in some cases venomous barbs. You can swim with incredible grace and glide through water like a phantom.
1039. Batsquatch Physiology,5.1
#You are or can transform into a Batsquatch, a hulking flying cryptid with blue fur, yellow eyes, a wolf-like muzzle and fifty-foot leathery wings. You possess monstrous strength, the ability to fly long distances, and a presence that terrifies any who witness you.
1040. Battlefield Adaptation,5.4
#You automatically adapt to any battlefield, your body and mind constantly evolving to outmatch your environment and opponents. Each battle you survive makes you stronger, sharper, and more tactically refined, slowly forging you into a one-man army.
1041. Batwere Physiology,3.7
#You are a batwere, a true bat born with the ability to take on a humanoid form. Unlike a werebat, your true self is the bat, and your human shape is the disguise. You retain your bat senses and flight in any form.
1042. Bauchan Physiology,3.5
#You are or can transform into a bauchan, a mischievous Scottish hobgoblin who is dangerous when wronged but fiercely helpful to those it favors. You possess fae strength, shapeshifting tricks, and a sharp sense of loyalty and grudge alike.
1043. Bauk Physiology,4.6
#You are or can transform into a Bauk, the bear-like monster of Serbian folklore that lurks in dark and abandoned places to ambush wandering victims. You possess immense strength and a terrifying presence, but bright lights and loud noises will send you fleeing.
1044. Bean-nighe Physiology,4.7
#You are a Bean-nighe, the Scottish washing-woman spirit who foretells death by the river. You can sense impending death and misfortune around those near you, grant wishes and bestow knowledge to those who treat you with respect. Anyone who manages to sneak up on you can force boons from you.
1045. Beast Divinity,6.6
#You possess the bestial form of divinity, granting you raw power far beyond mortal beasts and men. Your physical might, instincts and animal-aligned abilities are amplified to a divine level, and you can call upon the authority of beast-gods. Vulnerable to divine slayers and divine power immunity.
1046. Beast Soul,4.0
#Your soul is that of a beast, granting you ferocious instincts and feral capabilities even in a human body. Your power may be partly dormant, awakening through strong emotion or wild behaviour, and stronger beast souls grant access to mythical creature traits.
1047. Beast of Gévaudan Physiology,4.8
#You are or can transform into the Beast of Gévaudan, the man-eating creature that terrorised the French countryside. You possess immense predatory strength, terrifying speed and an appetite for human prey, with hide thick enough to shrug off musket fire. Cryptid manipulators can try to leash you.
1048. Beastfolk Physiology,3.4
#You are or can become a member of the beastfolk, an anthropomorphic animal race. You gain the physical traits and instincts of your animal aspect, fur, claws, fangs, sharper senses, while retaining a humanoid form and intelligence.
1049. Beastwere Physiology,3.8
#You are a beastwere, an animal that can take on a humanoid form, the inverse of a werebeast. Some beastweres control their shifts freely while others are bound to the sun's position or magical triggers. You may retain partly bestial instincts even in human shape.
1050. Beauty Embodiment,7.6
#You are the physical embodiment of beauty itself, infinitely and supremely beautiful, with limitless control over the concept. You may never age, your beauty bends mortal hearts effortlessly, and you might be immune to death until very specific conditions are met.
1051. Beauty Infinitum,8.1
#Your beauty grows endlessly with no upper limit, increasing gradually forever. Your attractiveness, charisma and aesthetic perfection become limitless and immeasurable, allowing you to perform any feat that requires or scales with your inherent beauty. Can be countered by absolute manipulation or infinity negation.
1052. Bee Monster Physiology,4.5
#You are or can transform into a bee monster, possessing the traits and abilities of a giant or otherworldly bee creature. Enhanced strength, chitinous armour, paralytic stingers, venomous bites and the ability to fly come standard, with the worst specimens being absolute nightmares.
1053. Bee Physiology,3.0
#You are or can transform into a bee, including species like honeybees and bumblebees. You gain flight, compound vision and a stinger, though the bright colouration and constant buzzing make stealth a challenge and your stinger may pull free after one good hit.
1054. Beefolk Physiology,2.6
#You are a beefolk, a humanoid bee. You possess wings, enhanced agility, a venomous stinger, and an instinctive understanding of hive dynamics. Your body is far hardier than a regular bee's.
1055. Beginning Embodiment,8.4
#You are the personification of beginnings, the Alpha given form. Every start, from a single breath to the birth of universes, originates through you. Conclusion-aligned beings can contest your domain but cannot erase it.
1056. Being Immunity,6.6
#Your existence is singular across the multiverse. Your past, present, future, destiny and being cannot be borrowed, copied, stolen or swapped. Alternate versions of you may exist, but they have entirely different histories that cannot be confused with your own.
1057. Belief Dependent Self,7.3
#Your existence is shaped entirely by what you and others believe about you. Believe you are unharmed and your wounds vanish, believe you cannot die and you persist. The catch is brutal: you must remain aware of yourself at all times, or your mind itself will dissolve.
1058. Beloniform Physiology,2.8
#You possess the physiology of a beloniform fish, allowing you to take on the traits of flying fish, needlefish, halfbeaks or sauries. You can glide above water for impressive distances and your body is built for slicing through both air and sea.
1059. Belt Empowerment,2.3
#When you are wearing or in contact with belts, you become stronger, faster and more durable. The more belts you have on you, the greater the boost, and high-quality utility belts may even slow your aging.
1060. Belt Mimicry,3.0
#Your body is composed of belts, allowing you to unravel, reshape and reform yourself at will. You can squeeze through tight spaces, lash out like a whip, and reattach severed pieces of yourself with ease.
1061. Benevorous,4.0
#You can feed on the goodness of people's hearts, gaining boosts to stamina, strength, durability and speed proportional to the level of goodness in your foes. The power automatically seeks out the purest soul in any group, making fights against heroes especially nourishing.
1062. Betrayal Empowerment,3.6
#You grow stronger, faster and more durable from acts of treachery, whether your own or others around you. Loyalty and honest truths weaken you, so the more snake-like the surroundings the better you fare.
1063. Beyond-Dimensional Physiology,9.3
#You exist outside the entire concept of dimensions, not as a zero-dimensional point but as something conceptually superior to spatiotemporal reality itself. Almighty Laws and absolute powers can still touch you, but to anything bound by physics you are simply unreachable.
1064. Big Creation Immunity,7.8
#You are immune to universal creation events. You can stand at the heart of a Big Bang and walk away, soaking the primordial energies that birth realities without so much as a singed hair, though you may still feel the pain.
1065. Big Destruction Immunity,7.9
#You are immune to universal destruction events such as the Big Rip, Big Freeze and Big Crunch. The end of a universe is something you can simply walk out of, though the experience is no less unpleasant.
1066. Binding Empowerment,3.5
#You grow stronger, faster and more durable through the act of binding others, drawing power from each captive you keep restrained. Without anything to bind, you weaken back to baseline.
1067. Binding Mimicry,3.6
#You can transform your body partially or completely into bindings, ropes, chains, or restraints of your choice. Your transformed form retains your shape but is made of binding material, allowing you to wrap, ensnare, and hold targets with parts of yourself. Vulnerable to cutting if you keep your anatomy intact.
1068. Binding Power Link,4.2
#Your binding nature is fused with your other powers, fueling and reinforcing them. Every ability you have can be strengthened or augmented by channeling your restraining force through it, but if your binding falters or destabilizes, your other powers may go haywire.
1069. Binding Symbiosis,4.5
#You host a binding-natured entity within yourself, granting you potent containment and immobilization powers. The entity may push back when stressed, attempting to take control of your body or impose its will, especially when you use its power recklessly.
1070. Bio-Augmentation,4.0
#Your biology and genetics have been artificially augmented, granting you a suite of enhancements depending on the nature of the modifications. Could be enhanced strength, regeneration, sensory upgrades, or specialized organs, the exact loadout varies by what you were engineered for.
1071. Bio-Capacitor,4.7
#Your body is a living battery, capable of bio-energetically absorbing ambient energy from any source and storing it for later use. You can release the stored energy in any form you can channel, making you a walking reserve tank for whatever powers you happen to wield.
1072. Bio-Electric Dynamo,4.7
#Your body is a living power plant, drawing in ambient energy and converting it endlessly into bio-electricity and charged particles. You can absorb electrical energies into yourself for fuel, though prolonged output tires you and you have a set maximum voltage.
1073. Bio-Electromagnetic Dynamo,5.4
#Your body endlessly draws in ambient energy and converts it into bio-generated electromagnetic force and particles, with no fuel required. You can absorb electromagnetism back into yourself and channel the stored output to almost any purpose your imagination allows.
1074. Bio-Energy Empowerment,4.6
#You become stronger, faster and tougher in the presence of bio-energy, drawing strength directly from the living force around you. Some users can even feed on it for sustenance or slow their aging, though without a subtle body to draw from you are merely human.
1075. Bio-Energy Power Link,4.5
#Your biofield is fundamentally linked to your other powers, fueling and amplifying them through your living energy. As long as your biology is strong and stable your powers grow with it, but any disruption to your biofield will send them spiraling out of control.
1076. Bio-Gamma Reactor,6.4
#Your body is an infinite gamma radiation power plant. You constantly draw in ambient energy and convert it into endless streams of gamma rays and related particles, which you can project, channel, or absorb back into yourself. You will never run dry.
1077. Bio-Gravimetric Dynamo,6.6
#You are an endless source of gravitational energy. Your biofield draws in ambient power and pumps out gravitons forever, letting you produce, project, or absorb gravity itself in unlimited quantities. You're never going to run out of pull.
1078. Bio-Heat Dynamo,6.0
#Your body is a never-ending furnace, drawing in ambient energy and converting it into infinite heat that pours out of you forever. You can project it, channel it, or pull it back in. You will never freeze and you will never go cold.
1079. Bio-Ionic Dynamo,5.4
#Your body is a living ionic power plant, drawing in ambient energy to endlessly produce ions and ionic forces. You can absorb stray ionic energy to refuel and project it for any purpose you can think of, never running dry as long as the world has energy to give.
1080. Bio-Ionic Furnace,5.8
#Your body is a living plasma furnace, drawing in ambient energy to infinitely generate plasma fire from your flesh. You can vent it as searing arcs, absorb hostile flames to refuel, and direct the burning ionized matter however you wish. You will never go cold.
1081. Bio-Kinetic Dynamo,5.3
#Your body is a living kinetic power plant, drawing in ambient energy to endlessly produce bio-generated kinetic force. You can absorb incoming impacts to refuel yourself and channel that motion for any purpose, from explosive bursts of speed to thunderous strikes.
1082. Bio-Metal Mimicry,6.0
#Your body is composed of malleable living metal, granting you superior strength, immense durability, and first-rate regeneration with no structural weak points. You can harden, soften, sprout blades, mimic your environment, or scatter into pieces, and consuming raw metal makes you stronger.
1083. Bio-Metallic Symbiotic Exoskeleton,6.3
#You are bonded to a bio-metallic symbiotic exoskeleton, a fusion of advanced biomechanics and resilient alloy that integrates seamlessly with your body. It bestows superhuman strength, durability, and physical enhancement, but the bond runs to your genes — if your symbiote dies, so do you.
1084. Bio-Nuclear Dynamo,6.1
#Your body is a living nuclear power plant, endlessly producing nuclear reactive energies and particles drawn from the ambient world. You can absorb radiation as fuel and channel the forces of the atom to whatever destructive or productive purpose you choose.
1085. Bio-Photonic Dynamo,5.8
#Your body is a living photonic power plant, drawing in ambient energy and producing infinite photons and photonic particles. You can absorb light back into yourself or unleash an endless torrent of radiant energy without ever exhausting your reserves.
1086. Bio-Plasma Dynamo,5.9
#Your body is a living plasma furnace, endlessly drawing in ambient energy to produce plasma, heat, and related particles. You can radiate, project, or reabsorb fourth-state matter at will, never running dry of fuel.
1087. Bio-Pyric Dynamo,5.7
#Your body is a living eternal flame, drawing in ambient energy to endlessly produce bio-fire, heat, oxidizers, and related fire elements. You can absorb fire back into yourself just as easily as you project it, never burning out.
1088. Bio-Quantum Perpetuator,6.7
#Your body is a living quantum power plant, drawing in ambient energy and channelling it into the energetic forms of quantum physics. You can absorb and radiate quantum forces endlessly, manipulating the strange phenomena of the subatomic world without exhausting yourself.
1089. Bio-Reactive Perpetuator,5.9
#Your body is a living reactor, endlessly drawing in ambient energy to produce and channel radiation and radioactive particles. You can absorb radiant energy back into yourself or unleash it in any form, an inexhaustible nuclear power plant in flesh.
1090. Bio-Solar Dynamo,6.4
#Your body is a living solar power plant, endlessly drawing in ambient energy to produce the forces, substances, and radiation that comprise extraterrestrial suns. You can radiate the power of a star or absorb it back into yourself, never burning out.
1091. Bio-Sonic Dynamo,5.6
#Your body is a living acoustic power plant, drawing in ambient energy to infinitely produce bio-generated sound and related vibrational energies. You can radiate, shape, or reabsorb sound at any volume forever without straining your throat or lungs.
1092. Bio-Stellar Transformer,7.3
#Your body is a living dyson sphere, constantly drawing in ambient energy and converting it into stellar forces with no upper limit on output. You can endlessly produce starfire, stellar plasma and radiation, absorb it back, and never run dry as long as ambient energy exists nearby.
1093. Bio-Volatile Dynamo,7.2
#Your body endlessly produces volatile forces and explosive substances by drawing in ambient energy, with no theoretical upper limit. You can release detonations, fuel reactions, and reabsorb the products back into yourself. Effectively a self-fueling bomb factory wearing your skin.
1094. Biodroid Physiology,5.5
#You are a biodroid, an artificially engineered organic being designed to be the perfect form of life. Your body is purpose-built and programmable, every organ optimized for function. You retain organic vulnerabilities but trade them for engineered perfection in everything else.
1095. Biological Boxing Gloves,0.6
#You have boxing gloves where your hands should be. Permanently. Buttoning a shirt is a nightmare, but you'll never have to bring your own gear to the gym.
1096. Biological Resistance,2.8
#Your body shrugs off the effects of biological weapons, viruses, toxins, and unwanted genetic tampering. There is still a threshold to how much your body can endure, and a bioweapon designed specifically against you may bypass your defenses entirely.
1097. Biological Singularity,7.3
#You are a biological singularity, an organism whose evolutionary potential has folded inward and outward at once, expanding endlessly to assimilate everything it touches. Your growth has no natural ceiling but always teeters on the edge of devouring everything around you, and may even turn carcinogenic against itself.
1098. Biological Zipper,0.4
#You were born with one or more zippers somewhere on your body. Anyone, including you, can pull them open. What is underneath is up to your imagination, but other people can pull them too.
1099. Bioluminescence,1.6
#Your body can generate its own light through internal chemical reactions, glowing softly or brightly as you wish. Useful in dark places, romantic in others, and easily countered by darkness-based powers.
1100. Biomechanical Regeneration,4.5
#Your biomechanical tissue regenerates from any damage, mono-molecular biomachines rebuilding your synthetic flesh on a cellular level. Scratches, broken bones, lost limbs and even chunks of your body all knit back together. Subject to the usual regeneration limits, like needing a surviving core.
1101. Biomechanical Skin,2.0
#Your robotic body is covered in artificial skin made of biomechanical material, perfectly mimicking organic flesh in appearance and feel. Useful for infiltration, for blending in, or for living among people who would otherwise destroy you on sight.
1102. Biomechatronic Power Core,6.0
#Inside you burns a core that perpetuates near-limitless faux life energy, transforming your entire body into a closed-loop reactor of clean energy. You never tire in the way mortals do and your physical and mental efficacy run hot from the constant flow. Your body must remain organic-like in form, or the core misfires.
1103. Bionic Frog Physiology,2.6
#Allows you to transform partially or fully into a cybernetic frog. You gain enhanced leaping power, a mechanical tongue that can extend several meters and grip like a cable, and onboard targeting systems. Vulnerable to Robotic Manipulation.
1104. Bionic Gorilla Physiology,3.6
#Allows you to transform partially or fully into a cybernetic gorilla. You gain monstrous strength, reinforced armor plating, and built-in heavy weaponry that can be deployed from your forearms. Vulnerable to Robotic Manipulation.
1105. Bionic Hedgehog Physiology,3.0
#Allows you to transform partially or fully into a cybernetic hedgehog. Your spines become razor-sharp metal quills that can be launched as projectiles, and you can roll into a buzzsaw form at high speeds. Vulnerable to Robotic Manipulation.
1106. Bionic Insect Physiology,3.2
#Allows you to transform partially or fully into a cybernetic insect of your choosing. You gain reinforced chitin plating, mechanical wings, sensor antennae, and built-in tools or weapons depending on the insect. Vulnerable to Robotic Manipulation and insect slayers alike.
1107. Bionic Penguin Physiology,2.7
#Allows you to transform partially or fully into a cybernetic penguin. You become an aquatic torpedo with reinforced plating, jet propulsion through water, and a beak strong enough to puncture steel. Vulnerable to Robotic Manipulation.
1108. Bionic Physiology,5.4
#Your body is a machine, or you can transform yours into one. You possess the traits of robots, cyborgs, and androids - mechanical limbs, internal factories that can manifest tools or weapons, wheels, and other contraptions limited only by your imagination. Vulnerable to Technology Manipulation and EMPs.
1109. Bionic Rabbit Physiology,2.5
#Allows you to transform partially or fully into a cybernetic rabbit. You gain absurd leg-piston strength for jumping and kicking, hyper-acute auditory sensors, and a small but agile chassis. Vulnerable to Robotic Manipulation.
1110. Bionic Rhinoceros Physiology,3.7
#Allows you to transform partially or fully into a cybernetic rhinoceros. You become a rolling tank with thick armor plating, a drill-horn capable of punching through walls, and devastating charge attacks. Vulnerable to Robotic Manipulation.
1111. Bionic Shark Physiology,3.5
#Allows you to transform partially or fully into a cybernetic shark. You gain a reinforced metal hide, a buzzsaw-jaw filled with replaceable serrated teeth, sonar arrays, and a propulsion system for incredible underwater speed. Vulnerable to Robotic Manipulation.
1112. Bionic Spider Physiology,3.3
#Allows you to transform partially or fully into a cybernetic spider. You can spin metal cable webbing, scale any surface, deploy from your abdomen miniature drones, and inject various chemical payloads through your fangs. Vulnerable to Robotic Manipulation.
1113. Bionic Toy Mimicry,2.2
#Allows you to transform yourself into a mechanical toy, retaining your full anatomy in toy-form. Your durability is limited and you may need to recharge with batteries, but you make for an excellent infiltrator and your wind-up mechanisms can power surprising feats.
1114. Bionic Wolf Physiology,3.4
#Allows you to transform partially or fully into a cybernetic wolf. You gain enhanced speed and tracking sensors, reinforced metal jaws strong enough to crush armor, and pack-coordination systems if multiple wolves are present. Vulnerable to Robotic Manipulation.
1115. Birdfolk Physiology,3.6
#You are or can transform into a birdfolk, a humanoid avian race popular in fantasy settings. You gain hollow bones, true flight via feathered wings, sharp talons and beak, and the keen eyesight of a raptor while retaining your humanoid mind and dexterity.
1116. Bisonfolk Physiology,3.7
#You are or can transform into a bisonfolk, a humanoid bison race common in fantasy settings. You gain immense bulk and strength, a thick shaggy coat, devastating horns, and the unstoppable momentum of a charging bison while retaining your humanoid intelligence.
1117. Bisso Galeto Physiology,4.5
#European Folklore - Allows you to transform into the Bisso Galeto, a legendary Veronese monster with the body and crested head of a rooster, spined wings, and a serpent's tail. You can grow or shrink your body length at will and your venom is incredibly potent. Will die instantly if you ever see your own reflection in a mirror.
1118. Absolute Bite,8.6
#Your bite is absolute. There is nothing your jaws cannot tear through - not metal, not stone, not the laws of reality themselves. Whether you achieve this through fangs, mandibles, beak, or some unusual jaw-structure, when you bite down, the target loses.
1119. Enhanced Bite,2.0
#Your bite is far stronger than a regular human's, allowing you to crunch through bone, light metal, and most everyday materials. Your teeth can still break on truly hard substances, so be mindful what you chomp.
1120. Supernatural Bite,4.2
#Your bite is unnaturally powerful and your teeth are unnaturally resilient. Sharp fangs, mandibles, beaks, or simply monstrously strong jaw muscles let you tear through nearly any material your teeth can grip. Large flat surfaces remain a problem since you have to actually get a bite in.
1121. Peak Human Bite,1.0
#Your bite force is at the peak of human conditioning, strong enough to tear through flesh and even sever fingers with effort. Your teeth can still chip on hard substances, so chew carefully.
1122. Bivalvia Physiology,1.4
#You are or can transform into a bivalve - clam, oyster, mussel, or scallop. You gain a hard protective shell and the ability to filter-feed, but you are also slow, mostly blind, and possess very poor senses overall. A safe but limiting form.
1123. Black Bear Physiology,3.0
#You are or can transform into a black bear, American or Asian variety. You gain considerable strength, sharp claws, surprising climbing ability, and the dense muscle and fat of a true ursine predator.
1124. Black Dog Physiology,4.4
#European Folklore - Allows you to transform into a black dog, the spectral nocturnal hound of British folklore known by countless names like Barghest, Black Shuck, Padfoot, and Cù Sìth. You gain spectral physical abilities, an unsettling presence, and association with the underworld. May be unable to enter holy ground and weak to divine forces.
1125. Black Hole Mimicry,7.5
#You can transform your body partially or fully into a black hole, your form composed of collapsed matter and crushing gravity. In your fully formed state you become an inescapable singularity, while hybrid forms grant immense physical reinforcement through the energy flowing through your cells.
1126. Black Shuck Physiology,4.6
#You are or can transform into a Black Shuck, the massive black hound of the British isles with flaming eyes that serves as an omen of death. The meanest of the Black Dog breeds, you are immensely large, vicious, and your appearance alone is said to herald doom.
1127. Blade Retraction,4.0
#You can generate and retract blades from your body at will, made of metal, bone, or energy depending on your nature. Wolverine-style claws, hidden arm blades, retractable shoulder swords, the form is up to you. The blades can still be broken if struck hard enough.
1128. Bladed Dragon Physiology,6.3
#You are or can transform into a Bladed Dragon, a species of dragon whose body is composed of or covered in blades, either through natural means or magical construction. Combined with the natural physical might of dragons, your body itself becomes a lethal weapon, every scale a razor edge.
1129. Bladed Tail,3.1
#You possess a tail tipped with a blade of some kind, whether a knife, axe, scissors, or any other edged tool. The tail itself may even fully take the form of a bladed weapon. Watch where you swing it, and pray nobody cuts it off.
1130. Bladeproof Durability,4.2
#You are immune or highly resistant to blades and stabbing attacks, whether through tough skin, rapid healing, or blades simply passing through you. You are not immune to pain or knockback, and sufficiently enhanced or supernatural blades may still cut you.
1131. Blattodea Physiology,3.5
#You are or can transform into a cockroach, gaining their incredible resilience, ability to survive radiation, squeeze through impossibly small gaps, and live without a head for weeks. Disgustingly hard to kill.
1132. Blemmyae Physiology,3.3
#You are or can transform into a Blemmyae, a mythological headless humanoid whose facial features are located on its chest. Strange in appearance, undeniably unique, but you may not be the brightest creature around.
1133. Blessed Blood,5.4
#Your blood is inherently sanctified, granting you minor passive benedictions like resistance to disease and corruption. Unholy beings that consume or touch your blood are burned and weakened, and a single drop can purify tainted water or ground. Vulnerable to those wielding cursed blood of comparable potency.
1134. Blessed Body,6.6
#Your entire physical form is composed of pure blessing, being blessed is as natural to you as breathing. You are passively a walking benediction, healing the sick by proximity and warding off evil without effort. The catch is severe: committing genuine evil acts begins to unmake your body, and stripping your blessing would be the same as killing you.
1135. Blessed Power Link,5.7
#Your blessed nature is fused with your other powers, sanctifying everything you do and amplifying your abilities through holy energy. Every power you possess is enhanced by benedictions, making them more potent and harder to negate. Requires a stable state of mind, and can spiral out of control if your faith wavers.
1136. Blessing Dragon Physiology,6.8
#You are a Blessing Dragon, a rare and powerful draconic being with mastery over benedictions. Your physical form is monstrously strong and you can grant blessings to anything in sight, ranging from temporary invincibility to perfect luck to extraordinary beauty. Still outranked by true dragon gods, but among mortals you are essentially a walking miracle.
1137. Blessing Embodiment,7.4
#You are the embodiment of blessings themselves, a living concept of benediction. Anything you touch or even glance at can be blessed at will, and your very existence radiates positive supernatural effects. Curses and curse embodiments are your eternal opposite and natural counter, but against anything else you are a font of pure good fortune.
1138. Blessing Presence,5.4
#Your mere presence blesses people and things around you, plants grow faster in your wake, the sick feel better in your shadow, and allies in your vicinity find their luck quietly improving. The effect has a finite range and may not work on all targets, but it is constant and effortless. Curse manipulators can disrupt it.
1139. Blindness Immunity,2.6
#You are immune to anything that would cause blindness, whether it be viral, induced, magical or manipulated. Bright flashes, blinding gases, and sight-stealing curses simply do not affect you. Bypass-type abilities and immunity negation can still get through.
1140. Blob Physiology,4.3
#You either are or can transform into a blob, an amorphous being that can disintegrate and consume nearly anything. You are nearly impossible to kill through conventional means due to your lack of vital organs or fixed shape, and you can squeeze through any gap. Temperature extremes can be a serious weakness.
1141. Block Physiology,3.6
#Your body is made of blocks, granting you incredible resilience and the ability to survive dismemberment with only repairs needed. You can rearrange, separate and reshape your blocky body into different forms or weapons, but you are obviously inhuman on close inspection.
1142. Blood Empowerment,3.9
#You become stronger, faster and more durable when in contact with or near blood, with your existing abilities amplified by its presence. You may also gain sustenance from blood and even slow your aging, but you risk addiction and withdrawal without regular consumption.
1143. Blood Independence,3.2
#You can survive losing vastly more blood than a normal person, far past the typical 40% lethal threshold. Blood-based attacks no longer threaten you with death by exsanguination, though you can still be killed by other means.
1144. Blood Physiology,4.2
#Your body is made of blood, either retaining the same internal anatomy or being a homogeneous fluid mass. You can reshape and reform yourself freely, but haemotoxic poisons and vampiric powers are devastatingly effective against you.
1145. Blood Power,5.4
#Your blood is its own font of life energy, an endless supernatural fuel from which all blood-based abilities can be derived. Acts as its own catalyst for blood magic, and a willing blood sacrifice produces a tremendous burst of power. Beware blood drinkers, who can siphon it from you.
1146. Blood Rush Immunity,1.4
#You are immune to the effects of blood rushing in your body. You can hang upside down indefinitely without your head exploding, and you physically cannot blush. Strangely specific but oddly freeing.
1147. Bloodlessness,3.8
#You have no blood or any other circulatory fluid. You don't need to oxygenate your cells, granting you near-limitless stamina, and you cannot bleed out from any wound no matter how horrific. Vulnerable to anyone who could turn you into blood, however.
1148. Bloodline Force Empowerment,4.7
#You become stronger, faster and more durable when in contact with or drawing upon the forces of your bloodline, with some affinity techniques unlocking on the fly. You may even slow or halt your aging while immersed in it. Without that connection, you are just a regular member of your line.
1149. Bloodline Power Link,4.5
#Your hereditary essence is directly tied into your powers, fueling and strengthening them through your bloodline. The more stable your lineage, the more controlled your abilities become, but an unstable hereditary nature can cause your powers to spiral out of your grasp.
1150. Bloodlust Empowerment,3.6
#You grow stronger, faster, and more durable the more bloodlust you feel. A violent desire to maim and kill fuels your body, unlocking new capabilities and even slowing your aging. However, your sanity may not survive the thirst, and satisfying it may weaken you instead.
1151. Bloody Bones Physiology,5.4
#You are or can transform into Bloody Bones, a bogeyman spirit that feeds on the fear, pain and flesh of others. Any human who looks directly at you will be haunted until their death, and you can drag victims into deep waters or follow them through the dark. You are powerless against those who refuse to look at you.
1152. Bludnik Physiology,3.3
#Slavic Folklore - You are a Błudnik, a troublesome gnome-like spirit that leads travelers astray like a Will O' The Wisp, often to their deaths in swamps and forests. You can manipulate paths and perception to make anyone lost, though you are vulnerable to holy relics and cold iron.
1153. Blue Fire Mimicry,5.5
#Your body is made of or can transform into blue fire, letting you flow as flame or reform as a physical being whose cells and bones are fortified by searing heat. You may need oxygen or flammable material to sustain the form, and water or cold can still hurt you.
1154. Blue Men of the Minch Physiology,4.2
#You are a Blue Man of the Minch, a Scottish sea-demon of the storm. You can swim like a porpoise, whip up vicious maritime storms at will and possess the mischievous strength of a fairy. Vulnerable to cold iron and holy relics, and bound to halt any attack if your leader's rhyming challenge is accepted.
1155. Bluecap Physiology,3.2
#You either are or can transform into a Bluecap, a small fairy resembling a living blue flame. You can drift through caves and tunnels with ease, sense valuable mineral deposits within the stone and feel the tremors of impending cave-ins long before they happen.
1156. Blunt Force Immunity,4.0
#You are completely immune to damage from blunt force attacks. Punches, kicks, falling anvils, baseball bats and collapsing buildings mean nothing to you, though you can still be thrown around like a ragdoll, and sharp edges still cut just fine.
1157. Bodach Physiology,3.8
#You either are or can transform into a Bodach, the hideous old-man bogeyman of Scottish folklore. You possess the strength and malice of a fairy hag, can slip down chimneys to snatch misbehaving children and feed on the fear of your victims, though you lose power if no one fears you.
1158. Bodily Entry Protection,3.9
#Nothing can enter or exit your body through any orifice, gap or wound without your permission. Poison gas cannot reach your lungs, parasites cannot crawl into your ears and sensory overload cannot reach you through your nose.
1159. Bodily Fluid Independence,4.2
#Your body has no bodily fluids at all, and doesn't need them. You can survive desiccation, blood loss, dehydration and fluid-based poisons effortlessly, though if you no longer need to eat or drink, you may find the sensations impossible to enjoy.
1160. Bodily Fluid Mimicry,4.3
#You are made of or can transform your body completely into bodily fluids. You can reform from splatters, squeeze through tight spaces and absorb physical blows, though you are horrifyingly vulnerable to anything or anyone with an appetite for such things.
1161. Bodily Gas Mimicry,2.6
#You can transform your body into bodily gas at will, becoming intangible to most physical attacks but vulnerable to wind. You may also smell constantly and risk being unable to return to solid form.
1162. Body Adaptation,3.6
#Whenever your mind is transferred or swapped into another body, you rapidly adapt to it, overcoming its weaknesses and mastering its capabilities as if it were your own. Useful for anyone who expects to be body-hopping.
1163. Body Function Empowerment,4.7
#You grow stronger and faster from the bodily functions of yourself or others, breathing, digestion, heartbeat, neural activity, healing. The more active the processes around you, the more empowered you become. Some users can even draw sustenance from these processes or slow their own aging.
1164. Body Meridian Empowerment,4.6
#Your body meridians act as an internal engine, making you stronger, faster and tougher the more you cultivate your inner energy. With enough training, you can even slow your aging and draw sustenance directly from your own chi flow.
1165. Body Part Mimicry,2.8
#You are (or can turn into) a fully independent body part, a walking hand, a sentient eye, a roaming organ. Despite being just a limb you function as a complete being and not a subcomponent of any larger body.
1166. Body Storage,3.9
#Your body contains hidden compartments that can store objects, weapons or tools. Advanced users have so much capacity it's clearly dimensional in nature, an entire armory somehow coexisting with your organs. Great for never being unarmed.
1167. Body Supremacy,6.0
#You have complete and total control over your own body, from muscles and bones down to neurons, reflexes and instincts. You move with superhuman grace and precision, override involuntary processes at will, and cannot be forced into actions your mind doesn't command. Overriding natural reflexes carelessly can leave you exposed.
1168. Body Transcendence,7.4
#Your body has transcended its natural potential and limitations, able to perform feats the mortal form was never meant to achieve. The more you train and refine yourself, the further past the horizon of 'possible' your body can reach. Can still be outmatched by someone with an absolute body.
1169. Bog Mummy Physiology,3.8
#You are (or can transform into) a bog mummy, a corpse preserved for centuries in the acidic waters of peat bogs and swamps. You possess the durability and eerie presence of the undead but your bog-cured flesh can be fragile, and slayers of the undead know exactly how to put you back in the mud.
1170. Boggart Physiology,4.4
#You are a boggart, a mischievous spirit of English folklore that haunts households, swamps, fields and other localised places. You love to play tricks, prank and frighten mortals, and the stronger their fear, the stronger you become. Vulnerable to holy relics, cold iron and anti-fairy magic.
1171. Boitata Physiology,4.6
#South American Mythology - You are or can transform into the Boitata, a massive fiery serpent born from a flood-surviving anaconda that devoured eyes for their light. Your gaze burns with all the light you've swallowed and your nocturnal senses are flawless, but daylight leaves you near-blind and water or cold dims your fire considerably.
1172. Bokkenrijder Physiology,4.2
#Dutch Folklore - You are a Buckrider, a devil-sworn sinner who can call upon the Devil's name to summon a flying goat steed and ride through the night sky. You possess the supernatural vitality of a damned soul but are vulnerable to holy rites and prayers of monotheistic faiths.
1173. Bond Empowerment,4.7
#The stronger the bonds of friendship, love and family you share with others, the stronger, faster and more durable you become. Being near loved ones amplifies your existing abilities and may unlock new ones tied to the affinity you share, and deep enough bonds may even sustain you or slow your aging. The death of a bonded one is devastating in more ways than one.
1174. Bone Durability,3.6
#Your bones are extraordinarily dense and durable, allowing you to throw and withstand bone-shattering blows without harm. Useful for absorbing impacts and reinforcing strikes, though the rest of your body is still as vulnerable as anyone else's.
1175. Bone Regeneration,3.4
#Your bones regenerate from any damage, knitting themselves back together from breaks and even regrowing entirely if shattered or removed. The process may still hurt, and it only regenerates bones, not the soft tissue around them.
1176. Boneless Body,2.3
#Your body has no bones, your skeleton being replaced by cartilage or something similar. This makes you absurdly flexible and resistant to blunt trauma, though your striking power suffers for it.
1177. Boo Hag Physiology,4.6
#You are a Boo Hag, a flayed demonic hag from hoodoo folklore that wears stolen skins by day and rides victims by night, draining their life. You must return to your skin before sunrise or lose it forever, and holy wards can keep you out.
1178. Book Mimicry,3.3
#You either are or can transform into a book. Depending on what kind of book you are, you may have access to the powers associated with it - a spellbook grants magic, a comic book grants superpowers, a cookbook grants recipes you really shouldn't skip.
1179. Boomerang Mimicry,2.2
#You either are or can transform into a boomerang. You retain your organs and vulnerabilities in this form, but you do come back to yourself when thrown - most of the time.
1180. Bounce House Mimicry,1.1
#You either are or can transform into a bounce house. Children love you, deflation is a real concern, and you may start to drift skyward if you aren't holding onto something.
1181. Boundless Inner World,8.5
#You contain an infinite inner reality within yourself, a limitless plane filled with knowledge and potential. Within this inner world you are effectively omnipotent, able to draw out anything you need from its endless possibilities. The more you explore and develop it, the more it can offer, and a skilled user could pull entire armies or artifacts out of their own soul.
1182. Bovine Companionship,1.4
#You have a natural bond with bovines, be it cows, bulls, buffalo or antelope. Any bovine you befriend becomes a loyal companion and nothing can drive you two apart, though some training may still be needed for the bond to fully form.
1183. Brachiation,1.7
#You are able to brachiate, moving effortlessly and smoothly through trees, scaffolding and any overhead structure by swinging from arm to arm. In a forest or jungle gym you move faster overhead than most people can run.
1184. Brain Empowerment,2.9
#You become stronger, faster and more durable in the presence of brains, whether your own, others', or nearby specimens. Being close to enough grey matter may even unlock related abilities and slow your aging, though anything that impedes brain function (trauma, alcohol, disease) weakens you in turn.
1185. Brain Entity Physiology,3.9
#You are an entity made entirely of brain matter, whether a literal living brain, a disembodied grey matter in a synthetic body, or a walking manifestation of a nervous system. Your physical form is as sensitive as an exposed brain typically is, making you exceptionally vulnerable to trauma when your defenses fail.
1186. Brainlessness,2.2
#You either have no brain or a completely nonfunctional one, rendering you immune to head trauma and powers targeting the brain. The downside is that you are, well, brainless, resulting in a noticeable lack of intelligence.
1187. Branding Empowerment,4.0
#You grow stronger, faster, and more durable from brands placed upon you or nearby, potentially unlocking abilities related to their affinity. You may even be able to draw sustenance from brands and slow your aging. Without a brand to feed on, you are weakened.
1188. Brown Bear Physiology,3.4
#You are or can transform into a brown bear, gaining its massive size, raw strength, thick hide and devastating claws. Be warned, those who wield Ursine Manipulation can take the reins from you.
1189. Brownie Physiology,3.1
#You are or can transform into a brownie, a household spirit from British folklore. In this form you are small, hairy, unsettling to look at and possess an uncanny knack for completing chores and farm work at supernatural speed overnight.
1190. Brunnmigi Physiology,3.8
#Norse Mythology - You are or can transform into a brunnmigi, a monstrous fox-like spirit infamous for defiling wells with its urine. Your touch can pollute any source of water, spreading sickness and drought across entire settlements. Vulnerable to Old Norse rituals.
1191. Bubble Mimicry,4.2
#Your body is made of bubbles, or can be transformed into them at will. In homogeneous form you are nearly impossible to damage conventionally, but a careless pop can leave you scattered across the room.
1192. Bubble Slime Mimicry,3.8
#Your body is made of a viscous bubble slime, capable of producing bubbles directly from its surface. You can flatten, stretch and reshape yourself freely, though returning to your original form takes practice.
1193. Buffalo Physiology,3.1
#You are or can transform into a buffalo or bison, gaining immense weight, trampling strength and a stubborn endurance. Your charge is nearly impossible to stop once committed.
1194. Bugbear Physiology,3.9
#You are a Bugbear, the bogeyman of English folklore that lures away misbehaving children. You possess frightening strength, a fear-inducing aura and claws built for the hunt, though cold iron and religious icons can harm you and you weaken when no one fears you.
1195. Buggane Physiology,4.5
#You are a Buggane, the malicious troll-like monster of Manx folklore. You possess immense strength capable of tearing roofs from houses and altering landscapes in a fight, though you share the vulnerabilities of fairy folk and giant-kin alike.
1196. Bul-Gae Physiology,4.6
#Korean Mythology - You are a Bul-Gae, a legendary hound from the kingdom of darkness, sent by its king to seize the sun and moon. You possess the persistence and hunting prowess of a celestial beast, but the sun burns your mouth and the moon freezes it, making your grand task eternally out of reach.
1197. Bulletproof Durability,3.5
#You are immune or highly resistant to bullets and gunfire, either through tough skin, armored physiology or rapid healing. You still feel the impact and knockback, and high-caliber or contact shots may still breach your defenses.
1198. Bullywug Physiology,2.9
#DnD - You possess the traits of a bullywug, an amphibian humanoid. You gain powerful leg muscles for long leaps, a long sticky tongue, the ability to breathe underwater and skin that must stay moist or you begin to suffer.
1199. Bunyip Physiology,4.3
#You have the form of a bunyip, the shapeless carnivorous water monster of Aboriginal myth. Your exact appearance is never fixed, shifting between witnesses, and you are an apex predator in any billabong, river or swamp, with immense strength and a paralyzing roar.
1200. Burning Kiss,2.8
#Your kiss burns whatever it touches, scorching lips on contact and capable of incinerating flesh with prolonged contact. Romantic life gets complicated, and the power may be constantly active.
1201. Buruburu Physiology,3.8
#You are a Buruburu, a Japanese yokai of cowardice that manifests to the fearful and causes them to shiver uncontrollably before fleeing. You feed on fear and can induce terror in those who meet your gaze, but the fearless and the strong-willed are immune, and shrine rituals can seal you away.
1202. Butter Mimicry,2.1
#Your body is made of butter, either anatomically identical to your old form or as homogeneous matter you can reshape freely. Vulnerable to heat and mold.
1203. Butterfly Physiology,2.9
#You either are or can transform into a butterfly, gaining flight, delicate compound vision, and the traits of whichever species you take on.
1204. Butterflyfolk Physiology,3.5
#You are a butterflyfolk, a humanoid butterfly race from fantasy. You possess delicate wings, enhanced agility, and the grace of your kin while retaining a humanoid form and mind.
1205. Bwbachod Physiology,3.2
#Welsh Mythology - You are a bwbachod, a household brownie-goblin trickster spirit. You loyally serve whoever summons you, tidying homes and tending lands, but will turn wrathful if denied your due offering of fresh cream and butter.
1206. Byobu Nozoki Physiology,2.9
#Japanese Mythology - You are a Byobu Nozoki, an impossibly tall yokai in white robes who peers over folding screens at acts of intimacy. You feed off sexual misdeeds and possess the mischievous nature common to tsukumogami, but are weak to shrine rituals and lust negation.
1207. Bypassing Anchoring,5.4
#You are immune to any attempts at bypassing your immunities. Powers that would slip around your defenses simply fail to take hold, though immunity negation and removal still work on you normally.
1208. Cù-sìth Physiology,4.6
#Scottish Mythology - You are or can transform into a Cù-sìth, a shaggy dark-green forest hellhound the size of a cow. You hunt in absolute silence, broken only by three terrifying barks that can be heard for miles, even far out at sea.
1209. Cŵn Annwn Physiology,5.0
#Welsh Mythology - You are or can transform into a Cŵn Annwn, a white red-eared hellhound of Arawn's wild hunt. You hunt the souls of oathbreakers and the damned across moors and mountains, your bay heralding the arrival of death itself.
1210. Cabbit Physiology,1.4
#You either are or can transform into a cabbit, a hybrid of cat and rabbit. Cute, nimble, with twitchy ears and a curious disposition. Mostly just adorable.
1211. Cacatuidae Physiology,1.5
#You either are or can transform into a cockatoo. Loud, crested, clever enough to pick locks, and blessed with flight. Unfortunately you can be controlled by avian manipulators.
1212. Cacodemon Physiology,6.3
#Greek Mythology - You are a cacodemon, a minor demonic spirit of bad luck and ruinous manipulation. You radiate misfortune onto those around you, guiding them into disastrous situations, and are a powerful shapeshifter on top of it. Weak to demon slayers and the light of agathodaemons.
1213. Cacomistle Physiology,1.7
#You either are or can transform into a cacomistle, a small nocturnal mammal resembling a half-cat, half-raccoon. Nimble, stealthy, and great at climbing, but not much in a fight.
1214. Cactus Cat Physiology,3.0
#North American Folklore - You are or can transform into a Cactus Cat, a bobcat-sized creature covered in hair-like thorns with long spines on your legs and an armored branching tail. You slash open cacti to drink their fermented juice, and your drunken shrieks carry across the desert night.
1215. Cactus Physiology,2.8
#Your body is made of cactus, spined and water-retaining. Attackers who strike you impale themselves on your thorns, but you need sunlight and water and are quite slow.
1216. Caffeine Empowerment,3.1
#You become stronger, faster, and more durable by consuming caffeinated products. Coffee, tea, soda, or energy drinks all count, and heavy doses can even slow your aging, but crash and addiction are very real concerns.
1217. Cake Mimicry,1.9
#Your body is made entirely of cake, either anatomically identical to your old form or as homogeneous dessert. You are soft, edible, and vulnerable to rot.
1218. Cake Monster Physiology,2.7
#You are a cake monster, a sugary abomination whose body and traits depend on your flavor. You are stronger than you look, but you can still be eaten, and monster slayers will have a field day.
1219. Caladrius Physiology,5.2
#Roman Mythology - You are or can transform into a Caladrius, a snow-white mythological bird that heals the sick by drawing their ailments into yourself and then flying off to disperse them into the sky. Anti-regeneration and healing impairment can counter you, but few ailments are beyond your touch.
1220. Calendar Empowerment,3.3
#Your strength, speed and durability fluctuate with the calendar. Certain days, seasons or times grant you massive boosts and even unlock new abilities, while others leave you at baseline. You may find yourself praying for the right holiday before a fight.
1221. Calm State,4.1
#Your mind, body, heart and soul exist in a state of unshakable inner peace. You still feel fear, anger and sorrow, but they never spiral or cloud your judgement; every emotion is processed with perfect clarity. No amount of pain, terror or provocation can make you panic or hesitate.
1222. Calmness Empowerment,3.0
#Your strength, speed and durability grow with the calmness of yourself and those around you. The more serene the environment, the stronger you become. Useless in the middle of a panicking crowd.
1223. Caloric Conversion,3.2
#You fuel your powers by burning the calories you eat. The harder you push, the more you need to eat to keep up, and running dry means your body starts consuming its own life force to compensate. Sustained overuse can starve you to death.
1224. Cambion Physiology Transcendent,7.8
#You are a transcendent cambion, born from the union of a mortal and a demon of the highest order. Your physical and mystical abilities wildly surpass ordinary cambions, letting you overpower angels and demons by the legion. You wield demonic power at a nigh-omnipotent level, though divine slayers and transcendent weaponry can still bring you down.
1225. Cambion Physiology,4.6
#You are a cambion, the offspring of a demon and a mortal human. You possess demonic abilities tempered by your human half, granting you enhanced physicals, a touch of hellfire or corruption magic, and a lifespan that exceeds mortal norms. Holy powers and angels may give you serious trouble.
1226. Camelid Physiology,2.3
#You are or can transform into a camelid, gaining the resilience, endurance and desert-adapted physiology of a camel, llama or alpaca. You can go days without water, spit with remarkable accuracy and carry heavy loads with ease.
1227. Camelidoid Physiology,2.6
#You are a camelidoid, a humanoid of camelid descent. You retain the dexterity of a human while gaining a camel's endurance, water retention and surefooted stride across harsh terrain. Your spit game is also notably strong.
1228. Candy Empowerment,3.2
#Eating candy makes you stronger, faster, and more durable, and grants full sustenance without the sugar crash. The more exotic the sweet, the greater the boost, though poisoned candy is a very real risk.
1229. Candy Mimicry,3.5
#Your body is or can become candy. You retain your full anatomy in this form but can also shift into homogeneous sugar, though fire melts you and cold makes you brittle.
1230. Candy Monster Physiology,4.1
#You are or can transform into a candy monster, a supernatural confectionary being with a slew of candy-based abilities. Your body is made of living sweets and you can reshape it into fangs, claws, or sprawling sugary horrors.
1231. Candy Tears,1.5
#You cry candy instead of tears. A strange, sticky blessing that makes heartbreak a little sweeter.
1232. Canine Monster Physiology,4.3
#You are or can transform into a canine monster — a supernatural beast shaped like a hound but far more terrible. Enhanced strength, senses, and a feral edge that most normal predators cannot match.
1233. Canine Physiology,3.4
#You are or can transform into a canine, whether wolf, fox, jackal, coyote, or domestic dog. You gain all of their senses and physical traits, though chocolate is now genuinely poisonous to you.
1234. Caninefolk Physiology,3.7
#You are a member of the caninefolk, a humanoid race of dog-people. You possess a canine's senses, strength, and loyalty with a human's mind and hands, ranging from noble wolfkin to scrappy street-mutt.
1235. Cannibalism Empowerment,4.6
#(Horror) Eating the flesh of your own species makes you stronger, faster, tougher, and may even unlock new abilities tied to those you consume. The boost can sustain you indefinitely and slow your aging, but it only works if you're willing to pay the price.
1236. Cannon Mimicry,3.2
#Your body is or can become a cannon, either retaining your shape in mortar form or transforming wholesale into homogeneous cannon-matter. Fire yourself at your enemies and hope the recoil doesn't hurt too much.
1237. Capability Retention,4.6
#Your powers, skills, and traits remain with you no matter what form you take. Turned into a frog? Still have your fire magic. Transmuted into a sword? You can still cast spells and think clearly. Your essence carries your capabilities regardless of the vessel.
1238. Capacitor,4.2
#Your body acts as a living capacitor, able to absorb energy of any kind and store it for later use. You can channel the stored energy however you please, whether to empower your strikes, fuel other abilities, or release it in a single devastating discharge. Storage capacity scales with your training.
1239. Caprine Monster Physiology,4.0
#You are or can transform into a caprine monster, a terrifying hybrid beast combining the worst qualities of goats with nightmarish proportions. Enhanced physical abilities, curling horns capable of shattering stone, and an unsettling stare are standard issue.
1240. Caprine Physiology,2.6
#You are or can transform into a caprine, a goat, sheep, ibex, or musk ox. You gain their sure-footedness on treacherous terrain, powerful ramming horns, and surprisingly tough constitution. Partial transformation lets you keep your hands while getting the horns and hooves.
1241. Carabidae Physiology,2.2
#You are or can transform into a ground beetle, either partially or fully. You gain a reinforced carapace, powerful mandibles, and the ability to spray defensive chemicals from your abdomen. Be careful around bigger creatures and anyone with Insect Manipulation.
1242. Carangiformes Physiology,2.1
#You are or can transform into a carangiformes fish such as a cobia, jack, remora, or dolphinfish. You become a fast open-water swimmer, and remora-type users gain a suction disc on their head that can latch onto almost any large surface for a free ride.
1243. Carbuncle Physiology,3.5
#You are or can transform into a carbuncle, a small South American cryptid with a glowing red gem set into its forehead. The gem is said to bring immense fortune to whoever claims it, and you can shutter it with a natural lid when you want to hide. Being small has its usual disadvantages, but you are incredibly lucky.
1244. Card Empowerment,2.8
#Being near cards makes you stronger, faster and more durable, and may unlock other card-related abilities as you grow in affinity. Strong users can even draw sustenance from cards or slow their own aging, provided they keep a healthy deck nearby.
1245. Card Immunity,2.2
#You are completely immune to cards and card-based powers, direct or indirect. A lifesaver against a Card Magic user and essentially worthless against anyone else.
1246. Card Mimicry,2.7
#You can transform part or all of your body into cards, either retaining your anatomy or becoming homogeneous card matter. In card form you are subject to everything that would damage normal cards, including water and fire.
1247. Cardboard Mimicry,1.6
#You can transform part or all of your body into cardboard, a slightly more durable alternative to paper or card. Slightly better against blunt impact than Card Mimicry, still ruined by a rainstorm.
1248. Carnivorous Horse Physiology,4.2
#Greek Mythology - You are or can transform into a flesh-eating horse like the Mares of Diomedes, possessing enhanced strength, speed and a taste for human meat. These creatures were legendary for their ferocity, and a pack of them is considerably more dangerous than a lone one.
1249. Carnivorous Plant Physiology,4.1
#Your body is made of carnivorous plant matter, allowing you to transform fully or partially into a flytrap, sundew, pitcher plant or fantastical variant. You can sprout snapping jaws and digestive sacs from your form, but you may slow down and require sunlight or water to sustain yourself.
1250. Carnosaur Physiology,4.6
#You possess the traits and biology of carnosaurs, the large predatory dinosaurs of the Jurassic and Cretaceous. You gain immense physical strength, terrifying jaws, razor claws and the predatory instincts of an apex hunter, and can transform fully into a carnosaur if you wish.
1251. Carpet Mimicry,2.2
#You can transform your body into a carpet, either fully or partially, allowing you to lie flat and unnoticed or smother targets under your woven form. Vulnerable to fire, moths, and being vacuumed.
1252. Carrot Mimicry,1.6
#You can transform your body into a carrot or a bundle of carrots, either retaining your anatomy as orange root vegetable or dispersing into homogeneous carrot matter. Extremely vulnerable to being eaten, especially by rabbits.
1253. Cartoon Dragon Physiology,5.2
#You are or can transform into a cartoon dragon, combining the fearsome physical traits of a draconic form with the absurd elasticity, immortality and physics-defying antics of a toon. You breathe fire that squashes and stretches like a gag, and shrug off anvils with a comedic bounce.
1254. Cartoon Immortality,6.5
#You possess the unkillable nature of a cartoon character, recovering instantly from any harm no matter how absurd, from being flattened by a steamroller to falling off a cliff. Even if you somehow die, you return as a ghost and climb back into your body, though you still feel pain and indignity along the way.
1255. Cartoon Machine Physiology,5.1
#You either are or can transform into a cartoon machine, combining mechanical form and function with the reality-bending logic of toon characters. Your gears squash and stretch, your bolts pop off in comedic ways and somehow you still work better than any real robot.
1256. Cartoon Mimicry,6.0
#You can transform completely into a cartoon character of any style, whether Western animation, anime, 3D CGI or anything in between. While in toon form you can break the laws of physics, stretch and squash your body, and become nearly impossible to kill, though some users struggle to return to their original form.
1257. Cash Mimicry,2.8
#Your body is made of paper money and can scatter into individual bills or reform into a single shape. You can sculpt extra limbs and weapons out of your cash form, but you are vulnerable to water, fire and wind like any ordinary banknote.
1258. Cassette Mimicry,2.7
#You can transform your body into a cassette, audiotape or cassette player, recording and playing back sounds through your own form. Sound Immunity and Sound Nullification are near-perfect counters, and your storage capacity limits how many tapes you can hold at once.
1259. Castorimorph Physiology,2.9
#You are or can transform into a castorimorph, including beavers, pocket gophers and kangaroo rats. You gain powerful gnawing teeth, burrowing instincts, and in the case of beavers, remarkable engineering prowess with wood and water.
1260. Cat Monster Physiology,5.3
#You are or can transform into a monstrous feline, a grimalkin or caterwaul, drawing on the many forms of supernatural cats from folklore and pop culture. Your exact abilities depend on the kind of cat monster you embody, but all variants possess fearsome physical prowess and an aura of dread befitting the beast.
1261. Cat Sìth Physiology,5.5
#You are or can transform into a Cat Sìth, a fae black cat with a white chest spot from Celtic mythology. You are intelligent, can speak and walk on two legs in silence, and can steal the souls of the recently dead by passing over their corpse before burial. On Samhain your power peaks.
1262. Catapult Mimicry,2.5
#You can transform your body into a catapult, either retaining your anatomy in siege engine form or becoming homogeneous catapult matter. You can launch objects, projectiles, or even parts of yourself at distant targets with tremendous force.
1263. Caterpillar Physiology,2.1
#You are or can transform into a caterpillar, the larval stage of lepidoptera. You are slow and soft-bodied, but you can climb almost any surface, chew through plant matter with ease, and one day may metamorphose into something far grander.
1264. Caterpillarfolk Physiology,2.8
#You are or can transform into a caterpillarfolk, a humanoid caterpillar hybrid. You gain enhanced climbing, sticky feet, and the ability to produce silk from your body. Given enough time and a safe place, you can even cocoon yourself to heal grievous wounds.
1265. Catoblepas Physiology,5.2
#You are or can transform into a Catoblepas, a buffalo-bodied beast with a boar-like head too heavy to lift. Your bronze-scaled hide shrugs off most attacks, and your gaze and breath are lethal to any who meet them, petrifying or outright killing weaker beings. The trouble is actually aiming that head.
1266. Catwere Physiology,2.9
#You are a catwere, a cat that transforms into a human or a human-feline hybrid. In your feline form you are a perfectly ordinary housecat, but in your other shapes you retain the reflexes, senses, and instincts of a cat.
1267. Caudata Physiology,2.2
#You are or can transform into a salamander or salamander-like creature. You gain incredible regeneration of limbs and organs, moist permeable skin, and the ability to breathe underwater.
1268. Caudataoid Physiology,3.0
#You are or can transform into a humanoid salamander, newt, axolotl, or similar amphibian hybrid. Your regeneration is top tier, being able to regrow entire limbs in minutes, and you are equally at home on land or underwater.
1269. Cave Mimicry,3.1
#Your body takes on the traits of a cave, your flesh becoming rough stone, your insides a hollow echoing space that can shelter others within you. You are incredibly durable and resistant, but you may have difficulty moving.
1270. Ccoa Physiology,6.2
#You are or can transform into a Ccoa, a massive divine feline from Quechua myth. You can fly with ease, generate lightning from your eyes, spit hail, urinate rain, and cause both solar and lunar eclipses. You answer to no one but the higher Apus, though proper offerings may sway you.
1271. Cecaelia Physiology,3.5
#You are or can transform into a cecaelia, a merfolk variant with a humanoid upper body and an octopus lower half. Your tentacles are strong, dexterous, and numerous, and you are a powerful swimmer, but on land you are clumsy and slow.
1272. Celebration Embodiment,5.7
#You are the living embodiment of parties, festivals, and celebrations. Wherever you go a celebration follows, drawing people into joy and revelry that you can shape to your whims. You might get carried away, and a party you start may rage out of your control.
1273. Celedon Physiology,5.3
#Greek Mythology - You are or can transform into a Celedon, one of the Golden Charmers crafted by Hephaestus from pure gold for Apollo's temple at Delphi. Your body is living gold, strikingly beautiful, and your voice can enchant any who hear it. As an automaton-like being you cannot heal naturally and must consume gold to repair yourself.
1274. Cellular Consciousness,5.8
#Your mind is spread throughout your cellular makeup, giving you awareness and fine control at the cellular scale. You can consciously command every cell, organ and organelle in your body, coordinating processes that are normally automatic and performing operations impossible for ordinary minds.
1275. Cemetery Empowerment,3.5
#You become stronger, faster, and more durable while in cemeteries or burial grounds, and may unlock death-affinity abilities while standing among the dead. Some users draw sustenance from the graves themselves and slow their aging as long as the dead are near.
1276. Centaur Physiology,3.8
#You are or can transform into a centaur, bearing the upper body of a human and the lower body of a horse. You possess great physical strength, endurance, and speed, along with a proud warrior's disposition — and a tendency toward drinking, if you lean into the original myths.
1277. Center of Mass Defiance,3.3
#You can ignore your own center of mass, granting you extraordinary balance, the ability to move while unstable, and resistance to being toppled. Walking remains level no matter the terrain, and you can alter your own trajectory mid-motion.
1278. Center of Mass Infringement,3.6
#You can violate your own center of mass without any visible change to your body, infringing upon physical laws in subtle, invisible ways. To outside observers you look perfectly normal, yet you can perform feats of balance and motion that ought to be impossible.
1279. Centipede Physiology,3.0
#You are or can transform into a centipede, gaining their many-legged resilience, venomous bite, and segmented body. You may be able to split individual body parts or multiply into several smaller forms.
1280. Cephalopod Physiology,3.4
#You are or can transform into a cephalopod such as an octopus, squid, cuttlefish, or nautilus. You gain boneless flexibility, ink discharge, incredible camouflage, and the ability to squeeze through impossibly tight spaces.
1281. Cephalopodoid Physiology,3.6
#You are or can take on the form of a cephalopodoid, a humanoid cephalopod creature that stalks fantasy settings. Combines the dexterity of human form with tentacled appendages, ink, and aquatic adaptation.
1282. Cephalothorax Physiology,2.2
#You are or can transform into a cephalothorax — a walking, waddling head with limbs directly attached. Surprisingly mobile for an entity with no torso, and you never have to worry about back pain.
1283. Ceratopsid Physiology,3.4
#You are or can transform into a ceratopsid dinosaur, gaining the massive frilled skull, horns, and tank-like body of a triceratops or its kin. Charge through anything that stands in your way.
1284. Cerberus Physiology,5.4
#Greek Myth - You are or can transform into Cerberus, the three-headed hound of Hades and guardian of the Underworld. You possess immense physical power, demonic durability, and the presence of a creature meant to hold souls back from the living world. Size optional, menace mandatory.
1285. Cereal Mimicry,1.6
#Your body is made of or can transform into cereal of any kind. You retain your anatomy but are soggy in milk and crunchy under pressure. Try not to get eaten.
1286. Cervid Physiology,2.8
#You possess the traits and abilities of cervids, able to partially or fully transform into a deer, elk, moose or reindeer. Enhanced agility, powerful legs, antlers for defense and a stronger connection to forests.
1287. Cervine Monster Physiology,4.2
#You are or can transform into a cervine monster, a twisted horror of antler and hoof. Your strength and ferocity far exceeds a normal deer, with monstrous physical stats and an unsettling presence. Watch out for Monster Slayers.
1288. Cetacean Physiology,3.0
#You are or can transform into a cetacean - whale, dolphin or porpoise - either partially or fully. You gain incredible aquatic prowess, echolocation and the raw mass of whatever cetacean you pick. Needs water to be useful.
1289. Cetaceanoid Physiology,3.3
#You are a cetaceanoid, a humanoid cetacean hybrid. You possess the physical prowess and aquatic adaptations of a whale or dolphin while retaining a humanoid form, able to walk on land and swim with equal grace.
1290. Chain Mimicry,3.7
#Your body is made of or can transform into chains. You can unravel your limbs into whirling links to extend your reach, entangle enemies or slip through small gaps. Reverting back to your original form may not always be possible.
1291. Chainsaw Mimicry,2.6
#You can transform into a chainsaw or partially take on chainsaw anatomy. Your body roars to life as a mechanical cutting tool, able to rend flesh and wood alike. Hopefully you like the noise.
1292. Chakra Empowerment,4.8
#Your physical and supernatural capabilities are amplified by the opened chakra points along your spine. The more chakras you develop and open, the stronger you become, unlocking abilities tied to each chakra's affinity. Fully opening all seven could even slow your aging.
1293. Chameleon Physiology,2.7
#Your physiology is that of a chameleon. You can freely alter your skin's color and pattern to blend into your surroundings, your eyes can move independently for a 360-degree field of vision, and you possess a long prehensile tongue.
1294. Chameleonic Nature,3.3
#You are a natural at blending in, whether that be through altering your appearance, your mannerisms, or your presence. You can slip into any social situation unnoticed and your body subtly shifts to match your surroundings, making you very difficult to track or spot.
1295. Change Empowerment,4.6
#You become stronger, faster and more durable the more change occurs around you, whether it be the change of the seasons, your own transformations, or the shifting of the world itself. In a static environment you are merely human, but in times of upheaval you are unstoppable.
1296. Chanting Empowerment,3.8
#You become stronger, faster and more durable from the cheering, chanting and applause of others. A small crowd gives you a noticeable boost, but a stadium full of screaming fans could turn you into a walking titan. You are at your weakest when no one is paying attention.
1297. Chaos Adaptation,4.7
#You are able to survive and adapt to any chaotic environment, from worlds with constantly shifting space-time laws to dimensions of pure discord. Your body and mind adjust on the fly to whatever randomness is thrown at you, rendering you immune to the disorienting effects of chaos itself.
1298. Chaos Derivation,9.2
#You are the source from which all chaos, strife, discord and havoc flow across the cosmos. Every act of disorder, every broken law, every moment of mayhem in all of existence originates from you. Should you ever die without passing on the source, all chaos in reality would cease, and reality itself would collapse from the absence.
1299. Chaos Empowerment,4.6
#You become stronger, faster and more durable the more chaos surrounds you. A calm orderly day leaves you unremarkable, but a riot, a war, or a full-on apocalyptic event turns you into a nightmare. Users of Order Manipulation are your greatest weakness.
1300. Chaos Heart,6.0
#Your heart is infused with the essence of pure chaos, granting you immortality through constant regeneration from almost any wound as well as the ability to manipulate chaotic energies for a wide variety of feats. If your heart is ever destroyed, however, it will release all of its stored chaos in a catastrophic explosion.
1301. Chaos Immunity,5.4
#You are completely immune to anything that can be considered chaotic, from chaotic influences to beings to essences. Disorder cannot touch you, although neutral or orderly things can still harm you normally. Your fundamental incompatibility with chaos means you stand as a pillar of stability no matter the madness around you.
1302. Chaos Mimicry,6.3
#Your body is made of chaos itself, whether fully formed or as a homogeneous mass of disorder flowing through flesh. You gain potent chaotic abilities and your form is difficult to pin down or harm conventionally. Takes time to fully master control over your own unstable essence.
1303. Chaos Power Link,5.4
#Your chaotic nature is linked directly to your powers, fueling and amplifying them through discord. The more unstable you are, the stronger your abilities become, but this goes both ways - if your chaos spirals out of control, so do your powers.
1304. Characteristic Power Reflection,4.0
#Your powers reflect your personality, traits, and desires. The lonely may turn invisible, the regretful may rewind time, the proud may grow untouchable. As your inner self shifts, so do your abilities, which means your weaknesses may also be reflected and amplified.
1305. Chaste Power,4.1
#Your powers are bound to your personal chastity, the longer you remain pure the stronger you become, potentially reaching divine levels of strength at the pinnacle of your abstinence. Engaging in intimate activities can weaken or completely strip away your powers, so expect people to try and seduce or assault you for the sake of sabotage.
1306. Chastity Empowerment,3.6
