#You grow stronger, faster and more durable from the chastity of yourself and others, with prolonged abstinence unlocking new abilities and even slowing your aging. The stress of resisting temptation may be considerable, and users of Sexual or Desire Inducement can corrupt your innocence.
1307. Cheek Pouch Protrusion,2.3
#You possess large cheek pouches like a hamster or chipmunk, allowing you to store weapons, tools, food and various objects inside them and retrieve them when needed. Limited by how much your cheeks can actually stretch without giving you lockjaw.
1308. Cheering Empowerment,3.5
#You grow stronger, faster and more durable the more you are cheered for by spectators and fans, with enough cheering you can even unlock more powerful forms or heal yourself. Useless when nobody's watching, but devastating when you have a crowd on your side.
1309. Cheese Mimicry,3.2
#Your body is made of cheese, or you can transform into cheese at will. You can become homogeneous dairy or retain your anatomical shape, though either way you are vulnerable to mold and intense heat will melt you into a puddle of fondue.
1310. Cheetah Physiology,3.3
#Allows you to transform partially or fully into a cheetah, gaining the immense running speed, agility and predatory instincts of the world's fastest land animal. Your sprinting speed is unmatched though your endurance at full tilt is limited.
1311. Chemical Empowerment,3.9
#You grow stronger, faster and more durable when in contact with chemicals, with prolonged exposure unlocking new abilities and even slowing your aging. Overuse may induce dependency or addiction, turning your empowerment into a chemical hunger.
1312. Chemical Reaction Immunity,3.6
#You are immune to the effects of chemical reactions. Acids do not burn you, poisons do not poison you, fire does not oxidize your flesh. Your body simply refuses to partake in the chemistry happening around it.
1313. Chemical Repository,3.0
#Your body stores a variety of foreign chemicals and drugs within it, which you can draw upon at will. You are immune to whatever you carry inside you, and can secrete, exhale or inject them through contact as needed.
1314. Cherry Mimicry,2.3
#You are made of cherries, or can transform your body into cherries at will. Depending on your level, you retain your organs as cherry-flesh or become homogeneous fruit matter. Bite-sized and vulnerable, but strangely charming.
1315. Cherub Physiology,7.6
#You are a Cherub, a biblical angel of the higher choirs, possessing four faces and four wings and immense divine authority. Your body radiates holy power, your presence demands awe, and you can channel sacred flame and judgment. Vulnerable to Angel Slayers.
1316. Cherufe Physiology,6.5
#You are a Cherufe, a near-apocalyptic demonic giant of Mapuche folklore dwelling in volcanoes, your body made of magma, crystal and rock. You can trigger eruptions, earthquakes, and untold destruction. Your wrath may be temporarily soothed by sacrifice, and slayers of giants or demons can wound you.
1317. Cheshire Cat Physiology,5.2
#Alice in Wonderland - You are a Cheshire Cat, capable of vanishing part or all of your body at will, leaving only your grin behind. You possess uncanny agility, riddling intelligence, and the unsettling ability to appear wherever you please with a smile that lingers after you leave.
1318. Cheval Mallet Physiology,5.0
#You are a Cheval Mallet, a demonic horse of French folklore that appears as a strikingly beautiful steed at night to lure travelers, who are then carried off never to return. Your beauty is hypnotic, your speed supernatural, and your intent rarely kind. Warded off by holy relics such as the medal of St. Benedict.
1319. Chi Durability,3.4
#Your body is passively reinforced by your own chi, making you far tougher than an ordinary person of your build. The more chi you have, the more punishment you can soak, though durability negation and chi inhibitors are still hard counters.
1320. Chi Empowerment,3.6
#You grow stronger, faster, and tougher the more you come into contact with chi, whether from your own reserves or absorbing from the environment. With enough saturation you may slow your aging, draw sustenance from chi alone, or unlock dormant abilities.
1321. Chi Entity Physiology,5.3
#You are a being whose very existence is woven from and tied to chi itself. You can manipulate chi in all its forms, access a wide range of chi-based abilities, and your physiology is as much spiritual as it is physical. The downside is that hostile chi manipulators can target you directly.
1322. Chicken Monster Physiology,2.8
#You are or can transform into a chicken monster, a grotesque fowl-shaped creature with enhanced size, strength and savagery. You remain vulnerable to monster slayers and the usual hunters of twisted beasts.
1323. Chicken Physiology,1.4
#You are or can transform into a chicken. Clucking, pecking, flapping uselessly, laying the occasional egg. A rooster form may come with more aggression, a hen form with more eggs.
1324. Chiko Physiology,6.5
#You are a chiko, a nogitsune, the most powerful and wicked rank an evil kitsune can achieve. You possess a wide array of dark fox-spirit powers and a deeply cruel streak, though rituals, prayers and Shinto charms made to ward off evil spirits can still bind or banish you.
1325. Chimera Physiology,5.1
#You are or can transform into a chimera of Greek myth, a ferocious hybrid of lion, goat and snake with a devastating fire breath. Your physical stats are pushed well beyond human limits and your multiple heads grant you incredible perception and versatility in battle.
1326. Chimpanzee Physiology,2.1
#You are or can transform into a chimpanzee, gaining their superior climbing ability, raw arm strength and surprising intelligence. Hope you like bananas.
1327. Chinchilla Physiology,1.2
#You are or can transform into a chinchilla. Extremely fluffy, very cute, and you can jump surprisingly high, but good luck fighting anything bigger than a housecat.
1328. Chindi Physiology,5.4
#You are or can transform into a Chindi, a demonic spirit from Navajo mythology formed from the collected evil of the dead. You ride dust devils, inflict terrible diseases and misfortune with a touch, and your malevolent presence alone can wither the living. Vulnerable to Navajo rituals and relics.
1329. Chip Mimicry,1.4
#Your body is made of or can transform entirely into chips. You retain your shape and anatomy, but you are now edible, crunchy, and vulnerable to hungry opponents and anyone with rot inducement.
1330. Chipmunk Physiology,1.1
#You are or can transform into a chipmunk. Small, quick, cheek pouches full of nuts, and about as threatening as you'd expect.
1331. Chloro-Mechanical Physiology,5.3
#You are or can become a chloro-mechanical being, a robotic construct fused with plant-life. You possess a wide range of plant-based abilities channelled through mechanical systems, combining the regeneration of flora with the precision and durability of machinery.
1332. Chochin-Obake Physiology,1.4
#You are a Chōchin-obake, a paper lantern yokai that awakened after growing old. You are mostly harmless but excel at scaring unsuspecting humans with a flickering flame and a long lolling tongue.
1333. Chochin-bi Physiology,2.1
#You are a Chōchin-bi, a floating ball of ghostly fire said to drift along the footpaths between rice fields. You can vanish the moment mortals approach and relight yourself elsewhere, a trickster flame born of kitsune and tanuki mischief.
1334. Chocolate Empowerment,3.2
#Eating chocolate makes you stronger, faster, and more durable, and may unlock latent abilities tied to cocoa. You can draw full sustenance from chocolate alone and, with enough of it, slow or even halt your aging.
1335. Chocolate Mimicry,3.5
#Your body is made of chocolate, or you can transform it into chocolate at will. You can shift between an anatomically identical chocolate form and a homogeneous cocoa mass, but you are edible, sensitive to heat, and vulnerable to blunt attacks that can chip and break you.
1336. Chordeva Physiology,3.9
#You are a Chordeva, a demonic cat-witch from folklore that preys upon the old, sick, and dying. You possess feline grace, vampiric hunger, and the cruelty of a wicked witch, but sunlight, wooden stakes, and running water will undo you.
1337. Chort Physiology,4.1
#You are a Chort, a Slavic demon that traffics in wishes and stolen souls. You are crafty and powerful enough to build a castle in a single night, though clever heroes can trick you into doing their bidding, and holy rituals and relics will harm you greatly.
1338. Chronoscience,7.8
#You possess comprehensive knowledge of time and all of its intricacies. Every secret of temporal phenomena is laid bare to you, from how time flows to everything encapsulated within it. Your omniscience is limited to things relating to space-time and may be confined to a specific timeline or universe.
1339. Chrysomallos Physiology,5.2
#Greek Mythology - You are or can transform into Chrysomallos, the golden winged ram whose fleece became the legendary Golden Fleece. You possess flight, incredible durability in your golden coat, and the divine aura of a creature gifted by Hermes himself.
1340. Chthoniscience,7.4
#You know everything about the underworld, the netherworlds, and all the undergrounds. Every secret of the realms of the dead, every soul that dwells there, and every law that governs them is laid bare to you. Your omniscience is strictly limited to the underworld and things related to it.
1341. Chupacabra Physiology,3.6
#You are or can transform into a chupacabra, a reptilian-dog hybrid cryptid with leathery gray skin, spines down its back, a forked tongue and glowing red eyes. You have enhanced predatory senses, fangs capable of draining blood, and leave a sulfuric stench in your wake.
1342. Church Grim Physiology,4.7
#You are or can transform into a church grim, a hellhound-like guardian spirit of cemeteries and churches. You possess ghostly powers, supernatural strength, and a terrifying presence that wards off thieves, witches and even the devil. You cannot leave the grounds you are bound to.
1343. Churel Physiology,4.4
#You are or can transform into a Churel, a vengeful female revenant from Hindu folklore. You can shift between hideous and alluring forms to lure men, drain their life-force, and reduce them to frail old men. You may be warded off by certain rituals and relics of Indian tradition.
1344. Cicada Physiology,2.2
#You are or can transform into a cicada, or other related hoppers like leafhoppers and treehoppers. You gain their piercing song, hopping ability, and chitinous exoskeleton. Unfortunately you also inherit their vulnerability to birds, spiders and pesticides.
1345. Ciconiiform Physiology,2.3
#You are or can transform into a stork, gaining flight, long legs and a powerful beak. A decent utility pick if you enjoy wading through marshes or delivering babies.
1346. Cigarette Mimicry,1.4
#You are or can transform your body into cigarettes. In this form you retain your shape and organs, but you are made of tobacco and paper which makes you extremely flammable. A very niche ability unless you enjoy the smell of nicotine.
1347. Cinnamon Mimicry,1.8
#You are or can transform your body into cinnamon, either retaining your anatomy or becoming homogeneous spice matter. The type of cinnamon you are made of varies, and you are edible, sensitive to heat, and vulnerable to strong winds.
1348. Cipactli Physiology,6.0
#Aztec Mythology - You are or can transform into Cipactli, the primordial sea monster that is part crocodile, part fish and part toad. Every joint on your body has an extra hungry mouth, granting you immense destructive power and an insatiable appetite that can consume almost anything.
1349. Circulatory Armor,3.5
#Your circulatory system is reinforced with supernatural armor, drastically increasing the durability of your veins, arteries and heart. This grants you great resistance against internal attacks, blood manipulation, poisons and even mental powers that route through your brain's blood supply.
1350. Classical Element Empowerment,3.8
#You become stronger, faster and more durable when you come in contact with the classical elements. Standing in a forest, near a river or under the open sky gives you power, but being empowered by one element may leave you vulnerable to its opposite.
1351. Claw Retraction,2.8
#You have razor-sharp claws of bone, keratin, metal or energy that can be projected from your fingertips, wrists or even feet at will. Retracting them cleanly takes practice and they may interfere with fine manual tasks.
1352. Clay Mimicry,3.6
#Your body is made of or can transform completely into clay. Semi-solid clay can absorb attacks and enemies alike and is nearly impossible to hurt, while dry clay is hard and brittle. Your abilities shift based on how much moisture you are holding.
1353. Clean Activity,1.6
#You can move, fight and perform tasks without ever leaving a mess behind. No mud tracked through the house, no knocked over vases, no splattered blood on your clothes. A blessing for assassins and toddlers alike.
1354. Cleanliness Empowerment,2.6
#You become stronger, faster and tougher in clean environments. A freshly mopped floor or a hot shower is enough to give you a noticeable boost, and a sterile operating room would let you throw cars. Filthy environments do nothing for you and may even weaken you.
1355. Clear Mind,5.2
#Your mind has reached a state of total clarity, the Meikyo Shisui of legend. You are unaffected by emotional manipulation, fear, rage or confusion, and your awareness and reaction time are at their absolute peak. The downside is that prolonged use may dull your emotions and slowly erode what makes you human.
1356. Clear Sight,4.1
#Your eyes pierce through all illusions, glamours and disguises of the supernatural. Shapeshifters, invisible spirits, false images and magical concealment are all laid bare to you, and you can perceive the true nature, age, gender and species of anything you look at. Does not protect you from mundane deception.
1357. Climate Empowerment,3.0
#You grow stronger, faster and more durable while inside a specific climate. Whether that is tropical, arctic, arid or temperate is determined at the moment of activation. Within your climate you may even draw vitality from the very air around you.
1358. Clock Mimicry,3.3
#Allows you to transform your body partially or fully into clocks. Your clock-form has all the same organs and functions but is made of ticking, whirring timepieces. Somewhat vulnerable to impact but surprisingly hard to kill.
1359. Clockwork Physiology,3.9
#Your body is a clockwork mechanism of springs, gears and intricate moving parts. You do not need food or air, only a source of power, whether that's a wind-up key, a battery or, for the masters, perpetual motion. Your movements can be smooth or jerky depending on your design and maintenance.
1360. Cloth Mimicry,3.1
#Allows you to transform your body into cloth, either maintaining your human shape as a walking soft-sculpture or becoming a homogeneous mass of fabric. You retain all your organs and functions but are vulnerable to anything that would threaten normal cloth — fire, shears, moths.
1361. Clothing Consumption,1.6
#You can eat and digest clothing to sustain yourself and fuel your powers. Silk tastes decent, denim is chewy, and a cheap polyester shirt tastes about as bad as you would expect. If you stop eating fabric, you starve.
1362. Clothing Empowerment,2.8
#You gain strength from the articles of clothing you wear, be it hats, gloves, shirts or coats. The more you wear, the stronger you become, but strip you naked and you are left as weak as an ordinary person.
1363. Cloud Mimicry,4.2
#Your body is made of or can transform entirely into clouds, becoming a drifting mass of water vapor. In this form you are hard to pin down but extremely delicate to concentrated impact, and strong winds may scatter you if you are not careful.
1364. Clouded Leopard Physiology,3.2
#You either are or can transform into a clouded leopard, either partially or fully. As a clouded leopard, you gain a stealthy frame, powerful climbing ability, exceptional agility in trees and the longest canines of any modern feline relative to body size.
1365. Clouded Mind,4.5
#Your mind is the dark counterpart to a Clear Mind, with every thought and action deeply intertwined with your emotions. Hesitation is gone, and raw emotional intensity fuels your abilities with unwavering resolve. The downside is obvious: a clouded mind fogs reason, and you may lose yourself to your stronger feelings.
1366. Clubbed Tail,2.7
#You possess a tail tipped with a heavy club of bone or keratin that you can swing as a brutal blunt weapon. Capable of crushing armour and breaking bones with a single sweep, though if your tail is removed, the ability goes with it.
1367. Clupeiform Physiology,1.5
#You either are or can transform into a clupeiform, the order of fish that includes herrings, anchovies and sardines. You gain the ability to swim in massive coordinated schools, which is useful if there happen to be dozens of you around.
1368. Clurichaun Physiology,3.2
#You are or can transform into a Clurichaun, the drunken goblin-kin of the Leprechaun. You possess minor fairy magic, surprising strength for your size, and a supernatural knack for tormenting thieves and cellar-owners. Vulnerable to iron and religious icons, and you are a hopeless drunk.
1369. Cnidarian Physiology,3.0
#You possess the traits of cnidarians such as jellyfish, coral and anemones. You can sting with neurotoxins, regenerate fragments of yourself, and partially or fully transform into a gelatinous, near-transparent medusa form that drifts through water with ease.
1370. Cnidarianoid Physiology,3.3
#You are a cnidarianoid, a humanoid hybrid of human and jellyfish or coral. You keep your shape and intellect while gaining stinging tendrils, semi-translucent flesh, and an amphibious body suited for deep water as much as dry land.
1371. Coal Mimicry,2.7
#Your body is made of or can transform into coal. You are tougher than flesh and resistant to blunt trauma, but slow-moving and flammable - prolonged fire will burn you down like any other lump of fuel.
1372. Coati Physiology,2.1
#You can transform fully or partially into a coati. You gain their agile climbing, sharp claws, a flexible snout capable of sniffing out food or hidden things, and the mischievous cleverness of the hog-nosed coon.
1373. Coblynau Physiology,2.9
#You are or can transform into a Coblynau, the helpful Welsh mine gnome. You possess a sharp instinct for finding ores and gems, enhanced durability for rockfalls, and a friendly supernatural aura. You grow weak and sickly when kept too long from underground places.
1374. Coccinellidae Physiology,2.0
#You can transform fully or partially into a ladybug. You gain a hard protective shell, the ability to shrink to insect size, functional wings, and the good-luck aura traditionally attached to the ladybird across many cultures.
1375. Cockatrice Physiology,4.6
#You are or can transform into a Cockatrice, a two-legged dragon-serpent with a rooster's head. Your gaze, touch, and breath can kill, and you possess a potent venom. Be wary of mirrors and the crowing of real roosters - both can spell your death.
1376. Cockroach Monster Physiology,4.1
#You can transform into a towering cockroach monster. Your chitin is absurdly durable, you can survive in hostile environments that would kill almost anything, and your regeneration is horrifying. In this form you inspire revulsion that borders on a weaponized aura.
1377. Coco Physiology,4.5
#You are or can transform into the Coco, the demonic boogeyman of Latino folklore. You can sense fear from afar, stalk targets unseen, and deliver gruesome punishments in the dark. Your strength scales with the fear you invoke and wanes when no one believes in you.
1378. Coconut Mimicry,1.8
#Your body takes on the traits of a coconut, gaining a shell so hard it can shrug off blunt force and a nourishing interior. You can roll, float, and survive enormous drops unscathed, although a hard enough strike still cracks you open.
1379. Coffee Mimicry,2.4
#Your body is made of or can transform into coffee. You can shift between bean, grounds and liquid states, slip through narrow gaps as hot brew, and reform from any spilled drop. Drinkable in a pinch, which is a real concern.
1380. Coffin Mimicry,2.6
#Your body is made of or can transform into a coffin. You gain the durability of whatever material your coffin is made of and can swallow enemies into yourself for burial. You may become inanimate while transformed and share all the weaknesses of a normal casket.
1381. Cogno-Active Blood,5.5
#Your bloodstream is flush with billions of cog-and-gear micro-robotic drones that reinforce and rebuild your body from within. Wounds are stitched with retromechanical engineering, your bones are braced by hidden gearwork, and the drones adapt and grow with every new trauma they survive.
1382. Coin Mimicry,3.5
#You can transform your body fully or partially into coins, gaining the durability and endurance of metal. You can also break yourself down into a pile of scattered coins, though returning to your normal form may be difficult for new users.
1383. Cold Embodiment,7.3
#You are the personification of cold itself within your reality. Your control over coldness is limitless, reaching from simple chills to the absolute zero that silences molecules. Heat is your only true enemy.
1384. Cold Empowerment,3.6
#You grow stronger, faster and more durable in the presence of cold, with frigid environments unlocking and amplifying your powers. In a deep winter or arctic climate you may even draw sustenance from the chill and slow your own aging.
1385. Cold Immunity,2.6
#You are immune to cold. No matter how frigid the environment or how intense the freezing attack, your body temperature holds steady and cold-based illnesses have no effect on you. Physical impacts from ice still hurt though.
1386. Cold Mimicry,4.6
#Your body is made of or can transform into cold itself. In this state, your cells and bones are fortified by the freezing energy flowing through them, and attacks pass through you like a winter wind. Energy drain is devastating to you.
1387. Cold Presence,2.7
#You passively project a field of cold around you, lowering the ambient temperature and creating a constant chill wherever you go. Useful for cooling drinks and intimidating enemies, but turning it off can be tricky.
1388. Cold Resistance,2.1
#You are highly resistant to cold temperatures, able to walk through blizzards in light clothing and operate in freezing conditions without issue. Not outright immune, however — extreme enough cold can still get to you.
1389. Cold Symbiosis,4.7
#You host a cold-based entity inside your body, an embodiment or spirit of freezing temperatures that grants you potent cryokinetic abilities in exchange for sharing your form. The entity may try to take over during moments of weakness, and wielding its power can damage you.
1390. Collective Intelligence,3.1
#Your intelligence scales with how many people are near you, usually of the same species. Alone you might be dim, but in a crowded city your mind operates at genius levels. Isolation is your greatest weakness.
1391. Collective Shadow,7.0
#You are the embodiment of the collective evils of a society, nation, or the entire world, a living manifestation of humanity's darkest impulses. You gain the traits and aspects of absolute evil, wielding the accumulated malevolence of dictatorships, genocides, and atrocities as raw power. Hope and acceptance weaken you.
1392. Collective Strength,3.2
#Your physical strength grows the more people are near you, especially those of the same species. Alone you are average, but in a crowd you could lift cars. Your strength is tied to your companions.
1393. Color Embodiment,5.7
#You are the living embodiment of color itself, the attribute born from light reflecting, transmitting, and emitting at various wavelengths. You wield chromatic power at a conceptual level, though you may be useless against shades not considered true colors like black, white, or grey.
1394. Color Empowerment,3.0
#Being near colors makes you stronger, faster, and more durable, and may unlock color-related abilities the longer you stay exposed. Advanced users can even draw sustenance from colors and slow their aging.
1395. Color Mimicry,4.1
#Your body can become pure color, including hues outside the human visible spectrum. In this form your anatomy is preserved but flows with chromatic essence, fortifying your cells and bones while letting you shift shade at will.
1396. Colt Pixie Physiology,3.1
#You are or can transform into a Colt Pixie, a scruffy pale horse carrying the magic of the fae. You possess equine grace with mischievous pixie nature, and can lead travelers astray with will-o'-the-wisp trickery.
1397. Columbiform Physiology,2.3
#Allows you to transform into or mimic the traits of doves and pigeons. You gain flight, an uncanny sense of direction, and the strange ability to be ignored in most urban settings.
1398. Combat Embodiment,8.3
#You are the concept of combat itself in every form - mental, physical, spiritual and conceptual. You are supremely skilled in every fighting style, every weapon, every strategy and tactic of war, and you can control how conflict itself progresses. May come with violent outbursts and battle-lust.
1399. Combat Immunity,6.3
#You are immune to combat directed at you - not just physical attacks, but the very act of fighting you. Combat-based powers slide off, battle-forms fail, and even abilities like combat merging find no purchase. May be limited to certain forms of combat.
1400. Combative Evolution,6.5
#You evolve through combat. The more battles you experience, the more your body advances to its next evolutionary stage, granting you a new form, new physiology, and new abilities each time, all oriented toward greater combat skill. A lifetime of battles could take you from human to something entirely inhuman.
1401. Combative Luck,5.0
#Your luck applies specifically to combat. In any fight, fortune favors you and your allies at the perfect moments while misfortune plagues your enemies, making you the absolute worst person to pick a fight with. Outside of combat you are as lucky or unlucky as anyone else, and Luck Erasure can strip this protection away.
1402. Combative Transcendence,7.8
#You transcend your physical, mental, spiritual, and existential limitations through combat. Each time you lock horns with a worthy opponent, you ascend further, potentially from mortal to godlike and beyond. Each ascension grants you new abilities and transcendent combat skill, but you may develop a lust for combat, and Development Reset, Existence Grounding, or Status Elimination can tear the ladder out from under you.
1403. Combined Force Empowerment,4.5
#Your body drinks from two or more combined forces, becoming stronger, faster and more durable the deeper the combination runs. With enough affinity you may even slow your own aging by feeding on the mixture, though there is a ceiling to how much raw power you can pull before the forces start fraying you.
1404. Combined Force Mimicry,5.7
#Your body is made of two or more combined forces interwoven through your being, allowing you to shift between a normal anatomical form and a homogeneous mass of pure mixed energy. In your fully formed state you retain vulnerabilities, in your nigh-formed state the forces flow through you and injuries lose most of their meaning. Takes time to master the transition.
1405. Comfortable Activity,4.3
#Every movement and action you take becomes comfortable, leisurely and even fun, no matter how painful, difficult or exhausting it would be for anyone else. Running a marathon feels like a nap, swinging a warhammer feels like stretching, and at higher levels the ease itself can soothe pain and mend damage as you move.
1406. Comic Physics,6.3
#The laws of physics around you bend to match comic book conventions. You can see and interact with lettering, caption boxes and sound effects, break through panel gutters, and move between pages. Depending on which comic's rules you're mimicking, you may also inherit that comic's specific weaknesses, and bystanders may get pulled into the comic logic too.
1407. Companion Connection,4.8
#You share an unbreakable link with your companion, gaining strength and abilities through them, exchanging thoughts and emotions across any distance, and sensing their exact location and health. Your teamwork is supernaturally coordinated as if you move as one mind in two bodies.
1408. Compass Mimicry,1.4
#Your body becomes that of a living compass. You can transform any part of yourself into compass components, always know true north, and can reshape yourself into a functional navigational tool.
1409. Compassion Embodiment,6.6
#You are the living embodiment of compassion. You feed on the kindness of all living things, converting it into energy you can use to extend your lifespan or weaponize directly. You may never age, and are immune to death so long as compassion exists in the world. Destruction and Violence Embodiments are your natural predators.
1410. Compassion Empowerment,3.6
#You grow stronger, faster and more durable the more compassion surrounds you, whether your own or from others. A crowd of kindhearted people is a battery for you, and genuine acts of mercy unlock new heights in your existing abilities. Rage and Sadness Inducement can shut you down.
1411. Composite Activity,3.3
#You have a natural aptitude and build for every kind of physical activity. Weightlifting, acrobatics, martial arts, swimming, climbing, dancing, it does not matter what your frame looks like, you can do them all well. You are the person who picks up any sport and is immediately solid at it.
1412. Composite Alien Physiology,6.8
#Your body is a gestalt of alien beings, each contributing their energies, physiologies, and consciousnesses to your form. You can access the abilities and knowledge of every individual alien that makes you up, giving you a vast library of extraterrestrial powers and raw xeno energy. A walking one-person alien council.
1413. Composite Angel Physiology,7.3
#Your body is a gestalt of angelic beings, each lending their energies, powers, and knowledge to your form. You can access the abilities of every angel within you and draw from their collective divine wisdom and raw holy energy. You must maintain unity of purpose among them, or risk the celestial choir within you turning on itself.
1414. Composite Demon Physiology,7.2
#Your body is a gestalt of demonic beings, their energies and powers fused into your form. You wield the abilities of every demon within you and can draw on their collective infernal knowledge and raw demonic power. Keeping the fiends inside you in line is a constant struggle of wills.
1415. Composite Digital Entity Physiology,6.4
#Your body is a gestalt of digital entities and AIs, each contributing their code, knowledge, and abilities to your form. You possess raw digital energy and can access the combined processing power of every entity within you. EMPs are your kryptonite, but as long as there is a backup server somewhere, you can always come back.
1416. Composite Dragon Physiology,7.6
#Your body is a gestalt of dragons, each lending their scales, fire, wisdom, and raw draconic energy to your form. You access the abilities and hoarded knowledge of every dragon within you. Keeping dozens of proud wyrms cooperating inside one body is no small task, but the power you wield is genuinely legendary.
1417. Composite Fairy Physiology,6.6
#Your body is a gestalt of fairies, with their combined energies, magics, and knowledge flowing through you. You wield the abilities of every fae within you and access their collective arcane wisdom. Keeping a court of fairies unified inside one body requires constant diplomacy.
1418. Composite Machine Physiology,5.8
#You are or can become a composite machine, formed from the combination of several robots fused together. You gain the abilities of each machine, can combine their functions, and sometimes new powers emerge from their synergy. The parts must be compatible to merge, and your size can make fighting smaller opponents awkward.
1419. Composite Monster Physiology,5.6
#You are or can transform into a composite monster, a beast formed from the fusion of many individual monsters. You retain all the powers and abilities of the creatures that make you up, an amalgam of fangs, horns, venom, and terror. Specific anti-amalgam techniques can be devastating against you.
1420. Composite Organism Physiology,5.3
#Your body possesses traits from a mix of organisms, blending aspects of animals, plants, fungi, unicellular life, viruses and humans into a single form. These parts can come from extant, extinct, or even mythological species, turning you into a walking chimera of biology.
1421. Composite Spirit Physiology,6.7
#You are or can become a composite spirit, a soul that has merged with many others and retained the powers and consciousnesses of each. You wield the abilities of every ghost within you and can draw on their collective memories, though you must keep the spirits inside you cooperating or risk losing yourself.
1422. Composite Undead Physiology,6.5
#Your body is a gestalt of undead beings, their bones, rot, and necromantic energy fused into your form. You wield the abilities of every undead within you and can access the memories of their past lives. Your collective body can still rot and decay, and the dead inside you do not always want to cooperate.
1423. Compressability,2.6
#Your body is elastically compressible, allowing you to flatten, compact or squish yourself into smaller shapes without injury. Great for squeezing through vents and surviving blunt trauma. You cannot stretch, only shrink.
1424. Computer Anti-Virus Physiology,4.1
#You are a living antivirus program, capable of hunting down and purging computer viruses, malware and rogue programs from any system you interface with. Powerful enough viruses may still give you a run for your money, and you can theoretically be reprogrammed.
1425. Computer Mimicry,3.5
#Allows you to transform your body into a computer, either keeping your anatomical form but made of circuitry, or becoming a homogeneous computing mass. Vulnerable to EMPs, water and technology manipulators.
1426. Computer Perception,4.5
#Your mind processes information at the speed of a supercomputer, allowing you to analyze, calculate and extrapolate situations with terrifying speed and accuracy. Every conversation becomes a chess game you've already won.
1427. Computer Program Physiology,3.7
#You are or can become a living computer program, your body taking the form of executable code. You may find yourself bound by what you were originally programmed to do, and users of Programming can rewrite you.
1428. Computer Virus Physiology,4.8
#You are a living computer virus, capable of spreading through and hijacking any technology you touch. Infected devices become extensions of your will, and you can manifest a cybernetic body when you need physical presence. Powers that respect conservation laws and purely intangible energies resist your control.
1429. Concept Embodiment,7.3
#You are the tangible incarnation of a concept, your body, mind and powers all shaped after the idea you represent. You have innate affinity and control over your concept, growing stronger when it is present and weaker when it is opposed. If the concept is destroyed, so are you.
1430. Concept Empowerment,5.3
#You become stronger, faster and more durable through affinity with a particular concept, unlocking powers related to its nature. You may even draw sustenance from it or slow your aging. If the concept weakens, so do you.
1431. Concept Mimicry,8.9
#You are a living concept, your existence unified with one or more metaphysical abstractions. You possess unlimited authority over whatever you embody, know everything about it, and exist wherever your concept exists. Vulnerable to Concept Manipulation and Metaphysical Manipulation.
1432. Concept-Dependent Immortality,6.2
#Your existence is tied to a particular concept, and as long as that concept exists, you cannot truly die. Kill you and you return, as love returns, as war returns, as night returns. Destroy the concept though and you become fully mortal.
1433. Conceptual Anchoring,7.4
#You are immune to conceptual alteration, definition changes, logic warping, status enforcement, perspective shifting, none of it can touch you. You are what you are, and no amount of rewriting reality can change that. Useless against Conceptual Lordship and Omni-Negation.
1434. Conceptual Defense,6.3
#You possess a defense that operates on the conceptual level, protecting you from attacks that bypass ordinary means such as time, space, existence or unavoidable strikes. By becoming conceptually impossible to harm in the relevant way, the attack's cause is negated entirely. May only work under specific circumstances depending on the concept.
1435. Conceptual Mind,6.8
#Your mind is a conceptual one, unshackled from biological or psychological limits. You can comprehend abstract concepts instinctively, your senses are no longer tied to your brain, and your intelligence operates at a level regular minds literally cannot parse. A mind like yours may eventually develop a sense of self that refuses your control.
1436. Conceptual Power Link,5.5
#Your conceptual nature is directly linked to your powers, fueling and empowering them with abstract force. Your powers grow stronger the more tied they are to your concept, and you can utilize them on levels impossible for those without a conceptual core. May go out of control if your concept becomes unstable.
1437. Conceptual Resistance,5.6
#You are highly resistant to conceptual phenomena, such as conceptual attacks, damage, effects, and laws. Users of conceptual powers must expend significantly more effort to affect you, though sufficiently strong ones can still break through. Resistance Removal may strip this if wielded by someone powerful enough.
1438. Conceptual Symbiosis,7.4
#You share a symbiotic bond with a conceptual being, absorbing its energy or outright hosting it within your body. This grants you reality warping and control over universal laws tied to its concept, but the entity may try to take over your mind, and its raw power may damage or destroy your mortal frame.
1439. Conceptual Transcendence,9.3
#You transcend all conceptualization, including conceptual powers, definitions, meanings and forms of logic. You exist outside any perspective or classification, which renders you immune to conceptual attacks and grants you total freedom from any restriction. Since concepts are how reality is defined, you are usually otherness, impossible, or undetermined to those who perceive you.
1440. Conclusion Embodiment,9.1
#You are the physical manifestation of conclusions and endings themselves. Games, stories, people, gods, worlds and universes all have an ending and you decide how and when each of those endings arrive. You could bring eternity itself to a standstill. Useless against Beginningless Beings, as a thing with no beginning has no end to enforce.
1441. Concrete Empowerment,2.8
#You grow stronger, faster and more durable while in contact with concrete. Being in a city or anywhere with heavy concrete construction is like a constant trickle of energy to you, and with enough practice you may even be able to draw sustenance from it and slow your aging.
1442. Concrete Mimicry,3.5
#You can transform your body partially or fully into concrete, gaining significant durability and weight at the cost of speed. You can choose between anatomical transformation, retaining your organs as concrete, or homogeneous transformation, becoming solid stone throughout.
1443. Concrete Regeneration,3.3
#You can use concrete to regenerate from injuries, with the amount of concrete you have access to determining how quickly and thoroughly you heal. In a city you can bounce back from severe wounds, in a forest you are just as mortal as anyone else.
1444. Condensed Activity,5.2
#Your body can contain an absurd density of power, matter, energy and force without needing the size to match. A skinny old man with this trait could carry the strength, speed and durability of a hulking titan and never burst, leak or tear from the pressure. You can still hit the ceiling of your own training, this trait just removes the bodily container as a bottleneck.
1445. Condiment Mimicry,2.0
#You can transform your body partially or fully into condiments. You gain some resistance to physical attacks by being a squishy fluid, but you are now literally edible and vulnerable to being consumed. Returning to your original form may take practice.
1446. Condition Infinitum,7.3
#Your condition increases over time with no upper limit. Every day, week and year you become measurably stronger, faster, tougher and sharper, with no ceiling and no cap. Given enough time you could achieve any feat of physical or mental prowess, though you may need to fulfill a specific trigger condition for the growth to continue, and unchecked growth could damage you.
1447. Condition Retention,4.2
#Your physical, mental, and cognitive condition never decays from disuse or circumstance. You could lie in a coma for a decade and wake up with the same muscles, reflexes, and sharpness you had going in. Injuries still happen, but atrophy, rust, and rot do not.
1448. Confection Mimicry,3.2
#Your body is made of confections, or can transform into them at will. You could be a living gingerbread man, a chocolate golem, or a sentient pile of marshmallows. You are also, unfortunately, edible.
1449. Confidence Empowerment,3.5
#You grow stronger, faster, and more durable the more confident you are in yourself. A believing hero with this trait fights far above their weight class; a self-doubting one crumbles. Some users can even slow their aging while riding a streak of certainty.
1450. Confusion Embodiment,6.5
#You are the physical manifestation of Confusion itself. You draw power from the bewilderment of others and your own, can weaponize perplexity directly, and become immune to death save under very specific conditions. Clear Mind and Psychic Shield users resist your presence.
1451. Confusion Immunity,2.8
#You cannot be confused. Illusions, psychic tricks, and disorientation effects wash over you without landing. Your mental balance holds no matter how chaotic the situation gets. Absolute Illusion and Omni-Telepathy may still get through.
1452. Congregative Reform,5.4
#As long as all your pieces, body, mind, or soul, are gathered together, you can regenerate or resurrect yourself from them. Even a shattered soul can reform into an astral body if the fragments are collected. The catch is that finding every piece can take years and the process may be agonizing.
1453. Conjoined Physiology,3.3
#You possess a body fused with one or more other beings, sharing organs, limbs, or a single frame. Cooperation amplifies your capability; conflict cripples it. If the fused entities are ever separated, the power ends permanently.
1454. Connectionless Body,3.6
#You have no hips, knees, ankles, shoulders, elbows or wrists. The rest of your limbs simply float in place near your body, held by nothing, moving as if the joints were still there. Strikes pass through empty air where a joint should be, but a strong enough hit can send a limb flying off to be retrieved later.
1455. Connector Mimicry,2.6
#Allows you to transform partially or fully into a living connector, your body becoming cables, plugs and ports while retaining your anatomy. In this form you can interface directly with machines and transmit signals or electricity through yourself.
1456. Conquest Empowerment,4.6
#You grow stronger, faster and more durable from every conquest, be it a battlefield victory, a hostile takeover or even winning an argument. The more you subjugate and dominate, the more your powers swell, and sufficiently dedicated conquerors may find themselves aging slower or not at all.
1457. Conscious Spatial Awareness,3.3
#You possess an instinctual extrasensory awareness that prevents you from ever materializing any part of your body inside a solid object when teleporting. You can port into places you've never seen within your range without fear of fusing into a wall, a floor, or another person.
1458. Consciousness State Empowerment,4.4
#You grow stronger, faster and more durable from states of consciousness, with each mental state unlocking different boosts and related abilities. A deep meditative state might sharpen your mind, while an altered intoxicated state could amplify your raw physical power. Some can even subsist on consciousness itself.
1459. Consequence Immunity,6.5
#You are immune to consequences, meaning you can act however you please without suffering the results of your own actions. Eat poison, insult kings, fall from orbit - nothing sticks. You may never learn from your mistakes, however, since you never feel them, and sufficiently powerful beings may be able to make consequences bite through regardless.
1460. Conserved Motion,4.1
#Your motion is conserved. If you are sprinting at full speed and suddenly drop to a crawl, your speed and direction are preserved regardless of what your body is actually doing. You can flip, spin, switch stances, all while your momentum simply continues onward. Fine maneuvering can still be awkward.
1461. Constant State of Death,3.5
#You are trapped in a cycle of perpetual death, dying over and over again by some force internal or external. Some users repeat the same death endlessly, others meet a new end each time. It never truly expires, and whether this is a curse or some strange blessing depends entirely on the user.
1462. Constellation Empowerment,4.9
#You draw power from the constellations overhead, your natural abilities steadily amplified to supernatural levels, and each constellation granting you additional powers tied to its mythological meaning. Under a zodiac's gaze you become something far more than human.
1463. Contact Force Defiance,4.3
#You can ignore contact forces at will, walking without friction, striking without impact, and interacting with objects from a distance as though touch were optional. Gravity still holds you down though, so no flying for you.
1464. Contaminant Immunity,3.5
#You are immune to all manner of contaminants, including poisons, toxins, venoms, viruses, bacteria, parasites and allergens. You could drink from a sewer and feel nothing, though overwhelming quantities may still push your limits.
1465. Continent Physiology,6.4
#Your body is a continent, or at the very least carries the traits of one. You possess unfathomable mass, landscapes grow upon your skin, and your body hosts ecosystems. You are essentially a walking landmass, nearly impossible to move against your will and capable of crushing armies underfoot.
1466. Continuum Embodiment,7.4
#You are the physical manifestation of a continuum, an aspect of reality's successive series given flesh. You have limitless control over your chosen continuum and are utterly immune to its effects. You are typically bound to a single continuum, but within that spectrum you are absolute.
1467. Continuum Power Link,5.3
#Your very nature is linked to a continuum, and that continuous essence fuels and strengthens every power you possess. Your abilities are amplified by the spectrum you are bound to, though instability in your archetypal nature can send your powers spiralling out of control.
1468. Control Immunity,5.6
#You are utterly immune to all forms of control, subordination and possession, regardless of origin. Mind control, hypnosis, brainwashing, marionette strings, divine commands; none of them take hold. Only absolute-tier dominations like Omniarch can bypass you, and immunity negation remains your one true weakness.
1469. Control Loss Defiance,3.8
#You simply do not lose control of yourself. Knocked flying, tripped, slipped, stunned, slowed, staggered, none of it breaks your composure or your ability to act. You can still be hurt, but you will never flail or fumble your way into a worse position.
1470. Control Continuation,5.3
#Even when you are possessed, mind-controlled or having your body puppeted, you can keep doing what you were trying to do. Whatever force has taken the wheel finds a ghost still driving underneath, allowing you to act independently alongside or in spite of the intruder.
1471. Conversion Blood,4.3
#Your blood has conversion properties, allowing you to turn others into a different type of being through transfusion or ingestion. Whatever species you are, or whatever the blood was imbued for, is what the target becomes. Those with conversion immunity or negation are unaffected.
1472. Conversion Empowerment,4.7
#Every time you convert another being into your kind, you grow stronger, faster and more durable, and may unlock new abilities tied to your affinity. Sufficiently dedicated users can draw sustenance from their conversions or even slow and halt their own aging.
1473. Conversion Immunity,3.3
#You cannot be turned into something you aren't. Vampire bites, werewolf curses, zombification, mummification, demonic transformation, none of it takes hold. You remain stubbornly yourself no matter what bites, spells or mutagens come your way.
1474. Conversion Recovery,3.9
#Any conversion inflicted on you slowly unravels, reverting you back to your original state over time. Bitten by a vampire? Give it a week. Cursed by lycanthropy? It'll pass. You can still be re-converted, and some transformations take longer to shake off than others.
1475. Cookie Mimicry,2.8
#Your body is made of or can transform into cookies. You retain all your organs and anatomy, just now rendered in edible baked dough. You are somewhat vulnerable to being bitten and eaten and anything that causes rot is absolutely miserable for you.
1476. Cool Movement,2.7
#You can move without producing heat or suffering from cold. No matter how hard you exert yourself you never overheat or sweat, and no matter how cold it gets you keep acting like the temperature doesn't touch you. You are effortlessly, literally cool.
1477. Cooperative Mobility,4.1
#Inertia, weight, gravity, friction, every physical force that would normally resist your movement instead assists it. You move as if the world itself were politely stepping out of your way. You still have a top speed and cannot accelerate forever, but within those bounds motion is effortless.
1478. Copper Mimicry,3.0
#Your body is made of or can transform into copper. You gain the high thermal and electrical conductivity of the metal but are also soft, malleable and very heavy, with all the vulnerabilities that copper entails.
1479. Coral Physiology,2.9
#You are or can transform into coral, a living colony of polyps. In this form you are durable and can regenerate as the colony grows, but you risk becoming brittle if you let yourself dry out for too long.
1480. Core-Reliant Immortality,5.4
#You are immortal as long as your core remains intact. The core may be an organ housing your life force or a vessel containing your soul, and while its destruction means true death, nothing short of that can end you. Hiding and protecting the core is your only real vulnerability.
1481. Core-Reliant Regeneration,5.2
#You can regenerate from any and all bodily damage so long as your core remains intact. The core houses your regenerative essence, and can range from a specific organ down to a single cell. Destroying the core ends the regeneration, and often ends you with it.
1482. Corporate Brand Mimicry,3.8
#You are or can transform into a corporate brand entity, an alien-like monstrosity embodying the identity and loyalty of whatever brand you represent. Your form and abilities shift depending on the brand, and competing brands may try to devour you on sight.
1483. Corrupted Blood,3.6
#Your blood is inherently corrupted, spreading taint into anything it touches or anyone foolish enough to ingest it. Useful as a bioweapon in a pinch, but you may not be immune to your own blood's influence.
1484. Corrupted Power Link,4.7
#Your corrupted nature is directly linked to your powers, fueling and strengthening them the more tainted you become. You may go out of control if your corruption becomes unstable, and purification users are your natural counter.
1485. Corrupted Symbiosis,5.6
#You share a symbiotic bond with a corrupted or corrupting being, gaining access to defiled energies, deformed physical enhancements and the power to taint others. The essence is fortifying but the entity inside you may eventually try to take over your body and mind.
1486. Corrupting Presence,5.3
#Your very presence corrupts the minds of others, augmenting and unleashing malevolence in everyone around you. Always active and largely uncontrollable, so expect hostility from anyone who spends too long in your shadow. A classic mark of higher evil spirits.
1487. Corruption Embodiment,6.6
#You are the living embodiment of corruption itself. Your mere presence spreads like a virus, worming into the emotions of those around you and unlocking their darkest impulses, eroding moral values and bending them toward horrible acts. Those with no morals to begin with and those touched by Omni Purification are beyond your reach.
1488. Corruption Empowerment,3.6
#You grow stronger, faster and more durable the more corruption surrounds you, whether it be a corrupted environment, corrupted people or your own tainted state. Prolonged immersion may begin to reshape your personality, and in a pure place you will find yourself weakened.
1489. Corruption Immunity,4.2
#You are wholly immune to corruption and all corruption-based powers, meaning you can wield dark powers without being tainted by them and walk through defiled lands without consequence. Only Omni-level corruption or immunity-bypassing abilities can overcome this.
1490. Corvid Physiology,3.3
#You are or can transform into a corvid - crow, raven, rook, jay or magpie - either partially or fully. You gain flight, sharp intelligence, keen eyes and the uncanny cleverness of the corvid family.
1491. Cosmic Capacitor,4.5
#Your body functions as a living battery for cosmic energy, absorbing it from any source and storing it indefinitely. You can channel the stored energy for any purpose you can formulate, making you an excellent support for any cosmic-based power user, including yourself.
1492. Cosmic Divinity,7.4
#You are a divine being of the cosmic variety, whether by ancestry, ascension, or being enhanced to the point of godhood. Your raw power far exceeds the mundane, granting you the status and presence of a cosmic deity. Ineffective against those with Divine Power Immunity and vulnerable to divinity nullification.
1493. Cosmic Embodiment,7.3
#You are the physical manifestation of cosmic forces. Stars, meteors, planets and nebulae all answer to you as extensions of your very being. Can be countered by users of Universal Manipulation, and you may be limited to one particular cosmic force rather than all of them.
1494. Cosmic Empowerment,4.6
#You are empowered by cosmic forces, gaining enhanced strength, speed, and durability while also unlocking new abilities tied to the cosmos. You may draw sustenance directly from cosmic radiation and even slow your aging. Overloading on too much cosmic energy can leave your body unstable.
1495. Cosmic Energy Mimicry,6.0
#Your body is made of or can transform into cosmic energy. In your transformed state you may still retain your anatomy or become homogenous energy with no vital organs at all. Cosmic Energy Absorption may prove fatal to you in this state.
1496. Cosmic Event Empowerment,3.7
#You become stronger, faster, and more durable when cosmic events occur such as eclipses, meteor showers, solstices, equinoxes and planetary alignments. Some events may unlock entirely new powers. The catch is that cosmic events may only happen once in a great while, and you may need to be in a specific location to catch them.
1497. Cosmic Fire Mimicry,5.8
#Your body is composed of or can transform into cosmic fire, with the flames flowing through your cells, bones and muscles and fortifying them. You are mostly immune to regular fire but other users of Cosmic Fire Manipulation may still hurt you.
1498. Cosmic Hunger,6.3
#You hunger on a cosmic scale and possess the means to satisfy it. You can devour anything and everything, organic, inorganic, and possibly even concepts themselves. The downside is that you are almost always hungry, and starvation causes you unimaginable suffering without killing you.
1499. Cosmic Immunity,4.8
#You are immune to cosmic energy, forces and objects, suffering no harm from their direct or indirect effects. The drawback is that you're also immune to beneficial effects of Cosmic Magic and may be impossible to heal with Cosmic Healing.
1500. Cosmic Interaction,4.0
#You can physically interact with cosmic objects and artifacts that would normally harm or destroy anything that touched them. Even if an artifact doesn't passively harm others, you may be the only one capable of using it. Might require proximity to the object and may not work on every cosmic thing.
1501. Cosmic Keystone,7.6
#You are the anchor for an entire world, dimension, universe or reality. Your existence is required for that place to exist, and as a result you are likely its ultimate conduit of power. If you are killed or forced to leave, the place you anchor collapses with you.
1502. Cosmic Knowledge,6.1
#You possess immense cosmic knowledge, including cosmology, quantum mechanics, dimensional theory, metaphysical constructs and the very nature of existence. Advanced sciences, arcane systems, and universal laws are open to your understanding. You may still be unaware of certain things and your knowledge may be tied to your native universe.
1503. Cosmic Medium Defiance,3.3
#You can travel through cosmic mediums like space dust, cosmic rays, interstellar gas and nebulae without any resistance. Moving through them at supersonic or even relativistic speeds is no problem for you. Does not help against any other kind of force.
1504. Cosmic Quintessence,6.3
#Your body endlessly generates its own cosmic energy, without needing to draw from the universe around you. You can use this infinite reservoir to enhance your physique, power any invention, or fuel any cosmic technique, though channeling too much at once still tires your mind and body.
1505. Cotton Candy Mimicry,2.3
#Your body is made of cotton candy, either anatomically identical to your normal form or fully homogeneous sugar-floss matter. You can reshape and reform yourself but melt when wet and are helpless against anyone willing to take a bite.
1506. Countenance,4.6
#Your face, true form or appearance causes various effects in whoever sees it. The nature of the effect depends on you and the viewer, ranging from paralyzing dread to helpless adoration. Usually requires eye contact to trigger at full strength.
1507. Counter Inertia,3.6
#Your body automatically counteracts its own inertia, meaning you never trip, overshoot, get knocked down from impacts or tear yourself apart from your own momentum. You always land correctly and your limbs stay attached no matter how hard you swing.
1508. Courage Embodiment,6.3
#You are the living embodiment of courage, growing stronger the more fearless you become in the face of danger. No common fear can touch you, and your bravery manifests as tangible power that escalates the more dire the situation gets. May lose to an embodiment of Fear in a direct clash.
1509. Coyote Physiology,2.2
#Allows you to transform into a coyote or gain the traits of one, granting enhanced senses, agility and endurance. You gain the cunning and adaptability of the trickster of the desert.
1510. Coyotefolk Physiology,2.8
#You are a coyotefolk, a humanoid coyote with the agility, senses and feral cunning of your kind combined with the dexterity of a person. You possess sharp fangs, keen ears and the endurance to run down prey for days on end.
1511. Crab Physiology,2.3
#Allows you to transform into a crab or partially gain their traits, granting you a hardened chitinous shell, powerful pincers, and the ability to breathe underwater. Your sideways scuttle is surprisingly fast.
1512. Crayon Mimicry,0.4
#You are a crayon. A drawing implement made of pigmented wax. Good luck.
1513. Cream Mimicry,2.2
#You can transform your body partially or fully into cream, becoming a creamy fluid that can reform and reshape itself. You are, however, edible, and a hungry enemy is a terrifying thing.
1514. Creation Embodiment,8.7
#You are the living embodiment of creation itself, the beginning of all things, able to bring anything and everything into existence by simply willing it so. Matter, life, concepts, worlds — all flow from you like breath. You may feel a compulsion to create without considering the consequences.
1515. Creation Power Link,4.8
#Your creative spark is directly wired into your powers, every act of materialization fuels and strengthens your abilities. The link is potent but unstable, if your materialization falters your powers may spiral out of control.
1516. Creation Symbiosis,5.4
#You host or are bonded to a creative entity, an embodiment of materialization that grants you profound creation-based abilities. The entity may try to possess your body or mind, and the raw creative force flowing through you can harm you as easily as it empowers you.
1517. Creative Source,8.9
#You are the source of all creation, as long as you exist creation itself exists. You have an emotional link to every created thing and every creative power in existence, but if you ever die all of creation dies with you, and you cannot escape this role without passing it to another.
1518. Absolute Creativity,8.7
#Your imagination is limitless, boundless and wholly unrestrained by logic or reality. Any concept you can conceive, no matter how impossible or unprecedented, can take form in some way, your mind an infinite wellspring of originality from which new inventions, arts, sciences and entire forces spring freely.
1519. Enhanced Creativity,2.7
#Your creative faculties run far above the human baseline, new ideas, designs and concepts come to you constantly and in great variety. You may have the ideas but still need skill to execute them properly.
1520. Supernatural Creativity,4.5
#Your imagination and ideation operate far beyond what most beings in your world are capable of, generating inventions, artistic designs and concepts that others would consider impossible. You may still need real-world skill to actually build what you envision.
1521. Creativity,1.7
#You have a strong creative mind, capable of producing a wide variety of original ideas, designs and concepts. You are at the peak of what a regular human can manage, though you may still lack the technical skills to bring everything to life.
1522. Crest Empowerment,4.1
#Your body bears crests, birthmark-like sigils that make you stronger, faster and more durable, and may even unlock abilities tied to their meaning. Advanced users can draw sustenance from their crests or slow their own aging through them.
1523. Crime Drama Embodiment,5.8
#You are the living embodiment of crime dramas, the concept and conveyance of the justice system wrapped in intrigue and suspense. Every case you investigate takes on cinematic weight, twists unfold around you, and you can intuitively channel the tropes of noir into very real effects.
1524. Crocodilian Monster Physiology,4.2
#You are or can transform into a crocodilian monster, a hulking apex predator with armored hide, bone-crushing jaws and a primal hunger. Monster slayers will treat you accordingly.
1525. Crocodilian Physiology,3.0
#You are or can transform into a crocodilian, gaining the traits of crocodiles, alligators, caimans or gharials. You are fast in water and hit like a freight train, but short-tempered and ungraceful on land.
1526. Crocodilianoid Physiology,3.1
#You are or can transform into a crocodilianoid, a humanoid crocodilian race with scaled hide, sharp teeth and a heavy tail. You keep a bipedal frame and human intelligence while gaining the physical gifts of a crocodilian predator.
1527. Crocotta Physiology,3.6
#You are or can transform into a Crocotta, a mythical hybrid beast with a bone-ridged maw instead of teeth. You possess immense strength, the bravery of a lion and the swiftness of a horse, and can mimic human voices to lure prey. Vulnerable to being stabbed in the back of the neck.
1528. Crustacean Monster Physiology,4.3
#You are or can transform into a monstrous crustacean, a hulking chitinous horror with oversized claws, layered armor and predatory instinct. You possess immense crushing strength and near-impenetrable shell, but are vulnerable to those trained in Monster Slaying.
1529. Crustacean Physiology,3.2
#You are or can transform into a crustacean such as a crab, lobster, crayfish, shrimp, krill or barnacle, either partially or fully. Hard shell, powerful pincers and excellent aquatic adaptation come with the territory.
1530. Crustaceanoid Physiology,3.4
#You possess the body of a crustaceanoid, a humanoid hybrid of human and crustacean. Chitinous armor plating, powerful claws and aquatic adaptability combined with humanoid dexterity and intelligence.
1531. Cryogenic Blood,3.3
#Your blood runs freezing cold, rendering you invisible to thermal cameras and causing any of your blood that spills to flash-freeze whatever it touches. Cut an enemy while bleeding on them and they may find their wound encased in ice.
1532. Cryogenic Bodily Fluids,3.5
#All of your bodily fluids — blood, sweat, saliva, tears — are freezing cold and capable of icing over whatever they touch. Spit freezes locks, sweat frosts your grip, tears become crystalline shards. May require a specific diet or lifestyle to maintain.
1533. Cryogenic Tears,2.6
#Your tears are freezing cold and turn to ice the moment they touch air or any surface. Cry onto a wound to seal it, or weep onto the floor to create impromptu caltrops of frozen grief.
1534. Cryoscience,5.4
#You possess omniscient knowledge of all things related to ice, snow, frost and winter. You instinctively understand every crystalline structure, every frozen reaction, every secret buried in the cold. Your power and insight are magnified in winter or within frozen lands.
1535. Crystal Embodiment,7.3
#You are the living embodiment of crystal itself, the concept of ordered lattice and geometric perfection given form. You possess limitless control over and immunity to crystal in all its forms, but sound and vibration strike at the very core of your being.
1536. Crystal Empowerment,3.2
#You become stronger, faster and more durable when in contact with crystals and gemstones, with different stones unlocking different affinities. With enough exposure to the right gems you may even draw sustenance from them or slow your aging.
1537. Crystal Heart,3.8
#Your heart is made of pure crystal, beating in slow radiant pulses. While it grants you a natural affinity for crystal-based powers and a certain otherworldly presence, any damage to the crystal itself is catastrophic, and it may struggle to function as a proper cardiac organ without support.
1538. Crystal Mimicry,5.1
#Your body is made of or can transform into living crystal, granting you immense durability and a shimmering geometric form. Though you retain your organs in crystalline analog, every crystal has flaws, and a precise strike or the right frequency of sound can shatter you.
1539. Crystal Monster Physiology,5.0
#You are or can transform into a crystal monster, a beast whose entire body is composed of living gemstone. The type of crystal determines the specific powers you wield, from ruby-born flames to sapphire frost, all backed by the brute strength of a lattice-bodied monstrosity.
1540. Crystal Spike Protrusion,3.1
#Razor-sharp crystal spikes grow from your body at will, usable as weapons or as a defensive bramble of faceted edges. You can retract them when you don't want to shred your clothes or the people hugging you.
1541. Crystallokinetically Enhanced Durability,3.2
#Your body can be reinforced with crystalline structures, granting you much higher durability against physical trauma. Durability negation and invulnerability bypassing easily slice through this defense.
1542. Cuélebre Physiology,6.3
#You are or can transform into the Cuélebre, a massive winged serpent-dragon of Asturian myth. Your scales grow thick and impenetrable with age, your bat wings carry you across the sky, and you instinctively hoard treasure. Though you are functionally immortal, you will eventually feel the pull toward the Mar Cuajada beyond the sea.
1543. Cucumber Mimicry,1.0
#Your body is made of, or can transform into, cucumbers. You can be a regular-looking person made of cucumber matter, or a homogeneous pile of cucumbers. Either way, you are a cucumber.
1545. Cupcake Mimicry,1.0
#Your body is made of or can transform into cupcakes. You might look anatomically normal while being entirely cupcake, or you can become a homogeneous pile of cupcakes. Try not to get eaten.
1546. Curing Immunity,3.0
#You are immune to all forms of curing. No one can remove a disease, curse, transformation or modification from you against your will. Absolute restoration and power negation can still bypass this.
1547. Curse Attraction,2.9
#You are a curse magnet. Any curse in your general area will be drawn toward you rather than its intended target, making you an excellent shield for your friends and an absolute nightmare for yourself. Turning it off may not be an option.
1548. Curse Dragon Physiology,7.3
#You are or can transform into a Curse Dragon, a rare and fearsome breed of dragon whose very breath carries misfortune. Your physical stats are immense and you wield potent curse manipulation on a scale only dragons can match, although dragon gods still eclipse you.
1549. Curse Embodiment,8.6
#You are the living embodiment of curses, the walking misfortune itself. You are utterly immune to any and all curses and wield curse-based abilities superior to any practitioner, capable of warping reality itself by cursing its very foundation. Only an embodiment of blessing can truly challenge you.
1550. Curse Immunity,3.6
#You are completely immune to the direct effects of curses, hexes and jinxes. No witch, demon, or cursed object can lay a supernatural affliction on you directly, though indirect curses (like a cursed building collapsing) may still harm you.
1551. Cursed Blood,4.0
#Your blood is inherently cursed, granting you potent curse-based abilities and allowing you to inflict afflictions on any target that comes into contact with it. Consuming your blood is catastrophic for the drinker, and even a splash can deliver a devastating hex. Users of Healing Blood may resist.
1552. Cursed Body,5.4
#Your physical body is made entirely of curses, being cursed is as natural to you as breathing. Any attempt to remove your curse is an attempt to kill you, and you are fueled by the very malediction that sustains you. You may find yourself incapable of truly doing good, as virtue is anathema to your very existence.
1553. Cursed Name,6.2
#Your name is cursed, anyone who speaks it aloud suffers from supernatural afflictions, sleep disorders, madness, dread, misfortune and even death. Once spoken, your name also allows you to track the speaker across any distance. Those who know of you speak only in nicknames, if at all.
1554. Cursed Power Link,4.8
#Your cursed nature is inextricably linked to your powers, the desecration that afflicts you is the fuel that drives your abilities. As your curse deepens, your powers grow, but if your cursed nature becomes unstable, so do you.
1555. Cursed Symbiosis,5.6
#You host a cursed being inside your body, be it spiritual, demonic or magical in origin. Its presence grants you negative energy powers, double-edged enhancement and hex-casting, but it may try to possess you, harm you, or demand specific conditions to share its power.
1556. Cursing Presence,5.0
#Your very presence curses whatever is around you. Plants wither, livestock sickens, people grow unlucky and fall ill the longer they linger near you. You can't really turn it off, making normal life rather difficult, but in a fight it's devastating.
1557. Curupira Physiology,5.4
#South American Mythology - You are or can transform into a Curupira, a Brazilian forest spirit with bright red hair and backwards-facing feet. You can create footprints that lead pursuers in circles for days, command the beasts of the forest, and enforce natural balance on those who take more than they need. The forest itself bends to your will.
1558. Cut Activity,3.6
#Your body parts continue to function even when partially severed or cut into multiple pieces. A halved arm still grips, a split leg still runs, and a bisected torso can still fight. Does not restore the parts, they remain wounded, but they still answer to you.
1559. Cutting Immunity,4.0
#You cannot be harmed by cuts, slices or severing of any kind, no matter the angle or force. Absolute Slicing, Dimensional Cutting and Phase Cutting can still bypass this, and exceptionally powerful cuts may still get through.
1560. Cyber Mind,4.5
#Your mind runs like a supercharged supercomputer, processing information at extraordinary speeds and seamlessly interfacing with any technological system you come near. Vulnerable to computer viruses, EMPs and Data Absorption, since your consciousness is now a very fancy machine.
1561. Cyber Viral Immunity,2.0
#You are immune to computer viruses, whether because your anatomy is organic, your code is hardened, or your body is simply built different. Weaker users may only resist certain strains, and some become unwitting carriers instead of being truly immune.
1562. Cybernetic Aging,4.2
#Your aging is delayed or suppressed through cybernetic enhancements woven through your body. You may live for centuries as long as the implants keep running, balancing your biological decay with mechanical maintenance.
1563. Cybernetic Enhancement,4.3
#Your body has been augmented with cybernetic implants and mechanical parts, granting a suite of enhanced abilities depending on the nature of the augments. Training and upgrades allow you to push these enhancements further over time.
1564. Cybernetic Metal Skeleton,4.8
#Your entire skeleton is replaced with technological metal bones that are nearly indestructible, turning you into a perfect killing chassis around which flesh simply hangs. Similarly equipped enemies can still harm you, and without Mechanical Regeneration repair is slow and external.
1565. Cybernetic Mouth,2.8
#Your mouth has been replaced with a cybernetic one, complete with mechanical jaw, teeth and whatever additional mechanisms the designer bolted in. Commonly hides extending fangs, built-in weapons, or diagnostic tools, but can be disabled by a solid EMP.
1566. Cybernetic Speed,4.0
#Your cybernetic enhancements grant you immense speed, the exact level depending on what has been installed into your frame. Extended sprinting can strain the organic parts of your body, and you may need a power source to keep pushing hard.
1567. Cybernetic Spine,4.3
#Your spine has been replaced with a cybernetic one, granting enhanced strength, speed and durability directly through your central nervous system. The implant may also interfere with your DNA, pushing you toward transhuman mutation and unique supernatural abilities over time.
1568. Cybernetic Stamina,4.1
#Your cybernetic systems give you immense stamina, ranging from superhuman endurance to effectively unlimited depending on the quality of the enhancements. You simply do not get tired the way a biological body does, and your cardiovascular system never catches up to the exhaustion.
1569. Cybernetic Strength,4.2
#Your cybernetic body or body parts grant you superhuman strength, ranging anywhere from low-tier to crushingly high-end depending on the enhancements. Users of Absolute Strength can still overpower you, and the right weapons can still dismantle your frame.
1570. Cybernetic Subdermal Armor,4.0
#You have artificial body armor implanted under your skin, dramatically enhancing your durability and strength. The armor may interact with your DNA over time, nudging you toward transhumanism, though your outer skin remains vulnerable without a regenerative factor.
1571. Cyberspace Adaptation,3.8
#You can survive and operate within cyberspace as if it were a physical environment, handling malicious programs, digital firewalls and virtual predators without harm. Vulnerable to Cyberpotence users who own the realm, and you may be weaker outside of digital space.
1572. Cycle Embodiment,8.1
#You are the living embodiment of the cycles of the universe, creation and destruction, life and death, beginning and end. You exist as the turning wheel itself, and your actions resonate on a cosmic scale whether you want them to or not.
1573. Cycle Transcendence,8.5
#You transcend the cycles of the universe. Most high-level beings, no matter how powerful, are merely fulfilling their role within the current cycle and will end when it does. You are beyond that limit, persisting through the death and rebirth of reality itself.
1574. Cyclops Physiology,3.6
#Allows you to transform into a cyclops, a one-eyed giant of Greek myth. You gain immense size and strength, and your single eye marks you as something ancient and feral. Your depth perception is, naturally, terrible.
1575. Cypriniforme Physiology,2.6
#Allows you to transform into a member of the cypriniformes order, such as carp, koi, loaches, or goldfish. With enough perseverance and the right waterfall, a koi can even ascend into a dragon in the old stories.
1576. DNA Link,3.5
#You possess a genetic link to somebody or something, allowing you to sense each other's location, share powers, and feel each other's condition across any distance. Corruptions in one party's DNA may carry to the other, and the link may be impossible to sever.
1577. Daemon Physiology,6.0
#Greek Mythology - Allows you to transform into a daimon, a minor deity and personification of a concept, function, or place. You possess divine authority over whatever domain you embody, standing as a lesser god beneath the Olympian pantheon.
1578. Daeva Physiology,5.6
#Zoroastrian Mythology - Allows you to transform into a daeva, a malevolent spirit of chaos and disorder from ancient Persian myth. You gain demonic physical abilities and the power to sow confusion and corruption in those around you.
1579. Daidarabotchi Physiology,6.4
#Japanese Mythology - Allows you to transform into a daidarabotchi, a yokai giant so massive that their footprints were said to create lakes. Your size grants you immense strength and a presence that reshapes the landscape, but you are impossible to hide and rarely welcomed.
1580. Daitya Physiology,6.5
#Hindu Mythology - Allows you to transform into a daitya, one of the divine giant ascetics of old. You possess titanic strength and a measure of the divine, but like the asura you are hot-blooded and easily ruled by wrath and pride, which can cloud your judgement in battle.
1581. Damage Empowerment,5.4
