#The more damage you take, the stronger, faster, and tougher you become. Physical, mental, and spiritual wounds all feed your power, and taking lethal damage pushes you to your absolute peak. You still have to survive the pain to use it.
1582. Danava Physiology,6.5
#You are a Danava, one of the asura half-brothers of the devas and daityas from Hindu myth. You possess immense physical strength and the raw divine power of a giant of old, but your hotblooded nature and addictions to wrath, pride and bellicosity cloud your judgment in battle.
1583. Dangerous Fluid Activity,3.1
#You can move, act and work inside dangerous and volatile fluids without taking any damage, whether that's boiling water, acid, liquid nitrogen, toxic gas or live electrical currents. Perfect for industrial accidents and lava baths alike.
1584. Dark Elf Physiology,4.6
#You are a Dark Elf, a subterranean cousin to the fair elves known for cruelty, cunning and stealth. You possess enhanced agility, supernatural senses, an affinity for shadow and dark magic, and a natural talent for treachery. You may turn to stone in direct sunlight depending on which tradition your lineage draws from.
1585. Dark Energy Mimicry,5.4
#Your body is made of or can transform into dark energy, fortifying your cells, bones and muscles with a flowing negative current. While transformed you gain resistance to conventional harm, though light energy and energy drain are highly effective against you, potentially lethally so.
1586. Dark Heart,3.2
#Your heart is partially or completely devoid of good, light and virtue. You are resistant to emotional manipulation and mental influence based on kindness or compassion, but you may find yourself incapable of genuine good even when you want to be. Vulnerable to purification.
1587. Dark Matter Embodiment,7.4
#You are the physical manifestation and personification of dark matter itself. You have limitless control over it and are completely immune to its effects. Your only true weaknesses are antimatter and conventional matter manipulation of sufficient caliber.
1588. Dark Matter Empowerment,3.6
#You become stronger, faster, and more durable the closer you are to dark matter, with prolonged exposure unlocking related abilities and amplifying existing ones. You can draw sustenance from it and may even slow your own aging in sufficiently rich environments.
1589. Dark Matter Mimicry,5.7
#Your body is made of or can transform into dark matter, with the substance flowing through your cells, bones and muscles to fortify them. Your transformed form remains anatomically functional and grants you cosmic resilience, but switching between structural states mid-transformation is fatal if interrupted.
1590. Dark Matter Symbiosis,5.8
#You are symbiotically bonded to a being of dark matter, drawing potent cosmic abilities from the link. The bond grants immense power but comes at a cost; the entity may attempt to take over your mind or body, and sufficiently powerful dark matter beings may harm or even destroy their hosts outright.
1591. Dark National Personification,6.3
#You are the embodiment of the darkest aspects of a nation or regime, the avatar of its jingoism, prejudice and violent pride. You draw power from unrest and conflict within your country and exist in perpetual invisible warfare with National Embodiments. If your nation or regime collapses, you fade with it.
1592. Dark Soul,4.6
#Your soul is either devoid of light entirely or has been thoroughly corrupted, granting you access to arcane powers the pure could never wield. You are prone to being drawn toward evil and chaos but with enough discipline you can use it without descending. Vulnerable to purification and holy powers.
1593. Darkness Adaptation,2.1
#Your body is naturally suited to dark environments, especially nighttime, with heightened senses that compensate for the absence of light and a circadian cycle built for nocturnal activity. You tend to be groggy in the day and your eyes are sensitive to bright light.
1594. Darkness Embodiment,8.6
#You are the physical manifestation and personification of Darkness itself, holding absolute authority over shadow and everything closely related to it. Within your domain you are essentially omnipotent, opposed only by those who embody Light.
1595. Darkness Empowerment,3.4
#You become stronger, faster, and more durable when in contact with darkness or shadow, possibly unlocking new abilities and slowing your aging as long as you stay in the dark. Being out in the light weakens you and prolonged exposure may even harm you.
1596. Darkness Immunity,3.0
#You are completely unharmed by darkness and shadow in all its forms, from the corrosive to the corrupting. A great niche protection, but light-based attacks hurt you just as much as anyone else.
1597. Darkness Mimicry,4.5
#Your body is made of living darkness, allowing you to flatten into a 2D shadow, blend into darkness completely, stretch outward, or teleport through shadows. Your form still contains organs and remains vulnerable to attacks, especially from light.
1598. Darkness Symbiosis,5.2
#You host a darkness-based entity or elemental force within your body, granting you powerful umbrakinetic abilities drawn from whatever dwells inside you. Be careful - the entity may try to take over your mind, its nature may be lethal to your body, and you inherit its weakness to light.
1599. Daruma Mimicry,3.5
#You are or can transform into a daruma doll, a hollow weighted figure modeled after the monk Bodhidharma. In this form you embody perseverance and good luck - knocked down, you always right yourself - but you can be fragile and are vulnerable to doll manipulation.
1600. Dawn Embodiment,5.8
#You are the personification of the dawn itself, the transition from night to day. You possess near-limitless control over dawn and all of its optical phenomena, wielding the first rays of the rising sun as your domain. However, your window of true power is brief, and you are notably weaker than those who embody the full day.
1601. Day Embodiment,6.8
#You embody day itself, the concept of the period of light between sunrise and sunset. You wield all of the authority that daylight carries, becoming a divine figure of the sun's reign and all it illuminates. If there is no day anywhere for you to draw upon, however, you are powerless.
1602. Day Empowerment,3.0
#During the day, you become stronger, faster, and more durable, and any existing powers you have are amplified. Some users can even draw sustenance from daylight and slow their aging under the sun. At night, you are just yourself.
1603. Daydream Empowerment,2.9
#Your own daydreams and the daydreams of those around you make you stronger, faster, and more durable, possibly unlocking abilities related to the fantasies being had. You can even draw sustenance from a good enough daydream. Users of Oneiric Immunity are unaffected.
1604. Daytime Walking,3.5
#You are a nocturnal creature, typically a true vampire, that has gained the ability to walk freely in sunlight without being harmed. Whether through dhampir blood, magic, or unique physiology, the sun no longer burns you, though it may still weaken you or cause some discomfort.
1605. Daze Immunity,2.6
#You are immune to being dazed. Blows to the head, flashbangs, concussive force, and other sources of stupefaction simply cannot make you groggy or unable to focus. You can still be hurt and knocked back, but your mind stays sharp through it all.
1606. Dead Heart,3.6
#Your heart no longer functions, whether literally as a non-working organ or conceptually due to severe emotional trauma. Your body keeps going just fine, but you are unable to experience positive emotions and in the worst cases, any emotions at all. You have become cold, heartless, and devoid of compassion, though this state is not necessarily permanent.
1607. Death Connection,7.4
#You are connected to every form of death and dying in existence, emotionally and spiritually linked to every end that ever was or will be. As long as you exist, death exists, and as long as death exists, so do you. Killing you or trapping you may remove death from the world entirely, though users of Bond Destruction can sever the link and Amortals are immune to the connection.
1608. Death Defiance,4.6
#You defy death itself; situations with a high probability of killing you simply fail to do so, letting you walk out of collapsing buildings, gunfire and freefalls with nothing more than a bad day. You can still be hurt and suffer normally, and outside of genuinely lethal situations this trait does nothing for you.
1609. Death Derivation,9.5
#You are the source of all death in the cosmos; every dying cell, every fading star, every ending exists because you do. You hold instant and total dominion over the dead, the dying, and all powers related to death. However, if you are ever killed, death itself ceases and nothing in existence can ever die again, so the role cannot be escaped without passing it to a successor.
1610. Death Embodiment,8.6
#You are Death incarnate, existing wherever death is present and knowing everything tied to it. You are exempt from dying, hold supreme dominion over the dead, and can guide or induce death at will. You may be bound by certain rules of your station and are forbidden from directly clashing with an embodiment of Life.
1611. Death Presence,6.4
#Your mere presence is death. Plants wilt, food rots, wood splinters and metal corrodes around you, and living beings in your proximity simply begin to die. The speed of this decay scales with your strength, reaching grim reaper levels at the highest tiers. Immortals and those who can halt death itself may push back against your aura.
1612. Death Shadow,5.4
#Your shadow kills. Anything caught within it suffers a fate ranging from slow withering to outright erasure from existence, and at higher levels even objects crumble when it falls across them. The shadow must actually touch the target, and it may be impossible to turn off, which makes sunny days an ordeal.
1613. Death Transcendence,9.0
#You have utterly transcended the concept of death. No process categorized as dying can touch you, and even if you are somehow rendered lifeless you simply reinitiate your own existence, reforming body and soul at will. Only Absolute Erasure, Absolute Destruction and Omni-Negation can do anything to you, and even fated deaths slide off without effect.
1614. Death-Force Empowerment,4.5
#You grow stronger, faster and more durable when exposed to death-force, possibly unlocking new related abilities. Sufficient exposure can even sustain you without food or slow your aging to a crawl.
1615. Death-Force Mimicry,5.8
#Your body is made of death-force, or can transform into it at will. In this form your cells, bones and muscles are fortified by necrotic energy flowing through them, though Life-Force Manipulation or Energy Drain can be fatal to you.
1616. Death-Force Power Link,4.8
#Your other powers are wired into your death-force reserves, using necrotic energy as their fuel and amplifier. If your death-force becomes unstable, your linked powers can spiral out of control and Life-Force users may be able to overpower you entirely.
1617. Decapitation Survival,4.2
#Your body keeps functioning even when your head is cut off, blown off, ripped off or outright destroyed. Your body can operate independently from the head, and in most cases you can simply reattach it, though there may be a limit on how many times you can pull this trick.
1618. Decay Embodiment,6.6
#You are the embodiment of decay, rot and the inevitable breakdown of all things. You command every power of necrosis, wither and putrefaction, and can even draw strength from it, though you must be careful not to let your own body become a victim of the process you personify.
1619. Decay Immunity,3.9
#You are completely invulnerable to decay, rot and decomposition. Your body can still be killed, but your corpse would remain pristine forever, bones intact, flesh fresh, muscles preserved. Omni-absorption and power negation are the only things that can strip this immunity.
1620. Decay Power Link,4.7
#Your powers are fueled by your own rotting nature, the decay of your body strengthening and sustaining everything else you can do. You may still rot to death if you push too hard, and life-based or healing powers can overpower you.
1621. Decayed Activity,3.3
#You can move and act normally despite your body being decayed, rotten or falling apart. Flesh that should not function still functions; muscle that should be too mushy to flex still flexes. Great for zombies who want to keep their day job.
1622. Decelerated Aging,2.8
#You age far slower than normal for your species and may live significantly longer than your peers. You are not immortal and are still vulnerable to Age Manipulation, and if you have this from birth you may be stuck looking like a child for decades.
1623. Decelerated Forces,4.4
#External forces like friction and gravity affect you at a reduced rate or with less strength. You can accelerate with unnatural ease and shrug off impacts that would floor others, though without control the power may be inconsistent about when it kicks in.
1624. Defeat Adaptation,5.4
#Whenever you lose, you adapt. Any power, tactic, or trick that defeated you will never work on you the same way twice, your body developing immunities and your mind forming counters automatically. The more times you lose to someone, the more untouchable you become to them.
1625. Defense Adaptation,5.8
#Your attacks adapt to whatever defends against them. If your first strike fails against a target's durability, shield, or immunity, each subsequent attack grows stronger and more tailored until it breaks through. The stronger the defense, the more attempts you need, and you must survive long enough to adapt.
1626. Defense Immunity,5.7
#You are immune to the defenses of others - shields, barriers, armor, and protective powers fail to function when aimed at stopping you. Walls don't hold, forcefields fizzle, and invulnerability gives way. Absolute Defense and Power Negation may still hold you back.
1627. Defense Mechanism,4.0
#When your life is in danger, your body reacts on its own, unleashing protective abilities to keep you alive. You may not have full control over what happens, and the power fades once the threat is gone, but you are remarkably hard to actually kill.
1628. Absolute Defense,9.6
#Your defense is unassailable. No force, element, or power in your universe can get past it, regardless of its nature, scale, or approach. You are the immovable wall, placed above all other beings in terms of sheer protection. Only reality manipulation and conceptual erasure stand a chance against you.
1629. Definition Embodiment,9.1
#You are the embodiment of definitions themselves, the fundamental nature and identity that makes anything what it is. You hold near-limitless dominion over all meanings, though changing the definition of what you are will in turn change your own properties in the world.
1630. Dehydration Survival,2.6
#You can remain alive and functional even in states of severe dehydration that would kill an ordinary person. You may still be vulnerable and weakened while in such a dried-out state, but you will not die from it.
1631. Deity Reincarnation,6.1
#You are the reincarnation of a god, carrying a divine soul or existence passed along from another upon your birth. You may not have access to the full scope of the original deity's powers, and your existence is vulnerable to Reincarnation Denial or Soul Trapping.
1632. Deity Soul,6.4
#You possess the soul of a deity housed within the body of another creature, granting you god-like supernatural abilities. Your divine soul may be dormant at first, suppressed by a higher being or waiting for a specific event to awaken. Your mortal body may struggle to contain the power of what lives inside it.
1633. Delayed Immortality,5.2
#You age normally until you reach your physical prime, at which point your aging screeches to a halt. You stay young and fit indefinitely, though you can still be killed through violence, disease, or other critical injuries. A lifespan with no expiration date, assuming nothing kills you first.
1634. Demi-Dragon Physiology,4.6
#You are half-human, half-dragon, possessing the physical might, scales, and elemental breath of dragonkind while retaining your humanity. Not as powerful as a full-blooded dragon, but far beyond any mere mortal, with the potential to grow into something truly terrifying.
1635. Demi-Nymph Physiology,4.7
#You are half-nymph, blessed with eternal beauty, a divine spark, and a potent connection to nature through your nymph parent's affinity. Forests, rivers, or mountains bend slightly to your presence depending on your heritage, and your mortal half grants you flexibility the pure-blooded lack.
1636. Demi-Werebeast Physiology,3.8
#You are a hybrid of human and werebeast, bearing the shapeshifting traits and enhanced physical stats of your bestial parent without fully losing your humanity. You aren't as monstrous as a full werebeast, but you also lack some of their more crippling weaknesses.
1637. Demigod Physiology,5.7
#You possess a divine spark inherited from a godly parent, granting you a partial form of divinity. Your physical and supernatural abilities far exceed mortal limits, and you may one day ascend to full godhood after death. Still vulnerable to powers that specifically target divinity.
1638. Demihuman Physiology,2.9
#You are a demihuman, one of the many fantasy humanoid races that blend human features with animal traits. Catfolk, lizardfolk, beastkin, whatever fits, you gain its natural attributes. Powers vary wildly depending on species, and some settings don't treat demihumans kindly.
1639. Demon Dragon Physiology,6.2
#You are a demon-dragon hybrid, combining the elemental might and majesty of a dragon with the infernal powers and corruptive nature of a demon. Rare even among mythical beings, you possess both hellfire and dragon's breath, but holy powers hit you twice as hard.
1640. Demon Inheritance,4.3
#You inherit the powers, traits, and possibly the memories of your demonic parent or parents. What exactly you gain depends on who sired you, but you carry their infernal legacy in your blood and soul, potentially awakening more of it over time.
1641. Demon Limbs,3.6
#You possess or can manifest limbs of demonic origin, grotesque and powerful appendages that grant supernatural strength and various infernal abilities depending on their nature. They may be awkward to control at first and make you a target for demon slayers.
1642. Demon Machine Physiology,6.0
#You are a mechanical being infused with demonic power, part cyborg or android and part infernal entity. Your mechanical body is empowered by hellish energy, granting destructive capabilities that dwarf regular machines. Still vulnerable to divine force and holy powers.
1643. Demon Physiology Superior,6.3
#You are an empowered demon, possessing additional power sets beyond those of your base demonic physiology. Like other superior-tier races, you are far stronger than an ordinary demon and possess the intelligence to use your expanded arsenal with refined precision.
1644. Demon Physiology,5.1
#You are or can become a demon, a malevolent spirit of infernal divinity. You gain the physical and supernatural traits of demonkind: horns, claws, fangs, enhanced strength, demonic energy, and possibly wings. Still vulnerable to the usual demon weaknesses like exorcism and divine water.
1645. Demon Soul,4.8
#Your soul is that of a demon even if your body is not. You possess supernatural abilities on a demonic level, channeling infernal power through a mortal vessel. Some of your powers may be sealed and require unlocking, and Angel Soul users can counter you directly.
1646. Demonic Avian Physiology,4.2
#You are or can become a demonic bird, whether a bird born of Hell or an infernal spirit trapped in avian form. You possess flight alongside potent demonic abilities and an intimidating presence. Still vulnerable to holy powers, and corruption may take you easier than other birds.
1647. Demonic Beast Physiology,4.9
#You are or can become a demonic beast, an animal of infernal origin with supernatural size and abilities beyond any natural creature. You don't die from age or disease and must be killed through specific means. Some demonic beasts carry bestial instincts that can override your reason.
1648. Demonic Beauty,4.1
#You possess a supernatural beauty in your demonic form that captivates mortal eyes. In your true form, however, your beauty is so intense and otherworldly that mortals cannot bear to look upon you without suffering harm. A double-edged gift, depending on which face you wear.
1649. Demonic Cat Physiology,3.1
#You are or can transform into a demonic cat, gaining feline agility, reflexes and senses alongside minor demonic traits like unholy claws and resistance to mundane harm. Vulnerable to demon slayers and feline manipulators.
1650. Demonic Cyclops Physiology,4.0
#You are or can transform into a demonic cyclops, combining giant-class strength and durability with hellish traits. Your single eye may hold demonic sight abilities. Demon slayers remain a threat, but precious few things will survive a swing from a demon cyclops fist.
1651. Demonic Dinosaur Physiology,5.3
#You are or can transform into a demonic dinosaur, fusing the raw primal power of prehistoric beasts with hellish supernatural conditioning. Rare and terrifying even among demon-kind, you gain enhanced physical stats and demonic abilities on top of whatever dinosaur form you take.
1652. Demonic Divinity,7.8
#You possess the demonic form of Divinity, granting you raw godly power through an infernal lineage or transformation. You are a divine demonic being by nature - a dark god with dominion over both demonic and divine aspects, wielding authority that rivals transcendent demons. Countered only by divine/demonic slayers and power negation.
1653. Demonic Fairy Physiology,4.4
#You possess the traits of a demonic fairy, the malignant cousin of nature spirits from old pagan lore. You combine fey magic - glamour, enchantment, traditional fairy tricks - with demonic malevolence. Vulnerable to cold iron, rustic charms and divine relics alike.
1654. Demonic Giant Physiology,5.8
#You are or can transform into a demonic giant, combining the raw physical might of a giant with the monstrous supernatural power of a demon. Many demonic giants rank on par with giant lords and transcended giants - you are the kind of being cultures build myths around, like the Nephilim of biblical lore.
1655. Demonic Insect Physiology,3.6
#You are or can transform into a demonic insect, inheriting the traits of both insect and demon - chitinous durability, hive instincts, uncanny reflexes, and whatever hellish abilities you've developed. Small forms make for terrifying infiltrators.
1656. Demonic Monster Physiology,5.2
#You are or can transform into a Demonic Monster, a creature born of hellish essence. Your form is grotesque and powerful, granting immense physical capabilities and a demonic nature, though the specifics vary with the monster in question. Vulnerable to angelic and divine forces, and in your full monstrous form you may lose your higher cognitive functions to beastly instinct.
1657. Demonic Name,6.2
#Your very name carries infernal weight, and those who speak it aloud unknowingly invoke demonic phenomena. Speaking your name can summon or banish demonic agents, infuse the speaker with demonic power, trigger dark miracles, or even force future knowledge from the demons you are tied to. Reckless use of your name by others can damn them, and you must tread carefully as demons are habitual liars.
1658. Demonic Plant Physiology,5.4
#You have the traits of a demonic plant or a malevolent nature spirit twisted by infernal influence. You embody the dark counterpart to benevolent nature, your body a fusion of plant matter and demonic essence with all the strengths and evils of both. Vulnerable to exorcisms, divine magic, and anti-demon techniques, and you may die if the plant you are tied to is destroyed.
1659. Demonic Power Immunity,5.1
#You are immune to demonic powers and effects, capable of shrugging off hellfire, infernal curses and dark influences with ease. This makes you uniquely equipped to go toe-to-toe with demons on their own terms, though you are still perfectly vulnerable to divine powers and sufficiently transcendent demons may still get through.
1660. Demonic Power Link,4.6
#Your demonic nature is linked directly to your powers, fueling and amplifying them with its infernal essence. Your abilities grow stronger as your demonic nature grows stronger, and any power you wield is given an unholy edge. If your demonic nature becomes unstable, however, your powers may spiral out of your control.
1661. Demonic Presence,4.8
#Your mere presence warps the area around you, causing sinister and strange effects influenced by your mood, demonic type, and infernal rank. Your aura can torment minds, darken weather, twist emotions, and corrupt the environment, all without you lifting a finger. Divine Presence will actively push yours back in most cases.
1662. Demonic Shark Physiology,4.6
#You are or can transform into a demonic shark, blending the predatory perfection of an apex ocean hunter with the unholy might of a demon. Your teeth tear through flesh and soul alike, and your senses and hunting instincts become terrifyingly sharp in the water.
1663. Demonic Snake Physiology,4.7
#You are or can transform into a demonic snake, a serpent born of Hell or an evil spirit trapped in ophidian form. Western culture already considers snakes unholy, and your form embraces that fully with venomous bite, unsettling presence, and demonic traits to boot. May carry bestial instincts that cloud your judgement.
1664. Demonic Source,4.8
#You possess a source of demonic power within you, whether through ancestry, transformation, vessel-hood, or theft from another demon. This infernal wellspring feeds any and all demonic abilities you may develop and marks you as a being of Hell. Weak around holy lands, items and entities, and demonic slayers will mark you as prey.
1665. Demonic Spider Physiology,4.6
#You are or can transform into a demonic spider, a creature of webs, venom and unholy intent. Your many eyes, fangs and spinnerets all carry demonic properties, and your webs can trap both body and soul. Deeply unsettling to behold and terrifying to fight.
1666. Demonic Symbiosis,5.6
#Allows you to host demonic beings within your body, gaining their powers in exchange. You can host anything from lesser devils to full-blown archdemons, with your capabilities scaling accordingly. The fusion comes with a price — erosion of mind and body over time, and a constant risk of long-lasting corruption from your passenger's influence.
1667. Demonic Ugliness,3.6
#You are so hideous in a deeply unnatural way that it warps the world around you. Weak-willed onlookers are driven to fear or madness, and prolonged exposure causes inanimate objects to rot and decay. Angelic beauty directly counters your aura.
1668. Demonic Vampire Physiology,5.5
#You are a hybrid of demon and vampire, whether by birth, conversion or possession. You possess the raw physical supremacy and regeneration of a vampire alongside the hellish powers and immortality of a demon. Unfortunately you also share the weaknesses of both, and holy forces hit you twice as hard.
1669. Demonic Wings,4.2
#You possess one or more pairs of demonic wings that grant you flight, the ability to teleport between planes, and act as a conduit for your infernal power. In some fantasies, losing your wings would strip you of your immortality entirely.
1670. Demonic-Alien Physiology,5.7
#You are or can transform into a demonic alien, a cosmic horror cut from hellish cloth. You possess the otherworldly biology and adaptability of an alien alongside the raw supernatural might of a demon. Shares the weaknesses of both and is outclassed by angelic aliens.
1671. Demonic-Undead Physiology,5.6
#You are a fusion of demon and undead, your presence deeply corrupt and unnatural. You specialize in wielding unholy and necrotic energies together for devastatingly destructive effect. Holy powers and rituals are especially potent against you, and some hybrid types still require blood or flesh to sustain themselves.
1672. Dense Muscles,2.8
#Your muscle fibers are far denser than those of a regular person, granting you higher base strength, toughness and some elasticity. You weigh considerably more than you look though, which may be an issue for boats and scales.
1673. Density Infinitum,6.3
#Your density passively, endlessly increases for as long as you exist, constantly making you stronger, tougher and heavier. Given enough time you become unmovable, but you'll also need complementary powers to stop yourself from falling through the floor, then through the planet, then through space itself.
1674. Dependency Transcendence,6.4
#You transcend your dependencies on things, food, water, oxygen, sleep, training, even conceptual and metaphysical requirements. You can simply keep going without them. Note that transcending the need for oxygen does not make you immune to being choked, it just means a lack of air won't kill you.
1675. Derivation,7.8
#You are the Prime Source of a specific concept, the foundational wellspring from which that abstract exists. As long as you live, the concept flows from you, but if you die the concept itself unravels alongside you. Sources normally have no form of their own and may require a host to channel their overwhelming output.
1676. Dermal Armor,3.5
#Your body possesses innate armor as a natural part of you, whether scales, thick hide, bone nodules beneath the skin, or simply dense muscle and bone. You are resistant to physical harm, pain and temperature extremes, but the heavier it gets, the harder it is to swim.
1677. Desert Adaptation,2.3
#Your body is perfectly suited to desert environments, both hot and cold. You can go far longer without food or water, tolerate extreme heat and sudden cold nights, shrug off blowing sand and may even develop coloration matching the sands around you.
1678. Desire Embodiment,7.4
#You are the personification of all desire and fulfillment, holding absolute power within the realm of craving, longing and emotional need. Others cannot help but covet you, envy you, and aspire to whatever you represent, which makes forming genuine relationships almost impossible.
1679. Despair Embodiment,7.3
#You are the living incarnation of despair, feeding on the hopelessness of everyone and everything around you, including your own. You can convert despair into raw energy, wield it as a weapon, and may never age or die unless a very specific condition is met.
1680. Destiny Aspect Manifestation,6.4
#You are the manifestation of one specific aspect of fate itself, an individual facet of how destiny shapes the world and existence. You may have to share your domain with other aspects of fate or be forced to work alongside them whether you want to or not.
1681. Destruction Embodiment,7.8
#You are destruction itself, the concept given flesh. Your presence alone is ruinous, and you outperform any other being at the act of destroying, your very thoughts and breath acts of annihilation. May be opposed by embodiments of creation, and you may feel compelled to destroy without regard for consequence.
1682. Destruction Empowerment,4.2
#You grow stronger, faster and more durable the more destruction occurs around you. Battlefields, collapsing buildings and ruined cities feed you energy, sharpen your reflexes and may even halt your aging. Creators and protectors can weaken the effect.
1683. Destruction Power Link,5.4
#Your destructive aspect is linked to all your other powers, feeding and strengthening them through the act of erasure. The more you destroy, the more your abilities flourish, but if the erasure ever becomes unstable your powers may go wild. Creators may be able to sever the link.
1684. Destruction Symbiosis,5.8
#You host a destructive entity within you, some manifestation of annihilation, erasure or negation. Through this bond you gain profound powers over unmaking. However, the entity may attempt to take over, and harbouring such a being is dangerous in itself.
1685. Destructive Countenance,6.6
#Your face, your true form, causes destruction the moment it is seen. Revealing your countenance can range from cracking walls to utterly devastating entire landscapes depending on how much you unveil. Absolute Immortals and Flawless Indestructibles are unaffected.
1686. Destructive Presence,6.3
#Your mere presence causes destruction. Walls crack as you pass, ground splits beneath your feet, and unlucky bystanders find their possessions crumbling just from sharing a room with you. The strength of the effect scales with your power.
1687. Destructive Source,9.1
#You are the source of all destruction in existence. Every act of breaking, every crumbling ruin, every annihilated star flows from you. All destructive forces and powers are yours to command absolutely. If you ever die, destruction itself ceases to exist everywhere, creating absolute peace. You cannot escape the role without passing it to another.
1688. Determination Embodiment,6.5
#Undertale - You are the living embodiment of determination, able to accomplish anything you set your will to no matter how impossible or dire the situation. You refuse to give up, and reality tends to bend under that refusal. Without something to be determined about you cannot use this power, and high-level fear manipulators can shake your resolve.
1689. Determined Strength,4.6
#You fight at full strength no matter how badly you are injured. Missing limbs, massive blood loss, mortal wounds, none of it slows you down until the fight is over. Unlike Survival Empowerment, you don't grow stronger near death, you simply never weaken. Push too hard and you may still die at the end of it.
1690. Deva Physiology,7.8
#You are or can become a Deva, a celestial spirit that watches over natural forces. As a Deva, you possess immense spiritual power and dominion over fundamental forces of the universe such as evolution, comparable to an Archangel in the celestial hierarchy. Your mere presence carries the weight of a being that is one with the cosmos.
1691. Devil Monkey Physiology,2.6
#You are or can transform into a Devil Monkey, an aggressive cryptid primate from North American folklore. You possess cunning far beyond a normal animal, primate-like agility, sharp claws and fangs, and a frenzied shrieking presence that terrifies prey. Still a mortal creature though, you can be killed as easily as any other monkey.
1692. Absolute Dexterity,7.4
#Your dexterity is boundless and godlike, there is no movement too precise or delicate for you to execute flawlessly. You cannot lose your balance through any means short of reality manipulation, you can perform feats of accuracy that defy physical possibility, and your coordination is so perfect that the concept of clumsiness cannot touch you.
1693. Enhanced Dexterity,2.3
#Your physical control and coordination is far beyond any peak athlete. You can juggle flawlessly, slip through laser grids, navigate hazardous terrain while keeping perfect balance, and move your fingers and toes with exceptional finesse. Tendon strain and clumsiness are things of the past, though you can still injure your joints if you push too hard.
1694. Supernatural Dexterity,4.6
#Your dexterity is glaringly, obviously above the natural level of your world. You control your limbs, muscles and digits with a precision no mortal athlete could ever achieve through training, allowing you to pull off maneuvers that would be flat-out impossible for anyone of your species.
1695. Peak Human Dexterity,1.8
#Your coordination is at the absolute peak of what a regular human can achieve. You can keep perfect balance, juggle without dropping, slip through tight spaces, and even stand upright on unstable moving surfaces with practice. You are essentially incapable of being clumsy, though your dexterity does not cross into the superhuman.
1696. Dhampir Physiology,5.2
#You are a dhampir, a half-vampire hybrid that possesses most of the strengths of a full vampire without the crippling weaknesses. You have enhanced physical abilities, supernatural senses and a potent healing factor. You may still crave blood and grow weaker without it, but you can subsist on human food and sunlight does not burn you away.
1697. Dhole Physiology,1.9
#You are or can transform into a dhole, the whistling Asian wild dog. You possess heightened canine senses, pack-hunter instincts, enhanced stamina and the agility of a natural predator. Your senses can be overwhelmed by sensory overload though.
1698. Dice Mimicry,3.2
#You are or can transform into dice, either retaining your anatomy made of dice or becoming homogenous cube matter. Not invulnerable, dice can still be melted or crushed, and users of plastic or object manipulation will have a field day with you.
1699. Dieselpunk Physiology,4.6
#Your body is built on dieselpunk principles, a retro-futuristic fusion of interwar diesel technology and mechanical marvels. Your physical capabilities are greatly enhanced and your body houses integrated machinery, but you need to regularly refuel on coal, petroleum or similar stock or you will grind to a halt.
1700. Digestive System Mimicry,3.6
#Your body is or can become a living digestive system, whether a giant stomach or a fully assembled tract complete with esophagus and intestines. You are a literal eating machine, but you are also vulnerable to gastrointestinal distress and digestive diseases like never before.
1701. Digestive Waste Mimicry,2.2
#Your body is made of or can transform into digestive waste, either retaining your anatomy in excremental form or becoming homogenous muck. You reek, you can be melted by heat, and cold abilities will make you brittle, but at least you are hard to bring yourself to hit.
1702. Digestive Waste Monster Physiology,3.3
#You are or can transform into a digestive waste monster, a hulking horror of filth and excrement with enhanced physical abilities. You give off a terrible smell, especially when burned, and heat-based attacks will melt chunks off you.
1703. Digging Implement Mimicry,1.7
#You are or can transform into a digging implement like a shovel or trowel, either anatomically identical made of shovel material or homogenous tool matter. Your durability depends on what you're made of, and you may not be able to change back.
1704. Digital Empowerment,3.3
#The more digital data around you, the stronger, faster and tougher you become. In a server room or data center you are a monster, but strand you in the wilderness and you are just a regular person. You may even draw sustenance from raw data.
1705. Digital Form,5.7
#You can transform your body into pure electronic data, allowing you to travel through cyberspace and enter any device that runs on electricity. While digitized you can pilot machines from the inside and even hijack supercomputers. Vulnerable to EMPs, strong magnetic fields and anti-tech countermeasures.
1706. Digital Power Link,4.0
#Your powers are linked directly to your data/digital nature, with your internal data stream acting as their fuel and control system. This allows you to push your abilities to higher levels than normal, but unstable data or digital negation can cripple you entirely.
1707. Digital Regeneration,4.1
#Your body regenerates by weaving digital data into itself, with healing speed scaling to how much data you have access to. In a data-rich environment you can recover from grievous wounds in seconds, while in a dead zone you heal no faster than a normal human.
1708. Digital Soul,5.5
#Your soul is composed of digital ectoplasm rather than ordinary spirit-stuff. This grants you innate data manipulation, digital perception and the ability to exist in or above the digital world, and your soul is easily stored, letting you inhabit mechanical bodies at will. Electromagnetic waves can disrupt or even kill you.
1709. Digital Symbiosis,4.7
#You host a digital being inside your body, be it an AI, a sentient program or a living computer virus. The symbiote grants you technological and data-based powers, but it may try to take over your mind and body, and prolonged symbiosis can corrupt the host from within.
1710. Digitigrade Legs,1.5
#Your legs are built for digitigrade locomotion, walking on the balls of your feet like a cat or a wolf. You move faster and more quietly than most people, and your stance gives you a natural spring when running or jumping.
1711. Digitless Interaction,1.2
#You have no visible fingers or toes, yet your hands and feet function as if you did. Your smooth palms can still grip, type and manipulate objects with full dexterity, though fine tasks requiring real fingertips may be slightly clumsier.
1712. Diligence Empowerment,3.9
#You grow stronger, faster and tougher the more diligently you apply yourself to a task, and you draw further strength from the diligence of others around you. As long as you are committed to something with real effort, your powers climb steadily higher. Abandoning the task saps it all away.
1713. Dimensional Adaptation,4.2
#Your body naturally adapts to the atmosphere, gravity, temperature and exotic phenomena of any dimension you find yourself in. Walking into a crushing gravity well or a toxic plane is a matter of a few uncomfortable seconds before your body adjusts.
1714. Dimensional Empowerment,4.3
#You grow stronger, faster and more durable while within a specific dimension tied to your affinity, unlocking related abilities and boosting any powers you already have. Some draw sustenance from the place itself or age slower there, but away from that dimension you are noticeably weaker.
1715. Dimensional Independence,6.6
#You are not bound to the three spatial dimensions. You can move through time and across dimensions freely, perceiving things from angles no 3D being could, and walking around obstacles that would trap anyone else. You can still be struck by attacks in motion, and a lower-dimensional object impaling you can pin you in time and place.
1716. Dimensional Mimicry,7.4
#Your body is itself a dimensional realm, either from birth or through transformation. You retain your shape and sentience, but your flesh is now a living pocket-world containing its own space and laws. You are incredibly vast in scale and potential, but vulnerable to dimensional destruction and sentience removal.
1717. Dimensional Power Link,5.7
#Your powers are fueled by and linked to dimensions themselves, allowing the dimensional energy to strengthen and stabilize your abilities. The stronger or more stable the dimensions you are tapped into, the greater your powers, although unstable dimensions may cause your abilities to spiral out of control.
1718. Dimensional Survival,5.2
#You can survive in any alternate dimension or universe, no matter how hostile its physics, mathematics, matter or energy are to your native existence. Realms never meant for mortal beings let you breathe just fine, although particularly alien aspects may still affect you and extended stays may wear you down.
1719. Dimensional Transcendence,8.9
#You have ascended beyond all dimensional levels on a conceptual and existential level. Lower dimensional beings cannot harm you at all, your immunities cannot be bypassed except by equals or those above you, and you can manipulate lower dimensions at will. Still encompassed by users of Unity and Pan-Dimensional Physiology.
1720. Dimensional Transformation,4.6
#Whenever you travel to a different dimension, your form automatically transforms to match it, sometimes adopting its qualities, sometimes becoming something entirely new. The transformation is randomized and you may have different abilities in each form, taking time to adapt to them.
1721. Dingo Physiology,2.1
#You are or can transform into a dingo. You gain the instincts, senses and hunting prowess of the Australian wild dog. Vulnerable to users of Canine or Animal Manipulation who can order you around.
1722. Dino-Dragon Physiology,6.6
#You are or can transform into a prehistoric dragon, a beast with the primal instincts and raw killing skill of a dinosaur fused with the supernatural and magical might of a true dragon. You are a terror in both combat and the hunt, with the vicious savagery of the ancient world backing every breath.
1723. Dinosaur Monster Physiology,5.7
#You are or can transform into a dinosaur monster, a kaiju-tier beast with the physical stats to match. Your strength, durability and destructive potential are all massively amplified, but your sheer size makes stealth almost impossible and coexisting with ordinary humans a constant challenge.
1724. Dinosaur Physiology,3.8
#You possess the traits, attributes and abilities of dinosaurs, or can transform into one. You gain enhanced physical stats, natural weaponry and keen predatory senses, though your overall size remains closer to your base form rather than the true scale of the prehistoric beast.
1725. Dinosauroid Physiology,3.6
#You are or can transform into a dinosauroid, a humanoid dinosaur with two arms, two legs and a distinctly saurian body. You possess enhanced physical stats, natural armor, claws and a tail, while still retaining the dexterity of a humanoid frame.
1726. Dip Physiology,4.1
#You are the Dip, the black hound of Catalan myth, lame in one paw and hungry for the blood of drunkards. You possess enhanced physical abilities, demonic resilience and a terrifying presence in the night. Your bite drains the blood of your victims and the alcohol in their veins only makes them more appealing to you.
1727. Dirtiness Empowerment,2.7
#You become stronger, faster and more durable the filthier you or your surroundings are. Mud, grime, stench and rot all fuel you, and at high levels you may even draw sustenance from the muck itself. Anything that cleans you weakens you.
1728. Disability Compensation,3.5
#You develop supernatural powers that compensate for a disability you possess, a blind user may gain enhanced hearing and sixth sense, a deaf user may gain vibration sensing and so on. The trade is real, and curing the disability may cost you the power it granted.
1729. Disability Recovery,4.0
#You can recover from any disability or disabling injury, whether physical or mental. Given enough time, nothing short of outright death keeps you down, lost limbs regrow, shattered minds heal. The more severe the condition, the longer the recovery takes.
1730. Disability-Based Immunity,3.3
#Your disability grants you immunity to certain effects tied to the sense or faculty you lack. A blind user cannot be affected by hypnotic gazes, a deaf user is immune to siren songs and sonic attacks. Cure the disability and the immunity goes with it.
1731. Disc Empowerment,1.7
#You become stronger, faster and more durable when in contact with discs, whether they be records, frisbees or energy constructs. A very niche affinity, but very strong if you build your life around a DJ booth.
1732. Discipline Embodiment,6.2
#You are the living embodiment of discipline itself, the idea that mankind must master itself and its environment for the sake of progress. You naturally excel at research, training and self-mastery, and your presence inspires order, innovation and urbanization wherever you go. The more disciplined the civilization around you, the stronger you become.
1733. Discomfort Immunity,2.8
#You are immune to all forms of physical discomfort: itching, burning, nausea, stinging, swelling, none of it bothers you. Pain still hits normally though, and you may dangerously ignore symptoms that are actually life-threatening warnings.
1734. Discord Empowerment,3.5
#You grow stronger, faster, and more durable the more conflict and disagreement surrounds you. A tense room gives you a buzz, a full-blown war can push you to superhuman levels. Some users can draw sustenance from strife itself and slow their aging as long as the world stays divided.
1735. Discovery Empowerment,4.1
#Every discovery you make, whether a new place, a hidden truth, or an unknown fact, empowers you physically and unlocks new capabilities. Pain fades when you are on the hunt for something new. If you get angry enough while driven by curiosity, you can even briefly negate another's powers.
1736. Discrimination Embodiment,6.5
#You are the living embodiment of discrimination, feeding on hatred, misconception and misery. You are a slow-acting corruption, whispering promises of superiority to the weak-minded and turning communities against each other. Vulnerable to Good Embodiment and Love/Purification powers, and powerless against the truly omnibenevolent.
1737. Disease Immunity,3.1
#Your immune and digestive systems are enhanced far beyond the human norm, making you completely immune to every disease from bacteria, viruses and parasites. Poisons and toxins still affect you normally, and you may still carry pathogens on your skin and clothes and pass them to others.
1738. Disease Mimicry,5.0
#You can transform your body fully or partially into one composed of diseases, illnesses and viruses. You retain your shape and organs but become a living plague, difficult to injure conventionally and capable of infecting anything that touches you. Healing powers aimed at disease may be lethal to you.
1739. Disease Symbiosis,4.6
#Your body is home to a colony of intelligent pathogens that grant you power in exchange for shelter. You gain enhanced physique, infection abilities and minor shapeshifting as the symbiotes reshape your flesh. They will defend your life fiercely, but their weaknesses become yours, and a strong-willed strain may try to take the wheel.
1740. Disembodied Activity,4.1
#You can continue to move and act even without a body, your severed head still barking orders or a stray hand still crawling along the floor. Each piece retains its share of your will. You can still die if the remaining pieces are destroyed, so losing too much of yourself is still fatal.
1741. Disembodied Intelligence,4.8
#You exist without a body, a bodiless consciousness able to learn, understand and reason with sharp intellect. Being incorporeal means many physical threats cannot touch you, but interacting with the material world requires possessing a vessel or using other powers to manifest.
1742. Disgust Embodiment,6.3
#You are the living embodiment of disgust itself, feeding off every cringe, every gag, every revulsion within your range. You convert disgust into energy to fuel your abilities and extend your lifespan, and you may be immune to death so long as disgust exists in the world. Without disgust, you are weakened considerably.
1743. Disgust Empowerment,3.9
#You grow stronger, faster and more durable the more disgust surrounds you, whether yours or others. Being in a filthy slum or provoking revulsion in a crowd powers you up considerably. In a sterile, pleasant environment you are effectively just a regular person.
1744. Dispersed Mind,4.5
#Your consciousness is not confined to your brain but distributed across your entire body, so even catastrophic brain damage cannot fully kill you. As long as a few scraps of your physical form remain intact, you can be resuscitated from them, your core self reassembling from whatever survived.
1745. Disposition Embodiment,8.9
#You are the living embodiment of alignment itself, encompassing good and evil, law and chaos, order and entropy, inevitability and necessity all at once. You cannot be considered moral or immoral, you exist outside of alignment entirely. Beings of pure alignment treat you as kin, and concepts of ethics bend around your presence.
1746. Distortion Empowerment,4.2
#You grow stronger, faster and tougher in the presence of distortions, drawing sustenance and power from any warping of reality around you. In a battlefield already riddled with contortive effects, you may even slow your aging.
1747. Distortion Power Link,4.8
#Your distorted nature is hardwired into your powers, fueling and strengthening them. The more twisted your essence becomes, the more potent your abilities get, though an unstable distortive core can send everything spiraling out of control.
1748. Div Physiology,5.4
#Persian Mythology - You are a Div, a vicious spirit taking the form of an animalistic human with large horns, boar-like fangs and deadly claws. You are a prolific shapeshifter, immensely strong, delight in cruelty and possess a ravenous appetite for human flesh. You are weakened during the day as a nocturnal spirit.
1749. Divided Mind,3.8
#Your mind houses multiple distinct personalities, each with their own temperament and possibly their own abilities, all born from some unknown cause or past trauma. Some may be passive, some aggressive, and each may emerge at different times. Keeping control over who is in the driver's seat is not always easy.
1750. Divine Adaptation,7.3
#Your body and soul can adapt to divine powers and effects, allowing you to withstand angelic might, trade blows with deities and endure supernatural environments that would instantly annihilate a mortal. The stronger the god or angel, the longer adaptation takes, and no amount of adaptation will let you tank an omnipotent being.
1751. Divine Authority,8.0
#You are a divine being with the authority to rule, enforce laws and make decisions that cannot be disobeyed by those beneath your hierarchy. Your dominion covers every being within your divine station, and at higher levels you can elevate subjects by granting them limited authority of their own.
1752. Divine Beast Physiology,6.6
#You are or can transform into a Divine Beast, a supernatural animal of divine origin with vastly enhanced size, strength and natural abilities. You do not die of age or disease and must be killed by specific means, and many of your powers deal with nature and the natural world. You may carry bestial instincts along with the divinity.
1753. Divine Body Parts,6.2
#You possess one or more divine body parts, each granting powers tied to its nature and function. A divine eye grants divine sight, a divine arm grants divine strength, and so on. These parts are bound to you by nature, but if severed and taken, the thief inherits their power along with a lingering connection to you.
1754. Divine Giant Physiology,5.9
#You are a divine giant, born of godly union or suffused with divine power, placing you firmly in the tier of demigods and far above ordinary giant lords. Your strength, size, and divine abilities are staggering, but you still rank below true gods and remain vulnerable to both giant slayers and divine slayers.
1755. Divine Machine Physiology,6.9
#You are a bionic being of divine origin, a machine infused with unfathomable holy power. Your body possesses abilities far beyond any mundane machine and you effectively stand as a god of technology, blending transcendent divinity with mechanical precision. Vulnerable only to divinity nullification.
1756. Divine Name,6.7
#Your name itself carries divine power. Speaking it aloud can call upon benevolent miracles, infuse the speaker with divine force, trigger divine interventions, or even summon an avatar of a god. Most users are known only by titles to prevent misuse, as the name can become dangerous in the wrong mouth and blasphemous to utter.
1757. Divine Power Immunity,6.8
#You are immune to divine powers and effects, allowing you to withstand godly assaults and trade blows with deities. More powerful gods may be harder to resist entirely, and you are not immune to the powers of omnipotent beings.
1758. Divine Presence,5.0
#You emit a transcendent presence that produces supernatural effects on those around you based on your divine aspect and mood. Your mere existence can inspire awe, fear, peace, or ruin. Inexperienced users may cause unintended damage simply by being there.
1759. Divine Spark,5.6
#You carry a divine spark within your soul, a fragment of true divinity that grants you demigod-tier supernatural powers. With faith and dedication the spark can grow and ascend, reconnecting you to the divine source it came from. The spark can, however, be stolen.
1760. Divine Spirit Physiology,6.7
#You are a divine spirit, a being of pure holiness whose very existence teems with divine power beyond natural law. Your miraculous nature lets you affect almost anything by will alone, shaping reality as a being of light and sanctity. Vulnerable to Divine Slayer effects unless your soul is Eternal.
1761. Divinity,7.0
#You are a divine being by nature, possessing divinity and the immense power that comes with it. This can come from divine ancestry, faith, channeling a god's soul, ascension through evolution, or simply being born a deity. The exact level and form scales with your character and nature, but at baseline you stand head and shoulders above mortal existence.
1762. Djieien Physiology,3.6
#Allows you to transform into or be a Djieien, a monstrous six-foot spider. You cannot be killed by conventional means because your heart is hidden away, buried underground in a safe location. Of course, if anyone ever finds your heart, you die just as easily as any mortal.
1763. Djinni Physiology,4.8
#Allows you to become a Djinni, an air-type jinn of Arabian myth with a body sharp as copper and as fluid as wind. You are a grand master of air manipulation because the element is literally part of you. You may, however, be bound to a receptacle such as a lamp, and whoever holds it may command wishes from you.
1764. Dobhar-Chú Physiology,4.2
#Allows you to transform into the Dobhar-Chú, the legendary mystical otter of Celtic myth. You gain immense aquatic prowess, unnatural speed in and out of water, and the predatory ferocity of a creature whose name translates to 'water hound'. Beginners may struggle to revert back.
1765. Dodo Physiology,0.6
#Allows you to transform into a dodo, an extinct flightless bird. Congratulations, you are now famously bad at surviving. Cute though.
1766. Dog Physiology,2.6
#Allows you to transform into or be a dog, gaining all the enhanced senses, loyalty, and endurance of a canine. Your sense of smell is the real prize here, letting you track by scent with terrifying accuracy. Unfortunately chocolate is now poisonous to you.
1767. Dogū Mimicry,3.8
#Japanese Mythology - Allows you to transform into a dogū, a clay idol from Jōmon-era Japan made as a protective effigy. You gain the idol's warding properties against illness and misfortune and may even induce fertility or good luck in those near you. Your ancient clay body may be fragile compared to modern materials.
1768. Dogfolk Physiology,3.2
#Allows you to transform into or be a dogfolk, a humanoid canine race from fantasy fiction. You gain enhanced senses, natural pack instincts, and the physical prowess of a canine warrior while retaining the dexterity and intellect of a human. Furry adjacent.
1769. Doll Mimicry,4.0
#Allows you to transform into a living doll, your body becoming porcelain, plastic, plush or wood while retaining all your organs and functions. You can modify your body as needed, swapping limbs or reshaping features, but may be vulnerable to heat, cold or a lack of batteries depending on your material.
1770. Dominant Activity,5.1
#You can perform actions without interruption, no matter what. Even if your body parts are divided, your mind fractured, your powers unstable or your properties actively fighting themselves, your actions go through cleanly. External and internal forces that would normally stop you mid-motion simply fail to.
1771. Dominant Genetics,6.2
#Your genes are supreme. Any trait or power you possess will override and dominate those of your partner, ensuring that your offspring inherit your physical appearance and abilities. Your own genetic code is also resistant to mutation, tampering or corruption, though skilled geneticists may still attempt to extract or erase your genes through direct intervention.
1772. Domsten Blob Physiology,3.6
#You are a Domsten Blob, a gray featureless blob-creature from Swedish UFO legend. You possess a near-unbreakable grip, frightening speed and a limited form of precognitive thought-reading that lets you dodge incoming attacks before they land. Your body lacks any distinct features or weak points, but loud noises disorient and harm you.
1773. Donestre Physiology,3.3
#You are a Donestre, a lion-headed humanoid monster from medieval folklore. You possess enhanced physical abilities befitting a predator and an unnatural charisma that allows you to welcome and beguile strangers with gifts and kind words. However, you are cursed with the compulsion to eventually devour those you befriend, mourning over their remains afterward.
1774. Doorway Embodiment,6.5
#You are the living embodiment of doorways, passages and thresholds. You can become a portal to anywhere, control who may or may not pass through any threshold in your presence, manifest barriers and exits at will, and exist as the very concept of transition between places. Your full power may require a 'key' tied to your existence to unlock.
1775. Doppelgeist,5.1
#Your body and soul exist as two separate entities, one physical and one spiritual, each operating independently with their own perspective. Your ghostly half can phase through walls and scout unseen, while your body remains capable of fighting and interacting with the world. The two halves must cooperate, and disagreements between self and self can be uniquely frustrating.
1776. Dorotabo Physiology,3.1
#You are a Dorotabo, a vengeful yokai born from the spirit of a rice farmer wronged by neglect. Your body is a rotting, three-fingered mud-covered corpse that rises each night to wail and haunt those who have ruined what was once tended. You possess supernatural endurance and a cursed wailing that disturbs the rest of the wicked. Vulnerable to divine magic and prayers.
1777. Dosojin Physiology,6.6
#You are a Dōsojin, a Japanese deity of boundaries, roads, travelers and protection. You watch over crossroads, villages and thresholds, blessing travelers with safe passage, warding off evil spirits and bestowing fertility and harmony upon those under your care. Your divine authority grants you dominion over borders and journeys, and all who pass through your domain fall under your watchful eye.
1778. Doubt Embodiment,7.3
#You are the living embodiment of doubt itself, feeding off the skepticism and uncertainty of everyone around you, even your own. You convert doubt into raw energy to fuel your lifespan or your attacks, and as long as doubt exists in the world you may never age or die. Weakened in absence of doubt, and strong embodiments of Hope can overpower you.
1779. Dough Mimicry,3.0
#Your body is made of dough, or can transform into it, ranging from pita to cookie to pasta. You retain your shape and can even reform after being torn, but fire, heat and rot can kill you just as easily as any baker.
1780. Dover Demon Physiology,3.2
#You possess the traits of the Dover Demon cryptid: a slender body, tendril-like fingers, glowing eyes and an oversized head. You gain unnatural reflexes and an unsettling presence, but your frail mortal body can be killed like any animal if someone catches you.
1781. Dracaenae Physiology,5.0
#Greek Mythology - You are or can transform into a Dracaena, a divine half-dragon nymph of Greek myth. You possess the serpentine lower body, the venomous bite, and the divine nymph essence, with all the beauty and danger that comes with it. Vulnerable to divine power negation and dragon slayers.
1782. Draconic Beast Physiology,5.7
#You are or can transform into a draconic beast, a natural animal empowered to supernatural scales with draconic heritage. You possess immense size, enhanced instincts, and beast-like draconic powers, and you do not age or sicken, though specific methods can still slay you.
1783. Draconic Immunity,5.1
#You are immune to all draconic forces, and no amount of dragon fire, lightning or breath can harm you. You may also be immune to the beneficial effects of dragon magic, and omni-absorption or immunity bypass can still get through.
1784. Draconic Intelligence,5.6
#Your mind has been transformed into that of a dragon, granting you augmented intelligence, cognition, and access to the ancient knowledge and wisdom of dragonkind. Some users become so reliant on this subconscious draconic thought process that they cannot function without it.
1785. Draconic Power Link,4.3
#Your draconic essence is intertwined with whatever other powers you possess, fueling them with raw dragon force. Every ability you wield becomes stronger, more versatile, and carries a distinctly draconic flavor, as if a dragon itself were channeling your techniques.
1786. Draconic Source,5.2
#You are a source of draconic power itself, whether by ancestry, soul, possession, or transformation. Your body naturally generates dragon energy that can be drawn upon for countless techniques, making you vulnerable to Dragon Slayers but marking you as a true descendant of the wyrms.
1788. Dragon Arm,4.6
#One of your arms is that of a dragon, granting you immense strength and durability focused in that limb, as well as the ability to fire projectiles of pure draconic energy from it. Anti-dragon powers can counter this directly, and the rest of your body remains merely mortal.
1789. Dragon Bird Physiology,5.0
#You possess the physiology of a dragon bird, a hybrid creature combining the traits of dragons and birds. You can fly with powerful wings, breathe draconic elements, and possess scales and talons, though anti-dragon and anti-avian abilities can both threaten you.
1790. Dragon Blood,4.8
#You possess the blood of dragons, whether through ancestry, ingestion, or transfusion, granting you the ability to replicate draconic powers. The exact blessings vary depending on the specific dragon your blood came from, and so do the weaknesses, including vulnerability to Dragon Slayers.
1791. Dragon Divinity,7.6
#You possess a draconic form of divinity that elevates you beyond mortal limitations. Your power is that of a Dragon God, immense and raw, and everything about you carries the weight of divine draconic authority. Divine Slayers and Dragon Slayers are the few threats that can truly harm you.
1792. Dragon Embodiment,7.2
#You are the physical incarnation of dragons themselves, the living manifestation of every wyrm concept. You can draw power from the life of dragons, weaponize draconic energy as blasts and constructs, transmute dragons into other forms, and even steal their life essence with a thought.
1793. Dragon Empowerment,4.2
#You grow stronger, faster, and more durable in the presence of dragons or draconic essence, possibly unlocking new abilities related to whichever dragon empowers you. Strong users can even slow their aging or draw sustenance directly from draconic presence.
1794. Dragon Fruit Mimicry,2.1
#Your body is made of dragon fruit, allowing you to transform partially or fully into the pink-fleshed tropical fruit. You can reform from scattered chunks but remain uncomfortably vulnerable to being eaten.
1795. Dragon Heart,5.7
#You possess the heart of a dragon, a biological reactor that generates enormous amounts of energy within your body. You gain draconic traits such as speaking in their tongue and breathing their flames, and with training you can harness as much of a connected dragon's power as it itself can wield.
1796. Dragon Monster Physiology,4.8
#You are or can transform into a dragon monster, a feral beast with an innate connection to draconic force. Larger and more savage than a typical dragon, you trade intellect for raw physical menace. Monster Slayers treat you as priority prey.
1797. Dragon Physiology Lesser,4.2
#You are or can transform into a lesser dragon, a dragon-like beast lacking the size and intellect of true ancient dragons. You are more animal than sage, driven by powerful instincts, but still possess scales, fangs, wings and a modest breath weapon.
1798. Dragon Physiology Superior,6.6
#You are or can transform into a superior dragon, a rare breed with an innate connection to supernatural powers beyond your race's normal limits. You are several times stronger and more intelligent than an ordinary dragon, developing abilities that other dragons simply cannot, like a metahuman among regular humans.
1799. Dragon Physiology Transcendent,8.3
#You are or can transform into a transcendent dragon of godly power, the absolute pinnacle of all draconic existence. No dragon, no matter how ancient or powerful, could ever hope to equal or overcome you. You are vulnerable only to transcendent weaponry and divine slayers.
1800. Dragon Physiology,5.9
#You possess the traits, attributes and abilities of a dragon, one of the most powerful and legendary creatures in myth. Whether European or Eastern in tradition, you gain scales that rebuff steel, a devastating breath weapon, flight and immense physical strength, alongside the innate magic that all dragons are said to carry in their bones.
1801. Dragon Slime Physiology,4.4
#You are or can transform into a dragon slime, a gelatinous being with the powers of a dragon packed into an amorphous body. You gain the reshaping, splitting and absorption traits of a slime alongside draconic breath, scales and magic, though you also inherit the weaknesses of both.
1802. Dragon Soul,5.6
#Your soul is that of a dragon, carrying draconic essence at its very core. You can draw upon this inner reserve to manifest wings of energy, exhale elements, and access an immense level of strength, and with enough focus you can even morph your body into a dragon form.
1803. Dragon Symbiosis,6.4
#You can host draconic beings within your body, ranging from ordinary dragons to draconic gods, gaining their powers in exchange for sharing your flesh. More powerful dragons may strain your body with their raw power, and corrupted hosts may find the dragon fighting for control.
1804. Dragon Turtle Physiology,5.2
#You are or can transform into a dragon turtle, a legendary Chinese creature combining a turtle's body with a dragon's head. You gain immense durability, longevity and aquatic prowess alongside draconic breath and magic, powerful enough to capsize ships, though the shell makes you undeniably slow.
1805. Dragonborn Physiology Transcendent,8.0
#You are a dragonborn of godly power, a dragon-hybrid ascended to divine status. You combine the versatility of a humanoid form with the cosmic might of a transcendent dragon, wielding powers no lesser dragonborn could ever grasp. Vulnerable only to transcendent weaponry and divine slayers.
1806. Dragonborn Physiology,5.3
#You are the offspring of a dragon and another species, a humanoid bearing draconic traits like scales, claws, horns and wings. You possess abilities similar to those of true dragons, including elemental breath and innate magic, but retain the adaptability of your humanoid form.
1807. Dragonman Physiology,5.4
#You are or can transform into a humanoid dragon, an anthropomorphic being with scales, horns, claws, fangs, wings and a tail. You keep the dexterity of a humanoid while gaining draconic strength and elemental abilities, often fire breath. Losing control may leave you acting as a mindless beast.
1808. Dragonwere Physiology,5.2
#You are a dragonwere, a true dragon that can take on a human or humanoid form. Unlike a weredragon, your dragon self is the real you, and your human shape is the disguise, granting you the raw power of a dragon with the freedom to walk among mortals.
1809. Drapet Physiology,4.6
#You are a Drapet, a ghostly horse demon of French folklore that lures children onto its back and lengthens its form to carry them away. You can stretch your body to impossible proportions, trap any who touch you, and vanish into the night. Vulnerable to cold iron, sunlight and religious relics.
1810. Draugr Physiology,5.0
#Norse Mythology - You are a draugr, an undead Viking warrior that retains its intelligence and delights in the suffering it causes. Your corpse-black flesh is unnaturally heavy and strong, and you wield the dark magic of the grave alongside a warrior's martial skill. Fire and iron are your bane.
1811. Dream Empowerment,3.8
#You grow stronger, faster, and more durable when exposed to dreams, whether your own or those of others nearby. Sleeping beings passively sustain you and may even slow your aging, and deep exposure can unlock new dream-related abilities.
1812. Dream Symbiosis,4.7
#You host a dream-based being within your body, gaining oneiric powers through the symbiosis. The being may be a benevolent spirit or a nightmarish entity, and as with all symbiosis there is always a price to be paid for the power it lends.
1813. Drill Mimicry,2.8
#You are or can transform into a drill, either partially growing spinning drill bits from your limbs or fully turning your body into a homogeneous drilling construct. Great for boring through walls, less great for hugs.
1814. Drink Mimicry,3.1
#You are made of or can transform into various beverages, your body becoming coffee, wine, soda or any other drink at will. Be extremely careful around thirsty people, being consumed may incapacitate or even kill you.
1815. Dromaeosaur Physiology,4.2
#You are or can transform into a dromaeosaur, a family of dinosaurs including Velociraptors, Deinonychus, Utahraptors and Dakotaraptors. You gain enhanced speed, pack-hunting instincts, sickle claws perfect for disemboweling prey, and the sharp predatory intelligence that made these theropods legendary hunters.
1816. Drone Mimicry,3.4
#You are or can transform into a drone, an unmanned aircraft. Your abilities and size depend on the type of drone you become, ranging from tiny surveillance quadcopters to large combat UAVs. Vulnerable to hackers and technology-stopping powers.
1817. Dropbear Physiology,3.6
#You are or can transform into a Dropbear, the mythical Australian monster envisioned as an abnormally large and aggressive koala that leaps from trees to maul unsuspecting hikers. Grants enhanced strength, leaping ability and predatory instincts. Still mortal though, so try not to get shot.
1818. Drowning Empowerment,3.2
#While drowning, you become stronger, faster and tougher, drawing power from the very act of suffocating underwater. Prolonged drowning may even slow your ageing, but you need to actually be drowning to benefit.
1819. Drude Spirit Physiology,4.6
#You are a Drude, a malevolent nocturnal hag-elf-demon of Germanic folklore tied to nightmares. At night you can slip into the dreams of sleepers to torment and feed on them, and your physical capabilities are far beyond human once the sun is down.
1820. Drum Mimicry,1.1
#You either are or can transform into a drum. Good luck moving around on your own while you are a drum.
1821. Dry Movement,2.6
#No matter how dried out your body gets, you can still move freely. Even as a desiccated husk or outright corpse you suffer no stiffness, friction or loss of agility.
1822. Dryad Physiology,4.1
#You are a dryad, a tree nymph bound to oak, ash, pine, poplar, apple or laurel. You can meld with your tree for sanctuary, command the plants around you and move with the grace of a forest spirit. As long as your tree lives, so do you.
1823. Dual Consciousness,6.6
#You possess two layers of consciousness at once: a higher awareness that can spread across cosmic distances and contemplate the vastness of existence, and a lower one that keeps exquisite control over your personal self. You can meditate on the stars while haggling in a market, and neither mind loses focus on the other.
1824. Dual Impregnability,8.7
#Your body and mind are both impregnable. Nothing physical can cut, crush, burn, poison or disintegrate you, and nothing psychic can enter, read, hypnotise or influence your mind. Your feelings, memories and secrets are a sealed vault. However, you are not immortal - soul-based attacks and direct death inducement can still end you since your impregnability does not extend to the soul.
1825. Dullahan Physiology,5.8
#You are a dullahan, the headless faerie herald of death from Celtic myth. You carry your own grinning, moldy-fleshed head under one arm, its enormous darting eyes seeing in every direction at once, and you ride a black steed with a whip of human spine in hand. Speaking the name of anyone you please marks them for death. Gold repels you - even a single pin is enough to drive you away.
1826. Dumpling Mimicry,2.8
#You can transform your body partially or fully into dumpling dough and filling. Soft, squishy, and surprisingly resilient, though being hungry around you becomes a hazard and your biggest fear is a really determined eater.
1827. Duppy Physiology,4.1
#You are a Duppy, a malevolent Caribbean spirit of either corrupted human origin or pure supernatural birth. You revel in chaos and misfortune, especially at night, with a gift for malicious pranks and murderous phenomena. Vulnerable to divine magic and rituals tied to Caribbean folklore.
1828. Durability Infinitum,7.4
#Your durability has no cap, increasing endlessly over time and training without any upper limit. Given enough time you could shrug off attacks that rend continents and eventually the unmaking of reality itself. Infinity Bypassing and Infinity Negation are the perfect counters.
1829. Absolute Durability,9.7
#You are immune to any and all kinds of damage, physical, spiritual, psychic or even conceptual. From the smallest atomic disturbance to the grandest omniversal devastation, nothing can harm you. Space-time alteration of any magnitude leaves you untouched, and your indestructibility transcends all normal physical limits.
1830. Enhanced Durability,3.5
#Your durability far surpasses the peak of your species, letting you shrug off falls from tens of thousands of feet, medium-scale explosions, and light to medium firearms. You can tank strikes and recoil that would pulp a normal person, but you are not invulnerable, and your eyes, organs and brain remain your weakest points.
1831. Invulnerability Durability,8.7
#You possess complete immunity to any conventional form of physical harm, regardless of type or magnitude. Damage Manipulation and Disease Manipulation targeting your physical integrity slide off without effect. Weak against Absolute Attack, Invulnerability Negation and non-physical attacks like telepathy or density/carbon manipulation.
1832. Supernatural Durability,5.4
#You are incredibly resistant to damage, able to withstand sizeable explosions, nuclear bombs, heavy arms fire, pressures from the deepest trenches, near-absolute zero cold and heat rivaling the sun's surface. Your stamina and pain tolerance scale with it, but you are not fully invulnerable and bypassing abilities can still get through.
1833. Durability-Based Strength,4.8
#Your strength is driven by your durability, your tough body naturally able to exert forces that would tear apart a weaker frame. The more unbreakable you become the harder you hit, letting you lift heavy materials and demolish regions. Vulnerable to Invulnerability Bypassing and Durability Negation.
1834. Peak Durability,2.6
#Your bodily tissues are denser and more resilient than any ordinary human's, at the absolute peak of human conditioning. You can survive falls from 200-foot buildings, tank a metal bat to the skull, endure brutal animal attacks and shrug off lightning-equivalent shocks. You still feel the pain, and explosions or gunshots remain lethal.
1835. Duration Empowerment,4.2
