#The passing of time makes you stronger, faster, tougher and sharper. The longer an event, a fight, or even your life stretches on, the more empowered you become. Some users draw sustenance from time itself, slowing or halting their own aging entirely.
1836. Durian Mimicry,2.7
#You can transform your body partially or fully into durian flesh, spikes and all. Your spiked rind makes you hilariously painful to grab, and your smell alone can clear a room. Downside: you are edible, and some people actually like the smell.
1837. Dusk Embodiment,6.3
#You are the personification of dusk itself, the living breath of the sunset. You wield near-limitless control over the twilight hour, its long shadows and its fading golden light. Your power peaks in that brief window between day and night, and you pale against pure Day or Night Embodiments in their domains.
1838. Dust Mimicry,4.2
#You can transform your body fully into dust, letting you slip through the tightest crevices, clog electronics and evade most physical attacks. Air Manipulation is your worst nightmare, as a single strong breeze can scatter you across a city block.
1839. Dust Trail,0.4
#Wherever you walk, you leave behind a small trail of dust and dirt. Terrible for stealth, great for annoying your housemates.
1840. Dwarf Physiology,3.8
#You are a dwarf, or can transform into one. Short, stout, absurdly durable, and born with an instinctive feel for stone, metal and craft. Given a forge and enough time you can produce works fit for the gods, though you may find yourself needing a drink more often than most.
1841. Dyson Sphere Mimicry,7.6
#Your body is a Dyson Sphere, or can become one. You can siphon raw power directly from stars, your frame functioning as both a habitat and a weapon of cosmic scale, complete with surveillance systems and offensive capabilities beyond anything mortal tech can match. You need to stay near a star to function at full capacity.
1842. Eagle Physiology,2.6
#You are an eagle or can transform into one. Sharp eyes, sharper talons, and the ability to soar on thermals for hours. In a partial form you retain human reasoning with the raptor's instincts and vision.
1843. Ear Mimicry,1.1
#You are, or can become, a disembodied ear. You hear everything with painful clarity, which is both your greatest strength and your greatest weakness.
1844. Earless Perception,3.2
#You have no ears, yet you hear. Your hearing is not done through any organ, making you immune to deafness and any form of auditory attack. The way you perceive sound is fundamentally different from the ordinary sense, picking up things others never could.
1845. Earth Embodiment,8.5
#You are the embodiment of earth itself, the walking ground, the living stone. Your control over soil, rock, metal and mineral is nigh-absolute, and the earth beneath every foot on the planet answers to your will as naturally as your own body does.
1846. Earth Empowerment,3.2
#As long as you are in contact with earth, soil or stone, your physical abilities are significantly enhanced and any earth-related powers you possess are amplified. You can even draw sustenance from the ground, barely needing to eat so long as your feet touch dirt.
1847. Earth Soul,5.2
#Your soul itself is made of earth, an elemental core of living stone that can be manifested outside your body and channelled into geokinetic abilities. Such souls are typically possessed by elemental deities, nymphs and earthen spirits, making you something more than mortal.
1848. Easter Egg Mimicry,2.1
#Your body is made of or can transform into Easter eggs. You can become a homogenous mass of painted shells or keep your normal shape, though in either case you are rather fragile and prone to cracking.
1849. Echidna Physiology,2.0
#You are or can transform into an echidna, gaining their spiny defense, powerful digging claws and keen sense of smell. Surprisingly hardy for such a small and odd little creature.
1850. Echinoderm Monster Physiology,3.8
#You are or can transform into a monstrous echinoderm, taking on the form of a horrific starfish, sea urchin or sea cucumber beast. You gain regeneration beyond the norm, venomous spines and the ability to contort your body in ways that defy anatomy.
1851. Echinoderm Physiology,2.6
#You possess the traits and attributes of echinoderms such as starfish, sea urchins and sea cucumbers. You gain impressive regeneration, water vascular locomotion and defensive spines or hardened skin depending on which echinoderm you lean into.
1852. Ecopresence,7.8
#You simultaneously exist everywhere nature and ecosystems manifest, from the smallest moss patch to the greatest jungle. Wherever there is life and environment, you are there. An imbalance in nature may leave you stuck in place, and those who embody pollution can bind you.
1854. Ectoplasm Mimicry,4.8
#Your body is made of ectoplasm or can transform into it at will, taking the form of spectral matter that can ignore most physical interactions. You can stay anatomically like yourself or become a homogenous ghostly mass. Some users struggle to ever return to their original body once they let go.
1855. Edible Body,2.6
#Your body is made entirely of edible matter, from candy flesh to bread bones or whatever flavour you prefer. You may feel pain when bitten if you still have nerves, and eaten pieces do not grow back on their own.
1856. Eel Physiology,2.3
#You possess the body and traits of an eel, granting you a sinuous aquatic form, slippery skin and potentially an electric organ depending on the species. Fantastic underwater, awkward on land.
1857. Eelfolk Physiology,2.8
#You are of the eelfolk, a humanoid race with eel-like traits. You retain a bipedal form but gain sleek aquatic adaptations, serpentine grace and often an electric bite, making you equally at home in water and on land.
1858. Effect Variation,3.2
#The effects of your powers vary depending on external factors like weather, mood or time of day, shifting between elements or fluctuating in strength without your conscious input. Unpredictable but occasionally grants abilities you wouldn't normally have.
1859. Effective Activity,5.0
#Your movements, attacks and actions are always effective, landing where they need to land and dealing what they need to deal. Every swing connects, every dodge works, every manoeuvre pays off. Some beings can still resist and it may not work on targets well above your level.
1860. Efficient Body,3.9
#Your body is perfectly optimized, no wasted energy or effort anywhere. Every calorie is burned for maximum output, every muscle fiber pulls its weight, every breath oxygenates to the fullest. You won't surpass peak human without training, but you'll reach it with shockingly little effort and stay there forever.
1861. Efficient Power,4.7
#Whatever powers you possess are totally efficient, with absolutely no wasted energy or effort. You get the maximum possible output from every drop of energy spent and can wring full effectiveness out of even the most mediocre abilities. Stacks well with any other power you have.
1862. Effigy Empowerment,4.1
#You grow stronger, faster and tougher in the presence of effigies, drawing sustenance and even unlocking new abilities tied to what they represent. The more effigies around you, the more power you can draw. Without any to feed on, you may feel weakened.
1863. Egg Mimicry,3.5
#Your body is made of or can transform into egg. You retain your anatomy and organs but are composed entirely of yolk, white and shell. Extreme heat can cook or hatch you, and a heavy enough impact can crack you open, but you gain the ability to reform from any unbroken piece.
1864. Egg Monster Physiology,4.3
#You are or can transform into a monstrous living egg, a creature perpetually in an egg-like state. In this form you gain access to a wide variety of egg-based powers and abilities, from egg generation to hatching smaller creatures from yourself. Vulnerable to users of Egg or Monster Manipulation.
1865. Eggplant Mimicry,1.4
#Your body is made of or can transform into eggplants. You retain your anatomy and organs but are made of purple vegetable flesh. Beware of anyone who likes ratatouille.
1866. Elapidae Physiology,3.7
#You are or can transform into an elapid snake, a cobra, mamba, adder, sea snake or similar. You gain a flexible serpentine body, fangs that can deliver potent neurotoxic venom, and the reflexes of the fastest striking snakes on earth.
1867. Elastic Fat,1.9
#You have large amounts of body fat that is elastic like rubber. You can stretch, bounce and absorb impacts with it, though you may find your mobility affected by the sheer bulk. Stretching it too thin may compromise its armor value.
1868. Elastic Jaws,2.1
#Your jaws are incredibly flexible and can unhinge with ease, allowing you to open your mouth unnaturally wide. Useful for swallowing things whole, intimidating enemies and horror-movie grins. Your bite strength may be reduced as a tradeoff.
1869. Elastic Skin,1.9
#Your skin is incredibly elastic, able to stretch and deform to absurd lengths while keeping its texture and layered density. Only the skin though, everything underneath is still regular flesh and can still be cut.
1870. Elasticity,4.4
#One Piece - Your entire body is superhumanly elastic, able to stretch, twist, flatten, deform and contract. You can form your body into shapes, tools and constructs, and reflexively absorb blunt damage by stretching with the impact. Piercing and cutting attacks still hurt you normally and pain is very much still a thing.
1871. Elasticized Mind,3.9
#Your brain itself is elastic, able to stretch and expand its sensory and cognitive horizons, amplifying mental processes and thinking in directions the ordinary mind cannot reach. Overstretching burns you out hard, and repeated misuse can fry your mental faculties permanently.
1872. Elbow Witch Physiology,3.6
#Ojibwe Folklore - You take on the traits of an Elbow Witch, a man-eating hag-like monster with awls or knives lodged in your elbows. Your elbows are natural weapons capable of shredding flesh, and you gain the predatory hunger and physicality of the creature. You are not immune to your own blades and the folklore warns these creatures are easily tricked.
1873. Eldritch Connection,6.3
#You have a direct connection to eldritch sources, letting you borrow their power, manipulate eldritch energies, create or destroy abominations, and glean insights into the hidden patterns of reality. Prolonged exposure twists your mind and body, and many users become addicted, always reaching for more of the abyss.
1874. Eldritch Empowerment,5.0
#You are empowered by eldritch sources, becoming stronger, faster and more durable as your eldritch affinity grows. You may unlock further abilities tied to that affinity, enhance existing powers, and draw sustenance from yourself enough to slow or stop aging.
1875. Eldritch Parasite Physiology,5.6
#You are or can transform into an eldritch parasite, an astral or transcendent horror of Lovecraftian origin. You feed on hosts - sometimes their flesh, sometimes their thoughts, sometimes even conceptual sustenance. Without a host you may struggle to survive, and some subtypes require food neither the host nor its world can provide.
1876. Eldritch Power Link,5.1
#Your eldritch nature is directly linked to your other powers, fueling and strengthening them with Lovecraftian essence. Everything you cast runs hotter, stranger and more potent. If your eldritch nature becomes unstable, your abilities may spiral out of your control entirely.
1877. Eldritch Soul,6.6
#Your soul is that of an eldritch entity from beyond the known multiverse, granting you access to alien magics and causing subtle madness and dread in those who linger near you. Your body is still mortal however, and your soul remains vulnerable to those skilled in soul manipulation.
1878. Electric Capacitor,3.0
#Your body acts as a living capacitor, absorbing any electricity that touches you and storing it for later release. You can channel it back out whenever you want, making you a walking battery with a trigger.
1879. Electric Conductivity,3.3
#Your body safely conducts all forms of electricity, making you functionally immune to being shocked regardless of voltage. You can discharge current through conductive surfaces like metal or water, though you cannot actually generate electricity on your own.
1880. Electric Life,5.1
#Your life energy is electricity itself, the lightning in your body replacing your soul and the need for food. You cannot age and exist indefinitely as long as there is current to sustain you, although cutting you off from power sources entirely can be fatal.
1881. Electric Quintessence,5.7
#You generate your own electricity infinitely from within, never needing an external source to power your abilities. The infinite current can fuel your body, your techniques, or any technology you care to plug into, though handling too much at once can still overwhelm your physical form and force you into rest.
1882. Electrical Immunity,3.5
#You are completely immune to electricity, both direct and indirect. A downed power line feels like a tickle, lightning shrugs off your skin, and you can safely stick a fork in any outlet you like. Note that heat generated by electrical discharges can still hurt you.
1883. Electricity Embodiment,8.4
#You are the embodiment of electricity itself, holding supreme dominion over every bolt, spark, and current in existence. At absolute levels, you are the conceptual source of electricity across reality, storms answer to your moods and every dynamo hums your name.
1884. Electricity Empowerment,3.4
#When in contact with electricity you grow stronger, faster, and tougher, drawing power and even sustenance from any current around you. Storms, power lines, and fuse boxes all become personal gyms.
1885. Electricity Mimicry,5.3
#Your body is made of or can transform into pure electricity, becoming a coursing current of living lightning. Grounding, water, and rubber insulators are all serious hazards, and it takes practice to reliably reform into flesh.
1886. Electricity Resistance,2.8
#You are highly resistant to electricity, nearly invulnerable to both direct and indirect effects such as muscle seizing or cardiac arrest. Heat from powerful currents may still be an issue and there is an upper limit to how much you can shrug off.
1887. Electrolytic Blood,4.2
#Your blood is saturated with unstable ions and can transform from liquid into raw plasma energy when shed. A wound becomes a detonation and anything caught in the blast radius is obliterated. You can also absorb ambient electricity through your blood cells, using them as living batteries.
1888. Electromagnetic Capacitor,4.1
#Your body functions as a living electromagnetic battery, capable of absorbing ambient EM energy and storing it for later use. You can channel the stored reserves into any electromagnetic technique you possess, though storage capacity scales with your overall strength.
1889. Electromagnetic Energizing,4.0
#Your body absorbs ambient electromagnetic energy and converts it into bodily fuel, granting you superhuman physical performance as long as EM is present. In EM-rich environments you are a powerhouse, but a faraday cage will quickly starve you.
1890. Electromagnetic Quintessence,6.3
#Your body is an infinite wellspring of electromagnetic energy, generating its own EM without ever needing an external source. You can pour it into your physical and mental attributes, power any technology, or fuel any electromagnetic technique, though your body can only handle so much output at a time before requiring rest.
1891. Electromagnetic Wave Mimicry,5.6
#Your body is composed of or can transform into electromagnetic waves, letting you phase through solid matter, move at wave speeds, and reform elsewhere. In wave form you are vulnerable to anyone with electromagnetism manipulation, as they can reshape you directly.
1892. Electromagnetism Defiance,4.6
#You simply ignore electromagnetic forces and radiation. EMPs wash over you without effect, magnets do nothing, and even an EM manipulator's strongest attack slides off as if it were never there. Other forces still affect you normally, so a well-placed punch still gets the job done.
1893. Electromagnetism Empowerment,3.4
#You grow stronger, faster and more durable in the presence of electromagnetic fields and energy. Standing near power lines, electronics, or simply inside Earth's magnetic field keeps you empowered. With enough ambient EM you may even be able to feed off of it and slow your aging.
1894. Electromagnetism Immunity,4.3
#You are completely immune to electromagnetism, both direct and indirect effects. Electricity, magnetism, EM radiation and attacks from EM manipulators all wash off of you harmlessly. Extremely strong attacks from beings far above your level may still partially affect you.
1895. Electromagnetism Mimicry,5.4
#Your body is made of pure electromagnetic force, or can transform into it at will. In your EM form you are extremely difficult to harm by physical means, can flow through wires and circuits, and can fortify your physical body by channelling EM through your bones and muscles.
1896. Electroreception,2.4
#You can sense the electric fields of living beings and objects around you, locating them even in total darkness, murky water, or through solid obstacles. Like a shark or a platypus, you can pinpoint buried prey, hidden enemies, and active electronics without ever needing to see them.
1898. Elemental Card Empowerment,3.2
#You grow stronger, faster and more durable while near elemental cards, and you may unlock new abilities depending on which cards are close. Some users can even feed on the cards themselves, drawing sustenance or slowing their aging.
1899. Elemental Connection,4.3
#You share a profound bond with the fundamental forces of nature, feeling the flow of water, the warmth of fire and the weight of the earth as extensions of your own senses. You can sense fluctuations in any element you are connected to and commune with them emotionally, opening the door to deeper elemental mastery.
1900. Elemental Enhanced Durability,3.3
#Your body is reinforced by elemental force, granting you considerably higher durability than a normal person. The effect may be temporary or tied to the element being near you, and durability negation users will cut through it with ease.
1901. Elemental Embodiment,6.6
#You are the living embodiment of an element, whether one of the classical four, something from the periodic table, or something more esoteric. You physically resemble it, your personality is shaped by it, and your control over it surpasses any ordinary elemental manipulator.
1902. Elemental Empowerment,3.8
#Upon coming into contact with your affiliated element, you become stronger, faster, tougher and may unlock abilities tied to its nature. Extended exposure can even slow your aging, but you will grow dependent on it and become vulnerable to its opposite.
1903. Elemental Energy Embodiment,7.3
#You are the physical personification of elemental energy itself, granting you limitless control over and complete immunity to it. You may be vulnerable to users of Elemental Manipulation or Energy Manipulation who can manhandle the very stuff you are made of.
1904. Elemental Energy Empowerment,3.9
#Coming into contact with elemental energy makes you stronger, faster and tougher, while unlocking related abilities and slowing your aging. The more elemental energy in the environment, the more of a monster you become.
1905. Elemental Energy Mimicry,5.8
#Your body is, or can transform into, pure elemental energy. The transformed form can be anatomically identical to your normal body or a fully homogeneous mass where every part is interchangeable. Vulnerable to Energy Absorption users who can drink you dry.
1906. Elemental Energy Symbiosis,5.6
#You host an elemental energy being or force inside your body, granting you powerful abilities tied to its nature. The bond comes with a price, the entity may try to possess you, the energy may injure you, and you may unleash deadly effects you never intended.
1907. Elemental Enhanced Condition,4.0
#Your baseline physiology is enhanced by elements, each element boosting different aspects of your body. Stone lends strength and defence, wind lends speed and agility, fire lends ferocity. Requires training to utilise every element at once in combat.
1908. Elemental Enhanced Senses,3.4
#Your senses are sharpened by the elements, letting you see through flame, hear distant winds, feel tremors through stone, or taste the minerals in water. Sensory overload is a real risk and magic may distort the readings.
1909. Elemental Enhanced Speed,3.5
#Elemental forces accelerate your movement, either by active propulsion or by passively boosting you when in contact with your element. Away from your element you return to baseline speed, and Speed Cancellation will shut you down.
1910. Elemental Enhanced Strength,3.4
#Your physical strength is amplified by elemental power, letting you push past the normal maximum of a body your size. The effects may only last as long as you can sustain the elemental infusion.
1911. Elemental Fangs,3.0
#Your teeth are made of or infused with elemental force, letting every bite inflict elemental damage, burning, freezing, shocking, or petrifying whatever you sink them into. Best in melee and best if you aren't squeamish about biting people.
1912. Elemental Metabolization,3.5
#You sustain yourself and your powers by consuming elements directly. Eat fire to fuel your pyrokinesis, drink lightning to stay awake, munch on rocks for earthen reserves. You may need to discharge excess periodically or risk overdosing on your own fuel.
1913. Elemental Object Empowerment,3.5
#When near objects of your affiliated element, your physical abilities are enhanced and you may even draw sustenance from them. The closer and more concentrated the elemental objects, the stronger the boost.
1914. Elemental Physiology,5.2
#Your body is that of an elemental, a creature born from or bonded to a primal force such as fire, water, wind, earth, lightning or even stranger elements like time and space. You possess an innate mastery over your element and physiology suited to wield it.
1915. Elemental Resistance,3.3
#Your body is highly resistant to elemental forces, allowing you to survive direct blasts, traverse hostile elemental environments and endure what would melt, freeze or crush a normal person. May be limited to a single element.
1916. Elemental Soul,5.4
#Your soul is composed of one or more natural elements, letting you channel that element through your body or project your elemental spirit outward to act independently. You can reshape your elemental form as desired, but while your soul is projected your body lies limp, and your internal reserves are not infinite.
1917. Elemental Symbiosis,5.6
#You host one or more elemental beings inside your body, gaining powerful elemental abilities drawn from their nature. The bond grants you immense control over your symbiote's element, but the entity may fight for control of your mind, and raw elemental force can slowly corrode the body hosting it.
1918. Elephant Physiology,3.5
#You are or can transform into an elephant, ranging from modern African and Asian elephants to mammoths and mastodons. As an elephant you possess tremendous physical strength, durability and memory, though your jumping ability is essentially nonexistent.
1919. Elf Physiology,4.6
#You are an elf, a slender ageless humanoid with a lifespan measured in centuries or millennia. You possess graceful beauty, enhanced senses, natural magical inclination and a deep affinity for nature. Your body ages so slowly that watching mountains erode is more eventful.
1920. Elioud Physiology,5.2
#You are an Elioud, the grandchild of Heaven and Earth born from a Nephilim and a mortal human. You possess angelic traits that place you on par with lesser angels and demons, granting enhanced physical abilities, a holy presence and minor divine authority. Countered by demonic powers.
1921. Elohim Physiology,7.8
#You are an Elohim, a biblical heavenly being created before the physical universe itself. You dwell in the divine realm as a lesser god subservient to the One True Creator, wielding holy authority as a divine messenger, destroyer, or protector. Your spiritual presence alone can shake the faith of mortals.
1922. Embedded Existence,8.6
#Your existence is completely embedded into reality itself, making you immune to erasure and existential manipulation. No matter how many times a reality warper tries to unmake you, you remain stubbornly present. Logic manipulation and similarly abstract powers can still affect you though.
1923. Emblem Empowerment,3.5
#You are empowered by emblems, growing stronger, faster, and more durable in their presence. You can unlock new abilities related to the emblem's affinity and even draw sustenance from them. Without emblems nearby, you are functionally a normal human.
1924. Embodiment Empowerment,5.3
#You are empowered by embodiments, growing stronger and faster in the presence of personified forces. You may unlock new abilities tied to whichever embodiment you draw from, and can even slow your aging by feeding on their essence. Without embodiments nearby, you are considerably weaker.
1925. Embodiment Power Link,5.0
#Your embodied nature is linked directly to your powers, using the personification to fuel and control them. This connection lets you push your abilities to greater heights, though if your embodied nature becomes unstable, your powers may spiral out of control with it.
1926. Emere Physiology,5.1
#African Folklore - You are an Emere, a spirit disguised as a beautiful child who can freely travel between the physical and spiritual worlds. Considered more powerful than witches, you possess natural seductive charm and supernatural authority. Emere traditionally die on days of their greatest joy, so your happiest moments may be your most dangerous.
1927. Emotion Embodiment,6.6
#You are the living physical manifestation of an emotion, be it love, hatred, joy, despair or anything in between. You possess absolute influence over your represented emotion, but your existence is polarized and lack of exposure to that emotion will cause you to deteriorate.
1928. Emotion Empowerment,4.2
#You become stronger, faster and more durable the more you feel a specific emotion, either from yourself or others around you. The stronger the emotion burns, the more your physical capabilities and existing powers are amplified, though opposing emotions will weaken you.
1929. Emotion-Connective Immortality,6.2
#Your existence is tethered to the emotions others feel about you, be it love, hatred, sorrow or awe. As long as someone out there feels strongly about you, you cannot die, but if you are ever permanently forgotten you will cease to exist entirely.
1930. Emotional Activity,3.1
#You can perform any action perfectly regardless of what emotions you are feeling at the moment. Overwhelming rage, crippling grief or delirious joy will never affect your accuracy, reflexes or judgement.
1931. Emotional Affinity,4.3
#Your physiology is attuned to a specific emotion, growing stronger and transforming the more you feel it. A rage-attuned body becomes monstrous and intimidating, a lust-attuned body becomes mesmerizingly beautiful, but you lose all power when the attuned emotion fades.
1932. Emotional Energy Mimicry,5.6
#Your body is made of or can transform entirely into emotional energy. In this form you may retain your anatomy or become a homogeneous mass of pure feeling, empowering your cells with whichever emotion flows through you at the time.
1933. Emotional Power Link,3.2
#Your emotional state is directly tied to your powers, fueling them and amplifying them based on what you feel. The stronger the feeling, the stronger the output, but unstable emotions mean unstable power and you'll need meditation or tranquil discipline to keep yourself from going off like a bomb.
1934. Emotional Reliance,2.9
#Your powers are fueled entirely by a specific emotional state, whether fear, anger, or love, and grow stronger the deeper you feel it. Sometimes you can even siphon power from the emotions of others nearby, but if your mood is undermined or soothed you become alarmingly easy to neutralize.
1935. Emotional Source,7.4
#You are the source of emotion itself; as long as you exist, feelings exist, and you have an empathic link to every being capable of feeling anything. Should you ever die, all emotion dies with you and every living thing becomes permanently apathetic. May be limited to being the source of a single specific emotion.
1936. Empathic Objects,4.2
#You have a deep bond with an item of personal value that grants you powers tied to your personality and its nature. A watch that controls time, a ring that burns with love, a locket that houses a spirit. The object may shift form to match your needs, but only awakens when your emotions run strong.
1937. Empathic Power Augmentation,4.6
#Your powers scale with the intensity of your emotions, anger, joy, grief, fear, all of them crank your abilities to their absolute peak. The stronger you feel, the stronger you become, but losing control of the emotion means losing control of the power.
1938. Empathic Power Resistance,3.2
#You passively resist powers that manipulate emotion and empathy, shrugging off inducements and empathic hijacks. Strong enough empathic users may still partially affect you, but their effects are dulled considerably.
1939. Empathic Shield,3.9
#You are completely immune to empathic powers, emotion manipulation, inducement, and all empathy-based influences simply bounce off. Your emotions remain your own. Does not protect against telepathy or non-emotion-based mental attacks.
1940. Empousa Physiology,4.7
#Greek Mythology - You are or can transform into an Empousa, a shapeshifting servant of Hecate said to seduce and feed upon young men. You possess supernatural beauty, shapeshifting, and the hunger of a phantom-vampire hybrid that drains vitality from those you lure in.
1941. Empowering Affinity,4.8
#You draw power from a specific phenomenon, object, emotion or concept, becoming stronger, faster, and tougher in its presence, and sometimes unlocking new abilities tied to it. A water-affinity user near the ocean could develop hydrokinesis, for instance. You weaken without contact and may be vulnerable to opposing affinities.
1942. Empty Heart,4.9
#Your heart is partially or completely devoid of good and evil, lacking all emotional and moral alignment. You feel no love, no hate, no conviction, and act purely from logic, instinct, duty, or external command. Strong forces of either light or darkness may still shift you, for better or worse.
1943. Encantado Physiology,5.4
#South American Mythology - You are or can transform into an Encantado, a Brazilian spirit of the pink boto form with supernatural beauty and musical talent. You can shapeshift between dolphin and human, control storms, enchant mortals into your service, and inflict illness or madness. A respiratory hole on your crown marks your true nature, usually hidden beneath a hat.
1944. Enchanted Allure,4.5
#You possess a supernatural attraction that grants immense powers of persuasion and seduction. Those under your spell become utterly willing to carry out whatever you ask of them, even walking to their deaths. Some targets may be affected by sexual preference, and strong psychic shields resist the pull.
1945. Encyclopedic Knowledge,6.5
#You possess a complete and innate understanding of all fields of knowledge, science, magic, history, technology, mysticism and beyond. Any information, natural or supernatural, is simply there for you to access without study. However, knowledge is not skill, and your mind can be cluttered or overwhelmed by the sheer volume of information.
1946. Endless Development,7.3
#Your potential is limitless, you can endlessly grow stronger, faster, tougher, smarter, sharper, with no ceiling to hold you back. Through training, learning, or simply willing it, you improve without end. Given enough time you will eclipse every living being in your reality, though Development Reset remains a threat.
1947. Endomodular Deviant Anatomy,4.2
#Your body has been reforged with a bio-metallic crystalline skeleton and integrated cybernetic implants, making you leagues more durable and granting natural compatibility with any technology you plug yourself into. The internal overhaul places strain on the rest of your organs, so you will need the rest of your body reinforced to fully take advantage.
1948. Absolute Endurance,9.1
#Your endurance is absolute, meaning stress simply does not exist for you. You do not need food, water, sleep, or air, and no amount of punishment can wear you down. You fight at peak for an eternity regardless of environment, injury or circumstance. Only reality manipulation and concept-level powers could ever force you to flag.
1949. Supernatural Endurance,4.6
#Your endurance is pushed far beyond natural limits, allowing you to go weeks without food or rest, shrug off wounds that would cripple normal people, and keep fighting through illness, poison or exhaustion. You can still be worn down by sufficiently overwhelming stress, but it takes a lot.
1950. Peak Endurance,2.7
#You are at the peak of what a member of your species can endure, tolerating pain, hunger, thirst and exhaustion far beyond even elite athletes. You can fight non-stop for an entire day without food or water and shrug off injuries that would drop most people. Your body still pays the price afterward.
1951. Energized Body,3.8
#Your body absorbs every form of energy that touches it and converts it into raw biological fuel, enhancing your physical capabilities based on the type and quantity you consume. Without a steady diet of energy to feed on, however, you may struggle to keep yourself stable.
1952. Energy Connection,3.0
#You possess a deep empathic bond with various non-physical forces and energies, allowing you to intuitively understand them and even communicate with them. More of a spiritual bridge than a manipulation power, but invaluable for any would-be energy master.
1953. Energy Defiance,4.8
#You can ignore most forms of energy affecting you, from heat and electricity to radiation and gamma rays, and even some mystical energies. Not quite full immunity, but enough that conventional energy weapons become little more than a nuisance to you.
1954. Energy Derivation,9.5
#You are the primordial source of all energy in existence, the binding force from which every power, spell and energetic phenomenon in reality flows. All energy exists because you exist, and your dominion over it is total and absolute. Should you ever perish, every form of energy in the multiverse would cease alongside you.
1955. Energy Embodiment,8.6
#You are the physical manifestation of all forms of energy in your reality, granting you limitless control over energy and every energy-based power in existence. You are no longer a being who uses energy but the very concept of energy made flesh, and your mastery of it knows no peer short of divine tiers.
1956. Energy Empowerment,3.6
#Your body becomes stronger, faster and more durable when in contact with energy, with prolonged exposure potentially unlocking new abilities or even slowing your aging. The more potent the energy around you, the more you thrive within it.
1957. Energy Entity Physiology,5.7
#You are or can transform into a pure energetic entity with innate ergokinetic powers and a physiology bound to your energy nature. Unlike a being simply made of energy, you are a creature defined by your wielding of it, granting you forms and abilities unique to your energetic nature.
1958. Energy Immunity,5.8
#You are completely immune to all forms of energy and suffer no direct or indirect effects from them. Heat, electricity, radiation, lasers and mystical energies all wash over you without a trace, though this may also prevent you from being healed by energy-based abilities.
1959. Energy Independence,5.6
#Your body has no need for energy in any form. You do not eat, drink, sleep, or tire, and your cells function without ATP or mitochondria. Any powers you possess can be used continuously without recharge, making you a tireless engine of whatever abilities you wield.
1960. Energy Matter Empowerment,4.6
#You grow stronger, faster and more durable in the presence of energy matter, drawing sustenance from it and potentially slowing your aging. Without a source of energy matter to feed on, you weaken significantly, and there is a ceiling to how much strength you can gain.
1961. Energy Matter Physiology,5.7
#Your body is made of, or can transform into, energy matter. Depending on your mastery, you can exist as a nigh-physical being reinforced by energetic substance, or as a homogeneous form that removes vital points entirely. Anti-matter and anti-energy manipulation are your natural opposites.
1962. Energy Matter Symbiosis,5.8
#You host an energy matter-based entity or force within your body, gaining access to its ergo-materiokinetic power. The bond grants immense ability but the entity may attempt to take over your mind, and its force can be lethal to the host if left unchecked.
1963. Energy Metabolization,4.5
#You can feed on raw energy as sustenance, using it to fuel your powers and your body. Taking in too much risks an overdose and you may have to periodically discharge excess, which can accidentally drain nearby machines or living beings.
1964. Energy Mimicry,5.6
#Your body is made of, or can transform into, pure energy. You can become a nigh-physical being with energy flowing through your cells or shift into a fully homogeneous form with no vital points. Takes time to master, and energy drain effects are potentially fatal against you.
1965. Energy Power Link,4.7
#Your powers are linked to and fueled by energy itself, which empowers and stabilizes every ability you possess. If the energetic source grows unstable, your powers may go out of control, and anti-energy effects can shut you down completely.
1966. Energy Resistance,3.6
#Your body is highly resistant to concussive, electrical and heat-based attacks on a superhuman level. Lasers glance off, electricity barely tingles, and explosions lose most of their bite, though you are not fully immune.
1967. Energy Signature Empowerment,4.1
#You grow stronger, faster and tougher the more energy signatures saturate your environment, and may even unlock new abilities keyed to whatever energy you are steeped in. In a dead void with nothing to feed on, you wither.
1968. Energy Soul,4.2
#Your soul is made of pure energy, which you can project out of your body to act independently, take various shapes, or unleash as concussive blasts. While your soul is out wandering your physical body is limp and defenseless, and your reserves need to recharge.
1969. Energy Sourcing,3.8
#You draw your power from an external energy source rather than generating it yourself, such as converting sunlight, kinetic energy or ambient heat into fuel. The power can either be based on proximity or stored in your cells for later use.
1970. Energy Symbiosis,4.8
#You host an energy-based entity inside your body and gain powers from the bond, ranging from simple energy attacks to full matter manipulation depending on the nature of your passenger. As with most symbiotes the entity may try to take over your mind or body, and its power may damage you if you push too hard.
1971. Energy Vampire Physiology,5.0
#You are a vampire that feeds on energy rather than blood, using absorbed energies to fuel your strength, speed, senses and lifespan. You can even acquire new energy-based abilities from the things you drain, though you must feed constantly or starve, and energy drain works on you just as well as it does for you.
1972. Engine Mimicry,3.0
#You are or can transform into a living engine, converting energy into raw mechanical output to power whatever machines you're attached to. You need a fuel source to keep running and are prone to overheating under sustained load.
1973. Enhanced Action,3.6
#Your action speed is drastically heightened, letting you act first in nearly any situation and perform tasks with better results than others. Without complementary reflex or body enhancements, your own body may struggle to keep up with your intent.
1974. Absolute Adroitness,8.6
#You have absolute control over your prehensile body parts, able to manipulate matter down to the quantum super-string level and even the quantum foam. Your fingers can pluck at the threads of reality like they were guitar strings.
1975. Supernatural Adroitness,5.5
#Your control over your hands and other prehensile body parts is supernatural, allowing manipulation down to the atomic and even subatomic level. You may need enhanced eyesight to actually see what your fingers are doing.
1976. Enhanced Adroitness,3.2
#You possess precise control over your hands and other prehensile body parts, handling any object with grace, ease, speed and skill, possibly down to the cellular or molecular level. Objects can still slip from your grip if you're careless.
1977. Enhanced Ammunition,3.3
#Your ammunition and firepower is stronger than that of others, whether it comes from weapons, powers or thrown attacks. Using too much at once can exhaust you, and unless you have Infinite Supply you can still run dry.
1978. Enhanced Bodily Capacity,4.6
#You can use more than 100% of all your bodily systems and functions, making you superior to even the peak of your species. Without accompanying durability this overuse will damage or break your body, and it burns fuel fast enough to risk starvation.
1979. Enhanced Body Part Velocity,3.1
#You can move any part of your body at speeds far beyond the normal, throwing punches and gestures that blur the air. Without strong muscular bonds or counter inertia your limbs may actually rip off at the extremes.
1980. Enhanced Body Structure,4.3
#Your body is composed of elements and materials stronger, harder and more effective than ordinary flesh and bone, something like super-bone with the ratio of high-grade steel and a fluid that outperforms blood. Your mind and brain may benefit as well.
1981. Enhanced Body Temperature,2.2
#Your internal body temperature runs above the normal and peak of your species, making you a living furnace. You're a great cuddle partner in winter and a miserable one in summer.
1982. Enhanced Brain Capacity,4.7
#You can access more than 100% of your mental capacity, gaining expanded knowledge, faster thought, and the ability to push your physical and mental abilities far beyond their normal ceiling. Sustained use may only last for short bursts before your brain demands rest.
1983. Enhanced Caution,3.1
#You can be cautious and hasty at the same time, moving and handling things carefully at any speed without dropping, stumbling or colliding. Probability manipulators can still overdrive your careful instincts into failure.
1984. Enhanced Chi,3.9
#Your chi is enhanced far beyond that of others, letting you amplify your physical capabilities, heal, channel it into attacks or unlock further chi-based powers. Your chi may even possess special properties nobody else's does, though building it up takes time.
1985. Enhanced Concentration Capacity,4.0
#Your concentration can be pushed far beyond the normal maximum, letting you tune out all distraction and power through obstacles that break lesser focus. You may become too fixated on one thing at a time, and the focus drains stamina the longer you hold it.
1986. Absolute Cuteness,8.0
#You possess a level of cuteness that exceeds all others, possibly being the single cutest thing in existence. This can manifest as sincere, innocent adorability you aren't even aware of, or as a hypnotic weaponized cuteness used to manipulate anyone who lays eyes on you.
1987. Supernatural Cuteness,5.2
#Your cuteness exceeds natural limits, radiating an almost physical pull of adorability that can be weaponized at will. People lose their words, their willpower, and occasionally their lunch money around you.
1988. Enhanced Cuteness,2.6
#Your cuteness exceeds normal parameters and can even be weaponized to some degree. You may have to act the part as well, and cute is highly subjective so the effect varies from person to person.
1989. Enhanced Emotions,3.2
#Your emotions run deeper and sharper than anyone else's, letting you feel things in ways others cannot and powering any emotional abilities you may have to greater heights. You may also be overemotional at the worst possible moments.
1990. Supernatural Energy,4.3
#Your internal energy levels are unnaturally high, making you far more energetic, active and lively than any member of your species has any right to be. You may have trouble sleeping or sitting still, and excess energy may constantly leak from your body.
1991. Enhanced Energy,2.8
#Your internal energy runs extraordinarily high, giving you superior stamina, vitality and fast recovery from strenuous activity. Sitting still may be harder than running a marathon for you.
1992. Enhanced Initiative,3.1
#Your mental reflexes are drastically enhanced, allowing you to process and react to events faster than they unfold. Does not grant any physical speed however, so you may find yourself aware of the incoming punch but still unable to move out of the way in time.
1993. Enhanced Instincts,3.8
#Your instincts across the board are sharpened far beyond the norm, whether they be predatory, combat, parental, social or even sexual. You can abandon logic entirely and trust your gut to make illogical but correct decisions at the drop of a hat. Be careful, as your instincts may take over entirely if you rely on them too much.
1994. Enhanced Intuition,3.0
#Your intuition is far beyond that of a normal person, granting you access to unconscious pattern recognition, insight and deductive capabilities that border on the uncanny. Useful for solving puzzles, reading people or sniffing out lies.
1995. Absolute Life-Force,9.3
#Your life force is infinite, boundless and absolute. Your vitality transcends mortal, divine and cosmic concepts, granting you eternal life, limitless regeneration and endurance that surpasses logic itself. Your body, mind and spirit are elevated by the sheer weight of the life energy burning within you, letting you accomplish the impossible with nothing but raw existence.
1996. Supernatural Life-Force,5.7
#Your reserves of life energy are immense, acting as a supernatural power source that bolsters your longevity, stamina, healing and vitality. You can survive circumstances that would kill lesser beings many times over, though the sheer volume may be difficult to control and is still ultimately finite.
1997. Enhanced Life-Force,3.3
#You have enhanced life energy flowing through you, granting you better stamina, a stronger constitution, faster healing and the ability to channel it for attacks or augmenting your physical capabilities. Useful as both a power source and a passive boost.
1998. Enhanced Lower Leg Strength,2.1
#Your legs are far stronger than peak human, capable of pushing vans and kicking boulders aside. Your upper body however remains normal, so you'll look very silly arm wrestling someone while casually crushing a car with your calves.
1999. Enhanced Memory,2.8
#Your memory is vastly superior to the average person, allowing you to recall books, conversations, faces, lyrics and events in detail with minimal effort. You can study faster, remember longer and retain more, though attempting to memorize beyond your brain's capacity may give you headaches or worse.
2000. Enhanced Mental Stamina,2.9
#Your mind can push itself much further and longer than normal before tiring. You can focus for hours without losing sharpness and is especially valuable if you possess any psionic or mind-based abilities.
2001. Enhanced Mobility,3.2
#You move with grace, control and precision far beyond peak human. Whether running, climbing, swimming, jumping or flying, you rarely lose your footing, balance or momentum. Physical forces like inertia and friction still apply however, so being pinned or stuck remains a very real problem.
2002. Enhanced Momentum,3.0
#Your momentum is supernaturally enhanced, making you hit harder when you charge and far more difficult to stop or knock over once you get going. Still tires like normal and can be brought to a halt with enough force.
2003. Enhanced Motor Skills,3.1
#Your coordination and precision is flawless. You can pull off absurd feats of tricking, gymnastics, sleight of hand or fine craftsmanship without breaking a sweat. Picture dancing on top of a spinning vehicle mid-flip while performing yo-yo tricks - that's your baseline.
2004. Enhanced Muscle Usage,3.4
#You can push your muscles past the normal 60-65% cap that most humans are limited to, exerting well beyond 100% of what your body should be capable of. Without matching durability however, you risk tearing your own muscles or breaking your bones from the sheer force you put out.
2005. Enhanced Physics,4.2
#The laws of physics bend in your favor. Where altered physics may help or hinder, your modified physical laws actively support you, letting you perform feats that would be impossible under normal rules. Gravity, friction and inertia all seem to know which side they're on.
2006. Enhanced Power Use,4.3
#You simply use your powers better than anyone else could. More output, fewer limitations and greater efficiency across the board. Apply this to any of your other abilities to squeeze significantly more out of them.
2007. Enhanced Proprioception,2.4
#Your sense of body position is heightened, letting you know exactly where every part of your body is at all times without needing to look. Essential for any kind of acrobatics, fighting or delicate movement, though it does nothing against sense removal.
2008. Enhanced Reorientation,2.6
#You can change your body's facing and orientation in an instant, mid-rotation, mid-fall or mid-flip. Like a cat always landing on its feet, you can always twist yourself into the exact direction you need to be facing.
2009. Enhanced Repositioning,2.5
#You can shift your body into any pose or position quickly and effortlessly, getting into a stance, dodge or pose far faster than others. Useful in combat, gymnastics and anywhere precise positioning matters.
2010. Enhanced Revolution,2.3
#You can perform external rotations and orbital loops effortlessly, making full revolutions with perfect control, balance and precision at any speed or radius. Great for aerial maneuvers and acrobatics, though inertia and friction still apply.
2011. Enhanced Rotation,2.3
#You can cartwheel, somersault, flip and twist with perfect control, balance and precision at any speed. Tumbling and spin-based techniques come naturally to you, though you are still subject to the normal pushes and pulls of the physical world.
2012. Enhanced Self-Awareness,3.2
#Your awareness of yourself - your feelings, motives, biology and instincts - is greatly enhanced. You instantly recognize when something tries to alter your mind, body or behavior against your will, making you harder to subtly control or manipulate without noticing.
2013. Enhanced Soul,3.6
#Your soul is stronger and denser than an ordinary one, granting you minor powers and enhancements, the ability to heal or attack with your spiritual essence and potentially even unique properties other souls lack. Still vulnerable to beings who can manipulate souls directly.
2014. Enhanced Stability,2.1
#You can stay upright and balanced in positions that should send you toppling. Boneless legs, too many joints, being suspended upside down on one toe - none of it disturbs your posture.
2015. Enhanced Synesthesia,3.2
#Your senses are cross-wired in useful ways, letting you smell colors, see sounds, taste emotions and so on. With practice you can read the emotional states of others as vividly as reading a book.
2016. Absolute Ugliness,8.6
#Your ugliness is infinite and absolute. Any being that attempts to perceive your true form is struck with overwhelming fear, hatred, disgust, and insanity. Even suppressed to mortal viewing levels, you are still the single most undesirable being in existence. No face, no glamour, no illusion can hide it.
2017. Supernatural Ugliness,5.2
#You are so hideous that no normal being can look at you without adverse effects, ranging from nausea to fainting to going pale as a sheet. Beings with Apathy or Fear Immunity are unaffected.
2018. Enhanced Ugliness,2.0
#Your face is hideous enough to make even hardened fighters flinch away, giving you social leverage through sheer revulsion. Doesn't turn itself off though, so expect stares and a lot of self-esteem issues.
2019. Enhanced Upper Arm Strength,2.8
#Your arms are strong enough to lift vans and hurl boulders, well beyond peak human. Your legs however are just ordinary, so be careful not to lift something your lower body cannot support.
2020. Enhanced Visibility,2.7
#People notice you more, find you more attractive, more likable, more magnetic. You draw followers easily, but stealth is basically impossible and you will attract attention from the wrong crowd too.
2021. Enhanced Willpower,2.4
#Your will is stronger than normal, enough to push through pain and despair that would break lesser minds. Not on the level of Indomitable Will, and it can still be shattered by Will Breaking or sufficiently horrific events, but you can achieve remarkable things on grit alone.
2022. Enhancing Inertia,4.1
#Your inertia works backwards - the heavier you are, the faster you accelerate. Piling on mass makes you move quicker rather than slower, though your raw force output remains normal. Controlling your acceleration can become a problem very quickly.
2023. Enlightenment,7.6
#You have achieved true enlightenment, allowing full comprehension of any situation you encounter. You understand the mind of God or Universal Consciousness and perceive all things as part of a single unity. This is not Omniscience, but everything you look upon, you understand. Requires a pure mind, though pure does not mean good.
2024. Enormous Interior,3.6
#Your insides are impossibly larger than your outside, big enough to potentially contain a city within your stomach. Storing things, hiding people, swallowing whole armies - all on the table. Getting around inside yourself may take a while though.
2025. Enraenra Physiology,4.0
#You are or can transform into an Enraenra, a yokai composed of smoke and darkness shaped like a human. Only those pure of heart can see you clearly. Wind can disperse you, and you may lack a truly solid form.
2026. Entertainment Empowerment,4.3
#You grow stronger, faster and more durable by consuming entertainment - films, comics, games, music, books. Heavy consumption can unlock new abilities and even slow your aging, though you will still need food and rest in the real world.
2027. Entity Empowerment,4.0
#Your body draws strength from the presence of entities around you, becoming faster, stronger, and more durable the more beings are near. You may even slow your aging while feeding on entity essence. If there is nothing around to draw from, you are left at baseline.
2028. Entropic Quintessence,5.8
#Your body generates limitless entropic force on its own, with no need to draw from ambient temperature or environment. This infinite fuel can enhance you to superhuman levels, power machines, or be unleashed as raw entropy. However, your body can only channel so much at a time before you need food and rest.
2029. Entropy Defiance,5.0
#You can ignore entropy and the physical laws associated with it. Your body, and the things you touch, do not dissipate, decay or degrade the way they normally would. You may not be able to ignore it completely against overwhelming entropy forces or for indefinite periods.
2030. Entropy Embodiment,7.8
#You are entropy incarnate, the physical manifestation of universal disorder itself. You have limitless control over entropy and are entirely immune to its effects. Decay does not touch you, but it answers to you, and wherever you walk the second law of thermodynamics bows to your will.
2031. Entropy Empowerment,3.8
#You grow stronger, faster and more durable when in contact with entropy or entropic power. Being near decay, disorder or thermodynamic chaos fuels you, and at high enough levels you may even draw sustenance from entropy itself and slow your own aging.
2032. Entropy Immunity,5.3
#You are immune to all things entropy. You do not lose energy to heat, you cannot be affected by entropy manipulation, and you cannot be destroyed by entropic decay. You can still be hurt by non-entropic forces, and overwhelming entropy beyond a certain threshold may still get through.
2033. Entropy Mimicry,6.3
#Your body is made of or can transform into pure entropy. In this form you retain your shape but are composed of disordered energy, with your cells, bones and muscles reinforced by entropic force. Stabilization or entropy immunity can be highly effective against you, and you are still bound by the laws of thermodynamics.
2034. Entropy Symbiosis,5.7
#You are bonded symbiotically with an entropic being or force, be it an embodiment of entropy, a disorder spirit, or a construct of unused universal energy. Through the bond you gain potent entropic abilities, but the entity may try to take over your mind or body, and the raw force may slowly damage you.
2035. Environment Mimicry,6.4
#You are a living environment, an entire ecosystem in the shape of a person. You can control all the plant life, inorganic objects, and animals that are part of you, and can call down weather and natural disasters upon yourself as an extension of your being. You may be unable to create new life or matter from nothing.
2036. Environment Warping Presence,5.9
#The regions you settle in slowly warp to reflect you, your beliefs, your aesthetic, your nature, even your biology. Terrain, weather, and inhabitants bend to mirror your inner self, and interlopers may find themselves changing just by staying too long. Removing you from the area causes the changes to gradually revert.
2037. Environmental Adaptation,3.3
#Your body automatically adapts to whatever environment you find yourself in. Extreme temperatures, low oxygen, high pressure, unusual sustenance, hostile atmospheres, none of these cause you real discomfort. You may be weaker in opposing environments to the one you are currently adapted to.
2038. Environmental Defiance,5.4
#You simply ignore the environment you are in, as if it were beneath your notice. You can stroll through lava without burning, stand in a blizzard without freezing, walk underwater without drowning. Lethal metaphysical environments may still catch your attention though.
2039. Environmental Empowerment,3.5
#You grow stronger, faster and tougher in tune with whichever environment you are in, drawing sustenance from the terrain itself. At higher levels you may even slow or halt your own ageing as long as you remain in a suitable habitat.
2040. Environmental Perfection,7.8
#You are the flawless pinnacle of the environment itself, the ideal natural being in every conceivable way. All powers tied to nature, terrain and environmental forces are available to you at their absolute peak, and if bonded to a specific environment you become perfect within it in every other way as well.
2041. Environmental Symbiosis,5.3
#You share a symbiotic bond with a specific environment or territorial entity, gaining powers drawn from its nature. Both you and the environment support one another, but if the environment is sentient it may try to take the wheel and you may find yourself along for the ride.
2042. Environmental Transformation,3.6
#Whenever you enter a new environment your body transforms in some way related to that environment, either adapting to it or mimicking parts of it. The transformations are random though and are not guaranteed to actually help you survive what you are stepping into.
2043. Envy Derivation,8.9
#You are the absolute primordial source of all envy across the cosmos, the binding force behind every jealous thought in existence. You wield total dominion over covetousness, resentment and the green-eyed monster on a universal scale, and if you ever die, envy itself dies with you and everyone becomes incapable of wanting what they cannot have.
2044. Envy Embodiment,6.0
#You are the very incarnation of envy, drawing power from the jealousy of yourself and others. As long as your envy is unfulfilled your lifespan stretches onward, and you can weaponize that hunger to take whatever you covet from whoever you wish.
2045. Envy Empowerment,3.0
#You grow stronger, faster and tougher whenever you or those around you are consumed by jealousy. The deeper and pettier the envy, the greater the boost, and you may even slow your ageing so long as there is something you still covet.
2046. Epoch Embodiment,5.8
#You are the living embodiment of a specific time period, and your powers follow the themes of that epoch, whether literal, metaphorical, romanticized, or even fictional. Time Travelers altering your era can shift or outright erase your abilities.
2047. Equid Physiology,3.3
#You are or can transform into an equid, gaining the full form of a horse, donkey or zebra either partially or completely. Grants enhanced speed, stamina and a powerful kick, but you'll need to relearn how to open doors.
2048. Equipment Mimicry,3.4
#You can take on the form of any piece of equipment, from a scalpel to a jackhammer to a chef's knife. Useful for infiltration and ambushes, but each form comes with the weaknesses of whatever tool you decided to become.
2049. Erasure Immunity,7.4
#You cannot be erased from existence, or if you somehow are, you will always come back. You continue existing even after all of existence has ended, though this does not make you immortal in the conventional sense and Absolute Erasure can still claim you.
2050. Erebopresence,7.6
#You simultaneously exist everywhere night and darkness exist, manifest or reside, from the deepest cave to the shadow beneath a child's bed. Absolute Light can banish your presence entirely, and you may be unable to manifest anywhere the sun fully reaches.
2051. Ereboscience,7.3
#You know everything about darkness, shadows and the night, every secret whispered under a new moon, every thing that hides in the dark and every rule that governs it. Your knowledge is bound to the dark though, and Absolute Light blinds you completely.
2052. Ergokinetic Agility,3.9
#You can channel energy through your body to dramatically amplify your agility, speed, reflexes and coordination. Dodging bullets, acrobatic feats and closing gaps in the blink of an eye become trivial, though Energy Controllers can shut your enhancement down.
2053. Ergokinetic Durability,3.3
#Your durability is augmented by an envelope of energy, letting you shrug off blows that would drop an ordinary human. Energy Controllers can strip the protection away, and anything that bypasses invulnerability will still put you down.
2054. Erinaceomorph Physiology,2.3
#You are or can transform into a hedgehog or gymnure, gaining a body covered in protective spines and a sharp little nose. Rolling into a spiked ball is now a valid defensive option, and bugs suddenly look very appetizing.
2055. Erinyes Physiology,6.8
#Greek Mythology - You are or can transform into one of the Erinyes, the chthonic Furies of vengeance. You possess divine-tier physical abilities, flight, and the power to inflict tormenting madness, disease or death upon oathbreakers, murderers and those who offend the natural order. You are bound by strict rules on who you may punish.
2056. Erogelic Physiology,5.8
#You are or can transform into an angel of love, desire and sex — a divine being connected to the sacred side of affection and intimacy. You possess supernatural beauty, feathered wings, a halo and angelic magic centered on love and desire. Demons, succubi and incubi are your natural enemies.
2057. Erosion Immunity,3.0
#Your body, bones and joints are immune to erosion of any kind. No matter how many years pass or how much strain they endure, your parts will never wear down, grind away or suffer age-based decay.
2058. Ersatz Body Part,2.2
#One of your body parts is made of something other than flesh — a robotic arm, a stone leg, a rubber hand, or a limb belonging to another creature entirely. Depending on what it is, it may be a powerful asset or an inconvenient burden you have to live with.
2059. Esociform Physiology,1.6
#You are or can transform into an esociform fish, such as a pike or a mudminnow. You gain the predatory jaws, streamlined body and ambush instincts of one of freshwater's most voracious hunters.
2060. Esoteric Physiology,6.0
#You are an "Esoteric Version" of your race, a rare specimen that is the healthiest, strongest, and most versatile of your kind, with a supercharged set of their qualities plus unique powers and traits unheard of among your peers. You may feel isolated from your own kind or be treated as a monster, and raw potential does not replace real experience.
2061. Esoteric Power,5.9
#You possess an internal wellspring of esoteric power, a dormant supernatural force that acts as the core of your otherworldly abilities. Its reach is bound only by your skill, imagination, and morality, and with time your power may develop its own laws that transcend any Supernatural Law binding others. Depending on its source, this inner power could be lovecraftian and dangerous even to you.
2062. Essence Embodiment,7.8
#You are the embodiment of essence itself, possessing the purest form of essence that cannot be changed or altered by any means. You can even possess any and all essences of various species simultaneously, making you a living library of fundamental nature.
2063. Essence Physiology,6.4
#Your body is composed entirely of essence, a homogeneous matter where no part is more important than any other. Your form can appear anatomically normal, with essence-energy flowing through your cells, bones and muscles fortifying them greatly, or you can become a pure essence-energy being. Your power is mostly focused through your body, making you a walking fortress of fundamental being.
2064. Essenceless Activity,4.6
#You can continue to move, fight and function even without your life force or spirit. Should your essence be removed, your soul detached, or while astral projecting, your body still acts normally, though you may have reduced speed and strength in this state.
2065. Eternal Bond,8.9
#You share a bond with someone or something so profound it transcends the very concept of connection. This bond is not limited by emotion, species, form, space, time or reality itself, and it can exist between anything - lovers, enemies, a wielder and weapon, an entity and a concept. Whatever your bond, it cannot be severed by any means below true omnipotence.
2066. Eternal Evolution,8.6
#You exist in a constant state of evolution, capable of evolving past any obstacle, limitation, restriction or opponent regardless of your current condition. Unlike adaptation, this is not dependent on external factors - you simply grow endlessly and infinitely. The downside is that your evolution is not guided by your will, and may develop in directions detrimental to your goals or even self-destructive.
2067. Eternal Existence,9.6
#You have no beginning and no end. You were never created and will never cease, existing at all points of time even where existence itself is impossible. No matter how far anyone looks into the past or future, they will never find a point where you start or end. You are immune to death, destruction, erasure, and time itself, free from the boundaries of reality and concept.
2068. Eternal Function,5.6
#Your body and its parts continue to function even when too damaged or destroyed to do so normally. You can eat and digest food without a stomach, you can think and move without a nervous system, you can bleed and breathe through bodies that should not be able to. You can still be killed, but only if every part of you is destroyed simultaneously with nothing left.
2069. Eternal Imprint,6.8
#You will always exist as a memory in the minds of everyone in existence, both before and after your death. More powerful users of this ability can continue to exist as a living memory even after their entire concept has been erased from reality. Memory Erasure may be the only thing that threatens you.
2070. Eternal Transcendence,9.5
#You exist in a state of perpetual transcendence, endlessly ascending beyond your current state of being, concepts, and levels of reality without limit. Every moment you grow further beyond all laws and principles, seeing lower realities as meaningless fiction. Given enough time, you will exist beyond absolutely everything.
2071. Eternity Embodiment,9.1
#You are the physical personification of Eternity itself, having no beginning and no end. You embody endlessness and beginninglessness, granting you control over everything considered infinite or without origin. You have always existed and always will, for you are the concept made flesh.
2072. Ethereal Mimicry,6.3
#Your body is made of pure Ether, the substance that pervades all universal space and exists between the planes of matter and energy. You take on the properties of both, becoming neither fully physical nor fully energetic, but something transcendent that bridges the two.
2073. Eudaemon Physiology,6.4
#You are or can transform into a Eudaemon, a benevolent divine spirit of happiness and guardianship. Your body is suffused with holy essence, granting you divine physical abilities, aura, and a benevolent presence that inspires goodness in those around you. Vulnerable to divine slayers and anti-divine powers.
2074. Event Immunity,7.6
#You are immune to events and event-based powers, the significance and aftermath of manipulated or altered events simply fail to touch you. Even changes wrought by time travel slide off without leaving a mark. Weak against Temporal Bypassing and you may find yourself immune to beneficial events as well, for better or worse.
2075. Evil Aura,4.2
#Your essence is so saturated with evil that your aura bleeds it, influencing wicked activities just by contact. You can release and surround yourself with malefic energies for defense or offense, gaining enhanced physical capabilities, flight through aura propulsion, and an intimidating presence that makes most people want to cross the street.
2076. Evil Empowerment,3.6
#You grow stronger, faster and more durable in the presence of evil and malice, whether from others or from within yourself. Exposure to wickedness may unlock new abilities and enhance existing ones, and you can draw sustenance from cruelty itself. Drop you in a Buddhist monastery and you will be significantly less impressive.
2077. Evil Eye Embodiment,7.3
#You are a living embodiment of the Evil Eye, a conceptual being with destructive gaze-based attacks that transcend natural law. Your form tends toward the inhumanly ugly or monstrous, cyclopean or otherwise marking you as a harbinger of ruin. Universally evil in alignment, with immense destructive potential, but your supernatural weak point tends to be obvious to those who know what to look for.
2078. Evil Immunity,6.6
#You are immune to anything that can be considered evil, including all wicked influences, activities, beings and essences. Nothing malevolent can touch you, though anything neutral or good-aligned can still hurt just fine. If you yourself become incapable of committing evil, that may itself become a vulnerability your enemies can exploit.
2079. Evolution Empowerment,4.3
#You become stronger, faster and more durable through the act of evolving, possibly unlocking new abilities and enhancing your existing powers with every step forward. You may be able to draw sustenance from evolution itself and slow or stop aging. The more growth happens around you, the more you benefit.
2080. Evolutionary Immortality,6.7
#You are or can become immortal through evolutionary adaptation, your body constantly reshaping itself to survive whatever situation it encounters. A mortal who gains this trait can accumulate new forms of immortality over time, magical, genetic, cosmic, along with new powers and skills. Can still be killed before adaptation completes by absolute death or total atomic disintegration.
2081. Evolutionary Template,8.3
#You are the foundation and template for the evolutionary process of an entire race or species, the building block all their progression was based on. Every step they have taken, or will take, traces back to you as either their origin or the ultimate endpoint of their evolutionary path. Unlike a Prime Being, you may or may not be the first of their kind. Weak against Devolution.
2082. Exceptional Sex Appeal,3.2
#Your physical form, scent, and voice are carnally irresistible on a primal level, bypassing logic and striking directly at base desires. Even a glance from you can leave people flustered. Those with Indomitable Will or incompatible tastes are unaffected, and depending on your circumstances this can be a blessing or a heavy curse.
2083. Execution Device Mimicry,3.4
#You are or can transform into a tool of execution, a guillotine, noose, electric chair, or something more exotic. Your form is purpose-built for killing, and in some cases may only activate against targets who would otherwise deserve the death penalty.
2084. Exercise Equipment Mimicry,1.9
#You are or can transform into any form of exercise equipment, from a humble dumbbell to a full squat rack. Deeply silly, but you're almost impossible to break in this form.
2085. Exertion Defiance,3.8
#Forces exerted on you accelerate you less than they should. Pushes, pulls, kicks and throws all land like they're hitting something far heavier than you are. You're not immovable, but you are much, much harder to move than your body should allow.
2086. Exhaust Protrusion,3.2
#Your body can grow exhaust ports and propulsion systems at will. Expel gases for flight, fire for attacks, or steam for defense. Your biology smoothly integrates fuel burn and venting as if you were built half-machine.
2087. Existence Embodiment,9.3
#You are the personification of existence itself, the living concept of being. So long as anything exists, you exist through it, and your authority over that which is extends as far as existence does. Only a Void Embodiment that predates you could truly challenge what you are.
2088. Existential Distinction,9.5
#Your essence is absolutely other, a singularity of being that nothing else in all of existence shares. You are distinguished from everything, everywhere, everywhen and everyhow, without exception, making you fundamentally incomparable and incompatible with any law, power, or category that would try to group you with something else. You are simply, and only, yourself.
2089. Existential Perfection,9.9
#You are an existentially perfect being. While you exist, you are complete, absolute, and infinite in every sense and aspect, with no limitation of any kind applying to you. Nothing in living existence can surpass or even approach you, as imperfection itself cannot touch what you are.
2090. Existential Plane Empowerment,6.5
#You draw strength, speed, and durability from the existential planes themselves, the planar forces empowering you and unlocking new abilities tied to your affinity. You may even draw sustenance from them, slowing or stopping your aging entirely. Cut off from these planes, however, you are significantly weaker than your peak.
2091. Exorcism Immunity,3.2
#You are immune to exorcisms and cannot be forcibly removed from a host or vessel. Priests, shamans, and ritualists trying to banish you find their words and rites hollow. Purification may still affect you, and if the host body dies you may still be forced to retreat to a noncorporeal state.
2092. Exotic Human Physiology,4.5
#You are an exotic human, a fantastical variant of humanity itself such as those born of medieval caricatures or misunderstood cultures. You possess unique traits and powers tied to whichever mythic human lineage you belong to, and are still considered human in essence despite your strangeness. You remain mortal, and some exotic humans are one of a kind.
2093. Expanding Brain,3.3
#Your brain is constantly growing, and that continuous expansion comes with various supernatural abilities tied to your swelling intellect. The longer you live, the more your mind expands and the stranger your mental gifts become. Your skull is always at risk of bursting, and mundane situations may become difficult as your head keeps changing shape.
2094. Experience Empowerment,4.8
#Your body and soul feed on experience itself, growing stronger, faster and tougher the more experience you or those around you accumulate. Veterans around you make you sharper by proximity, and with enough ambient experience you can even slow your own aging. If deprived of experience entirely, you weaken.
2095. Explosion Immunity,4.5
#You are completely immune to explosions. You can walk out of a burning building unscathed, stand in the crater of a grenade without flinching, or drive a car that just had its engine blown. Absolute Explosions can still hurt you, and you may still feel the shockwave and pain even without taking damage.
2096. Explosive Blood,3.3
#Your blood is dangerously unstable, violently detonating whenever it's spilled. Enemies that cut you open get an unpleasant surprise, but a hard enough impact from the outside may also be enough to set you off from the inside.
2097. Explosive Bodily Fluids,3.5
#All of your bodily fluids — blood, saliva, sweat, tears, whatever — are explosive and can be detonated on contact or at will. Spitting at an enemy becomes a grenade toss, and bleeding on someone becomes a last-ditch weapon. Useless against those with Explosion Immunity.
2098. Explosive Body Parts,3.6
#One or more of your body parts are volatile explosives, capable of detonating to damage nearby targets. Losing that body part to the blast may leave you vulnerable, and regeneration, if you have it, may not be fast enough to save you in the moment.
2099. Explosive Ingestion,1.4
#You can eat bombs, grenades, and other explosives without suffering any harm. Sufficiently powerful explosives may still hurt, so don't try to swallow a nuke.
2100. Explosive Mucus,1.6
#Your snot is explosive. Blowing your nose becomes a tactical consideration and flicking a booger becomes a war crime.
2101. Explosive Saliva,2.2
#Your spit is explosive. Distance, precision and yield depend on your skill and lung power, and casual drooling becomes a hazard to yourself and others.
2102. Exposed Brain,1.5
#Your brain is exposed and you live perfectly fine without a skull to cover it. Horrifying to look at, mildly inconvenient when it rains.
2103. Expressive Ears,1.1
#Your ears physically express your emotions and moods, drooping when sad, perking when excited, twitching when annoyed. You may not be able to control them, which makes hiding your feelings impossible.
2104. Expressive Hair,1.6
#Your hair moves on its own in response to your moods, bristling when angry, wilting when sad, curling when delighted. You may not be able to control it, so it broadcasts your emotions whether you like it or not.
2105. Expressive Skin,1.3
#Your skin shifts color or pattern to reflect your emotions and moods, a bit like a cuttlefish. You may not be able to control it, so lying or hiding your feelings is basically out of the question.
