2106. External Invulnerability,4.1
#You are immune to any form of damage as long as it is applied to the outside of your body. Skin, bones, and outer organs are untouchable, but internal attacks, poisons, and sonic strikes can still ruin your day.
2107. External Nervous-System,3.8
#Your nervous system exists outside your body, rendering you immune to pain and physical shock. The system itself has its own locomotion and life, but if it is harmed you feel it in full, so keep it hidden and safe.
2108. External Organ,3.2
#You use a disconnected object or location outside your body as one of your organs. Great as backup insurance if your internal organs fail, but others can damage your organ without ever touching you, and poor maintenance leads to disease.
2109. Extra Teeth,0.4
#You have a higher number of teeth than a normal person. Makes dental visits more expensive and your smile slightly unsettling.
2110. Extra-Dimensional Energy Mimicry,5.7
#Your body is made of or can transform into extra-dimensional energy, retaining your full anatomy but reshaped into otherworldly power. Energy drain and dimensional distortion are potentially fatal to your form.
2111. Extra-Dimensional Symbiosis,6.2
#You host an extra-dimensional being living in or on your body, granting you enhanced condition, altered physiology, foreign energy control, and even minor manipulation of physical laws. Powerful symbiotes can harm, destroy, or possess their host if you aren't careful.
2112. Extra-Spatiotemporal Presence,9.1
#You exist outside of space and time entirely, making you immune to nearly anything that could affect or harm you. If time stops, you move; if reality changes, you remember both versions; if the planet vanishes, you simply aren't affected. Binding you requires dragging you back into spacetime first.
2113. Extraspatial Presence,8.4
#You exist outside of space itself, making you immune to physical attacks and all spatial powers like Spatial Slicing or Remote Teleportation. Time still affects you though, so you can still age and be manipulated temporally.
2114. Extratemporal Presence,8.4
#You exist outside of time itself, rendering you ageless, foodless, sleepless, and immune to disease progression and temporal powers. Your body reverts to its locked state, but spatial powers still affect you and healing is tricky since healing requires time to pass.
2115. Extreme Specialization,3.6
#You are a natural min-maxer, you can dump certain stats or skills to radically amplify others. Want Supernatural Speed? Trade away your durability and become a glass cannon. The trade-offs are always equal but the weaknesses you gain are often more severe than the strengths they fuel.
2116. Extreme Temperature Resistance,2.3
#You can comfortably survive in a wide range of hot and cold temperatures without discomfort. You still have limits and you are not immune to other related effects like smoke, debris or slippery ice, but the temperature itself simply does not bother you.
2117. Eye Color Shifting,0.7
#You can change your own eye color at will. Useful for disguises, vibes or matching your outfit.
2118. Eye Empowerment,3.6
#You grow stronger, faster and more durable when near eyes, whether your own or others'. Being in a crowd empowers you, and you may even draw sustenance from eyes or slow your own aging through them. If blinded, you may need Blindsight to keep functioning.
2119. Eye Mimicry,2.6
#You are or can transform into a giant eyeball of any shape or size. In full eye form you may need assistance to move around since eyes do not typically come with limbs, but your sensory abilities become unmatched.
2120. Eyeless Perception,4.2
#You can perceive the world without eyes at all, whether you have empty sockets, smooth skin where eyes should be or simply never had them. Your perception often exceeds normal vision and you are immune to most blinding effects. May take a moment for the alternate senses to kick in if suddenly gained.
2121. Eyestalk Protrusion,1.8
#You can extend your eyes on long stalks, giving them a much wider field of view. Perfect for peeking over walls, around corners, or just looking deeply unsettling at parties.
2122. Eyewear Mimicry,2.0
#You can transform yourself into eyewear, whether glasses, goggles or a visor. Your transformed form either retains your organs and is vulnerable, or becomes homogeneous eyewear-matter without weak points. Rarely useful on its own but great for infiltration.
2123. Face Mimicry,2.8
#You are made of or can transform your body into a face or a collection of faces. You may remain anatomically identical with your organs intact, or become homogeneous face-matter where no part is more vulnerable than another. Unsettling to behold but surprisingly versatile.
2124. Faceless Perception,4.3
#You can perceive the world despite lacking facial features entirely. When your original senses are removed, new and unique senses manifest that let you perceive, hear and smell in ways no normal creature can. You are also immune to destructive sources targeting your face. May take time for the new senses to kick in.
2125. Fachan Physiology,4.5
#Scottish Folklore - You take on the traits of a Fachan, a hideous one-eyed, one-armed, one-legged giant from Scottish folklore. You gain immense strength and durability along with a natural affinity for club weapons, but your irrational hatred for all other forms of life makes you predictable and you are weak to holy relics and prayers.
2126. Failure Embodiment,5.2
#You embody the concept of failure, the state of not meeting a desired objective. You can inflict crushing defeat onto others and warp events so that efforts collapse around you, but no matter how powerful you become, you too will ultimately fail in the end.
2127. Failure Empowerment,3.5
#You grow stronger, faster and more durable from failure, whether your own or others'. Every loss feeds you and may unlock new abilities, but success weakens you and Victory Inducement users are your bane.
2128. Fairy Mouse Physiology,2.2
#You are or can transform into a fairy mouse, the folkloric rodent cousin of the Tooth Fairy found in French and Spanish tales. Small, quick and magical, but still very much mouse-sized.
2129. Superior Fairy Physiology,6.4
#You are a superior fairy, standing far above the common fae in power, elegance and magic. You wield the full range of fairy abilities at a level most lesser fairies cannot hope to match, though traditional fae weaknesses like iron still apply unless you train against them.
2130. Transcendent Fairy Physiology,8.0
#You are a transcendent fairy, a fae who has ascended to a godly state and stands as one of the most powerful fairies in existence. You wield divine fae magic on a sweeping scale, though Divine Slayers, Omnislayers and transcendent weaponry can still threaten you.
2131. Fairy Physiology,5.0
#You are or can transform into a fairy, a supernatural being tied to magic, nature and realms beyond mortal understanding. Your form is strikingly beautiful and your essence blurs the line between material and spiritual, though cold iron can repel and wound you and by folklore you cannot tell an outright lie.
2132. Fairy Soul,5.3
#You are not a true fairy but you possess the soul of one, granting you fae-like powers, the ability to manifest wings and a heavy reservoir of magic stored within your body. Like a fairy you can embody a natural concept such as a season or an element.
2133. Fairy-Vampire Physiology,5.7
#You are a hybrid of fae and vampire, a creature once thought impossible. You possess the powers of both bloodlines, are immune to sunlight and the invitation rule, and can still eat ordinary food. You grow stronger with age but remain vulnerable to wooden stakes, fire, and enchantments meant to bind the fair folk.
2134. Falcon Physiology,3.0
#You are or can transform into a falcon, either partially or fully. You gain incredible aerial agility, sharp eyes capable of spotting prey from absurd distances, and the signature hunting dive that can exceed 200 mph.
2135. Fall Damage Immunity,3.3
#You take zero damage from falling, no matter the height. Drop you off a skyscraper and you will land perfectly fine, though whatever is on the ground, be it lava, spikes, or a very angry crowd, can still ruin your day.
2136. Fall Damage Resistance,2.0
#Your body shrugs off fall damage far better than a normal person's. A two-story drop is nothing, a five-story drop leaves you bruised but standing. Not quite invulnerable, but enough to turn fatal falls into survivable ones.
2137. Fallout Adaptation,3.6
#Your body adapts to radiation, pollution, and toxic fallout on levels that would kill or mutate anyone else. You can drink irradiated water, eat contaminated food, and walk through wastelands that would strip the flesh from a normal person.
2138. Fallout Mimicry,5.4
#Your body is made of or can transform into fallout, whether nuclear ash, volcanic tephra, or other catastrophic residue. Attacks pass through your homogeneous form, but simply being near you is a death sentence for anything living that isn't equally adapted.
2139. False Divinity,6.5
#You possess an artificial form of divinity, a pseudo-godhood fueled by the belief others hold in you or the belief you hold in yourself. You are considered holy and wield divine-tier power, but true gods can still bring you low, and a crisis of faith can unravel everything you are.
2140. False Physiology,5.6
#Your body looks human but is actually made of something else entirely, be it stone, metal, wood, or animated flesh. You never need to eat, sleep, or breathe, feel no pain, and cannot be poisoned or sickened. Whatever your true material is, that is what drives you.
2141. Famine Derivation,8.6
#You are the primordial source of all famine, hunger, and starvation across the cosmos. Every empty stomach, every failed harvest, every decaying field draws from you. You have total dominion over famine and everything connected to it, though you can never escape the role without passing it to another, and your death would end all hunger forever.
2142. Fan Mimicry,3.0
#Your body can transform into a fan or a mass of fans, either partially or fully. In homogeneous form your organs are dispersed throughout you, making targeted attacks nearly useless, though you still suffer the weaknesses of the material.
2143. Fang Retraction,1.7
#You possess abnormally sharp, retractable fangs capable of delivering a deadly bite. You can hide them in polite company and bring them out when the situation calls for tearing something's throat out.
2144. Fantastic-Matter Blood,5.8
#Your blood is fantastic-matter given flesh, coursing through your veins with supernatural potency. It enhances your physical condition and grants you a suite of fantastic-matter abilities, though blood absorption and fantastic-matter negation are serious vulnerabilities.
2145. Fantastic-Matter Immunity,4.4
#You are completely immune to fantastic-matter and all abilities rooted in it, taking no damage from direct or indirect effects. The stronger or more exotic the matter, the harder it is to maintain, and targeted immunity bypass can still catch you off guard.
2146. Fantastic-Matter Mimicry,5.0
#Your body is made of, or can transform into, fantastic-matter. You gain all the supernatural properties of the material you embody, from indestructibility to exotic power generation, with skilled users keeping an anatomically normal form beneath the exotic substance.
2147. Fantastic-Matter Power Link,4.0
#Your fantastic-matter nature is directly linked to your powers, feeding and strengthening them through its exotic essence. If the material destabilizes your powers may go out of control, and fantastic-matter negation is a hard counter.
2148. Fantastic-Matter Quintessence,6.5
#You are an infinite wellspring of fantastic-matter, generating the exotic material endlessly from your own body rather than drawing from the world around you. This limitless reservoir can empower your physical and mental attributes, fuel any invention, or be handed out as raw material, though your body can only handle so much at once before you need food and rest.
2149. Fantastic-Matter Resistance,3.2
#You are highly resistant to the effects of exotic supermaterials like unobtainium, vibranium and adamantium. Not full immunity though, enough of the stuff thrown at you can still harm or even kill you.
2150. Fantastic-Matter Symbiosis,5.7
#You host a fantastic-matter entity within your body, gaining powerful abilities tied to whatever exotic material it embodies. The bond is dangerous though, as the entity may attempt to possess you or the matter itself may slowly harm your body.
2151. Fantastic-Metal Mimicry,5.7
#Your body is made of or can transform into a fantastic-metal such as mithril or adamantium, granting you supernatural durability while retaining your anatomy. Alternatively you can go fully homogeneous, losing the vulnerability of organs in exchange for losing fine internal structure.
2152. Fantasy Embodiment,7.6
#You are the living embodiment of Fantasy itself, the concept of stories, imagination, wishes, desires, magic, the supernatural, and all that is not. Wherever you walk the impossible becomes plausible and the dreamed-of begins to take shape around you.
2153. Fantasy Vehicle Mimicry,4.0
#You are or can transform into a fantasy vehicle, such as a chariot, magic carpet, ghost ship, or time machine. May require special fuel and tends to buckle under anti-magic.
2154. Fantasy World Defiance,7.3
#You can ignore the rules, physics and logic of any fantasy or fictional world, substituting your own truth and context in their place. This lets you do what should be impossible within those worlds and makes you effectively immune to their conceits.
2155. Fantasy World Immunity,6.6
#You are immune to the physics and logic of any fantasy world you enter, retaining the rules of your own world wherever you go. Omni-absorption and immunity-bypassing powers are the perfect counters to this.
2156. Fashion Ability Manifestation,4.6
#You gain abilities based on what you wear. Put on a knight's armor and you gain chivalry and swordsmanship, wear a cook's apron and you gain culinary intuition, drape yourself in a bear pelt and you gain the strength of a bear. The rarer and more meaningful the garment, the stronger the manifested ability. You lose these powers the moment the clothing comes off.
2157. Fastener Immunity,3.3
#You are immune to anything that fastens or anchors things in place. Ropes, chains, bolts, nails, screws, and glue cannot keep you from moving what you are holding. Useful for escapology and moving heavy furniture, but extremely heavy anchored objects may still resist.
2158. Fat Armor,3.2
#Kevlard - Your body fat is so thick and dense that it functions as body armor, causing physical attacks to bounce right off. Areas with less fat, like the head, are less protected, so keep your guard up.
2159. Fat Mimicry,3.8
#Allows you to transform your body completely into fat, either anatomically identical to your normal form or as homogeneous adipose matter. You gain the flexibility and shock absorption of fat but become highly sensitive to heat, potentially melting if exposed to high temperatures.
2160. Fate Immunity,6.2
#You are immune and free from every fate. You can act and think as you wish without following any predictable design, making your own mark in life without the chains of destiny. You can still be tricked or coerced into certain courses of action, however.
2161. Fathomless Mind,8.6
#Your intelligence operates on a level beyond normal eldritch minds, existing in a state beyond the conception of thought, logic or reason. Compared to your mind, even other alien intellects are like puddles to an ocean. No telepath, mind reader or psychic entity can parse you, and any attempt to do so may shatter their own mind.
2162. Fear Countenance,3.2
#Your true face is the stuff of nightmares. Anyone who lays eyes on it is struck with primal, paralyzing fear. Ineffective against the blind or anything without a survival instinct like drones or the truly apathetic.
2163. Fear Derivation,9.3
#You are the primordial source of all fear across the cosmos. Every shiver of dread, every panicked heartbeat, every nightmare flows from your existence. You have absolute dominion over fear in all its forms, but should you ever die, all fear would vanish with you and the universe would lose one of its binding forces.
2164. Fear Embodiment,7.4
#You are the living personification of fear itself, drawing power and sustenance from every fearful thought in existence. You exist beyond dimensional constraints since fear does too, and you cannot truly die as long as something, somewhere, is afraid.
2165. Fear Empowerment,3.6
#The more fear surrounds you, be it your own or others', the stronger, faster and tougher you become. In a room full of terrified people you are a monster, but in the absence of fear you are just you.
2166. Fear Gorta Physiology,5.2
#Irish Folklore - You are or can become a Fear Gorta, a gaunt phantom of starvation that wanders during famine. Those who cross your path may stumble onto Hungry Grass and starve even with food in their stomachs. Appeased by alms, vulnerable to cold iron and divine relics.
2167. Fear Immunity,3.8
#You are incapable of feeling fear, anxiety or dread, no matter the situation. You can think clearly and act decisively in scenarios that would reduce others to gibbering wrecks. Warning, fear exists for a reason, and without it you may make reckless decisions that get you killed.
2168. Fear Liath Physiology,5.0
#Scottish Folklore - You are or can become a Fear Liath, a malevolent mountain spirit that haunts high peaks and induces crushing paranoia in climbers. Your power is strongest in remote, cold and isolated regions and you may be bound to such places as a genius loci.
2169. Fearsome Critter Physiology,3.4
#American Folklore - You are or can transform into a Fearsome Critter, one of the bizarre creatures of lumberjack tall tales. Hidebehinds, hodags, squonks and splinter cats are all fair game. Most are more amusing than frightening but a few are genuinely dangerous.
2170. Feather Dragon Physiology,5.7
#You are or can transform into a Feathered Dragon, a dragon artificially modified through magic and alchemy to have an aerodynamic build and feathered coat. You absorb the type of magic that was used to create your kind, granting you an affinity for that school alongside your draconic might.
2171. Feather Manifestation,2.2
#You have or can grow feathers over your body, aiding in flight, waterproofing and thermal insulation. Some users can retract them at will to pass as normal.
2172. Feather Wing Manifestation,3.6
#You can grow and retract feathered wings from your back, using them for flight, offense or defense. The wings can range from sparrow-like to full angelic splendor depending on your nature.
2173. Feline Companionship,2.3
#You have a natural bond with felines of all kinds, from housecats to tigers to mythological beasts. Cats simply take to you, and any feline you befriend is loyal for life. A soft power, but comforting in its own way.
2174. Feline Dragon Physiology,5.4
#You are or can transform into a feline dragon, a draconic being with the grace, senses, and predatory instincts of a cat combined with the raw power of a dragon. You possess enhanced physical stats, draconic breath, and the agility of a hunting feline. Vulnerable to both dragon slayers and feline manipulators.
2175. Feline Physiology,3.5
#You possess the traits and abilities of a feline, from enhanced reflexes, night vision, and balance to retractable claws and the ability to always land on your feet. You may fully or partially transform into a cat of any species.
2176. Felinefolk Physiology,3.4
#You are a felinefolk, a humanoid with the traits of a cat. You have enhanced reflexes, claws, fangs, night vision, and the natural grace of a feline, along with an unmistakable appearance that draws attention wherever you go.
2177. Felis Physiology,3.1
#You are or can transform into a domestic cat or one of its wild relatives. You possess all the instincts, reflexes, and flexibility of a real feline, and can shift between fully human, fully cat, or somewhere delightfully in between.
2178. Felisoid Physiology,3.3
#You are a felisoid, a cat-like humanoid with the traits and instincts of a housecat scaled up to a person. Soft paws, retractable claws, flexible spine, and an intensely curious disposition. Less imposing than a felinefolk tiger type but arguably more charming.
2179. Fenghuang Physiology,6.4
#Chinese Mythology - You are or can transform into a Fenghuang, the phoenix that rules over all birds. You possess immense grace and beauty, control over fire and wind, the ability to bless the righteous and harbinger great fortune, and a regal presence that commands respect from every avian creature and many spiritual beings.
2180. Fenodyree Physiology,3.2
#Manx Folklore - You are a fenodyree, a small, shaggy brownie who aids mortals during the night in exchange for food and milk. You work at supernatural speeds, capable of gathering an entire harvest or cleaning an entire estate in a single night. Never accept clothing as payment, it will offend you so deeply you'll abandon the household forever.
2181. Fenri Physiology,7.4
#Norse Mythology - You are or can transform into Fenrir, the monstrous wolf fated to devour Odin at Ragnarök. As Fenrir, your size, strength, and ferocity grow with your rage and hunger, and your bite can tear through gods. Only bindings of potent magic can restrain you, and prophecy itself tries to chain your fate.
2182. Fertility Embodiment,6.2
#You are the embodiment of fertility itself, with limitless command over the natural capacity to produce offspring and growth. Life blossoms wherever you walk, barren lands bloom, and creatures around you are filled with vitality and the drive to create new life.
2183. Fertilizing Blood,2.9
#Your blood induces fertility wherever it falls, causing plants to sprout from the soil and restoring vitality to animals and land. Shed a few drops on a barren field and watch life erupt. Your body, however, may not be immune to its own effects.
2184. Fertilizing Bodily Fluids,3.1
#(Nsfw-adjacent) All of your bodily fluids, blood, sweat, saliva, tears, and the more intimate ones, induce fertility in whatever they touch. Plants bloom where you weep, fields flourish where you bleed, and certain other applications are best left unremarked.
2185. Fertilizing Tears,2.4
#Your tears induce fertility in plants, animals, and soil. Cry over a dead plant and it will bloom again, weep on a barren field and it will flourish. A bittersweet gift, especially if your tears are uncontrollable.
2186. Fext Physiology,5.7
#Slavic Mythology - You are a Fext, an undead humanoid made bulletproof and near-invincible through a pact with malevolent forces. Conventional weapons slide off you, wounds close almost instantly, and assassination attempts fail one after another. Only glass bullets or wooden stakes from sapling ties can truly kill you, and the demonic pact that made you may still be collecting its price.
2187. Fictional Empowerment,4.6
#You grow stronger, faster and more durable in the presence of fictional powers, objects, energies or worlds, and may even unlock abilities associated with whatever fictional source you draw from. Strong enough users can feed on fiction itself and slow or stop aging through it.
2188. Fictional Entity Physiology,6.5
#You are, or can transform into, a fictional character of your own design or one pulled from existing media, complete with their powers, abilities and physiology. Real World Enforcement pushes back against your form, and Abolishment is even worse.
2189. Fictional Physics,6.0
#You are governed by altered laws of physics pulled from any kind of fiction, which can manifest as an extremely broad suite of abilities depending on which fictional logic takes hold. You may also inherit the weaknesses of whichever fiction your body is currently mimicking.
2190. Fighting Instinct,5.4
#You possess the innate aptitude of the ultimate fighting machine. In any combat, your body automatically identifies the optimal course of offense, defense, evasion, and counter without conscious thought, allowing you to resist fear and pain and push past your physical limits to secure victory.
2191. Fin Blades,2.6
#You possess blade-tipped fins that can be used as cutting weapons while also granting you decent swimming ability. Lose the fins and the power goes with them.
2192. Fin Guards,2.4
#You possess armored dorsal fins that function as both shields and swimming instruments. They block blows like steel plates and still let you cut through water.
2193. Finger Vision,3.3
#You possess extra eyes or equivalent sensory organs on your fingertips, granting you extremely flexible sight and up to 360 degrees of vision. The downside is obvious weak points on your hands and a heavy processing burden for all the extra viewpoints.
2194. Fire Elemental Physiology,4.3
#You are or can transform into a fire elemental, a creature born of flame and heat with a natural affinity for all things fire. Your elemental form grants you potent pyrokinetic abilities but leaves you vulnerable to ice, water and fire negation.
2195. Fire Embodiment,8.6
#You are the embodiment of fire itself, possessing absolute control and immunity over all flames. At the pinnacle of this power you are omnipotent over fire, able to do anything and everything with it, from igniting stars to snuffing out primordial infernos with a thought.
2196. Fire Empowerment,3.3
#You become stronger, faster and more durable when in contact with fire, drawing power and even sustenance from its flames. The larger and hotter the flame, the more your abilities are enhanced, but ice and water weaken you considerably.
2197. Fire Extinguisher Mimicry,1.1
#You are or can transform into a fire extinguisher, retaining your anatomy in the form of pressurized foam and red metal. A deeply strange gift, but at least you'll never be caught without one in an emergency.
2198. Fire Giant Physiology,5.4
#You possess the traits of a fire giant, combining the raw physical might of giants with potent fire-based abilities. Your size, strength and heat are overwhelming to mortals, but ice, water and giant-slaying weapons are your natural enemies.
2199. Fire Horse Physiology,5.7
#Greek Myth - You are or can transform into a Fire-Horse, a mythic immortal steed capable of generating celestial and earthly flames and flying without wings. These were the horses the gods used to pull their chariots across the heavens.
2200. Fire Immunity,3.5
#You are completely immune to fire, able to walk through burning buildings and withstand oven-level temperatures without so much as blistering. Be careful though, since fire spreads naturally, you could become a living candle and torch everything around you by accident.
2201. Fire Mimicry,4.5
#Your body is made of or can transform entirely into fire, your form retaining its anatomy as living flame. In this state you gain the properties of fire itself, becoming hard to grasp and burning everything you touch, but water and ice are dangerous to you.
2202. Fire Quintessence,6.3
#Your body is an infinite furnace, generating endless fire from within rather than drawing it from the environment. This limitless combustion can be used to enhance your physical and mental attributes, generate any kind of flame, or power machinery. You can only channel so much at once before your body and mind need rest.
2203. Fire Skeleton Mimicry,4.8
#Your body is or can transform into a blazing skeleton wreathed in eternal flame. You gain the durability and tirelessness of the undead alongside full pyrokinetic output from your bones, making you a walking pyre that refuses to die.
2204. Fire Slime Mimicry,4.3
#You can transform your body into a living flaming slime, gaining the malleability of ooze combined with the heat and damage of fire. You can squeeze through gaps, reform from splatter and incinerate whatever you engulf. Weak against water and ice-based abilities.
2205. Fire Soul,5.2
#Your soul is made entirely of fire, and you can manifest it outside your body to perform spiritual feats or channel its flames into concussive blasts. Immunity to fire's damage doesn't mean immunity to the pain, and any Soul or Fire Absorber is a direct hard counter.
2206. Fire Symbiosis,5.5
#You host a fire-based entity within your body, a flame elemental or ethereal being of heat that grants you powerful pyrokinetic abilities in exchange for sharing your flesh. The stronger the bond, the greater the power, but the entity may try to possess you or burn you out from the inside if you lose the upper hand.
2207. Fire Tail,2.6
#You can manifest a tail made of fire extending from your lower back, used to whip attackers, guard your rear or simply look intimidating. The tail burns anything it touches and can extend or retract at will.
2208. Firefly Physiology,2.3
#You are or can transform into a firefly, either partially or fully. You gain the ability to produce bioluminescent light from your body, communicate in soft glowing pulses, and in full form, flight on delicate wings. Great for ambience, less so for combat.
2209. Firefox Physiology,5.4
#Finnish Folklore - You are or can transform into a Revontulet, the mythical firefox whose tail sparks the aurora borealis. As you sprint across snow and strike tree or stone with your tail, brilliant auroras ignite the sky, and the sparks themselves carry real heat and beauty. Your speed and grace in cold climates are unmatched.
2210. Fish Monster Physiology,4.0
#You are or can transform into a hulking fish monster, either partially or fully. In this form you possess immense physical strength, a terrifying maw, and the full aquatic dominance of a deep-sea horror. Surface folk tend not to stick around to chat.
2211. Fish People Physiology,3.6
#You are or can transform into a fishperson, a humanoid with a scaled, fish-like body and face. You possess enhanced strength, underwater breathing, and far greater swimming speed and agility than any human. Your scales may dry under prolonged sun or heat, so stay hydrated.
2212. Fish Physiology,2.8
#You are or can transform into a fish, either partially or fully. Includes everything from hagfish and lampreys to sharks and tuna, granting underwater breathing, swimming, and the traits of whichever fish you choose. Transitioning back to land may take practice.
2213. Fitness Acceleration,3.9
#Your body adapts to physical training far faster and further than any normal member of your species. You can undertake regimes that would cripple or kill others and emerge stronger for it, your genetics keeping pace with your ambition. Peak human fitness is a stepping stone, not a ceiling.
2214. Fitness Preservation,3.5
#Your physical fitness is locked in regardless of diet, exercise or substance abuse. You could live on junk food and beer and remain as toned and agile as a marathon runner. Every gym goer's envy and every doctor's nightmare.
2215. Fixed Direction,4.7
#Your direction of motion is absolute; once you are moving somewhere, nothing short of absolute defense can change where you are going. You can be sped up, slowed down or even stopped entirely, but your heading is yours alone to alter. Perfect for charging through walls of enemies on a straight line.
2216. Fixed Duration,4.8
#The time you take to move any distance is a fixed constant, no matter the circumstances. Whether you cross a room or a mile, the duration is the same to you, meaning greater distances effectively become faster travel. Gravity, drag and terrain cannot change your duration, only your reach.
2217. Fixed Speed,4.6
#Your speed when moving is an unalterable constant; nothing can slow you, stop you or speed you up while in motion. Your direction can still be changed with enough force, and absolute defense can still halt you, but within those limits you are a tireless, unceasing projectile.
2218. Flame Head,3.3
#Your head is made entirely of fire, as is tradition for demons and ghost riders alike. You cannot be harmed through the head and can ignite or extinguish it at will, though strong wind or water may douse it temporarily.
2219. Flaming Wings,3.0
#You possess wings made of fire that do not harm you, letting you fly with a blazing trail behind you. Looks incredible, though the flames can be extinguished by heavy rain or strong wind, grounding you until they relight.
2220. Flamingo Physiology,2.0
#You possess the traits and abilities of a flamingo, able to transform partially or fully. You gain impressive balance on one leg, filter-feeding capability and pink coloration, though predators like big cats and hyenas remain a concern.
2221. Flammable Blood,3.2
#Your blood ignites upon contact with air, making every wound a potential weapon. You can use it offensively by bleeding onto enemies, but without a regeneration factor or blood generation, you risk bleeding out or setting yourself entirely on fire.
2222. Flammable Bodily Fluids,3.3
#All of your bodily fluids - blood, saliva, sweat, mucus, even urine - are flammable and can be set alight. An extremely versatile combat option provided you don't accidentally combust during a hot summer day.
2223. Flammable Saliva,2.3
#Your saliva can be set on fire, turning every spit into a tiny molotov. With a lighter or flint, you can effectively breathe fire, though you should probably avoid chewing matches.
2224. Flammable Urine,1.5
#Your urine is flammable. Do with that what you will.
2225. Flatwoods Monster Physiology,4.1
#You are or can transform into the Flatwoods Monster, a seven-foot-tall cryptid with a glowing diamond-shaped face, a dark pleated exoskeleton, and inhumanly fast clawed arms. Your very presence inspires dread, and witnesses often report symptoms of radiation sickness.
2226. Flawless Indestructibility,9.7
#You are absolutely indestructible, with no physical, spiritual, or mental weaknesses whatsoever. True Oblivion, Total End, space-time alteration - none of it will affect you, and you will always remain in perfect condition. This is the indestructibility aspect of omnipotence, and nothing short of an actual omnipotent being can even make you flinch.
2227. Flesh Empowerment,3.5
#You grow stronger, faster and tougher the more flesh you come into contact with, whether your own, another's, or a pile of it. In large quantities you can draw sustenance from it and even slow your aging, making slaughterhouses and battlefields your favorite places.
2228. Flesh Mimicry,2.8
#Your body is made of flesh, or you can turn it into a homogeneous flesh form. In homogenous form you lack vital organs and can take a beating that would kill a normal body, but you are still vulnerable to anything normal flesh would be.
2229. Fleshless Movement,3.0
#You can move and fight normally even without muscles, skin or connective tissue. Reduced to a skeleton, a pile of organs or less, you still walk, run and swing your fists as though your body were whole. Strong forces can still knock you apart though.
2230. Absolute Flexibility,7.4
#Your flexibility is limitless. You can contort your body into any shape imaginable or unimaginable, squeeze through any opening, rotate your limbs in impossible ways, and even snapping your own spine or neck does nothing to hinder you. Bones and joints become suggestions rather than rules.
2231. Enhanced Flexibility,2.3
#Your joints, tendons and muscles let you bend and contort far beyond the normal limits of the human body. You can hold boneless-looking poses without strain and squeeze into tight spaces with ease, though your long bones are still as rigid as anyone else's.
2232. Supernatural Flexibility,3.6
#Your flexibility is glaringly, obviously unnatural even in a world full of superhumans. You can twist and bend your body in ways that should be physically impossible, moving your joints through impossible arcs, though your long bones still refuse to bend.
2233. Peak Flexibility,1.4
#You are as flexible as a human being can possibly be. A professional contortionist with proper training could only dream of your suppleness, but you still need to be careful not to push past the limits of muscle and bone.
2234. Flexible Organs,2.6
#Your internal organs can deform and squish without being crushed or losing function. You can be compressed, folded and twisted in ways that would pulp a normal person and keep right on ticking, up to a point.
2235. Flexible Skeleton,2.7
#Your bones are flexible and bend like rubber, letting you squeeze through tight spaces a jointed body could never fit through. The trade-off is that your bones are more prone to snapping, and careless bending can crush your own organs.
2236. Flinching Immunity,3.6
#You do not flinch. Jump scares, sudden pain, shocking injuries, intimidation, none of it makes you react. You can walk forward through a hail of blows without your rhythm ever breaking, though you can still be knocked back by sufficient force.
2237. Flipper Protrusion,1.7
#You can grow or always possess flippers on your body, typically on your hands or feet. Makes swimming through water dramatically easier, though they make walking on land awkward when extended.
2238. Floating Hair,1.2
#Your hair floats around your head as though underwater or caught in a gentle breeze. Some users can control when this happens, others have to live with it constantly. Purely aesthetic, but it does look dramatic.
2239. Floor and Ceiling Mimicry,3.2
#You are made of or can transform into floors and ceilings, blending seamlessly into any room. In homogenous form you lose your organs but are much harder to damage conventionally, making ambushes from above or below your specialty.
2240. Flotation Device Mimicry,1.1
#You can transform your body into a life preserver or raft, keeping yourself and others buoyant. Useless on dry land and embarrassing at parties, but a lifesaver at sea.
2241. Flour Mimicry,2.3
#Your body is made of flour, allowing you to scatter, reform and slip through tight gaps. Water and wind are your worst enemies, and a strong breeze can leave you as a very sad pile on the floor.
2242. Flower Monster Physiology,4.0
#You can transform into a flower monster, a towering plant beast with petal maws, vine limbs and thorny defenses. Your physical stats are dramatically increased in this form and you gain a host of plant-based abilities, but monster slayers will have your number.
2243. Flower Physiology,3.6
#Your body is either made of or can transform into flowers. In this form you can scatter your petals, regrow from the smallest bud and blend into any garden, but you move slower than in your normal form and may require sunlight, water or fertile soil to recover.
2244. Fluid Power Empowerment,3.5
#You grow stronger, faster and more durable the more fluid power surrounds you. Near engines, circulatory systems, hydraulic presses or even your own heavy breathing, your abilities surge and your body enters peak form.
2245. Flute Mimicry,0.7
#You can transform into a flute. In this form, you make a lovely sound when someone blows into you, but you cannot move on your own.
2246. Fly Physiology,2.5
#You can transform into a fly or swarm of flies, granting you incredible agility, compound vision, flight and the ability to squeeze through the tiniest of cracks. Surprisingly hard to swat once you know what you're doing.
2247. Flying Pig Physiology,3.4
#You can transform into a flying pig, either a plump pink one with angel wings, a bristly boar with feathered wings, or something closer to Khrysaor of Greek myth. You possess the physical strength of a boar and the power of flight, though you won't be winning any aerodynamics awards.
2248. Flying Squirrel Physiology,2.1
#You are or can transform into a flying squirrel, or a human-squirrel hybrid. Allows you to glide significant distances by stretching out the membrane between your limbs, useful for scaling trees and escaping ground-level threats.
2249. Focused Activity,3.2
#You can perform tasks that demand extreme concentration under any circumstance, such as meditating mid-brawl or solving complex equations during a car chase. Nothing short of direct injury can break your focus.
2250. Fog Vision,2.2
#Your eyes can see clearly through fog, mist, smoke, dust and any other vision-impairing clouds. Very dense clouds may still give you trouble, and this does not make the cloud any safer to breathe.
2251. Food Empowerment,3.3
#Eating food makes you stronger, faster and tougher, with the amount consumed determining the duration of the buff. Heavy eaters may unlock deeper affinities and even slow their own aging, though being poisoned is a real concern.
2252. Food Mimicry,4.0
#Your body is made of or can transform into food, including your blood, bones and organs. You can either retain your internal anatomy as an edible copy or become a homogeneous blob of matter. Try not to get eaten.
2253. Foot Mimicry,0.8
#Your body either is or can transform into a giant disembodied foot. Not exactly combat-viable, and functioning in polite society is going to be a challenge.
2254. Footwear Mimicry,0.6
#You can transform into a shoe. Yes, just a shoe. Boots and sandals too, if you prefer.
2255. Forbidden Knowledge,6.2
#You possess knowledge that mortals were never meant to know, whether scientific, magical or eldritch in nature. This knowledge grants you abilities far beyond human comprehension, but the price is steep: your sanity, your life, or worse, and beings that guard such secrets will come for you.
2256. Force Blood,5.1
#Your blood has the properties of a natural or unnatural force, flowing through your veins as both biological sustenance and raw power. This enhances your physical condition considerably and grants you force-based abilities tied to whatever force runs through you.
2257. Force Connection,6.5
#You have a deep physical, psychic and spiritual connection to a natural or unnatural force, giving you intuitive understanding of its every facet. This allows you to tap directly into its power without needing rituals or tools, though severing the connection would leave you hollow.
2258. Force Empowerment,4.0
#You grow stronger, faster and more durable when in contact with natural or unnatural forces, potentially unlocking new abilities and slowing your aging. The strength gained has a ceiling, and you may be limited to specific types of forces.
2259. Force Entity Physiology,6.8
#You are or can transform into a pure force entity, the living embodiment of a particular force or concept. You possess total control over your chosen force and can manipulate every aspect of it, though beings capable of absorbing or negating force energy can threaten you directly.
2260. Force Mimicry,5.4
#Your body is made of or can transform into natural and uncommon forces, fortifying your cells, bones and muscles with whatever force flows through you. In full force form you become homogeneous, harder to harm and empowered by your chosen force, though learning to control the body takes time.
2261. Force-Field Empowerment,3.6
#You grow stronger, faster and tougher when you come into contact with force-fields or are surrounded by them. Some users can even draw sustenance from them, slowing or halting aging, though Force-Field Penetration users can bypass the effect entirely.
2262. Forearm Blade,2.3
#You have or can extend a blade from your forearm, ready for stabbing and slashing at a moment's notice. A reliable concealed weapon, but blades can still be broken if they meet something tougher than they are.
2263. Foreign Chemical Immunity,3.2
#You are immune to the effects of drugs, gases, and other foreign chemicals entering your body. Unfortunately this also means medicine and anesthesia have no effect on you, so bring something to bite down on.
2264. Foreign Chemical Protection,2.3
#You are highly resistant but not immune to drugs, gases, and foreign chemicals. There is a limit to how much your body can take before effects start setting in, but you can weather doses that would drop a normal person.
2265. Foreign Symbiosis,6.1
#You have become the host to a foreign entity that lives inside or on your body, granting you enhanced condition and wrong-context abilities the likes of which this world has never seen. Be warned, the entity may try to take over your mind or body, and a powerful enough symbiote can harm or destroy its host.
2266. Forest Adaptation,3.3
#You are built to survive in forests and woodlands, with honed hunting and scavenging instincts, deep knowledge of local flora and fauna and a natural connection to the woods that lets you blend in and never get lost. You could live your entire life in the forest and never miss civilization.
2267. Form Embodiment,6.3
#Your body is the purest embodiment of form itself, the platonic ideal of physical perfection. Your every movement utilises physical energies to their absolute maximum, granting you incredible physical abilities that far outstrip those of lesser beings bound by imperfect flesh.
2268. Form Retention,5.7
#Your physical form is anchored to itself, no matter what is done to it. Attempts to manipulate, transform or even destroy your body slide off without consequence, your shape remaining exactly as it is in spite of all efforts against it.
2269. Form Transcendence,8.3
#You have transcended the very concept of form, both corporeal and incorporeal. You are like the wind, everywhere and nowhere at once, experienced only as a presence or feeling. You cannot be seen, heard, smelled, tasted or touched, existing entirely outside the idea of a body. Absolute Attacks may still reach you.
2270. Formlessness,6.8
#You possess no permanent form, ever shifting and changing, scattering and reforming at will. You can become anything you wish and shift out of the way of attacks before they can land, your body offering no fixed target for enemies to strike at.
2271. Formula Empowerment,4.1
#You grow stronger, faster and more durable when in contact with formulas, and may even unlock new abilities tied to the formula's nature. Sufficient exposure can sustain you in place of food and drink, or even slow your aging. Prolonged exposure may make the dependence addictive.
2272. Formula Mimicry,5.4
#Your body is made of or can transform into living formulae, flowing scientific scripts that harness supernatural forces. In your formula form you can channel science-based effects directly through your anatomy, though it takes time and practice to truly master your new body.
2273. Formula Power Link,4.5
#Your formulaic nature is linked directly to your other powers, letting the equations fuel, strengthen and refine them. As long as your formulaic core remains stable your abilities operate at peak efficiency. Instability in the formula leads to instability in everything it powers.
2274. Fortress Mimicry,5.8
#Your body is or can transform into a living fortress, with an interior spacious enough to store people, weapons, vehicles and defences that you can deploy at their full size. Your insides are a habitable environment for anyone you shelter there, and advanced mastery turns you into a walking stronghold.
2275. Fossil Mimicry,3.4
#Your body is made of or can transform into fossils, ancient mineralised remains preserved in stone. You gain the durability of fossilised material but are also subject to all the weaknesses thereof, which, unfortunately, includes being breakable.
2276. Fouke Monster Physiology,3.6
#You are or gain the traits of a Fouke Monster, a malevolent breed of sasquatch from the swamps of Boggy Creek. You are massive and imposing, covered in thick fur, with three fingers and toes, sharp fangs and a predatory nature that makes you a terror to livestock and humans alike.
2277. Four Symbols Empowerment,6.8
#Chinese Mythology - You are empowered by the Four Symbols: the Azure Dragon, Vermilion Bird, White Tiger and Black Tortoise. Your physical and supernatural abilities are massively enhanced and you gain minor affinities tied to each beast, drawing sustenance from their celestial energies. Your aging slows to a crawl as long as the Four Symbols exist somewhere in the cosmos to feed you.
2278. Foxfolk Physiology,3.3
#You are a foxfolk, a fox-like humanoid with sharp senses, natural agility, and a cunning edge to your instincts. You possess a tail (or tails), fur, and fox ears, and may have minor affinities for fox magic and illusion depending on your lineage.
2279. Frankensteinian Monster Physiology,4.5
#You are a Frankensteinian monster, a patchwork being sewn from dead flesh and animated by electric impulse. You possess immense physical strength and durability, do not need food or sleep, are resistant to electricity, and cannot truly die as long as your parts can be restitched. However, you may be slow, and your intelligence depends on the state of your borrowed brain.
2280. Fraud Embodiment,6.5
#You are the embodiment of fraud, deceit and trickery itself. You can warp the truth of another's words into a lie the moment they speak it, flawlessly become anyone you wish, and manipulate power structures through perfectly crafted deception. The cost is that you may become physically incapable of speaking a single true word.
2281. Fraud Empowerment,3.8
#You become stronger, faster and more durable fueled by fraud and deceit, whether your own lies or those told around you. The more dishonesty thrives in your vicinity the more powerful you become, drawing sustenance and slowed aging from every con and betrayal you witness or orchestrate.
2282. Free Will Manifestation,5.4
#You possess true free will, the ability to make choices free from fate, prophecy and destiny. You can defy predictions meant for you, break out of scripted roles, and forge your own path even in universes ruled by deterministic forces. Can be overridden by those with direct Free Will Manipulation.
2283. Freedom,8.6
#You are truly free. Laws, rules, fate, predestination, concepts and limits of every kind slide off you like water. At the baseline you simply act beyond societal and physical constraint, but at the upper levels you are liberated from causality itself, able to defy the fundamental logic of reality and move in directions the universe did not leave open.
2284. French Fry Mimicry,1.1
#Your body is entirely made of French fries. You can keep a humanoid form or collapse into a pile of homogeneous fries and reassemble. Your exact properties depend on what kind of fry you are (shoestring, curly, waffle, crinkle), and yes, you are edible.
2285. Friction Adaptation,2.6
#Your body automatically adapts to environments of high, low, or no friction. You can walk on ice without slipping, swim through thick sludge without drag, and shrug off the heat and wear that friction would normally inflict on you.
2286. Friction Immunity,3.9
#You are immune to all effects of friction, including air resistance, fluid drag, and the heat and static that friction generates. Does not protect against the same forces from unrelated sources, a flamethrower still burns.
2287. Friction Independence,3.5
#You can walk, move and grip things normally even in an environment with zero friction, as though the rules simply do not apply to you. In a frictionless vacuum where others would drift helplessly, you move as if on solid ground.
2288. Frictionless Maneuverability,3.2
#Your body moves as though friction barely applies to it, granting you inhuman maneuverability, turning on a dime, sliding through impossibly narrow gaps, and pivoting on one foot as if you weighed nothing.
2289. Frictionless Skin,3.4
#Your skin is perfectly frictionless, making you impossible to grab, hold, or pin down. Physical projectiles tend to glance off rather than strike true, and grapplers find themselves sliding helplessly off you. Non-physical attacks ignore this entirely.
2290. Friendship Empowerment,5.7
#You draw strength, speed and durability from your friendships with others, your existing powers amplified by every real bond you share. True close friendships may even slow your aging or unlock entirely new abilities tied to the affinity.
2291. Frill Protrusion,1.4
#You have or can generate decorative frills on your head or body, usable for display, intimidation, or whatever other purpose your biology allows. Mostly aesthetic.
2292. Frozen Time Activity,5.8
#You can move, attack, and act freely during frozen time, whether the time stop is your own or cast by someone else. You can even step on frozen air or water as solid ground, and forces like friction, gravity and momentum behave however best benefits you during the pause.
2293. Frozen Yogurt Mimicry,2.0
#Your body is made of or can transform into frozen yogurt, either anatomically faithful or as a homogeneous sweet mass. Vulnerable to fire and heat, and depending on the flavor you may find yourself unusually attractive to children.
2294. Fruit & Vegetable Empowerment,2.9
#You become stronger, faster and more durable whenever you come into contact with or consume fruits and vegetables, possibly unlocking further produce-related powers. May be limited to certain types, with others even weakening you.
2295. Fruit and Vegetable Mimicry,2.2
#Your body is made of fruits and vegetables, or can shift into them at will. Unfortunately you don't last very long, prone to rot, bruising, and the occasional hungry bystander.
2296. Fudakaeshi Physiology,3.3
#You are a Fudakaeshi, a malevolent yokai that exists to get protective Fuda charms removed from buildings. You cannot remove them yourself, so you must seduce, trick, or intimidate humans into doing it for you. Vulnerable to Shinto rituals and priests.
2297. Fukuro Mujina Physiology,3.0
#You are a Fukuro Mujina, a tsukumogami that appears to be a bag-carrying female badger yokai but is in truth a haunted bag taking that shape. You love puns, tricks, and pranks, but destroying your original bag destroys or gravely weakens you.
2298. Full Health Compensation,3.6
#As long as you are at full health, you become stronger, faster, tougher, and sharper across the board. The moment you take even a scratch, the boost fades entirely, so maintaining untouched condition is paramount.
2299. Funayurei Physiology,3.7
#You are a Funayurei, a malevolent ghost of the sea that sails spectral ships and drowns sailors to add them to an ever-growing spectral crew. You wield buckets to fill boats with seawater and can merge with others of your kind into a massive gestalt form. Vulnerable to Shinto rituals.
2300. Fundamental Forces Embodiment,8.4
#You are the fundamental forces of the universe made flesh - strong force, weak force, electromagnetism, and gravity all personified in you. You wield limitless control over them, the laws of physics bending around your every whim.
2301. Fundamental Forces Empowerment,4.6
#You grow stronger, faster, and tougher when in contact with fundamental forces. Standing in a magnetic field, near a strong gravity source, or in a nuclear environment can sustain you, unlock new abilities, and even slow your aging.
2302. Fundamental Forces Mimicry,6.3
#Your body is made of or can transform into the four fundamental forces, either remaining anatomically the same or becoming a homogeneous being of pure interactive force. In your nigh-form, the forces flow through your cells and fortify every inch of you.
2303. Fundamental Power Link,5.5
#Your powers are linked to the fundamental forces themselves, drawing from the unified field to fuel and strengthen them. This link amplifies everything you can do, but if the underlying force becomes unstable, so do you.
2304. Fungal Immunity,1.4
#You are completely immune to fungal infections of every kind, from athlete's foot to cordyceps to supernatural spore plagues. Does not protect against absorption-based or immunity-bypassing abilities.
2305. Fungal Physiology Superior,5.2
#Your body is composed of a superior strain of fungus, far beyond mundane mushrooms. You possess enhanced regeneration through mycelial growth, potent spores and resilience to most weaknesses of ordinary fungi, though you remain vulnerable to Fungus Manipulation.
2306. Fungal Physiology Transcendent,8.1
#You are a divine fungus that has ascended to true godhood, a mushroom deity whose mycelium stretches across the heavenly realms. Your spores can seed entire worlds and your decomposition can unmake gods. Vulnerable to Divine Slayer and Omnislayer weaponry.
2307. Fungal Physiology,3.9
#Your body is made of fungal matter, able to transform fully or partially into mushrooms and mold. You can produce poisons, hallucinogens and useful drugs from your own flesh, though you may be slowed and gain all the weaknesses of fungi.
2308. Fungal Symbiosis,4.5
#You host a living fungal symbiote within your body that grants you spore infestation, decomposition, shapeshifting and a more robust physique. The symbiote has its own will and may attempt to take over if mistreated or starved.
2309. Furaribi Physiology,4.5
#You are a furaribi, a bird-like yokai wrapped in flame that drifts aimlessly through the night. Your body bears the form of a bird with a face between a dog and the god Garuda, and you are kin to the hi-no-tama, the wandering soul-fires of the unquiet dead.
2310. Furniture Mimicry,2.4
#You can transform yourself into furniture of any shape, size or material, disguising yourself as an armchair, a bookcase or a four-poster bed. Unparalleled for ambushes, awkward social situations and hiding from authority figures.
2311. Furutsubaki no Rei Physiology,4.3
#You are a furutsubaki no rei, the spirit of an aged camellia tree that has separated from its host and gained the power to bewitch and trick humans. Your fate is bound to the original tree, and if it dies, so do you.
2312. Futakuchi-Onna Physiology,3.2
#You are a futakuchi-onna, a yokai woman with a hidden second mouth on the back of your head beneath prehensile hair. The mouth and hair can act with minds of their own, and the second mouth is ravenously hungry at all times, demanding to be fed.
2313. Future Embodiment,7.6
#You are the living embodiment of the future itself. You possess knowledge of every timeline yet to come, can peer into what will happen before anyone else, and can manipulate the course of the future without causing universal consequences.
2314. Fylgja Physiology,3.6
#You are a fylgja, a Norse spirit companion tied to a human's fate. You can take the form of an animal bound to someone's destiny, from noble birds of prey to carrion eaters, and your presence signals fortune or doom to those who can perceive you.
2315. G-Force Adaptation,2.8
#You are completely immune to the stresses and strains caused by g-force. You can accelerate, decelerate, or be flung around at speeds that would flatten a fighter pilot into pudding without so much as a nosebleed, making you an ideal passenger for anything that moves fast.
2316. Gag Embodiment,5.2
#You are the living embodiment of comedy, parody, and gags. You can transform into whatever joke or comedic relief fits the moment, and may even assume forms that grant you the powers of the characters you are currently parodying. Real World Enforcement and Gag Immunity are your greatest enemies.
2317. Gag Immunity,3.9
#You are utterly immune to gags, jokes, and comedic effects both direct and indirect. Slapstick physics bounces off you, cartoon anvils fall sideways, and joke-based powers simply fail to land, though you may also be incapable of finding anything funny.
2318. Galaxy Mimicry,7.8
#Your body is, or can become, a living galaxy. You retain sentience and can manipulate the cosmological matter and energy within yourself, and the lifeforms that inhabit you act as your immune system. Vulnerable to those who can destroy or manipulate galaxies outright.
2319. Galliform Physiology,2.2
#You are or can transform into a galliform bird, including turkeys, chickens, roosters, quail, pheasants, partridges and junglefowl. Hope you like scratching around in the dirt.
2320. Game Controller Mimicry,2.0
#You are or can transform your body into a game controller, or many game controllers. Your controller form retains your organs and sentience but is somewhat vulnerable to being dropped, stepped on, or chewed by dogs.
2321. Game Luck,3.6
#You are extraordinarily lucky in games. Dice roll your way, cards fall into your hand, loot drops land at your feet, and RNG bends toward you in any game you engage with. Doesn't make up for lack of skill, but it certainly helps.
2322. Gamma Capacitor,3.8
#Your body acts as a living battery for gamma radiation, absorbing and storing it indefinitely. You can channel the stored energy for any purpose you can formulate, from powering devices to unleashing it in raw bursts. The more you store the more you have to work with.
2323. Gamma Empowerment,3.5
#Your body grows stronger, faster and tougher in the presence of gamma radiation. In heavily irradiated areas you unlock enhanced abilities, can draw sustenance from the rays alone, and may even slow your aging to a crawl.
2324. Gamma Immunity,3.2
#You are immune to gamma radiation and all of its effects, from cellular damage to radiation sickness to burns. You could walk through the heart of Chernobyl without a second thought, though the blast of a nuke might still physically injure you.
2325. Gamma Mimicry,5.4
#Your body is made of or can transform into pure gamma radiation, letting you shift between solid physical form and formless irradiated energy. In your homogeneous form you are nearly untouchable by conventional means, but early on your control is dangerous and takes time to master.
2326. Gancanagh Physiology,4.3
#Irish Mythology - You are or can transform into a gancanagh, a male love-talker fairy whose skin carries an addictive toxin. Those you seduce become literally addicted to your touch, pining away in withdrawal or fighting to the death for your affection. You carry the charm of the fair folk but dislike smoke intensely.
2327. Gandharva Physiology,5.2
#Hindu Mythology - You are or can transform into a Gandharva, a male nature spirit and husband of the Apsaras. You possess supernatural musical skill capable of moving gods, partial animal traits of bird or horse, and you serve as a messenger between the divine and mortal realms. You are bound under the command of higher Hindu gods and cannot teach mortals the crafting of Soma.
2328. Garbage Empowerment,2.4
#You grow stronger, faster and more durable when near or using garbage, unlocking abilities tied to filth and refuse. In a landfill you approach superhuman levels, but in a pristine environment you are no better than an average human.
2329. Garbage Mimicry,2.8
#Your body is made of or can transform into garbage, letting you shift into a heap of refuse or a homogenous mass of trash. Useful for hiding in plain sight in alleyways or slumping into a dumpster to escape pursuit, though some users struggle to return to their original form.
2330. Garden Gnome Mimicry,1.7
#Your body is made of or can transform into a garden gnome. In your ceramic form you blend perfectly into any yard or flower bed and can wait motionlessly for days, but you are also quite fragile and vulnerable to both Object Manipulation and Gnome Manipulation users.
2331. Gargarean Physiology,3.8
#Greek Mythology - You are or can transform into a Gargarean, one of the all-male warriors of ancient legend. You possess the martial prowess, physical conditioning and battle-hardened resolve of a society bred purely for war.
2332. Gargoyle Physiology,4.6
#You are or can transform into a gargoyle, a winged humanoid with horns, fangs, claws and often a serpentine tail. You can turn yourself to living stone voluntarily or perch atop high terrain for days on end, warding off evil spirits by your very presence. Some gargoyles are petrified during the day and can only move at night.
2333. Garlic Mimicry,1.5
#Your body is made of or can transform into garlic, either retaining your anatomical form as a pungent bulb-person or dissolving into homogenous garlic matter. Excellent for warding off vampires, less useful for most other situations.
2334. Garuda Physiology,7.4
#Hindu Mythology - You are or can transform into a Garuda, the monstrously powerful demigod and companion of Vishnu whose sheer might eclipses Indra and his entire army. You possess a golden human body, an eagle's beak and wings large enough to block out the sun. You can change size at will, appear and disappear, and you carry an eternal antagonism toward the naga.
2335. Gas Defiance,3.6
#You ignore the physical resistance of gases like air, allowing you to move at supersonic speeds without generating friction heat or being battered by wind pressure. Does not extend to gravity or other forces.
2336. Gas Mimicry,4.6
#Your body is made of or can transform into gas at will. You retain your anatomy in gaseous form and remain somewhat vulnerable to attacks, and strong winds can blow you around. Being the least stable state of matter, prolonged use is exhausting.
2337. Gas Pump Mimicry,1.1
#You are or can transform into a gasoline pump. You may not be able to move from the spot and your inorganic body cannot heal, but at least drivers will appreciate you.
2338. Gaseous Current Defiance,2.2
#You ignore wind, turbulence and gas currents when moving, allowing you to walk through gales and fly through storms without being thrown around. Does not help against any other forces, and extremely thick winds can still slow you.
2339. Gaseous Movement,2.6
#You can move through any gas without resistance, walking through thick atmospheres or thin vacuums of other planets as easily as you walk on land. Does not grant immunity to the gas itself, so bring a helmet if it's poisonous.
2340. Gastropoda Physiology,2.1
#You are or can transform into a gastropod such as a slug, snail, limpet or nudibranch. Very likely slows you to a crawl and salt is a serious vulnerability, but at least you carry your home with you.
2341. Gearmite Mimicry,5.4
#Your body is composed of semi-sentient macro-robots that can restructure themselves into fabrications, breaking down raw materials to build tools, armor, or larger reinforced forms. Vulnerable to lightning, corrosion and magnetism.
2342. Gecko Physiology,2.1
#You are or can transform into a gecko, partially or fully. Grants wall-climbing, a detachable tail, and incredible grip, but you're still small and squishy.
2343. Gelatin Mimicry,2.9
#Your body is made entirely of gelatin, retaining the shape of your original form but with all the jiggly properties of the substance. You're somewhat vulnerable to ice, fire, and being eaten by hungry opponents.
2344. Gelatinous Body,3.6
#Your body has the properties of a gelatinous substance that you can reshape, stretch and compress at will. You are highly resistant to physical impacts as blows simply sink into your flesh, though unlike amorphous physiology you still retain a distinct form.
2345. Gemstone Mimicry,4.3
#Your body is composed of gemstone, retaining your original anatomy but crystallized. You are incredibly durable but the gem may shatter under heavy impact, and if knocked unconscious you may revert automatically.
2346. Gemstone Tears,2.3
#Your tears crystallize into gemstones and other valuable materials as they fall. The quality depends on the intensity of your emotion and the rarer gems only fall during genuine grief.
2347. Gender Anchoring,3.0
#You are immune to any alteration or change of your gender, regardless of the source. No spell, curse or cosmic force can shift what you are.
2348. Gender Force Empowerment,3.9
#You grow stronger, faster and more durable when exposed to gender forces matching your own, unlocking related abilities and amplifying existing ones. Extended exposure may even slow your aging.
2349. Gender Transcendence,5.0
#You transcend the concept of gender and sex entirely, having no definition or characteristics that bind you to any category. You can appear as any sexual being without inheriting their vulnerabilities, though you may be unable to reproduce sexually.
2350. Genelessness,6.2
#You possess no DNA or genetic information whatsoever, making you entirely immune to cellular, genetic and gene-based manipulations. Nothing can confirm or deny your existence through biological means, though Identity Manipulation and Omniscience can still find you.
2351. Generational Empowerment,5.4
#You grow stronger, faster and more durable with each passing generation of your lineage or chosen affinity, inheriting the accumulated power of those who came before. Your abilities compound over time and you may draw sustenance from the inheritance itself, possibly slowing your aging.
2352. Genesis Blood,4.6
#Your blood has the innate property of creating living creatures whenever it is shed. The stronger and purer your blood, the more impressive the creation, and you may sometimes birth things unintentionally from a simple nosebleed or paper cut.
2353. Genesis Tears,4.2
#Your tears are capable of creating life when they fall. Each tear can birth a creature, though you may have little control over what emerges, and it takes a long time before your tears regain their life-giving potency after a good cry.
2354. Genetic Consciousness,6.3
#Your mind, soul, and consciousness exist within every strand of your DNA rather than in your brain, rendering you immune to death by physical means as long as a single strand survives. You retain your full memories and personality through any regeneration, but you are still vulnerable to mental and conceptual attacks, and if you lack regeneration you may be stuck as a single strand of DNA.
2355. Superior Genie Physiology,6.7
#You are, or can transform into, a superior genie - the most powerful form of djinn. You possess greater skill and strength than lesser genies, along with resistance or complete immunity to many of their common weaknesses. Even if killed, you are strong enough to be reborn after a set period of time, and depending on your nature you may access demonic or holy abilities as well.
2356. Transcendent Genie Physiology,8.3
#You are, or can transform into, an all-powerful genie with unimaginable magical power. Your abilities dwarf those of lesser djinn and let you break the laws of both magic and nature, warping reality as you see fit. Your power may be bound to a lamp or phylactery with rules concerning its possessor, and you are vulnerable to divine slayers and omnislayers.
2357. Genie Physiology,5.6
#You possess the traits and abilities of genies, supernatural creatures of smokeless flame that occupy a world parallel to mankind. You may be a free-willed demon, a lesser angel, or something in between, with the classic array of wish-granting, shapeshifting, and mystical powers. Your body may be bound to a receptacle, and whoever holds it may have command over you.
2358. Genius Loci Physiology,6.2
#You are or can transform into a genius loci, the spirit of a place, whether that be a tower, a house, a hotel, a whole city, or at your most powerful, an entire planet. Your strength scales with the size and significance of the location you are tied to, and within your domain you are essentially a god. Your tether can be broken by Purification, Blessing or Curse Removal and Absolute Erasure.
2359. Genius Physiology,4.9
#You are or can transform into a genius, a spiritual being that follows a target from birth to death, encouraging them towards virtue or sin and recording their deeds. You are typically invisible and immaterial but can take physical form at will, and may dwell within your charge like a shoulder angel or devil. You may have to answer to a higher power.
2360. Genre Embodiment,6.6
#You embody a specific genre of art or literature, whether that be horror, romance, action, tragedy, or something more niche. You gain powers associated with your genre, and the narrative itself bends around you to reinforce its tropes - a horror embodiment makes the world grow darker and more dreadful, while an action embodiment turns every conflict into a high-octane setpiece.
2361. Geokinetic Immunity,3.3
#You are completely immune to earth and earthen effects. Landslides, stone projectiles, crushing boulders and being buried alive simply do not affect you. You walk through collapsing caves and quicksand as if nothing were happening.
2362. Geometric Physiology,6.4
#You are made of pure geometry, able to transform your body into any geometric shape from simple 2D triangles and squares to 3D polyhedrons, tesseracts and higher-dimensional forms. Your scale of power depends on how many dimensions you can manifest, with higher-dimensional forms capable of interacting with reality in ways ordinary beings cannot perceive.
2363. German Physiology,3.3
#Slavic Mythology - You are or can transform into a German, a male rain spirit. You have influence over rain and hail, able to bless fields with nourishing showers or curse lands with drought and downpour. Only males can take this form, and you may feel a persistent wanderlust and pull toward solitude.
2364. Gerridae Physiology,2.1
#Allows you to transform into a water strider or gain their traits. You can glide across the surface of water without sinking thanks to hydrophobic hairs on your legs, moving across ponds and lakes as if they were solid ground. Still vulnerable to pesticides and predators.
2365. Gestalt Mind,4.3
#Your mind is composed of multiple other minds woven together, either whole or in fragments, into a single functioning consciousness. You benefit from the combined knowledge, perspectives and intuitions of all components, making you incredibly adaptable and mentally resilient. However, you may inherit disorders or imbalances from your component minds, and internal conflicts are a real risk.
2366. Gestalt Soul,4.8
#Your soul is a patchwork composition of two or more other souls merged into a single essence. This grants you unusual spiritual resilience and a complex, layered existence that resists simple soul-based effects, but you are vulnerable to fission inducement and may unfuse upon death. Soul manipulation powers can target each constituent piece separately.
2367. Ghost Dog Physiology,3.4
#You are or can transform into a ghost dog, a spectral hound with all the instincts of a canine and the powers of a ghost. You can phase through walls, turn invisible, and haunt whoever wronged you in life. The longer you linger in the mortal realm, the more vengeful you may become.
2368. Ghost Monster Physiology,4.3
#You are or can transform into a ghost monster, a twisted beast fused with spectral power. You combine monstrous physical strength with ghost abilities such as intangibility, possession, and supernatural dread. Certain anti-spirit attacks can deal heavy damage against you.
2369. Ghost Physiology Superior,5.6
#You are a superior ghost, far stronger than a common apparition and armed with superpowers born from the circumstances of your death. Someone who perished in a blizzard might gain ice powers, someone who burned might wield fire. You are harder to banish, more intelligent, and your power may rival or exceed a ghost lord's. The longer you stay in the mortal realm, the more vengeful you become.
2370. Ghost Physiology Transcendent,8.1
#You are a transcendent ghost, a godly spectral being of terrifying power. Your paranormal abilities dwarf those of common ghosts, and you can command lesser spirits, reshape the boundary between the living and the dead, or outright destroy those concepts. You may be vulnerable to divine nullification and omnislaying weapons, but to all else you are a nightmare made manifest.
2371. Ghost Physiology,3.8
#You are or can transform into a ghost, a spirit of the dead bound to the mortal world until your unfinished business is resolved. You can fly, phase through solid matter, turn invisible, and possess the living. You cannot truly die since you are already dead, but resurrection may strip your powers and lingering too long can twist you into something vengeful.
2372. Ghost Shark Physiology,3.6
#You are or can transform into a ghost shark, a spectral predator of the deep. You combine the hunting instincts and lethal bite of a shark with ghostly intangibility, allowing you to swim through walls, ships, and even dry land as if it were open ocean.
2373. Giant Alien Physiology,5.3
#You are or can transform into a giant alien, an extraterrestrial lifeform of massive proportions. Given the near-infinite variety of possible extraterrestrials, your form can range from a towering humanoid to a kaiju-scale abomination with biology unlike anything on Earth. Your size makes you slow and an easy target, but makes up for it with raw overwhelming might.
2374. Giant Animal Physiology,3.9
#Allows you to transform into giant versions of animals, towering over their ordinary counterparts with proportionally greater strength and presence. Whether a dire wolf the size of a horse or an elephant the size of a house, your size makes you impossible to overlook or easily hide.
2375. Giant Ape Physiology,4.2
#Allows you to transform into a giant ape, partially or fully. In this form your strength, durability and raw mass are comparable to a King Kong-esque beast, able to toss cars and shrug off small arms fire.
2376. Giant Bird Physiology,4.0
#You are or can transform into a giant bird, think roc or thunderbird scale. You possess immense wingspan, talons capable of snatching livestock and humans, and the physical power to match your size.
2377. Giant Cat Physiology,4.0
#Allows you to transform into a giant feline, ranging from a saber-toothed size to full kaiju tigers. Your speed, agility and predatory instincts scale with your size, making you an apex predator in any form.
2378. Giant Divinity,7.8
#You wield the dark divine power of the titans and primordial giants, a form of raw divinity that places you among beings of myth. Your strength, authority and presence rival that of gods, and you can command lesser giants with ease. Only divinity nullification or dedicated giant slayers can truly threaten you.
2379. Giant Dragon Physiology,6.6
#Allows you to take the form of a gigantic, kaiju-scale dragon. Unlike a regular dragon your size is measured in city blocks, and your strength, breath weapon and durability scale accordingly. Your sheer size makes stealth impossible and you will be noticed from miles away.
2380. Giant Monster Physiology,6.0
#You are or can transform into a gigantic monster, a kaiju whose very appearance is an aberration of nature. Your immense endurance, strength and unique monstrous abilities make you a walking disaster, though most kaiju are not particularly bright and transformation may erode your sentience.
2381. Giant Physiology Superior,6.3
#You possess the traits of a superior giant, the kings, queens and chiefs of giant society. Your strength and presence command lesser giants naturally, and you rule through raw might. You still rank below true deities and can be clumsy enough to knock down buildings without meaning to.
2382. Giant Physiology Transcendent,7.9
#You are a giant of truly godlike scale, embodying aspects of nature or the cosmos and standing in opposition to order itself. Figures like Utgard-Loki or Ymir are your kin, and your power dwarfs that of mere giants. You can still be slain through divine means, and your size makes cities into hazards.
2383. Giant Physiology,4.3
#Allows you to transform into or are a classic giant, a humanoid of prodigious size, strength and endurance. You lack inherent supernatural abilities but your raw physicality is enormous. You must also eat a correspondingly enormous amount to sustain yourself.
2384. Giant Shark Physiology,4.5
