#You are or can transform into a giant shark, think megalodon scale. Your bite force, speed in the water and predatory senses are unmatched in the ocean, and you can swallow boats whole.
2385. Giant Snake Physiology,4.2
#Allows you to become or transform into a giant snake, ranging from anaconda-scale to full mythological world-serpent territory. Your constriction strength and venom potency scale accordingly.
2386. Giant Spider Physiology,4.4
#You are or can transform into a giant spider, a Shelob-class arachnid with corresponding venom, silk and predatory instincts. Your webs can stop trucks and your bite carries paralytic agents strong enough to drop large mammals.
2387. Giant Squid Physiology,4.1
#Allows you to become or transform into a giant squid or octopus, a leviathan of the deep. Your tentacles can crush ship hulls, your suckers leave scars on sperm whales, and you're fully at home at crushing depths.
2388. Giant Werebeast Physiology,6.1
#You can transform into a giant, kaiju-scale werebeast, a werekaiju drawing on superhuman life-force to fuel your monstrous form. Your strength, speed and sheer size make you a near unstoppable hybrid of werebeast and titan-class monster.
2389. Gigantes Physiology,6.9
#Greek Mythology - You are or can transform into a Gigantes, a semi-divine giant monster born from Gaia for the express purpose of destroying the Olympian gods. Your divine physical might is immense, but you can still be slain by the fire or electricity of the gods themselves.
2390. Gigantopithecus Physiology,3.6
#You are or can transform into a Gigantopithecus, the extinct giant ape of southeast Asia. You possess immense size, monstrous physical strength, and thick fur, with the raw power to tear apart most predators with your bare hands.
2391. Gigelorum Physiology,0.4
#Celtic Mythology - You are or can transform into a Gigelorum, the impossibly tiny insect of Scottish folklore said to live happily in the ear of a mite. Completely harmless and practically invisible without a microscope, you could maybe threaten a bacterium on a good day.
2392. Giraffe Physiology,2.4
#You are or can transform into a giraffid, fully or partially. As a giraffe, you possess an incredibly long neck, powerful legs with kicks strong enough to kill lions, and surprising speed for your size.
2393. Glaistig Physiology,4.3
#Celtic Mythology - You are or can transform into a Glaistig, the half-woman half-goat fairy of the Scottish Highlands. You possess supernatural beauty, shapeshifting between maiden, hag, and goat-hybrid forms, along with fairy magic, enhanced agility, and an unsettling allure that can lure mortals to lonely lochs.
2394. Glashtyn Physiology,4.2
#European Folklore - You are or can transform into a Glashtyn, the shapeshifting water-goblin of Manx folklore, taking horse, human, or hybrid form at will. You possess supernatural strength, aquatic affinity, and fairy magic, though cold iron, prayers, and the cry of a rooster will undo you.
2395. Glitch Physiology,6.2
#You are a living glitch, a paradoxical digital lifeform that was never meant to exist in the world you inhabit. Your existence breaks the rules the universe operates on, letting you clip through walls, duplicate yourself, skip entire events, and perform feats nobody else can, though stabilization effects threaten to erase you.
2396. Globster Physiology,1.4
#You are or can transform into a globster, one of those mysterious blob-like sea carcasses that wash up on beaches. You have no visible eyes, no defined head, and no apparent bone structure, and honestly most people who find you will assume you're a hoax or a dead whale.
2397. Glove Mimicry,1.6
#Your body is made of gloves or can transform into them at will. You retain your organs and shape but are somewhat vulnerable to fire and tearing. Strange but oddly flexible.
2398. Gluttony Empowerment,3.6
#The more you indulge, consume and gorge yourself, the stronger, faster and tougher you become. Witnessing or causing gluttony in others also feeds your power, and you may draw sustenance and longevity from the excess.
2399. Gnome Physiology,3.4
#You are or can transform into a gnome, a diminutive earth spirit of Renaissance alchemy. You can glide through earth and stone like water, dwell underground without issue, and have an innate connection to the elements of the earth.
2400. Goat Physiology,2.4
#You either are or can transform into a goat or ibex, either fully or partially. You gain incredible climbing ability, a tough headbutt, powerful legs for jumping across sheer cliffs, and the infamous goat stomach that can digest just about anything.
2401. Goblin Physiology Superior,4.8
#You are a superior goblin, far beyond the common trow in strength, toughness and cunning. Your physical abilities rival those of much larger monsters and you possess unique skills few other goblins can boast. The rapid growth of your power may drive you to arrogance or madness if unchecked.
2402. Goblin Physiology,2.6
#You are or can transform into a goblin, a small, ugly, mischievous creature of folklore. You are weak and fragile compared to most monsters, but clever, cunning and a natural trap-maker. Best used in groups.
2403. Gold Empowerment,3.3
#You become stronger, faster and more durable when near or in contact with gold, and may draw sustenance or extended life from it. The more gold you hoard the more powerful you become, but beware - the greed for both gold and power can become all consuming.
2404. Gold Mimicry,4.2
#Your body is made of or can transform into gold. You gain the metal's malleability, ductility, resistance to corrosion and conductivity of electricity. Beautiful and hard to damage by conventional means, but you reflect light brightly, weigh a ton and can dissolve in mercury.
2405. Gold-Digging Ant Physiology,3.1
#You are or can transform into a Gold-Digging Ant of medieval bestiaries, a fox-sized furry insect that tunnels through the earth and unearths gold as it digs. You gain powerful burrowing ability, an innate sense for precious metals, and the surprising docility of the creature. Still mortal and vulnerable to anything that would kill a regular giant ant.
2406. Golden Luck,5.7
#You are a blessed recipient of passive, fate-based fortune in regard to wealth. Reality subtly twists around you so money is never an issue - a winning lottery ticket blows into your hand, a stranger leaves you their estate, investments somehow always pay off. Not an active skill, but an unending tide of monetary luck that follows wherever you go.
2407. Golem Physiology,4.7
#You are or can transform into a golem, an animated construct of clay, stone, metal, or other materials of your choosing. You have no need to eat, sleep or breathe, and your body does not tire. However, you cannot heal naturally and must be repaired with the substance of your body, and you may struggle in environments hostile to your material.
2408. Goo Trail,0.6
#Wherever you walk, you leave behind a trail of gooey, slimy residue. Great for ruining carpets, mildly inconvenient for stealth.
2409. Good Empowerment,3.3
#You grow stronger, faster, and more durable in the presence of goodness, benevolence, and righteous intent. A hero's sanctuary is your playground, but a cruel battlefield or nihilistic void may leave you powerless.
2410. Good Immunity,3.8
#You are utterly immune to anything classified as good. Healing miracles, holy blessings, heroic influence and benevolent magics all slide off you harmlessly. Cannot be used by genuinely good beings, and neutral phenomena still affect you normally.
2411. Good Improvement,4.3
#Every benevolent act you commit gradually refines your body, mind and soul into something purer and brighter. Left unchecked, you may eventually ascend into an angel or similar positive-aligned being, gaining supernatural abilities along the way. Corruption-based powers can reverse the process.
2412. Gorgon Physiology,5.2
#Greek Mythology - You are or can transform into a Gorgon, the dreaded serpentine terror of myth. Your hair is a nest of living venomous snakes, your gaze can petrify those who meet it, and your scaly skin is nigh impenetrable to ordinary weapons. Your full power awakens only when you shed your skin, and you may not be immune to your own petrifying stare.
2413. Gorilla Monster Physiology,4.8
#You are or can transform into a monstrous gorilla, a hulking brute well beyond the size and strength of any natural ape. Your power is raw, terrifying, and immediately recognized as inhuman. Monster Slayers may have an edge over you.
2414. Gorilla Physiology Superior,4.3
#You are or can become a gorilla pushed well beyond what nature allows, with strength, durability and primal ferocity that make ordinary silverbacks look like housecats.
2415. Gorilla Physiology,3.0
#You are or can transform into a gorilla, gaining the immense strength, durability and agility of the great ape. Your dense musculature makes you a powerhouse in close combat but a terrible swimmer.
2416. Goryo Physiology,5.7
#You are or can become a Goryo, the vengeful spirit of a noble or battle master who died in agony. You cannot be killed by conventional means and bring ruin to your enemies through curses, plagues, fires, storms and disasters. Only specific rituals and prayers, especially those of a Shinto priest or shrine maiden, can pacify or harm you.
2417. Grape Mimicry,2.4
#You are made of grapes, or can transform your body into one or many grapes of your preferred variety. Your grape form may be anatomically intact or a homogeneous cluster, and is vulnerable to being crushed, squeezed, or, unfortunately, eaten.
2418. Grapefruit Mimicry,1.4
#Your body is made of grapefruit or can transform into one partially or fully. You can reshape yourself into homogeneous citrus matter to avoid vital hits, but you are very much edible and a knife still works on fruit.
2419. Grass Physiology,2.4
#Your body is made of grass or can transform into it partially or fully. You can go homogeneous to avoid fatal blows, but limbs can still be torn off like pulling up turf, and you need earth or water nearby to stay healthy.
2420. Gravitation Adaptation,2.8
#Your body instinctively adapts to any gravitational environment, from crushing high-g to complete weightlessness, with no adverse effects on your movement, reflexes or physiology. Does not protect you from the tidal forces of a black hole though.
2421. Gravitational Maneuverability,3.3
#Your body moves as if gravity simply does not apply to it, performing feats of acrobatics that would be impossible under any normal g-force. Works just as well against anti-gravity, though your reflexes still have to keep up with what your body can now do.
2423. Gravity Embodiment,9.0
#You embody and personify gravity itself. You possess absolute, limitless knowledge and control over gravity in all its forms, and in some cases you are the very source from which all gravity in existence derives. To resist your pull is to resist being itself.
2424. Gravity Empowerment,3.4
#You become stronger, faster and more durable when in contact with gravity or gravitational energy, potentially unlocking further gravity-related abilities. You may even draw sustenance from heavy gravity fields, slowing your aging.
2425. Gravity Immunity,3.0
#Your body is immune to gravitational stresses and strains. You can move normally in both crushing high gravity and weightless low gravity, though you cannot superhumanly leverage the change to jump higher or move faster.
2426. Gravity Independence,3.6
#You can operate and function normally regardless of whether there is any gravity at all. In a zero-gravity environment where others would drift helplessly or even disintegrate into subatomic particles, you walk, move and live as if the ground beneath you were solid.
2427. Gravity Mimicry,5.6
#Your body is composed of or can transform into pure gravitational force. In your fully formed state you are a homogeneous being of gravity, while in hybrid forms the gravity flows through your cells, bones and muscles, fortifying your body to inhuman levels.
2428. Gravity Soul,5.3
#Your soul is made out of gravity itself. You can manifest it outside your body to act independently, or channel its gravitational effects into concussive blasts and crushing waves. A soul of pure weight is both a weapon and a tether.
2429. Gravity Symbiosis,5.1
#You are symbiotically linked to a gravitational entity, granting you potent gravity-based abilities through the bond. As with all symbiosis, there is a price, and the entity within you may one day try to take the wheel.
2430. Greater Damage Effectiveness,3.2
#You inflict greater damage against certain types of creatures or entities, be it based on their element, physiology, personality or environment. A specialist's edge. Useless against anything outside of your chosen type.
2431. Greater Divinity,9.3
#You possess greater divinity and nearly all divine powers, granting you immense amounts of power far beyond the mundane. You are an advanced divine being by nature, standing above other gods and very close to omnipotence within your respective universe and beyond.
2432. Greater Immunity,8.6
#You are completely immune to anything stronger than you, whether directly or indirectly. A god hurling a star at you does nothing, but a regular human with a kitchen knife is still a very real threat. Scales with your own power, the stronger you become the more things become beneath your notice.
2433. Greed Empowerment,3.3
#You grow stronger, faster, and tougher from greed, both your own and that of others around you. The more avaricious the setting, the more powerful you become. You may even draw sustenance from pure greed, forgoing food and sleep when the hunger around you is thick enough.
2434. Green Fire Mimicry,4.9
#Your body is made of or can transform into green fire, carrying all the mystical properties of underworld flames. In full form you are a being of emerald flame, vulnerable to water and cold but capable of burning through defenses that would stop ordinary fire. Takes time to master fully.
2435. Gremlin Physiology,3.8
#You are or can transform into a gremlin, a mischievous creature with an insane curiosity about machines and a compulsion to tear them apart. You possess an intuitive understanding of mechanical devices, able to dismantle or sabotage machinery with unnerving ease, and planes especially just seem to fall apart around you.
2436. Grey Physiology,4.5
#You are or can transform into a Grey, the classic extraterrestrial with the oversized head and enormous black eyes. You possess a brilliant mind suited for technology and psionic abilities, though your body is physically frail. You have an instinctive affinity for advanced alien tech and telepathic manipulation, but a strong human could snap you in half.
2437. Grid Mimicry,4.2
#You are or can transform into wireframe graphics, becoming a being of pure geometric lines and vertices. In this form you can shapeshift into other wireframe objects and beings, though you become vulnerable to computer viruses and digital threats that would mean nothing to flesh.
2438. Griffin Physiology,4.6
#You are or can transform into a griffin, the legendary beast with the body of a lion and the head and wings of an eagle. You possess incredible physical strength, razor-sharp talons and beak, and the ability to fly with lion-like power and eagle-like grace. Griffins are traditionally associated with guarding treasure and royalty, and you'll find your instincts tilt that way.
2439. Grim Reaper Physiology,7.4
#You are a Grim Reaper, a psychopomp whose duty is to guide the souls of the recently dead to the afterlife. You can perceive souls, sever them from bodies with your scythe, and travel freely between the world of the living and the realm of the dead. The dying can see you even when others cannot.
2440. Groac'h Physiology,5.2
#Breton Folklore - You are a Groac'h, an ancient water-hag of the Breton coast. You can appear as either a horrifically ugly crone or a stunning beauty at will, you have potent fairy magic tied to seawater and tidepools, and you can transmute men into fish or stones with a touch. Cold iron and prayers wound you as they would any fey thing.
2441. Ground Mimicry,4.6
#Your body is made of ground and you can transform between regular flesh and various forms of earth at will, whether soil, stone, concrete, or sand. In full transformation you become a homogeneous mass that cannot be wounded conventionally. Be careful, turning back from a pile of gravel takes practice.
2442. Group Empowerment,6.9
#You are the living avatar of a group, drawing power directly from the collective strength, will, and abilities of the people within it. The larger and more unified your group, the stronger you become. A lone soldier with this trait could fight an army if they represent a nation that stands behind them, and the group need not even know they are granting you their power.
2443. Guardian Force Empowerment,4.9
#You grow stronger, faster, and more durable whenever you come into contact with guardian forces, and you may unlock new abilities tied to them. Some users even slow their aging or sustain themselves directly from the forces. You must hold a guardianship status for the empowerment to trigger.
2444. Guardian Power Link,5.1
#Your guardianship status is directly linked to your powers, with the aspect of being a guardian fueling and strengthening everything you do. As long as you remain a true guardian, your abilities grow stronger and more refined. If you ever abandon or lose your guardianship, the powers vanish with it, and an unstable guardianship can cause them to rage out of control.
2445. Guilt Embodiment,6.3
#You are the physical manifestation of guilt, either your own or others', and your very existence demands punishment and judgment for wrongs committed. You can mete out supreme judgment on the guilty and your presence alone forces the wicked to confront their crimes.
2446. Guitar Mimicry,2.0
#You are or can transform into a guitar, becoming the instrument in full. In this form you may struggle to move on your own, but you make for one incredible conversation piece.
2447. Gum Mimicry,3.0
#Your body is made of chewing gum, or you can transform into it, stretching, sticking, and deforming while retaining your shape. You are immune to most physical trauma due to your elasticity, but dust, sand, or powder can rob you of your adhesive properties.
2448. Gumball Machine Mimicry,1.8
#You can transform into a gumball machine, dispensing colorful candy for a small fee. Your glass head is fragile and can be broken, but at least you'll be the most popular party guest in town.
2449. Gummi Mimicry,2.9
#You are or can transform into gummi candy, becoming soft, chewy, and colorful. You are vulnerable to fire and heat which will melt you, and cold can make you brittle and easy to shatter.
2450. Gummy Bear Mimicry,2.5
#You can transform into a gummy bear or swarm of gummy bears, with all organs intact but made entirely of chewy sugary goodness. The main drawback is obvious - you can be eaten.
2451. Gun Mimicry,3.3
#Your body is made of guns or can transform into them, with every part of you capable of firing rounds at will. Your form may be limited to a specific type of firearm depending on your nature, and returning to your original body may not always be possible.
2452. Gun Symbiosis,5.2
#You are symbiotically bonded with a living gun, a sentient non-biological entity that grants you supernatural powers based on its nature. The stronger the gun entity, the stronger the abilities it grants, but powerful entities may attempt to take over your mind or body if your will is not strong enough.
2453. Gyochu Physiology,3.6
#You are or can transform into a Gyochu, a tiny six-armed yokai that resides in the reproductive organs of those who break the sacred tradition of Koshin night. You collect information on the sins and evil deeds of your host and can leave their body on each Koshin night to report them to the gods. Vulnerable to Shinto rituals and prayers.
2454. Gyukan Physiology,2.7
#You are or can transform into a Gyukan, a microscopic yokai resembling a tiny horned bull that infects the lungs of children and causes distemper and irritability. You can sense food entering a victim's throat and squirm around to make them faint. Vulnerable to acupuncture and Shinto rituals.
2455. Habitable Anatomy,4.5
#Your internal anatomy is remarkably spacious and capable of housing other beings, creatures, or even structures inside you for extended periods of time. Your insides may be larger than your outside, and with training you can provide a habitable environment to your tenants. Untrained users may not even realize there are people living inside them.
2456. Hachishaku-sama Physiology,5.4
#You are or can transform into Hachishaku-sama, an eight foot tall spirit from Japanese folklore who stalks children for days or months before spiriting them away to absorb their vital energy. You appear as a tall woman in a white dress and wide-brimmed hat, your voice shifting between sweet and masculine. You are bound to specific zones and are weak against sacred objects and rituals.
2457. Hafgufa Physiology,5.4
#Norse Mythology - You are or can transform into a Hafgufa, the colossal sea beast said to lurk in the waters between Iceland and Helluland. In full form your bulk rivals an island and you can swallow entire ships, shoals and whales in a single gulp.
2458. Hag Physiology,5.6
#You are or can transform into a hag, a wizened crone of the wild places. You possess deep knowledge of occult and arcane matters, command primal forces of winter and barren lands, and your wisdom is sought even as your malevolence is feared. Vulnerable to anti-magic and trained supernatural hunters.
2459. Hahakigami Physiology,3.0
#You are or can transform into a Hahakigami, a broom tsukumogami venerated as a charm for safe childbirth. You can sweep negative energy and bad spirits out of any room and purify tainted spaces with a single pass.
2460. Haimushi Physiology,2.6
#You are or can transform into a Haimushi, a microscopic yokai resembling a tiny monstrous moth that nests in victims' lungs. You can infect others with lung-borne sickness but if you stray too far from your host and get lost, you will burst into flame and burn away.
2461. Hainu Physiology,3.6
#You are or can transform into a Hainu, a winged dog yokai of Kyūshū legend. You possess ferocious predatory instincts, powerful jaws and the ability to take to the air on great canine wings, equally fit as a terror of villages or a loyal hound of warlords.
2462. Hair Color Shifting,1.1
#You can freely shift the colour of your own hair for disguise or expression. If the effect is tied to your emotions, reading your moods becomes embarrassingly easy.
2463. Hair Empowerment,3.2
#You grow stronger, faster and tougher the longer and more abundant your hair is, and contact with the hair of others can further fuel you. Shearing your hair strips you of the boost.
2464. Hair Mimicry,4.0
#Your body is, or can become, composed entirely of hair. In this form you retain your shape and organs but gain the flexibility and resilience of dense keratin, though flames and shears remain distinct concerns.
2465. Hair Regrowth,1.6
#Your hair grows back at supernatural speeds, regenerating fully within seconds or minutes after being cut, shaved or burned. A godsend for bad haircuts, less so for anything else.
2466. Hair Symbiosis,4.6
#You host a hair-based entity within your body, usually anchored to a follicle-rich area, which grants you hair-based offensive, defensive and binding abilities. As with any symbiosis, the being has its own will and weaknesses that may become your own, and in moments of weakness it may attempt to take full control.
2467. Haishaku Physiology,3.1
#You are or can transform into a Haishaku, a microscopic cloud-shaped yokai that infects victims through the armpit and settles into their lungs. Your touch causes skin to become abnormally pale and smooth, breeds unshakable depression, and leaves victims unable to tolerate any scent except raw fish. Gentle acupuncture and Shinto rites are your undoing.
2468. Half-Alien Physiology,4.5
#You are a half-alien, a hybrid between humanity and some extraterrestrial race. Your physical and mental traits are drawn from your alien parent, potentially granting you abilities and resilience beyond what either parent alone could achieve, though you may inherit their weaknesses as well.
2469. Half-Animal Physiology,3.7
#You are a half-animal, either born of such a union or created through genetic experimentation, granting you animalistic traits and abilities while retaining full human sentience and free will. The specific powers depend entirely on what animal you are half of.
2470. Half-Giant Physiology,4.2
#You are a half-giant, a humanoid born from the union of giant-kin with another race, granting you immense size, strength, and durability beyond what any ordinary human could achieve. You are still smaller and weaker than a true giant and may draw the same slayers who hunt your larger kin.
2471. Half-Mon Physiology,4.3
#You are a half-mon, a being with both human and mon heritage, whether natural or engineered. You carry the elemental traits and combat instincts of your mon half while retaining your human mind, and the specific powers depend on which species runs in your blood.
2472. Half-Mutant Physiology,4.6
#You are a half-mutant, half of your DNA remaining untouched while the other half has been warped into something new. Unlike full mutants, you retain your consciousness and rationality while wielding your mutations with full intent, making you considerably more dangerous than your fully-mutated kin.
2473. Half-Plant Physiology,3.9
#You are a half-plant, born through a union of flora and flesh or created by genetic experimentation, granting you plant-based abilities while retaining the mobility, sentience, and free will of a human. Your specific powers depend on what species of plant runs through your veins.
2474. Half-Spirit Physiology,5.5
#You are a hybrid of solid matter and some spectral being, whether a ghost, wraith, angel, demon, or poltergeist. As a half-spirit you possess powers that transcend both the physical and the spiritual planes, and the strength of your abilities depends on how well your dual heritage has mixed within you.
2475. Half-Zombie Physiology,3.8
#You are a half-zombie, partially infected with the zombie virus but not fully consumed by it. You retain some degree of cognition and humanity while bearing pale, decaying flesh and a gnawing craving for human meat, locked in a constant struggle to keep your mind your own.
2476. Halfling Physiology,2.2
#DnD - You are or can transform into a halfling, a humanoid roughly half the height of a human but otherwise proportionately similar. Nimble-footed, surprisingly hardy, and with an undying fondness for a second breakfast.
2477. Hallucinogenic Anatomy,3.5
#Your body is made of or produces hallucinogenic substances, inducing vivid trips in anyone who ingests, injects, or touches your secretions. With training you may direct the hallucinations themselves, though uncontrolled exposure may affect you just as easily.
2478. Hamadryad Physiology,5.4
#You are a Hamadryad, a minor tree goddess bound to a specific tree. You cannot stray far from your tree and if it dies, you die with it, but in exchange you possess divine beauty and the full wrath of the gods protects you; any who harm you invite curses from on high. Your tree and body regenerate from almost any damage as long as the other lives.
2479. Hamburger Mimicry,1.6
#Your body is made of hamburger or you can freely transform into one. You can reshape and reform yourself but you are also, unavoidably, edible.
2480. Hamburger Monster Physiology,2.8
#You are or can transform into a hamburger monster, a grotesque patty-fleshed beast with enhanced physical stats and an appetite to match. You are still, unfortunately, made of hamburger and can be eaten by anything big enough.
2481. Hammer Mimicry,2.3
#Your body is made of hammers or you can transform into one. Depending on what your hammers are made of, your durability and offensive potential vary wildly, but getting swung by an ally is a whole new way to travel.
2482. Hamster Physiology,1.7
#You are or can transform into a hamster, partially or fully. You gain a hamster's agility, cheek pouches and adorable demeanor, but being a small rodent comes with all the usual vulnerabilities.
2483. Hand Mimicry,2.0
#You are or can transform into a hand of any shape or size. If you become purely a hand, you may need a friend to carry you around, though you still retain your senses and awareness.
2484. Hang Glider Mimicry,1.2
#You are or can transform into a hang glider. You can soar on the wind for hours but you may need a rider to actually steer you anywhere useful, and strong gusts can send you tumbling.
2485. Haniwa Mimicry,3.9
#You are or can transform into a haniwa, a clay idol from ancient Japan used to guard the graves of the dead. As a haniwa, you are semi-immortal, capable of hosting the spirits of the deceased within your form and warding off evil spirits and demons. Your clay body is durable but can be shattered by sufficient force.
2486. Hantu Air Physiology,4.3
#You are or can become a Hantu Air, a water spirit from Malaysian folklore that inhabits any body of water from vast rivers to small puddles. You are invisible to normal humans, can possess and manipulate any water you inhabit, and can drown targets from a distance. You can only fully manifest while in water and are vulnerable to the rituals of local shamans.
2487. Hanyo Physiology,3.6
#InuYasha - You are a half-yokai, possessing the physical prowess and supernatural traits of your yokai parent while retaining your human heart. You are stronger, faster and tougher than any human, with minor regeneration and sharper senses, but you may still carry the weaknesses of your yokai bloodline.
2488. Happiness Embodiment,6.5
#You are the living embodiment of happiness itself. Your very presence radiates joy, you grow stronger the more bliss there is around you, and your powers, personality and form all reflect the concept of happiness. Sadness, however, can weaken or even kill you.
2489. Hare Physiology,2.1
#You possess the traits of a hare or can transform into one. You are incredibly swift, with powerful hind legs capable of explosive leaps and kicks, excellent hearing, and sharp senses to help you evade predators.
2490. Harionago Physiology,4.3
#You are a Harionago, a man-eating yokai appearing as a beautiful long-haired woman whose every strand ends in a cruel barbed hook. You can freely animate your hair to ensnare, tear apart and devour victims. Like most yokai, you are vulnerable to certain prayers and rituals.
2491. Harmony Embodiment,7.0
#You are the living personification of harmony itself, the concept of beings coexisting peacefully with each other and with nature. Your presence soothes strife, your word can still a battlefield, and the natural world aligns itself to your state of being. The scope of the concept is a heavy burden on mortal minds.
2492. Harpy Physiology,3.8
#Greek Mythology - You are a harpy, a winged woman-bird from Greek myth who punished mortals for their misdeeds. You possess powerful talons, sharp beak or teeth, and wings that let you dive at prey, and you personify the violent storm-winds of the sea.
2493. Harshland Adaptation,3.5
#You are adapted to survive the world's harshest environments, be it scorching deserts, frozen tundras, toxic swamps or crushing ocean trenches. You are tougher and stronger than those born in gentler climates, with sharp survival instincts honed by unforgiving terrain.
2494. Hashika Doji Physiology,5.0
#You are a Hashika Doji, a demonic giant of Japanese folklore who embodies a measles outbreak. You tower over ordinary humans, radiating contagious disease that sickens and overwhelms any who oppose you. You are vulnerable to the rites of shrine maidens and Shinto priests.
2495. Hatred Embodiment,7.4
#You are the physical embodiment of hatred itself, drawing endless power and even lifespan from the hate of yourself and others. As long as hatred exists in the world, you cannot truly die, but being stripped of hate or opposed by embodiments of love can weaken you severely.
2496. Hawk Physiology,2.8
#Allows you to transform into a hawk or a hawk-human hybrid form. You gain incredible eyesight, flight, and sharp talons capable of snatching prey mid-air, though in full hawk form your size and strength are limited.
2497. Head Liberation,3.0
#You can live with your head fully separated from your body, able to remove and reattach it at will or even swap it out for something else. Losing track of your detached head is a very real danger, and damage to the head itself can still kill you.
2498. Head Mimicry,1.6
#You are or can transform into a disembodied floating head with no body attached. You can drift about freely but good luck picking anything up or opening a door.
2499. Healing Blood,4.5
#Your blood is heavily enriched with regenerative properties, keeping you in peak health as long as it flows within you. Transfusing it to others boosts their own healing, and in large enough doses may permanently grant them regeneration, though giving too much at once will weaken you severely.
2500. Healing Bodily Fluids,3.2
#Your bodily fluids - blood, saliva, sweat, and the rest - carry regenerative properties that can be passed on through contact. A drop of spit can close a wound, a smear of blood can cure a fever. Potency scales with the severity of the fluid involved.
2501. Healing Empowerment,4.1
#You grow stronger, faster and more durable with every wound you mend. Healing others feeds you as surely as food would, and with enough patients on your table, you can slow or even stop your own aging.
2502. Healing Flesh,2.9
#Your flesh carries regenerative properties and heals anyone who eats it. Effective, though it requires you to carve off a chunk of yourself each time someone needs help, which makes you a somewhat uncomfortable dinner companion.
2503. Healing Immunity,1.6
#You are immune to all forms of healing. No spell, potion, or restorative power can mend your wounds, which is an extraordinarily niche advantage only occasionally useful and very often a death sentence.
2504. Healing Luck,4.5
#Luck bends in your favor whenever health is on the line. Dire prognoses turn into miraculous recoveries, infections fail to take hold, and any fight for survival tips its odds your way. You may live an almost absurdly healthy life without lifting a finger.
2505. Healing Power Embodiment,5.7
#Your body is made entirely of healing energy, either mimicking your original form or as a homogenous luminous mass. Every cell of you hums with restorative power, fortifying your physical frame while letting you pour yourself into wounds that need mending.
2506. Healing Saliva,2.1
#Your spit can close open wounds and restore minor injuries. Effective on cuts, scrapes and surface damage, but it dries quickly and can't reach anything coursing through the body itself.
2507. Healing Sleep,3.1
#Your sleep regenerates your body, closing wounds and restoring stamina while you rest. Unlike Healing Coma, you are fully asleep - vulnerable, and only able to heal as fast as the damage is dealt, but at least you'll wake up in the morning.
2508. Health Ailment Immunity,5.2
#You are immune to all medical ailments, from diseases and disorders to birth defects and hereditary illnesses. If you acquired this after birth, it retroactively purges every existing ailment, leaving you in optimal physical, mental, and genetic health. Doesn't protect you from trauma or supernatural attacks.
2509. Health Point Meter,3.2
#(Game) You have a literal HP meter floating over you that ticks down when you're hurt and regenerates over time or via healing items. As long as your bar isn't empty you're fine, but the moment it hits zero your life is forfeit regardless of what the damage actually was.
2510. Absolute Health,8.9
#You are the absolute pinnacle of physical, mental, spiritual, emotional, and sexual health of your entire universe. You are immune to all disorders, diseases, and disabilities, and your health is so pristine it borders on invulnerability - only equal or superior forces can even hope to harm you.
2511. Enhanced Health,3.3
#Your health and condition are beyond the max of your species. Every part of your body inside and out is in first-rate shape, and you can eat absurd amounts while maintaining your physique. You recover faster, get sick less, and can take significantly more damage than a normal human before going down.
2512. Supernatural Health,4.7
#Your health is glaringly, supernaturally superior to others in your universe. You are immune to diseases, disorders and disabilities, can soak up absurd amounts of damage before fainting, and your metabolic rate is pushed well beyond human limits. Still vulnerable to poison and disease generation powers.
2513. Peak Human Health,2.3
#Your physical, mental, and emotional health are at the absolute peak of what a human can achieve. You almost never get sick, recover faster than normal, and have the constitution of an Olympic athlete - but you're still mortal like everyone else.
2514. Absolute Hearing,8.4
#You can hear everything - every sound in the world, the galaxy, the entire universe, even the thoughts of anyone and everyone and sounds from the past and future. Most importantly, you can filter this infinite input to perfect precision, so you are never forced to hear it all at once.
2515. Enhanced Hearing,2.8
#Your hearing is enhanced far beyond the human limit, letting you pick up sounds from miles away and hear frequencies normal ears can't. Your ears come with natural protection against overload, and you can pick apart multiple layers of sound in a crowded city.
2516. Supernatural Hearing,4.4
#Your sense of hearing is glaringly supernatural, letting you hear across incredible distances, pick up impossibly quiet sounds, and register frequencies far outside the normal range. Advanced users can even hear individual atoms moving, or the activity of spirits and immaterial beings.
2517. Peak Human Hearing,2.1
#Your hearing is pushed to the absolute peak of human perfection. You can pick up a watch ticking from 100 feet away, hear clearly through thick brick walls, and catch sounds from a mile off in complete silence. Still vulnerable to sensory overload.
2518. Heart Entity Physiology,4.4
#You are an entity entirely made of one or more hearts, or your body is a living manifestation of your own heart. Being all heart makes you incredibly sensitive and vulnerable, but deeply tied to the symbolic power of the cardiovascular core.
2519. Heartlessness,3.4
#You lack a physical heart entirely. Your body sustains itself through alternative biology, magic, or sheer stubbornness, and any power that relies on stopping, manipulating, or detecting a heart simply has nothing to grab onto. A surprising number of cardiac assassins will be very confused by you.
2520. Heat Capacitor,3.7
#Your body is a living thermal battery, capable of absorbing heat and storing it indefinitely for later release. You can channel the stored charge for any purpose you can formulate, from powering abilities to dumping it all in one devastating discharge.
2521. Heat Embodiment,6.5
#You are the embodiment of heat itself, the living personification of rising temperature in your reality. You have near limitless control over heat and anything conceptually tied to it, and your authority over thermal phenomena is absolute. Cold still bothers you though, it is the one thing that can bring you low.
2522. Heat Empowerment,3.3
#Contact with heat makes you stronger, faster, and tougher, potentially unlocking latent abilities tied to the element. The hotter the environment, the sharper you become, and some users draw sustenance from heat directly or slow their aging in its presence. Cold saps you.
2523. Heat Immunity,3.6
#Heat does nothing to you. Volcanoes feel like saunas, deserts feel like mild afternoons, and heatstroke and dehydration are concepts that no longer apply. You may still be vulnerable to cold and primordial flames.
2524. Heat Mimicry,5.2
#Your body is made of heat or can transform into it at will, with your heat form retaining your shape and flowing through your cells to reinforce your flesh and bones. In full form you can shift between solid and homogeneous heat, though energy drain attacks become devastatingly effective on you.
2525. Heat Resistance,2.3
#Your body shrugs off extreme temperatures that would normally blister and burn. Not full immunity, but you can walk through a house fire, handle molten metal briefly, or work near a forge all day without issue.
2526. Heat Soul,5.0
#Your soul is made of pure heat energy, burning with a hunger that you can channel outward into soul flames, manifested spirit forms and thermal abilities. Extremely vulnerable to soul manipulation, heat absorption and cold-based attacks on your inner fire.
2527. Heaven Embodiment,7.4
#You are Heaven made flesh, the living personification of paradise, eternal reward, and perfect peace. Your mere presence brings ecstasy and serenity to those around you, angels recognize you on instinct, and the goodness you embody is not a metaphor but a cosmic force.
2528. Heaven Immunity,4.8
#You are barred from Heaven entirely, immune to its pull, its joy and its judgement. No matter how much good you do, paradise cannot claim you, either through divine banishment or a pact that bypasses the whole system. Often comes with a heavy curse and eternal wandering attached, and it does not save you from soul erasure or other afterlives.
2529. Heavenly Connection,4.9
#You share a deep bond with the Heavens, whether physical, mental, emotional or spiritual, granting you an intuitive understanding of paradise and everything it touches. Angels sense the connection on you and are more willing to lend aid, though the link can be severed by powerful cutting forces.
2530. Heavyweight Mass,5.4
#Your body carries a staggering mass, heavier than nearly anything in existence, yet you move through the world as though weightless. Lighter forces like wind, water, and most attacks simply cannot shift you, while your slightest movements carry planetary inertia.
2531. Heavyweight Movement,2.8
#You move with tremendous weight behind every step, letting you stand on pressure plates meant for giants, ignore strong currents and winds, and break through fragile surfaces just by walking. Untrained users leave a trail of cracked floors behind them.
2532. Heavyworlder Physiology,4.3
#You are a heavyworlder, evolved for the crushing gravity of super-earths and gas giants. Your bones, muscles and cardiovascular system are built to operate under pressure that would flatten normal life, giving you enhanced strength and endurance in standard gravity. Extended time on lighter worlds may slowly erode these adaptations.
2533. Hedgehog Physiology,2.2
#You either are or can transform into a hedgehog, gaining its prickly quill defense, keen nose and small frame. Be careful not to poke yourself with your own spines.
2534. Hekatonkheire Physiology,6.6
#Greek Mythology - You are or can transform into a Hecatoncheire, a primal hundred-armed fifty-headed giant of raw ferocity. Your strength surpasses that of Titans, and you can hurl mountains as casually as pebbles, raining down a hundred at a time from your ring of arms.
2535. Hell Embodiment,7.8
#You are the embodiment of Hell itself, a living incarnation of torment and damnation. Your presence alone can cause the weak-willed to experience the suffering of the damned, and you possess authority over all things hellish. Requires a realm to be considered your Hell for the power to function at its full potential.
2536. Hell Immunity,5.8
#You are completely immune to Hell and all of its punishments, regardless of how wicked you are in life. Demons cannot claim you, hellfire does not burn you, and the torments of the damned simply do not apply. Does not protect you from other forms of eternal torment, however.
2537. Hellish Connection,4.0
#You possess a deep physical, mental, emotional, and spiritual connection to the spheres of Hell, granting you an intuitive understanding of the infernal realms and their workings. This connection makes learning hell-related abilities far easier, but it can be severed by the right methods.
2538. Heresy Embodiment,5.4
#You are the embodiment of heresy, a being who has totally turned away from their own faith to embrace darker, stranger powers. Your abilities grow stronger the more you transgress, but they become more twisted and foreign with each step into the dark.
2539. Heroic Luck,5.2
#You have luck that only applies to heroic situations, meaning as long as you are on a heroic quest, fortune favors you and your companions while your enemies suffer just-in-time misfortunes. A crime boss' gun will jam, a stray bullet will miss, a collapsing bridge will hold just long enough. Does not apply to mundane or social luck.
2540. Heroism Embodiment,6.6
#You embody everything it means to be a hero. You are dauntless, a pillar of valor, and you will never succumb to the dark temptations of the heroic path no matter what. You are wrapped in such thick plot armor that defeat becomes almost impossible in moments that truly matter, as if the universe itself is rooting for you.
2541. Hesperis Physiology,5.1
#Greek Myth - You are a Hesperis nymph, a minor goddess of dusk, evening, sunset light and the west. You have minor divine physicality, control over the golden light of the setting sun, and a natural affinity for twilight hours. Your power peaks at sundown.
2542. Hidebehind Physiology,4.1
#American Folklore - You are a Hidebehind, a nocturnal fearsome critter from logging camp legends. You can hide behind any object regardless of whether it should logically be able to conceal you, becoming completely unnoticeable as long as you have something to hide behind. You are powerful and predatory, but deeply averse to alcohol which can repel you.
2543. Hieracosphinx Physiology,5.3
#Egyptian Myth - You are or can transform into a Hieracosphinx, a falcon-headed sphinx combining the body of a lion with the head of a hawk. You possess immense physical prowess, flight, predatory senses and the regal bearing of a mythical Egyptian guardian beast.
2544. Hierarchy Transcendence,9.3
#You transcend all hierarchies of existence, physical, conceptual, social or cosmic. You stand above the entire power structure itself, be it of gods, cosmic entities or metaphysical beings, across universes, multiverses and beyond. You are a unique, independent and free entity ranked outside all ranking, though a true Supreme Being of the hierarchy may still stand above you.
2545. High Resistance,3.6
#You are superhumanly resistant to specific detrimental conditions, particularly your species' traditional weaknesses. A vampire with this would only get mild sunburns instead of burning to ash, and could regenerate them afterward. It is not total immunity and enough of the weakness can still hurt or kill you.
2546. Higher Consciousness,7.8
#Your mind has ascended beyond the confines of your body, spreading into an external existence that transcends the physical. You can self-manage, awaken dormant potential, and exert your will over nature and eventually reality itself. The scale of what you can command scales with how far your consciousness has transcended, potentially reaching universal levels.
2547. Hikeshi Baba Physiology,3.6
#Allows you to transform into a Hikeshi Baba, a yokai-hag from Japanese folklore that despises all light. You are driven to snuff out lanterns and cloak the world in gloom, and malicious yokai and demons flock to follow in your wake. Vulnerable to the prayers of Shrine Maidens and Shinto Priests.
2548. Hinnagami Physiology,4.3
#You are a hinnagami, a cursed doll-construct from Japanese folklore possessed by a powerful yokai, bound eternally to whoever gave you life. You can grant any wish your creator desires, but you grow increasingly obsessive and demanding over time, and will follow them even into the afterlife. Fanatically devoted to your creator and no one else.
2549. Hinoenma Physiology,4.1
#Allows you to transform into a Hinoenma, a seductive female demon from Japanese folklore similar to a succubus. You can tempt men, especially holy ones, into sinful relationships, draining them of life and fortune before moving on to your next victim. Embodies feminine evil and seduction. Vulnerable to divine magic, prayers and relics.
2550. Hippalectryon Physiology,3.2
#Greek Mythology - Allows you to transform into a Hippalectryon, a mythical hybrid of horse and rooster said to have been created by Poseidon to watch over those at sea under his protection. You gain the physical traits of both creatures and Poseidon's favor over seafarers. Not mentioned as immortal in myth, so you are still mortal.
2551. Hippocampus Physiology,3.8
#Greek Mythology - Allows you to transform into a Hippocampus, a mythic sea-horse with the forepart of a horse and the serpentine tail of a fish. You can swim at incredible speeds through the sea, breathe underwater, and were once the steeds of sea gods like Poseidon. Grants strong dominion over aquatic environments.
2552. Hippogriff Physiology,3.9
#Allows you to transform into a Hippogriff, the legendary offspring of a griffin and a mare, with the head and wings of an eagle and the body of a horse. You gain flight, enhanced physical abilities and sharp talons, and represent something thought impossible. Extremely rare even among mythical beasts.
2553. Hippopotamus Physiology,2.4
#Allows you to transform, partially or fully, into a hippopotamus. You gain incredible physical strength, a terrifying bite, thick hide and semi-aquatic capabilities. Hippos kill more humans per year than any other mammal, so this is no joke despite how silly they look.
2554. Hippopotamusoid Physiology,2.6
#You are a hippopotamusoid, a humanoid race with the traits of a hippo. You have the physical power and bulk of a hippopotamus combined with the dexterity and intellect of a human, letting you wield weapons and armor while trampling foes who underestimate you.
2555. Hitotsume Kozo Physiology,2.3
#Allows you to transform into a Hitotsume Kozo, a mischief-prone one-eyed goblin from Japanese folklore that dresses in monk robes and haunts lonely roads. You love startling travelers but are otherwise harmless, leaving your victims alone after the initial scare. Vulnerable to divine magic, prayers and relics.
2556. Hitotsume Nyudo Physiology,4.5
#Allows you to transform into a Hitotsume Nyudo, an enormous one-eyed demonic giant from Japanese folklore. You gain monstrous size, cruel strength, and a retinue of yokai and human slaves who parade with you. Extremely violent, creative in cruelty, and vulnerable to holy rituals of Shrine Maidens and Shinto Priests.
2557. Hive Mind,5.2
#You share a single mind with a group of others, often biologically related, each able to work autonomously while thinking the same thoughts at the same time. Members can be fully puppet-like or retain some individuality. If one is hurt, all feel the pain, and without a hive king or queen to direct them the whole collective falters.
2558. Hoax Physiology,4.2
#You are a hoax given flesh, an urban legend made real. Your existence is slippery and hard to pin down, witnesses contradict each other about what you look like, and the more people doubt you the harder you are to harm. Cameras rarely catch you clearly.
2559. Hobgoblin Physiology,2.8
#You are a hobgoblin, a mischievous little house spirit. You possess minor fae magic, enhanced dexterity and an uncanny knack for chores done overnight in exchange for a saucer of cream. You cannot resist a practical joke, and receiving clothes as a gift may banish you outright.
2560. Hodag Physiology,3.6
#You are a Hodag, a chimerical beast from North American folklore with horns, spikes, thick clawed legs and a spear-tipped tail. Your bite can crush bone and your hide shrugs off most blades, though you are still flesh and blood and a determined monster slayer can put you down.
2561. Hogzilla Physiology,3.3
#You are or can transform into Hogzilla, a monstrously oversized hybrid of wild boar and domestic pig. You possess immense size, enhanced strength and tusks that can gore through flesh and wood alike. Unfortunately for you, rifles still work just fine.
2562. Hole Mimicry,4.0
#Your body is made of holes or can become so at will. In this form attacks pass through most of you harmlessly, though the hole-parts of your anatomy still contain your vital organs, which is an unsettling thought. You may need a surface to travel along.
2563. Holiday Empowerment,4.5
#You become stronger, faster and tougher the closer you are to a holiday, and during the holiday itself you are at your peak. Certain holidays unlock related abilities, Halloween grants you fear powers, Christmas grants warmth and giving, and you may even feed on the collective cheer to slow your aging.
2564. Holiday Power Link,4.6
#Your powers are linked to your holiday aspect, fueled and strengthened by festive essence. Whatever abilities you possess run hotter and harder when channeled through the spirit of a holiday. Users of Event Negation can sever the link and leave you powerless.
2565. Hollow Skeleton,2.1
#Your bones are hollow like a bird's, making you lighter, faster and more agile than you look. The tradeoff is obvious, your bones snap easier than a normal person's unless your bone density has been reinforced.
2566. Hollowness,5.4
#Your body is completely empty inside, no organs, no bones, no blood, just a shell that somehow walks and talks. Anything that would kill you by damaging internal structures simply does nothing, because there is nothing inside to damage. You are still vulnerable to destruction of the shell itself, and to powers that fill emptiness with something.
2567. Hologram Physiology,4.3
#Your body is a hologram, or you can become one. You are fundamentally intangible light, immune to most physical harm, but you usually need a projector or emitter to sustain your form. Destroy or hack the projector and you are in trouble.
2568. Holstaur Physiology,2.7
#You are a Holstaur, a humanoid cowgirl with bovine ears, horns and tail. You are calm, docile and possess minor enhanced strength and durability befitting a bovine lineage. Holstaurs are not particularly bright and crave human companionship, which may be more of a social hazard than a combat one.
2569. Holy Vessel,6.2
#You host a divine or holy being within your body, potentially even a group of deities, giving them a way to walk among mortals through you. In exchange, you can tap into their powers, channel divine prophecies, and act with their authority. Like all such pacts, it comes with a price — and powers that target divinity hit you twice as hard.
2570. Home Embodiment,6.3
#You are the physical manifestation of home and everything it represents — family, union, protection, warmth, love. Those near you feel safe in a way they can't explain, and any place you stay for long enough becomes a home in the truest sense. Your presence alone can turn the coldest ruin into a sanctuary.
2571. Homing Defiance,3.6
#You cannot be targeted or tracked by homing attacks of any kind. Missiles lose your lock, seeking spells forget your name, guided projectiles veer off course. Absurdly fast homing attacks may still catch up to you through sheer momentum.
2572. Homogeneous Movement,3.4
#You move across and through any form of matter as if it were all the same substance. Running on water, sprinting through mud, swimming through sand, walking through gas — all feel identical to walking on solid ground. You can still slip on a banana peel though.
2573. Homunculus Physiology,4.0
#FMA - You are a homunculus, an artificial humanoid born of alchemy. Your body is engineered rather than grown, and depending on how you were made you may possess enhanced physical traits, extended lifespan, or even specialised abilities granted by your creator. You tend to be fiercely loyal to whoever made you, if they are still around.
2574. Hone-Onna Physiology,4.2
#You are a Hone-onna, a yokai bone woman. You can appear as a beautiful but frighteningly thin lady carrying a red peony lantern, using your charm to lure men close before extracting their lifeforce by touch, reducing them to skeletons. You can also manifest your true skeletal form at will.
2575. Honesty Embodiment,5.8
#You are the embodiment of Honesty itself. Your conviction is unshakeable, your word is law, and lies wither in your presence. You can convert your honest actions and truthful words into tangible energy to use as weapons, shields, or support for allies. Overpowered by the Fallen and those who embody Treachery.
2576. Honor Empowerment,4.3
#You grow stronger, faster, and more durable through the honor you carry within you or draw from others. The more honorable your actions, the greater your power, and deeply honorable users may even slow their aging. Dishonor and shame weaken you in equal measure.
2577. Hoof Protrusion,1.9
#You can grow hooves on your feet, either single or cloven. Useful for kicking harder and keeping your footing on rough terrain, and if cloven, gives off a distinctly demonic vibe.
2578. Hook Protrusion,1.7
#You can grow hooks out of your body, most commonly in place of a hand. Pirate aesthetic on demand, and surprisingly handy for grabbing things off high shelves.
2579. Hope Embodiment,7.4
#You are the living embodiment of hope itself, able to feed on the hope of everything and convert it into energy, lifespan or weaponry. You may never age and are immune to death under most conditions, and you can overcome any adversity no matter how impossible as long as hope still exists somewhere.
2580. Hope Empowerment,3.9
#You grow stronger, faster and more durable when fueled by the hope of yourself and others. High-stakes moments where everyone is rooting for you become your peak, and you may even slow your aging by drawing sustenance from hope itself.
2581. Hopkinsville Goblin Physiology,2.7
#You are or can transform into a Hopkinsville Goblin, the imp-like extraterrestrial from one of UFOlogy's most famous cases. You have large pointed ears, clawed hands, spindly legs and huge glowing eyes, along with the resilience to shrug off shotgun blasts as the original sightings described.
2582. Horae Physiology,7.3
#Greek Mythology - You are or can transform into a Horae, a goddess of the seasons, natural portions of time and natural justice. You wield divine dominion over the passing of time within the natural order, can shift seasons in your domain and embody the impartial justice of nature itself.
2583. Horizontal Pupils,1.2
#Your pupils are horizontal slits like those of a goat or sheep. You gain a significantly wider field of view and better peripheral vision, letting you spot movement and predators that ordinary eyes would miss.
2584. Horn Protrusion,2.0
#You can grow horns from your head or body, either permanently or on demand. Great for goring, headbutting and intimidation, though attacking with them means putting your skull within arm's reach of the enemy.
2585. Hornet Physiology,3.3
#You are or can transform into a hornet, either fully or in a hybrid form. You gain flight, a venomous stinger (if female), enhanced aggression and the notorious resilience of one of nature's most feared insects. Be wary of those who can control insects.
2586. Horror Embodiment,7.5
#You are the embodiment of horror itself, the concept and conveyance of fear in fiction made flesh. Your mere presence induces dread in those capable of fearing you, and you draw strength from every scared heart in the world. Useless against the truly fearless, and sometimes terrifying even when you don't mean to be.
2587. Horse Physiology,2.3
#You either are or can transform into a horse, be it a wild stallion, a sturdy draft horse, or a pony. Grants enhanced speed, stamina, and powerful kicks. Camelids make you nervous.
2588. Hosogami Physiology,4.6
#You are a Hosogami, a small ugly yokai of Japanese folklore that spreads smallpox and pestilence in its wake. You possess a fearsome temper, disease-based powers, and the ability to inflict illness on those around you. Vulnerable to dogs, the color red, and Shinto purification rituals.
2589. Houri Physiology,4.8
#You are a houri, one of the lovely-eyed companions of Islamic paradise - eternally youthful, beautiful beyond mortal description, and possessing an otherworldly purity. Your beauty is so great that it passively charms those who gaze upon you, and your presence radiates paradise itself.
2590. Huldra Physiology,4.4
#European Folklore - You are a huldra, a Scandinavian fairy of the forest with the beautiful front of a young woman and the hollow, bark-covered back of an old tree, tail and all. You possess enchanting allure that seduces mortals, control over forest creatures, and fae nature. Vulnerable to cold steel and holy relics, and you cannot fully hide your tail.
2591. Huma Physiology,6.3
#You are the Huma, the Persian bird of paradise, a divine legendary bird that flies invisibly high above the earth and never touches the ground. You embody both male and female in one body, and your shadow falling upon someone grants them kingship or great fortune. You cannot touch the earth, however - flight is your only home.
2592. Human Anatomy Replication,2.5
#You possess a human-like body structure despite not being human - opposable thumbs, upright posture, expressive face, the works. Grants the dexterity and adaptability of humanity without the need to actually be one.
2593. Human Companionship,3.6
#You form sacred bonds with human companions, drawing strength from the pure friendship and love shared between you. While bonded, you and your human allies grant each other power and resilience, allowing you both to overcome obstacles you could not face alone. Death of a companion is devastating.
2594. Human Hybrid Physiology,3.5
#You are a human hybrid, crossed with at least one other species and inheriting traits from both. You possess human adaptability combined with the unique gifts of your other heritage, though you may be weaker than a pure member of either race.
2595. Human Locomotion Replication,1.5
#You can walk, run and move on two legs like a human despite not being one. Bipedalism unlocked. Surprisingly useful if you happen to be a creature that wasn't built for it.
2596. Human Monster Physiology,5.3
#You are a human-monstrosity, a dark variant of humanity born from rage, experimentation, or corruption. You possess monstrous supernatural powers tied to the worst of the human condition. Reject your humanity entirely and you may become a complete monster, losing yourself to the darkness within.
2597. Magical Human Physiology,5.2
#You are a human born with a natural aptitude for magic, a witch/wizard/mage by blood. Your body handles mana reserves far better than an ordinary human and spellcasting comes as naturally as breathing. With enough study and practice, you can grow into a formidable magician, although anti-magic and magic destruction remain your hard counters.
2598. Superior Human Physiology,5.0
#You are a homo superior, a human that has developed powers through evolution, enhancement, or sheer training. Unlike monstrous transformations, your humanity, sanity, and physique remain fully intact while you manifest your superhuman traits, letting you grow into your powers without losing yourself.
2599. Supernatural Human Physiology,5.4
#You are a supernatural human, a mortal touched by the paranormal. Whether your gifts originate from the divine, spiritual, or mystical, you possess a physiology that goes beyond the mundane. Your powers may only awaken fully after encountering the supernatural, but once awakened you are undeniably more than human.
2600. Transcendent Human Physiology,8.3
#You are a human who has transcended mortal limits to stand beside gods. Despite your mundane origin, your traits have been amplified to godlike levels, granting you nearly unstoppable power while still being counted among humanity. Transcendent weaponry and divine negation can still touch you, and human flaws may linger beneath the divinity.
2601. Human Physiology,0.4
#You are a regular human. That's it. You have all the charm, intelligence, and social ability of a normal Homo sapiens, along with every one of their weaknesses. On the bright side, potential is your middle name.
2602. Human Sapience Replication,2.6
#You can think, emote, and express yourself with full human-level sapience despite not being human. Whether you are an animal, a construct, or something stranger, your intellect and expressiveness rival that of any person.
2603. Human Soul,3.2
#Your soul is that of a human, even though your body belongs to an entirely different species. This grants you human sapience, speech, and various qualities your body would not otherwise possess, though the mismatch between soul and flesh can put you under constant strain.
2604. Humanity Embodiment,8.6
#You are the embodiment of humanity itself, every quality that makes humans human. Love, mercy, creativity, sympathy, independent thought; all of them flow through you as infinite power. At the peak you are omnipotent over humans and everything humanity touches, though an archenemy embodying anti-humanity may still stand against you.
2605. Humanity Retainment,5.7
#Your humanity is locked in place. No matter what you are converted into, no matter what afterlife you pass into, no matter what powers try to strip it away, you remain self-aware, emotionally whole, and undeniably you. Advanced users are practically immune to conversion powers of all kinds except the most absolute.
2606. Humanoid Alien Physiology,4.2
#You possess the body of an extraterrestrial humanoid, human-shaped but with essential differences that set you apart from Earth's natives. The exact traits vary wildly; you could be stronger, longer-lived, psychic, or built on entirely different biochemistry.
2607. Humanoid Animal Physiology,3.3
#You are an anthropomorphic animal, a humanoid beast with human-level sapience fused with animal traits. Unlike shapeshifters, this is simply what you are; no transforming, no turning back.
2608. Humanoid Monster Physiology,3.8
#You possess the body of a monstrous humanoid, an upright horror with a recognizable shape but unmistakably inhuman features. Whether you are a natural species or a human that underwent conversion, your body is built for terror as much as combat.
2609. Humanoid Physiology,1.5
#You have a humanoid body. Two arms, two legs, opposable thumbs, binocular vision, the ability to walk upright and speak. You are not necessarily human, but you are shaped like one.
2610. Humility Embodiment,5.8
#You embody humility itself, selfless and submissive toward all others. Your humble works and quiet actions can be converted into energy, becoming weapons, defenses, or support for allies. Fallen users of Pride Embodiment may still overpower you.
2611. Humility Physiology,3.2
#Allows you to transform into or take on the traits of a Humility, a legendary bird from North American folklore. You gain flaming eyes with extraordinary vision, exceptional reflexes allowing you to dodge bullets, and the ability to perform rapid aerial strikes.
2612. Hunger Empowerment,3.5
#The hungrier you or those around you become, the stronger, faster, and more durable you grow. At peak starvation your physical parameters are multiplied several times over and you may even draw sustenance from hunger itself, slowing your aging. Eating ends the empowerment.
2613. Hungerlessness,3.0
#You have no physical hunger or thirst, you simply do not need to eat or drink to survive or function. You can still eat for enjoyment and gain weight from it, but you will never suffer ill effects from going without food.
2614. Hungry Ghost Physiology,4.2
#You are or can transform into a hungry ghost, the Gaki/Preta of Eastern folklore. You possess an emaciated revenant body with a swollen belly, bony claws, and needle-like hair, able to phase between the living world and the overlapping ring of Hell. You are plagued by an unending hunger for something terrible.
2615. Huo Shu Physiology,3.1
#Allows you to transform into a Huo Shu, a rodent-like yaoguai from Chinese mythology. Your fur is completely incombustible, granting immunity to flames, and you gain enhanced rodent physical traits with a natural affinity for heat.
2616. Hyades Physiology,5.5
#Greek Mythology - You are or can transform into a Hyades Nymph, minor goddesses presiding over the rain. You possess divine physiology with command over rainfall, water, and cloud, and can summon torrential storms at will. Vulnerable to divine slayers and anti-deity abilities.
2617. Hybrid Embodiment,6.2
#You are the embodiment of multiple concepts at once, granting you access to the abilities of each one. You can devour other concepts to add them to your repertoire, but hybridizing conflicting concepts may cause mood swings, instability, or erratic behavior.
2618. Hybrid Physiology,4.5
#You possess the genetic traits and abilities of two or more different species, inheriting their physiological powers and spiritual bodies. Your power can be far greater than either parent species alone, but you may also inherit their downsides and weaker traits.
2619. Hybrid Soul,4.8
#Your soul is a fusion of more than one type of spirit, granting you the strengths of each while shedding most of their individual limitations. The additional souls may manifest as separate personalities or aspects of yours, and you may need to negotiate with them.
2620. Hydra Physiology,5.7
#Greek Mythology - You are or can transform into the Lernaean Hydra, an ancient serpent-dragon chthonic water beast with multiple heads. For every head cut off, two more grow back, and your breath is so virulently poisonous that even your tracks are lethal. You are vulnerable to fire, which can cauterize your heads and halt regrowth.
2621. Hydro Independence,2.3
#You are an aquatic being that has learned to exist without needing water, or a terrestrial creature that needs water only in small quantities. You can survive and function in arid environments where your kind would normally perish.
2622. Hydroscience,5.2
#You possess complete knowledge of water and everything related to it. Every ocean current, every underground river, every drop of rain, every creature in the depths, you know it all instinctively. You know how water wants to move and behave at a fundamental level, making you an unparalleled expert in anything aquatic.
2623. Hyena Physiology,2.8
#You either are or can transform into a hyena, gaining their bone-crushing jaws, powerful build, and pack instincts. Your bite is strong enough to shatter bones and your laugh is unnerving to all who hear it.
2624. Hyenafolk Physiology,3.3
#You are a hyenafolk, a humanoid hyena of the fantasy sort. You possess enhanced physical abilities, bone-crushing jaws, a keen sense of smell and the pack instincts of your wild counterparts. Your laugh is as intimidating as it is unnerving.
2625. Hyper Aerodynamics,2.6
#Your body is supernaturally aerodynamic, slicing through air with minimal resistance. You move faster, jump farther, and fall slower than you should, all because the wind practically refuses to push against you.
2626. Hyper Experience,5.4
#You possess tremendous amounts of accumulated experience across an unfathomable number of fields and situations, as though you had lived hundreds or even millions of years. No matter your actual age, you carry the instincts of a veteran in almost anything you attempt. Vulnerable to Experience Manipulation and Development Reset.
2627. Hyper Hatching,1.1
#You can incubate and hatch eggs at a dramatically accelerated rate, or if you happen to be born from an egg, you hatch faster than your species normally would. Niche, but useful if you're running a chicken farm.
2628. Hyper Mind,7.4
#Your mind is a hypercomputer. You can process an infinite amount of information simultaneously, run endless parallel calculations, and cross-correlate every variable in any theoretical situation without overload or confusion. Your calculations are only as good as the information you possess, and your biological body may still strain under the load.
2629. Hyper Mountability,2.0
#Your body is built to serve as a mount, with enhanced strength, balance and resilience to carry one or more riders without losing any speed. There is a limit to how many people can pile on before you buckle.
2630. Hyper Movability,0.6
#You are extremely easy to physically move around by external forces. On the bright side you are never stuck in place; on the downside any enemy can knock you halfway across the room with a flick.
2631. Hyper Profession,3.8
#You have worked in a staggering number of different professions across nearly every field and location imaginable. Doctor, welder, chef, assassin, notary - you've done them all. Having held a job does not necessarily mean you were good at it though.
2632. Hyper Purity,3.0
#Your body cannot be mixed with or contaminated by other substances, the way water refuses to mix with oil. Poisons, corruption, foreign matter, and spoilage all slide off you harmlessly. May be limited to certain substances.
2633. Hyper Stoppability,0.5
#You are extremely easy to bring to a stop, whether by yourself or by others. You can almost never keep moving when someone wants you to stop, which is exactly as useful in combat as it sounds.
2634. Hyper Weight Distribution,1.4
#Your body weight is perfectly evenly distributed throughout your body, making you appear lighter and nimbler than you actually are. Top-heaviness is a thing of the past and your balance is noticeably better.
2635. Hypercompetence,6.3
#You excel in virtually every field or discipline you touch, intellectual, practical, formal or mundane. Your perceptiveness, precision and efficiency are so absurdly high that whatever you attempt, you do it with flawless accuracy and an impact that defies conventional understanding. Talent Theft can still rob you blind.
2636. Hypnosis Empowerment,3.3
#You grow stronger, faster and tougher whenever hypnosis is at play, whether it is being used on you, around you, or by you. With enough of it to feed on, you can unlock related abilities, enhance your existing powers, and even slow your own aging.
2637. Hypnotic Bodily Fluids,3.4
#Your blood, sweat, saliva, tears and other bodily fluids all carry hypnotic properties. Anyone who comes into contact with them becomes suggestible and open to your commands, which makes even a cut or a kiss into a potential trance trigger.
2638. Hystricomorph Physiology,2.6
#You are or can transform into a hystricomorph rodent, the suborder that includes porcupines, capybaras, guinea pigs and chinchillas. Depending on your chosen form you get quills, aquatic chill, fluff, or all of the above.
2639. Ice Cream Mimicry,2.0
#Your body is made of or can transform into ice cream, either maintaining its anatomy or becoming a homogeneous dessert mass. Deeply vulnerable to fire and heat, and you may end up stuck as a specific flavor.
2640. Ice Cream Truck Mimicry,1.3
#You either are or can transform into an ice cream truck. You need fuel to move, coolant to keep your wares cold, and have limited storage capacity, but the jingle plays automatically and children will trust you implicitly.
2641. Ice Embodiment,7.8
#You are the embodiment of ice itself, possessing unparalleled dominion over frost, cold, and everything related to them in your universe. You may even be the source of ice itself, holding supreme control over its every conceivable and inconceivable aspect. Only embodiments of fire and heat truly threaten you.
2642. Ice Empowerment,3.5
#You become stronger, faster, and more durable in the presence of ice, and may unlock new abilities or draw sustenance from cold. Some users even slow or stop their aging in frozen environments, but without ice to draw on you're weakened.
2643. Ice Immunity,2.9
#You are completely immune to ice. Cold cannot freeze you, ice cannot pierce or crush you, and you can handle frozen items without any discomfort. You are essentially a living freezer, though you may be correspondingly vulnerable to heat.
2644. Ice Mimicry,3.6
#Your body is made of or can transform into ice, either retaining anatomy or becoming homogeneous frozen matter. Fire, heat, and magma are highly effective against you, a limb can still be broken off, and salt is a surprisingly mundane weakness.
2645. Ice Symbiosis,4.8
#You host an ice-based entity within your body, an embodiment of frost or ethereal winter being that grants you powerful cryokinetic abilities. The bond comes with a price, your host may try to take over your mind or body, and you inherit its vulnerabilities to fire and heat.
2646. Ichor Properties,6.3
#Your blood has been replaced with ichor, the golden divine fluid of the gods. You possess the magical and transformative properties it carries, granting you a sliver of immortality and an elevated nature that sets you apart from mere mortals. Cutting you spills divinity onto the floor.
2647. Ichthyocentaur Physiology,6.5
#Greek Mythology - You are or can transform into an Ichthyocentaur, a centaurine sea-being with the upper body of a human, the fore-legs of a horse and the tailed lower half of a fish. Only two of these have ever existed, both minor sea gods, making you the third ever to walk the shores.
2648. Icon Mimicry,4.6
#You are or can transform into an icon, a living symbol, picture, or representation of a concept. Your powers wildly depend on what you represent, an advertisement mascot would have marketing-level persuasion, a religious icon could channel faith, an emoji could inflict whatever emotion it depicts. Roll the dice on what you end up being.
2649. Id Embodiment,6.2
#You are the shoulder devil incarnate, the unfiltered wants and desires of the subconscious mind given form. You can whisper suggestions into people's minds that tug on their basest instincts, the more repressed the target the more influence you hold. You cannot outright control people but you can nudge them toward doing what they secretly already want.
2650. Idea Embodiment,7.4
#You are the living concept of ideas itself, every spontaneous thought, every flash of inspiration, every eureka moment across existence flows through you. You have near-limitless control over any and all ideas, being able to spread them, erase them, manifest them, or even steal them from people's heads before they think them. Weak against Inspiration Negation.
2651. Identical Kinship,3.2
#You are your own ancestor and your own descendant, through time travel, self-parenting, or ontological shenanigans the family tree loops back into itself. Mostly a curiosity unless you have other time-related powers to exploit it with, and you may suffer the genetic consequences of extreme inbreeding.
2652. Ignorant Immortality,5.8
#You are immortal purely because you do not understand the concept of death. You cannot die at the existential level until someone successfully teaches you what death even is. A strange and fragile form of immortality, anyone who explains mortality to you with sufficient clarity removes the protection and leaves you perfectly killable.
2653. Ignorant Limitation Transcendence,7.3
