#You transcend the laws of reality, logic and physics purely by virtue of being too stupid or crazy to understand that they apply to you. Feats that should be impossible happen anyway, specifically because you don't know they shouldn't. Restoring your sanity or educating you on physics will immediately cause the power to fail, and you can be tricked into hurting yourself just as easily as you can achieve the miraculous.
2654. Iguanodon Physiology,3.1
#You possess the physiology of an Iguanodon, allowing you to partially or fully transform into the herbivorous dinosaur. You gain enhanced physical strength, tough hide, and a wicked thumb spike that can punch through predators. Decent but not as impressive as the carnivore forms.
2655. Illusion Awareness,4.8
#You are completely aware of true reality at all times, seeing through any environmental, sensory, or mental illusion anyone attempts to deceive you with. You can also perceive illusions others are experiencing and even step into them yourself without losing your anchor to what is real. Absolute Illusions may still trick you, and True Illusions make immunity the least of your problems.
2656. Illusion Embodiment,7.8
#You are the living embodiment of illusion itself. Every hallucination, mirage, and false perception across reality bends to your will. You do not cast illusions so much as decide what counts as one, making truth and lie interchangeable in your presence.
2657. Illusion Empowerment,3.2
#Your body and abilities are strengthened when in contact with illusions or illusory power. The stronger the illusion around you, the faster, tougher, and more potent you become. You may even draw sustenance from hallucinations, forgoing normal food in illusion-rich environments.
2658. Illusion Physiology,5.4
#Your body is made of illusion itself, a construct of light and perception rather than flesh. Physical attacks pass through you unless you choose to solidify, and your form is fluid, able to shift appearance at will. Vulnerable to Illusion Negation and those with Illusion Awareness who will always see through your form.
2659. Illusionary Perfection,6.3
#You appear utterly flawless in one or more specific fields, near-perfect in skill and presence to all who observe you. In truth, you are only mimicking perfection, and a being of true flawlessness or a cunning enough opponent can find the cracks. Still, near-perfection is more than enough to dominate most of existence.
2660. Illusory Power Link,4.2
#Your illusory nature is fused with your powers, meaning every ability you have is fueled and amplified by hallucination. This makes your powers flexible and deceptive, but if your illusory core becomes unstable, your abilities go haywire.
2661. Illusory Symbiosis,4.6
#You share a symbiotic bond with an illusory entity, an optical phenomenon or hallucinatory being that grants you significant illusion-based abilities. The entity may have its own will, and strong ones may try to take over your body or mind if you slip.
2662. Imaginary Physiology,3.2
#Your body is the product of someone's imagination, granting you a form as malleable and fantastical as whoever dreamed you up. Your sway over the real world may be limited and you are subject to the whims of your imaginer, but you can be reshaped or repaired by pure belief.
2663. Imagination Empowerment,4.1
#You grow stronger, faster and more durable the more you or others imagine you being so. The wilder the daydreams fueling you, the more your existing abilities are enhanced and new ones unlocked. A boring mind will leave you a boring person.
2664. Imagination Power Link,4.8
#Your imagination is directly linked to your powers, such that the vividness of your fantasies fuels and amplifies everything else you can do. A wild mind makes your abilities soar, while an unstable one sends them out of control.
2665. Imaginative Condition,8.1
#Your entire condition, body, mind and spirit, is shaped by your imagination. You can imbue yourself with any quality you can picture, becoming strong enough to tear holes through reality or fast enough to reach infinite speed. You cannot affect your surroundings directly, only yourself, but what you can do to yourself is all but unbound by logic.
2666. Immobility,3.6
#You can never be moved by any external physical force, though you can freely position yourself. The ground may still be ripped out from under you and sufficiently absolute strength can still shift you, but short of that you are quantum-locked in place.
2667. Immortal Aging,3.5
#You are immortal and will never die, but you still age normally, just without any of the downsides. No frailty, no stiff joints, no declining mind. You could be ninety years old and still play sports at peak human level, looking every bit your age but performing like a prime athlete.
2668. Immortal Rebirth,4.5
#When you die, you are immediately reborn as a child, carrying your memories forward into a new life. Your new body may or may not resemble your old one, and instead of being born you may simply appear or grow back from nothing. You still age normally between deaths.
2669. Immortal Sleep,3.8
#You are eternal and indestructible, but only while asleep or in hibernation. While dormant your age is frozen and your body is immune to all physical harm, but the moment you wake up you become as vulnerable as anyone else.
2670. Absolute Immortality,9.7
#You are absolutely immortal. You cannot die, age, sicken, or be permanently wounded. Your mind and soul are as eternal as your body, immune to mental and spiritual damage alike. Blow you up, disintegrate you, erase you from existence entirely, and you will still return. You have transcended the concept of death itself, an Immortality-Aspect of Omnipotence.
2671. Nigh-Absolute Immortality,8.6
#You do not age, heal from virtually any wound and have an eternal lifespan. Only a handful of things in existence can actually end you, such as absolute erasure, authorities of death or dedicated immortal slayers. Everything else just inconveniences you.
2672. Absolute Immune System,8.0
#Your immune system is without limit or equal. No poison, drug, contaminant or disease can so much as slow you down, and this immunity cannot be stripped, bypassed or negated by any means. You could drink hemlock like water forever.
2673. Enhanced Immune System,2.8
#Your immune system is beyond the peak of your species, granting near-total immunity to diseases, pathogens and toxins that would floor a normal human. You essentially never get sick and shrug off poisons that would hospitalize others.
2674. Supernatural Immune System,4.0
#Your immune system is blatantly, unnaturally stronger than anything else in your universe, rendering you immune to all manner of contaminants, pathogens and diseases. Biological warfare is a non-issue for you.
2675. Peak Human Immune System,1.6
#Your immune system is at the absolute pinnacle of natural human potential. You resist poisons, pathogens and drugs better than almost anyone and recover from most ailments in a fraction of the usual time, but you're still mortal and can still get sick.
2676. Immunity Empowerment,4.3
#You grow stronger, faster and more durable the more immunities you possess or are exposed to, potentially unlocking new abilities tied to those affinities. Some users can even draw sustenance or slowed aging from their immunities.
2677. Immunity,4.0
#You are completely immune to something, whether it be a specific power, a concept, an idea, a disease or anything else. Rarity of the entry scales with what you picked, though clever opponents may still find workarounds that don't directly rely on what you're immune to.
2678. Impact Immunity,5.8
#You are immune to impact forces, no matter how powerful. Falls from orbit, being crushed under debris, strikes from impossibly strong opponents - none of it injures you. Raw power beyond your tier and Immunity Bypassing are the main ways around it.
2679. Imperfection Embodiment,8.9
#You are the universal personification of every imperfection, flaw and irregularity in existence. Living beings, objects, physical laws and even emotions all have their flaws, and you embody and control every one of them. Only the truly flawless - omnipotent beings, users of Perfection, Absolute Invincibility - stand apart from your touch.
2680. Imperfection Immunity,3.4
#You are immune to all surface-level imperfections on your body - no blemishes, freckles, marks, moles, scars, tattoos, cuts, wounds or stains can stick. If you gained this after birth, every existing flaw is wiped away. Your internal organs are still vulnerable though.
2681. Implausible Mobility,4.2
#You can move, attack and act using body parts that should never work as limbs - your eyes, eyebrows, eyelashes, lips, ears, nose, wrinkles, even bruises and skin conditions. Balance, gravity and mass still apply, and you may want Enhanced Durability to avoid tearing parts of yourself off in the process.
2682. Impossible State Survival,6.3
#You remain alive and fully conscious even in states where life should be impossible. Turned into a chair, melted into a puddle, flattened into a portrait — your life-force and mind persist intact, and you can often still think, sense, and act within the limits of your new form. Returning to normal usually needs outside help.
2683. Inanimate Object Dragon Physiology,5.4
#You are or can transform into a dragon made of inanimate matter — stone, glass, paper, metal, whatever suits you. You retain full dragon physiology in this form, with all the power and fury that implies, plus the properties of your chosen material.
2684. Inanimate Object Monster Physiology,5.0
#You are or can transform into a monstrous being made of some inanimate object, gaining supernatural powers tied to whatever material you embody. A clock-monster, a doll-monster, a chair-monster — each comes with its own thematic abilities and its own thematic weaknesses.
2685. Inaudibility,2.9
#You can be completely silent, or selectively audible only to people you choose. With training you can extend this silence to the area around you. Being unheard in a fire or emergency can work against you as much as for you.
2686. Incisive Appendages,3.5
#Your limbs cut, pierce and slash as if they were bladed weapons, whether through sheer focused force or by transforming outright into edges. A careless touch can slice flesh and bone. Cutting Immunity may be required to avoid hurting yourself.
2687. Incomprehensible Form,6.8
#Your true form and true power cannot be perceived or understood by ordinary senses. Anyone who tries is driven to terror or madness, their mind recoiling from a shape it cannot process. Users of Clear Sight may still see you clearly, and Incomprehension Negation poses a threat.
2688. Incorporeal Form,5.7
#You possess an incorporeal body — gas, energy, spirit, or some stranger substance — free from the constraints of matter. You interact with both physical and non-physical realms as a phantom-like being, untouchable by most mundane threats. Weak against Non-Physical Interaction and Non-Corporeal Slicing.
2689. Incubus Physiology,3.6
#You are an incubus, a male demon of seduction. You possess supernatural beauty, enhanced physicals, and magical aptitude for illusions and mental manipulation. Your powers grow stronger through romantic and sexual encounters. Vulnerable to holy powers and users of Chastity Embodiment.
2690. Indivisibility,5.7
#You cannot be divided. Your body cannot lose limbs, be cut apart, vaporized, or suffer joint dislocations. Your joints themselves are bound by a force that keeps the body unified no matter what is done to it. You may still be vulnerable to Essence Dispersal or Dissolution.
2691. Indomitable Belief,4.0
#Your belief in yourself, in others, or in an ideal is absolutely unshakable. Not mere confidence, but a transcendent conviction that grows stronger the harder adversity tries to break it. It inspires those around you, turns obstacles into fuel, and allows you to endure impossible hardships. Misplaced faith can still lead you astray, however.
2692. Indomitable Compassion,3.8
#Your compassion is boundless and unbreakable. You feel for the suffering of others on a profound level, and your warmth forms meaningful bonds wherever you go, inspiring allies to push past their limits. However, your kindness may leave you open to manipulation by those who would exploit it.
2693. Indomitable Courage,3.5
#Your courage is powerful enough to suppress even overwhelming fear. You can act and react normally in the face of death, combat, disaster, or horror itself, drawing upon superhuman reserves of bravery when it matters most. Does not grant immunity to Fear Inducement at higher levels.
2694. Indomitable Emotions,4.6
#Your emotions are indomitably powerful, granting you total immunity to Emotion Negation, Emotion Removal, Apathy, and all but the strongest forms of Emotion Manipulation. You can face immense psychological trauma and physical pain and refuse to surrender to despair. Certain emotions like fear or rage may still turn against you if uncontrolled.
2695. Indomitable Envy,3.7
#Your envy is an endless and consuming force, an ugly longing for everything others possess. This jealousy drives you to go to any lengths to claim what you desire, and the sheer intensity of it becomes a dangerous source of strength. May lead to your downfall if it takes over your mind.
2696. Indomitable Evil,4.1
#Your evil is absolute and unyielding. You will remain a villain until the very end, completely willing to inflict suffering and misery on anyone for any reason, from those who wronged you to those who simply happened to be there. Cosmic forces that punish wickedness may take notice of you.
2697. Indomitable Excitement,4.5
#Your excitement is endless and infectious. The world never grows stale to you, and every moment feels as fresh as the first. This exhilaration projects outward: colors seem brighter, pain feels duller, and allies near you have their courage and stamina bolstered to unbreakable levels.
2698. Indomitable Fear,4.0
#Your fear is all-consuming, but instead of paralyzing you it transforms into an unstoppable force. Terror fuels you with relentless urgency and desperate strength, pushing your body and instincts far beyond their normal limits. Without proper control your fear may blind you to reality and make you unable to think clearly.
2699. Indomitable Gluttony,3.6
#Your hunger is endless and ever-growing. You will always desire more food and drink beyond what any normal body could consume, and you will go to desperate and violent lengths to satisfy it. Poison is your greatest weakness unless your body has also adapted to become immune.
2700. Indomitable Happiness,4.3
#Your joy is endless and ever-growing, a positive force so strong it can push you through physical pain and psychological trauma and even death itself. You will never stop smiling. May make you seem insensitive to others around you, and you are still vulnerable to high-end emotion manipulators.
2701. Indomitable Hatred,4.2
#Your hatred is an unbreakable, malevolent force. It drives you with an urge to eradicate all you despise and to inflict pain on others, becoming a dark source of inner strength. If uncontrolled, it can make you prone to petty and illogical decisions that sabotage yourself in pursuit of your targets.
2702. Indomitable Heroism,4.7
#Your heroism is absolute and unwavering. You are devoted to protecting the world until the very end, and you inspire the hearts and minds of everyone around you. You fearlessly face any danger, take any burden, and bear the mantle of leader, rescuer, and symbol. You will never fall from grace.
2703. Indomitable Honor,4.0
#Your honor is unbreakable, an adherence to what is right that no bribe, threat, or temptation can erode. Your esteem and dignity are held to a standard few can match. Dishonorable methods are never an option, which may be exploited in a world where chivalry is dead.
2704. Indomitable Hope,4.1
#Your hope is boundless and aspirational, a determined longing that allows you to overcome impossible odds for the sake of your dreams. Your inclinations and determination are ever-growing, making you the last one to give up even when every other soul has fallen to despair.
2705. Indomitable Humility,3.9
#Your humility is unbreakable. You always think of others before yourself, and your modesty puts both narcissism and self-loathing to shame. You are immune to the seductions of ego and pride, giving you a balanced and unshakeable view of your own self-worth. May be easy to betray.
2706. Indomitable Libido,3.8
#(Nsfw) Your libido is inexhaustible, an unrestrained sexual appetite that grants you incredible stamina, heightened allure, and an endless capacity for pleasure. Every fiber of your being is fueled by desire, and your magnetism draws partners to you effortlessly. Lack of indulgence may leave you frustrated and unfocused.
2707. Indomitable Love,5.2
#Your love is absolute, a force so pure and resolute it shapes destiny itself and bends cruel worlds toward hope. It is your shield and sword, letting you protect those you hold dear with an impenetrable devotion that no hardship or malevolence can erode. Love may still blind you to reality.
2708. Indomitable Loyalty,4.0
#Your loyalty to those you hold dear is utterly unbreakable. You will never betray or abandon your bonds, enduring any hardship and making any sacrifice for them. Your devotion extends to your chosen cause, person, or group, and can inspire the same in others. May be exploited by mental manipulators forcing loyalty dilemmas.
2709. Indomitable Lust,4.2
#Your lust is insatiable, an all-consuming hunger that transcends mere carnal desire to include power, knowledge, pleasure, and conquest. Pain, fatigue, and fear become distant noise in the face of your craving. It burns endlessly within you, driving you forward without rest. May deteriorate your relationships.
2710. Indomitable Nature,5.8
#Your very nature is indomitable. You are nearly impossible to subdue, overcome, or vanquish, whether the assault is physical, mental, emotional, or spiritual. This indomitability is woven into your being itself, letting you push past all your own limits and resist any force that tries to break you. Does not grant Immortality or Invulnerability.
2711. Indomitable Pride,3.8
#Your pride is indomitable, a deep satisfaction in your own achievements and qualities that cannot be shaken. This pride grants you confidence, presence, and the intimate strength that comes from valuing yourself. However it may make you prone to arrogance and cause you to dangerously underestimate your opponents.
2712. Indomitable Rage,4.3
#Your rage is endless and escalating, an unquenchable fury that grants you unparalleled strength and ferocity in battle. You are immune to pacification and cannot be calmed. Through your wrath you shrug off pain and trauma that would kill a normal person. Uncontrolled, your rage will render you a feral berserker with no rational thought.
2713. Indomitable Sadness,3.9
#Your sorrow is profound and eternal, a grief so deep that it becomes inseparable from your being. Yet rather than breaking you, the sheer weight of your sadness forges resilience within you, giving you a strength born from emotional suffering. Uncontrolled melancholy may cause hopelessness and decreased self-preservation.
2714. Indomitable Sexuality,4.0
#(Nsfw) You are the embodiment of sexuality itself. Your libido is inexhaustible, your allure irresistible, and you experience and express every form of sexual energy with flawless intensity. It is not something you have but what you are, etched into biology, soul, and every thought. May be impossible to suppress when you want to.
2715. Indomitable Sloth,3.4
#Your sloth is endless and unshakable. You have no drive to work, exert yourself, or expend energy for anything, and this apathy insulates you from stress, obligation, and effort-based manipulations. However, you may genuinely lack the motivation to act even in life-threatening situations, making you an easy target.
2716. Indomitable Will,7.4
#Your willpower is an unbreakable force, allowing you to endure any amount of physical pain and psychological torment without surrendering. No matter how dire the situation, you refuse to yield, pushing past your limits and even cheating death and fate itself. At sufficient levels, you become immune to all forms of temptation, subordination and mental manipulation, as your resolve simply cannot be bent by anything short of overwhelming conceptual force.
2717. Indulgent Activity,6.2
#Dragon Ball Super - Your body and soul grow stronger the more you enjoy what you are doing, particularly combat. The more hits you take, the more you lose, the more of a thrill you feel, the more your physical stats and energy swell. Even if you should be broken emotionally, the sheer indulgence of the act keeps you climbing higher. This is the same principle that fuels Ultra Ego.
2718. Indus Worm Physiology,4.2
#Allows you to transform into the Skōlex, the legendary giant carnivorous worm said to inhabit the Indus River in ancient Greek writings. In this form you possess colossal size, crushing strength, and the ability to drag prey underwater. You can be controlled by Monster and Worm manipulators, however.
2719. Industrial Adaptation,2.6
#You are perfectly adapted to surviving in industrial environments such as refineries, factories, mines and power plants. Pollution, chemical fumes, heavy metals and stray electrical currents do nothing to you, allowing you to walk through toxic waste or grab a live wire without flinching.
2720. Inertia Immunity,4.8
#You are completely immune to inertia, the resistance of matter to changes in motion or rest. You can move at incredible speeds without being pulped by g-forces, start and stop on a dime, and never suffer whiplash, internal bleeding, or any of the usual consequences of violating Newton's first law.
2721. Inertia Independence,4.4
#You can function as if inertia applied to you normally, even when it doesn't. Normally an inertialess being would fail to land meaningful attacks or jumps since any force would stop them instantly, but you move, strike and leap with full effective momentum regardless of your actual state.
2722. Inertia Protection,4.7
#You are protected from anything with inertia, meaning that physical impacts lose all their force the moment they touch you. A bullet, a punch, a falling meteor, all die on your skin because their momentum simply terminates on contact. You may still be vulnerable to internal damage and non-inertial forms of energy.
2723. Inertial Assistance,5.2
#Your body naturally generates counteractive forces that offset your mass and inertia, no matter how heavy you become. Even if you weighed as much as a planet or infinitely, these forces would keep you as nimble as a normal person, letting you walk on ordinary ground without breaking it and move freely despite your impossible bulk.
2724. Inertial Frame Adaptation,4.1
#You are adapted to fictitious forces and inertial frame effects, meaning things like centrifugal force and sudden acceleration never throw you off. You can stand comfortably in a spinning centrifuge or a car that brakes at 200mph without being affected. Regular forces like gravity still push on you normally, though.
2725. Inertialess Body,5.0
#Your body has little to no inertia, granting you semi-invulnerability as attacks lose all their force the instant they touch you. You can accelerate and change direction instantaneously, and outside forces cannot easily push you around. On the flip side, you need constant force to move or attack at all, and this can become taxing.
2726. Inertialess Maneuverability,4.4
#Your maneuverability is as absurd as if you had no inertia, letting you start, stop, pivot and spin at incredible speeds without any momentum dragging on you. This applies to both linear and rotational motion, allowing for absurd aerial combat and dodging, though your reflexes may struggle to keep up with your own body.
2727. Inevitability Embodiment,8.4
#You are the living embodiment of inevitability, the things that are constant and unchangeable. Whatever you declare must be, will be. You enforce cosmic certainty, doom that cannot be outrun, and outcomes that cannot be stopped. However, you are bound by the rules you enforce, and clever targets who find a loophole are untouchable to you.
2728. Infected Arm,4.0
#One of your arms has been infected by some monstrous experiment, virus, or otherworldly creature, granting it abilities based on whatever tainted it. You might be able to form organic constructs, gain enormous strength, or produce horrific biological weapons from that limb. The infection is painful for a long time and can cause blurred vision and color distortion until you get used to it.
2729. Infestation Rejection,2.6
#You are immune to parasitic infection and can actively expel parasites from your own body or others. In some cases, your body itself is toxic to parasites, killing anything that tries to burrow into you.
2730. Infinite Digestive System,4.1
#Your stomach and digestive system can process any matter of any size or shape without harm. You can eat a car, a mountain, or a bonfire and feel fine afterwards, and with practice you can even store things inside and spit them back out later. You may still gain weight though.
2731. Infinite Energy,6.2
#You possess an unlimited source of energy that never runs dry, fueling any attack, technique or feat that requires energy. The source can supply any form, from electrical to kinetic to life energy, though losing control can overload you or devastate your surroundings. Counterable by Infinity Negation.
2732. Infinite Experience,8.6
#You have personally experienced and done literally everything there is to do. Every job, every skill, every life, every power, every location. Nothing can surprise you because you have already been there and done that countless times over, granting you unparalleled insight into any situation you find yourself in.
2733. Infinite Resurrection,7.8
#You endlessly resurrect after death, regardless of cause or method, always returning in perfect condition. You can still be injured and suffer normally, and sufficiently powerful erasure abilities can still permanently remove you from existence, but short of that nothing can keep you dead.
2734. Infinity Embodiment,9.2
#You are the physical personification of infinity itself. All boundless aspects, all endless quantities, all limitless concepts bow to your will. Whatever you touch becomes without end, and your very existence transcends any notion of a cap or ceiling.
2735. Influential Presence,5.4
#Your mere presence warps the surrounding area, generating a field centered on you that causes strange effects based on your nature. Weather may shift, powers may fade, hostility or wonder may bloom in those nearby. The downside is that your presence becomes a beacon to anyone with aura detection unless you learn to suppress it.
2736. Infra-Sound Hearing,2.7
#You can hear infrasound below the normal human range, allowing you to sense incoming earthquakes, volcanic activity and other natural disasters. You can also hear machines starting to malfunction before anyone else notices.
2737. Infrared Capacitor,3.2
#Your body acts as a living infrared battery, absorbing infrared radiation and storing it for later use. The stored energy can be channeled freely into whatever purpose you see fit.
2739. Initial Movement Sense,4.0
#Allows you to sense the initial movements of people and objects and predict the path they will follow through on. Can be feinted by targets able to change course after committing, and outside forces can disrupt the predicted path.
2740. Injury Immunity,7.4
#You cannot be affected by physical harm, though you can still be harmed. A stab to a vital organ may make a hole in you, but it will not stop your body from working perfectly. You can still be mechanically hampered by dismemberment and extreme destruction like total incineration can still kill you.
2741. Ink Mimicry,4.3
#Your body is made of ink, or can transform into it fully. You can shift between liquid, paste, and solid ink roughly as hard as soft stone, reshape yourself, and change color at will. Water is a notable weakness.
2742. Inkanyamba Physiology,5.4
#You are or can transform into an Inkanyamba, the legendary African serpent of waterfall lakes. In this form you possess the traits of a massive eel-serpent, can ascend into the sky as a tornado, and your moods shape seasonal storms around you.
2743. Inner Balance,6.6
#You have attained perfect harmony with every aspect of your being — mind, body, spirit and all else converging into one still center. You are immune to all forms of imbalance and can even channel your most unstable qualities as power, unlocking a wide array of supernatural abilities tied to your higher, true self. Falling from this state is catastrophic.
2744. Inner Beast Empowerment,4.9
#Your inner beast makes you stronger, faster, and more durable, unlocking abilities tied to its affinity and enhancing those you already possess. Some users can even draw sustenance from the beast or slow their aging, though you risk losing your senses and running wild.
2745. Inner Beast Symbiosis,5.2
#You host an inner beast within yourself in a symbiotic bond, able to harness its powers, communicate with it, and negotiate favors in exchange for its cooperation. With enough effort you can give your beast a form through your own body or energy, though the risk of being possessed never fully goes away.
2746. Inner Beast,4.7
#You possess an inner beast, an innate creature residing within you that grants great strength, power and ferocity. The beast's nature is uniquely bound to your own characteristics and experiences, manifesting as anything from a single tame companion to a pack of wild monsters waiting to be unleashed.
2747. Inner Being Empowerment,4.6
#Your inner being makes you stronger, faster and more durable, granting you new abilities tied to its affinity while enhancing whatever powers you already possess. Depending on the being, you may even draw sustenance from it or slow your aging considerably.
2748. Inner Being Symbiosis,5.1
#You share a symbiotic relationship with your inner being, housing an innate entity within yourself whose powers and attributes you can channel freely. The bond runs deep enough that you can negotiate favors and trade strengths, though possession is always a lurking risk.
2749. Inner Being,4.8
#You possess an inner being, an intrinsic entity dwelling within you that embodies your true self and grants immense strength and potential. You can converse with it to draw on its wisdom or channel its energies, though accessing it at all can be very difficult without meditation.
2750. Inner Dragon Physiology,6.1
#You possess the physiology of your own personal inner dragon, a draconic creature woven into your very essence. Its form is a perfect reflection of your nature, individuality and the ideal concept of a dragon, making you a one-of-a-kind wyrm under your complete control.
2751. Inner God,8.9
#You possess an inner entity of infinite power and knowledge dwelling within your soul, mind and body. It has no desires of its own and instead identifies completely with yours, granting you whatever knowledge, enhancement, or ability best suits your immediate goals. It is fiercely protective of you and will spontaneously empower you in times of need, making you effectively untouchable as long as it remains content.
2752. Inner Self,4.5
#You possess an inner self, an intrinsic blend of emotional and spiritual essence that manifests as a personal embodiment of your attributes, ambitions, beliefs, fears and memories. It serves as your inner compass, unfazed by conventional notions of good or bad, and guides you through your inner journey. You may need to meditate to open the passage between you and it.
2753. Inner Source,4.8
#You possess an inner source deeply intertwined with your essence, a quintessential personal wellspring of energy and latent potential that empowers everything you do. It may manifest as an inner entity, an inner force, or even an entire inner world, but its purpose is always to grant you a unique connection to your extraordinary capabilities. Could potentially be stolen from you.
2754. Inner Wellspring,5.5
#You possess a vast inner wellspring, a boundless reservoir of life, power and magic rooted deep within your being. This wellspring is a source of infinite vitality, strength and resilience that you can tap into and direct as needed. In some cases you yourself are the wellspring, existing as the very source the power flows from.
2755. Inner World,5.8
#You possess an inner world, an esoteric metaphysical dimension within you shaped by your thoughts, emotions, memories, beliefs and desires. This inner reality is full of wonders and dangers that reflect your nature and can influence both you and itself. Some users never achieve full mastery over their own inner world, and it is vulnerable to those who can manipulate such domains.
2756. Innervation Immunity,2.6
#You are immune to any effect that would deprive you of your sense of touch. Numbing drugs, nerve attacks and touch-based sensory removal simply do not work on you.
2757. Inodorosity,2.2
#Your body produces no discernible scent at all, allowing you to easily evade bloodhounds, enhanced smell users and any scent-based tracking. You may not be able to turn the ability off, so expect to smell like absolutely nothing forever.
2758. Inorganic Empowerment,4.0
#Allows you to become stronger, faster and more durable when you come in contact with inorganic materials, possibly unlocking related abilities or drawing sustenance from them. Overuse may lead to dependency or outright addiction to the material.
2759. Insanity Empowerment,4.0
#You grow stronger, faster and more durable the more insanity surrounds you, whether it is your own or someone else's. The madder the situation, the more you thrive, with high enough levels of insanity even unlocking new abilities and slowing your aging to a crawl.
2760. Insect Dragon Physiology,5.7
#You are an Insect Dragon, a dragon whose physical form resembles insects and shares their abilities. If you take after an ant, you can spit acid and carry many times your weight; if you take after a beetle, your chitinous armor is nigh impenetrable; if you take after a mantis, your scything arms can cleave steel.
2761. Insect Physiology,3.6
#You are an insect or can transform into one, whether that be a cockroach, beetle, mantis, fly or any other variety. You gain the traits of the insect you become, including their strengths and weaknesses. Hope you're not afraid of cold weather or bug spray.
2763. Insectoid Physiology,4.3
#You are an insectoid, a humanoid with the traits and appearance of an insect or arachnid. Your exact features depend on which bug you resemble, but you possess the enhanced strength, durability, agility and senses of your chosen form, along with its natural weapons and natural weaknesses.
2764. Insecurity Embodiment,5.0
#You are the manifestation of insecurity itself, existing primarily on the mental or psychic plane as a living concept. You are intangible to most, but your presence alone induces crippling insecurity in anyone who perceives you, and you embody every gnawing doubt that has ever plagued a sentient mind. You may or may not be aware that you aren't a real person.
2765. Instant Kill Immunity,5.2
#You are immune to instant kills, any attack that relies on an instantaneous nature to take you down will fail regardless of its raw power. Does not protect you from being ground down through normal damage, and immunity bypassing abilities still work.
2766. Instructive Muscle Memory,4.2
#You can copy any movement or physical action after indirect observation, whether by hearing instructions, reading a manual, or watching a video. Acrobatics, martial arts, dexterous crafts, your body takes the instruction and performs it flawlessly. Cannot mimic superpowers and only extends to what your body is physically capable of achieving.
2767. Intangibility Immunity,4.6
#You are immune to intangibility and intangible attacks, ghosts and phasers cannot pass through you or harm you with insubstantial strikes. In return, you can harm them as easily as any solid being. Weak against ultimate intangibility and the usual immunity bypassing.
2768. Intangible Bodily Fluids,2.8
#Your bodily fluids, blood, sweat, saliva, tears, are intangible, passing harmlessly through solid matter. Difficult to bleed you dry when your blood slides through any container, though maintaining the property may require a specific diet or lifestyle.
2769. Intangible Tears,1.2
#Your tears are intangible, they phase through your face as they fall and never wet the shirt of whoever is comforting you. A curious oddity, utterly useless unless you find a very creative application.
2770. Intelligence Infinitum,7.8
#Your intellect grows without limit, increasing moment by moment with no ceiling in sight. Given enough time to think, there is no problem you cannot solve, no concept you cannot comprehend. Weak to Infinity Negation and Downgrading, and some growth may require specific conditions to be met.
2771. Absolute Intelligence,8.6
#Your intellectual faculties transcend every sentient being in the verse. Flawless memory, unparalleled foresight, unlimited concentration, instant comprehension of anything you encounter and a mind capable of producing ideas no other being could ever conceive. You are not omniscient, however, so your plans and inventions can still go awry against the unknown.
2772. Enhanced Intelligence,3.8
#Your intellect is far beyond that of an ordinary human, allowing you to memorize and process vast amounts of information at phenomenal speed. You can apply this to science, engineering, strategy, art, and combat, predicting enemy movements through pure logic. Those with Supernatural or Absolute Intelligence can still outwit you.
2773. Supernatural Intelligence,6.2
#Your mind processes information at speeds no ordinary genius could match, simplifying complex systems instantly and generating groundbreaking ideas and technologies with ease. Where others see chaos, you see structure. At this level, isolation from lesser minds is almost unavoidable.
2774. Peak Human Intelligence,2.8
#You possess intelligence at the absolute peak of what a human can achieve, with excellent memory, fast learning and information processing rivalling the greatest real world geniuses. Not superhuman, and you cannot outthink those with enhanced or supernatural intellect, but among ordinary people you stand above all.
2775. Intelligent Regeneration,6.3
#Your healing factor is smart, it does not blindly multiply cells but repairs them to their optimal healthy form, curing tumors and illnesses rather than spreading them. Broken bones set themselves, embedded objects get shifted out of the way, and any birth defects you had are corrected over time. Instant death and complete destruction still apply.
2776. Interaction Symbiosis,6.5
#You are bonded with a fundamental force entity, an embodiment or supernatural being tied to one of the fundamental forces of reality. Through this symbiosis you wield potent force-based abilities, but the entity may attempt to possess you or outright destroy your body if the bond grows unstable.
2777. Interbreeding,2.1
#You are reproductively compatible with any species you choose, your reproductive organs shifting to fit your partner and produce viable fertile offspring. May not extend to truly alien beings, and some unions may draw the wrath of higher powers or produce offspring with unpredictable mutations.
2778. Interexistence,5.8
#You exist and do not exist at the same time. You are physically present and can be remembered, but your existence cannot be recorded, read or identified by any medium. You do not appear in photographs, videos, paintings or books unless inserted as a fictional character. Making yourself known to others, even when you want to, can be difficult.
2779. Internal Force Defiance,3.5
#You can ignore the internal forces acting on your body, letting your limbs and body parts move faster and more precisely than they ever should. You cannot propel your whole body this way, but individual parts can move with uncanny speed and control. Still vulnerable to external forces.
2780. Internal Friction Defiance,3.2
#Your body ignores its own internal friction, meaning your muscles, joints and tendons move without any resistance or wear. This makes your movements smoother, faster and far less taxing than they should be. Other physical forces still affect you normally.
2781. Internal Invulnerability,4.4
#You are immune to any and all internal damage, poisons, ruptures, organ failure, internal bleeding, none of it affects you. Your outside can still be cut, burned and broken, so you will need External Invulnerability if you want to be truly untouchable.
2782. Internal Reinforcement,3.4
#Your internal organs and systems are armored and reinforced, protecting them from rupture, trauma and internal damage. You may still have weak points, and non-mechanical forms of damage like poison or energy attacks can slip past the armor.
2783. Internet Program Physiology,4.3
#Your body is made of living internet program, letting you transform into a forum, a flash game, a script or other digital construct. You can inhabit and travel through networks as data, but you are vulnerable to viruses, crashes and malfunction.
2784. Intimacy Empowerment,3.3
#You grow stronger, faster and more durable through acts of physical and emotional intimacy. Hugs, kisses, cuddling and deeper forms of closeness all fuel your power, potentially unlocking new abilities or slowing your aging. A hermit's nightmare.
2785. Intimidating Glare,1.6
#Your glare alone is enough to intimidate others, making weaker willed individuals flinch, back down or simply avoid you. Does not work if your eyesight is compromised or if the target cannot see your eyes.
2786. Intimidating Voice,1.7
#Your voice is naturally authoritative and frightening, capable of instilling fear in others through speech alone. Whether it is a heavy growl or a shrill command, your words carry weight that shakes lesser wills.
2787. Intoxication Embodiment,5.8
#You are the living embodiment of intoxication, ecstasy and the high. The more you indulge, the stronger you become, riding the urge into new forms of bliss and power. Going cold turkey, however, sends you into crippling withdrawal.
2788. Intuitive Aptitude,5.5
#You possess an innate intuition that lets you grasp the precise mechanisms of anything you encounter, from machines to organisms to cosmic phenomena, without needing formal education. You can still forget things, and some innately illogical truths may remain opaque.
2789. Intuitive Bilingualism,2.0
#You can intuitively speak, understand and read a secondary language in addition to your native one, despite never having formally studied it. Limited to one extra language, and may occasionally fumble niche slang or dialects.
2790. Intuitive Empathy,3.2
#You instinctively absorb the emotions, sensations and perspectives of people around you without any mental filter. This makes you incredibly perceptive and able to slip into another's shoes effortlessly, but crowds are exhausting and other people's trauma bleeds into you like it's your own.
2791. Intuitive Intelligence,4.6
#Your subconscious does the heavy lifting for you. Inventing, planning, theorizing and learning happen beneath the surface without conscious rumination, letting you grasp how things work on instinct alone. You still need external stimulus to point your mind at a problem, and the answers come as gut certainty rather than true understanding.
2792. Inugami Physiology,4.2
#You are or can transform into an Inugami, a dog-god spirit born from a cruel ritual involving a starved and beheaded dog. You are a master of either black magic or white arts depending on your nature, though most Inugami are bound to a master and are vulnerable to those who can control spirits and souls.
2793. Inverse Activity,4.5
#Your movements and attacks work in reverse to the forces acting on you. The more time slows, the faster you move. The stronger gravity, friction or inertia gets, the easier you act. In environments where these properties are entirely absent, however, you become helpless.
2794. Inverted Thermoreceptor,1.1
#You feel cold as hot and hot as cold. A mild annoyance most of the time, though it does mean you can happily lounge in a blizzard while complaining about how stuffy the ice hotel is.
2795. Invisibility Awareness,3.3
#You automatically detect cloaked and invisible targets, seeing them as clearly as anything else. Sneaking past you is nearly impossible, though losing your eyesight would also nullify this power.
2796. Invisible Skin,2.7
#You can turn your skin and soft tissues transparent or entirely invisible, revealing the structures beneath. At full expression you look like a walking skeleton, which is terrifying in combat and awful on a first date. Might be irreversible.
2797. Invitation Bypassing,2.1
#A classic vampire power, you no longer need an invitation to enter someone's home. You can come and go as you please, ignoring the threshold rules that bind lesser creatures of the night.
2798. Ion Empowerment,3.4
#Whenever you come into contact with Ion Force you become stronger, faster and more durable, and your existing abilities are amplified. With enough exposure you may even be able to draw sustenance from ionic sources and slow your aging.
2799. Ionic Capacitor,3.5
#Your body functions as a living battery for ionic energy, absorbing and storing it indefinitely for later use. You can channel the stored energy however you please, whenever you please.
2800. Ionic Mimicry,4.8
#Your body is made of or can fully transform into ionic energy, retaining all your organs and anatomy but now composed of charged particles. You can shift between physical and homogeneous ion forms, channeling the energy through your cells, bones and muscles to fortify your body.
2801. Iron Empowerment,3.2
#When in contact with iron you become stronger, faster, and more durable. Touching large iron sources can even sustain you in place of food and slow your aging, but lose your iron and you lose your edge.
2802. Iron Mimicry,4.3
#Your body is made of iron, or can transform into it at will. You gain immense durability, malleability, and magnetizability, but you also inherit iron's weaknesses, including extreme weight, rusting, and vulnerability to magnetism manipulation.
2803. Irresistible Self,2.3
#You are an irresistible force to yourself, meaning you can always move your own body with ease no matter how heavy you become. Useful if you are a giant or weighed down with armor, but external forces can still push, crush, or mind-control you normally.
2804. Island Mimicry,5.0
#Your body takes on the traits of a living island, your skin becoming soil and stone, your frame hosting forests, streams and wildlife. You gain immense size and durability and can host entire ecosystems on your back.
2805. Isopod Physiology,2.8
#Your body takes on the traits of isopods, granting you a hardened carapace, the ability to curl into a defensive ball, and resistance to underwater pressure. You may need to stay in humid environments and are weakened by temperature extremes.
2806. J'ba Fofi Physiology,4.2
#African Mythology - You either are or can transform into a J'ba Fofi, a giant venomous spider from Congolese folklore that can grow up to the size of a house. You possess immense physical strength, potent venom, and can weave webs strong enough to ensnare large prey between trees. Despite your size, you are still an animal and can die by natural or violent means.
2807. Jörmungandr Physiology,7.8
#Norse Mythology - You either are or can transform into Jörmungandr, the Midgard Serpent, the second child of Loki large enough to encircle the world and bite its own tail. Your physical might rivals that of Thor himself, your venom can poison the sky and sea, and your scales shrug off all but the mightiest of divine weapons. You are a harbinger of Ragnarök given flesh.
2808. Jötunn Physiology,6.6
#Norse Mythology - You either are or can transform into a Jötunn, the god-giants of Norse myth. You possess immense physical abilities on par with the Aesir themselves, mastery over primal elements like frost, fire or stone depending on your lineage, and a natural affinity for ancient magic. You are, however, vulnerable to divine slayers and weapons forged to kill gods.
2809. Jabberwock Physiology,5.8
#You either are or can transform into the Jabberwock of Lewis Carroll's nonsense poem, a dragon-like beast with a terrible bite, dreadful claws, leathery wings and a long scaly neck. You possess immense physical strength, durability beyond most dragons, and a horrific presence that instills dread. If the Vorpal Blade exists in your world, however, your head is one snicker-snack away from rolling.
2810. Jack-in-Irons Physiology,5.2
#Yorkshire Folklore - You either are or can transform into a Jack-in-Irons, a malevolent ghost-giant covered in rattling chains that haunts lonely roads. You wield a spiked club with crushing force, possess the strength of a giant and the unnatural endurance of the restless dead, and the severed heads of your victims hang from your chains as grim trophies. Being evil in nature, you are vulnerable to divine magic and holy relics.
2811. Jackal Physiology,2.3
#You either are or can transform into a jackal, granting you enhanced senses, stamina, pack instincts and a cunning predatory edge. Useful for hunting, scavenging and running through the night.
2812. Jackalope Physiology,2.8
#You either are or can transform into a jackalope, a jackrabbit with antelope horns. You possess enhanced speed, agility and leaping ability, along with a set of sharp horns useful for goring the unwary. Folklore claims jackalopes can mimic human voices, which you may be able to do as well.
2813. Jactitation Absolute,7.4
#You are absolutely immune to any and all forms of immobilization. No power, spell, toxin or technique that stops, slows, paralyzes, petrifies, freezes time around you, or otherwise restricts your movement can affect you. You will always be able to move.
2814. Jactitation,4.6
#You are unaffected by immobility effects such as paralysis, chronokinetic time stops, neurotoxins and other supernatural forms of movement restriction. You may still be bound by physical methods like chains, ropes and shackles, however.
2815. Jaguar Physiology,2.9
#You either are or can transform into a jaguar, granting you enhanced strength, speed, stealth and one of the most powerful bites of any feline, strong enough to crunch through skulls and turtle shells alike.
2816. Jakotsu Baba Physiology,4.1
#Japanese Folklore - You either are or can transform into a Jakotsu Baba, a yokai hag surrounded by snakes, clutching a blue snake in your right hand and a red in your left. You can command the serpents around you to attack, frighten or drive away intruders, and possess the longevity and mysterious presence of an old yokai. As a yokai, you are vulnerable to certain rituals and holy relics.
2817. Jann Physiology,4.6
#Arabic Mythology - You either are or can transform into a jann, the ancestral and weakest form of genie. You are a shapeshifter by nature, capable of taking the forms of whirlwinds, serpents and white camels, and possess minor wish-granting magic. You may, however, be bound to a receptacle such as a lamp, and whoever holds it commands you.
2818. Jatai Physiology,2.7
#Japanese Folklore - You either are or can transform into a Jatai, a yokai that takes the form of a snake-like kimono sash. You can slither, constrict, and strangle sleeping victims who dream of serpents, and are nearly impossible to notice when draped over a pillow.
2819. Jellyfish Physiology,3.2
#You possess the traits of a jellyfish, granting you a boneless body, venomous stinging tendrils, water propulsion, and a degree of transparency. Certain species of jellyfish are even biologically immortal, and you may inherit that quirk as well.
2820. Jenglot Physiology,3.3
#Indonesian Folklore - You either are or can transform into a Jenglot, a tiny deformed humanoid doll-creature. In your natural state you do nothing, but when fed dark magic or blood you can act as a protector, curse enemies, or function as a living good luck charm. Your small size is both an advantage for hiding and a significant physical weakness.
2821. Jersey Devil Physiology,5.1
#North American Folklore - You either are or can transform into the Jersey Devil, a flying biped with cloven hooves, bat-like wings, a goat's head, clawed hands and a forked tail. You possess terrifying speed, flight, supernatural endurance, and a blood-curdling scream that can paralyze lesser beings with fear.
2822. Jet Pack Protrusion,3.0
#You can generate a jet pack directly from your body, mainly for flight but also for sudden bursts of propulsive force. It may still require fuel to power, and can be sabotaged or destroyed if someone gets behind you.
2823. Jet Propulsion Arms,3.6
#MHA-adjacent - Your arms contain built-in ignition systems that emit propulsive energy for high-speed movement and devastating rocket-powered punches. You can fly, dash, and hit with the force of a missile impact, but without proper protection you risk tearing your own arms apart from the recoil.
2824. Jiang Shi Physiology,3.6
#You are a jiang shi, a Chinese hopping vampire. Your body is stiff as a corpse, forcing you to hop rather than walk, but you possess great strength, claws and the ability to drain qi from the living. Vulnerable to peach wood swords, black dog blood and talismans placed on your forehead.
2825. Jigsaw Mimicry,3.0
#Your body can transform, partially or fully, into interlocking jigsaw pieces. In this form you can disassemble and reassemble yourself, shrug off attacks by letting pieces pop off and popping them back in, or rearrange your own shape.
2826. Jikininki Physiology,3.5
#You are a jikininki, a cursed cannibalistic ghost of Japanese folklore that feeds on the dead. You possess ghostly traits, enhanced senses for locating corpses and the ability to manifest at night, but are plagued by an undying hunger and vulnerable to Shinto rites.
2827. Jinmengyo Physiology,2.1
#You are or can transform into a jinmengyo, a Japanese cryptid fish with a human face. You gain aquatic physiology and an unsettling visage that disturbs anyone who sees it.
2828. Jinmenken Physiology,2.2
#You either are or can transform into a jinmenken, a dog with a human face from Japanese urban legend. You possess canine physiology and a presence that unnerves anyone who encounters you at night. Considered an omen of disasters.
2829. Jointlessness,3.2
#Your body lacks joints entirely, yet your limbs remain attached and functional. Every part of you can rotate and bend in any direction, granting absolute flexibility and making you immune to joint locks, grapples and arthropathy.
2830. Jorōgumo Physiology,4.3
#You are or can transform into a jorōgumo, a spider-yokai that can take the form of a seductive woman. You possess the strength and web-spinning of a giant spider, beguiling beauty, and a natural talent for music and performance. Associated with deep pools and waterfall basins.
2831. Jubokko Physiology,4.2
#You are a jubokko, a vampiric tree yokai born from ground soaked in centuries of bloodshed. Your twisted branches can snatch victims and impale them on thorns to drain their blood. Limited in mobility and easily spotted by the defiled earth around your roots, but deadly in ambush.
2832. Jueyuan Physiology,3.3
#You are a jueyuan, a monkey-like creature from Chinese folklore. You possess great strength, speed and the ability to assume human form, along with an unerring sense of smell for finding specific people. Folklore says they kidnap beauties — your instincts may lean similarly primal.
2833. Juice Mimicry,2.5
#Your body can transform into juice, whether a single type or any kind you choose. In this form you flow like liquid, squeeze through small spaces and reform at will, but you can be literally drunk by an unfortunate or unfortunately thirsty enemy.
2834. Jumen Physiology,1.4
#You are a jumen, an extremely ugly humanoid yokai with a grimacing face. Despite your horrendous appearance, you are largely harmless and possess only minor yokai traits. Vulnerable to Shinto rituals.
2835. Jungle Adaptation,2.6
#Your body is perfectly suited to the challenges of the jungle. Disease, poisonous plants, hostile predators and sweltering humidity all trouble you far less than a normal person, and you instinctively know what is safe to eat and where to find shelter.
2836. Justice Embodiment,6.6
#You are the embodiment of justice, fairness and the law. You possess an innate sense for what is right and wrong, and your presence compels order. You cannot interfere with the free will of others, as that would not be just, and your power may scale with the laws of the culture you preside over.
2837. Kaiju Symbiosis,6.2
#You host a gigantic megafauna within yourself, merged through eugenics, spiritual tethering or organ transplant. You gain vast physiological enhancements and esoteric abilities drawn from the kaiju's essence, but the beast's mind and body may try to overtake yours if you grow weak, and stronger titans may destroy you outright.
2838. Kamaitachi Physiology,4.2
#You are a kamaitachi, a weasel yokai with sickle-long claws that rides on whirlwinds. You move at such speeds that you appear as the wind itself, slashing victims with cuts so clean they barely bleed. Legend says you come in threes - one to knock down, one to cut, one to heal the wound.
2839. Kameosa Physiology,2.8
#You are a kameosa, a tsukumogami in the shape of an old cracked jar. You contain an endless amount of water or sake, freely pouring out whatever quantity any thirsty human may desire. Utterly benign, and the life of any party.
2840. Kanedama Physiology,3.6
#You are a kanedama, a money spirit formed from the essence of metal and gold koban coins. You are drawn to the homes of pure-hearted people and despise the corrupted, blessing the former with wealth. Your presence may eventually corrupt even the best of owners.
2841. Kangaroo Physiology,2.4
#You either are or can transform into a kangaroo, gaining its powerful legs capable of launching you dozens of feet, its tough tail for balance and striking, and a pouch to carry your valuables. Your kicks can shatter ribs.
2842. Kappa Physiology,3.8
#You are a kappa, a child-sized reptilian water yokai with scaly skin and a water-filled plate on your head. You are a master wrestler and swimmer, strong enough to drag adult humans into rivers. If the plate on your head dries out, you lose all your strength.
2843. Kapre Physiology,3.9
#You are a kapre, a towering hairy tree demon from Philippine folklore, 7 to 9 feet tall with a beard and an ever-present ganja pipe. You dwell in the branches of old acacias and banyans, and the belt around your bahag grants you invisibility to humans at will.
2844. Karankoncolos Physiology,3.6
#You are a karankoncolos, a malevolent Turkish demon that haunts the ten dreadful days of Zemheri. You can mimic the voices of loved ones to lure victims into trances, and strike down any passerby who fails to answer your questions with the word "kara". Vulnerable to holy relics and prayers.
2845. Karma Embodiment,7.4
#You embody karma itself, the concept of action and reaction that drives the entire cycle of cause and effect. Every deed done in your presence returns to its doer, for good or ill, and you can accelerate or redirect this cycle at will. You are causality made flesh.
2846. Karma Empowerment,5.2
#Your body feeds on karma itself, every good deed or justified wrong done by or to you makes you stronger, faster and tougher. Saints and absolute bastards both thrive with this, and if you accumulate enough karmic weight you may even slow your aging or unlock affinities tied to your actions. Neutral lifestyles see little benefit.
2847. Kasa-Obake Physiology,2.6
#You are a kasa-obake, a one-eyed, one-legged umbrella yokai. You can hop around with surprising agility, shield people from rain and wind, and your long tongue is good for pranks. Your existence is tied to the parasol you evolved from; if it is destroyed, so are you.
2848. Kasha Physiology,4.6
#You are a kasha, a demonic cat-ghoul that preys on the dead. Your physical abilities are well above human, you can sense corpses and lingering souls from great distances, and you can snatch souls destined for hell before they reach judgement. You can also reanimate corpses for your own amusement, though divine magic burns you fiercely.
2849. Katana Mimicry,3.4
#You are or can transform your body into katanas, either as a blade-studded humanoid or as homogeneous sword-matter with no vital points. In humanoid form you still have organs beneath the steel and can be wounded, homogeneous form trades individuality for durability.
2850. Katsura Otoko Physiology,5.0
#You are a Katsura Otoko, a seductive moon spirit of devastating beauty. At night you can project your image onto the moon and any mortal who gazes at it becomes hypnotized, slowly feeding you their life force, a long enough stare is fatal. You are powerless during the day and those of indomitable will can simply look away.
2851. Kawahime Physiology,4.3
#You are a kawahime, a water-dwelling yokai who haunts bridges and watermills as a beautiful woman (or occasionally a kappa-like form). You can seduce mortals and feed on their life-force through touch or kiss, and you have natural shapeshifting and aquatic abilities. Shinto rites will banish you easily.
2852. Kawauso Physiology,3.0
#You are a kawauso, an old river-otter that turned into a playful yokai. You can shapeshift into an attractive human to run mischievous schemes, you have an instinctive knack for stealing sake, and your otter form is fast, cunning and at home in any waterway. Mostly harmless, but a handful in a bar.
2853. Kayeri Physiology,3.2
#You are a kayeri, a Colombian forest spirit that manifests through mushrooms and rainforest vines during the wet season. You possess supernatural strength and speed, and you share awareness with the fungi and creeping plants of the jungle. A bone-tipped arrow to the kidney can still kill you.
2854. Kaze No Kami Physiology,4.8
#You are a Kaze No Kami, a plague spirit riding a yellow cloud of pestilence. Any who your cloud passes over fall sick with whatever disease you choose, and you can manipulate the wind to fail crops and spread ruin. Shinto priests and shrine maidens can purify you outright.
2855. Kee-wakw Physiology,4.4
#You are a Kee-wakw, a cannibalistic Abenaki giant born from a human whose heart turned to ice through great evil. Your body is massive, half-human half-animal, and your hunger is insatiable. You are vulnerable to Abenaki prayers and the rites of their gods.
2856. Keelut Physiology,4.2
#Inuit Mythology - You are a Keelut, a hairless underworld hound that feeds on the dead. You leave no tracks whatsoever, making you nearly impossible to detect until you strike, and your mere presence can feel like a death omen. Inuit rituals and prayers can drive you off.
2857. Kejourou Physiology,4.0
#You are a kejourou, a yokai with disturbingly thick and long black hair covering your face and sometimes your whole body. You can manipulate your hair as grasping whips, blades or curtains to ensnare the men who come to the red-light districts you haunt. Outside such places of ill-repute your powers wane.
2858. Kelpie Physiology/Each-uisge,5.1
#You are an Each-uisge, the more savage cousin of the Kelpie, free to haunt any body of water including the open sea. You have monstrous strength, water-based shapeshifting and a ravenous hunger that leaves only livers behind. The scent of prey can send you into a reckless frenzy, and cold iron will drop you.
2859. Kelpie Physiology,4.5
#You are a kelpie, a Scottish water-horse spirit that can shift between a powerful black steed and a human form, with your hooves reversed as a tell. You are immensely strong, tied intimately to rivers and lochs, and can drag prey into the water with ease. Your bridle is your weakness, whoever holds it controls you utterly.
2860. Keukegen Physiology,3.1
#You are a keukegen, a small dog-sized disease spirit made entirely of dirty hair. You haunt filthy homes and spread sickness and minor misfortune to their inhabitants, though without malice, you're just doing what you are. You can only exist in squalor, a good scrubbing will banish you instantly.
2861. Key Mimicry,2.9
#You can transform into keys, either a humanoid form made of interlocking keys with organs still beneath, or homogeneous key-matter with no vital points. You might only become certain types of keys and there's no guarantee your key-form actually opens anything.
2862. Kiko Physiology,6.3
#You are a Kiko, the first celestial evolution of a good-aligned kitsune. You have shed any physical body and become pure spirit, able to take the form of a brilliant white nine-tailed fox or whatever shape you desire. As a servant of Inari you possess considerable divine spiritual power, though you remain below the tenko and kuko, and evil-aligned powers may burn you due to your alignment.
2863. Kinetic Durability,4.0
#Your body converts kinetic energy into reinforcement, making you tougher the more force is applied to you. Bullets, punches and falls feed your durability instead of damaging you, scaling up to superhuman levels when hit hard enough.
2865. Kinetic Energy Empowerment,3.5
#You grow stronger, faster and more durable whenever you come into contact with kinetic energy. Battlefields, storms and stampedes feed you, and with enough exposure you may draw sustenance from motion itself and slow your aging.
2866. Kinetic Energy Power Link,4.8
#Your powers are fueled and controlled by your kinetic energy, using motion and momentum as their power source. The more kinetic energy you can muster, the stronger all your other abilities become, though unstable kinetics may cause them to go haywire.
2867. Kinetic Force Redirection,5.8
#Any kinetic force enacted on your body is automatically redirected back to its source or to another target of your choosing. Physical attacks become utterly useless against you, though the environment around you may still take the brunt of the redirected force.
2868. Kinetic Mind,4.6
#Your sensory and psychological processes are amplified by kinetic energy, accelerating your thoughts to computer-like speeds. You can process information, react and plan far faster than a normal mind, though over-acceleration can fry your mental facilities.
2869. Kinetic Quintessence,6.6
#You are an infinite wellspring of kinetic energy, generating it endlessly from within your own body without needing any external source. The limitless output can be used to enhance your physical and mental attributes to superhuman levels, power any machine, or fuel any kinetic technique indefinitely. However, your body can only safely handle so much output at once before needing rest.
2870. Kinkajou Physiology,2.1
#You are or can transform into a kinkajou, the honey bear of the rainforest. You gain its nimble climbing, prehensile tail, sharp teeth and long sticky tongue, and an unfortunate fondness for fermented fruit.
2871. Kinutanuki Physiology,2.3
#You are or can mimic a Kinutanuki, a strange and largely harmless yokai born from silk that has come to life as a tsukumogami. You take the form of long strands of silk sporting the hands, feet, tail and head of a tanuki, fond of puns and drumming on your own belly. Destruction of the silk you evolved from may destroy you in turn.
2872. Kishi Physiology,4.6
#African Mythology - You are or can transform into a Kishi, a demon with a human face in front and a ravenous hyena face on the back of your head. The human side is a cunning and ruthless predator who seduces and tricks victims, while the hyena devours anything its jaws can close on. Vulnerable to rituals and prayers of the African pantheons.
2873. Kitsune Physiology,5.8
#You possess the characteristics and abilities of a kitsune, a Japanese fox spirit that grows stronger with age. You can shapeshift, cast illusions, conjure foxfire, and possess others, and over time you grow additional tails up to nine. Upon reaching a thousand years and your ninth tail, you turn golden and become a Celestial Fox gaining clairvoyance across a thousand li. Some fox trait always lingers in your form, and dogs are your natural enemy.
2874. Knockback Immunity,3.3
#You are immune to being knocked back by any force. You can still be pushed down or moved normally, but no blow, no matter how powerful, will send you flying. A charging bull could ram you and all you would do is stagger. Power Negation and Omni-Absorption are the perfect counters.
2875. Knockdown Immunity,3.3
#You are immune to being knocked down by any force. You can still be pushed back or moved, but you remain on your feet regardless of what hits you. May have an upper force limit before even this power gives out, and Power Negation bypasses it entirely.
2876. Knocker Physiology,3.1
#Welsh Folklore - You are or can transform into a knocker, an ugly little goblin of the mines. You possess supernatural agility in tight tunnels, can create unsettling knocking sounds that echo unnaturally and can cause minor cave-ins with focus. Vulnerable to cold-iron, folk charms and divine relics, and your power wanes far from the underground.
2877. Knowledge Anchoring,4.1
#Your mind is anchored against all knowledge-altering powers. Nothing can erase, overwrite, reshape or steal the knowledge in your head. It does not improve how well you learn or remember on your own, and it does nothing against other forms of mental manipulation like mind control.
2878. Knowledge Derivation,9.3
#You are the source of all knowledge and wisdom in the cosmos, the binding force from which every idea, thought, and fact derives. You have total dominion over intelligence and information on a universal scale, but if you were ever to die, all knowledge everywhere would die with you. You cannot pass the burden on without finding a successor.
2879. Knowledge Embodiment,8.6
#You are the living embodiment of knowledge itself. The more you know, the more powerful you become, and your dominion over knowledge manipulation and near-omniscience grows with every fact you acquire. Embodiments of oblivion and ignorance may still overpower you if they catch you unaware.
2880. Knuckle Claws,2.8
#You can extend and retract razor-sharp claws directly from your knuckles at will, perfect for brawling, climbing and shredding through flesh. Less elegant than hand-claws but hits far harder when you're throwing a punch.
2881. Koala Physiology,2.0
#You are or can transform into a koala, gaining strong climbing claws, a diet tolerance for eucalyptus and an incredibly efficient sleep schedule of up to 22 hours a day. Not exactly a combat form.
2882. Kobold Physiology,3.3
#German Folklore - You are or can transform into a kobold, a household or mine sprite capable of turning invisible and manifesting as an animal, a flame, a candle or a small childlike humanoid. Mischievous, helpful or malicious depending on temperament, with minor elemental and domestic magic tied to whatever place you claim as your own.
2883. Kodama Physiology,4.0
#Japanese Folklore - You are or can take on the traits of a Kodama, a benevolent tree spirit bound to a specific great tree. As a guardian of the forest you possess minor nature magic, supernatural senses within your woodland and the ability to manifest as wisps of light or small humanoids. Your life is tied to your tree, and the death of one means the death of the other.
2884. Kokuri Baba Physiology,3.7
#Japanese Folklore - You are or can transform into a Kokuri Baba, a ghoulish yokai-hag that haunts old temples and feeds on the flesh of the dead. You possess unnatural strength and cunning rooted in despair, madness and isolation. Vulnerable to divine magic, prayers and rituals due to your malignant nature.
2885. Komainu Physiology,3.9
#Japanese Folklore - You are or can transform into a komainu, the lion-dog guardians of Shinto shrines. You possess the physical strength of a great beast and a natural aura that wards off evil spirits, making you a powerful protector of the places and people you claim as your own.
2886. Kori Physiology,3.6
#Colombian Folklore - You are or can transform into a kori, a destructive aquatic monster resembling an anteater. Your massive claws can dig under riverbanks and collapse them, and you can summon strong winds or turn dirt into drowning water to devastate anyone who crosses your territory.
2887. Koromodako Physiology,4.6
#Japanese Folklore - You are or can transform into a Koromodako, a tiny octopus yokai that rests at only a few centimeters long until angered. Once provoked you can rapidly expand to monstrous, ship-swallowing scale, engulfing everything in reach before shrinking back down to your harmless form. Vulnerable to Shinto rituals and prayers.
2888. Koropokkuru Physiology,2.7
#Ainu Folklore - You are or can transform into a Koropokkuru, a small agile humanoid of the northern Japanese islands. You possess exceptional skill at fishing, foraging and moving unseen, and your diminutive stature and natural stealth make you nearly impossible to track in the wilderness.
2889. Korori Physiology,4.1
#Japanese Folklore - You are or can transform into a Korori, a Yakubyo Gami yokai devoted to spreading cholera and disease. You embody the plague itself, carrying and spreading sickness wherever you go and feeding on the corpses of those who succumb. Vulnerable to the rituals and prayers of Shinto priests and shrine maidens.
2890. Koryu Physiology,6.5
#Japanese Mythology - You are or can transform into a Koryu, a fox dragon so virtuous and powerful that its kitsune nature is indistinguishable from that of a true dragon. You possess the immense power of both lineages, with command over fox magic, illusions and elemental breath. As a member of the celestial hierarchy, you likely have superiors and duties to uphold.
2891. Kraken Physiology,6.0
#European Folklore - You are or can transform into a Kraken, a legendary sea monster vast enough to be mistaken for an island. Your tentacled or crab-like body possesses monstrous strength and durability, capable of dragging entire ships beneath the waves. You can still be slain, and other great sea monsters may match or exceed you.
2892. Kresnik Physiology,6.3
#Slavic Folklore - You are or can transform into a kresnik, the natural antithesis and immortal enemy of vampires. Your power is considered superior to even the eldest of vampire lords, granting you immense physical might, holy-aligned abilities and shapeshifting to maintain the balance between light and dark. Your strength may be greatest when vampires are near.
2893. Kubikajiri Physiology,3.5
#Japanese Folklore - You are or can transform into a kubikajiri, a cannibalistic ghost that manifests as an old man in burial shrouds haunting graveyards. You feed on the heads of the dead and possess supernatural hunger and strength befitting a restless starved soul. Vulnerable to Shinto rituals and prayers.
2894. Kuchisake-Onna Physiology,4.4
#Japanese Urban Legend - You are or can transform into the Kuchisake-Onna, the Slit-Mouthed Woman. You possess supernatural speed, a compulsion to ask your victims if you are pretty and the power to punish their answer with a pair of cursed scissors. Bound by the rules of your legend, you can be confused by ambiguous answers or distracted by fruit and candies.
2895. Kudan Physiology,3.2
#You are or can transform into a Kudan, a yokai with a human head on the body of a cow. You possess enhanced bovine physical traits and can issue prophecies, though these prophecies are almost always grim and unavoidable.
2896. Kujata Physiology,7.8
#You are or can transform into Kujata, the cosmic bull of Islamic cosmography. Your body bears thousands of horns, eyes, and tongues, and each breath you take controls the tides of entire oceans. Your cosmic scale grants you physical abilities far beyond mortal reckoning.
2897. Kuko Physiology,8.1
#You are a Kuko, the final stage of a good-aligned kitsune, possessing magical power equal to the gods themselves. Your mastery over illusion, spiritual energy and transcendent kitsune magic is unmatched, though your venerated status means much of your power is geared toward distant observation rather than direct intervention. Evil-aligned beings of great strength may harm you more easily due to your pure alignment.
2898. Kulmking Physiology,4.6
#You are or can transform into a Kulmking, an undead Estonian monster that haunts public places. You can take many forms, possess the weak-willed, devour the unwary, and turn people into lesser devils. Holy rituals and prayers can banish you, and your haunting is restricted to public grounds.
2899. Kulullû Physiology,3.5
#You are or can transform into a Kulullû, an ancient Mesopotamian sea monster that is half-man and half-fish. You possess enhanced aquatic physiology, allowing you to swim at great speeds, breathe underwater, and wield the strength of the old sea spirits.
2900. Kuri Physiology,4.2
#You are or can transform into a Kuri, a goblin-like demon from English folklore that stalks graves in the wilderness. You can attach yourself to a victim, whisper into their dreams, and slowly drive them mad until they see your hideous face on the faces of their loved ones. Holy rituals can banish you, and the soulless are immune to your torment.
2901. Kurote Physiology,2.8
#You are or can mimic a kurote, a perverted toilet-yokai whose hands strike from porcelain depths. Though mostly a harasser, provoked kurote are genuinely dangerous supernatural foes capable of cursing those who cross them. Shinto rites can drive you away.
2902. Labatut Physiology,3.3
#You are or can transform into a Labatut, a monstrous cannibal from Guarani folklore. As a Labatut you possess enhanced physical abilities and a feral, lawless mindset that makes you terrifying in close combat, though your human origin means mortal weapons can still put you down.
2903. Laestrygonian Physiology,5.4
#Greek Mythology - You are or can transform into a Laestrygonian, one of the man-eating giants encountered by Odysseus. Your massive size grants you tremendous physical strength, enough to hurl boulders with the force to sink ships and flatten buildings.
2904. Lagarfljót Worm Physiology,4.4
#You are or can transform into the Lagarfljót Worm, the lake monster of Iceland. You possess a massive serpentine aquatic body capable of tremendous strength underwater, and your coils can overturn boats and drag prey into the depths.
2905. Lagomorph Physiology,2.7
#You possess the traits of a lagomorph, rabbit, hare, or pika. This grants you powerful hind legs for explosive jumping and sprinting, enhanced hearing, and a twitchy awareness that makes you hard to catch off-guard.
2906. Lake Monster Physiology,4.3
#You are or can transform into a lake monster like the Loch Ness Monster, a massive freshwater megafauna with a long flexible neck, turtle-like body, and powerful flippers. Your physiology grants immense underwater strength and stealth, letting you vanish into the depths without a ripple.
2907. Lambton Worm Physiology,4.6
