#European Folklore - You are or can transform into the Lambton Worm, a massive serpentine monster that once terrorized English villages from its lake. Your coils are strong enough to crush knights in full armor, and legend says cutting you in half only doubles the threat.
2908. Lamia Physiology,5.2
#Greek Mythology - You are or can transform into a lamia, the serpentine monster born from the grief and rage of Zeus's mortal lover. You possess a powerful serpentine lower body, venomous fangs, and the cursed hunger that drove the original lamia mad, though you retain the beauty of the queen she once was.
2909. Lampad Physiology,5.7
#Greek Mythology - You are or can transform into a lampad, an underworld nymph who serves as torchbearer to Hecate herself. You wield chthonic flames that illuminate the dead, travel effortlessly through night and the underworld, and carry a piece of the goddess of witchcraft's favor. Divine power users can still pierce your nymphic defenses.
2910. Lamprey Mouth,2.1
#Your mouth is a circular funnel ringed with rows of inward-pointing teeth, perfect for latching onto prey and rasping through flesh. Horrifying to look at, great for clamping down and not letting go.
2911. Lampriformes Physiology,3.2
#Allows you to transform into or take on the traits of a lampriform fish such as an oarfish, opah or ribbonfish. You gain the ability to thrive at deep ocean pressures, swim with ribbonlike grace and, as an opah, even regulate your body heat unlike most fish.
2912. Land Adaptation,2.6
#If you are normally an aquatic being, this trait lets you breathe air, move comfortably and use your senses on dry land without missing a beat. A swap-ready body for water-born creatures who need to walk among the surface dwellers.
2913. Land Nymph Physiology,5.4
#You are a land nymph, a minor goddess bound to groves, meadows, mountains, vales or pastures. You possess divine authority over your chosen landscape type, nurturing and commanding its plants, soil and wildlife as an extension of yourself. Being Alseid, Auloniad, Orestiad, Leimakid or Napaea determines what type of land responds to you.
2914. Landmass Mimicry,4.2
#Allows you to take on the traits of a landmass, becoming as durable, vast and geologically resilient as a stretch of terrain itself. Your body can gain the hardness of mountains, the mass of plains and the weathering resistance of ancient bedrock.
2915. Large Body Parts,2.2
#You possess body parts that are unusually large, be it hands, head, legs or anything else. Useful for grappling, containment or just sheer intimidation, but the disproportion may cause you problems in everyday life and put strain on the rest of your body.
2916. Laser Empowerment,3.5
#You grow stronger, faster and more durable whenever lasers are present, drawing sustenance from their coherent light. Standing in a laser show is essentially a workout and a meal for you.
2917. Laser Immunity,3.4
#You are immune to lasers, direct or indirect, of any intensity. Laser weapons, cutting beams and focused light arrays simply don't register. Your clothes on the other hand are not so lucky.
2918. Laser Mimicry,5.4
#Your body is composed of coherent laser light, letting you move at the speed of the beam, pass through narrow gaps and unleash devastating photonic attacks from any part of your form. Takes practice to change back and you may accidentally scorch anything you touch before mastering it.
2919. Laser Symbiosis,5.1
#You host a laser-based entity within your body, granting you potent photonic abilities channeled through its power. The entity may attempt to take over your mind or body, and its sheer luminous force can be lethal to an unprepared host.
2920. Laughter Empowerment,3.4
#You grow stronger, faster and more durable the more comedy and laughter surround you, whether your own or someone else's. A good stand-up set could turn you into a juggernaut, and you may draw sustenance from humor itself. Gag Immunity users can shrug you off.
2921. Lauma Physiology,5.2
#You are a Lauma, a nature spirit from Baltic folklore who gave up part of their divinity to live among mortals. You retain a suite of supernatural gifts, can shift between human and animalistic forms like mares, bears and goats, and have a deep fondness for children. Iron and fae-warding charms are your weaknesses.
2922. Lava Perception,2.2
#You can see, hear and smell through lava despite its opacity and heat, letting you navigate and sense freely while submerged. Largely useless without Lava Immunity since you would cook before using it.
2923. Law Empowerment,6.3
#You grow stronger, faster and more durable from the presence of laws, drawing power from every rule and code nearby, natural or artificial. In heavily regulated societies you are borderline unstoppable, but in true lawless anarchy you weaken considerably.
2924. Law Immunity,5.5
#You are immune to any and all laws you would otherwise be subject to, from legal statutes to physical and supernatural rules. You cannot be arrested, imprisoned or bound by Law Manipulation. You may still suffer the social consequences of acting however you please.
2925. Law Power Link,6.3
#Your lawful aspect is connected directly to your powers, with governance itself fueling and amplifying them. The more ordered and stable your inner code, the stronger your abilities become. If your lawful aspect is ever destabilized, your powers may go out of control or lash out at you instead.
2926. Layered Durability,4.2
#Your body is composed of multiple stacked layers of increasingly durable materials, each tougher than the last. Attacks must grind through layer after layer before reaching anything vital, making you a nightmare to put down in a prolonged fight. Fortitude Weakening can compromise the layering.
2927. Layered Life,4.0
#Your life is protected by multiple defensive layers that cap how much damage you can take at once. Any single blow can only strip one layer, preventing one-shot kills regardless of the attack's power. Does not protect against status effects, being knocked unconscious, or pure death inducement.
2928. Lazy Activity,3.2
#You get all the benefits of training, exercising and practicing while doing only a fraction of the actual work. A few minutes of half-hearted effort is equivalent to a professional athlete's full workout, and you can build muscle or lose weight with embarrassing ease. Some areas of development may still require real effort.
2929. Leanan Sidhe Physiology,5.2
#You take on the traits of a Leanan Sidhe, an Irish fairy known for taking mortals as lovers. Those you favor are blessed with overwhelming artistic inspiration rivaling the muses, but their lives burn short and bright, often ending in madness or wasting sickness as you drain them of life. You are vulnerable to cold iron and cannot influence those with indomitable will or seduction immunity.
2930. Lechuza Physiology,4.6
#You are a lechuza, a hag from Mexican folklore who appears as a normal woman during the day but transforms at night into an owl-like monster. In your night form you can mimic voices, manipulate weather and even induce death with your screeching, but you are helplessly vulnerable to salt and powerless during the day.
2931. Leech Physiology,2.8
#You are or can transform into a leech, either partially or fully, allowing you to latch onto targets and drain their blood while possessing a slimy, near-boneless body. You are vulnerable to salt, vinegar, alcohol and extreme temperatures, and you may need to drink blood to stay alive.
2932. Legume Mimicry,2.0
#Your body is made of legumes or can transform into them, whether as an anatomically identical bean-person with internal organs or as a homogeneous mass of beans. Vulnerable to being eaten, stepped on, or ending up in someone's soup.
2933. Legwear Mimicry,1.3
#You are or can transform into legwear such as pants, leggings or skirts. You may become a fully anatomical pair of sentient pants with organs inside, or a homogeneous legwear mass, but pants aren't particularly resilient and some users can't change back.
2934. Lemon Mimicry,1.5
#You are or can transform into a lemon or a mass of lemons, either as an anatomically identical lemon-person with organs or as homogeneous citrus matter. Unfortunately, you may be vulnerable to being juiced, squeezed, or tossed into a fruit bowl.
2935. Lemur Physiology,2.4
#You are or can transform into a lemur, fully or partially, gaining their agility, grip, enormous eyes, and primate instincts. Your senses and balance in trees are incredible, though you may pick up lemur-like fears and dietary habits.
2936. Lens Mimicry,1.8
#You are or can transform into a lens or lens-based object, whether as an anatomically identical lens-person with organs or as homogeneous glass matter. Fragile against Glass Manipulation and Shattering, and you may not always be able to change back.
2937. Leocampus Physiology,4.2
#You are or can transform into a leocampus, the Greco-Roman sea-lion with the head and upper body of a lion fused to webbed forelimbs and a fish's tail. You possess regal strength on land and unmatched grace beneath the waves, but you are still vulnerable to Mythical Beast Manipulation and Shapeshifting Negation.
2938. Leopard Physiology,3.5
#You possess the traits of a leopard, whether by full or partial transformation or by being one outright. You gain incredible agility, stealth, climbing ability and a crushing bite, along with the rosette-patterned coat of the world's most efficient ambush predator.
2939. Lepidoptera Physiology,2.9
#You are or can transform into a lepidopteran such as a butterfly or moth, fully or partially. Gain delicate wings, a long proboscis, incredible antennae and, if you want, the terrifying silent flight of a giant moth in the dark.
2940. Leporid Physiology,2.4
#You are or can transform into a leporid such as a hare or rabbit, fully or partially. Gain incredible leaping ability, swift legs, long ears that catch every sound, and the unmatched reproductive enthusiasm of your kind.
2941. Leporidoid Physiology,2.8
#You are a leporidoid, a humanoid rabbit-folk of fantasy genre fame, whether by birth, mutation or evolution. You keep human intelligence while gaining long ears, powerful legs, and the grace and reflexes of a hare standing upright.
2942. Leprechaun Physiology,4.4
#Irish Folklore - You are or can transform into a leprechaun, a tiny old-man fairy in a red or green coat who spends his time cobbling shoes and hoarding a pot of gold at the end of a rainbow. You can grant wishes to any human who captures you as a price for your release, but your powers weaken if your gold is lost and you are vulnerable to iron and clover.
2943. Leshy Physiology,5.1
#Slavic Mythology - You are or can transform into a Leshy, a demonic forest spirit who rules over woodlands and the hunt. You can lead travelers endlessly astray, command beasts and trees, and vanish into the forest itself, though you are vulnerable to divine or transcendent powers that nullify spirit kind.
2944. Lesser Damage Effectiveness,1.0
#Your attacks deal less damage against certain creatures or affinities, such as a fire wielder struggling to harm a water wielder. A niche drawback trait that only really matters when matchups are bad.
2945. Lesser Divinity,6.2
#You possess a minor portion of divinity, granting you power well beyond the mundane but still short of true godhood. Obtained through divine ancestry, faith, possession, or evolution, this status makes you a demigod capable of minor miracles and resistant to most mortal threats, though full deities and divine attacks can still overwhelm you.
2946. Lesser Immunity,6.2
#You are completely invulnerable to anything and anyone weaker or lesser in status than you. Blunt force, telekinesis, transmutation, biological attacks, soul attacks — nothing from a lesser being can touch you. Against equals or superiors, you are as vulnerable as anyone else. Scales with your overall power level.
2947. Lethal Activity,5.4
#Every action you take is lethal. A flick, a tap, a gentle pat on the shoulder — all of them kill, whether instantly or over time. You cannot perform a non-lethal action against another living being. Hard to turn off, making peaceful interactions a careful exercise in not touching anyone.
2948. Lethal Physiology,6.5
#You are a walking beacon of death. Your blood, touch, gaze, voice, breath, shadow and aura are all fatal to others. Unlike beings made of death-essence, you embody what death does rather than what it is. Without some form of regulation, simply existing near others will kill them. Life Resilience and Life and Death Transcendence users are immune.
2949. Lethargy Immunity,3.2
#You are immune to fatigue, sleepiness, and intoxication. You never grow tired from effort, never get sluggish from a bad night's sleep, and cannot be drugged into a stupor. You can still choose to rest or sleep, you just never need to.
2950. Letter Mimicry,3.4
#You are or can transform into a letter or a set of letters. Your letter form can be anatomically normal but made of letters, or homogeneous throughout. If you are multiple letters, you can rearrange yourself into words and sentences. You can also manifest yourself in printed work, books, graffiti, or on screens.
2951. Lettuce Mimicry,0.8
#You are made of lettuce or can transform into it. Your lettuce form can be anatomically identical to your normal body aside from the crunchy leafy substance, or fully homogeneous. You are deeply vulnerable to being bitten, shredded, or dressed with vinaigrette.
2952. Leverage Defiance,3.1
#You can ignore how levers work in physics. In the human body, levers normally trade off between speed and strength, but your body uses them for both at once, combining all three lever classes. The result is a body that moves faster and hits harder than its muscles have any right to.
2953. Ley Line Connection,5.4
#You have a permanent connection to the ley lines of your planet, conduits of energy that run beneath the biosphere. You can bend the mystic forces of the world by tapping into the network wherever you walk, gaining insight into underlying patterns and an endless battery of esoteric power. Weak against Connection Removal.
2954. Ley Line Empowerment,4.7
#You grow stronger, faster and more durable when in contact with ley lines, possibly unlocking abilities tied to their affinity and enhancing your existing powers. Some users can draw sustenance directly from the flow or slow their aging while camped on a nexus. Find the right node and become a local god.
2955. Licorice Mimicry,1.4
#Allows you to transform your body partially or fully into licorice. You gain some flexibility and can stretch your limbs like ropes, but you are sensitive to heat and fully edible to anything with teeth.
2956. Lie Empowerment,3.2
#Whenever lies are spoken in your vicinity you grow stronger, faster and tougher, with the magnitude of the boost scaling to the scope and weight of the deceit. Blatant truths nullify the boost while they are being spoken.
2957. Life Addition,5.4
#Every time you take the life of another being, you gain an extra life of your own. Upon death you resurrect fully healed, and the counter grows with every kill you rack up, but repeated deaths can burn through your tally fast.
2958. Life Connection,6.2
#You are emotionally and spiritually linked to every form of life. As long as you live, life endures, but you feel the pain of every wounded creature and if you ever die, life itself may end with you. Bond Severing powers can cut the link.
2959. Life Derivation,8.7
#You are the primordial source of all life in the cosmos. Every living thing exists because you exist, and you have instinctive dominion over every power of life, but the burden is eternal: if you ever die, all life dies with you, and you cannot simply step away from the role.
2960. Life Embodiment,9.1
#You are life itself. You have unlimited power over the living, endless life-force to draw upon, and can heal, immortalize, or grant existence at absolute levels. Second only to Omnipotence in your field, though Absolute Death Manipulation can still challenge you.
2961. Life Empowerment,3.5
#You become stronger, faster and tougher the more life surrounds you. A crowded city or a lush forest turns you into a powerhouse, while sterile wastelands and dead zones leave you noticeably weaker.
2962. Life Resilience,5.4
#You are completely immune to all death-force and death-inducing abilities. Reapers, kill orders, instant death curses, all of it slides off you. However, you can still die from natural causes like aging, accidents, or plain old physical trauma, and abilities that bypass immunities still work.
2963. Life Trail,4.2
#Wherever you walk, life blooms in your footsteps. Flowers sprout, grass grows, small insects and microbes flourish in your wake. In barren areas this makes you incredibly obvious to track, but in the right circumstances you can turn a wasteland into a garden simply by taking a stroll.
2964. Life Transcendence,7.6
#You have exceeded the natural limits of your life and lifespan. Your body can be destroyed or rendered lifeless but you retain the ability to restore yourself to a living state, and your life-energy operates independently of food, water, sleep or biology. Not true immortality, as Absolute Erasure and sufficiently strong Death Manipulation can still end you.
2965. Life and Death Connection,6.3
#You are emotionally and spiritually connected to all life and death, everything alive or dying across existence. As long as you exist, life and death do too, and you can feel the pulse of every living thing if you focus. Bond Severing can break the link, and beings outside life and death are invisible to you.
2966. Life and Death Embodiment,9.0
#You are the living embodiment of Life and Death itself, the personification of both forces. You have effectively limitless control over at least one and profound mastery over the other. Existence bends around you because you are two of its most fundamental concepts wearing a face.
2967. Life and Death Transcendence,8.1
#You transcend the concepts of life and death, existing as something neither living, dead, nor undead. You may never have truly been alive to begin with. You are immune to all powers related to life and death, though you can still feel pain, and absolute erasure can still wipe you from existence.
2968. Life-Force Empowerment,3.8
#You grow stronger, faster and more durable the closer you are to sources of life-force, whether crowds, forests, or ambient vitality. Prolonged immersion can even slow your aging or sustain you without food.
2969. Life-Force Immunity,4.5
#You are completely unaffected by life-force manipulation of any kind, whether constructs, attacks, absorption or infusion. Sufficiently godly life-forces may still partially bypass your immunity.
2970. Life-Force Mimicry,5.6
#Your body is made of or can transform into pure life-force, fortifying your cells, bones and muscles with raw vitality. In this form your physical abilities are greatly enhanced, but Death-Force Manipulation and energy drains become extremely dangerous, potentially fatal.
2971. Life-Force Power Link,4.2
#Your life-force is directly connected to your powers, fueling and strengthening every ability you possess with your raw vitality. If your life-force becomes unstable your powers may run wild, and life-force drains become especially dangerous.
2972. Life-Force Symbiosis,5.1
#You share a symbiotic bond with a life-force entity, gaining powers over biology, growth and vitality through its quintessential essence. The entity may try to possess you, and a powerful one can tear your body apart if you cannot contain it.
2973. Lifeless Continuation,4.9
#You can keep going after you have died, your body continuing to fight, move and act on sheer residual will until its energy runs out or its goal is completed. You are not undead, just refusing to stop.
2974. Enhanced Lifting,2.3
#Your lifting capacity is well beyond peak human, letting you hoist cars, trucks and the occasional bulldozer without breaking a sweat. Strength is not durability however, so lifting something too heavy above your head may still crush your bones.
2975. Supernatural Lifting,4.2
#Your lifting strength is glaringly, obviously unnatural, letting you heft tanks, airplanes, locomotives and massive boulders with ease. Gravity, balance and your own structural integrity still apply, lifting more than your bones can bear will snap you before it snaps the weight.
2976. Peak Human Lifting,1.5
#Your lifting capacity sits at the absolute ceiling of human potential, surpassing olympic weightlifters. You can deadlift and press objects that would normally require a team of strongmen, like refrigerators, beds and motorcycles.
2977. Light Capacitor,3.8
#Your body functions as a living photonic battery, absorbing any light you come into contact with and storing it indefinitely for later release. You can channel the stored energy however you see fit, from powering abilities to unleashing the whole reserve in a single burst.
2978. Light Consumption,3.0
#You can consume and digest light itself, eating photons to sustain yourself and fuel your powers. If you ever find yourself in a lightless place for too long, you will begin to starve just like any other creature deprived of food.
2979. Light Derivation,8.9
#You are the source of all light in existence, the primordial force from which every photon in every universe flows. As long as you exist, light exists, and you hold total dominion over every aspect of it across cosmic, universal and multiversal scales. Should you die, all light everywhere ceases to be, unless you pass the source onto another.
2980. Light Embodiment,8.6
#You are the living embodiment of light itself, its personification made flesh. You hold limitless control over light and everything closely related to it, approaching essential omnipotence within your domain. Only an equal embodiment of Darkness can truly oppose you.
2981. Light Empowerment,3.7
#You grow stronger, faster and more durable when in contact with light, with your existing abilities amplified and new light-affinity powers sometimes unlocking. Sunlight may sustain you or even slow your aging, but darkness weakens you and prolonged absence of light may damage your body.
2982. Light Energy Mimicry,5.2
#Your body is either made of or can transform into light energy, letting you flow as radiant matter while retaining your form. In this state you are fast and hard to pin down, but dark energy and energy drain are highly effective, if not outright lethal.
2983. Light Immunity,3.5
#You are completely immune to light, both its direct effects and indirect ones. Lasers cannot burn you, flashbangs cannot blind you, and you could stare into the sun without issue, although you are also cut off from the beneficial effects of Light Magic.
2984. Light Mimicry,4.8
#Your body is either made of or can transform into light, letting you move at breathtaking speeds and slip through cracks as pure radiance. Darkness Manipulation is extremely effective against you, and changing back may take practice.
2985. Light Refracting Body,2.6
#Your body naturally reflects all light that hits it, giving you a mirror-like sheen and making you effectively invisible to certain forms of sight. The catch is that your eyes reflect light too, which may leave you blind.
2986. Light-Darkness Mimicry,5.7
#Your body is made of or can transform entirely into light and darkness in equal measure, with your form holding together as a cohesive being of radiant shadow. You can shift between physical and elemental states at will, and your power grants you enhanced durability and access to a vast array of light-dark abilities.
2987. Lightbulb Mimicry,1.1
#Your body is made of glass and filament. You generate light from within and possess a mechanical, bulb-like physiology. Try not to get dropped.
2988. Lighter Mimicry,0.7
#Your body is or can become a lighter. You depend on fuel to produce flame and may not be able to move while in this form. Pocket-sized hero.
2989. Lightning Soul,5.0
#Your soul itself is made of electricity. You can manifest it outside your body to act independently, or channel its current into magical and physical abilities. Soul manipulators are your greatest threat.
2990. Lightweight Body,1.4
#Your body is extremely light. Easy to lift, easy to carry, unfortunately also easy to blow away in a strong gust of wind.
2991. Lightweight Mass,4.0
#Your mass is lighter than almost anything in existence, yet you remain unaffected by anything heavier or more forceful than you, including air, subatomic particles, and light itself. You move freely without being shoved around by the universe.
2992. Lightworlder Physiology,2.6
#You are native to low-gravity environments like dwarf planets, comets and asteroids. In any weaker gravity than Earth you gain an apparent boost in condition, but stepping into a high-gravity world could crush you outright.
2993. Lily Pad Mimicry,0.6
#You are or can turn into a lily pad. You need water to thrive and movement is... let's just say pond pace.
2994. Limb Arsenal,4.5
#You produce and wield a wide variety of specialized limbs; arms, legs, wings, tails and stranger appendages, each with their own functions and abilities. A one-being army with the right assortment equipped.
2995. Limblessness,2.8
#Your hands, feet, and head float freely near your body with no connecting limbs or neck. You have longer reach, no joint restrictions, and can literally throw your punches. Downside: you can be knocked apart and may have to go fetch a runaway foot.
2996. Liminality Embodiment,7.6
#You are the living personification of liminality itself, or at least some aspect of it. You have limitless control over thresholds and in-between states and are utterly immune to them. You are the doorway, the twilight, the rite of passage made flesh.
2997. Liminality Power Link,5.5
#Your other powers are fueled and controlled through your personal liminal essence. This connection strengthens and refines everything else you can do, but if your threshold nature ever destabilizes your abilities can spiral out of control.
2998. Limitation Transcendence,7.3
#You can overcome your own limitations and weaknesses, whether personal, species-based, or tied to your other powers. A vampire could walk in sunlight, a werewolf shrug off silver, a human surpass the ceiling of mortal flesh. When one limit is broken, however, another may eventually take its place.
2999. Limitless Elevation,8.6
#You ascend endlessly. Skills, powers, knowledge, and all aspects of your being grow without ceiling, continuously elevating and refining themselves as you adapt to each new challenge. Given enough time, there is no obstacle you cannot grow past - though others with similar boundless potential can match your climb.
3000. Linguistic Intelligibility,3.2
#Anyone who hears your voice understands you regardless of the language you're actually speaking, and you understand them in return on a basic level. You never have to learn another language but you still can't read their writing.
3001. Lion Monster Physiology,4.8
#You are or can transform into a monstrous lion, far larger and crueler than any natural beast. Your physical abilities are terrifying, your roar alone can stagger lesser beings, and your bite crushes stone. Vulnerable to monster slayers and those who command felines.
3002. Lion Physiology,3.6
#You are or can transform into a lion, gaining the strength, senses, and predatory instincts of the king of beasts. Your roar carries authority and your bite is devastating. Larger tigers may still give you trouble.
3003. Lionfolk Physiology,3.4
#You are or can transform into a lionfolk, a humanoid lion with a mane, claws, fangs and a tail. Your physical abilities are well above human, your senses are sharper and you carry yourself with the innate pride of your kind.
3004. Liquid Current Defiance,2.4
#You are unaffected by currents and turbulence in water and other liquids, moving through them as though the flow did not exist. Thick and viscous liquids may still slow you, and gravity still applies as normal.
3005. Liquid Defiance,2.7
#You can defy liquids, ignoring the friction, heat and force they would normally impart when moving through them at high speeds. Water will not slap you like concrete at terminal velocity, though extreme densities or speeds may still be too much.
3006. Liquid Empowerment,3.6
#Contact with liquids makes you stronger, faster and more durable, and may unlock related abilities or slow your aging. The empowerment fades once you leave the liquid, leaving you somewhat dependent on staying wet for peak performance.
3007. Liquid Metal Mimicry,5.3
#Your body is made of or can transform into liquid metal, flowing between solid and liquid states at will. You can shape yourself into weapons, tools or amorphous pools, but suffer from the same weaknesses as metal itself, including electricity, magnetism and corrosion.
3008. Liquid Mimicry,4.9
#Your body can transform into liquid at will, becoming homogeneous flowing matter that most physical attacks pass harmlessly through. Extreme heat can evaporate you and extreme cold can freeze you solid, either of which is very bad for your health.
3009. Liquid Movement,2.6
#You can move through any liquid as easily as walking on land, swimming through thick oil or thin water without being hindered by viscosity or drag. You are not immune to the effects of what you swim in, so choose your medium wisely.
3010. List of Alien Species Physiologies,5.5
#You are or can transform into an alien of a randomly determined species, gaining their unique physiology and suite of innate abilities. The exact power level depends entirely on which species the gacha rolled for you.
3011. Supernatural Animal Physiology,5.7
#You are or can transform into a supernatural animal, a beast far beyond its natural kin in both raw power and capability. Whatever creature you embody, it is strong enough to face threats that would kill any ordinary member of its species several times over.
3012. Transcendent Animal Physiology,7.8
#You are or can transform into a transcendent animal, a beast that has ascended to god-like power through divine intervention or tremendous magical feats. In this form you operate on the level of animal gods, only really threatened by transcendent negation or beings of similar rank.
3013. Animal Physiology,3.0
#You are or can transform into an animal of your choosing, gaining all of its natural abilities and instincts. The scope and flexibility of the transformation depends on your familiarity with the creature.
3014. Colombian Mythical Creature,4.2
#You are a mythical creature from Colombian folklore, randomly chosen from the likes of La Patasola, El Mohan, El Sombrerón or the Madremonte. Your physiology, powers and weaknesses are those of whichever creature you rolled.
3015. Cryptid Physiology,4.0
#You are a cryptid, one of the hidden beasts whispered about but rarely proven. Whether you end up as Mothman, a chupacabra, a skinwalker or a jersey devil is up to chance, but all share uncanny physical abilities and a knack for staying unseen.
3016. Literary Empowerment,3.9
#You grow stronger, faster and tougher the more literature surrounds you. Libraries, bookstores and archives become your personal battery, and deep enough immersion in the written word can even slow your aging.
3017. Literature Embodiment,7.3
#You are the embodiment of literature itself, the living essence of every written work of lasting artistic merit. You can draw upon the full weight of prose and poetry ever committed to page, using narrative conventions and the force of the written word as a fundamental power.
3018. Little People Physiology,2.8
#You are or can transform into one of the little people of folklore, a tiny humanoid ranging from just short enough to notice to small enough to ride an insect. You retain human intellect and may possess minor supernatural traits depending on which folklore you hail from.
3019. Living Anomaly,7.6
#You are a living anomaly, an enigma that exists within the system while refusing to obey it. Physical laws, causality and fate all fail to quite stick to you, letting you shrug off restrictions that bind everything else and impose your own actions upon reality.
3020. Living Arsenal,5.5
#You are a living arsenal, capable of pulling guns, swords, cannons, shields and hammers from your own body at will. You can absorb existing weapons into your personal collection and craft new ones any time, even handing them out to allies.
3021. Living Blood,5.6
#Your blood is alive, a sentient circulatory substance with supernatural properties of its own. It can enhance you, act as a weapon, reshape itself on command and even function as an extension of your will, though it may be vulnerable to blood manipulation or harvesting.
3022. Living Clothing,4.6
#You possess a set of living, symbiotic clothing that responds to your thoughts, shifting style, size and color on demand. It can store itself within you, summon itself fresh whenever needed, and repairs any damage by regenerating.
3023. Living Conduit,5.7
#You are a living vessel for some greater force, whether it be an entity, an energy or a concept housed within your body. You can channel its power through yourself and access its knowledge, though the source may have its own will and agenda.
3024. Living Database,6.5
#You are knowledge given flesh, a living archive containing complete information on every subject. Unlike passive omniscience you are an active agent of knowledge, capable of editing, erasing and reshaping what is known at will.
3025. Living Doper,4.2
#Your body is a walking pharmaceutical lab, capable of synthesizing performance enhancement drugs from mundane chemicals to supernatural concoctions. You can dose yourself or others for massive temporary boosts, though the side effects can be brutal.
3026. Living Factory,5.3
#Your body is a factory, capable of producing weapons, items, creatures and constructs from your own flesh or by merging with surrounding material. Whatever you make can be stored inside you for later, at the cost of needing to absorb matter and energy to replenish yourself.
3027. Living Garden,4.5
#Your body is a living garden, capable of growing any kind of plant or fungus from within yourself. You can cultivate healing herbs, poisonous flowers or massive trees straight out of your skin, and may imbue them with supernatural effects.
3028. Living Hive,4.7
#You share your body symbiotically with a swarm of creatures, be they bugs, snakes or birds. They live inside you, emerge at your command to fight or gather information, and in some cases you are less a person than a hive-mind wearing a human shape.
3029. Living Kitchen,3.2
#Your body is a fully automated kitchen. Swallow any organic ingredients and within seconds you can produce any prepared dish imaginable, perfectly chopped, seasoned, cooked or baked. You still need to source the ingredients though, no conjuring food from nothing.
3030. Living Laboratory,5.4
#Your body is a living chemlab. You can take in matter and internally synthesise chemical compounds, natural elements, and even technological components based on blueprints in your mind. With enough study you can dabble in fringe sciences that push past normal physics, churning out creations from an operating table later.
3031. Living Power Plant,4.2
#Your body is a living dynamo, able to generate, absorb and store enormous quantities of energy from yourself or your surroundings and channel it into anything you touch. Power a city block, charge a mech, jumpstart a dead star, as long as you keep drinking in energy.
3032. Living Seal,4.6
#Your body functions as a living prison, capable of containing entities, powers or objects far beyond your own weight class. You gain nothing from what you seal, your existence simply holds the door shut. If the seal ever breaks, it will likely take you with it.
3033. Living Studio,3.3
#Your body is a living art studio. Take in pigments, clay, wood, sound, footage, anything associated with art, and your body will compose, sculpt, paint, film or perform it internally before producing finished pieces. You still need raw materials to work from.
3034. Lizard Physiology,2.4
#You are or can transform into a lizard, gaining the traits of reptiles, wall-clinging, tail regeneration, cold-bloodedness and all. Watch out in cold climates though, you may find yourself sluggish or wanting to hibernate.
3035. Lizardfolk Physiology,3.2
#DnD - You are or can transform into a lizardfolk, a reptilian humanoid with scaled hide, strong jaws, claws and the endurance of a cold-blooded hunter. More resilient than a human and well suited to swamps and harsh environments, though still mortal in most respects.
3036. Llamhigyn Y Dwr Physiology,3.4
#Welsh Folklore - You are or can transform into the Llamhigyn Y Dwr, an evil frog-like swamp monster with a long tail and leathery wings. You are an ambush predator of ponds and marshes, capable of snapping fishing lines and dragging grown men under. Monster slayers may come for you.
3037. Lobster Physiology,2.2
#You are or can transform into a lobster, gaining thick chitinous armor, powerful crushing claws and the ability to breathe underwater. Your flesh regenerates well and you are functionally biologically immortal.
3038. Location Independence,8.6
#You function and exist without a defined location. You are neither everywhere nor nowhere, as both of those are still places. You cannot be travelled to, reached or accessed through any form of space, dimension or concept of 'place'. Targeting you requires transcending location itself.
3039. Lock Mimicry,1.9
#You are or can transform into a lock, or become a body made entirely of locks. In your transformed state you are essentially an inanimate piece of hardware, which is as useful as it sounds most of the time.
3040. Locomotion Compensation,3.0
#Whenever one form of locomotion is removed or limited for you, another is dramatically enhanced to compensate. Lose your legs and your arms can carry you at running speed. Take away your jump and your sprint doubles. Regaining the lost ability strips the compensation.
3041. Locomotive Mimicry,3.2
#You are or can transform into a locomotive, gaining the sheer size, durability and speed of a train alongside features of whatever class you mimic. You are also enormously heavy and may need fuel, rails and a wide turning radius. Getting derailed is a serious problem.
3042. Locust of Abaddon Physiology,6.5
#Book of Revelation - You are or can transform into a Locust of Abaddon, a biblical horror with a human face, lion's teeth, locust body and scorpion tail. Your sting injects a venom that torments victims for months and drives them to beg for death. Your wings sound like war chariots. You may still be bound in service to Abaddon himself.
3043. Logic Adaptation,6.3
#You adapt automatically to the laws of logic and reason in whatever reality you occupy, including logic being actively rewritten in your own. Paradoxes, inverted causality, alien rules of thought, none of them disorient or harm you. Illogical dimensions where there are no rules to adapt to are still a problem.
3044. Logic Embodiment,8.6
#You are the living embodiment of logic itself. You freely redefine what is possible and impossible, ignoring rules as if they never existed, and your comprehension of any situation is effectively instant and total. Beings who transcend logic entirely, such as users of Conceptual Transcendence, can still overcome you.
3045. Logic Immunity,7.6
#You exist separately from logic itself. Physical and metaphysical laws wash over you like they were never written, allowing you to casually perform feats that are fundamentally impossible. Does not grant omnipotence, and Absolute Powers still apply to you regardless.
3046. Logic Independence,8.1
#You exist entirely independent of logic. You can do things without justification, reason, or cause behind them, including defeating infinitely powerful beings for no explicable reason. Unlike manipulation, you are not bending logic; you simply transcend it and act anyway. Absolute and Almighty Powers can still affect you.
3047. Lollipop Mimicry,1.9
#Allows you to transform your body, partially or fully, into lollipops. In this form you are effectively made of candy, which means you can be melted by fire and heat and are, unfortunately, edible.
3048. Loneliness Embodiment,5.2
#You are the living embodiment of loneliness and isolation. You care only for yourself and are unburdened by emotional ties, granting you an immensely strong will of survival. You can spawn lesser beings from yourself for company without it counting as companionship, as they are merely extensions of you. Vulnerable to Friendship Embodiment.
3049. Loneliness Empowerment,3.5
#You grow stronger, faster, and more durable from the loneliness of yourself and others. The more isolated and disconnected the beings around you are, the more your power swells, and some users can draw sustenance from the lack of bonds themselves and even slow their aging.
3050. Long Limbs,1.3
#You have disproportionately long limbs. Great for reaching things on top of the fridge, awkward for buying clothes that fit.
3051. Ageless Longevity,5.3
#You do not age at all. Your body remains frozen in its physical prime, unaffected by the passage of time, and you are immune to abilities that try to force age upon you such as Age Acceleration or Reversal. You are still vulnerable to everything else, from disease to mortal wounds.
3052. Love Derivation,8.7
#You are the source of all love in existence, the primordial force behind every form of romance, intimacy, friendship, and parental bond across cosmic and universal scales. As long as you exist, love exists, and you have total dominion over all powers connected to it. If you die, every form of love in the cosmos dies with you, and you cannot escape this role without passing it to a successor.
3053. Love Embodiment,6.5
#You are the living manifestation of love itself, feeding off the love of everyone and everything including yourself. You can convert love into raw energy to extend your lifespan or use it as a weapon, you may never age, and you may be immune to death unless very specific conditions are met. Users of Apathy and Indomitable Will can resist you.
3054. Love Empowerment,3.6
#You grow stronger, faster, and more durable through the love of yourself and others, potentially unlocking new abilities tied to affection. Some users can even draw sustenance directly from love. A life without love leaves you powerless, and you can be matched by users of Hatred Empowerment.
3055. Low Health Compensation,3.6
#When your health drops critically low, your physical and mental parameters all receive a massive boost, granting you a last-stand surge of strength, speed, durability and combat instinct. You can still be defeated, but anyone who brings you to the brink is in for a nasty surprise.
3056. Low Power Activity,3.4
#Allows you to keep performing any action, attack or technique no matter how low your energy reserves are, preventing them from being completely drained. You still need to be careful since overexertion may exhaust you anyway, but you will not simply collapse mid-fight from running out.
3057. Lower Consciousness,5.2
#Your mind is spread throughout every part of your being, from every cell to every strand of hair. Each component of your body has a small "will" of its own guided by your central mind, allowing for coordinated prehensile movement throughout. The depth can reach microscopic scales with training. Your "hub" mind is still a weak point, however.
3058. Loyalty Empowerment,4.2
#You grow stronger, faster and more durable from loyalty in all its forms, personal, familial, group, national. You may draw sustenance directly from the devotion of others and even slow your aging with enough followers. Users of Treachery Embodiment are immune to your boosted prowess.
3059. Luck Derivation,8.1
#You are the source and conductor of all luck in your reality, both good and bad. All fortune flows through you and you can infuse, bestow and redirect luck energy freely across the cosmos. You cannot escape this role without passing it to another, and if you die, all luck in existence simply stops.
3060. Luck Embodiment,8.4
#You are the living personification of luck itself, the physical representation of chance and probability on every level. Every form of fortune, good and bad, falls under your limitless control. Coincidence is not a force that happens to you, it is a force that is you.
3061. Luck Empowerment,3.7
#You grow stronger, faster and more durable when you come into contact with luck, whether good or bad. You can draw sustenance from fortune itself and may even slow your aging as long as luck flows around you. Some users are only empowered by specific types of luck.
3062. Absolute Luck,9.3
#You possess an inescapable blessing of limitless, transcendent luck so profound it warps the very structure of reality around you. You defy causality, walk away from impossible odds, and craft your own destiny just by existing. Unbeatable enemies stumble, impossible victories become routine, and no force within your universe can bring you anything but fortune.
3063. Luck,7.8
#You are impossibly, continuously lucky. Things just work out for you, no matter how dire the situation or how stacked the odds. Falling off a skyscraper? A truck full of mattresses happens to be passing by. The power is mostly subconscious and hard to actively press, and Coincidence Nullification is its hard counter, but in almost every other situation you are effectively untouchable by causality.
3064. Lumbar Wing Manifestation,3.2
#You have, or can manifest at will, a pair of wings growing from your lower back or waist. Primarily used for flight, they also significantly enhance your speed, balance and agility. May or may not be retractable, and you might want to invest in some warm clothing for higher altitudes.
3065. Lunar Embodiment,7.6
#You embody the moon itself, possessing its key physical and personal traits. You can move the moon at will, induce nighttime, draw upon every energy and concept ever associated with lunar objects, and personify the moon's literary and mythological roles. Due to the limitless range of what humans have projected onto the moon, an embodiment's power ceiling is staggering.
3066. Lunar Empowerment,4.3
#You become stronger, faster and more durable whenever you are in contact with a moon, moonlight or lunar energy, possibly unlocking entirely new abilities and slowing your aging. You may be weaker during the day or at a new moon, and strongest under a full moon hanging directly overhead.
3067. Lunar Entity Physiology,5.2
#You are or can transform into a lunar entity, a supernatural spirit associated with the moon and its energies. In this form you gain natural command of lunar energies and the presence of a being only half-tethered to the material world. Your power may be limited on Earth, with your full strength only accessible when close to the moon itself.
3068. Lunar Immunity,3.5
#You are completely invulnerable to lunar energy in all its forms, direct and indirect. Moonlight cannot touch you, which means lycanthropy, lunar madness, moon-induced dreaming, forced sleep and illusions all fail against you. May not extend to esoteric moon concepts, and solar energy can still cook you as normal.
3069. Lunar Power Link,5.2
#Your lunar essence is directly connected to your powers, with the moon fueling and strengthening everything you do. Your abilities scale with the power of the moon, but may become unstable or go out of control when the moon itself is disturbed.
3070. Lunar Presence,5.7
#Your mere presence is the same as that of the moon itself, producing lunar energies that shape the environment around you as a moon would. Plants may grow under your light, waters may flood and freeze, and tides may follow your footsteps. Stronger emotions can distort the field.
3071. Lunar Symbiosis,5.8
#You share a symbiotic bond with a lunar being or the essence of a moon, absorbing its energy to enhance your abilities and wield its supernatural powers. Both host and moon benefit from each other's state, but if sentient, the moon could take over your mind or body.
3072. Lunarian Physiology,5.4
#You are a Lunarian, an alien life form native to a moon rather than a planet. Your physiology is alien and suited to the harsh lunar environment, granting you inhuman resilience and capabilities, though you may struggle to survive far from your home moon.
3074. Absolute Lung Capacity,8.6
#Your lung capacity is transcendent and limitless, allowing you to hold your breath indefinitely, inhale or exhale endlessly, draw in anything and everything with a single breath, and survive even total deoxygenation. A single exhale could birth hurricanes, and a deep enough inhale could swallow an ocean.
3075. Enhanced Lung Capacity,2.2
#Your lungs are more efficient than a normal human's, allowing you to hold your breath for up to two or three hours at a time. You may even have birdlike lungs, keeping fresh air cycling constantly. You still need to breathe eventually.
3076. Supernatural Lung Capacity,4.7
#Your lung capacity is vastly superior to almost every other being in your universe, letting you hold your breath for absurd stretches of time, from hours to centuries depending on your stature. You will still need to breathe eventually.
3077. Peak Lung Capacity,2.8
#Your lung capacity is at the pinnacle of human potential without crossing into the superhuman. You can hold your breath for 30 to 60 minutes even while active underwater, or a full minute in the vacuum of space. Your larger lungs also let you produce a loud, carrying roar.
3078. Lunglessness,3.0
#You lack lungs entirely, yet function as if you still had them, able to live and even breathe without them. Freed from their constraints you may achieve feats that lunged beings cannot, such as not needing to breathe at all.
3079. Lure Protrusion,2.6
#You grow or possess a lure-like appendage that can vary greatly in appearance. The lure can be used to entice, distract or fool targets, much like the glowing bait of an anglerfish.
3080. Lust Derivation,9.0
#You are the source of absolute lust in every living being everywhere, at cosmic and universal scales. All libido, bloodlust, ambition, fervor, dark hungers and deep thirsts flow from you. Should you die, all lust in the cosmos would simply stop, so the force itself clings to your existence and cannot be escaped without passing it to another.
3081. Lust Embodiment,7.4
#You embody lust itself, every strong craving and longing, from sexual desire to bloodlust and beyond. You draw power from the lust of everyone around you and your own, converting it into energy that you can wield as a weapon or use to extend your lifespan.
3082. Lutrinae Physiology,2.8
#You are or can transform into an otter, either partially or fully. You gain incredible swimming ability, dexterous paws, a playful disposition, and the insulating fur to thrive in cold waters.
3083. Lycanthropy Immunity,1.6
#You are completely immune to lycanthropy. No bite, scratch, curse, or ritual can turn you into a werewolf. Very niche unless you live in a supernatural setting.
3084. Lynx Physiology,2.9
#You are or can transform into a lynx, either partially or fully. You gain incredible night vision, silent paws, powerful hind legs for pouncing, and the sharp senses of an apex ambush predator.
3085. Lynxfolk Physiology,3.2
#You are a lynxfolk, a humanoid lynx hybrid. You possess enhanced agility, night vision, retractable claws, tufted ears with amplified hearing, and the natural grace and stealth of a feline predator in a bipedal form.
3086. Machine Soul,4.6
#Your soul is technological in nature, granting you a near-limitless life force and innate access to a vast array of mechanical abilities and technological skills. You can interface with machines as naturally as breathing. Strong electromagnetic waves, however, can disrupt or even kill you.
3087. Madness Embodiment,6.5
#You are the living embodiment of madness and insanity itself. You feed on the insanity of everyone and everything, including yourself, converting it into raw energy and life force. You may never age and may be immune to death itself, but you are dangerously unstable and owe allegiance to nothing.
3088. Maenad Physiology,5.1
#Greek Mythology - You are or can transform into a Maenad, one of the frenzied nymph-followers of Dionysus. You gain supernatural strength, ecstatic frenzy that makes you nearly unstoppable in combat, command over wild beasts, and access to intoxicating divine madness. You are vulnerable to divine slayers and to your own feral mind.
3089. Magic Adaptation,4.8
#Your body adapts to any form of magic or magical environment, negating magical effects that would harm you. Prolonged exposure only makes you stronger against that type of magic. May only apply to certain forms of magic.
3090. Magic Conduit,4.7
#Your body is a natural conduit for magical energy, able to channel the essence of magic itself through yourself to gain its abilities and knowledge. You serve as a living link between the magical realm and the physical world, though the magic flowing through you may have negative effects over time.
3091. Magic Derivation,9.3
#You are the primordial source of all magic in every living being, across cosmic and universal scales. As long as you exist, magic exists; every spell ever cast is a downstream echo of you. If you die, all magic everywhere ceases along with you, and every magical entity in your plane of existence dies with it.
3092. Magic Embodiment,9.5
#You are the physical personification of all forms of Magic, the living incarnation of the Arcane itself. You wield limitless control over every school, system, and form of magic across existence, and your will is essentially magic's will. There is no spell you cannot cast and no magical effect beyond your command.
3093. Magic Empowerment,3.9
#You become stronger, faster and more durable when in contact with magic, whether your own or someone else's. Extended exposure can unlock related abilities, enhance existing ones, and even slow your aging. Too much magical energy at once can overload you.
3094. Magic Hybrid Physiology,4.1
#You are a magical hybrid, a fusion between two mystical species or between a mundane being and a magical one. You inherit traits and magical abilities from both sides of your lineage, although you may not reach the full strength of either parent.
3095. Magic Immunity,5.4
#You are immune to magic and magical effects, spells, curses, potions and incantations slide off you as if they never existed. With practice, you can selectively allow beneficial magic like healing to affect you, but at base you are a null zone for all arcane influence.
3096. Magic Intangibility,4.6
#Magic cannot feel you. Magical traps, wards, detection spells and enchanted objects simply fail to register your presence, making you a ghost to the arcane. Meta Magic and Almighty Magic can still pick you up.
3097. Magic Metabolization,3.8
#You can feed off magic, consuming spells, mana, and magical energy to fuel your body and powers. You can drink potions like soda, eat enchantments off weapons, and survive indefinitely in a mana-rich environment. Overconsumption may cause arcane indigestion.
3098. Magic Power,5.3
#You possess magical power as a core part of your being, an endless wellspring of arcane energy flowing through you. This raw magical force can be shaped into a wide variety of magical feats over time, granting you access to spells, enhancements, and supernatural phenomena. You are bound by magical laws unless you transcend them.
3099. Magic Transcendence,8.6
#Your powers exist beyond the laws and scope of magic itself. Anti-magic, magic negation and magical rules simply do not apply to you, allowing you to perform feats that contradict the very logic of whatever magic system you encounter. Magic users will find their counters utterly useless against you.
3100. Magica Infinitum,7.8
#Your magical power and potential grow endlessly over time with no upper limit. Given enough time you can perform any feat imaginable, as your raw magical reserves keep climbing forever. You may struggle to regulate this growth, and overly rapid increases risk self-destruction.
3101. Magical Alien Physiology,5.7
#You are or can transform into an extraterrestrial being that also happens to be a magical entity, combining alien biology with innate mystical talent. Your body is modified through magical means, granting enhanced intelligence and capabilities beyond normal aliens. Still vulnerable to anti-magic and higher beings.
3102. Magical Animal Physiology,4.2
#You are or can transform into an animal that also doubles as a magical being. Unlike mythical creatures, you are a regular animal that has gained the ability to wield magic, granting you human level intelligence, anthropomorphic traits and arcane spellcasting on top of your beastly form.
3103. Magical Arm,3.7
#One or both of your arms are imbued with magical properties, acting as a natural conduit for supernatural powers. You can channel spells and mystical effects through them with far greater ease than a normal mage. Lose the arm and you lose the ability.
3104. Magical Blood,4.4
#Your blood is inherently magical, granting you access to various mystical abilities that you channel through it. You can use your blood as a casting medium, an offensive weapon, or a ritual component. Overuse will weaken or kill you, and blood absorption or magic negation is a hard counter.
3105. Magical Divinity,7.3
#You are a divine being through magical means, possessing godlike raw power and the status that comes with it. Whether through ancestry, transformation, faith or stolen divinity, you stand above mortals as a deity of the mystical arts. Divinity nullification, magic negation and divine slayers remain your few vulnerabilities.
3106. Magical Energy Mimicry,5.8
#Your body is made of or can transform into pure magical energy. You can maintain your normal anatomical form, shift into homogeneous mana, or let the energy flow through your physical body to fortify cells, bones and muscles. Magic immunity renders you harmless and magic negation is potentially fatal.
3107. Magical Entity Physiology,6.0
#You are a pure magical entity by nature, wielding magic innately rather than learning it as a craft. Your body and soul are woven from magic itself, giving you far greater talent and power than any mere mage. Anti-magic, magic immunity and shapeshifting negation are your few true weaknesses.
3108. Magical Feathers,3.0
#Your feathers - whether growing from wings, scattered across your body, or simply carried as objects - are magical in nature, each capable of various mystical effects. Throw them as charms, scatter them as spell components, or let them fall as a blessing. You have a limited number available.
3109. Magical Hair,3.3
#Your hair is imbued with magical properties, allowing you to cast spells through strands of it. You can weave hair into sigils, use it as a spell focus, or let it serve as an extension of your magical reach. If your hair is cut or shaved, the power is nullified until it grows back.
3110. Magical Heart,3.8
#Your heart is a heart of magic, allowing you to possess magical capabilities even without being practiced in the arts yourself. You passively generate magical energy and can channel it through your body for various effects, though the heart itself can still be removed or targeted.
3111. Magical Machine Physiology,5.2
#You are, or can transform into, a machine that doubles as a magical being. Your body possesses enhanced intelligence, genuine emotions, and mechanical components that defy conventional physics thanks to your arcane nature. You can be modified through magical means and enchanted like an artifact.
3112. Magical Object Mimicry,4.7
#You are, or can transform into, a sentient object that doubles as a magical being. As this object you possess enhanced intelligence, human emotions and a form that can be modified through magical means, letting you masquerade as a harmless item or fight as an enchanted artifact with a mind of its own.
3113. Magical Plant Physiology,4.6
#You are, or can transform into, a sentient magical plant. Your body possesses enhanced intelligence, emotions, and photosynthetic magic that lets you regenerate in sunlight, sprout weapons of bark and thorn, and carry enchantments through your very sap.
3114. Magical Quintessence,6.2
#Your body generates its own magical energy infinitely and indefinitely, never needing to draw from ambient mana. This limitless wellspring can fuel spellcasting, enhance your body to superhuman levels, or power any magical invention you touch. While generation is infinite, your capacity to channel it at once is still limited by your skill.
3115. Magical Symbiosis,5.1
#Allows you to host magical entities inside your body, be they mana beings, arcane creatures or the souls of witches and warlocks. In exchange you gain access to their spells and arcane knowledge, though a powerful entity may try to possess you, harm you, or even burn your body out from the inside.
3116. Magical Tears,2.8
#Your tears are imbued with magical properties, producing various effects when they touch objects or people. Could heal, curse, enchant or transform depending on the nature of your magic. You have to actually cry for them to work, which is not very practical in combat.
3117. Magitek Physiology,6.2
#Your body is a living fusion of magic and technology, possessing the advantages of both a magically enhanced and a technologically augmented form. You gain physical capabilities and supernatural faculties neither form could achieve alone. Unfortunately, you may be hackable as well as vulnerable to anti-magic.
3118. Magma Breathing,3.0
#You can treat lava as a breathable substance, breathing it in and out as easily as air. You could potentially swim through molten rock like it was water, though this power is largely useless if you do not also possess Lava Immunity.
3119. Magma Embodiment,6.6
#You are the physical manifestation and personification of magma itself. You possess limitless control over and complete immunity to all forms of molten rock, from volcanic eruptions to the mantle of a dying world. May be vulnerable to overwhelming ice or cold.
3120. Magma Immunity,3.2
#You are completely immune to magma and lava, capable of bathing in it without harm. You could take a dip in an active volcano's chamber and come out fine, though extremely cold environments may still leave you vulnerable.
3121. Magma Mimicry,5.0
#Allows you to transform your body fully or partially into magma, retaining your anatomy or becoming homogenous molten matter entirely. In this form you wield total control over magma, though cold and water remain highly effective against you.
3122. Magnet Empowerment,2.4
#Your physical capabilities are enhanced in the presence of magnets, making you stronger, faster, and more durable the closer you are to them. With enough exposure you may draw sustenance from them and even slow your aging, but without a magnet nearby you weaken considerably.
3123. Magnet Mimicry,3.6
#You can transform your body into living magnet, either retaining your full anatomy in metallic form or becoming homogeneous matter with no vital organs to exploit. You may find yourself stuck in magnet form if you lack the training to revert.
3124. Magnetic Skin,2.3
#Your skin has the qualities of a magnet, able to adhere to and conduct ferrous metals on contact. With training you can toggle it on and off, otherwise you'll be picking paperclips off yourself all day. Sensitive to EM disturbances and lightning storms.
3125. Magnetically Enhanced Condition,4.3
#You can use magnetism to enhance your physical and mental capabilities, drawing on your own magnetic field or absorbing it from external sources. Strength, speed, reflexes and cognition all scale with how much magnetism you can safely channel. Overloading yourself will make you violently sick.
3126. Magnetism Embodiment,7.4
#You are the living embodiment of magnetism itself, a walking personification of the magnetic force. You have limitless control over it and complete immunity to its effects. Non-ferrous matter is harder to affect directly, and you may be weak to purer electromagnetism, but within your domain you are functionally unmatched.
3127. Magnetism Empowerment,3.7
#You grow stronger in the presence of magnetism and magnetic fields, drawing power, stamina, and possibly sustenance from them. Prolonged exposure may even slow your aging. Demagnetization effects will cripple you.
3128. Magnetism Immunity,3.0
#You are immune to magnetism in all its direct and indirect forms, making magnetic attacks and effects completely ineffective against you. Above a certain magnitude it may start to leak through, and absolute counters like Power Negation still bypass it.
3129. Magnetism Mimicry,5.4
#Your body is made of or can transform into pure magnetism and magnetic fields. In full form you lose ordinary anatomy, becoming homogeneous magnetic matter, while in partial form magnetism flows through your cells, bones and muscles to reinforce them. Opposing electromagnetic fields can overcome you, and non-ferrous cages can contain you.
3130. Magnetokinetic Regeneration,4.4
#Allows you to regenerate your body using magnetism, with the volume of magnetic energy consumed dictating the speed of healing. You need either to generate magnetism yourself or draw it from external sources. A lifeline for any magnetism-based combatant.
3131. Maize Mimicry,1.4
#Allows you to transform your body partially or fully into maize. Your transformed form retains your anatomy but is made of corn, making you vulnerable to being eaten, trampled, or popped. Decent for hiding in cornfields.
3132. Makuragaeshi Physiology,2.6
#You are or can transform into a Makuragaeshi, a mischievous youkai cousin of the Zashiki-Warashi. You gain supernatural stealth, the ability to slip through homes unnoticed, and at higher mastery can induce nightmares and sleep paralysis in sleeping targets. Vulnerable to Shinto rites and household deities.
3133. Malevorous,5.7
#You feed on the darkness in people's hearts, gaining boosts to strength, speed, stamina and durability proportional to the level of malice in your foes. The power automatically scans the most malicious intent in the room and feasts, so the worse your enemy is, the stronger you become. Worthless against the purely good or the innocent.
3134. Malora Physiology,4.0
#You are or can transform into a Malora, the headless fire-mule of South American folklore, a cursed woman damned for her romance with a priest. The transformation activates at the full moon and ends at sunrise, cloaking you in fire and granting the body of an equine beast. You may lose coherence and sentience as the curse makes you more wild and aggressive with each change.
3135. Mammalfolk Physiology,3.2
#You are a mammalfolk, a humanoid creature with the traits and appearance of a mammal. Commonly taking the form of lion or wolf people, though any mammal is possible, you inherit the strengths, senses and instincts of your particular mammalian heritage.
3136. Mammalian Monster Physiology,3.7
#You are or can transform into a mammalian monster, a warm-blooded beast of nightmare proportions. Whether hairy or bald, you possess the enhanced physical traits and predatory instincts of a creature humans were never meant to meet.
3137. Mammalian Physiology,3.0
#You are or can mimic and transform into mammals, warm-blooded animals with complex brains and adaptive bodies. You gain their senses, instincts and physical traits, though you may inherit their fears, diets and desires along with them.
3138. Mammoth Physiology,3.3
#You are or can transform into a woolly mammoth, granting immense strength, a sturdy hide, thick fur, and natural resistance to the cold. A tusked juggernaut built for the ice age.
3139. Manananggal Physiology,4.2
#You are a Manananggal, a Filipino creature of myth that can sever its upper torso and sprout massive bat wings to fly into the night in search of prey. You possess an elongated proboscis tongue perfect for drinking blood or feasting on the hearts of the unborn. You are weak to garlic, salt, and sunlight, and your lower half left behind is your most vulnerable point.
3140. Mandala Empowerment,4.3
#You grow stronger, faster and more durable in the presence of mandalas, drawing power from their sacred geometry. With enough exposure, you can unlock new abilities tied to their divine resonance, and may even slow your own aging by sustaining yourself on their presence. Without a mandala nearby, you are just a regular person.
3141. Mandrill Physiology,2.3
#You are or can transform into a mandrill or baboon, gaining their physical strength, nimble limbs and surprisingly vicious fangs. A mandrill's bite force is no joke and neither is their colorful display.
3142. Maned Wolf Physiology,2.1
#You are or can transform into a maned wolf, the tall stilt-legged canid of South America. You gain their long-legged running ability, keen senses and that distinctive foxy musk that smells uncannily like cannabis.
3143. Maneki-Neko Physiology,3.2
#You are or can transform into a maneki-neko, the beckoning cat figurine of Japanese tradition. In this form you passively draw good luck and fortune toward your owner or those around you, and can animate despite being made of ceramic or porcelain.
3144. Manidae Physiology,3.0
#You are or can transform into a pangolin, gaining its iconic overlapping keratin scales that function like armor plating, strong digging claws and a long sticky tongue for insectivorous feeding. Your ability to curl into a near impenetrable ball makes you remarkably difficult to harm in your transformed state.
3145. Manifested Empowerment,4.4
#You grow stronger, faster and more durable in the presence of manifested power, drawing strength from any shaped technique or materialized force nearby. With enough exposure you can unlock new abilities tied to the affinity and even slow your aging by feeding on manifestations, but without them you are just baseline.
3146. Mannendake Physiology,3.2
#You are or can transform into a Yokai-Mannendake, living stalks of bamboo that drain the life force of travelers who get lost in your forest. Your body is flexible yet harder than steel, and you can siphon vitality from anyone who wanders too close.
3147. Mannequin Mimicry,2.6
#Your body has the properties and likeness of a mannequin. You can hold impossible poses indefinitely, feel no pain, and blend seamlessly into any clothing display, though your joints only bend where the sculptor decided.
3148. Manticore Physiology,4.2
#You are or can transform into a manticore, a mythical beast with the body of a lion, a humanoid face with three rows of shark-like teeth and a tail of either dragon or scorpion that shoots paralyzing venomous spines. You may develop an appetite for human flesh.
3149. Mantis Physiology,3.1
#You are or can transform into a mantis, gaining incredible reflexes, scything forelimbs capable of snapping prey in half, and near-invisible stillness. If you manifest as female, flight may be off the table.
3150. Map Mimicry,1.4
#You are or can transform into a map. Useful for hiding in plain sight in a glove compartment, but if you're made of paper you burn and tear just like the real thing.
3151. Mapinguari Physiology,4.0
#You are or can transform into a Mapinguari, the Brazilian Bigfoot resembling a giant ground sloth capable of eating people alive. You possess immense strength, durability and endurance, though you are slow-moving and your belly button is a glaring weak point.
3152. Mari Lwyd Physiology,4.3
#You are or can transform into the Mari Lwyd, a skeletal horse spirit of Welsh folklore that prowls streets during Christmas and New Year's. You appear in a draping white cloak with glowing eyes and can challenge households to rhyming battles they cannot refuse, gaining strength during the holiday season.
3153. Marid Physiology,5.8
#You are or can transform into a marid, the most powerful type of jinn, associated with the open waters of seas and oceans. You wield immense water-based powers and may grant wishes, though you are susceptible to magic, can potentially be enslaved, and your considerable arrogance can be turned against you.
3154. Marionette Mimicry,2.8
#You are or can transform into a marionette, typically made of wood and operated by wires connected to your limbs. You are vulnerable to fire and heat, and if your strings are visible an enemy could grab them to puppet you right back.
3155. Marionette Motion,3.2
#You move oddly and jerkily as if controlled by invisible strings, your body bending and floating in ways anatomy and gravity should forbid. Genuinely terrifying to witness, grants unpredictable combat motion, and might be permanent whether you want it or not.
3156. Maritime Adaptation,3.3
#Your body is perfectly adapted to maritime environments like islands, coastlines and the open sea. You tolerate extreme weather, require little food or water, shrug off heat and salt spray alike, and may develop coloration that blends into coastal environments.
3157. Marshmallow Mimicry,2.2
#You are or can transform your body into marshmallow, either keeping your anatomy intact or becoming homogeneous fluff. You are bouncy and cushioned, but sensitive to heat and technically edible to anyone hungry enough.
3158. Marshmallow Monster Physiology,2.9
#You are or can transform into a marshmallow monster, towering, squishy and surprisingly menacing. You can be eaten, controlled by users of Marshmallow Manipulation, and are a prime target for Monster Slayers, but on a good day you're basically Stay Puft.
3159. Marsupial Physiology,3.1
#You are or can transform into a marsupial such as a kangaroo, wombat, opossum or koala. You gain the traits of your chosen form, from kangaroo kicks that can kill to the sheer obstinate durability of a wombat.
3160. Marsupialianoid Physiology,3.4
#You are or can transform into a marsupialianoid, a humanoid hybrid race bearing marsupial traits. You retain human intelligence and dexterity while gaining kangaroo legs, a pouch, or the jaws of a Tasmanian devil depending on which branch you embody.
3161. Martial Arts Empowerment,4.2
#Whenever you practice or engage in martial arts, your body is empowered - becoming stronger, faster and tougher the longer you fight. Prolonged mastery may even slow your aging and let you draw sustenance from the forms themselves. Requires you to actually know martial arts to benefit.
3162. Martian Physiology,5.8
#DC - You are (or can transform into) a Martian, the catch-all alien species from Mars. Depending on the roll you could end up with shapeshifting, telepathy, flight and density control like a White/Green Martian, or simply be a little green goblin with a ray gun. Fire is almost always a weakness regardless.
3163. Masculinity Aspect Manifestation,5.2
#You embody the conceptual traits of masculinity - courage, physical prowess, stoicism, protection. You draw power from acting in accordance with these ideals, growing stronger when you bear burdens, defend others or face danger without flinching. The specific aspects that empower you depend on what culture defines as 'manly' in your setting.
3164. Mask Mimicry,3.8
#Your body is made of masks, or can transform into such. In your mask form your anatomy is fully intact but composed entirely of layered masks of any material you choose. You may sometimes find it hard to tell where 'you' end and the masks begin.
3165. Masochism Embodiment,6.5
#You are the embodiment of masochism. Every bit of pain, injury and suffering inflicted on you - physical, mental or spiritual - feeds you pleasure and power. The more you are hurt, the stronger you become, making conventional attacks not just useless but actively counterproductive. Powerless against painless forms of death like instant kills or soul erasure.
3166. Massless Body Parts,3.6
#Some or all of your body parts possess near-zero mass, letting you move them with absurd speed and precision. Your fists can blur faster than sound and your legs tire less from carrying nothing. However currents, sticky substances and certain forces can yank your limbs around far too easily.
3167. Mastered Activity,5.2
#You can perform advanced or master-level actions, moves and maneuvers with little to no training. Pick up a violin and play a concerto, step onto a racetrack and drive like a veteran, wield a sword you have never held before like it's a part of you. You still need to put in some effort, but years of practice are compressed into minutes.
3168. Matagot Physiology,3.8
#You are a Matagot, a spirit from French folklore that appears as a black cat, rat, fox, dog or crow. You possess minor spirit abilities and, if fed and treated properly by a magician you bond with, you provide them with a single gold coin every day. You can be warded off by certain rituals and holy relics.
3169. Matchstick Mimicry,2.1
#Allows you to transform into or become made entirely of matchsticks, either retaining your anatomy in matchstick form or becoming homogeneous matter. Useful for squeezing through cracks and reshaping yourself, but water and wind users can make short work of you.
3170. Material Strength Defiance,4.2
#Allows you to ignore the property of material strength on your own body, letting you stretch and deform your flesh and bones far beyond their normal limits without permanent damage. You can turn rubbery and snap back into shape, though raw physical force still affects you normally.
3171. Matinta Pereira Physiology,3.2
#Brazilian Folklore - You take on the traits of the Matinta-Pereira, a birdlike creature that appears as an elderly woman or a striped cuckoo. You gain enhanced senses, flight as the bird form, and a taste for human blood. Weak to iron, loud noises, and the spoken name of any god while transformed.
3172. Matter Change Defiance,4.2
#Your body defies both physical and chemical changes in matter. You can walk through fire, wade through molten metal, or sit in boiling acid and your flesh simply refuses to burn, melt, or react. Does not protect against forces like gravity or kinetic impact, and extreme scale changes may overwhelm it.
3173. Matter Ingestion,3.2
#You can eat absolutely anything without harmful effect, be it solid, liquid, or gas. Rocks, acid, poison, metal, radioactive waste - it all goes down and digests fine. Doesn't grant special nutrition from it, and there's still a limit to how much you can physically fit.
3174. Matter Power Link,4.2
#Your powers are directly linked to the matter in and around you, drawing on physical substance as fuel and allowing material to reinforce and amplify your abilities. The stronger or denser the matter nearby, the more potent your powers become. Unstable states of matter can cause your powers to misfire.
3175. Matter State Immunity,4.3
#You are immune to all matter state transitions imposed on you. You cannot be frozen, melted, evaporated, condensed, sublimated, or otherwise phase-shifted. Your body stays exactly the state it is regardless of temperature, pressure, or supernatural effect. May be bypassed by absolute negation powers.
3176. Maximum Bodily Capacity,4.5
