#Your body runs at 100% of its biological potential at all times, every muscle, organ and nerve firing at peak efficiency. You outperform anyone at Peak Human Condition by a comfortable margin. Extended overuse may begin to deteriorate your bodily systems if you don't let them rest.
3177. Maximum Brain Capacity,4.7
#You use 100% of your brain at all times, gaining extended knowledge, hyper-efficient mental processing and ways of thinking you could never have understood before. Excessive absorption of information may trigger psychotic breakdowns as your mind tries to process more than it can hold.
3178. Maximum Concentration Capacity,4.2
#You can channel 100% of your concentration into any task, processing information at near-instant speed, shutting out all distraction and committing everything to memory with perfect recall. Your mind becomes a razor, though the intense focus may drain your stamina considerably.
3179. Maximum Muscle Usage,4.0
#Your muscles can exert 100% of their maximum capacity, whereas regular humans can only pull off about 30% without tearing themselves apart. You need the durability to back it up and careless use will accelerate lactic acid build-up, tiring you much faster than usual.
3180. Mazoku Physiology,5.2
#Allows you to transform into a Mazoku, a supernatural being from Japanese mythology. You gain considerable demonic power, enhanced physical stats and supernatural senses, though the exact flavor depends on your ruling maō. Weak against holy powers and Angel Physiology users.
3181. Mazzikin Physiology,3.8
#Allows you to transform into a Mazzikin, an invisible demon from Jewish folklore. You gain natural invisibility, a penchant for mischief and the capacity for larger destruction when provoked. Modern versions favor the winged succubus form. May be warded off by Jewish rituals and holy relics.
3182. Mbwiri Physiology,3.4
#Allows you to transform into a Mbwiri, a possessing demon from Central African folklore. You can possess victims and induce epileptic fits, wild uncontrollable dancing and even madness. Central African shamans know the ritual to drive you out and holy relics may ward you off.
3183. Meat Mimicry,2.9
#Your body is made of meat, or can transform into it at will. You can become anatomically identical to a normal human but made of pure meat, or a homogenous fleshy mass with no vital points. Unfortunately, you are now quite edible and carnivores will find you fascinating.
3184. Meatball Mimicry,1.4
#Your body is made of or can transform into meatballs. You can be anatomically identical to your normal form but rendered entirely in meatballs, or a homogenous pile of them. You might get eaten, especially at Italian restaurants.
3185. Mecha Bond,4.6
#You share a symbiotic bond with your mecha that connects you as if you were a single being. Through this bond you both gain new and powerful abilities that go beyond the mecha's original design, scaling with your determination and the machine's frame. Weak against Bond Destruction.
3186. Mecha Mimicry,5.0
#Allows you to transform into a mecha, a biomorphic humanoid robot far larger than any human with a varying arsenal of weaponry and support systems. You may need a pilot to move around and severe damage to internal systems such as your power core may destroy you.
3187. Mechagenoform,7.4
#Your body is a perfect fusion of mechanical, biological and conscious systems, allowing you to absorb any other system into yourself to evolve, adapt and develop indefinitely. Given enough time you become effectively unbeatable. The longer you enmesh with the collective, the greater the risk of being subsumed by it.
3188. Mechanical Fan Mimicry,0.7
#Allows you to transform into a mechanical fan. Yes, the rotating blade kind you plug into the wall. Dependent on electricity to function and you might not be able to transform back.
3189. Mechanical Regeneration,3.5
#Your mechanical parts self-repair via advanced technology, reassembling from damage and even letting you subtly improve their design during the process. Regeneration takes time and leaves you vulnerable, and some forms of damage may be beyond what your internal repair systems can handle.
3190. Mechanical Symbiosis,4.7
#You host a mechanical/technological entity within your body, gaining powers based on its nature, grafted weapons, nanites, full automatons, futuristic alien armaments sprouting from your flesh. Can also grant you the ability to interface with machines directly. The entity may try to possess you, your body may reject it, or it may simply be too powerful and destroy you.
3191. Mechanical Wing Manifestation,3.3
#You possess or can manifest wings made from mechanics and technology, usable for flight, as offensive weapons, or as shields to block incoming attacks. Being mostly metal they are vulnerable to fire and heat, and you may need to endure cold and altitude if you fly high enough.
3192. Media Embodiment,7.8
#You are the embodiment of Media itself, the personification of television, the internet, radio and every channel through which information flows. You possess near-limitless control over all forms of media, able to rewrite broadcasts, flood networks, or vanish from every record in existence with a thought.
3193. Medicine Empowerment,3.9
#You grow stronger, faster and more durable the more medicine and medical equipment is around you, possibly drawing sustenance from them or slowing your aging. In a sterile room stocked with supplies you are at your peak, in a barren wasteland with nothing pharmaceutical nearby you are at your weakest.
3194. Meditation Empowerment,3.8
#You grow stronger, faster and more durable the more you meditate, each session deepening your reserves and unlocking abilities tied to your inner stillness. Some users stop aging entirely through meditation, but it requires immense patience and mental fortitude to reach those heights.
3195. Megacephaloid Physiology,4.6
#Your head is disproportionately massive, housing an oversized brain that grants you most if not all mind-based superpowers, from telepathy to psychokinesis. The downside is that your body struggles to carry the weight, leaving you physically frail and slow, and you may find yourself sliding into megalomania.
3196. Melancholy Embodiment,6.2
#You are the living embodiment of sorrow itself. Your power scales with the sadness within you and around you, allowing you to manipulate and induce melancholy in others to devastating degrees, even lethally. The cost is that genuine happiness weakens you, and you are discontent no matter the circumstance.
3197. Enhanced Melee Strike,2.8
#Your strikes hit noticeably harder than any normal human could manage. Punches crack bone and dent metal, kicks send grown men flying, weapons cleave through what they shouldn't. Can still be countered or overpowered by a stronger force.
3198. Supernatural Melee Strike,4.6
#Your strikes carry supernatural force behind them. Punches shatter boulders, kicks can crumble walls, and weapon strikes cleave through steel like wet paper. You hit on a level well beyond anything physical training alone could produce, outmatched only by absolute-tier attackers.
3199. Melee Strike,2.0
#Your strikes hit at the peak of human capability. A solid punch from you can knock a grown man unconscious, fracture bone, dent steel doors, and a good kick can put someone clean through a brick wall. No supernatural force, just refined, devastating physicality.
3200. Meliad Physiology,5.7
#You are a Meliad, a nymph and minor goddess born from the blood of a god mixing with the earth. You possess divine physiology tied to ash trees and honey, granting you nature-aligned powers, divine resilience, and dominion over the environment surrounding your trees. Vulnerable to divine slayers and anti-deity abilities.
3201. Melting Presence,4.7
#You passively generate a field around you that melts your surroundings. Walls slump, metal runs, floors sag beneath your feet. Being in a room with you is a slow-motion disaster, and you'd better hope you're immune to the consequences of your own aura.
3202. Memetic Embodiment,6.8
#You are or can become a living meme, an idea that propagates through any form of communication: speech, writing, imagery, the internet. You spread like a disease of thought, existing in every mind that hears of you. Memory Erasure is one of the few things that can kill you, and if everyone forgets you, you vanish completely.
3203. Memory Condition,5.6
#Your physical condition scales with the memories you have access to. Every recollection, your own or absorbed from elsewhere, fuels your strength, speed, and durability. A lifetime of experiences makes you merely strong; a library of stolen memories makes you unstoppable.
3204. Memory Embodiment,6.5
#You are the living personification of memory itself. You grow more powerful the more things you remember and the more others rely on their own memories. In a world where the past matters, you are a god; in one that forgets, you fade.
3205. Memory Immortality,6.6
#You are immortal so long as memory of you persists somewhere in the world. Even if your body, soul and spirit are utterly destroyed you will reform so long as someone, somewhere, still remembers you. Erase all record of your existence and you die for good.
3206. Memory Physiology,5.3
#Your body is made of memories, either one specific memory or many layered together. You can shift between your normal anatomical form and a homogeneous memory-stuff form, though Memory Destruction and Memory Erasure can wound or even kill you.
3207. Memory Vampirism,4.8
#You sustain yourself and your powers by devouring the memories of others, draining them subtly enough to go unnoticed or hungrily enough to leave a husk. If you go too long without feeding you will begin to wither and die.
3208. Menacing Presence,3.6
#You radiate an overwhelming aura of dread that induces fear in those around you, in severe cases causing hallucinations, insanity, paralysis or even death. Those with strong will can shrug it off and, until you train it, your aura may terrify people you never meant to frighten.
3209. Menninkainen Physiology,3.5
#Allows you to transform into a menninkäinen, a goblin-leprechaun hybrid of Finnish folklore. You love riddles and games and, should you be captured, tradition demands you grant wishes or treasure to your captor. Vulnerable to cold iron and you burn badly in direct sunlight.
3210. Mental Continuation,5.4
#Your mind transcends your body. Even if your physical form is destroyed, your consciousness persists fully aware and self-sustaining, still thinking, remembering and reasoning. You may not be able to interact with the physical world in this state, but no mere death can snuff you out. Only those wielding absolute erasure can truly end you.
3211. Mental Disorder-Based Immunity,3.8
#Your own mental disorder grants you immunity to certain effects. Most commonly, you are so fundamentally insane that mind-affecting powers slide right off you, unable to find purchase in a psyche that already makes no sense. The downside is that you still have to live with the disorder itself, and if anyone ever cures you, the immunity goes with it.
3212. Mental Power Link,3.9
#Your powers are directly fueled by and tied to your mental state. Clear thoughts make for clean, strong techniques. Focused determination amplifies them further. The catch is that unstable emotions produce unstable results, and anyone who can invade your thoughts can also sabotage your abilities.
3213. Mental Presence,7.6
#Your mind exists everywhere and anywhere simultaneously. You are aware of every location, every conversation, every thought being thought, all at once. Your body is still fixed in one place and vulnerable as any other, but your consciousness spans all of existence. Processing this much simultaneous awareness requires a mind built for it.
3214. Mental Regeneration,4.7
#Your mind regenerates from any damage done to it, whether that be brain trauma, disease, memory loss, mind control or psychic alterations. As it mends, you are highly resistant to those same effects. You also recover lost memories, heal mental traumas and grow past old breakdowns. Sufficiently powerful telepaths may still slip past your defenses.
3215. Mental Resistance,3.5
#Your mind itself is tough, not merely shielded. You are nearly invulnerable to mental illnesses, psychic alterations and direct mental attacks, because the substance of your psyche resists them rather than deflecting them. There is still a ceiling on how much you can take before cracks begin to form.
3216. Mephitid Physiology,2.3
#You are or can transform into a skunk, partially or fully. You gain the physical traits of a mephitid, including the infamous spray, which you can unleash as a truly devastating area-denial stink bomb against anyone unlucky enough to be downwind.
3217. Mercury Mimicry,5.2
#Your body is made of or can transform entirely into mercury, retaining your anatomy in liquid metal form or shifting to a homogeneous slurry. You gain mercury's properties, including heat resistance and a form of thermal detection, but also its vulnerabilities to extreme temperatures and its horrific toxicity to anything living that touches you.
3218. Merfolk Physiology,3.7
#You are a mer, possessing a powerful scaled tail, webbed fingers, and gills that let you breathe underwater and swim with incredible grace and speed. You can still function on land but your scales dry out under the sun, and prolonged exposure to heat is genuinely painful.
3219. Merging Immunity,2.6
#You cannot be fused or merged with another being against your will, nor can you get stuck inside objects via botched teleportation or phasing mishaps. The downside is that you also can't intentionally merge even when it would save your life.
3220. Merrow Physiology,3.2
#Irish Folklore - You are a merrow, a type of Irish merfolk. Female merrows are strikingly beautiful while males are famously ugly. You require a magical cap to travel between sea and shore, and if it is stolen you lose your ability to shapeshift. The sea calls to you constantly and the pull home is hard to resist.
3221. Mesmerizing Presence,4.6
#Your very presence is hypnotically enthralling, ensnaring the minds of those who lay eyes upon you. A single glance can draw admiration, devotion, or obsession, and your words carry weight that reshapes beliefs and emotions effortlessly. Those with strong willpower or psychic defenses can resist, and it has no effect on the blind.
3222. Mesoamerican Cuisine Mimicry,2.3
#Your body is made entirely of Mesoamerican cuisine, whether anatomically identical to your normal form or a homogeneous mass of corn and spice. You are still edible, which is exactly as inconvenient as it sounds.
3223. Meta Erasure Immunity,9.3
#You are completely inerasable. Void, oblivion, deletion and nonexistence cannot touch you — even if all of existence itself is wiped out, you continue on as if nothing happened. Your existence is entirely self-contained, requiring no reality or field to reside in, whether you are healthy, damaged, dead or beyond.
3224. Meta Memory,8.6
#You possess the memories of every being that has existed, does exist, and will ever exist, from the origin of all things to their end. Dreams, genetics, muscle memory, the memories of souls, planets, entire universes — all of it lives in your head. You even remember what inanimate objects and elements have 'experienced'.
3225. Metabolism/Absolute,6.2
#Your metabolism is limitless. You cannot gain weight no matter what you eat, you are immune to illness, intoxication and poison, and your body heals at absolute speed. Injuries close before you can finish noticing them, and no toxin can take hold long enough to matter.
3226. Enhanced Metabolism,2.8
#Your metabolism is kicked up several notches, giving you resistance to weight gain, illness, mild injuries and intoxication while also accelerating your healing. Downside is that you need to eat a lot more to keep up.
3227. Supernatural Metabolism,4.2
#Your metabolism is unnaturally accelerated, rendering you glaringly resistant to weight gain, illness, injury and intoxication while giving you a solid healing factor. You will need to eat obscene amounts of food to keep yourself fueled, otherwise you risk rapidly starving.
3228. Metal Empowerment,3.5
#You become stronger, faster, more durable and more resilient when in contact with metal, and may unlock additional metal-affiliated abilities while empowered. At higher levels you can draw sustenance from metal directly and even slow your aging while touching it.
3229. Metal Ingestion,1.8
#You can eat metal with little to no difficulty, chewing through iron, steel and copper like crunchy snacks. Great for disposing of weapons, unsettling dinner guests, or supplementing the nutrients other metal-based powers require.
3230. Metal Mimicry,4.5
#You can transform your body completely into metal, either retaining your anatomy or going fully homogeneous. Your powers and properties change with each metal you mimic, from malleable softness that flexes under blows to unyielding hardness that shrugs them off. You remain vulnerable to magnetism and corrosion like any metal.
3231. Metal Tail,2.3
#You can manifest a tail made of solid metal, useful for whipping enemies, shielding your back, or balancing during acrobatics. Can be retracted at will.
3232. Metal Teeth,2.4
#Your teeth are made of or can transform into solid metal at will, giving you an incredibly powerful bite capable of chewing through steel cables, bone and most materials regular teeth couldn't dream of. Be mindful of rust.
3233. Metal-Eating Growth,3.2
#You can grow larger and stronger by eating metal, with the density and quality of the metal determining how much you gain. You may start out small and have trouble shrinking back down, so pace your meals.
3234. Metallic Blood,3.3
#Your blood is composed of a metallic substance, silver, gold, iron, copper, titanium or steel, allowing you to manipulate it in place of normal blood. Your blood may be poisonous to those who drink it, but you are also vulnerable to Magnetism Manipulation if the metal is magnetic.
3235. Metallic Bodily Fluids,3.5
#All of your body's fluids, blood, sweat, saliva, tears, are composed of a metallic substance that you can manipulate in place of their normal forms. Your fluids may be toxic to others touching or ingesting them, but magnetism users may find you far too easy a target.
3236. Metallophilic Adaptation,2.8
#You are adapted to environments saturated with metals that would be toxic to ordinary beings, thriving where others would sicken and die. You may even be able to obtain energy by reducing certain metals, making a heavy-metal wasteland feel like home. Without any metals around, however, you could starve.
3237. Metamorphic Arm,3.6
#At least one of your arms or hands has shapeshifting properties, allowing it to morph into blades, hammers, tentacles, shields, or any form you can imagine. Useless if the arm is restrained or severed, so keep it moving.
3238. Metamorphosis,4.2
#As you age, your body naturally matures and evolves, granting new and stronger abilities at each stage of your life. The process takes time and may leave you vulnerable during transition, but each evolution brings you closer to your ultimate form. Interruption during the process may result in Premature Evolution.
3239. Microchip Implantation,4.5
#You have microchips implanted in your body, tiny semiconductors that grant you powerful abilities depending on their design and programming. From AI assistance to combat subroutines to biometric enhancement, the possibilities scale with the chip. EMPs are a hard counter and removal can be fatal.
3240. Micromechanical Bodily Fluids,4.3
#Your blood, sweat, saliva and other fluids are laced with microscopic machinery. Each drop of you is a swarm of bots that can repair wounds, interface with tech, or be left behind as tracking agents.
3241. Microorganism Physiology,4.0
#You either are or can transform into a microorganism, existing as a single cell or a colony at microscopic scale. You can slip through any defense, infect hosts from within, and hide where no eye could find you.
3242. Microrg-Active Blood,4.6
#Your bloodstream carries micro-organic bio-machines programmed through your own DNA sequences. They adjust your physical and mental capabilities beyond human norms, self-tuning as you grow. Vulnerable to Biological Manipulation and organite counters.
3243. Microwave Mimicry,4.3
#You are made of or can transform your body into microwaves, letting you phase through ordinary matter, travel at near-light speeds, and cook anything you pass through. Takes time to master and is dangerous to everyone around you.
3244. Mikari Baba Physiology,3.6
#Japanese Folklore - You are a Mikari Baba, a one-eyed yokai hag in straw hat and coat with a burning torch clutched in your teeth. You bring misfortune, disease and fire wherever you wander, scavenging from villages on winter nights. Afraid of objects full of holes and vulnerable to divine prayer.
3245. Milk Empowerment,2.1
#You become stronger, faster, and more durable the more dairy you consume. A glass of milk gives a noticeable boost, while a whole block of cheese could have you throwing cars. Overconsumption may still give you a stomachache.
3246. Milk Mimicry,2.9
#Your body is composed of milk and dairy, or can transform into such at will. In this form you can reshape yourself, regenerate from spilled milk, and slip through small gaps. Vulnerable to rot, curdling, and anyone with a taste for dairy.
3247. Mimic Physiology,3.3
#You are a mimic, a predatory creature capable of disguising yourself as inanimate objects, most commonly a treasure chest. You can lure prey in and strike with surprising ferocity. Seasoned adventurers may spot the imperfections in your disguise.
3248. Mimicry Empowerment,4.8
#Your mimicry abilities grow stronger the closer you are to the original users of the powers you copied. Standing next to the source, your copied fire manipulation might rival theirs, and you may even be able to wield more mimicked powers at once. Distance weakens the effect considerably.
3249. Mimimushi Physiology,2.7
#You are a Mimimushi, a microscopic yokai resembling a tiny snake with long ears. You can infect a victim by entering their ear, wriggling between their ears and heart to cause immense discomfort, cold cravings, and bloated stomachs. Vulnerable to certain herbs and Shinto rituals.
3250. Mind Anchoring,4.2
#Your mind is unshakably anchored to your body. You are immune to mental displacement, body switching, soul transfers, and mind draining of all kinds. Even if your brain were swapped out, the intruder could never take control. Always active, for better or worse.
3251. Mind Hive,4.7
#You possess multiple autonomous minds within a single body, each with its own perspective, personality, and insight. You operate by consensus, which makes you near-impossible to deceive but slow to act when the minds disagree. With enough progress the minds may eventually unify into something greater.
3252. Mind Transcendence,7.6
#You have transcended the mental restrictions of your species, unlocking cognitive abilities far beyond the normal range. Your imagination, memory, foresight, visualization, and learning speed have all been elevated to supernatural and even absolute levels. You may eventually ascend so far mentally that emotional and moral ties become distant abstractions.
3253. Mindscape,6.0
#You possess a vast and deeply personal mindscape, a metaphysical inner world born from your consciousness and soul. It is no illusion, it is a true dimension shaped by everything you are and could become, be it an ethereal heaven, an infinite forest of memory, or a chaotic void of thought. Mastery over the mindscape determines whether it serves as a sanctuary, a training ground, or a prison.
3254. Mine Mimicry,3.4
#Your body is composed of explosive mines, capable of detonating on contact and reforming afterwards. You can plant parts of yourself as traps, trigger chain reactions, or walk into enemy lines as a living minefield. Making friends is difficult when a hug might blow off their legs.
3255. Mineral Evolution,3.3
#Your body can undergo an evolutionary transformation by assimilating minerals, gaining a new form with mineral-based physiology and abilities. Each evolution is tied to a specific mineral and carries its own strengths and weaknesses.
3256. Mineral Symbiosis,4.8
#You host a mineral entity or elemental force within your body, gaining powerful stone-based abilities through your bond. The entity may occasionally try to assert control over you, and channeling too much of its power can damage your body.
3257. Minhocão Physiology,4.3
#You either are or can transform into the Minhocão, a massive South American cryptid resembling a giant worm or fish with a pig-like snout, armadillo scales, and horns. You possess tremendous strength, able to drag horses and cattle beneath the water with ease.
3258. Miniature Dragon Physiology,4.1
#You either are or can transform into a miniature dragon, possessing all the traits of a regular dragon but in a far smaller package. Your size grants you exceptional speed and agility at the cost of raw physical power against larger foes.
3259. Minokedachi Physiology,3.4
#You either are or can transform into a Minokedachi, a hunched and hairy yokai said to cause conflict and embody cowardice. Your mere presence stirs up bickering and paranoia in those around you, though you are vulnerable to Shinto rituals.
3260. Minotaur Physiology,4.6
#Greek Mythology - You either are or can transform into a minotaur, the legendary bull-headed man of Greek myth. You possess incredible strength, natural combat prowess, and an intuitive sense for navigating labyrinths and confined spaces.
3261. Mint Mimicry,2.1
#Allows you to transform your body partially or fully into mint. In this form you are somewhat edible, vulnerable to heat, and smell fantastic, but you gain the ability to reform from scattered mint matter.
3262. Miracle Embodiment,8.9
#You are the living incarnation of miracles themselves. Impossible outcomes bend toward you, hopeless odds resolve in your favor, and you possess absolute authority over any and all miraculous phenomena no matter their origin.
3263. Miracle Empowerment,4.2
#Every miracle performed in your vicinity, whether by you, others, or spontaneous circumstance, feeds your power. You grow stronger, faster and more durable as the supernatural unfolds around you, potentially even slowing your aging if miracles are frequent enough.
3264. Miracle Power Link,5.2
#Your miraculous nature is directly linked to your other powers, fueling and strengthening them through thaumaturgy. Any ability you possess operates on a higher level as long as your miraculous core remains stable, but instability can send your powers spiraling out of control.
3265. Miracle Symbiosis,5.6
#You share a symbiotic bond with a miraculous entity, absorbing its essence to perform miracles both bright and dark. You can heal, inspire and protect, or degrade, bewilder and destroy. Be careful, as a powerful enough entity may try to take your body as its own.
3266. Mirror Mimicry,4.2
#You can transform your body into mirrors or reflective surfaces, either retaining your anatomical structure or becoming homogeneous reflective matter. Your mirror form is beautiful but carries the fragility of the material, a hard strike could shatter you.
3267. Mirror Monster Mimicry,4.3
#You can transform into a monster entirely composed of mirrors, a jagged creature of reflective edges and refracted light. You gain monstrous physicality but remain vulnerable to the same fragility that plagues all mirror-based beings.
3268. Mirror Spirit Physiology,6.2
#You are a mirror spirit, a being native to the mirror world that parallels reality. Within the mirror world your authority is nigh-omnipotent, and you can travel between worlds via any reflective surface or drag others into your domain. Destroying mirrors in your vicinity weakens you.
3269. Misery Empowerment,4.3
#You grow stronger, faster and more durable from the misery of yourself or those around you. Psychological anguish, emotional suffering and relational pain all fuel your power, and as long as someone nearby is hurting you continually grow. Happiness Inducement is your bane.
3270. Misfortune Embodiment,7.4
#You are the living embodiment of misfortune itself. You wield absolute control over bad luck on every level, able to curse individuals, groups or entire populations with disaster. You feed on the misfortune of others, growing stronger with every unfortunate event you cause.
3271. Mislocated Eyes,2.6
#You have eyes in unusual places on your body, granting you the ability to see in most directions at once. Depending on placement this ranges from mildly unsettling to extremely practical, though processing all those viewpoints simultaneously can be disorienting until you get used to it.
3272. Mobile Invulnerability,4.8
#As long as you are moving forward, nothing can stop you and nothing can hurt you. You build momentum at supernatural rates, generating freight-train force in only a few steps. The moment you stop moving, the protection ends, and true absolute defenses can still halt your charge.
3273. Mobile Tasking,2.6
#You can perform any kind of task at full proficiency while moving, even at high speeds. Writing a letter while sprinting, threading a needle mid-sprint, aiming a rifle from horseback, none of it matters to you.
3274. Mochi Mimicry,2.4
#Your body is made of mochi, making you stretchy, squishy and highly resistant to blunt force. Watch out for opponents with a big appetite though, since you are entirely edible.
3275. Modernity Mimicry,6.3
#You are the living embodiment of the modern post-industrial world. You can become living machinery, buildings, streets or entire cities, and you carry modernity's all-consuming nature with you, sweeping away the old to make way for the new. Where you walk, progress follows whether the land wants it or not.
3276. Modified Soul,5.5
#Bleach - Your soul has been modified, constantly evolving and adapting at a supernatural pace. Every experience strengthens it, every battle refines it, and its spiritual nature grows stronger at a rate far beyond any ordinary being. You can draw upon this modified soul for spiritual power and enhanced physiology.
3277. Mokumokuren Physiology,3.0
#You are a Mokumokuren, a yokai that manifests as many eyes upon unkept walls and damaged shoji. You can spread your awareness across any damaged surface, seeing through every eye you grow. Your power is strongest in neglected places and significantly weaker in well-maintained homes.
3278. Molecular Adjustment,4.0
#You possess an innate resistance to molecular manipulation. Powers that attempt to alter, accelerate, decelerate or restructure your molecules struggle to take hold, and you can actively fight off lingering molecular effects. Higher-tier molecular attacks may still bypass your adjustment if the wielder is significantly stronger than you.
3279. Molecular Consciousness,5.6
#Your mind is spread throughout your molecular make-up, granting you awareness and fine control at the molecular scale of your own body. You can alter your density, composition, and structure through conscious thought, and attacks on your molecules can be felt and responded to as easily as a twitch of a finger.
3280. Mollusk Physiology,2.8
#Your body is that of a mollusk or can transform into one, granting you the traits of gastropods, cephalopods, or bivalves depending on your form. You may gain ink-spraying, shell-armoring, or suction-based abilities, but you'll likely be slow and vulnerable to salt.
3281. Molten Metal Mimicry,5.0
#Your body is made of or can transform completely into molten metal, either retaining your anatomy in liquid-metal form or becoming a homogeneous mass of superheated alloy. You gain the offensive and defensive properties of molten metal but also its weaknesses, being cooled sufficiently can incapacitate you entirely.
3282. Momonjii Physiology,3.4
#You are or can transform into a Momonjii, an ugly hairy old-man yokai evolved from a Nobusu. You possess enhanced physical traits and can exhale a supernatural wind that sickens anyone caught within it. Vulnerable to divine magic, prayers and holy relics.
3283. Monetary Empowerment,3.9
#You grow stronger, faster and more durable the more money and wealth surrounds you, drawing on currency of all kinds as a source of power. A rich user is formidable, a poor user is weakened, and some can even slow their aging by hoarding enough of it.
3284. Mongoose Physiology,2.8
#You are or can transform into a mongoose or related herpestid such as a meerkat or kusimanse. You gain their agility, sharp reflexes and natural resistance to venom, making you especially deadly against snakes and anything that relies on toxins.
3285. Monkey Physiology,2.6
#You are or can transform into a monkey, gaining enhanced agility, climbing prowess, prehensile limbs and the clever problem-solving instincts of a primate. Partial transformations let you keep your human frame while stealing monkey traits at will.
3286. Monotreme Physiology,3.0
#You are or can transform into a monotreme such as a platypus or echidna. You gain their strange egg-laying mammalian anatomy, venomous spurs, electroreceptive senses and surprising durability, a physiology unlike anything else on land.
3287. Monster Attraction,2.3
#Monsters are drawn to you, pulled to your presence whether you want them there or not. Useful if you want to find them, dangerous if you do not, as attracted monsters rarely arrive with friendly intentions and you cannot simply turn the pull off.
3288. Monster Divinity,7.8
#You possess the monstrous form of a dark god, your very existence a divine aberration. Your raw power is beyond the mundane, placing you among divine beings by nature alone. Your monstrous flesh channels godhood itself, allowing you to trade blows with deities and overwhelm lesser divine entities. Vulnerable to monster slayers and divinity nullification.
3289. Monster Empowerment,3.2
#You grow stronger, faster and tougher whenever you are near monsters, even drawing sustenance and slowed aging from their presence. The more monsters around you, the greater the boost, and with enough exposure you may awaken new abilities tied to their affinity.
3290. Monster Life-Force,4.6
#Your very life essence is monstrous, your vitality running thicker and wilder than any human's. You are a monster among men, possessing supernatural abilities on a monstrous level, with stamina and resilience that mortal bodies cannot match.
3291. Monster Physiology,4.5
#Your body is that of a monster, an aberration outside the natural order. Your form is hideous, your capabilities wildly variable, and your mere appearance can inspire panic and harm. Every monster is different, so the exact nature of your physiology depends on what kind of monster you are.
3292. Monster Soul,4.4
#Your soul is monstrous, possibly made of many monster souls bound together, each carrying different abilities. The monstrous nature of your soul grants you access to their powers, though you risk losing consciousness or surrendering yourself to bestial instincts.
3293. Monster Truck Mimicry,2.1
#You can transform into a monster truck. Your truck form possesses immense horsepower, oversized tires and a frame built to crush cars, though you are still bound by fuel, gravity and the fact that you are a truck. Users of Vehicle Manipulation can drive you.
3294. Monster-Infused Mutated Physiology,4.3
#Your body has been injected with monster blood or grafted with monster organs, granting you powers drawn from whatever monster you were infused with. A vampire infusion grants vampiric traits, a dragon infusion dragon traits, and so on, each coming with both the strengths and the curses of their source.
3295. Monstrel Physiology,4.9
#You are a monstrel, a hybrid of two or more different monster species, and your body carries the strengths and abilities of each breed woven into one form. The more monstrous lineages mixed within you, the greater your power, though you may also inherit their weaknesses.
3296. Monstrous Animal Physiology,4.3
#You are a monstrous animal, a natural beast twisted into something far larger, fiercer and more violent than its kin. You retain the instincts of your species but wield them with supernatural brutality, capable of inflicting terror regardless of what animal you are. You may become feral when pushed.
3297. Monstrous Architecture Physiology,4.6
#You are a monstrous building, a sapient or semi-sapient structure such as a haunted house, fortress or tower. You possess supernatural abilities centered on your architectural form, able to shift rooms, grow corridors and trap those inside your body. Your size tends to slow or immobilize you entirely.
3298. Monstrous Power Link,4.4
#Your monstrous nature is directly linked to your powers, fueling and strengthening them through your freakish aspects. The more you embrace your monstrosity, the more potent your abilities become. If your monstrous nature becomes unstable, your powers may spiral out of control.
3299. Monstrous Wolf Physiology,4.1
#You are a monstrous wolf, far larger and more violent than any natural predator, capable of inflicting terror and savagery on anything in your path. Your bite, claws and senses are all amplified to supernatural levels, though your form may drive you feral.
3300. Moon Rabbit Physiology,4.2
#You are or can become a moon rabbit, the mythical hare said to pound the elixir of life on the lunar surface. You possess lunar-aligned mystical abilities, enhanced agility, and an innate talent for alchemy and medicine-making, especially under moonlight.
3301. Morality Embodiment,6.5
#You are the living embodiment of moral values, whether good, evil, or neutral. Your very existence radiates your chosen alignment as an intrinsic force, shaping ethical currents around you. Users of Amorality remain beyond your influence.
3302. Morality Transcendence,8.1
#You exist beyond good and evil, beyond even neutrality. Concepts of right and wrong do not apply to you and may not even be comprehensible to you, rendering you immune to all morality-based manipulation and allowing you to interfere with the very forces that govern such things.
3303. Morphogenetic Field Connection,7.3
#You possess a deep and powerful connection with the morphogenetic fields that imprint form upon all living things. Through this link you understand life down to its atomic blueprint, can tap into universal life-force, and can resonate with all living beings within your field's range. Weak against Connection Removal.
3304. Morphogenetic Fluids,6.4
#Your bodily fluids are imbued with the properties of morphogenetic fields, carrying the encoded biological and metaphysical blueprints of life itself. Through direct interaction you can imprint, reshape or guide the development of any living being, though others may try to harvest you for these fluids.
3305. Mosquito Physiology,2.8
#You are or can transform into a mosquito, gnat or midge, gaining their tiny flight, blood-drinking proboscis, and ability to slip through the smallest gaps. Still vulnerable to bug spray and frogs, unfortunately.
3306. Moss Physiology,2.4
#Your body is made of moss, or you can transform it fully into moss. You are soft, resilient, and thrive in damp shaded environments, able to regrow from even the smallest clump of yourself.
3307. Moth Monster Physiology,3.6
#You are or can transform into a moth monster, a grotesque oversized version of the humble moth with all its unsettling traits scaled up to horror. Still easily distracted by bright lights, and vulnerable to Monster Slayers.
3308. Moth Physiology,2.5
#You are or can transform into a moth, gaining silent powdery flight, incredible scent tracking and a strange fixation on light sources. Some moth forms lack a functioning mouth entirely, so eat beforehand.
3309. Mothfolk Physiology,3.4
#You are one of the mothfolk, a humanoid moth race with feathered antennae, powdery wings and compound eyes. You possess enhanced senses of smell, silent flight, and the uncanny beauty of a creature drawn to flame.
3310. Mothman Physiology,4.8
#You are or can transform into the Mothman of West Virginia, a seven-foot winged humanoid with glowing red eyes and a wingspan over ten feet. You can fly faster than most cars, induce dread, and may be a harbinger of disaster, though your powers may be strongest at night.
3311. Motion Adaptation,3.2
#You can adapt to any style of motion, moving efficiently in even the most unorthodox positions and postures. Run while crouched, swim while upside down, climb while sideways - no matter how inefficient the form, you move without losing speed.
3312. Motion Embodiment,8.6
#You are the living personification of motion itself, every concept from velocity and acceleration to inertia and displacement flows from you. Nothing moves without your tacit permission and your own movement is beyond physical law. Users of Time Embodiment may have power over you.
3313. Motion Retention,4.5
#You retain your ability to move regardless of what should be stopping you. Turned paper-thin? Still moving. Paralyzed, crushed, transformed into a slug? Still moving. Mass, shape, and disability simply don't factor into whether your body listens to you.
3314. Mountain Adaptation,2.3
#Your body is perfectly adapted to mountain environments, thin air, extreme cold, high pressure and dizzying heights mean nothing to you. You can scale and traverse the harshest peaks without gear, though heat may leave you sluggish.
3315. Mountain Mimicry,5.8
#You are a living mountain, your body composed of earth, stone and snow. Immense physical durability, weight and resilience come naturally, though mobility is another question entirely.
3316. Mouse Physiology,2.1
#You are or can transform into a mouse, gaining all the traits of one, small size, keen senses, impressive agility for your scale. Unfortunately cats, owls, snakes and most predators see you as dinner.
3317. Mousefolk Physiology,3.1
#You are a mousefolk, a humanoid mouse with whiskers, twitching nose and a tail. You retain keen senses, natural agility and the fantasy-staple charm of a rodent adventurer, while keeping your human-level intellect and hands.
3318. Mouthless Interaction,3.3
#You can eat, drink, taste and speak without needing a mouth at all, whether through telepathy, direct absorption, or manifesting one when needed. Makes you immune to mouth-based attacks and deeply unsettling to watch dine.
3319. Movable Eyes,2.8
#Your eyes can relocate themselves to different parts of your body at will, letting you see in multiple directions at once or peek around corners without exposing your head. Slightly cursed to look at but extremely practical.
3320. Movement Vision,2.1
#Your eyes instantly catch even the smallest movements within your field of vision. A twitching finger, a falling dust mote, the flick of an eyelid - nothing that moves escapes your notice, though things at rest are no easier to see than normal.
3321. Mucus Mimicry,3.3
#You are, or can transform into, living mucus. In your slime form you can squeeze through gaps and absorb blows that would shatter flesh, but you risk coagulating if you dry out or become too thick to move.
3322. Mud Mimicry,3.4
#Your body is made of mud, or can transform into it at will. Your mud form is surprisingly resilient to blunt force but slow and vulnerable to extreme heat or cold, which can bake or freeze you into an immobile lump.
3323. Mud Monster Physiology,4.1
#You are a mud monster of the sort that crawls out of swamps and quagmires at night. Your body is composed entirely of mud and clay, granting you regeneration, physical resilience, and a suite of mud-based abilities. Fire and ice are your bane.
3324. Mujina Physiology,3.8
#You are a Mujina, an ancient magical badger yokai. By night you take human form and wander the streets, singing and playing harmless tricks on people while remaining a master of hiding your true nature. You prefer to avoid humans rather than fight them, and Shinto rituals can bind you.
3325. Muldjewangk Physiology,4.4
#Australian Folklore - You are the Muldjewangk, a water-creature of the Murray River. You can take the form of an evil merfolk or a gargantuan river monster, lurking beneath dark waters to drag down those foolish enough to wade in after dark.
3326. Mule Physiology,1.9
#You are or can transform into a mule. You gain a mule's stubborn endurance, surefootedness on rough terrain, and the ability to carry significant loads without complaint. You may also become considerably harder to convince of things.
3327. Multi Hive Mind,6.3
#You possess multiple minds and souls spread across many bodies, all linked together as a collective consciousness. Each body can act independently while still sharing thoughts with the whole, letting you parallel-process tasks, fight as a coordinated army, and survive the loss of any single body.
3328. Multi Symbiosis,5.7
#Your body hosts multiple symbiotic entities that grant you enhanced physical condition and an array of new abilities. The symbiotes can be angelic, demonic, biological, mechanical or any combination, and their combined power far exceeds what any single symbiote could offer. Beware - they may fight for control of your mind or body.
3329. Multi-Directional Facing,3.6
#You can face multiple directions at once, whether standing still or moving, allowing you to focus on opponents from every angle without ever turning your head. Excellent for ambushes and multitasking.
3330. Multi-Directional Vision,2.6
#You can see in multiple directions at once, granting you a panoramic field of view that makes sneaking up on you nearly impossible. There may still be a small blind spot somewhere.
3331. Multi-Reincarnation,6.6
#When you die, your soul is reborn into multiple different lives at once, as twins, or as entirely separate people in different locations, worlds, realities, or times. Each incarnation may be weaker or stronger than the last, and they may share no memory of one another.
3332. Multi-Sensory Skin,4.2
#Your skin can see, hear, touch, taste, and smell beyond the norm. You can perceive the world through every inch of your body, making blindfolds useless and sneak attacks nearly impossible.
3333. Multi-hinged Jaws,2.8
#Your jaws have more than two hinges and can split into halves, allowing you to open your mouth impossibly wide or unhinge it entirely to swallow things far larger than your head. Unsettling to watch and very useful for eating things you shouldn't be able to.
3334. Multilayered Defense,4.6
#You possess multiple layers of defense stacked on top of each other, whether that's hardened skin, shields, force fields, or all of the above. Each layer may be equally strong or progressively tougher than the last, so breaking through to the real you is a slog of its own. Weak to Layer Removal effects.
3335. Multiple Arms,3.3
#You possess more than two functioning arms, typically in sets of four, six, or even eight, granting you remarkable dexterity and combat efficiency. Paired with proportional strength, you become a whirlwind of grappling limbs and weapons, though hiding them in a crowd is a lost cause.
3336. Multiple Body Segments,2.9
#Your body has multiple segments, much like a caterpillar or centipede, and this isn't limited to the torso. Your arms and legs may have extra segments as well, giving you extended reach and a very strange-looking silhouette. May not be retractable.
3337. Multiple Digits,1.4
#You possess additional fingers, toes, or other digits beyond the usual count. Mildly useful for piano, typing, and gripping small objects, but largely a cosmetic oddity unless paired with something else.
3338. Multiple Extremities,2.6
#You possess more than two functioning hands and/or feet, giving you additional dexterity and stability without necessarily having extra full limbs. Handy for multitasking, fighting, and holding onto several things at once.
3339. Multiple Fingers,1.8
#You possess more than ten functioning fingers on your hands, granting you immense manual dexterity. You can manipulate several small objects at once, play impossible chords, or pick multiple locks simultaneously.
3340. Multiple Hearts,4.1
#You possess multiple hearts, which don't all have to be inside your body, some may be spiritual or stored elsewhere entirely. Each heart can power up your abilities and serve as a redundant life source, so losing one doesn't kill you. However, if a supporting heart perishes mid-ability, the carryover strain falls onto your primary heart, which can be fatal.
3341. Multiple Joints,2.4
#Your body has extra joints beyond the normal count, granting you incredible flexibility and letting you bend your limbs in ways that shouldn't be possible. Fantastic for acrobatics, escape artistry, and unsettling your opponents.
3342. Multiple Legs,2.3
#You have more than two functioning legs, making you far more stable and difficult to knock over. Extra legs also mean extra locomotion, so you can run, climb, and maneuver with an unusual gait that most opponents won't know how to read.
3343. Multiple Life-Forces,4.5
#You possess two or more life-forces within your body, each augmenting your vitality and making you significantly stronger than someone with a single life-force. You can draw on them individually or collectively for power, though Life-Force Absorption may hit you harder than it would most people.
3344. Multiple Lungs,2.2
#You have more than two lungs, allowing you to hold your breath for extended periods while still remaining active. Useful for swimming, singing, wind instruments, and surviving in low-oxygen environments. The more lungs, the longer you can last.
3345. Multiple Mutation Immunity,3.2
#You are immune to mutagenic sources such as radiation, toxic chemicals, and exotic energies, because you are already mutated past the point they could affect you. Some such sources may even empower you further instead of hurting you.
3346. Multiple Souls,4.4
#You have multiple sentient souls sharing your body, each with their own personality and access to the controls. They may cooperate, take turns, or compete for dominance, and internal conflicts can manifest as very real damage to the body. At their best, they function as a council of minds with very different strengths.
3347. Multiple Stomachs,2.0
#You have more than one stomach, allowing you to eat massive quantities of food without ill effect. Great for eating contests, long wilderness trips, and ingesting things that would normally make a single stomach revolt. You may find yourself perpetually hungry.
3348. Multiple Tails,2.7
#You have multiple tails growing from your body, which can be used as extra appendages for balance, grabbing, fighting, or expression. Each tail functions like an additional limb, though they can be injured like any other body part.
3349. Multiple Thumbs,1.6
#You possess more than two functioning thumbs on your hands, granting you increased manual dexterity and grip. Opening jars, holding objects and playing instruments all become significantly easier, though explaining your hands to strangers does not.
3350. Multiple Toes,0.4
#You have more than ten toes on your feet, which grant you an enhanced sense of balance once you learn to coordinate them. Shoes will be a problem.
3351. Multiple Tongues,2.3
#You possess multiple tongues that can stretch, grab and strike with surprising strength. You can use them to pull in prey much larger than yourself, though they remain as vulnerable as any other body part.
3352. Multiple Wings,3.2
#You possess more than one pair of wings, granting you significantly enhanced flight speed and maneuverability compared to a regular winged being. Coordinating all of them takes practice.
3353. Multiversal Embodiment,9.6
#You are the multiverse incarnate. Time, space, reality, causality, probability and every other aspect of every parallel world fall under your absolute authority. Outside the multiverse itself, however, you are little more than a concept without a home.
3354. Multiversal Force Embodiment,9.0
#You are the living embodiment of multiversal forces. You wield limitless control over them and are wholly immune to their effects, essentially becoming a walking fragment of what composes all realities. You are, however, weak to pure Totality Manipulation.
3355. Multiversal Force Empowerment,7.2
#Your physical parameters, durability and existing powers are amplified when exposed to multiversal forces, drawing sustenance from them and potentially unlocking new abilities. Given that the multiverse is effectively infinite, so too is your potential well of power, though overuse can breed dependency.
3356. Multiversal Force Mimicry,7.9
#Your body is made of, or can transform into, multiversal forces. In solid form you retain your anatomy but fortified with cosmic essence, while in full energy form you become homogenous multiversal stuff. Mastering the transformation takes time.
3357. Multiversal Power Link,7.8
#Your powers are permanently linked to a multiversal force, which fuels and strengthens them on a level far beyond ordinary energy sources. An unstable force can cause your abilities to go wild, and you may need a clear mind to maintain the connection.
3358. Multiverse Mimicry,9.6
#You are a multiverse, or can transform your body into one while keeping your sentience. Your body becomes multiversal in scale, containing countless worlds, timelines and realities within yourself. Attacks on your ordinary form instead ripple out into your infinite inner cosmos, making you almost impossible to meaningfully harm. Vulnerable only to multiverse-scale destruction or beings that can manipulate the multiverse itself.
3359. Mummy Physiology Superior,5.8
#You are a superior mummy, a pharaoh or high queen preserved with rites far beyond the common dead. You possess far greater strength, intelligence and durability than a regular mummy, often acting as an alpha undead who can lord over lesser mummies. Supernatural hunters and purifying flames remain your greatest threats.
3360. Mummy Physiology Transcendent,7.8
#You are a mummy of godly scale, a deified pharaoh whose afterlife granted you powers rivaling the gods themselves. You have dominion over death and the underworld, command legions of lesser undead without effort, and possess almost none of a normal mummy's weaknesses. Only Meta Resurrection or Undead Divinity Manipulation can truly threaten you.
3361. Mummy Physiology,3.8
#You are or can transform into a mummy, an undead creature whose corpse has been mummified and animated. You are relentless and hard to put down, with durability that scales with how thoroughly you were wrapped. Fire burns you easily, water soaks your dried flesh, and removing your wrappings neutralizes you.
3362. Munuane Physiology,3.2
#You are a Munuane, an ogre-like being of Colombian and Venezuelan folklore. Tall and powerful, toothless, with empty eye sockets and eyes on your knees. You are invulnerable everywhere except your knees, rule the fish of the jungle rivers, and navigate the waterways as their undisputed master.
3363. Murderous Possession,5.7
#Death is not an ending for you, only an invitation. The moment you are killed your soul latches onto your killer like a curse, embedding itself in their body and slowly overwriting them from within. It takes time for the takeover to complete, but once it does, their body is yours. You must actually be killed for the power to trigger.
3364. Muscle Armor,3.3
#One Piece - Your muscles are so dense and hardened that physical attacks bounce off them like they were iron plating. By flexing at the moment of impact you can even deflect blows back at the attacker. Does not protect your skin, your internals from within, or parts of the body with less muscle mass.
3365. Muscle Independence,4.0
#Your body moves without needing muscles, powered by some other biological or inorganic system entirely. You are immune to paralysis, muscle manipulation, and cramping, and can keep moving even after your muscles are destroyed. Some fine-motor actions that depend on muscle-driven organs may still suffer.
3366. Muscle-Based Condition,3.3
#Your muscles are abnormally powerful, granting you a variety of physiology-related abilities as a result. You are a pseudo-powerhouse whose strength comes from sheer muscular quality, though you can still be overpowered by those with true supernatural bodies.
3367. Muscleless Body,3.0
#You have no muscles at all, making you completely immune to muscle manipulation, paralysis, cramping and related powers. Your body moves through some other means entirely, whether alternate biology or something stranger, though certain muscle-dependent bodily functions may not work as normal.
3368. Muse Physiology,6.3
#Greek Mythology - You are a Muse, a divine goddess of inspiration and the arts. Those you favor are blessed with creative genius far beyond their natural talent, and your presence alone can spark the making of masterworks. You command knowledge and art at a divine level, though you are not suited for physical combat.
3369. Mushroom Mimicry,3.6
#You are made of mushrooms, or can transform your body into them at will. Your form can be anatomically complete but fungal in substance, or a homogeneous mass of caps and mycelium with no vital parts. Cuts and punctures do little when your flesh is made of spores.
3370. Music Empowerment,3.2
#You grow stronger, faster, and more durable when exposed to music, unlocking related abilities and amplifying existing powers. Extended exposure may sustain you in place of food and even slow your aging. Silence Manipulation or deafness can leave you powerless.
3371. Music Mimicry,4.6
#You are made of music, or can transform your body into music or a specific song at will. In transformed form you can be anatomically intact but composed of sound, or a homogeneous wave of melody with no vital point to strike. While existing as pure music you may be unable to affect the physical world, and it takes practice to regain full control of your body.
3372. Music Note Mimicry,2.1
#You either are or can transform into a musical note. Floating, weightless, and oddly hard to grab onto, but good luck doing anything meaningful in this form beyond vibrating ominously.
3373. Musical Instrument Mimicry,2.3
#You either are or can transform into a musical instrument. Whether you become a single specific instrument or can shift between many depends on the draw. Hope your form is something useful and not a triangle.
3374. Musical Monster Physiology,5.3
#You are or can transform into a monster that embodies music, whether a dark demon of discord, a siren of haunting melodies, or a spirit of forbidden songs. You possess a variety of music and sound-based abilities tied to your specific form. May be physically repulsive enough to be shunned by most of society.
3375. Musteloid Physiology,3.3
#You possess the traits, attributes, and abilities of musteloids including weasels, otters, ferrets, badgers, and wolverines. You gain enhanced agility, sharp senses, tenacious stamina, and depending on your specific form, the flexibility of an otter or the raw ferocity of a wolverine.
3376. Mutagenic Blood,3.2
#Your blood is a mutagen, anyone who comes into contact with it starts mutating in unpredictable ways. The severity of the mutation depends on the amount of exposure. You are not necessarily immune to your own blood, so be careful when bleeding.
3377. Mutagenic Bodily Fluids,3.8
#Every fluid your body produces, blood, sweat, saliva, tears, is a potent mutagen. Anyone who comes into contact with them starts mutating, and you can even direct mutations onto yourself by consuming your own fluids. Messy but versatile.
3378. Mutagenic Saliva,2.8
#Your saliva is a potent mutagen. A lick, a bite or a spit is enough to start inducing mutations in your target, the degree depending on how much saliva made contact. You cannot control what mutations occur and they are often permanent.
3379. Mutant Alien Physiology,4.7
#You are a member of an alien species who has also undergone a mutation, gaining the baseline traits of your alien heritage on top of whatever strange abilities and physical changes your mutation grants. Effectively two physiologies layered into one.
3380. Mutant Physiology,4.0
#You are a mutant, your body has been altered from the baseline of your species to grant you heightened abilities and unique powers. The exact nature of your mutation varies wildly, you could end up with subtle enhancements or grotesque malformations.
3381. Mutated Angel Physiology,5.4
#You are an angel that has been twisted into a monstrous aberration of what you should be. You retain the raw power of your angelic heritage but your form is warped, grotesque and unstable. Holy beings may view you with revulsion rather than reverence.
3382. Mutated Demon Physiology,5.6
#You are a demon that has been mutated into a monstrous aberration, or a hybrid of demon and mutant. You wield both demonic powers and mutant traits, your form grotesque and unstable but considerably more dangerous than an average demon.
3383. Mutated Dragon Physiology,6.2
#You are or can transform into a mutated dragon, a creature even more fearsome than a natural dragon. On top of the standard draconic package of flight, scales, claws and elemental breath, your mutation grants additional abilities, though your body may be unstable and you could have trouble reverting.
3384. Mutated Ghost Physiology,4.8
#You are a mutated ghost, an incorporeal being whose spectral form has been warped by some strange force. Your powers as a ghost are heightened and strange, and your form is unsettling even to other spirits.
3385. Mutated Monster Physiology,4.7
#You are a monster that has undergone further experimentation, or a person or animal turned into a monster by the same process. Your capabilities far exceed those of your original species and you are markedly more resilient, though your form is grotesque.
3386. Mutated Undead Physiology,5.1
#You are an undead creature that has been mutated into a monstrous aberration. You retain the durability and lack of biological needs typical of the undead, but are significantly more resilient and powerful. You may need to consume flesh, blood or life energy to sustain yourself.
3387. Mutated Vampire Physiology,5.7
#You are a vampire that has been mutated into a monstrous aberration. Your traditional vampiric abilities are warped and amplified, and while you've lost the elegance and beauty usually associated with vampires, you've gained brute power in exchange.
3388. Mutated Zombie Physiology,4.4
#You are a zombie that has been mutated into a monstrous aberration. Tougher, faster and more dangerous than an ordinary shambler, your DNA is unstable and your form is grotesque, but your capabilities far exceed those of a baseline undead.
3389. Mutative Evolution,6.0
#Shin Godzilla - Your physiology undergoes constant unstable evolution, mutating to grant you new powers, heightened abilities and adaptations to whatever situation or threat you face. The downside is that the evolution is volatile, you could lose yourself to the process or mutate into something unrecognizable.
3390. Myling Physiology,3.2
#Nordic Folklore - You are a Myling, the demonic ghost of an abandoned unburied infant. You possess intangibility, enhanced strength, and the ability to latch onto victims and grow heavier until they are crushed. You are strongest at night and find true peace only if laid to rest in hallowed ground.
3391. Myobu Physiology,5.7
#Japanese Folklore - You are a Myobu, a divine fox and lesser deity that serves Inari. You are stunningly beautiful, your mere presence blesses the faithful with happiness and good fortune, and you possess a strong affinity for sacred rites and shrine magic. You are bound in service to higher Shinto gods and your strength is tied to the state of your shrine.
3392. Myomorph Physiology,2.1
#Allows you to transform partially or fully into a myomorph, including mice, rats, gerbils, hamsters and voles. You gain their senses, agility and ability to squeeze through tight spaces, though you also inherit their fragile frame and susceptibility to rodent-controlling powers.
3393. Myrmecoleon Physiology,2.8
#Medieval Bestiary - Allows you to transform into a Myrmecoleon, the offspring of a lion and an ant. You have the face of a lion and the body of a giant ant, possessing the strength of both. Your dual nature means you struggle to feed yourself as the lion half craves meat and the ant half can only digest grain.
3394. Mystic Lock,6.8
#You exist wholly outside of magic, as independent from it as certain entities are from physics. No spell, curse, enchantment or mystical phenomenon can touch you, regardless of its strength or origin. The drawback is that you are equally unable to use or benefit from magic yourself, and beings wielding Omni-Magic or Magic Transcendence can still affect you.
3395. Mystical Soul,5.4
#Your soul itself is a wellspring of mystical power, serving as its own inexhaustible source of magical energy. You will never run dry of mana and your spells draw from a deeper well than any conventional mage. However, the raw mystical pressure within you can drive the untrained to insanity, and soul-absorbers find you an irresistible target.
3396. Mysticism Empowerment,4.6
#You grow stronger, faster and more durable from all mystical phenomena around you, drawing power from every spell, ritual and supernatural experience nearby. Living in a haunted city or near a ley line could push you beyond your natural limits, and in the right place you may even slow your aging.
3397. Mythic Alien Physiology,4.8
#You are or can transform into a mythic alien, a cryptid being from beyond the stars whose very existence blurs the line between extraterrestrial and supernatural. Your form and abilities draw from both alien biology and mythological essence, making you as enigmatic as you are powerful.
3398. Mythic Dinosaur Physiology,5.1
#Allows you to transform into a mythical dinosaur, such as a thunderbird-scaled T-Rex or a feathered serpent raptor. You gain prehistoric physical might layered with legendary supernatural properties, making you a walking fusion of paleontology and myth.
3399. Mythic Physiology,6.5
#You can become any being mentioned in any mythological tale and gain all of their abilities, traits and powers. Phoenix, kitsune, leviathan, anansi — your repertoire is limited only by how much myth you know, though you inherit every weakness of each form as well.
3400. Mythic Symbiosis,5.5
#You host a mythic being within you in a symbiotic bond, gaining access to its preternatural powers in exchange for sharing your body. The entity might grant you elemental manipulation, enhanced strength, or magic of its own kind, but beware — a powerful enough mythic being may overtake your mind or burn your body out entirely.
3401. Mythical Avian Physiology,5.0
#Allows you to transform into legendary birds from any mythological tale, such as the phoenix, roc, thunderbird or simurgh. You gain their flight, supernatural traits and unique powers, though even a partial form leaves you vulnerable to Avian Manipulation.
3402. Mythical Bestiary,5.8
#You can transform into any beast or creature from mythology, from the Nemean Lion to the Questing Beast. Each form comes with its own strengths and weaknesses, and the instincts of the beast may influence your mind the longer you wear its shape.
3403. Mythical Creature Empathy,3.2
#You can sense and understand the emotions of legendary and mythical beasts, allowing you to befriend dragons, calm unicorns, and earn the trust of creatures that would maul anyone else. It is not mind control, so truly hostile beasts may still attack.
3404. Mythical Empowerment,4.5
#Your body grows stronger, faster and more durable in the presence of mythical creatures, and your existing powers are enhanced by their proximity. Prolonged exposure to certain beasts may even slow your aging, but without them to feed on you will feel weakened.
3405. Mythical Equid Physiology,4.8
#You are or can transform into legendary horses of myth, from Pegasus to Sleipnir to the unicorn. Each form carries its own powers and weaknesses, from winged flight to healing horns, and the full list of available mounts depends on your familiarity with the myths.
3406. Nachzehrer Physiology,4.1
#You are or can transform into a nachzehrer, a German vampire that forms after suicide or violent death. You feed on the life of your living kin and spread plague in your wake, but can be commanded by users of Vampire Manipulation.
3407. Naga Physiology,5.2
#Hindu Mythology - You are or can transform into a naga, a semi-divine serpent able to shift between human and snake forms. You are a guardian of water and treasure, can summon rain or flood, and possess venom potent enough to fell heroes. Benevolent by nature, but dangerous when crossed.
3408. Naiad Physiology,5.0
#Greek Mythology - You are or can transform into a naiad, a nymph presiding over freshwater springs, streams and wells. You can manipulate the waters under your care, drown foes who anger you, and bless those who honor you, though divine slayers and anti-divinity still threaten you.
3410. Namahage Physiology,4.2
#You are or can transform into a Namahage, a fearsome oni that serves as a divine enforcer. You possess enhanced physical abilities, a terrifying presence, and divine authority to harass and discipline wrongdoers, but are culturally expected to rarely cause true harm to the innocent.
3411. Namekujira Physiology,3.3
#You are or can transform into a Namekujira, a gigantic slug-like yokai. You possess colossal size, thick slippery hide and leave massive slime trails in your wake. Otherwise you are just a very large slug, and thus vulnerable to salt and basic rituals.
3412. Nameless Existence,6.6
#Your name holds no power over you, because in a very real sense you have none. You are immune to all name-based abilities, including Name Erasure, Name Severing, True Naming and Name Dominance. Definition Manipulation may still find purchase where names cannot.
3413. Nando Baba Physiology,2.8
#You are or can transform into a Nando Baba, a reclusive hag yokai that haunts dirty sheds and cupboards. You possess supernatural endurance and a terrifying scream that can send humans fleeing, but you mostly just want to be left alone. Vulnerable to Shinto rites.
3414. Nanite Mimicry,6.2
#Your body is composed entirely of nanomachines, allowing you to freely reshape yourself, form constructs from your own mass, and assimilate surrounding matter to replenish and grow your swarm. Vulnerable to EMP, corrosion and sophisticated computer viruses.
3415. Nano-Active Blood,4.3
#Your bloodstream is laced with nanites that constantly enhance your body and mind. You possess superhuman strength, reflexes, endurance and cognition well beyond peak human, and the nanites may manifest additional special abilities. You do not control the nanites directly, and they can be hacked or disrupted by EMPs.
3416. Nano-Active Saliva,2.9
#Your spit is laced with microscopic technology — organic, silicate or otherwise. Whatever you drool, lick or spit on becomes a canvas for your nanite abilities. Limited by how much you can produce, and vulnerable to EMPs.
3417. Narigama Physiology,3.6
#You are or can transform into a Narigama, a tsukumogami born from a very old iron kettle or cauldron. You can shift into a clawed pot-monster that breathes fire, and the sounds you make carry prophetic meaning — anyone who listens closely can hear the future in your rattling. Tied to your original vessel.
3418. Narrative Omniscience,8.6
#You possess flawless knowledge of every aspect of the narrative you exist within. Plot, characters, settings, themes, foreshadowing, symbolism, every line of internal monologue of every character — all of it laid bare before you. You know who dies, who betrays whom, and what the author intends, even for events that have not yet occurred.
3419. National Personification,6.5
#You are the living embodiment of a nation. Your country's fortunes are your fortunes — its prosperity makes you strong, its wars wound you, and its people's collective will flows through you. You may find it difficult to leave your borders, and if your nation is partitioned or destroyed, so are you.
3420. Native Forces Retention,2.8
#The gravity, air resistance and other physical forces of your homeworld cling to you wherever you go. On a high-gravity planet you move as if at home; in zero-g you walk as normal. Doesn't break physics, just keeps your personal rules consistent.
3421. Natural Defenses,3.0
#Your body possesses some form of natural armor, be it thickened plating, a shell, bark-like skin or interlocking scales. Passively shrugs off blows that would maim an ordinary person, though unless you can retract it, it's very obvious and may get in the way of daily life.
3422. Natural Force Mimicry,5.2
#Your body is made of, or can transform into, raw natural forces. You can shift between a flesh form fortified by natural energy and a homogeneous nature-force state that is harder to harm. Takes considerable training to remain fully sentient in the transformed state.
3423. Natural Power Link,3.6
#Your powers are fed directly by your ecological essence, letting nature fuel and strengthen whatever abilities you possess. The stabler and healthier the surrounding environment, the more reliable your powers. In polluted or dead places, they may sputter or spiral out of control.
3424. Natural Symbiosis,5.0
#You are bonded with a natural entity, a spirit of storm, forest, stone or beast, and share in its power. Your abilities reflect its nature, and the two of you benefit from each other's wellbeing. If the entity is injured you feel it, and a powerful one may try to wrest control of your body.
3425. Nature Companionship,4.5
#You share a genuine relationship with nature itself, strong enough that the natural world actively looks after you. Vines will lower fruit within reach, animals guide you to safety, storms break around your shelter. You don't command it, it simply chooses to help.
3426. Nature Connection,3.8
#You have a deep physical, emotional and spiritual connection to nature, letting you intuitively understand and sense the natural world. You feel what it feels, and when it is harmed, you are harmed. Severing this bond can leave you hollow or even kill you.
3427. Nature Derivation,9.3
#You are the source of absolute primordial nature throughout the cosmos. Every blade of grass, every star, every living cell draws its existence from you, granting total dominion over nature, elements and environment on a universal scale. If you ever die, all nature dies with you, so you must pass the burden on before you fall.
3428. Nature Divinity,7.6
#You possess the divine form and powers of a nature god, granting you raw power well beyond the mortal or even most supernatural. Elements, weather and life itself all bow to your presence, and your body carries the unmistakable weight of godhood. Divine slayers and nullifiers remain a real threat.
3429. Nature Embodiment,8.3
#You are the physical manifestation of Nature itself, the living ecosystem given form. All elements, animals, plants and weather answer to you directly, and your emotions shape the world around you. Lose your temper and hurricanes follow, so discipline is non-negotiable.
3430. Nature Empowerment,3.7
#You grow stronger, faster and tougher when surrounded by nature, gaining access to additional abilities the deeper into the wild you go. In a forest or mountain you're a monster; in a sealed city block you're just yourself, and prolonged dependence on nature empowerment can turn into addiction.
3431. Nature Forsaken,4.2
#Nature itself rejects your existence. Plants wither in your presence, animals react with fear or violent aggression, and storms gather above you as you walk. Sentient beings feel an instinctive unease around you. The more powerful nature is in an area, the more violently it lashes out, and users of Nature Unity will treat you as an existential enemy.
3432. Nature Unity,3.4
#Your soul is attuned with the natural world, granting you deep peace and empathy with all living things. Animals become docile in your presence, you can sense the feelings of living creatures, and plants grow or regenerate at your touch. Pollution and unnatural toxins hit you far harder than they should.
3433. Neanderthal Physiology,2.8
#You are a Neanderthal, possessing a more robust and muscular build than modern humans along with distinctive cranial features. You are notably stronger and tougher than a regular person, though your intelligence may lean more toward the instinctive than the scholarly.
3434. Near-Death Empowerment,5.6
#Dragon Ball - Every time you survive a near-death experience or come back from actual death, you grow stronger. This may result in a general power boost or even awaken entirely new abilities. Useless if whatever kills you leaves you unable to be revived.
3435. Nebula Mimicry,6.4
#Your body is made of or can be transformed into nebula, the interstellar cloud of dust and ionized gas that birthed the stars. You can become a diffuse homogeneous cloud or retain your anatomy while composed entirely of cosmic gases. Cosmic and air manipulators can still tear at your form.
3436. Necessity Embodiment,9.1
#You are the embodiment of Necessity, the fundamental need for things to be required or to exist. Life and death, creation and destruction, purpose, desire, time, all bow to your will. As long as something is necessary, you hold sway over it. Weak only to Obsolescence.
3437. Necklessness,1.6
#You lack an actual neck, your head floating just above your torso as if still connected. You have no neck-related movement restrictions and can throw full-force headbutts in any direction. Downside: being knocked apart, and occasionally losing your head and having to go find it.
3438. Necropresence,8.6
#You simultaneously exist everywhere death exists, wherever the dying take their last breath and wherever the dead manifest or reside. A trait of grim reapers, death gods, and the embodiment of death itself. Nothing dies without you being there for it.
3439. Needle Mimicry,3.0
#Your body can transform into a mass of needles, either partially or fully. In this form you can scatter, reshape, and reform, but you are vulnerable to anything that affects needles, including magnets and corrosion.
3440. Negation Immunity,6.2
#Your powers cannot be negated. No conventional or supernatural means can disable them, and any specific immunities designed to suppress you are themselves rendered null. Does not protect against Meta Power Negation or Immunity Bypassing, but against ordinary negators you are untouchable.
3441. Negative Embodiment,7.6
#You are the embodiment of negativity itself, channeling every negative aspect of the world through your being. You can manipulate negative emotions in others, weaponize your own despair, and even birth life out of pure negativity. If you start thinking happy thoughts, your power wanes.
3442. Negative Emotion Empowerment,4.6
#You grow stronger, faster and more durable by feeding on negative emotions, whether your own or those around you. Anger, hatred, sadness, fear and envy all fuel you and may even slow your aging. Happiness and love drain you instead, so a bad mood is a blessing.
3443. Negative Existence,7.4
