#You do not exist as a separate thing, but as the absence of one, much like cold is merely the absence of heat. Others perceive you as a being, but you are really the hole where something else isn't. You may lack a true will of your own, existing only as the counterpart to whatever you negate.
3444. Negative Mass Body,4.0
#Your body has negative mass. You float by default, things you push pull toward you, and things you try to pull are flung away. Gravity treats you like an afterthought. Takes considerable getting used to and can be genuinely dangerous if you forget how it works mid-reach.
3445. Negative Power Link,6.0
#Your powers are linked to and fueled by negative force, meaning the more negativity you draw upon, the stronger your abilities become. Rage, despair, malice, pain, all of it pours into your powers and amplifies them considerably. However, if your negative state becomes too unstable, your powers may rampage out of your control.
3446. Negativity Empowerment,5.1
#You grow stronger, faster, smarter and more durable from any and all forms of negativity, whether emotions, concepts, thoughts or ideas, your own or those of others. In a world full of misery you are practically unstoppable, and you may even draw sustenance from negative aspects and slow your aging. Requires negativity to sustain your power.
3447. Nelapsi Physiology,4.5
#You are or can transform into a Nelapši, a walking corpse from Slavic myth with pale skin, red eyes, claws and pointy teeth. You are feral, immensely strong, and an insatiable predator who tortures prey before killing them. You cannot be hurt by sunlight but must return to your grave before dawn, and can be distracted by counting poppy seeds.
3448. Nemean Lion Physiology,5.7
#Greek Mythology - You are or can transform into the Nemean Lion, the legendary monster whose golden hide is impervious to all conventional weapons and whose claws are sharper than any mortal sword, capable of cutting through any armor. Your strength is monstrous, though you can still be strangled, stunned or harmed by beings of absolute strength.
3449. Neon Empowerment,2.6
#You become stronger, faster and more durable when in contact with neon. Step into a neon-lit district and you become a glowing powerhouse, but step into a dark alley and you are just a regular person again.
3450. Neon Mimicry,3.5
#You can transform your body partially or completely into neon, becoming a glowing orange-red form of noble gas. In this state you are diffuse and hard to injure conventionally, but vulnerable to wind and very easy to spot in the dark.
3451. Nephalem Physiology Transcendent,8.7
#You are a transcendent Nephalem, born from the union of the apex or prime beings of two high-level supernatural species, most commonly an angelic and demonic progenitor. Your power vastly surpasses all lesser Nephalem and most supernatural entities, easily overpowering them in numbers, and your existence alone shifts the balance of power in whatever world you inhabit. Still vulnerable to divine slayers and omnipotent beings above you.
3452. Nephalem Physiology,6.8
#You are a nephalem, the offspring of an angel and a demon, wielding the powers of both light and darkness. You far surpass either parent race in potential and could overpower most angels and demons that cross your path. However, the clashing holy and infernal natures within you may drive you toward insanity if you do not keep them in balance.
3453. Nephele Physiology,4.2
#Greek Mythology - You are a nephele, a nymph of the clouds and skies. Your body can dissipate into mist or solidify into cloudstuff at will, and you have an innate command over weather, wind and rainfall. Your presence soothes the skies and your beauty is that of a minor goddess.
3454. Nephilim Physiology Transcendent,8.6
#You are a Transcendent Nephilim, born from a mortal and a transcendent angel. Your power vastly outstrips any ordinary nephilim, allowing you to effortlessly overpower hordes of angels and demons, and your ascendancy lets you wield nigh-omnipotent authority. Only transcendent weaponry or divine slayers can truly threaten you.
3455. Nephilim Physiology,5.4
#You are a nephilim, the child of a mortal and an angel. You possess angelic strength, wings, and a connection to the divine, putting you well above ordinary humans in every physical and spiritual regard. You share the same weaknesses as angels and demonic forces may be able to overpower you.
3456. Nerve Regeneration,3.6
#Your nerves regenerate almost instantly. Stab wounds only hurt for a second before the pain fades, and you cannot be stunned, knocked unconscious from pain, or permanently lose sensation in any part of your body. Does not heal flesh, bone or blood, only the nerves themselves.
3457. Nervelessness,3.8
#You have no nervous system as mortals understand it, rendering you completely immune to nerve-based powers, paralysis, pain manipulation and neural attacks. Your body is driven by some other unseen mechanism, and those who try to fry your synapses will find there are none to fry.
3458. Nested Mouths,2.8
#You have a second mouth hidden inside your primary one, capable of extending out far beyond your jaws to seize prey and drag it back. The inner mouth may act in tandem with the outer one or move on its own. Can be torn out by force if someone gets a grip on it.
3459. Nether Embodiment,7.4
#You embody the Nether itself, granting you limitless control over the chthonic element. Entropy, death, decay and destruction all flow through you as easily as breathing, and you can wield the force in any form you please. Aether stands as your natural counter.
3460. Nether Empowerment,3.7
#You grow stronger, faster and more durable when in contact with nether, possibly unlocking new abilities and enhancing existing ones. Prolonged exposure may even slow your aging or sustain you in place of food and water.
3461. Nether Physiology,6.4
#Your body is made of nether, the chthonic essence that flows between the realms of the living and the dead. You can shift fully into the dark element at will, becoming intangible to physical harm and channeling entropy through every movement. Countered by ethereal physiology.
3462. Neuroptera Physiology,2.7
#You are or can transform into a Neuroptera, a net-winged insect such as a mantidfly, lacewing or antlion. Grants you the natural weapons and traits of the insect, but pesticides and natural predators remain a threat.
3463. Neutral Embodiment,8.6
#You are the living embodiment of all neutral forces in the universe, the impartial wild card that exists between and beyond good and evil. You possess natural Balance and must never fully choose a side, lest the consequence of doing so upsets the very fabric of existence. The essence of balance cannot exist without good and evil, so your power relies on both still being around.
3464. Neutral Empowerment,3.5
#You become stronger, faster and more durable when in contact with neutrality, whether your own or another's, potentially unlocking new abilities related to impartiality and detachment. Some users can even draw sustenance from neutrality or slow their aging.
3465. Nexus World,8.7
#You possess your own nexus world, a unique hub realm connected to all worlds in every universe, acting as the dimensional crossroads from which all realities spring. From your home you have access to every other world through dimensional doorways, potentially making you master of all worlds. Weak against Nexus Manipulation and vulnerable to invasion by Nexus Navigation users.
3466. Nguruvilu Physiology,3.6
#Mapuche Mythology - You are or can transform into a Nguruvilu, a fox-headed serpent with a clawed tail that dwells in rivers. You can generate dangerous whirlpools in any body of water and manipulate river depths to lure prey into false fords. Your aquatic mobility is immense.
3467. Nigawarai Physiology,3.3
#Japanese Folklore - You are or can become a Nigawarai, a hateful green yokai with horns and a mouth forever forced into a grin. You feed on spite and ill-will, subtly causing those around you to bicker and resent each other, and your claws carry a paralytic poison. Vulnerable to Shinto rites.
3468. Night Embodiment,6.5
#You are the living embodiment of night itself, the concept of darkness between sunset and sunrise. As long as night exists somewhere, you are empowered and conceptually tied to it, wielding dominion over everything the nighttime represents. If night were ever to truly cease to exist, so would you.
3469. Night Hag Physiology,4.2
#You are or can become a Night Hag, a malevolent nocturnal spirit that visits mortals in their sleep to sit on their chests and ride them into terrible nightmares, paralysis, and sometimes death. You are a predator of the sleeping, though holy relics and certain rituals can ward you off and you are weakened during the day.
3470. Night Vision,1.6
#You can see clearly in low light or even near-total darkness, granted through supernaturally enhanced spectral and intensity range in your eyes. You may be briefly blinded by sudden bright flashes and it takes a moment for your eyes to readjust when moving back into well-lit spaces.
3471. Nightmarcher Physiology,4.3
#Hawaiian Folklore - You are or can become a Nightmarcher, a ghostly warrior of ancient Hawaii that rises on the nights of Kanaloa to march to sacred battle sites. Mortals who hear your chanting or conch tones must avert their eyes or perish. You are only active at night and can be warded off by living ti shrubs.
3472. Nightmare Embodiment,6.6
#You are the living embodiment of nightmares and bad dreams. Your power in the waking world may be limited, but in the dream world you are near-limitless, able to turn any dream into a nightmare and torture victims endlessly. If your body is destroyed, you live on in dreams and can possess sleeping mortals to reclaim a new body.
3473. Nihilism Embodiment,6.3
#You embody nihilism, the belief that life is meaningless. Your very presence radiates the void of purpose, and you possess powers tied to apathy, nothingness, and negation. You may even be the source of nihilism in your universe. Hope Embodiment and Meaningfulness Embodiment oppose you directly.
3474. Nikurashi Physiology,2.4
#Japanese Folklore - You are or can become a Nikurashi, a humanoid yokai resembling a sensually-dressed woman with a supernaturally hideous face. You are largely neutral in nature but carry a sinister edge fitting your name, which plays on 'hateful'. Vulnerable to Shinto rites.
3475. Nikusui Physiology,3.6
#Japanese Folklore - You are or can become a Nikusui, a monstrous yokai that disguises itself as a beautiful young woman to seduce men before transforming into a vampiric predator that drains them of their flesh, leaving only bone and withered skin. Vulnerable to Shinto rites.
3476. Ningen Physiology,3.4
#Japanese Cryptid - You are or can transform into a Ningen, a 20 to 30 meter long pale humanoid sea creature rumored to inhabit the icy waters of the Antarctic. You possess immense aquatic physical power and stealth, but you thrive best in arctic waters and warmer climates are taxing on you.
3477. Ningyo Physiology,3.5
#Japanese Folklore - You are or can become a Ningyo, a hideous fish-human hybrid with golden scales, a monkey's mouth, and bony clawed hands. Eating your flesh grants immortality. Your scales dry under sun and heat, and some forms cannot breathe air at all.
3478. Ninmenju Physiology,2.1
#Japanese Folklore - You are or can become a Ninmenju, a strange tree yokai that grows fruit in the shape of smiling, laughing human heads. The fruit is sweet and sour and edible, and though harmless in nature, making your fruits laugh too hard causes them to wither and fall. Vulnerable to Shinto rites.
3479. Nitroglycerin Secretion,3.2
#Your body secretes nitroglycerin through your sweat, saliva, or other fluids. Extremely volatile and will detonate under heat, shock or flame, making you a walking bomb. Be careful when showering.
3480. Noble Elf Physiology,6.2
#You are a Noble Elf, the demigod offspring of a Modern Elf and a Mythic Elf. You possess physical and magical capabilities far beyond even High Elves, with an innate affinity for ancient elven magics and an ageless, radiant beauty that marks you as something more than mortal.
3481. Nobusuma Physiology,3.8
#You are a Nobusuma, a yokai born from a bat that lived far too long. You take the form of a ravenous flying squirrel with a thirst for blood and fire, possessing enhanced senses and gliding capabilities. Over time you may evolve into a Yamachichi or Momonjii.
3482. Nocturnal Spirit Physiology,4.6
#You are a nocturnal spirit, one of the ancient sleep paralysis demons of folklore. You can sit upon sleeping victims to induce crushing nightmares, ride them to exhaustion, and feed on their terror. Only active during the hours of night and may be warded off by prayers or holy relics.
3483. Noderabo Physiology,2.6
#You are a Noderabo, the cursed yokai spirit of a sinful monk doomed to haunt shrines in eternal unrest. You are mostly heard rather than seen, and your mournful wailing can unsettle anyone within earshot. Vulnerable to the rituals of Shrine Maidens and Shinto Priests.
3484. Nokken Physiology,3.5
#You are a Nokken, the sinister male freshwater spirit of Scandinavian folklore. You can shapeshift to lure victims to their drowning deaths, control the waters you inhabit, and sing songs of hypnotic beauty. Severely vulnerable to iron and steel, which can kill you outright.
3485. Non-Atomic Body,7.4
#Your body is not composed of atoms or molecules, instead being either a single larger subatomic particle, composed only of subatomic particles, or simply nothing at all. This renders you completely immune to any atomic, molecular, subatomic or particle-based power, as there is nothing for them to grip onto.
3486. Non-Excessive Force,2.7
#You can perform demanding physical feats with the effort of ordinary movements. Lifting a heavy crate feels like lifting a bag of groceries, and swinging a greatsword feels like swinging a stick. You are not stronger, it just never feels like work.
3487. Non-Memorized Activity,4.0
#You can perform any action, move, or technique flawlessly on the first try without ever needing to learn, practice or memorize it. Muscle memory is irrelevant to you; your body simply knows what to do the moment you decide to act.
3488. Non-Relative Strength,3.0
#Every muscle in your body is as strong as your strongest muscle. Your jaw, fingers, neck, and toes are all as powerful as your legs, meaning you can grip with crushing force, bite through steel, and throw with your whole body evenly. Your body may not be fully prepared for such uniform power.
3489. Non-Standard Breathing,2.8
#You are able to breathe in environments where others would choke or die. Underwater, in vacuum, in toxic fumes, or on alien worlds, your lungs adapt without issue. You may struggle to breathe in your 'standard' environment if you drift too far from what the trait was tuned for.
3490. Non-Tailored Activity,3.2
#You can excel at any field of activity regardless of whether your body is designed for it. A quadruped you could still dunk a basketball, a fish you could still play chess, a slime you could still fence. Your form is never a handicap.
3491. Noppera-bō Physiology,2.3
#You are or can transform into a noppera-bō, a faceless yokai. Great for scaring people on dark roads, though you may be vulnerable to those who can control yokai.
3492. Normalcy Immunity,4.2
#You are immune to anything considered normal, from mundane physics to ordinary matter and energy. Sadly, this means nearly every superpower will still hit you like a truck, but at least you'll never stub your toe again.
3493. Noseless Perception,1.7
#You can smell without the use of a nose, perceiving scents through your entire body or by some unknown means. Useful for when you catch a cold or lose your nose in a fight.
3494. Nostalgia Embodiment,5.6
#You are the embodiment of nostalgia itself, the wistful yearning for the past. Your mere presence stirs powerful sentimental longing in those around you, dragging up happy memories and old regrets alike. Users of Emotion Immunity are unaffected.
3495. Nothingness Aspect Manifestation,6.3
#You have become an aspect of nothingness itself, embodying one of the many faces of the void. Whether you represent oblivion, absence, or the silence between stars, you wield the authority of that aspect as a conceptual extension of yourself.
3496. Nothingness Mimicry,6.6
#Your body is made of or can transform into pure nothingness. You can retain your normal form while being composed of void or become truly formless, with every part of you equal to the rest. Be cautious, as untrained users may erase things just by touching them.
3497. Notoriety Empowerment,4.0
#You grow stronger, faster, and more durable the more widely known you are, especially for infamous or scandalous reasons. The more people fear, hate, or gossip about you, the more powerful you become, though obscurity makes you weaker in turn. Go make some enemies.
3498. Nuckelavee Physiology,5.4
#You are or can transform into the Nuckelavee, a flayed centaurian horror of Celtic myth. Your breath wilts crops and spreads plague, your single burning eye inspires terror, and your physical strength is monstrous. However, you cannot cross running water and the smell of burning seaweed repels you.
3499. Nuclear Capacitor,5.0
#You are a living nuclear battery, able to absorb and store vast quantities of nuclear energy for later use. You can channel it into any purpose you see fit, releasing it slowly as power or all at once as a catastrophic discharge.
3500. Nuclear Empowerment,4.5
#You grow stronger, faster and more durable the closer you get to nuclear forces. Radiation that would kill a normal person feeds you, and in the heart of a reactor you may even draw sustenance and slow your aging.
3501. Nuclear Immunity,5.4
#You are completely immune to nuclear and atomic energy, being invulnerable to both direct and indirect effects of radiation, fallout and nuclear blasts. You could walk through a detonation unharmed, though absolute absorption and immunity bypass powers can still get through.
3502. Nuclear Mimicry,6.2
#Your body is made of or can transform into raw nuclear substance. You can walk as a physical being with nuclear energy flowing through your cells, bones and muscles, or dissolve into a homogeneous form of pure radiation. Takes time to master and even longer to use without cooking everyone nearby.
3503. Nuclear Quintessence,7.4
#Your body is an inexhaustible nuclear reactor, generating limitless nuclear energy from within without needing any external source. You can pour this energy into enhancing your own body to superhuman levels, into powering any machine or technology, or unleashing it as raw nuclear force. Overdrawing too much at once may still strain your mind and body, requiring rest to stabilize.
3504. Nuclear-Reactive Dynamo,6.0
#Your body is a living nuclear reactor that absorbs nuclear energy and converts it into active nuclear reactions, letting you amplify, redirect, or chain-trigger reactions around you. The more radiation you're bathed in, the more explosive your output, but a barren environment leaves you sluggish.
3505. Nudity Empowerment,2.3
#You become stronger, faster and more durable the less clothing you wear, reaching peak power completely nude. Some naked yoga training may even let you draw sustenance from nudity itself, although stripping off may leave you rather exposed in more ways than one.
3506. Nue Physiology,5.7
#You are or can transform into a Nue, the youkai with the head of a monkey, body of a raccoon dog, tiger legs and a serpent for a tail. You can melt into a black cloud to fly unseen, and your mere presence brings misfortune and illness to those you linger near.
3507. Null Element Empowerment,4.0
#You grow stronger, faster and more durable when in contact with non-elemental forces, unlocking further abilities tied to the null affinity as your exposure deepens. Some users even draw sustenance from null elements or slow their aging, though reliance can become an addiction.
3508. Null Element Immunity,5.3
#You are completely immune to non-elemental forces, invulnerable to every direct and indirect effect they might produce. Since null elements typically bypass conventional defenses, this immunity is rare enough to be priceless against the right enemies.
3509. Null Element Mimicry,6.0
#You can transform your body completely into non-elemental forces, becoming a homogeneous being of null. In this form nothing within conventional elemental systems has a natural advantage against you, though some users find returning to flesh far harder than they expected.
3510. Null Element Resistance,3.8
#You are highly resistant to non-elemental forces, shrugging off attacks that would devastate others. Not quite full immunity though, pile on enough null element energy and it will eventually get through.
3511. Number Empowerment,3.2
#You grow stronger, faster and more durable in the presence of numbers, whether written, spoken or conceptually present. A library, a calendar, or even a crowd you have counted can serve as a power source, and in a number-saturated environment your abilities sharpen considerably.
3512. Number Mimicry,3.1
#You can transform part or all of your body into a living number, gaining properties tied to whichever digit you embody. In this form you are harder to pin down physically and can slip through writings, equations and displays.
3513. Numerical Transcendence,9.1
#You exist outside of all numerical systems. Counting, measurement, infinity, zero, division by zero, cardinal numbers and every other mathematical construct simply do not apply to you. Number-based abilities and math manipulations do not work on you, you cannot be quantified, and you can exist in states like 'not a number' or 'beyond infinity' without contradiction.
3514. Nuppeppo Physiology,2.8
#You are or can transform into a Nuppeppo, a flabby, foul-smelling yokai of lumpy humanoid flesh. Your body reeks of rot strong enough to nauseate opponents, and your flesh is said to have magical healing properties if consumed. Combat ability is poor, mobility is sluggish, and you may become the target of those seeking your flesh.
3515. Nurarihyon Physiology,6.5
#You are or can transform into Nurarihyon, the supreme commander of all yokai. Your presence is so overwhelming that others instinctively treat you as the master of wherever you are, welcoming you into their homes and deferring to you without realizing why. You possess immense spiritual authority over lesser yokai and formidable supernatural power, though daylight weakens you considerably.
3516. Nure Onago Physiology,3.2
#You are or can transform into a Nure Onago, a ghostly yokai of a young woman perpetually dripping swamp water. Your presence draws rain and water to you, and you have ghostly powers tied to drowning and grief. Any kindness shown to you binds that person to your devotion, though you are vulnerable to shrine rites and Shinto prayers.
3517. Nure-Onna Physiology,4.2
#You are or can transform into a Nure-Onna, a vampiric sea serpent with the head of a woman and the coiled body of a great snake. You possess immense serpentine strength, aquatic mastery, and a vampiric hunger that lets you drain blood and life from your prey. Rivers and shores are your hunting ground.
3518. Nuribotoke Physiology,2.9
#You are or can transform into a Nuribotoke, a mischievous yokai that rises from an open butsudan at night. You possess poltergeist-like abilities and a ghostly presence perfect for frightening mortals, but you must retreat into the butsudan by sunrise, cannot manifest in daylight, and salt or a closed shrine can trap you.
3519. Nurikabe Physiology,3.5
#You are or can transform into a Nurikabe, an invisible wall yokai that blocks and misdirects travelers. You can manifest as an impassable unseen barrier, rerouting anyone who tries to walk past you and leading them astray through the landscape. Excellent for stalling pursuers or trapping people in place.
3520. Nut Empowerment,1.6
#You grow stronger, faster and more durable in the presence of nuts. A handful of almonds or a bag of pistachios makes you notably more powerful, and you can draw sustenance from nuts as a near-infinite energy source. Great if you live near a squirrel.
3521. Nut Mimicry,2.0
#You can transform into a nut, gaining a thick armored shell protecting a soft seed within. In this form you are remarkably durable against blunt impacts and can even sprout and grow into a plant if conditions are right. Mobility is obviously limited.
3522. Nutcracker Mimicry,2.3
#You are or can transform into a nutcracker, either retaining your organs or becoming a homogeneous wooden construct. Your jaw can crush practically anything that fits into your mouth, though wood is weak to fire, your mouth can be broken by oversized objects, and you are vulnerable to Toy Manipulation users.
3523. Nymph Physiology,4.5
#Greek Mythology - You are or can transform into a nymph, a nature spirit bound to a particular landform, grove, spring or tree. You possess supernatural beauty, agelessness, and powerful nature-based magic tied to your domain. You can bear fully immortal children if mated to a god, but your life-force is tied to your anchor in the natural world and threatening it threatens you.
3524. Oath Embodiment,7.8
#You are the living personification of oaths themselves. You can sense and connect to every oath-sworn bond in existence, from marriages to blood pacts to parent-child vows, and you wield the authority to enforce and punish those who break them. Oathbreakers cannot hide from you, and your wrath upon them is absolute.
3525. Oath Empowerment,6.4
#You draw power from oaths, contracts and pacts, growing stronger, faster and more durable for each binding vow in existence around you. Swearing oaths yourself further empowers you, and deeply sworn pacts can unlock entire new abilities, though forgetting or renouncing an oath strips you of the power it granted.
3526. Obariyon Physiology,2.9
#You are or can transform into an Obariyon, a small imp-like yokai that clings to travelers' backs. You can force yourself onto a target and grow steadily heavier until they collapse from exhaustion, biting at their scalp along the way. If carried successfully to your chosen destination, you reward your bearer with a sack of gold, though you are vulnerable to shrine rites.
3527. Object Evolution,4.0
#You can evolve into new forms by bonding with and integrating objects into your body, gaining new physical traits and abilities with each one. Removing the bonded objects may reverse the evolution, so hold onto your gear.
3528. Object Immortality,5.2
#You are immortal so long as a specific anchor object of your choosing exists and remains intact. As long as your phylactery is safe, nothing can truly kill you. If someone finds and destroys it, you become mortal again, or simply die.
3529. Object Immunity,4.8
#You are completely immune to objects and object-based powers. Weapons, armor, enchanted items, none of them can harm or affect you in any way. Does not protect against powers that work through concepts or energies rather than items themselves.
3530. Object Mimicry,3.8
#You can transform yourself into inanimate objects, ranging from furniture to food to tools to toys. Your transformed form retains your anatomy under the surface, but is built from the material of whatever you became. Great for hiding in plain sight.
3531. Object Power Link,4.2
#Your object-based nature is directly wired into your powers, letting the essence of the object fuel and strengthen every ability you use. Instability in your object form can cause your powers to spiral out of control, and object sealing or negation hits you twice as hard.
3532. Object Symbiosis,5.2
#You are symbiotically linked to a living object, a non-biological entity that grants you supernatural abilities based on its nature. This could be a sentient coat, an intelligent weapon, or a cursed accessory. The bond is powerful but dangerous, and a strong enough entity may attempt to take over your body or mind.
3533. Objectivism Embodiment,3.5
#You embody the philosophy of objectivism as defined by Ayn Rand, drawing power from objective reality, reason, self-interest and laissez-faire capitalism. The more you pursue rational self-interest, the stronger you become. Induced altruism weakens and can even disable you.
3534. Oboroguruma Physiology,3.6
#You are an Oboroguruma, a Japanese tsukumogami in the form of a massive ox-cart with a furious human face on its front. Born from the lingering rage of denied cart owners, you exist between the living and the dead, drifting through streets and intersections. You are vulnerable to Shinto rituals and the prayers of shrine maidens.
3535. Obsidian Mimicry,4.1
#Your body is made of obsidian and volcanic glass, giving you incredible sharpness and resilience against blunt force. You can transform between your anatomical form and a homogeneous glass state at will. Sharp edges may cause accidental injury to those around you, and you remain fragile against the right kind of impact.
3536. Occupied Activity,1.6
#You are able to perform various actions effectively even while your hands and other body parts are occupied holding things. You could fight off a mugger while carrying groceries in both arms and a baby in a sling without dropping a single item.
3537. Ocean Embodiment,8.4
#You are the ocean made flesh, the embodiment and personification of the seas themselves. You have absolute control over every ocean, every current, every creature within, and every drop of saltwater on the planet. You can raise tidal waves that drown continents, sink entire islands, call hurricanes, or boil the depths. You and the sea are one and the same.
3539. Odonatoptera Physiology,3.2
#You possess the physiology of a dragonfly or damselfly, either as a transformation or as your natural form. You gain compound eyes with near-360 degree vision, incredible aerial agility and the ability to hover, dart, and change direction in mid-air on a dime, and four transparent wings capable of independent motion.
3540. Offensive Immunity,5.2
#Your immunities don't just protect you, they punish whatever tried to affect you. Someone tries to poison you, their poison rebounds on them. Someone tries to set you on fire, the flames leap back. Someone tries to mind-control you, their psyche takes the backlash. The degree of retaliation scales with your power.
3541. Ogama Physiology,4.6
#You are an Ogama, a toad or frog that has lived long enough to transform into a yokai. You possess humanoid intelligence and size, a rainbow breath capable of trapping prey, the ability to produce and wield spears, shapeshifting, and a long sticky tongue that can snatch and devour things whole. You grow more dangerous as you grow older and larger. You are vulnerable to the rituals and prayers of shrine maidens and Shinto priests.
3542. Superior Ogre Physiology,5.1
#You possess the physiology of a Superior Ogre, one of the alpha specimens of ogre-kind who tower over and physically dominate their kin. You are larger, stronger, smarter and more durable than any normal ogre, and would naturally take the role of clan leader or alpha monster among them. Still, you rank below gods and Transcendent beings, and monster slayers pose a particular threat.
3543. Ogre Physiology,4.2
#You are an ogre, or can transform into one. You gain immense physical strength and durability, a large and imposing frame, a voracious appetite, and the hideous visage that comes with the territory. Smarter than trolls but cruder than humans, ogres are brutal, dangerous and surprisingly cunning when they want to be.
3544. Oil Empowerment,2.8
#You become stronger, faster and more durable when in contact with oil, and can even draw sustenance from it. Standing in an oil slick turns you into a significant threat, standing in a desert makes you useless.
3545. Oil Mimicry,3.8
#Your body is or can transform into oil, either anatomically identical to your normal form or as homogeneous matter where no part is more vital than another. Extremely vulnerable to fire and heat, and inexperienced users may have trouble turning back.
3546. Okapi Physiology,2.2
#You are or can transform into an okapi, the forest giraffe of the Congo. Possessing keen senses, a long prehensile tongue and striking zebra-striped legs, you are a shy but resilient creature of the deep forest.
3547. Okuchi no Makami Physiology,6.3
#Japanese Mythology - You are or can transform into an Okuchi no Makami, the deified form of the extinct Japanese wolf worshipped as a sacred beast. You possess incredible physical abilities and a divine presence, warding off evil spirits, disease and misfortune simply by being there.
3548. Omni Appearance,8.6
#You take on the appearance of everyone and everything, living or dead, physical or otherwise, all at once. Observers perceive you as a seamless blend of every possible and impossible face, and you cannot be picked out of a lineup by any conventional or supernatural means.
3549. Omni Identity,8.7
#You hold the complete identity and self of every being that exists, could exist or will exist within a single body. When you say 'I am everyone', you are not being poetic. Unlike a mind hive, a single central consciousness oversees all of it, letting you shift appearance, skills and memories at will while still being fundamentally you.
3550. Omni Incarnation Awareness,6.8
#You can recall every life you have ever lived — past, future, parallel, erased, sealed, impossible, dreamed, looped, even lives that happened to alternate versions of yourself. Be warned, the sheer weight of the memories can overload and kill lesser minds, so mental fortitude is mandatory.
3551. Omni Profession,7.6
#You can perform, learn and master every profession, class, skill, study, hobby and field of research imaginable or unimaginable. You seamlessly shift from one role to the next without transition, and some users can even defy logic by being the sole performer of every occupation simultaneously, paradoxes be damned.
3552. Omni-Action,8.6
#You perform every action across every moment of your life from birth to death simultaneously. Every consequence every alternate version of you has ever enacted happens at the same time in any situation you are in, exerting layered effects on anything you touch. Deeply weird, deeply powerful.
3553. Omni-Apathy,6.0
#You exist in a state completely devoid of emotion or sensation — no joy, sadness, anger, fear or surprise can touch you. You operate on pure logic and calculation, making you immune to emotional manipulation, empathy-based powers, and fear effects of any scale.
3554. Omni-Aversion,2.1
#(Drawback) You become weaker, slower and less durable from absolutely everything — dimensions, concepts, boundaries, even nothing itself. Anything you come into contact with heavily debilitates you. The primary limitation of this power is having it.
3555. Omni-Detection,7.7
#You can sense the presence of every person, object, concept, power, universal law and boundary. Your perception grants detailed knowledge of each sensed entity — its size, extent, concealment, and whether it is protected or obscured. Nothing escapes your awareness, regardless of how well it thinks it is hidden.
3556. Omni-Empathy,6.4
#You can sense and feel an infinite number of emotions across all universes, planes and dimensions simultaneously. The constant mental strain can affect your physiology if you cannot learn to turn it off, and users of Omni-Apathy are completely invisible to you.
3557. Omni-Empowerment,8.5
#You become stronger, faster and more durable from absolutely anything and everything — dimensions, boundaries, concepts, even nothing itself, and potentially from Omni-Aversion or the Omega Omnisphere. New affinity-related abilities may unlock over time, and some users can draw sustenance from reality itself or slow their aging indefinitely.
3559. Omni-Immunity,9.6
#You are completely immune to literally anything and everything on every level and layer, regardless of type or status. Absolutely nothing can affect you — powers, diseases, forces, concepts, laws, nothing. It does not matter what they bring; it does not touch you.
3560. Omni-Status,9.4
#You exist in every possible state of being simultaneously. You are alive and dead, real and unreal, whole and scattered, eternal and nonexistent, all at once. Contradictions have no hold on you because you embody every side of them, and actions that would end any normal being simply shuffle you between the states you already occupy.
3561. Omnibenevolence,7.5
#You embody infinite goodness in every capacity that good is recognized by any sentient being. You instinctively perceive what others see as good and act accordingly, and at deeper manifestations your soul is tethered to the absolute concept of goodness itself. Evil touches you like water touches oil, and your presence can soothe even the most broken hearts.
3562. Omnifarious,8.9
#You have absolute control over your own physical and metaphysical being. Shape, density, size, quantity, solid, liquid, gas, pure energy, it is all yours to command. You can split yourself into countless smaller pieces that each retain full transformation, and recombine at will. External alterations can touch you, but you revert them instantly, making them meaningless. Your mind is utterly immune to outside influence and as flexible as your body.
3563. Omnimalevolence,9.2
#You are evil incarnate, the source of all negativity in existence, utterly devoid of any benevolent trait. You can choose to be universally evil in the open or deceive the world into thinking you are a saint. Your malice spreads on cosmic and apocalyptic scales by presence alone, corrupting whoever you wish, destroying whatever you want, and calling forth terrible events with nothing more than your will.
3564. Omnineutrality,8.9
#You embody perfect cosmic neutrality, the counterweight between omnibenevolence and omnimalevolence. You cannot truly take sides, but your presence alone ends conflicts by restoring balance to whatever system you enter. Your understanding of neutrality is so complete that even gods struggle to sway you, and your judgement carries the weight of the cosmos itself.
3565. Omnipresence,9.1
#You are present everywhere and everywhen at once, an unbounded and universal presence. Usually you exist as an incorporeal force, unseen and unfelt unless you wish to interact, but you can affect anything in existence simply by willing your presence onto it. You can limit the range of your omnipresence if you don't wish to experience all of reality at once.
3566. Omniscience,9.2
#You possess infinite knowledge within the context of your reality. Every question has an answer you already know, every mystery is laid bare, every secret is yours. You understand magic as naturally as breathing, know the outcome of conflicts before they begin, and comprehend truths that would shatter mortal minds. The only things you cannot know are those that exist beyond your universe.
3567. Omniverse Embodiment,9.4
#You are the living embodiment of the omniverse itself. Everything within it - time, space, reality, causality, probability, every concept and every law - is yours to command without limit. You are the omniverse given form, and your only meaningful vulnerability is to those who could destroy the omniverse itself.
3568. Omniverse Mimicry,9.2
#Your body is made of the omniverse itself, anatomically composed of all multiverses, dimensions, realities and planes. You have authority over everything happening within yourself - matter, energy, laws of physics, concepts, logic - allowing you to take on any form or function. You are somewhat vulnerable to attacks since your body contains all worlds, and Omniverse Destruction can harm you.
3569. Oneiric Immunity,3.5
#You are immune to all dream-based abilities. No one can alter your dreams, trap you in your nightmares, or enter your sleeping mind. May need to be consciously activated and if you're already having a nightmare, dream manipulators cannot pull you out of it.
3570. Oneiric Omnipresence,6.6
#You are present in every dream at once, an unbounded dream-walking presence that extends across every sleeping mind in existence. You can observe, interact with, and enter any dream simultaneously, though Omnipresential Attacks can still reach you through the dreamscape.
3571. Oneiriscience,5.7
#You are aware of every dream that has ever been dreamed or is currently being dreamed. This grants you deep insight into desires, secrets, and fears that people keep consciously hidden, from their fondest wishes to their worst nightmares. Does not grant enhanced intelligence, and the constant flood of nightmares from others can erode your sanity over time.
3572. Onibi Physiology,3.6
#You are or can transform into an Onibi, a wisp of demon-fire from Japanese folklore. You can split yourself into small floating flames that drain the life force of anything they touch and reform at will. Vulnerable to Shinto prayers and shrine maiden rituals.
3573. Onikuma Physiology,4.2
#You are or can transform into an Onikuma, a demon bear yokai said to be an ordinary bear that lived long enough to become a spirit. You possess monstrous strength capable of hauling boulders ten men could not lift, and can grow large enough to carry away cattle in your jaws. Still ruled by ursine instinct.
3574. Onmoraki Physiology,4.1
#You are or can transform into an Onmoraki, a black crane yokai born from the spirits of improperly buried dead. You can breathe fire, unleash a piercing wail, and recite the Degeneration Sutra to prevent enlightenment in monks and priests. Drawn instinctively to sleeping clergy.
3575. Onryo Physiology,4.6
#You are or can transform into an onryō, a vengeful Japanese ghost who returned to the physical world to settle grievances from their death. You gain potent spiritual powers directed toward the object of your grudge, but you are bound to the place or object tied to your death and may weaken once your vengeance is complete.
3576. Onyudo Physiology,4.3
#You are or can transform into an Onyudo, the "big monk" yokai. Your size ranges from slightly larger than a human to as tall as a mountain depending on how much energy you pour into the transformation. Those who lay eyes on you in your true form may fall ill from the sheer weight of your presence.
3577. Openable Cranium,1.1
#You can open your skull at will like a hinged lid, exposing your brain to the open air. Useful for dramatic reveals, storing small objects, or airing out your thoughts. Your brain is extremely vulnerable while the cranium is open.
3578. Ophanim Physiology,6.8
#You are or can transform into an Ophan, one of the wheels within wheels beneath the throne of God. You take the form of nested burning wheels covered in eyes, capable of moving in any direction without turning and perceiving reality from every angle simultaneously. Subservient to higher angels and vulnerable to angel slayers.
3579. Ophiotaurus Physiology,5.7
#Greek Mythology - You are or can transform into the Ophiotaurus, the serpent-bull born from Chaos alongside Gaia and Ouranos. Your foreparts are those of a mighty black bull and your tail is that of a great serpent. Whoever burns your entrails gains the power to defeat the gods themselves, which tends to make you a target.
3580. Opportunity Sense,3.8
#You can sense every opportunity in any situation, the exact right moment to strike in combat, the precise instant to speak in a negotiation, the one second a locked door is unguarded. Your reflexes may not always be able to act on what you perceive, and the sense cannot be shut off.
3581. Opposing Forces Empowerment,5.2
#You grow stronger, faster, and more durable from the presence of any opposing forces around you. Light and darkness, heat and cold, order and chaos, any duality in conflict near you pours power into your body. In a truly contested battleground you become nearly unstoppable, and some users can draw sustenance from opposing forces or slow their aging.
3582. Opposites Embodiment,7.8
#You are the living personification of opposites themselves, whether of a single duality like life and death, or of every opposition in existence. You wield limitless control over whichever opposing forces you embody, and conflict between them bends naturally to your will. Useless against Boundary Manipulation and Duality Transcendence.
3583. Opposition Immunity,5.8
#You are immune to counters, reversals, reflections, and all forms of opposition. Attacks cannot be turned back on you, your powers cannot be reflected, and counter-techniques simply do not catch. Omnicounter and Meta Power Reflection can still bypass this.
3584. Optimal Finesse,5.3
#You instinctively utilize every skill, tool, and ability you possess at its absolute peak efficiency. You always know which of your techniques best suits the moment, your movements contain no wasted motion, and the chance of failure at any task within your skillset drops to near zero. Still capped by the actual ceiling of your abilities.
3585. Orang Minyak Physiology,3.3
#You are or can transform into an Orang Minyak, the oily man of Malay folklore, a pitch-black nocturnal spirit whose slick body is nearly impossible to grasp. You gain supernatural stealth at night and a body that slips from any hold, but the physiology brings with it strong nocturnal urges and a solitary disposition.
3586. Orangutan Physiology,2.9
#You are or can transform into an orangutan, fully or partially. You gain immense upper body strength, long arms built for brachiation, dexterous feet, and the patient intelligence of the great red ape of the forest canopy.
3587. Orc Physiology Superior,4.2
#You are or can transform into an alpha-tier orc, larger and stronger than common orcs, the sort that becomes a chieftain or warlord. You possess enhanced physical abilities, a bloodthirsty presence, and the instinctive cunning to lead hordes.
3588. Orc Physiology Transcendent,6.3
#You are or can transform into a divine orc, the sort worshipped as a war god by lesser orcs. Your physical abilities are raised to a godly tier and you often possess unique powers no other orc has. Vulnerable to divine slayer and divine power absorption.
3589. Orc Physiology,3.3
#You are or can transform into an orc, a tusked brutish humanoid built for war. You gain significantly enhanced strength, durability and aggression, along with the hoarse love of conflict that comes with the form.
3590. Order Derivation,9.3
#You are the source of all order in existence, the primordial wellspring from which law, justice, harmony and concord flow into every reality. Every structure, every rule, every pattern in the multiverse is an echo of you. You cannot be killed without passing the role to a successor, because if you cease, all order ceases with you.
3591. Order Disruption,4.1
#Your mere actions, especially the ones that should be impossible or unprecedented, warp the natural order of reality around you. You cannot control it, it simply happens in your wake. The effects fade if you stop, and those with chaos immunity are unaffected.
3592. Order Embodiment,7.4
#You are the living personification of Order, the incarnation of law, structure and uniformity. Your presence imposes arrangement and discipline on everything around you, and you can decree laws that bend entire planes into obedience. Weakened or outright negated by those who embody Chaos, and your existence may be tied to theirs.
3593. Order Empowerment,4.3
#Order makes you stronger, faster and tougher. The more structured, lawful and harmonious your surroundings, the more your physical abilities and existing powers are amplified. Drawn into a chaotic environment, you wither accordingly.
3594. Order Immunity,3.9
#You are immune to anything orderly, including lawful influences, harmony-based powers and attacks by beings of order. As a side effect your own chaotic disorganization makes it genuinely difficult to finish anything you start.
3595. Order Physiology,6.4
#Your body is made of or can transform into pure orderly matter and energy. In this form your cells, bones and muscles are reinforced by the flow of order itself, granting immense durability, enhanced abilities and a suite of related powers. Chaos manipulation can weaken or negate you, and mastery takes time.
3596. Organ Independence,4.6
#You do not need your organs to live. You can function perfectly fine without lungs, heart, stomach or brain, letting you shrug off what would be fatal wounds for any other being. A user of Organ Generation could force organs back into you and re-introduce those vulnerabilities.
3597. Organic Empowerment,4.0
#You grow stronger, faster and more durable the closer you are to organic matter, drawing power from flesh, wood, bone and blood around you. Overuse may induce dependency on organic surroundings to function normally.
3598. Organic Metal Skeleton,3.6
#Your bones are coated in an organic metal compound that mimics the properties of real metal, whether steel, titanium, or something more exotic. Your skeleton becomes nearly unbreakable, but magnetism users may find you suddenly very easy to yank around.
3599. Organic Mimicry,4.5
#Your body is made of, or can transform into, a particular type of organic matter. Blood, bone, wood, food, hydrocarbons, whatever you are attuned to. You do not mimic whole physiologies, only the material itself, and some users find they cannot return to their original form.
3600. Organic Power Link,4.6
#Your biological nature is directly wired to your powers, with your organics fueling and amplifying them. This lets you push your abilities further than they would otherwise go, but if your body is destabilized, your powers go haywire with it. Decomposition users are your natural counter.
3601. Organic Regeneration,5.2
#You regenerate wounds by absorbing organic substances, whether from corpses, plants, or unfortunate living beings nearby. The biomass either fuels your healing or is directly transmuted into your own mass. Cellular manipulators can unravel you by destroying the organics inside you.
3602. Organite Exoskeleton,6.3
#You possess a powered exoskeleton composed of organite biomachines that constantly evolve alongside you. The armor augments your strength, speed, durability and intellect while adapting to any situation. Left unchecked for too long, the suit may begin to develop a mind of its own.
3603. Organite Physiology,6.2
#Your body is composed of self-aware organite biomachines, allowing you to reshape yourself at will and infect anything you touch, turning it into an extension of yourself. Still vulnerable to diseases, pathogens, and DNA disintegration however, as organic weaknesses still apply.
3604. Origami Mimicry,3.5
#You are or can transform into living origami, with your transformed body being anatomically identical to your normal form aside from being made of paper. Damage can be undone by simply folding yourself back into shape, but you are notably weak against water and fire.
3605. Origin Embodiment,9.3
#You are the living personification of the origin of everything, the first point from which all existence springs. As the Walking Origin you embody the very concept of beginnings, though you do not encompass what lies outside origin or those who have transcended it.
3606. Origin Transcendence,9.1
#You have transcended your own origin, reducing its hold on you from an absolute order to an inconsequential force. You no longer need your creator or source to sustain your existence, and even if your origin is erased or overwritten, you remain. Your actions can defy conventional causality entirely.
3607. Ornament Mimicry,1.6
#You are or can transform into an ornament or decoration. Your transformed form is anatomically identical to your normal form, aside from being made of decorative matter. Most ornaments serve no practical purpose beyond looking pretty, and your form may be rather fragile.
3608. Ornithopod Physiology,3.8
#You possess the physiology of an ornithopod, a group of herbivorous dinosaurs that include hadrosaurs and iguanodons. You gain enhanced physical capabilities, a durable body suited for both bipedal and quadrupedal movement, and the instincts of a herd-dwelling dinosaur.
3609. Orthoptera Physiology,3.0
#You can mimic or transform into orthoptera such as grasshoppers, crickets or locusts, gaining their powerful jumping legs, tough exoskeleton and enhanced metabolism. You will need to eat near constantly, and still find yourself vulnerable to frogs, birds and lizards.
3610. Orthopteranoid Physiology,3.6
#You are or can transform into an orthopteranoid, a humanoid race with the traits of grasshoppers, crickets or locusts. You retain your human intelligence while gaining powerful legs capable of tremendous leaps, a tough chitinous shell and the predatory instincts of a swarming insect.
3611. Osculated Sway,3.4
#Your exocrine glands secrete enzymes through your sweat, saliva, tears and other fluids that induce extreme suggestibility in anyone who comes into contact with them. The closer the contact, the stronger the sway, making a kiss far more persuasive than a handshake.
3612. Oshiroi Baba Physiology,2.8
#You are or can mimic an Oshiroi Baba, a hag-yokai that wanders the night searching for sake and makeup. You gain supernatural endurance and yokai traits, but your appearance is so hideous that humans flee on sight. Vulnerable to shrine rituals and Shinto prayers.
3613. Otariidae Physiology,2.6
#You are or can transform into an otariid, the family of eared seals and sea lions. You gain their swimming prowess, blubbery durability, whiskers and surprising agility on land.
3614. Other Life-Force,4.2
#Your life-force does not match your species, resembling something else entirely, bestial, supernatural, or wholly alien. You still inhabit your original body, but the unusual vitality grants you powers and physical traits of whatever your life-force resembles.
3615. Other Soul,4.4
#Your soul does not match your species, resembling something else, bestial, divine, or utterly alien. This grants you powers and traits tied to whatever your soul resembles, though the mismatch with your body can put you under constant spiritual strain.
3616. Otocephalanoid Physiology,2.8
#You are or can transform into an otocephalanoid, a humanoid fusion of human and otocephalan fish. You possess gills, scales, and the aquatic prowess of your fish lineage while retaining a mostly humanoid frame.
3617. Ouroboros Physiology,6.3
#You are or can transform into an ouroboros, the serpent or dragon that devours its own tail. You embody the cycle of death and rebirth, constantly re-creating yourself, and your mere presence carries the weight of eternity and infinite return.
3618. Outback Monster Physiology,3.8
#You can take on the traits of creatures from Australian folklore, from bunyips lurking in waterholes to drop bears dropping from gum trees, yowies, min min lights and the more fanciful cryptids the Europeans cooked up. A wildly varied grab bag tied to the Dreamtime.
3619. Overdose Immunity,3.1
#You are resistant or outright immune to overdoses, able to consume far greater quantities of substances than would normally be lethal. Does not protect you from substances that are simply lethal in any dose.
3620. Overexertion Immunity,5.3
#You are immune to the effects of physical, mental and spiritual overexertion. Strain, fatigue, burnout, power backlash, none of it touches you, letting you push your body and abilities past their normal limits without paying the usual price. You can still be hurt the old-fashioned way.
3621. Overload Immunity,4.2
#You are immune to all or most forms of overloading, whether sensory, mental, energy, power or memory. Floodlights, shriek attacks and power overflows all wash over you without effect. Certain exotic overloads may still slip past depending on how far your immunity extends.
3622. Overwhelming Influence,5.7
#You possess a staggering amount of real-world influence in a sphere of your choosing - criminal, political, military, economic, religious, etc. Within that sphere you can pull strings that would be impossible for ordinary people, though rivals of equal standing and those with indomitable will can resist or topple you.
3623. Ovinnik Physiology,3.2
#Slavic Mythology - You are or can become an Ovinnik, the mischievous spirit of the threshing house. You possess minor luck manipulation (especially potent around the New Year), fire affinity, and spiritual presence, though you can be appeased with offerings of roosters and bliny, and are vulnerable to cold iron.
3624. Oviparous Reproduction,1.6
#You reproduce by laying eggs instead of live birth. Certain seasonal or environmental conditions may be required for the eggs to be viable.
3625. Owlfolk Physiology,2.8
#You are an owlfolk, a humanoid avian species with feathered limbs, keen nocturnal senses, silent wingbeats and the ability to rotate your head to unsettling degrees. You retain most human dexterity while gaining the instincts of a raptor.
3626. Oxygen Independence,3.6
#You no longer require oxygen to survive, allowing you to function indefinitely in airless environments, underwater, in vacuum, or in toxic atmospheres. You remain vulnerable to airborne hazards that attack through other means.
3627. Pachyderm Companionship,2.2
#You have a natural affinity for pachyderms - elephants, rhinos, hippos and tapirs. You can form deep, unbreakable bonds with one or more of them, and they will follow you loyally through thick and thin.
3628. Pain Embodiment,7.3
#You are the physical embodiment of pain itself. You grow stronger by feeding on the agony of yourself and others, can induce crippling suffering on a whim, and any pain inflicted upon you can be redirected back to the attacker. Those who feel no pain nor care about it reduce your effectiveness.
3629. Pain Empowerment,4.2
#You grow stronger, faster and more durable the more pain you endure. With enough suffering you may unlock new abilities or slow your aging entirely, but the pain still hurts unless you can suppress it - no free lunch.
3630. Pain Immunity,3.8
#You are completely immune to physical pain of all kinds. You can continue fighting, thinking and moving even through grievous injuries without flinching, letting you push past limits that would disable a normal person. The downside: you may not realize how hurt you are until your body gives out entirely.
3631. Pain Resistance,2.8
#Your pain tolerance is far beyond any regular person, you can power through serious injuries and keep swinging when others would collapse. Not true immunity, enough damage will still drop you, but you'll rarely flinch from what would incapacitate anyone else.
3632. Paint Empowerment,2.7
#You grow stronger, faster, and tougher in the presence of paint. Some users can even draw sustenance from it, slow their aging, or unlock new abilities tied to specific colors and affinities. The more paint around you, the more absurd you become.
3633. Paint Mimicry,3.9
#Your body can transform partially or completely into paint. You can keep your normal anatomy in paint form or become a homogeneous blob that no single attack can truly injure. Vulnerable to water and heat, though, both of which can genuinely undo you.
3634. Paintbrush Mimicry,1.1
#You either are or can transform into a paintbrush. May be inanimate while transformed, which is as awkward as it sounds. Hope someone picks you up.
3635. Painting Mimicry,2.9
#You either are or can transform into a living painting, shifting between flat canvas form and your regular physical body. Very handy for hiding and infiltration, although a splash of water can wash you clean away.
3636. Palaeognath Physiology,2.6
#You either are or can transform into a palaeognath, a class of flightless birds including ostriches, emus, kiwis, cassowaries and rheas. Pick your flavor: the cassowary form alone grants lethal kicks and a knife-shaped claw that can disembowel a man.
3637. Pan-Dimensional Physiology,9.3
#You are an infinite-dimensional entity, your existence spanning countably or uncountably infinite dimensions, up to and including absolute infinity. You sit above endless hierarchies of layers of existence, each lower one utterly trivialized by your presence. Still encompassed by users of Unity, and weak against Existence Grounding.
3638. Pan-Temporal Presence,9.0
#You are present across all of time at once, the past, the present, the future and every alternate timeline. You exist in every moment simultaneously, granting you boundless knowledge of every event that ever occurred or will occur. The constant flood of information is dangerous to an unprepared mind and can overload those who cannot handle omniscience.
3639. Pancake Mimicry,1.5
#Your body has the traits of a pancake. Flat, flexible, warm, and unfortunately quite appetizing, you can fold and flop yourself through tight spaces but should probably avoid anyone wielding syrup and a fork.
3640. Panda Monster Physiology,4.2
#You either are or can transform into a panda monster, a hulking ursine horror with supernatural strength, durability and a predator's instincts. Vulnerable to Monster Manipulation users, and of course, Monster Slayers have a particular interest in you.
3641. Panda Physiology,2.2
#You either are or can transform into a panda bear. Surprisingly strong jaws, thick fur, and the ability to sit around eating bamboo all day guilt-free. Giant pandas are also stronger than their cuteness suggests, with the bite force to crush steel pipes.
3642. Panmnesia,6.6
#You have perfect total memory. Everything you have ever read, heard, seen, experienced or learned is stored in your mind with pristine clarity and can be recalled instantly without strain. Your brain's storage is unlimited, and you will remember every moment of your life from birth to death without a single detail lost.
3643. Panotti Physiology,1.2
#Greek Mythology - You are a Panotti, a humanoid with enormous ears so large you can use them as blankets. Your hearing is exceptional and your ears provide surprisingly decent insulation, but they're awkward in tight spaces and make for an obvious target.
3644. Pantherine Physiology,3.5
#You possess the traits of the great cats, able to transform partially or fully into a lion, tiger, leopard, jaguar or similar pantherine. You gain the strength, speed, stealth and predatory senses of whichever big cat you draw from, and can mix and match traits across species with practice.
3645. Paper Empowerment,3.0
#You grow stronger, faster and more durable the closer you are to paper. In a library or a printing press you are a monster; in the desert, not so much. With enough mastery you can even draw sustenance from paper and slow your own aging.
3646. Paper Mimicry,4.0
#Your body is made of paper, or can be transformed entirely into it, letting you scatter into loose sheets, reform, and shape additional limbs or weapons from your own mass. You retain vulnerabilities to fire, water and air-based attacks, which can be devastating to your form.
3647. Papinijuwari Physiology,4.6
#You are a Papinijuwari, a one-eyed demonic giant from Aboriginal myth who stalks the sick and dead. You possess immense size and strength, supernatural scent for detecting illness and death, and a vampiric appetite for blood. You can shrink down to slip into dwellings unnoticed. Vulnerable to Aboriginal relics, prayers and giant slayers.
3648. Paracanthurus Physiology,2.2
#You are or can transform into a Royal Blue Tang, the same species as Dory from Finding Nemo. You gain all the traits of the fish, which unfortunately includes needing to be in water to survive and being prey to sharks.
3649. Paradox Existence,7.6
#You are a paradoxical existence, a being whose very being contradicts itself yet somehow does not self-destruct. You could travel back in time to introduce your parents, become your own grandfather, or cause the event that created you. The spacetime continuum may occasionally try to reject you from reality, and meeting another of your kind could be catastrophic.
3650. Paradox Immunity,7.5
#You are immune to the effects of any paradox as if it simply didn't happen. Reality-ending contradictions pass over you, and even paradoxes you cause yourself, such as killing your past self, leave you completely untouched. Immunity Bypassing is the only counter.
3651. Parallel Existence,8.4
#You exist across every parallel universe and timeline simultaneously, with a version of yourself in each of them descending from the original. With training you can communicate with or even control your parallel copies, coordinating actions across infinite worlds. If the primordial you is destroyed, all copies may fall with it.
3652. Parallel Processing,4.2
#Your mind can carry out multiple calculations and thought processes simultaneously, letting you hold several trains of thought in parallel instead of juggling them sequentially. There is a limit to how many threads you can maintain at once, and it scales with mental stats.
3653. Paralysis Immunity,4.0
#You are immune to being paralyzed or immobilized by any means, including Molecular Immobilization and Paralysis Inducement. May be limited to effects that target your physique and not outside forces holding you in place.
3654. Paralyzing Venom,3.5
#You possess venom capable of paralyzing effects, ranging from mild sedation to full body lockdown to outright death depending on the dose. You may not be immune to your own venom, so handle your fangs or glands with care.
3655. Paranormal Immunity,5.7
#You are immune to paranormal effects from unnatural entities, including magic, curses, possession, spectral attacks and supernatural conversion. Vampires, werewolves, demons and ghosts cannot turn, curse or ride you. Unfortunately this extends to beneficial magic too, so healing spells and blessings simply slide off of you.
3656. Parasite Empowerment,3.3
#Your body is infested with parasites and you draw power from them. The more parasites you host, the stronger you become, though your body must tolerate the infestation to reap the benefits.
3657. Parasite Immunity,2.1
#You are completely immune to parasitic infection. You can eat parasite-infested food, swim in infested waters or get bitten by vectors without any worry of catching something nasty.
3658. Parasite Physiology,3.6
#Your body is that of a parasite, or you can mimic one. You can latch onto a host and siphon their vitality to sustain yourself, but without a host you wither quickly. Fictional parasites tend to be closer to parasitoids, so your biology leans deadly by default.
3659. Parasite Symbiosis,4.6
#You host parasitic organisms within you and gain powers from the bond, ranging from ordinary parasites to parasitic gods. The stronger the parasite, the more it offers and the more it demands, and weaker-willed hosts can find themselves slowly taken over.
3661. Parasol Mimicry,2.4
#You can transform your body into parasols or become one entirely. In transformed state you share all the weaknesses a normal parasol has, but you can disassemble into a cloud of them and reform elsewhere.
3662. Pard Physiology,2.9
#You are or can transform into a pard, a large leopard-like feline with white spots dotting its body. You gain feline speed, grace and predator instincts, though beings who control felines or mythical creatures may find you easier to influence.
3663. Parrot Physiology,2.3
#You are or can transform into a parrot, either partially or fully. In addition to flight and the expected avian traits, you possess an uncanny ability to mimic voices and sounds with perfect accuracy, as well as a surprisingly sharp intelligence for problem solving.
3664. Particle Empowerment,4.8
#You grow stronger, faster and more durable when exposed to particles, potentially unlocking particle-affinity abilities and enhancing existing ones. Some users draw sustenance directly from ambient particles, slowing or even stopping their aging entirely.
3665. Particle Mimicry,6.2
#Your body is made of or can transform completely into particles. In this form you can be anatomically intact or a homogeneous cloud, flowing around attacks and reforming at will. Some users become nearly intangible beams of living matter, others reinforce their cells, bones and muscles with the particles flowing through them.
3666. Particle Power Link,5.4
#Your particle nature is linked directly to your powers, fueling and strengthening them at the subatomic level. Your abilities scale with your particulate essence, letting you push them further than most users could. May destabilize if your particle nature is disturbed, and vulnerable to Charged Particle Absorption.
3667. Passerine Physiology,2.2
#You are or can transform into a passerine bird such as a corvid, robin, finch or swallow, either partially or fully. You gain flight, sharp avian senses, and the natural cleverness associated with songbirds and corvids, with lyrebird variants capable of uncanny sound mimicry.
3668. Passion Embodiment,6.5
#You are the embodiment of all forms of passion - love, lust, desire, devotion, obsession. You can induce overwhelming passions in others that utterly consume them, driving them to ruin or rapture. The downside is that you are just as much ruled by your own passions as they are, and your mood can swing wildly from moment to moment.
3669. Past Embodiment,7.6
#You are the living past. The timeline of everything that has ever happened exists within you, and you can cause paradoxes without universal consequence since you are the one that holds history together. All that was, is you.
3670. Pasta Mimicry,1.7
#You are partially or completely made of pasta and can transform into any noodle-based form - spaghetti, ravioli, lasagna, ramen, you name it. Unfortunately this means you are extremely vulnerable to rot and also to hungry people.
3671. Pathogen Carrying,4.0
#You are an asymptomatic carrier of various diseases, viruses, and pathogens. You show no symptoms and are immune to what you carry, but can spread it freely. Depending on the pathogen, you may also inherit powerful disease-based abilities tied to it. People may also try to harvest you for a cure.
3672. Patience Embodiment,6.3
#You are the embodiment of Patience itself. You are incapable of impulsive or irrational behaviour, and you can convert your patient actions into an energy that can be used offensively, defensively, or in support of others. Can be overpowered by those who embody Hatred or Wrath.
3673. Paw Protrusion,0.8
#You have or can generate soft cushy paws on your feet and body, acting as natural shock absorbers for your load-bearing limbs. They are incredibly cute.
3674. Pea Mimicry,0.9
#You are made of peas or can transform your body into peas. Your pea-form can either be anatomically identical to your normal body or a homogeneous mass of legume. You may be vulnerable to being eaten and may have trouble changing back.
3675. Peace Derivation,9.2
#You are the source of all peace and harmony in existence. Everything that is tranquil, everything that is free from hostility and violence, derives its nature from you - and as long as you exist, peace does too. You have absolute dominion over every force of peace and harmony, but you cannot escape the role without passing it to another, and if you died, peace itself would cease to exist.
3676. Peace Embodiment,7.4
#You are the embodiment of peace itself. Your mere presence calms raging hearts, settles disputes and eases troubled minds. Violence simply unravels around you, weapons feel heavier in hands that would raise them against others, and hatred loses its grip. However, you are fundamentally incapable of attacking or causing harm, and beings embodying War, Rage or Chaos stand in direct opposition to you.
3677. Peafowl Physiology,2.3
#You are or can transform into a peafowl, either partially or fully. As a peacock you gain dazzling plumage that stuns onlookers, enhanced vision and flight capability, while as a peahen you gain sharper senses and better camouflage.
3678. Absolute Balance,8.6
#Your sense of balance is infinite and absolute. You will never be knocked off your feet, never experience vertigo or nausea, and can stand perfectly on the tip of a needle atop a spinning planet during an earthquake. Orientation is a concept that does not apply to you. Nothing in reality short of absolute-tier powers can throw you off balance.
3679. Enhanced Balance,3.2
#Your balance is enhanced to superhuman levels. You are almost impossible to knock down, recover from stumbles instantly, and can stand perfectly poised on the edge of a spinning coin. Your body instinctively adjusts its center of gravity to any surface, no matter how narrow or unstable.
3680. Supernatural Balance,4.6
#Your balance is unnaturally perfect, beyond what any training could produce. You can walk across a storm-tossed rope bridge in a hurricane without breaking stride, stand on a single raindrop, or do a handstand on a moving bullet. Sensory-based attacks may still throw you off, but little else can.
3681. Absolute Beauty,8.7
#You possess beauty so supreme it transcends the very concept of attraction. Every being that lays eyes on you is utterly captivated, regardless of orientation, species or whether they even understand beauty at all. Your allure is absolute and irresistible, bending hearts, minds and wills by mere existence.
3682. Enhanced Beauty,4.1
#Your beauty is on the level of a storybook princess or fairytale prince charming, well beyond what a human can reach but below the divine beauty of love goddesses and angels. You wield considerable social influence effortlessly, though your appearance is hard to hide and may attract unwanted attention.
3683. Supernatural Beauty,6.3
#Your beauty is flawless and unearthly, projecting a mystical and empathic effect on all who perceive you. Observers will see their own idealized vision of perfection when they look at you, falling into awe with just a glance, word or gesture. Only those with Indomitable Will or Seduction Immunity can resist.
3684. Peak Human Beauty,2.6
#You are as beautiful as the most stunning humans in history, easily receiving favors, special treatment and affection from admirers. Still within natural human bounds, so those with Enhanced Beauty will outshine you, and spurning an admirer can turn their adoration into bitter spite.
3685. Absolute Body,9.0
#Your body is absolute. Your strength can lift multiverses, your speed makes travel instantaneous, and your durability borders on true invincibility. Every cell, bone and drop of blood in you is perfected and infinite. You are the physical ideal taken to its limitless conclusion.
3686. Enhanced Body,4.3
#Your body operates just above peak human, letting you lift cars and boulders weighing several tons, run at speeds between 40 and 768 mph, and react to sniper rounds well enough to catch them barehanded. Lack of matching mental enhancements may cause problems, and the sheer superiority can foster arrogance.
3687. Supernatural Body,6.2
#Your physical abilities are unnaturally superior, far beyond what any training could ever produce. You are immensely stronger, faster and more durable than anyone else in your world could naturally become. Absolute Body users can still outperform you, and the obvious superiority tends to breed megalomania.
3688. Peak Human Body,2.8
#Your body is at the absolute peak of natural human potential, outclassing Olympic athletes in every physical attribute. Still firmly human, though, so anything enhanced can outperform you. Maintaining this condition may require strict diet and continuous training.
3689. Absolute Condition,9.3
#Every attribute you possess, physical, mental and spiritual, is at an infinite and absolute level. Your strength lifts multiverses, your speed crosses infinities in a finite moment, your intellect surpasses any god. Nothing in existence can match you on any front, because you are the condition of a god made flesh.
3690. Enhanced Condition,4.8
#Your entire body and mind operate above peak human in every respect, strength, speed, endurance, agility, durability, reflexes, senses, intelligence and willpower all dramatically augmented. You effortlessly perform feats no elite athlete could dream of, though you fall short of true superhuman levels and can be overpowered by those above you.
3691. Supernatural Condition,6.6
#Your body and mind vastly surpass any natural limit, reaching advanced superhuman levels that can scale into cosmic. Your strength ranges from leveling cities to shattering planets and stars, your speed breaks the light barrier, and your senses pierce worlds. Only those with Absolute Condition outmatch you, and the Plateau Effect may eventually cap your growth.
3692. Peak Human Condition,3.0
#Your body and mind are pushed to the absolute maximum of natural human potential, surpassing Olympic athletes and genius-level thinkers alike. Anything enhanced and above can still overpower you, and maintaining this condition may require a strict training regimen.
3693. Enhanced Grip,2.9
#Your grip is enhanced far beyond natural strength, letting you latch onto anything and refuse to let go. Whether through sheer muscle or adhesive skin, once you have hold of something, prying it free is a nightmare.
3694. Supernatural Grip,4.2
#Your grip is nearly unbreakable and can crush almost anything caught in your hand. Some users manifest claws sharp enough to cut as they grasp. Absolute Invulnerability is the only thing that reliably shrugs it off.
3695. Peak Human Grip,2.2
#Your grip strength sits at 500 psi, enough to crush a human skull barehanded, bend thick steel bars, snap chains, and hang from any surface for as long as you need. You may have to be careful with handshakes and coffee mugs.
3696. Absolute Mind,9.1
#Your mind is absolute, infinitely superior to every other intellect in your universe. You possess god-level intelligence, infinite imagination, wisdom beyond gods, and cognitive abilities no other being can comprehend, let alone replicate. Every thought you have is a miracle of reason in motion.
3697. Enhanced Mind,4.3
#Your mental capabilities are pushed beyond any ordinary human mind, granting heightened intelligence, intuition, creativity and wisdom just below superhuman. You solve the world's hardest equations in minutes, master new subjects in hours, and retain perfect recall of everything you've ever experienced.
3698. Supernatural Mind,6.1
#Your mental faculties are unnaturally vast, clearly superior to any normal mind in your world. You are smarter, cleverer and wiser than anything natural training could ever produce. Absolute Mind users still outwit you, and the obvious superiority tends to make you underestimate those around you.
3699. Peak Human Mind,2.7
#Your mind is at the absolute pinnacle of human potential without crossing into the superhuman. Your intelligence, creativity, perception and wisdom are all genius-level, letting you effortlessly unravel problems that would stump the brightest minds. Still just shy of truly enhanced.
3700. Pearl Empowerment,2.3
#You become stronger, faster and more durable the closer you are to pearls, and holding one can unlock latent pearl-related abilities. A string of pearls around your neck is basically a battery.
3701. Pearl Mimicry,4.0
