#Your body is made of pearl, or can transform into it at will. In homogenous form you possess no vital organs and gain a smooth iridescent beauty, though pearls are ultimately fragile and can be chipped or shattered by sufficient force.
3702. Pech Physiology,4.1
#You are a Pech, a gnome of Scottish folklore famous for their unfathomable strength and heather-brewed ale. Even a dying ancient Pech could crush a metal cup with one hand, and in your prime you can casually move stones meant for monolithic structures. You age extremely slowly but are vulnerable to cold iron and rustic charms.
3703. Pegasus Physiology,4.7
#Greek Mythology - You are or can transform into a pegasus, a winged divine horse. In this form you gain immense equine strength, flight via feathered wings, and a trace of the semi-divine nature of the original Pegasus of myth.
3704. Pelecaniform Physiology,2.6
#You are or can transform into a pelecaniform bird — pelican, heron, ibis, spoonbill or shoebill. You gain the flight, fishing talents and distinctive traits of whichever you choose, including the shoebill's unsettling thousand-yard stare.
3705. Peluda Physiology,5.4
#European Folklore - You are or can transform into the Peluda, the Shaggy Beast of medieval France. Your body is covered in green hair-like tentacles that can erect into poisonous quills and be fired as projectiles, and you have the scaly neck and head of a serpent and a tortoise-like shell. Your tail, however, is not invulnerable, and severing it is instantly lethal.
3706. Pen Mimicry,1.1
#You are or can transform into a pen. Any kind, from a cheap ballpoint to a fancy fountain pen. Just hope nobody with ink manipulation is around to make your life miserable.
3707. Pencil Mimicry,1.0
#You are or can transform into a pencil. Fragile, snappable, eraseable. You will live in fear of sharpeners.
3708. Penguin Physiology,2.0
#You are or can transform into a penguin, gaining their swimming prowess, insulation against extreme cold and, of course, their unmatched tuxedo waddle. Watch out for leopard seals.
3709. Penguinfolk Physiology,2.6
#You are a penguinfolk, a humanoid penguin from fantasy settings. You possess a humanoid form with penguin traits, granting you cold immunity, exceptional swimming, and a natural affinity for icy climates.
3710. Pentagram Empowerment,3.1
#You draw strength, speed and durability from the presence of pentagrams. The more pentagrams nearby, the stronger you become, and some of your latent magical abilities may awaken in their presence.
3711. Pepper Mimicry,2.1
#You are made of pepper or can transform your body into it, either retaining your anatomy as a pepper-form or becoming homogeneous matter. Unfortunately you are edible, and a sneeze at the wrong moment can be catastrophic.
3712. Enhanced Perception,3.6
#You possess powerful analytical and observational skills, catching minuscule details others would miss. You can read people and situations with precision, predict outcomes with unsettling accuracy, and always find the optimal approach, making you a natural master planner.
3713. Supernatural Perception,5.8
#Your perception is obviously beyond the natural limits of your species. You perceive, analyze and observe with supernatural clarity, able to catch details and patterns no mortal ever could. Not omniscience, but close enough that normal detectives, tacticians and readers of people simply cannot keep up with you.
3714. Peak Perception,2.7
#Your perception is at the absolute peak of human ability. You spot tiny details others overlook, read people effortlessly, and always know the optimal course of action. A peak human intellect pairs perfectly with this.
3715. Perfect Appearance,3.0
#You always look immaculate no matter the circumstances. Starving in a ditch, covered in mud, dying of thirst - it does not matter, your hair is perfect, your skin is flawless, and you look like you just stepped out of a day spa. You may still show signs of injury, but you'll be a gorgeous wreck.
3716. Performance Art Empowerment,3.0
#You become stronger, faster, and more durable in the presence of performance arts. Singing, acting and dancing all fuel you, and a stage with a live audience may awaken dormant abilities. Some users can draw sustenance from entertainment itself.
3717. Peri Physiology,5.4
#You are or can transform into a Peri, an exquisite winged spirit of Persian myth. Your beauty is otherworldly, your body light and graceful, and you possess a benevolent affinity for mankind as well as minor spiritual powers and flight. However, divs and daeva hunt Peri and can imprison them in iron cages.
3718. Periodic Element Empowerment,4.0
#You become stronger, faster and more durable when in contact with elements of the periodic table, drawing sustenance from them and even slowing your aging. The more elements surrounding you, the more pronounced the boost, though overuse may induce dependency.
3719. Perpetual Consciousness,3.3
#You are immune to being knocked unconscious. No blow to the head, no chokehold, no tranquilizer can make you black out. You can keep fighting and functioning until you take too much damage or are outright killed. You can still sleep normally, since sleep is a different state of consciousness.
3720. Perpetual Nourishment,4.5
#You are endlessly nourished, perpetually in perfect health and re-energized without end. You never go hungry, never waste away, and always recover to prime condition. You may still need some form of source to draw from, whether that is sunlight, ambient energy, or something stranger.
3721. Perseverance Empowerment,4.2
#You grow faster, stronger and more durable the more you persevere, and can even draw fuel from the perseverance of others around you. The harder the wall you push against, the more it fuels you, potentially unlocking new abilities under duress. Despair, rage, or fear can weaken or overwhelm this empowerment.
3722. Personal Absorption Manipulation,4.7
#You have complete control over your own absorption. Whatever power of absorption you possess, you choose what to absorb, who to absorb, the rate of absorption, and whether it happens at all. Touching something no longer means absorbing it by accident, and you can dial the intake to a trickle or a flood at will.
3723. Personal Afterlife,6.6
#Upon your death, a personalized metaphysical realm manifests, a crafted afterlife shaped by your nature, morality, emotions and past experiences. It can be a personal heaven, hell, limbo or purgatory, with its conditions and inhabitants shifting according to your intentions. Depending on what you constructed for yourself, you may find yourself blissfully at peace or forever stuck in torment of your own making.
3724. Personal Blessing,4.2
#You possess a personal blessing, be it holy favor, divine grace, spiritual redemption or arcane enhancement. It grants you beneficial supernatural effects passively and can sometimes be extended to others. Curses and sacrilege can weaken or counter it depending on the source.
3725. Personal Curse,4.2
#You carry a personal curse of magical, divine or spiritual origin that grants you supernatural effects. These effects are often detrimental but can be weaponized and extended to others. Curse removal or blessing manipulation can strip you of the power entirely.
3726. Personal Enchantment,3.6
#You carry a personal enchantment, a magical effect woven into you by some specialized spellwork or raw exposure to magic. Its nature can be a blessing, a curse or something in between, and the source of the enchantment largely defines what you can do with it. Weak to anti-magic and dispelling effects.
3727. Personal Insulation,3.8
#Your body is a living insulator, capable of resisting the passage of energy and matter through it. Electricity, heat, sound, and radiation are shrugged off, and you can also choose to let things pass through safely when you want them to. Strong enough energies can still overwhelm your insulation.
3728. Personal Joints,2.1
#You have complete control over your own joints, able to dislocate them painlessly, increase your flexibility to contortionist levels, and extend your reach by popping limbs out of socket. Useful for escaping restraints, fitting through tight spaces, and unnerving people at parties.
3729. Personal Liminality,5.7
#You exist in a personal liminal state, perpetually between two forms of being, whether physical and spiritual, alive and dead, material and conceptual, or any other threshold. From this in-between place, you can manifest abilities completely unavailable to either of the states you border. Your exact nature determines your specific techniques.
3730. Personal Mastery,9.2
#You have complete and absolute mastery over anything and everything that relates to you. Your body, mind, soul, reality, space, time, identity, perceptions, and origin are all yours to command absolutely. Any attempt to replicate, manipulate, or attack you through your own essence backfires onto the attacker. You are the sole authority over yourself.
3731. Personal Mortality,6.3
#You have full control over your own susceptibility to life and death. You can make yourself completely unkillable when you choose, or drop the protection to become as fragile as any mortal. Useful for surviving impossible situations, though immortality negation and soul destruction bypass it entirely. Once truly dead, you may stay that way.
3732. Personal Nature,6.5
#You possess your own personal biosphere within your being, containing fauna, flora, geology, weather, and entire ecosystems. You are one with a natural environment that exists as part of you, and can draw on its lifeforms and forces at will. Often associated with living celestials or genius loci made flesh.
3733. Personal Negative-Emotion Suppression,3.2
#You can suppress or completely negate negative emotions within yourself. Fear, sadness, anger, despair, and grief do not touch you, leaving you emotionally stable in any situation. This does not make you perpetually happy, only free from the downward pull. May not always be possible to switch off.
3734. Personal Nuclear Conservation,4.6
#Your body obeys its own personal law of nuclear conservation, storing potential energy in your particles and releasing it as radiation and kinetic force whenever you want. You can channel that stored energy into attacks, reinforce your body with it, or dump it all at once in a burst. In environments devoid of radiation your reserves can run dry.
3735. Personal Physicality,5.4
#You have full control over your own physical attributes, strength, speed, durability, reflexes, endurance and so on. You can rebalance them on the fly, dumping all your stats into one trait for a moment or spreading them evenly across a fight. Your ceiling is still defined by your baseline, but within that range you are fluid.
3736. Personal Positive-Emotion Suppression,2.6
#You can suppress or outright negate positive emotions within yourself, or simply never feel them at all. Useful for resisting charm, morale effects and joy-based mental attacks, though it may not be something you can turn off once it sets in. You will never be manipulated through happiness, but you won't feel it either.
3737. Personal Pouch,2.3
#You have a marsupial-style pouch on your body that you can store things in, weapons, tools, food, whatever fits. The capacity depends on the pouch's size and its contents stay secure until you reach in for them. Just be aware the pouch and everything in it can be cut away if someone is determined enough.
3738. Personal Power Source,5.7
#You possess a personal power source that is completely idiosyncratic to you, no one else anywhere has access to it. Whether it's an outside entity, a unique object, a secret practice or something stranger, it fuels every ability you have and cannot be stolen, copied or tapped by anyone but you. A power base with no competition.
3739. Personal Soundtrack,3.6
#You have a personal soundtrack that plays in the background of your life, giving you situational intuition through its tone. Foreboding music means danger, a heroic theme means you are on the right path, goofy music means shenanigans are afoot. Others may be able to hear it too, which can complicate stealth, and your tastes shifting may force you to re-learn the cues.
3740. Personal Symbol,4.3
#You bear a personal symbol emblazoned somewhere on your body, a brand or rune that grants you extraordinary power based on its design and origin. The exact capabilities it bestows depend on the symbol itself. Altering or damaging the mark can weaken or outright cancel its effects.
3741. Perversion Empowerment,2.6
#You grow stronger, faster, and more durable fueled by perversion, whether your own or those around you. The more degenerate thoughts in the air, the more potent you become. In a room of saints you are a weakling; at a convention you are a god.
3742. Peryton Physiology,3.3
#You are or can transform into a peryton, a mythical creature that is a cross between a great stag and a bird of prey. You possess antlered flight, sharp hooves, and the unsettling trait of casting a human shadow rather than your own.
3743. Pestilence Derivation,9.3
#You are the primordial source of all pestilence, disease and plague in the cosmos. As long as you exist, sickness exists, and you hold total dominion over every affliction. Anyone near you grows sicker by the moment. You cannot escape this burden without passing it to another, and if you die, all disease everywhere ceases to be.
3744. Petrification Immunity,3.0
#You are immune to petrification and all related abilities. No gorgon stare, no stone curse, no petrifying venom can turn you to rock. Omni-absorption, power negation and immunity bypassing are your only weaknesses.
3745. Petrifying Saliva,3.5
#Your saliva causes petrification on contact. Spit, lick, or bite a target and watch them turn to stone. Range and precision depend on your spitting ability, and you only produce so much saliva per day.
3746. Petrifying Venom,3.7
#Your venom turns victims to stone. Delivered through a bite, sting, or coated weapon, the rock-casting toxin spreads from the wound outward. Poison immunity and petrification immunity are your natural counters.
3747. Phagogenesis,4.6
#You reproduce by devouring organisms, and the traits of whatever you consume are imparted onto your offspring. Eat a lion, birth something with claws. Eat a psychic, birth something with a mind. Your children are chimeras of your diet.
3748. Phasmatodea Physiology,3.2
#You are or can transform into a stick or leaf insect, either partially or fully. In this form your camouflage is nearly perfect in the right environment, you can cling to any surface, and you possess the regenerative and molting traits of phasmids. Still vulnerable to birds and bug spray.
3749. Phenomenon Embodiment,7.4
#You are the living embodiment of a phenomenon, whether a typhoon, an earthquake, an eclipse or something less tangible. You wield that force as an extension of yourself and grow in power as it manifests. You may not have full control and Phenomenon Elimination is a hard counter.
3750. Phenomenon Empowerment,6.2
#You grow stronger, faster, and more durable in the presence of phenomena, and may unlock new abilities tied to whichever anomaly you are exposed to. You can even feed on phenomena to sustain yourself and slow your aging. Deprived of observable events to draw from, you weaken.
3751. Phenomenon Power Link,6.6
#Your phenomenal nature is directly linked to your powers, with observable events fueling and amplifying whatever abilities you possess. The stronger the phenomenon you are channeling, the stronger your powers become. An unstable phenomenal state may cause your powers to run wild.
3752. Philosophy Embodiment,7.3
#You are the living embodiment of philosophy itself, the study of reality, existence, knowledge, and mind made flesh. You grow stronger when your philosophical ideals are affirmed and can unleash attacks drawn from the doctrines that define you. You must hold a genuine philosophical view to wield this.
3753. Philosophy Empowerment,6.0
#You grow stronger, faster, and more durable in the presence of philosophy, whether spoken, read, or debated. Each doctrine you encounter may unlock affinities and strengthen your existing powers. You can even draw sustenance from philosophical discourse, but in a world devoid of ideas you wither.
3754. Phocidae Physiology,2.8
#You are or can transform into a true seal, such as an elephant seal, leopard seal or hooded seal. You are an incredible swimmer with blubber insulation, crushing jaws, and excellent diving lungs, but you are noticeably clumsy on land.
3755. Phoenix Dragon Physiology,7.5
#You are or can transform into a Phoenix Dragon, a hybrid of two of the most prominent mythical beasts. You possess the ferocity, scales and destructive breath of a dragon alongside the regal grace, rebirth and holy fire of a phoenix. Only someone with both Phoenix Slayer and Dragon Slayer capabilities can truly kill you.
3756. Phone Mimicry,2.0
#You are or can transform your body into a phone or phones, keeping all your organs and anatomy intact but made entirely of phone parts. In homogeneous form you are just phone. Vulnerable to water, EMPs, and microwave manipulation.
3757. Phorusrhacidae Physiology,3.4
#You are or can transform into a phorusrhacid, the extinct South American 'terror bird'. You gain a massive hooked beak capable of shattering bone, powerful running legs, and the predatory instincts of an apex flightless killer that once ruled a continent.
3758. Photo-Negative Mimicry,2.1
#You are or can transform into a photo-negative version of yourself, seeing the world in inverted colours and existing as an eerie negative image. Unsettling to look at and surprisingly hard to perceive in low light for those without enhanced senses.
3759. Photographic Appearance,2.7
#You are only visible in photographs and film, invisible to the naked eye and every other sensory medium. A trait normally associated with ghosts and darker spirits, and unnerving once someone flips through their vacation photos and finds you in every shot.
3760. Photographic Existence,3.1
#You exist only within photographs, drifting from one to another and appearing in the backgrounds of pictures as a hidden figure. As soon as a photo is taken anywhere, you can apply yourself into it, lurking in an alleyway or shadowed doorway. You cannot directly interact with the world outside of still images.
3761. Photokinetically Enhanced Condition,4.1
#Your body is constantly stimulated by ambient light radiance, dramatically amplifying your physical and mental attributes. You jump further, react faster, and think quicker the more light you are bathed in. Light absorption or negation powers can cut you down to size.
3762. Photosynthetic Blood,3.5
#Your blood is photosynthetic, granting you plantlike traits. You can sustain yourself by simply standing in the sun, heal faster under direct light, and gain minor affinities with plant life. Prolonged sun blocking will weaken you or even kill you.
3763. Physical Force Adaptation,4.0
#Your body adapts to any physical force that acts on it, whether pushing, pulling, crushing, or friction. Given time you can walk unharmed through gale winds, deep pressure, or powerful impacts, your body shifting to handle forces that would normally kill you.
3764. Physical Force Embodiment,7.4
#You are the living embodiment of physical forces themselves, the walking personification of deformation, friction, inertia, and motion. You do not simply use forces, you are them, and manipulating them is as natural as breathing. May be limited to embodying a specific force rather than all of them.
3765. Physical Force Empowerment,4.3
#You become stronger, faster and more durable when in contact with physical forces. Standing in strong winds, heavy gravity or high-kinetic environments empowers you instead of hindering you, and you can draw sustenance from raw force to slow your aging.
3766. Physical Force Immunity,5.4
#You are unaffected by physical forces, gravity cannot pin you, pressure cannot crush you, and acceleration cannot tear your body apart. You may still feel pain from them, and supernatural forces like magic can still affect you.
3767. Physical Force Mimicry,5.7
#Your body is made of or can transform into raw physical force, whether kinetic, gravitational, or magnetic in nature. In this form you retain anatomy but gain the properties of the force you embody, granting immense offensive and defensive utility.
3768. Physical Force Power Link,4.3
#Your powers are fueled and channeled through your own physical force, the harder you move, strike, or exert yourself, the stronger your abilities become. Requires a certain mental state to maintain the link and can destabilize if your force output is erratic.
3769. Physical Force Symbiosis,5.3
#You are symbiotically bonded to a physical force entity, an embodiment of gravity, kinetics, or some fundamental interaction. The bond grants potent force-based abilities, but the entity may try to assert control over your body, and powerful forces channeled through you can tear your flesh apart.
3770. Physical Godhood,9.3
#You possess every scientific power imaginable, wielding nigh-omnipotence over matter, energy, forces, and particles from the subatomic to the galactic scale. You can reshape the upscale structure of anything in the universe and beyond, though you have the potential for godhood and not yet the experience to execute all of it flawlessly. Supernatural and magical forces may give you trouble.
3771. Physical Law Adaptation,5.6
#Your body and powers automatically adapt to whatever physical laws govern your surroundings, allowing you to function normally even in universes where gravity flows sideways or light moves at walking speed. Adaptation may have a ceiling depending on how alien the laws are.
3772. Physical Law Immunity,7.8
#You are unaffected by the physical laws of the universe, space-time, matter, fundamental forces, chemistry, and particle behavior all fail to bind you. You exist as an exception in the equation of reality, though immunity-bypassing abilities and Almighty Law Creation can override this.
3773. Physics Independence,6.8
#You are able to operate without physics of any kind, functioning with no need for gravity, electricity, inertia, friction, time, space, or even the mathematics underlying them. You simply continue to exist and act regardless of whether the rules that govern everything else apply to you.
3774. Physics Powered Physiology,5.6
#Your body is composed of and powered by scientific forces, your flesh replaced with a quasi-physical form of manipulated energies and forces that you can shape and command. Your physiology itself is an expression of physics in motion.
3775. Physics Retention,6.0
#Your personal physics and physical laws remain with you no matter what. If someone rewrites the laws of your universe or you travel to a realm where physics works differently, your own laws continue to apply to you and you alone. You may be unable to use the altered physics around you even if you wanted to.
3776. Piñata Mimicry,1.4
#You either are or can transform into a papier-mâché piñata stuffed with candy. Fragile as you'd expect, one good whack and you're confetti. At least whoever broke you gets a treat.
3777. Piano Mimicry,1.1
#You either are or can transform into a piano. In this form you can still be played, but good luck moving anywhere on your own.
3778. Piciform Physiology,2.3
#You possess the traits of piciformes, gaining the abilities of woodpeckers and their kin. Your skull can absorb incredible impacts without concussion, your beak-equivalent can drill into hardwood, and your tongue can extend absurdly far to snatch prey.
3779. Picolaton Physiology,2.9
#You either are or can mimic a Picolaton, a folkloric bogeyman bird that hunts misbehaving and lazy children, pecking at their heels to force them to work. You can carry victims back to your thorn-bush nest but tend towards scaring rather than killing. Mortal despite your magic, skilled hunters can put you down.
3780. Pie Mimicry,2.0
#Your body is completely made of pie. You can keep your normal anatomy with all its organs (and corresponding vulnerabilities) or shift into homogeneous pie matter where no part is more vital than any other. Watch out for anything that induces rot.
3781. Piercing Immunity,3.8
#You are completely immune to damage from piercing attacks. Stabs, impalements, bullets, arrows, nothing that relies on puncturing can hurt you. Absolute piercing, dimensional piercing and phase stabbing can still get through.
3782. Pijavica Physiology,4.1
#Slovenian Folklore - You are a Pijavica, a vampire born from the souls of the most sinful dead. You stalk the night draining blood, often compelled to return to torment your own living relatives. Crushed garlic and wine keep you out of homes, sunlight keeps you in the grave, and only fire or a proper exorcism at your resting place can truly end you.
3783. Pika Physiology,1.8
#You either are or can transform into a pika, the small mountain-dwelling lagomorph. You gain their cold tolerance, agility across rocky terrain and their habit of hoarding food for winter. Mostly adorable, occasionally useful.
3784. Pillow Mimicry,1.3
#You either are or can transform into a pillow. Comfy, unassuming, and completely unable to do anything until someone picks you up.
3785. Pillywiggin Physiology,3.3
#You either are or can transform into a pillywiggin, a tiny butterfly or dragonfly-winged fairy that tends to flowers. You gain fey magic tied to plants and growth, but like all fairies you are weak to iron and other anti-fey materials.
3786. Pilot Imitation,3.0
#You are a mechanical being, usually a mecha, capable of learning and mimicking the movements and techniques of a pilot, controller or bonded partner. Mimicry is not instantaneous and you must be able to sense what you are copying, so anything they do out of your perception is lost to you.
3787. Pincer Claws,2.4
#You possess large pincer-like claws similar to those of crabs, lobsters or scorpions, capable of crushing with terrifying force. Fine manipulation is basically impossible with them though, so hope you have another set of hands for buttons and zippers.
3788. Pinnacle Body,6.5
#Your body is at its absolute apex, every muscle fiber, bone, organ and cell perfected to the utmost limit of your natural potential. You possess idealized strength, speed, beauty, endurance and reflexes, your body responding perfectly to your every desire. Still outmatched by truly absolute physiologies but peerless among natural forms.
3789. Pinnacle Condition,7.0
#Your physical, spiritual and mental condition is at its absolute peak, every essential attribute of your being perfected beyond any natural limit. Body, soul and mind respond instantly and flawlessly to your will, placing you above any other natural form. Still measurable and thus outmatched by true Absolute Condition.
3790. Pinnacle Mind,6.6
#Your mind is at its absolute apex, your intellect, memory, creativity, willpower and emotional control all perfected to their ultimate form. You can process immense amounts of information, hold perfect recall and shrug off most mental attacks with ease. Still bound by your natural potential but unrivalled among mortal minds.
3791. Pinnipediaoid Physiology,2.5
#You are a pinnipediaoid, a humanoid seal-folk or walrus-folk hybrid. You possess the aquatic prowess and blubber of a pinniped combined with a humanoid frame and dexterity, thriving in both sea and coast.
3792. Plains Adaptation,3.0
#You are perfectly adapted to life on wide open plains, be they tundra, savannah, prairie or steppe. You have sharp senses, exceptional vision, powerful endurance and a natural tolerance for harsh weather, wildfires and the lack of cover.
3793. Planar Dragon Physiology,6.6
#You are or can transform into a planar dragon, a draconic being hailing from one or more planes of existence. In addition to standard dragon traits, you gain a suite of plane-specific abilities drawn from your home plane, placing you well above ordinary dragonkind. You may struggle to survive too long outside your home plane.
3794. Planar Entity Physiology,5.2
#You either are or can mimic the traits of a planar entity, a being native to one of the various planes of existence. Your abilities and characteristics depend on which plane you hail from, ranging from elemental to spiritual to purely conceptual.
3795. Plane Physiology,8.6
#You are a plane of existence itself, possessing total authority over your own dimensions, borders, entrances and exits. You can spawn life from yourself as emissaries, reshape your interior at will, and only cease to exist if your entire realm is destroyed. You are, in the most literal sense, a living universe.
3796. Planet Mimicry,7.0
#You are made of or can transform your body into an entire planet, retaining your form or becoming a homogeneous mass of planetary matter. You can manipulate the elements and lifeforms within you, control your gravity field, and move through space under your own power. Your core, however, remains vulnerable to sufficiently powerful energy attacks.
3797. Planet Monster Physiology,7.3
#You are or can become a planet monster, a living world-sized monstrosity with access to a suite of planet-based supernatural abilities. You are as much a celestial body as a creature, and equally hard to kill.
3798. Planetary Adaptation,3.8
#Your body automatically adapts to the atmosphere, gravity, temperature, composition, and rotational speed of any planet you find yourself on. You can walk Venus or Jupiter as comfortably as Earth.
3799. Planetary Embodiment,8.6
#You are the planet, and the planet is you. Every tectonic plate, every ocean current, every creature walking on its surface is an extension of your being, and you have limitless control over all of it. Harming the planet harms you, but harming you is nearly impossible when your body is a world.
3800. Planetary Immunity,5.0
#You are completely immune to planetary energy and planets themselves. Being buried alive, crushed by tectonic forces, or pelted by a world-shattering blast means nothing to you, although extreme levels may still leak through.
3801. Planetary Independence,4.5
#You don't need a planet to survive. The vacuum of space, the surface of a star, a bare asteroid - all of them are as comfortable to you as Earth. You may still need to eat, sleep and drink though.
3802. Planetary Symbiosis,6.0
#You share a symbiotic relationship with a planet or planetary body, drawing energy and supernatural abilities from its essence while both of you share in each other's fate. A sentient world may try to take over your mind, and harming the planet harms you, but the power on offer is world-tier.
3803. Planimal Physiology,4.3
#You are a planimal, a hybrid creature combining the traits of plants and animals, with all the strengths of both kingdoms in one body. Your plant side is vulnerable to fire and herbicides and takes painfully long to regrow if damaged, but your animal side keeps you mobile and hunting.
3804. Plankton Physiology,2.1
#You either are or can transform into plankton, ranging from phytoplankton to zooplankton and fungal variants. Useful for scouting water in microscopic form or hiding from anything larger than a copepod, but you'll need to stay moisturized on land and swimming is largely at the mercy of currents.
3805. Plant Arm,2.3
#Your arm is, or can transform into, a plant. You can reshape it into vines, thorns, branches or flowering limbs, granting reach and utility. Still vulnerable to fire, herbicide, and the usual plant weaknesses.
3806. Plant Empowerment,3.8
#You become stronger, faster, and more durable when in contact with plants, and may unlock new plant-related abilities depending on the flora you touch. Some users can even draw sustenance from plants and slow their aging in lush environments.
3807. Plant Kingdom Embodiment,6.6
#You are the living embodiment of the plant kingdom itself, a manifestation of the natural forces of green life. You can feed on plant energy to extend your own lifespan and weaponize it, may never age, and can only be killed under specific conditions. Death-based abilities remain your only true threat.
3808. Plant Monster Physiology,4.2
#You either are or can transform into a plant monster, a hulking botanical horror with a suite of plant-based supernatural powers. Brings raw physical might and terrifying presence, along with the usual vulnerabilities to fire, chemicals, and sharp blades.
3809. Mutated Plant Physiology,5.4
#You are or can transform into a feral, mutated plant being. Your form is twisted and dangerous, granting you warped plant powers and a monstrous physique, but the mutations bleed into your mind, making restraint difficult when transformed.
3810. Superior Plant Physiology,5.6
#You are or can transform into a superplant, a plant several times stronger than any normal specimen. Hybrid forms allow you to retain humanoid traits while gaining thick bark, potent toxins, and enhanced regeneration. Barren environments weaken you considerably.
3811. Transcendent Plant Physiology,7.8
#You are or can become a divine plant, a tree-god of the heavenly realm. Your bark shrugs off mortal weapons, your roots drink from higher planes, and your presence alone causes flora to bloom in reverence. Only transcendent weaponry and divine slayers pose real threats.
3812. Plant Physiology,4.2
#Your body is made of or can transform into plant matter. You gain photosynthesis, regeneration from sunlight and water, and can reshape your limbs into vines or wooden armor. Fire is your bane, and heavy transformations may slow you down.
3813. Plant Power Link,3.6
#Your powers are fueled and amplified by your connection to plant life. The more verdant your surroundings, the stronger and more refined all of your abilities become. In a barren wasteland, you are significantly weaker.
3814. Plant Protrusion,2.1
#You have plant matter perpetually protruding from your body, whether that be flowering vines from your shoulders, moss on your back, or branches from your head. Mostly aesthetic, though you can snap off pieces for minor utility.
3815. Plant Soul,3.0
#Your soul is plant-like in origin. You photosynthesize passively, feel the rhythms of the natural world, and plants react to your emotions. With training, you can slowly transform your body to match your spiritual nature.
3816. Plant Symbiosis,4.5
#You host a living plant symbiote inside your body, granting you photosynthesis, regeneration, and shapeshifting in exchange for giving it a home. A strong-willed symbiote may try to influence your decisions, and its weaknesses become yours.
3817. Plant Trail,2.6
#Wherever you walk, plants sprout in your wake. Grass grows under your footsteps, flowers bloom along your path, and entire forests can trace your journey. Great for aesthetics and navigation, mildly annoying for landlords.
3818. Plasma Empowerment,3.5
#Your body grows stronger, faster, and more durable when exposed to plasma. Standing near a reactor, a star, or a lightning storm unlocks latent abilities and amplifies your existing powers. You can even draw sustenance from plasma sources.
3819. Plasma Movement,3.3
#You can move through plasma unhindered, walking or flying through ionized clouds, stellar atmospheres or the heart of a sun as if you were strolling on land. Does not grant immunity to the heat or radiation of the medium itself, so survival still depends on other protections.
3820. Plasma Quintessence,6.2
#Your body generates plasma infinitely and indeterminately, no longer reliant on external sources. This limitless ionic energy can power your body to superhuman levels, fuel any plasma ability you possess or energize machines and technology, though channeling too much at once can overwhelm your mind and body.
3821. Platypus Physiology,2.6
#Allows you to gain the traits of a platypus, either partially or fully. You gain electroreception through your snout, venomous spurs on your heels, webbed limbs for swimming and a dense waterproof pelt. Surprisingly well-rounded for such a goofy animal.
3822. Pleaidian Physiology,5.4
#You are a Pleiadian, one of the so-called Space Brothers, a benevolent Nordic alien with striking human-like features. You possess advanced spiritual and technological knowledge, minor shapeshifting, telepathic affinity and a naturally calming presence. Mortal but significantly beyond baseline human.
3823. Pleasant Scent,1.4
#Your body naturally produces an incredibly pleasant and irresistible scent that permeates everything about you. Your breath is perpetually fresh, your skin softly perfumed and your hair smells of whatever note best suits your aura. People instinctively feel drawn and at ease around you.
3824. Pleasure Immunity,2.8
#You are completely immune to pleasure-based attacks, inducements and effects. Charm spells, euphoria inducement, ecstasy weapons and similar tactics simply do not register, leaving your mind clear in situations that would leave others helpless and giggling.
3825. Pleiades Physiology,6.3
#You are one of the Pleiades, celestial nymphs and minor goddesses presiding over stars, constellations, rain and the mountains. You wield stellar energies, can call upon storms and rainfall, and possess the divine physiology and longevity of a minor goddess of the night sky.
3826. Plot Anchoring,7.3
#You are a fixed point in the narrative. No plot-altering ability can change your story, your life or your place within it, making you immune to retcons, timeline rewrites and narrative manipulation alike. Author Authority and immunity bypassing are the only things that can still touch you.
3827. Plot Armor,7.0
#You possess plot armor, ensuring you will survive deadly situations and come out on top simply because the story demands it. No matter how overwhelming the enemy or how perfect their plan, you endure because you are one of the main characters. Plot Negation and Author Authority override it.
3828. Pocong Physiology,3.8
#Indonesian Folklore - You are a pocong, a ghost born from a soul trapped in its burial shroud. You hop rather than walk, inspire dread in mortals who see you, and possess standard ghostly intangibility and presence. Usually neutral, but will exist for only forty days unless your body is freed from its bindings.
3829. Poetry Embodiment,5.4
#You are the embodiment of poetry itself. Your words carry rhythm, meter and meaning beyond their surface, able to stir emotions, sway hearts, and evoke concepts simply by speaking verse. In a world that values poetry, your presence alone can inspire movements or break spirits. Useless against those who cannot appreciate poetry.
3830. Poison Consumption,2.6
#Your diet consists of poisonous food and substances, rendering you fully immune to whatever you eat. Over time, constant consumption may cause your own flesh and fluids to become toxic to others. Breakfast of champions.
3831. Poison Embodiment,6.5
#You are the embodiment of poison itself. Corruption and toxicity spread wherever you walk, your body generates entirely new poisons on instinct, and because your venom is conceptual in nature, you can poison things that should be immune to poisons - constructs, undead, even concepts themselves.
3832. Poison Immunity,3.2
#You are immune to all forms of poison, toxin and venom. You could drink cyanide like water, let a king cobra bite your tongue, or eat pufferfish without a license. Esoteric and conceptual poisons may still affect you.
3833. Poison Mimicry,5.0
#Your body is made of poison or can transform into it completely. In your liquid form you are nearly impossible to harm with physical attacks, and every droplet of you is lethal to the touch. Some users struggle to return to their original body once they've tasted the change.
3834. Poison Resistance,2.3
#You are highly resistant to poisons, toxins and venoms. You can survive direct exposure to most toxic substances and walk through poisonous environments without suffering serious effects.
3835. Poison Symbiosis,4.6
#You host a poisonous symbiote within your body, granting you envenomation, chemical manipulation, minor shapeshifting, and a more durable physique. The symbiote wants to keep you alive but may try to take the wheel if you falter.
3836. Poison Touch,3.5
#Your touch is poisonous, passing toxins directly into anything your skin contacts. With training you can control the dosage and type, but unfiltered use may hurt you and anyone you care about just as easily.
3837. Poisonous Biology,4.0
#Your entire biology is imbued with venomous properties, making you lethal to the touch and immune to your own poisons. Your blood, breath and flesh are all weapons, and you can unleash them at will.
3838. Poisonous Blood,3.2
#Your blood is saturated with potent poisons that harm anyone who touches or inhales it. Useful as a final trump card in close combat, but any cut you suffer becomes a hazard to your allies as well.
3839. Poisonous Bodily Fluids,3.4
#All of your bodily fluids, from blood and saliva to sweat, mucus and urine, carry poisonous properties. Useful for creative improvisation in desperate situations, though maintaining the toxicity may require a specific diet.
3840. Poisonous Mucus,2.0
#Your mucus is poisonous. Sneeze on your enemies, I guess.
3841. Poisonous Saliva,2.3
#Your saliva is poisonous, turning every bite and spit into a potential attack. Limited by how much you can produce at a time, but a surprisingly effective trump card in a clinch.
3842. Poisonous Tears,2.3
#Your tears are poisonous, dripping with toxins that burn anyone they touch. Useful if you can cry on command, useless if you cannot.
3843. Polar Bear Physiology,3.4
#You are, or can transform into, a polar bear. Your massive frame grants you incredible strength, durability and resistance to cold, and you are just as comfortable swimming through arctic waters as you are tearing apart a seal on the ice.
3844. Polearm Mimicry,3.3
#You can transform your body, partially or fully, into a polearm or a mass of polearms. Depending on the material you are made of, your durability and abilities vary, and some may find returning to flesh requires practice.
3845. Police Car Mimicry,2.1
#You can transform your body partially or fully into a police car or mass of police cars. Sirens, lights and all. Still needs fuel to move, and getting pulled over by yourself is a genuine risk.
3846. Political Embodiment,6.2
#You are the living embodiment of a political ideology, your very existence shaping the way power is allocated and societies are ordered around you. The more followers and believers your ideology has, the stronger you become, but the more enemies it has, the more people there are to oppose you.
3847. Pollo Maligno Physiology,4.5
#Colombian Folklore - You are a Pollo Maligno, an evil chicken-spirit that haunts lonely roads. You can mimic voices to distract and madden travelers, attack with razor beak and claw, and you particularly despise card players, jokers and drinkers. Vulnerable to divine prayers, especially those invoking Saint Miguel.
3848. Pollution Embodiment,7.3
#You are the embodiment of Pollution itself, the walking personification of smog, sludge, crude oil and every toxic byproduct of industry. Your control over all forms of pollution is near-limitless, and your mere presence slowly contaminates everything around you.
3849. Pollution Empowerment,3.8
#You grow stronger, faster and more durable in the presence of pollution, drawing power from smog, sludge, and contamination of every kind. In a pristine forest you are merely human, but in a choking industrial district you are a monster.
3850. Pollution Mimicry,3.9
#Your body is made of or can transform into pollution, letting you become living sludge, smog or crude oil at will. Returning to your original form takes practice, and some users find themselves stuck as walking contamination forever.
3851. Poltergeist Physiology,4.4
#You are or can become a poltergeist, an invisible noisy spirit that haunts people rather than places. You can throw objects with unseen hands, rap on walls, whisper in voices, and deliver petty physical attacks. Ignoring you only makes you angrier and more violent.
3852. Popcorn Mimicry,1.0
#Your body is made of popcorn, or you can transform into popcorn at will. You are fluffy, crunchy, and entirely edible. Try not to get eaten.
3853. Popobawa Physiology,3.3
#You are or can transform into a Popobawa, a one-eyed bat-winged shapeshifting spirit from Swahili folklore. You gain enhanced physical abilities, poltergeist-like powers and the ability to shift between bat, human and hybrid forms. Warning: the form comes with strong antisocial and predatory urges that you will need to actively resist.
3854. Pork Mimicry,1.0
#Your body is made of pork, or you can transform into pork at will. With focus you can even become a finished pork dish. Edible, delicious, and probably ill-advised to use near hungry predators.
3855. Portal Empowerment,4.8
#You draw strength, speed, durability and sustenance from portals, possibly slowing or halting your aging when in proximity to one. Nearby gateways enhance your other abilities, but in a portal-dead zone you will be noticeably weaker.
3856. Portal Mimicry,5.2
#Your body is a living portal to another place, time or dimension. You can teleport to that destination, draw people into yourself, or expel objects and environmental effects of the other side through your form. Portal Negation can harm you directly.
3857. Portuguese Legend Physiology,4.6
#You are or can transform into a figure from Portuguese folklore, ranging from restless ghosts and divinely-rewarded heroes to titans like Adamastor. The exact power depends on which legend you embody, but all are wrapped in the fears and triumphs of seafaring myth. None of these beings are omnipotent.
3858. Positional Adaptation,3.3
#Your body adapts instantly to any position you end up in. Balance, flexibility, dexterity, no position is uncomfortable or awkward for you and you can move freely even in contorted or painful stances. You can fight, run, and function just as well hanging upside down as standing upright.
3859. Positive Embodiment,6.5
#You are the living embodiment of positivity. You channel every positive aspect of the world through yourself, manipulate positive emotions in others, and can even produce life from pure joy. However, if you give in to sad or negative thoughts, your power diminishes sharply until you find your smile again.
3860. Positive Emotion Empowerment,4.0
#You grow stronger, faster and more durable when surrounded by or feeling positive emotions such as love, hope, joy and generosity. Strong enough positivity can slow or halt your aging and unlock latent abilities. Negative emotions drain you and may leave you weaker than a regular person.
3861. Positivity Empowerment,4.7
#You grow stronger, faster and more durable from any form of positivity, including emotions, concepts, ideas, dreams and positive powers from oneself or others. Sufficient exposure can unlock new abilities and even halt your aging. The more positivity in the air, the stronger you become.
3862. Possession Immunity,3.8
#You are immune to possession, whether demonic, angelic, telepathic or spiritual. No entity, no matter how powerful, can enter your body and take control. May only cover certain types of possession depending on the source of your immunity, and as a tradeoff you cannot enter symbiotic bonds either.
3863. Possum Physiology,1.4
#You are or can transform into a possum, with all the traits that come with it. Playing dead has never been more convincing, and you get a prehensile tail out of the deal.
3864. Posterior Mimicry,0.3
#You are, or can become, a living butt. You possess all the traits of a rear end. Vulnerable to Rear Manipulation, for what that's worth.
3865. Potential Energy Empowerment,3.3
#Contact with potential energy makes you stronger, faster and tougher, unlocking related abilities and amplifying existing ones. At higher levels you can feed on it as sustenance and even slow your aging.
3866. Absolute Potential,9.3
#You have absolute potential, a limitless capacity for growth and learning. There is nothing you cannot master, no power you cannot develop naturally, no skill beyond your reach. Given enough time, there is no feat, no ability, no state of being you cannot achieve. Your only limits are those you impose on yourself.
3867. Enhanced Potential,3.6
#Your capacity for growth and learning is noticeably above the norm of your species. You pick up skills faster, push past plateaus others can't, and develop abilities that would be impossible for a regular person. You still need to actually put in the work though.
3868. Supernatural Potential,5.7
#Your innate potential transcends the natural limits of your species, allowing you to develop physically, mentally, spiritually and existentially in ways that should be impossible. You can learn skills, techniques and powers that your kind was never meant to wield, assimilating the impossible through sheer capacity for growth.
3869. Peak Potential,2.7
#Your potential is pushed to the highest limits of human perfection. You learn faster, train more efficiently and develop more easily than almost anyone, but you are still bound within the human ceiling. Capable of matching any peak human if you put the work in.
3870. Potion Empowerment,3.0
#You grow stronger, faster and tougher when in contact with potions, drawing power directly from magical concoctions. Prolonged exposure may even slow your aging or sustain you without food, turning the alchemist's shelf into your personal gym.
3871. Potion Immunity,2.6
#You are immune to the effects of all magical potions, elixirs and enchanted beverages. Unfortunately, this includes beneficial potions, so no more healing draughts or buff brews for you either.
3872. Poultry Mimicry,2.0
#Your body is made of or can transform completely into poultry; chicken, turkey, goose, your choice. With focus you can even become specific poultry dishes like roast turkey or fried chicken. You may become edible and attract hungry predators.
3873. Power Abdomen,2.1
#Your abdomen is abnormally strong, physically unique, or weaponized in some way, whether through claws, blades, projectiles or armor plating. Lets you fight with your gut in ways most people really can't.
3874. Power Absorption Immunity,4.5
#Your powers cannot be absorbed, drained or stolen by any means. Your abilities are singular to you and no power thief, energy drainer, or absorption mimic can pull them from you. Your life force is still fair game though, so be careful with vampires.
3875. Power Acquirement,6.2
#You can gain supernatural powers through your own efforts, developing any ability through sufficient practice and training. The more you work at it, the more powers you add to your arsenal, and existing powers grow stronger and deeper the longer you cultivate them. Given enough time, there is no real ceiling on what you can collect.
3876. Power Arms,2.8
#Your arms and upper body are abnormally strong or weaponized in some way, whether that be claws, blades, armor plating, or built-in projectile weaponry. Great for close combat but excessive use can strain your arms badly.
3877. Power Body,2.9
#Your entire body is a weapon, possessing great strength and speed that lets you deliver body slams and tackles capable of knocking people out and breaking through structures. Repeated use without proper physical conditioning may fracture your own bones.
3878. Power Bond,4.7
#You possess a profound connection between yourself and your powers that goes beyond mere control. This bond lets you synchronize with your abilities on an instinctive level, drawing far more out of them than their original scope would allow, whether they originate from an object, innate talent, or supernatural source.
3879. Power Catalyst,4.5
#You possess a finely tuned internal catalyst that unlocks and cultivates powers from within. Rather than being given abilities directly, your catalyst develops unique powers in response to external stimuli and training. Loss of the catalyst may remove your powers entirely.
3880. Power Cord Protrusion,2.1
#You have power cords that protrude from your body and can be plugged into any electrical outlet or suitable source to draw energy. Handy if you happen to run on electricity, deeply awkward if you do not.
3881. Power Elbow,1.6
#Your elbows are abnormally strong, sharp, or otherwise weaponized, making them remarkably effective in close combat. Niche, but unforgettable when landed.
3882. Power Embodiment,9.3
#You are the embodiment of power itself, an incarnation of might and force, a living example of exerting might unquestionably beyond others. You have free access to nearly all superpowers and can manipulate the superpowers of others with almost no limit, drawing out force far beyond mortal comprehension.
3883. Power Empowerment,5.8
#You become more powerful from the mere presence of others with powers, growing stronger, faster, and more durable the more of them are nearby. At high levels you may draw sustenance from their abilities and even slow or halt your own ageing. Being surrounded by too many powered individuals at once may overload you.
3884. Power Finger,1.4
#Your fingers are abnormally strong, sharp or weaponized in some way, giving you a surprising edge in any situation where poking, flicking, or jabbing is the answer. Extremely niche.
3885. Power Ignoring,7.6
#Any and all powers simply ignore you, treating you as if you weren't there. You avoid damage not by defending against attacks but by not existing as a valid target in the first place, whether the attack comes from psionics, magic, or anything else. Indirect effects and area fields may still bypass this.
3886. Power Legs,2.8
#Your legs and lower body are abnormally strong or weaponized, whether with claws, blades, armor or built-in projectile weaponry. Anyone who underestimates your kicks is in for a bad time, though excessive use may strain your legs badly.
3887. Power Level Infinitum,8.5
#Your power level increases over time, forever, with no ceiling whatsoever. Given enough time, you can eventually perform any feat imaginable as your abilities creep toward true limitlessness. Conditional triggers may govern how fast you grow, and Infinity Negation is one of the few things that can meaningfully counter you.
3888. Power Mimicry Immunity,5.2
#Your powers cannot be copied, mimicked, or replicated by any conventional means. Anyone who tries to scan, learn, or duplicate your abilities will simply fail, their power slipping off yours like water off glass. Absorption-type abilities and almighty replication can still bypass this.
3889. Power Napping,2.2
#Your sleep is hyper-efficient, a few minutes of rest giving you the same recovery as a full night's sleep for a regular person. You can even micro-nap while standing, walking or doing repetitive tasks. Your body's natural healing is also amplified while you rest.
3890. Power Nexus,7.8
#You are a nexus, a focal point through which all supernatural powers across the omniverse converge. Dormant by default, the nexus within you slowly awakens over time, granting you access to a vast and ever-growing collection of powers drawn from across existence. The downside is that your existence can unknowingly act as a beacon, drawing the attention of horrors from beyond.
3891. Power Omnipresence,8.6
#You exist simultaneously everywhere a particular power is used, manifests, or resides. Whatever domain you choose, be it fire, telepathy, or even the concept of power itself, you are present wherever that power exists across all of reality. Only true omnipresential attacks can reach you.
3892. Power Omniscience,8.8
#You know everything about every power that has ever existed, currently exists, or will ever exist. Every technique, every limitation, every user, every method of acquisition, all laid bare before your mind. Knowing how a power works, however, is not the same as being strong enough to actually wield it.
3893. Power Palm,2.6
#Your palms are supernaturally strong and serve as release points for whatever power you channel through them. Palm strikes hit harder, energy-based abilities flow cleaner through your hands, and techniques that require palm contact are far more effective. Useless if you lose the use of your hands.
3894. Power Regeneration,5.4
#Your powers regenerate from any damage done to them. Whether diluted, devolved, negated, erased or simply burned out from overuse, they will always return to optimal condition in time. Complete destruction of a power, however, may be beyond what this regeneration can fix.
3895. Power Regulation,3.1
#You have perfect fine control over your powers, allowing you to regulate their output with surgical precision. A super-strong user could cradle a baby without crushing it, a pyrokinetic could light a candle without burning the wick. Essentially removes the risk of hurting yourself or others by accident.
3896. Power Residuum,5.5
#Every power you have ever possessed leaves a residual imprint in your body, mind and soul, even after the power itself is removed, sealed or stolen. These residues act as limited internal reserves, letting you still use faint echoes of lost abilities. You will never be as strong as you once were, but you are never truly powerless either.
3897. Power Retention,4.9
#Your powers remain yours no matter where you go or what reality you step into. Dimensions with altered physics, worlds with different probability laws, realms where magic does not exist — none of it affects your abilities. Superpower manipulators who directly target your powers, however, can still mess with you.
3898. Power Source,3.2
#You possess a singular power source nestled within your being, the bedrock from which all of your extraordinary abilities flow. It may be an ethereal element, an otherworldly substance, or a conduit to something external. Destroying or stealing the source renders you powerless.
3899. Power Symbiosis,6.6
#You share a symbiotic bond with a being of pure supernatural force, gaining control over extraordinary faculties related to raw power. The entity grants you immense abilities, but it may also try to take over your mind or body, and the power it wields can be dangerous even to you.
3900. Power Tail,2.6
#You possess a tail that is either abnormally strong, physically unique, or weaponized in some way to increase your combat performance. It might be tipped with a blade, covered in spines, or simply strong enough to crush stone. Excessive use can strain the tail.
3901. Power Tentacles,3.3
#You possess tentacles that are abnormally strong or weaponized with claws, blades, projectile weaponry or protective armor. These limbs act as an extension of your body in combat, granting you reach, grip and raw force that normal appendages cannot match.
3902. Power Via Blood,4.3
#Your blood possesses mystical, cosmic or otherwise special properties that grant you powers based on its nature. Flammable blood gives pyrokinesis, acidic blood gives acid manipulation, healing blood grants regeneration, and so on. The nature of your powers is determined entirely by what flows through your veins.
3903. Power-Bolstering DNA,5.2
#Your DNA possesses the ability to embolden the natural powers of others, making empowered individuals significantly stronger than they were before. Overextending your genetic signature risks overloading hosts or painfully burning out your own DNA, and you may not be able to augment your own abilities.
3904. Power-Boosting Blood,5.0
#Your blood possesses the ability to enhance the powers of others, typically requiring a transfusion to take effect. Subjects become dramatically stronger, but over-dosage can result in delirium, power overload, or in rare cases death. Whether you can enhance yourself depends on your physiology.
3905. Power-Erasing DNA,5.8
#Your DNA possesses the ability to strip the powers from others, normalizing the empowered back into ordinary beings. Excessive use destabilizes your own physiology and can cause severe physical debilitation, and you may accidentally negate your own erasure ability in the process.
3906. Power-Granting Blood,5.3
#Your blood possesses the ability to bestow superpowers upon those who have none. Some recipients gain abilities similar to your own, while others develop entirely different ones. By rationality it must require a blood transfusion, and whether you can grant yourself new powers is uncertain.
3907. Power-Granting DNA,5.4
#Your DNA possesses the ability to bestow superpowers upon those who have none, with some recipients gaining abilities similar to yours while others develop entirely new ones. In skilled hands, your DNA can be extracted and refined into serums specifically designed for power bestowal.
3909. Prayer Empowerment,4.6
#You grow stronger, faster and more durable from the prayers of others, and devoted worship may even unlock new abilities or slow your aging. A single zealot could fuel modest enhancements, but a city of believers could turn you into something approaching a deity. Lose your congregation and you lose your edge.
3910. Precise Activity,4.5
#You can move, act, and perform any manual task with perfect precision, no matter how fast you or your target is moving or how small the object is. Hasty, sudden motions come off as if they were gradual and careful. Mistakes are practically impossible for you.
3911. Enhanced Precision,3.3
#The area of your brain dedicated to precision is drastically improved, allowing you to slice, cut, and stab flawlessly at close range. Unlike Enhanced Accuracy which handles ranged weapons, this is pure melee precision, hitting the exact spot on a target at the most opportune moment. Still limited to the natural realm.
3912. Supernatural Precision,5.7
#Your precision is pushed far beyond the natural level, allowing you to slice, cut and stab targets that are moving faster than light with 100% lethality. You never lose concentration or track of your target, always hitting exactly the vital points you aim for. Beings with absolute agility may still be out of your reach.
3913. Precision,2.2
#Your brain is hardwired for precision beyond that of the best surgeon, letting you slice, cut, and stab with exceptional accuracy. With a blade in hand, you can find every vital point on an opponent. Peak human, but no more than that.
3914. Precognitive Immunity,5.2
#You are completely immune to all forms of precognition, meaning no precog's vision can ever include you. Any attempt to see your future results in you appearing as if you have no future at all, making you a blank spot in fate itself. Retrocognition and purely instinctual precognition can still catch you.
3915. Predator Instinct,4.8
#You possess the honed instincts of an apex predator, allowing you to instinctively read every factor of a situation and exploit them without consciously planning. You anticipate your target's next move, where they are going, and how to corner them, letting them play right into your hands without ever realizing they were being hunted.
3916. Preemptive Adaptation,6.2
#Your body develops countermeasures to threats before they land. Moments before a bullet finds you, your skin hardens; moments before a telepath probes your mind, a psychic shield forms. The adaptations are temporary and only trigger against imminent or highly probable danger, but within that window you are almost impossible to catch off guard.
3917. Prehensile Abdomen,2.2
#Your abdomen moves and grips like an extra limb, stretching, twisting and snapping out in whipping strikes. You can lift objects with your gut, entangle enemies with your belly or pitch a ball across the room without lifting a finger.
3918. Prehensile Antenna,2.3
#Your antennae move with the dexterity of extra limbs, grasping, lifting and lashing out with whipping strikes. Great for fine manipulation and unexpected attacks, but antennae are fragile and easily damaged in a real fight.
3919. Prehensile Arm Parts,2.4
#The individual parts of your arms, forearms, biceps, elbows, can move and articulate independently as though each were its own limb. You can grasp with your forearm, strike with a detached-feeling elbow or hold several objects along a single arm at once.
3920. Prehensile Body Fat,2.6
#Your body fat moves with independent purpose, stretching out into pseudo-limbs that can grasp, lift and lash. The more adipose tissue you carry the more you have to work with, turning what most people consider dead weight into a versatile arsenal of wobbling whips and cushioned grips.
3921. Prehensile Bones,3.6
#Your bones can move, stretch and articulate independently of your muscles, pushing out of your body as gripping tools or lashing weapons. You can grab with a rib, strike with an extended femur or reshape your skeleton into whatever configuration the moment demands.
3922. Prehensile Brain,3.0
#Your brain and associated neural anatomy can move independently outside your skull, grasping, lifting and striking like a soft pink limb. Horrifying, incredibly situational, and extremely dangerous to you since your brain is the most fragile organ you own.
3923. Prehensile Cardiovascular System,3.2
#Your veins, arteries and the vessels of your circulatory system can extrude from your body and move as independent limbs, grasping and lashing with whipping strikes. Effective and grotesque, but your vessels remain fragile and losing too much blood flow will put you down fast.
3924. Prehensile Cells,3.4
#Your individual cells can act with independent purpose, peeling away from your body to manipulate objects, strike at enemies or reform into limb-like shapes. Extensive use wears out your biology and pushing the ability too far can lead to genuine cellular deterioration.
3925. Prehensile Chest,2.2
#Your pecs and breasts can move independently like flexible limbs, grasping, squeezing and lashing out. Limited in what shapes of object they can actually hold, but catches nearly everyone off guard the first time you use it.
3926. Prehensile Connective Tissues,2.9
#The tendons, ligaments and fascia that hold your body together can move and stretch with independent purpose, forming gripping constructs and lashing whips beneath or through your skin. A quietly versatile ability that turns your entire body into a network of waiting limbs.
3927. Prehensile Ears,2.0
#Your ears can move, stretch and articulate independently, grasping objects and lashing out with whipping strikes. Unusual, a little unsettling, and surprisingly handy when all your other limbs are occupied.
3928. Prehensile Eye-Stalk,2.5
#Your eyes extend on flexible stalks of optic nerve, moving independently to grasp, lift and lash at objects. You can see from wild angles and strike from unexpected ones, but exposed nerves are excruciatingly sensitive and the stalks only stretch as far as the optic tissue allows.
3929. Prehensile Face,2.3
#Your face itself moves with independent purpose, stretching and articulating like a limb made of features. You can grasp with your cheek, strike with your forehead or reshape your face entirely to hold and manipulate objects. Deeply uncanny to witness.
3930. Prehensile Feathers,2.4
#Your feathers move and articulate independently, grasping small objects and lashing out with whipping strikes. Extremely delicate work is possible but damaged or lost feathers shut the ability down until they grow back.
3931. Prehensile Feet,2.1
#Your feet function with the full dexterity of hands, capable of grasping, writing, fighting and fine manipulation. Your soles lack the usual arches and heels in exchange, making them rather more sensitive underfoot.
3932. Prehensile Fingers,2.4
#Your fingers can stretch, articulate and move with unusual independence, each one grasping, lifting or lashing out like a miniature limb of its own. Excellent for fine manipulation and unpredictable strikes, though fingers remain as fragile as they ever were.
3933. Prehensile Fins,2.2
#Your fins or flippers move with independent articulation, grasping and lashing with whipping strikes. Not as fully dextrous as real hands, but a distinct upgrade for any aquatic body plan.
3934. Prehensile Genetics,3.3
#Your very genes can move with independent purpose, extruding as strands that grasp and lash like microscopic limbs. Conceptually bizarre but startlingly effective, letting you manipulate objects and reshape your body at the level of the code itself.
3935. Prehensile Hair,3.0
#Your hair moves and articulates like a living mass of limbs, grasping, lifting and whipping out at opponents. Grow it long enough and you effectively have dozens of extra arms, though fire, ice and a decisive haircut can all end the fun fast.
3936. Prehensile Head,2.3
#Your head moves with independent purpose, stretching on a flexible neck or detaching its articulation entirely to grasp and strike at objects. Headbutts become precision weapons and you can hold things with your skull when your hands are full.
3937. Prehensile Heart,2.8
#You can extrude your heart from your body and manipulate it directly, sending it out to attack, defend or grab things. You still need it to, you know, pump blood, so be very careful about how far and how long you send it out.
3938. Prehensile Hooves,2.0
#Your hooves can articulate and grasp like flexible limbs, lifting and lashing out with surprising dexterity. Not as capable as actual hands, but a massive upgrade for anything with a hoofed body plan.
3939. Prehensile Horns,2.6
#Your horns move and articulate independently, grasping objects and lashing out with whipping strikes. Powerful in their own right, but horns are an extension of your body and breaking one is deeply, painfully debilitating.
3940. Prehensile Legs,2.4
#Your legs articulate and manipulate objects with the full dexterity of a second pair of arms, capable of grasping, striking and fine movement. You can hold, fight and walk all at once, though smaller objects remain awkward.
3941. Prehensile Mouth,2.5
#Your lips, jaw and mouth, or beak, mandibles or maw, move with independent flexibility, grasping, lifting and lashing out at targets. A second limb lives in your face and it bites back.
3942. Prehensile Muscles,3.1
#Your muscles can move, stretch and articulate with independent purpose, pushing out of your body or reshaping beneath the skin to form gripping constructs and lashing strikes. Effectively turns any muscle group into an additional limb on demand.
3943. Prehensile Nails,2.3
#Your nails, spurs or claws move and articulate independently, grasping fine objects and lashing out in precise whipping strikes. Delicate enough to pick locks with, fragile enough to crack in a real fight.
3944. Prehensile Neck,2.3
#Your neck stretches and articulates like a flexible limb, wrapping around objects to grasp them and snapping out in whipping strikes. Not quite as dextrous as an arm, but it puts your head anywhere you want it.
3945. Prehensile Nervous System,3.2
#Your nerves can extrude from your body and move as independent limbs, grasping and lashing with terrifying delicacy. Externalized nerves magnify every sensation including pain, and any severed strand may never reintegrate properly.
3946. Prehensile Nose,2.0
#Your nose stretches and articulates independently, grasping small objects and lashing out with whipping strikes. Pinocchio on purpose, and unexpectedly useful when your hands are full.
3947. Prehensile Organs,2.9
#Your internal organs can move independently, extruding from your body to grasp, lift and lash out at targets. A horror show in motion and a versatile one, though your organs remain as fragile outside the body as they are inside.
3948. Prehensile Rear,2.1
#Your buttocks move with independent flexibility, grasping, squeezing and lashing out with whipping strikes. Absurd, effective, and guaranteed to win any bar bet you care to make about it.
3949. Prehensile Reproductive System,2.5
#(Nsfw) Your reproductive anatomy, natural or artificial, moves with independent purpose, grasping and lashing out like an extra limb. Includes ovipositors, oviducts and anything else that fits the category. A deeply unconventional tool with deeply unconventional applications.
3950. Prehensile Skin,2.6
#Your skin can stretch and move on its own, grasping and manipulating objects like a clumsy extra limb. Useful for grabbing things just out of reach or whipping people with a slap that actually hurts. Only the skin stretches, not what's underneath.
3951. Prehensile Stinger,2.9
#You have a natural stinger that can extend and move independently, grabbing objects or lashing out at foes. Strikes with it carry venom if your physiology allows, and it makes for a nasty surprise in close combat.
3952. Prehensile Tail,2.4
#You have a fully prehensile tail capable of grasping, lifting and manipulating objects with the same ease as a hand. Great for holding a coffee while typing, or whipping someone across the face mid-conversation.
3953. Prehensile Teeth,2.2
#Your teeth can move independently and stretch out of your mouth to grasp and manipulate objects. Unsettling to witness and somewhat fragile, but a surprisingly versatile tool if you can get past the horror of it.
3954. Prehensile Tentacles,3.4
#You possess tentacles that move with independent precision, stretching and grasping like extra limbs. They can lift, throw, entangle and strike, and make for a formidable close-range combat tool.
3955. Prehensile Toes,1.7
#Your toes can stretch, extend and manipulate objects just like fingers. Dexterous piggies with surprisingly good grip, though they remain as fragile as any other digit.
3956. Prehensile Tongue,2.5
#Your tongue can stretch out like a frog's, grasping objects from a distance and whipping out to snag or strike. Vulnerable to fire and acid, and you will taste everything you grab, for better or worse.
3957. Prehensile Torso,2.7
#Your torso can move and flex independently, grasping and manipulating objects with its whole body. Awkward for small objects, but surprisingly effective at bear-hugging, crushing or throwing.
3958. Prehensile Whiskers,1.9
#You grow whiskers that move independently and can grasp small objects with surprising dexterity. Excellent for fine manipulation and sensing your surroundings, though easily damaged if treated roughly.
3959. Prehensile Wings,3.2
#Your wings double as a second pair of arms, able to grasp and manipulate objects as easily as hands. You may have to choose between flying and using them as limbs, but the versatility is worth it.
3960. Prehensility,3.6
#Every part of your body is prehensile. You can hold a weapon with your forearm, a ball with your calf, a basket with your belly, and even grip things with your skin, muscles or bodily fluids. Pulling a trigger may still be awkward.
3961. Prescient Reflexes,6.2
#Your body reacts to future events before your mind even registers them. You dodge, block and counter attacks that haven't been launched yet, and even you don't know how you'll move next, which makes you extremely hard to predict. Precognitive immunity is one of the few counters.
3962. Present Embodiment,8.5
#You are the living embodiment of the present moment. You know everything that is happening right now across all of existence at the exact instant it occurs, and you can exert control over it. The past and future remain beyond your direct reach, but the now is entirely yours.
3963. Pressure Defiance,3.5
#You can ignore pressure and its effects entirely, surviving crushing depths, vacuums and high-gravity environments without discomfort. You are also resistant to pressure-based powers used against you, though you remain vulnerable to other physical forces.
3964. Pressure Empowerment,4.0
#You grow stronger, faster and more durable the more pressure surrounds you. In high-pressure environments you become a monster, and you may even draw sustenance from pressure itself. In a vacuum, however, you are at your weakest.
3965. Pressure Immunity,4.2
#You are immune to being crushed, smashed or flattened, and can survive in the crushing depths of the ocean or the vacuum of space without discomfort. Your internal organs may still be vulnerable to extreme cases, but generally pressure simply does not affect you.
3966. Pressure Power Link,4.2
#Your very nature is pressurized, and your powers are fueled by the force building inside you. The more pressure you hold, the stronger your abilities become, though unstable pressure may cause your powers to spiral out of control.
3967. Pressure Resistance,2.6
#Your body is highly resistant to being crushed, smashed, or flattened. You could survive the depths of the ocean or a compactor with relative ease, though sufficiently extreme force will still hurt you.
3968. Pretzel Mimicry,1.4
#Allows you to transform your body into a pretzel, partially or fully. You can twist, knot and contort yourself into pretzel shapes, but you are vulnerable to being eaten and may struggle to return to normal.
3969. Prevention Immunity,6.6
#Your powers simply cannot be prevented. Nothing that would stop, block, or negate a power before it activates can affect you, your abilities always go through. Beings with immunity bypassing may still counter this.
3970. Prey Instinct,4.5
#You possess the ultimate instincts of prey, making you a master of evasion and survival. You instinctively know how much of a threat a foe is, what they will do next, how to hide without giving yourself away, and how to conserve energy while fleeing. You have no moral hesitation when it comes to escape.
3971. Pricolici Physiology,4.4
#Romanian Mythology - You are a pricolici, a vampiric undead wolf-monster risen from the grave. You possess wolf-like physical prowess and can shift between a human form and an animal form, but holy items and even ordinary weapons like sickles or clubs can still wound you.
3972. Pride Degeneracy,3.2
#(Curse) Your extreme pride has afflicted you with a degenerative curse, slowly mutating your body into something hideous or unnaturally beautiful while you remain convinced of your own perfection. Humility-based purification may reverse it, but left unchecked it leads to demonization.
3973. Pride Empowerment,3.5
#You grow stronger, faster and more durable the prouder you are of yourself and those around you. At extreme levels of pride you may unlock new abilities, slow your aging, or even draw sustenance from hubris alone. Humility weakens you.
3974. Primate Monster Physiology,4.0
#You are or can transform into a monstrous primate, a hulking beast combining the strength of an ape with the terror of a true monster. You possess enhanced physical capabilities and a ferocious presence that makes even seasoned warriors hesitate.
3975. Primate Physiology,2.8
#You either are or can transform into a primate, including lemurs, monkeys and apes. You gain the physical traits of your chosen form, from the agility of a gibbon to the raw power of a gorilla.
3976. Primatefolk Physiology,3.1
#You either are or can transform into a humanoid primate, a towering ape-man or monkey-folk with the features of a simian and the intelligence of a human. You gain enhanced strength, agility and climbing ability.
3977. Primatewere Physiology,3.6
#You are a primatewere, a primate cursed or blessed with the power to take on a human or humanoid-ape form. Unlike a were-ape, your true form is the beast and the human shape is the disguise, granting you the strength of a primal simian and the cunning of a man.
3978. Primordial Embodiment,8.4
