#You are not a representative of your concept, you are the concept itself, the living source from which every other embodiment of it descends. Without you, your concept ceases to exist. You command all lesser embodiments of the concept and generate endless emotional energy as raw fuel, though you are only sovereign within the domain of your own idea.
3979. Primordial Empowerment,6.8
#Contact with primordial entities or force makes you stronger, faster, tougher, and can even awaken latent abilities tied to that primeval affinity. Some users draw sustenance directly from the force and slow or halt their aging. The trade-off is that specific primordial forces may involuntarily control you in turn.
3980. Primordial Force Mimicry,7.8
#Your body is made of or can transform entirely into primordial force, the ancient energy that gave rise to some vital aspect of the universe. In this form your power over that aspect is effectively limitless, scaling with how much of the force flows through you. Control over it may still overwhelm any mortal frame attempting to hold it.
3981. Primordial Power Link,6.3
#Your primordial force is directly linked to your powers, feeding them raw primeval energy to amplify them to levels far beyond their normal capacity. The connection can become unstable and go out of control if you lose focus, and users of Absolute Destruction can sever it.
3982. Primordial Symbiosis,7.4
#You host a primordial entity in a symbiotic bond, drawing supernatural power from a primeval aspect that lives within you. The more you let it in, the more power you can channel, but a powerful primordial being may eventually try to take over your body or destroy it from the inside.
3983. Principle Embodiment,9.1
#You are the living archetype, the embodiment of principles themselves - the original basis and foundation for every concept, force and property that exists or could exist. This grants you near-limitless authority over all principles, as changing yourself changes the basis of everything.
3984. Probability Defiance,5.4
#You defy unfavorable probability. No matter how stacked the odds are against you, you succeed as if the challenge were trivial. You cannot grant yourself good luck, but any situation where you are the underdog will bend until you overcome it. Direct force can still hurt you if you're not actively overcoming it.
3985. Probability Power Link,5.4
#Your powers are linked to your probability/stochastic nature, meaning your luck fuels and strengthens every other ability you have. When fortune favors you, your powers reach peak output. When your luck is unstable, your abilities may go haywire or backfire entirely.
3986. Probability Symbiosis,5.6
#You are bonded to a probability-based entity, a living embodiment of luck or possibility that grants you its powers through your symbiosis. You can warp chance in your favor and curse your enemies, but the entity may try to take over your body, and its power may be too much for your mortal form to handle safely.
3987. Proboscideanoid Physiology,3.3
#You are or can transform into a proboscideanoid, an elephant-like humanoid. You gain immense physical strength, thick durable hide, a powerful prehensile trunk, tusks that can gore through most defenses, and the long memory and intelligence elephants are known for.
3988. Procyonid Physiology,2.8
#You are or can transform into a procyonid, such as a raccoon, coati, kinkajou, olingo or cacomistle. You gain sharp claws, nimble dextrous paws, incredible climbing ability, heightened senses, and that particular cunning that lets raccoons open anything with a latch.
3990. Programmable Empowerment,5.2
#You grow stronger, faster, and more durable in the presence of programmable abilities, drawing empowerment from their existence. You may also unlock abilities related to programming and instruction-based powers, and at higher levels you can feed on programmable effects to slow or halt your own aging.
3991. Programmable Matter,6.3
#Your body is made of programmable matter, a substance that rewrites its own shape, density and state on command. You can shift between solid, liquid and gas, reconfigure limbs into tools or weapons, and repair damage by rerunning your base pattern. Vulnerable to matter manipulators and anyone with hacking abilities.
3992. Progression Immunity,6.0
#You are immune to all powers involving growth, evolution, learning and progression. Nothing can forcibly evolve you, teach you, age you, or roll you back. The downside is that this immunity can cut both ways, potentially locking you out of natural growth as well. Users of Eternal Evolution or Meta Learning may bypass it.
3995. Property Immunity,6.4
#You are immune to the effects of any property, from inertia and friction to electrical conductivity, optical properties and everything in between. Whatever property is being thrown at you simply fails to apply. May be limited to certain types of properties and can be bypassed by immunity bypassing or almighty absorption.
3996. Prophetic Protection,6.3
#You are protected by prophecy itself, you are destined to die from a specific circumstance, and until that circumstance arrives nothing in the world can kill you. Get shot, stabbed, thrown off a cliff, dropped into a volcano, it doesn't matter, fate will contrive every possible coincidence to keep you alive until your written ending. Fate Immunity and Destiny Negation can bypass this.
3997. Proportional Physicality,3.6
#Your physical abilities scale in perfect proportion to your body's size, mass and density. Your strength, speed, durability and stamina are always balanced to your frame, meaning any increase in your size translates directly into a matching increase in power. A small you is agile and efficient, a large you is a titan.
3998. Propulsion Trail,2.3
#Wherever you go you leave behind a trail of propulsive energy or matter. Depending on what your trail is made of it could act as a hazard for pursuers, a marker for allies, or simply a very cool visual effect when you walk down the street.
3999. Prosimian Physiology,2.7
#You are or can transform into a prosimian, such as a lemur, loris, ringtail or tarsier. You gain enhanced agility, excellent night vision, a prehensile grip and the distinct ability to unsettle people with your unblinking wide-eyed stare.
4000. Prosthetic Walking,2.1
#You are able to walk and move naturally on any artificial body part, whether it be a prosthetic leg, a cybernetic limb or a full robot body. You may even be able to leverage the mechanical functions of your prosthetics to enhance your movements beyond what flesh could manage.
4001. Protacanthopterygiioid Physiology,3.1
#You are or can transform into a protacanthopterygiioid, a humanoid race with the traits of salmon, trout, pike and other protacanthopterygii fish. You gain enhanced swimming capabilities, heightened senses underwater, and the physical resilience of a fish built to leap upstream against raging currents.
4002. Protected Senses,3.0
#Your senses are immune to any effect that would damage or overwhelm them. Flashbangs, deafening explosions, overwhelming stenches and blinding lights do nothing to you. You still perceive them fully, just without any pain, disorientation or lasting harm.
4003. Protection Empowerment,4.4
#You become stronger, faster and more durable whenever you are actively protecting someone or something, including yourself. The more serious the threat and the more meaningful the thing you protect, the greater the empowerment. With deep affinity you may even slow or stop your own aging as long as there is something worth guarding.
4004. Protective Instinct,5.0
#You possess an innate aptitude for protecting yourself and others that bypasses conscious thought. Your body moves before your mind can process the threat, adapting perfectly to the situation with techniques you didn't even know you possessed. The instinct grows stronger with emotional attachment to those you protect, though it may leave you open to severe personal risk when shielding others.
4005. Protogenoi Physiology,8.9
#Greek Mythology - You are one of the Protogenoi, the primordials who formed the very fabric of reality before the gods. You are inseparable from your chosen element, whether that be sky, earth, sea, night or the void itself, and your mere existence shapes the cosmos around you. Older than Olympus and beyond the reach of almost any lesser being.
4006. Psammokinetic Immunity,1.4
#You are completely immune to sand. Sandstorms do not blind you, dunes cannot crush you, and your lungs do not suffer when the desert winds blow. Supernatural sand from divine or demonic sources may still affect you.
4007. Psionic Derivation,9.3
#You are the source of all psionic energy in your reality, the conductor through which every psychic power in the cosmos flows. Every telepath, telekinetic and empath draws from you whether they know it or not, and you can freely bestow, augment or revoke their abilities at will. You are the most powerful psionic being in existence by definition.
4008. Psionic Embodiment,9.0
#You embody the mind itself and everything connected to it. You hold supreme dominion over psionics in every conceivable and inconceivable way, possessing every psychic ability at a limitless scale and becoming the most powerful psychic being in your universe by simple fact of existence. Thought, will and consciousness all bow to you as their personification.
4009. Psionic Empowerment,4.2
#You grow stronger, faster, and more durable the more psychic energy surrounds you, whether your own or from others nearby. In a room full of telepaths you become a monster; in a psychic dead zone, just a regular person. Can even slow your aging with enough ambient psionics.
4010. Psionic Power Link,4.5
#Your psionic energy is hardwired into your other powers, fueling and amplifying them through a single connected reserve. It lets you push your abilities to levels they couldn't reach alone, but unstable psionics can send all of your linked powers spiraling out of control at once.
4011. Psionic-Extraterrestrial Physiology,6.3
#You are or can become an alien being whose entire biology is built around psionics, giving you vast psychic potential as naturally as breathing. Because psychic power is baked into your evolution rather than learned, your growth ceiling is effectively limitless and your abilities feel like instinct rather than effort.
4012. Psionics Superior,3.6
#You possess a raw psychic power level notably beyond what a normal member of your species can wield. You don't necessarily know more techniques than other psychics, but whatever psionic abilities you do have run on a bigger engine, hitting harder and lasting longer.
4013. Psychic Animal Physiology,5.0
#You are or can transform into an animal being with an innate connection to psionics, pairing bestial physical traits with a full suite of psychokinetic abilities. Picture a wolf that moves boulders with its mind or a hawk that strikes prey with telepathic attacks.
4014. Psychic Energy Mimicry,5.7
#Your body is composed of or can transform into psychic energy, either keeping the shape of your normal form or shifting into homogeneous energy without any vital parts. Your cells, bones and muscles are fortified by the psychic energy flowing through them, making you powerful on both the mental and physical planes. Psionic Drain is potentially fatal to you.
4015. Psychic Entity Physiology,6.3
#Your body is formed of psionic force and materialized thought, making you immune to physical attacks and granting you near-limitless psionic powers that can appear god-like to lesser beings. The downside is that you may only be able to exist in an intangible form, forced to interact with the physical world through hosts or indirect means.
4016. Psychic Immunity,6.2
#Your mind is an inviolable fortress; no psychic phenomenon of any nature or origin can touch it. You cannot be read, influenced, controlled, emulated, altered or even detected by telepathic means, forcing allies to rely on mundane or technological communication. Brain and sense manipulation may still bypass this from the outside.
4017. Psychic Intelligence,5.8
#Your intellect runs on psionic fuel, processing information far beyond ordinary perception and pulling knowledge, patterns and insights directly from minds, the universe and unseen forces. You simply 'know' things you shouldn't. Focus may be needed to sustain peak cognition.
4018. Psychic Power,5.7
#You possess an extraordinary wellspring of raw psychic energy, the living force of the mind from which all psionic abilities are derived. This is not a specific power but the fuel behind them, granting you a naturally massive pool of mental energy that expands as you train and unlocks psychic feats over time, ranging from the mundane to the esoteric.
4019. Psychic Vampire Physiology,5.3
#You are a psychic vampire. You feed on the emotional, life, and psionic force of other beings to fuel your strength, speed, senses, endurance, agility, and lifespan. Unlike regular vampires, the energies you absorb can be converted into new psychic powers, and with enough feeding you can transform yourself into pure force. You must feed regularly or wither.
4020. Psychology Empowerment,4.5
#You grow stronger, faster and more durable the more psychological energy surrounds you. Crowded emotional scenes, therapy sessions and mental breakdowns all feed you. Some users even slow their aging by feeding on minds. Starves in empty rooms.
4021. Pterosaur Physiology,3.3
#You are or can transform into a pterosaur. You gain leathery wings, hollow bones and the ability to glide or fly, though your wings are fragile and a full transformation is usually required for proper flight.
4022. Pterosauroid Physiology,3.6
#You are a pterosauroid, a humanoid pterosaur hybrid of the sort that haunts fantasy settings. You retain opposable thumbs and higher cognition while gaining wings, enhanced senses and the aerial capabilities of your reptilian cousins.
4023. Pudding Mimicry,1.8
#You can transform your body fully or partially into pudding, becoming jiggly, soft and delicious. Blades pass through you harmlessly but fire melts you and someone might just eat you. Not all users can revert.
4024. Pufferfish Physiology,2.2
#You have the abilities of a pufferfish, including the capacity to inflate yourself into a spiky ball and produce potent neurotoxins. Some of the toxic effects may be hard to regulate and you may not function well out of water.
4025. Pukwudgie Physiology,4.1
#You are or can transform into a pukwudgie, a 4-to-5-foot creature from Wampanoag folklore. You can appear and disappear at will, wield magic, shoot poison arrows and create fire. A small but genuinely dangerous trickster of the woods, best left alone by anyone with sense.
4026. Pulso-Mechanical Physiology,5.2
#Your body is a robotic construct fused with pulse-based technology, granting you mechanical durability alongside a suite of pulse-generating abilities. You can emit shockwaves, pulse beams, and resonance fields through built-in emitters.
4027. Puma Physiology,3.2
#You are or can transform into a puma, gaining its lean muscle, explosive pouncing ability, silent stalking, and sharp senses. Excellent for ambushes and traversal, though you lack the raw power of larger big cats.
4028. Pumpkin Mimicry,2.8
#Allows you to transform your body partially or fully into a pumpkin, either keeping your anatomy intact in pumpkin form or becoming homogeneous gourd matter. Watch out for anyone with a knife and a carving grin.
4029. Pupa Physiology,1.4
#You are or can transform into a pupa, a chrysalis or cocoon encasing a creature mid-metamorphosis. Tough shell, but you are almost entirely immobile and helpless in this form, so pick your timing carefully.
4030. Pupafolk Physiology,3.1
#You are a pupafolk, a humanoid being with the traits of a chrysalis or cocoon. You possess tough carapace-like skin, resilience against physical trauma, and the unsettling presence of something still mid-transformation.
4031. Pure Heart,3.2
#Your heart is devoid of malice and evil intent, giving you a natural resistance to corruption, mind influence, and dark magics that prey on wickedness. You may however find yourself almost incapable of cruelty even when you really should be.
4032. Pure Soul,3.5
#Your very soul is devoid of evil or darkness. Those of ill intent find it physically painful to touch you or hold you down, and most corruptive forces simply slide off. The downside is that you may be incapable of violent action, and Soul Absorbers find you a tempting target.
4033. Purification Empowerment,4.2
#You grow stronger, faster and tougher in the presence of purification, drawing power from cleansed targets, purifying acts and purifying environments. Without purification around to feed on, you are just regular you.
4034. Purification Immunity,4.5
#You are immune to purification-based powers. Cleansing beams wash off you, purification auras ignore you and purging attacks do nothing. Omni-Purification may still cut through, and the immunity may not last forever.
4035. Purified Power Link,5.8
#Your purified nature is directly linked to your powers, fueling and amplifying them through your cleansed essence. The purer your state of mind, the stronger your abilities become, though an unstable purified nature may cause your powers to run wild.
4036. Purified Symbiosis,6.0
#You host a purified/purifying entity within you - be it spiritual, divine or magical in origin - granting you powers associated with pure energies, supernatural cleansing and decontaminated enhancement. However, the entity may attempt to possess you or, if too powerful, harm or destroy your body.
4037. Purity Embodiment,7.3
#You are the living embodiment of purity itself. You can convert your pure thoughts into raw energy and use them as a source for various abilities drawn from all that is pure. Your mere presence cleanses corruption and your innocence is weaponized into divine potency.
4039. Purpose Embodiment,8.6
#You embody purpose itself. You have absolute control over the purpose of everyone and everything - making a sword's purpose to be broken, making a hero's purpose to fail, making the sun's purpose to freeze. Omnipotent beings and wielders of Absolute Existence may remain outside your influence.
4040. Pushback Resistance,2.3
#You are resistant to being pushed back, knocked over or blown away. Explosions, charging foes and gale-force winds can't move you from your footing easily, though there is still a limit to how much momentum you can absorb.
4041. Putto Physiology,4.8
#You possess the physiology of a Putto, a winged child-like angelic being found in many mythologies. You have divine musical talent, can influence mortals in matters of passion, carry messages for higher powers and embody God's omnipresence in small ways. Subservient to higher deities and vulnerable to divine slayers.
4042. Pyrokinetic Circulatory System,3.8
#Your blood has been replaced with flames that circulate through your body. You are naturally resistant to heat, bleed fire when wounded, and your touch can scorch. However, sufficient cold or water-based attacks can disrupt the circulation itself.
4043. Pyrokinetic Tears,1.9
#Your tears are made of fire, dripping as little embers whenever you cry. Dramatic for a villain monologue but you can burn your own face if you are not careful.
4044. Pyrokinetically Enhanced Durability,3.6
#Your durability is augmented by fire, letting you tank hits that would break a normal body as flames reinforce your skin and bones. Durability negation and invulnerability bypassing still get through.
4045. Pyrokinetically Enhanced Strength,3.6
#Your overall strength is augmented through flames coursing through your muscles, letting you lift and hit far beyond your baseline. Unlike pyrokinetic combat this enhances your raw strength rather than just your attack power.
4046. Pyroscience,5.8
#You know everything about fire, heat, and anything remotely related to it. Every combustion reaction, every flame's history, every burning object's secrets are laid bare to you. You only know things through fire and heat, but within that domain nothing is hidden from you.
4047. Qalupalik Physiology,3.3
#You are or can transform into a Qalupalik, an Inuit sea-demon that lurks beneath icy waters. In this form you have unnatural strength in frigid water, a long-nailed grip, a humming song that lures children closer, and a carrying sack you can drag prey into the deep. Vulnerable to Inuit rites and prayers.
4048. Qarinah Physiology,3.6
#You are or can transform into a qarinah, an Arabic spirit akin to a succubus. Supernaturally beautiful and loyal, you can slip into the dreams of those you desire and share intimacy through sleep, though your adoration can turn obsessive and your grip on your chosen one rarely loosens.
4049. Qilin Physiology,6.5
#You are or can transform into a Qilin, a divine hooved chimera of East Asian myth. Your body wreathes itself in gentle serene flames that burn only the wicked, your hooves never crush grass, and your presence brings rui - prosperity and serenity - to those around you. Your physical abilities are on the level of a divine beast, and the truly evil instinctively fear your approach.
4050. Quantum Capacitor,4.8
#Your body functions as a living capacitor for quantum energy, absorbing and storing it from any source you come into contact with. You can channel the stored energy freely for any purpose, making you a self-sustaining reservoir of quantum power.
4051. Quantum Consciousness,7.4
#Your mind is disseminated across the quantum state of your being, existing at the smallest conceivable scale of matter itself. You can perform operations and fine prehensile motions at the quantum level, effectively bypassing most physical limitations. Your potential as a thinking being is almost boundless, and conventional attempts to attack your mind have nothing to grasp.
4052. Quantum Empowerment,4.3
#Your body grows stronger, faster and more durable in the presence of quantum forces, and prolonged exposure may awaken latent quantum-based abilities in you. Powerful users can even draw sustenance from quantum energy alone and slow or halt their aging entirely.
4053. Quantum Existence,7.8
#Your body and mind have become unentangled from the quantum model of reality, existing as a living superposition no longer bound by the laws keeping space-time linear. You exist slightly outside the existential firmament, which makes you nearly impossible to target or remove, but prolonged use of this state slowly erodes your cognition and identity until you risk dissipating entirely.
4054. Quantum Foam Embodiment,9.3
#You are the living personification of the quantum foam, the smallest level and foundation from which all things in existence originally emerged. Reality boils beneath your skin, and anything you touch can be restructured from the ground up. Only one user per universe.
4055. Quantum Immortality,7.4
#You are the version of yourself, out of every parallel and alternate self across the multiverse, that survives every life-or-death scenario. Through probabilistic necessity, no matter how absurd or impossible the circumstances, there is always a thread where you walk away alive, and you are always that thread. You can still suffer, lose limbs and be left in ruin, but you will not die.
4056. Quantum Intelligence,7.3
#Your mind operates at the level of a quantum supercomputer, with a multidimensional cognition that pulls unlimited information and pre-processed knowledge from your multiversal counterparts. You can perceive probable outcomes, alternate strategies and parallel solutions in real time. Untrained users are overwhelmed by the deluge of data and risk shattering their minds entirely.
4057. Quantum Lock,2.1
#You freeze in place the moment someone is looking at you, appearing as a statue stuck mid-motion. It is an involuntary defense mechanism and can't be turned off, which is a problem if you meet another Quantum Lock user and the two of you just stare at each other forever.
4058. Quantum Luck,7.5
#You are the version of yourself, among every parallel and alternate iteration, that consistently experiences the luckiest possible outcome in every situation. Through sheer improbable happenstance you always catch the break, always find the winning ticket, always stumble onto the right answer. Reality bends itself to hand you the best possible branch of the probability tree.
4059. Quantum Perception,5.3
#Your perception is attuned to quantum mechanics, allowing you to see all of reality as a unified scientific model down to the subatomic level. Magic appears to you as scraps of reality you can read and understand, and any phenomenon within your line of sight is laid bare. Prolonged unchecked use risks detachment from reality and eventual insanity.
4060. Quantum Power Link,5.0
#Your quantum nature is directly linked to your powers, feeding them with quantized energy and amplifying them on multiple levels. Your abilities grow stronger, more efficient and more stable as a result, but if your quantum state becomes unstable your powers can spiral out of control.
4062. Queen Insect Physiology,4.2
#You are or can transform into the queen of an insect species, be it ants, bees, wasps, termites or otherwise. As queen you are the undisputed ruler over your hive, commanding absolute loyalty from your colony and possessing the physical traits and pheromonal authority of a monarch.
4063. Questing Beast Physiology,5.8
#You are the Questing Beast of Arthurian legend, a chimeric creature with the head of a serpent, body of a leopard, haunches of a lion and feet of a hart. You are nigh impossible to catch, your existence draws knights and heroes into futile hunts, and your cry is the sound of thirty baying hounds.
4064. Quetzalcoatl Physiology,7.6
#You are or can transform into Quetzalcoatl, the feathered serpent god of Mesoamerican mythology. You possess divine physical and magical abilities, wind manipulation, creation powers, and the duality of serpent and sky. As a transcendent deity you stand among the greatest gods of the Americas.
4066. Quinotaur Physiology,5.9
#You are or can become a Quinotaur, the legendary five-horned sea bull of Frankish myth, said to have sired the Merovingian line. You possess immense physical power, aquatic mastery and a brutal divine presence tied to Neptune himself, your horns capable of goring through almost anything.
4067. Quintessence Force,7.3
#Your body generates infinite energy from within, no longer dependent on any external source. You can pour this endless output into physical enhancement, fuel any form of technology, or convert it into almost any other type of energy. Channeling too much at once may overwhelm your body and require rest to stabilize.
4068. Qutrub Physiology,4.3
#You are or can transform into a qutrub, a wolfish Arabian jinni known for haunting graveyards and devouring corpses. You gain the physical prowess of a werewolf fused with the supernatural traits of a ghoul-like ifrit, excelling at thievery, stalking and nocturnal predation.
4069. Rabbit Monster Physiology,3.3
#You are or can transform into a monster resembling a rabbit, gaining the twisted and supernatural traits that come with such beasts. Think less cute bunny, more giant-fanged carnivorous horror with unnatural strength and appetite.
4070. Rabbit Physiology,1.6
#You are or can transform into a rabbit, gaining its agility, powerful legs and keen senses. Great for hopping, fleeing, and very little else.
4071. Raccoon Physiology,1.7
#You are or can transform into a raccoon, gaining their dexterous paws, nocturnal senses and legendary ability to get into any trash can, pantry or locked container. Surprisingly clever and remarkably hard to get rid of.
4073. Radiation Embodiment,7.8
#You are the living embodiment of radiation itself, not a user but the concept walking in flesh. You possess limitless control over all forms of radiation and absolute immunity to it. Lead, concrete, iron and water are the old wards that still hold some sway over you.
4074. Radiation Empowerment,3.8
#Your body grows stronger, faster and more durable when exposed to radiation. Standing in a fallout zone feels like a workout and a meal, and heavy exposure may even slow your ageing or unlock latent radiation-based abilities.
4075. Radiation Immunity,3.6
#You are immune to radiation and all of its effects. You can walk through fallout zones, reactor cores and irradiated ruins as if on a stroll through the park, never developing sickness, burns or cancer. You can still feel the blast of a nuke though, only the radiation part is negated.
4076. Radiation Resistance,2.8
#You are extremely resistant to radiation, shrugging off doses that would kill a normal person in minutes. Your internal organs may still be vulnerable to extreme exposure and the truly cosmic levels can still hurt you, but fallout zones and dirty bombs are trivial.
4077. Radiative Quintessence,6.2
#Your body is an infinite wellspring of radiation, generating limitless radioactive energy indefinitely without needing any external source. You can power your own enhancements, any radiation-based technique, or entire cities worth of machines, though your body can only safely channel so much at once before you need rest.
4078. Radio Wave Mimicry,5.4
#Your body is made of or can transform into radio waves. In this form you can travel at the speed of light through open air, phase through most matter, and slip into devices as signal. Skilled users can keep their anatomy intact in wave form, while reckless ones risk dispersing and being unable to reform.
4079. Radioactive Blood,2.8
#Your blood is saturated with radioactive substances. Anything that bites, stabs or drinks you gets a hefty dose of rads, and a well-aimed bleed can contaminate a room. Useless against anything with radiation immunity or absorption.
4080. Radioactive Bodily Fluids,3.1
#Every fluid your body produces, blood, sweat, spit, tears, and everything else, is laced with radiation. You can weaponize a handshake, contaminate food, or leave dangerous traces wherever you linger. Keeping loved ones around becomes a careful exercise in shielding.
4081. Radioactive Presence,4.0
#You radiate a field of lethal radiation simply by existing. Anything near you absorbs a dangerous dose, and prolonged exposure is fatal to the unshielded. Controlling the field is difficult, making you a hazard to friends as much as enemies until you master it.
4082. Radioactive Saliva,2.3
#Your spit is radioactive. A good loogie can contaminate surfaces, sicken a target, or ruin a meal. Licking anyone is essentially a slow poisoning. Does nothing to targets with radiation immunity or absorption.
4083. Radioactive Zombie Physiology,5.6
#You are a radioactive undead, a shambling corpse powered by nuclear energies drawn from fallout, reactor meltdowns, or orphaned sources. You pulse raw radiation into your surroundings, contaminating everything nearby and sometimes inducing cancers, mutations, or acute radiation sickness. Rare variants can even trigger low-yield nuclear detonations on death.
4084. Radiological Capacitor,5.0
#You are a living radioactive battery. You can absorb and store any and all forms of radiation indefinitely, holding onto it until you need it. When drawn upon, the stored rads can be channeled however you see fit, making you a flexible power source for any radiation-based ability or construct.
4085. Radiosynthesis,4.8
#You feed on radiation the way plants feed on sunlight. Any ionizing source, from fallout to background radiation, fuels your metabolism, enhancing your health, stamina and cellular recovery while granting strong resistance to further radiation. Without enough rads around, however, you begin to starve.
4086. Radish Mimicry,0.6
#You are made of or can transform into radishes and turnips. Your produce form retains all your organs but is embarrassingly edible, and there is always a nonzero risk of being snatched up by a passing gardener or rabbit.
4087. Raiju Physiology,5.4
#You are or can transform into a Raiju, the thunder beast of Shinto myth, typically taking the form of a wolf wrapped in lightning. Your body is composed of electricity, letting you travel as a ball of lightning and unleash devastating storms when agitated. During actual thunderstorms your power is greatly amplified and your cry sounds like thunder itself.
4088. Rain Bird Physiology,3.2
#You are or can transform into the Rain Bird of folklore, the avian that first brought rain to the world. In this form you can fly with ease and your presence coaxes rainfall from the sky wherever you go.
4089. Rain Mimicry,4.0
#Your body is made of rain, or you can transform into it at will. In this form you are a cascading shower of droplets that can reform at will, hard to pin down and harder to strike meaningfully. Extreme heat is your weakness, as evaporation can outright kill you.
4090. Rainbow Crow Physiology,4.2
#You are or can transform into the Rainbow Crow of legend, the selfless bird whose feathers once shone in every color before it sacrificed its beauty to bring fire to the world. In this form your voice carries a bewitching song and your feathers shimmer with the full spectrum of light.
4091. Rainbow Mimicry,4.2
#Your body is made of rainbow light, or you can transform into it at will. In this form you are a living prism, shimmering and hard to strike meaningfully, but disruption of light around you can scatter and weaken you.
4092. Rainbow Trail,1.4
#Wherever you go, you leave a shimmering trail of rainbows behind you. Extremely pretty, terrible for stealth.
4093. Raptor Physiology,3.6
#You are or can transform into a bird of prey, including falcons, eagles, and hawks. You gain incredible eyesight, powerful talons, aerial maneuverability and the predatory instincts of an apex hunter of the skies.
4095. Rarity Empowerment,4.1
#You become stronger, faster, and more durable the rarer your surroundings are, drawing power from scarcity and value. Standing in a vault of priceless artifacts turns you into a powerhouse, while common environments leave you at baseline.
4096. Rat Physiology,2.3
#You are or can transform into a rat, gaining enhanced agility, incredible survivability, a sharp sense of smell, and the ability to squeeze through tiny gaps. Watch out for cats and foxes though.
4097. Ratfolk Physiology,3.8
#You are or can transform into a ratfolk, a humanoid rat-like being from the fantasy genre. You gain enhanced agility, keen senses, nimble fingers, disease resistance, and the cunning survivability that rats are known for, all in a humanoid frame.
4098. Rattlesnake Physiology,3.3
#You are or can transform into a rattlesnake, gaining potent venomous fangs, heat-sensing pits, and a rattle at the end of your tail that warns off predators. You may be deaf in this form, and mongooses, weasels, and birds of prey are still a threat.
4099. Raw Power,6.2
#You possess such immense brute strength and unrestrained force that you can accomplish feats that defy conventional limitations through sheer magnitude alone. You can shatter spells, obliterate barriers, and bat aside intangible things just by hitting them hard enough. Refinement is for other people.
4100. Reactionlessness,3.7
#You do not react to anything, not pain, not attacks, not emotional or sensory effects, not even being surprised. Your face stays blank and your body stays still. You can still be killed or damaged, you just won't flinch while it happens.
4101. Reactive Attribute Enhancement,4.9
#Your physical attributes automatically enhance in response to threats and difficult situations, scaling up to match what you are facing. The boost lasts for the duration of the fight or task, and you may or may not have conscious control over how it manifests. The greater the danger, the greater the enhancement.
4102. Reactive Immunity,6.5
#You instantly become immune to anything used against you the moment it is used. Poison, fire, mind control, a specific person's punches, all of it stops working on you after the first exposure. Things that kill you in one hit never give you the chance to adapt, and absolute powers bypass it entirely.
4103. Reactive Invulnerability,5.4
#You become invulnerable whenever you are in genuine danger, and only then. The invulnerability fades as soon as the threat subsides. Requires that you actually recognize the danger, so attacks you never see coming can still hurt you.
4104. Reader Embodiment,9.2
#You embody the reader of the story, the story being the entire totality of existence and everything beyond it. Every power, every cosmic force, every bypass and meta-immunity is just words on a page you happen to be reading, and nothing within the narrative can touch you. The catch is that readers do not affect stories, so you cannot actually influence anything you observe, only witness it perfectly.
4105. Real World Immunity,6.4
#You are immune to all the physics and logic of the real world, retaining whatever impossible rules governed you in your native fantasy setting. You can still breathe underwater, still cast spells, still fly on nothing, because the real world's opinions do not apply to you.
4106. Reality Anchoring,8.1
#You are completely immune to any and all reality-altering powers. Reality warpers cannot touch you, cannot rewrite you, cannot edit you out of existence. The downside is that you also cannot be resurrected or healed by a reality manipulator, and sufficiently high-tier warpers may still find a way through.
4107. Reality Border Transcendence,8.3
#You exist beyond the concept of reality borders, able to move between time, events, timelines, dimensions and whole realities without any trouble. Walls that separate one existence from another simply do not apply to you. May be limited to a single type of border depending on the user.
4108. Reality Enhanced Condition,8.6
#Your physical and mental condition is enhanced through reality warping itself, meaning your strength, speed, durability, and intellect scale beyond any rational or scientific limit. You can tear reality apart with a punch and remember every atom of a universe. Reality Sundering poses a genuine threat however.
4109. Reality Dreaming,9.5
#Reality is but a dream you are having, all aspects of it are brought about by your subconscious desires and emotions. You are the undisputed supreme being with an indestructible existence, but your possibilities fluctuate with your self-awareness. Should you ever achieve a true state of lucidity, your control over the world would become absolute.
4110. Reality Embodiment,9.2
#You are the living physical manifestation of a reality and possess absolute dominion over it. You might embody just one reality, or in truly extreme cases, all of them. Your desires are reality's desires, and what you want to happen simply does happen, because you and reality are one and the same.
4111. Reality Empowerment,5.7
#You become stronger, faster, and more durable simply by existing within a reality, drawing power from events, objects, characters, real world energies, and the reality itself. You can passively grow in power without doing anything, and may even draw sustenance from reality to slow or stop your aging. Weak against Reality Immunity.
4112. Reality Forsaken,5.5
#You are literally forsaken from reality, your very existence does not agree with it, causing reality itself to constantly try and reject or attack you. On the upside, your existence is too wrong to be properly affected by most normal rules. On the downside, you are perpetually at war with the universe itself and users of Unity will actively hunt you.
4113. Reality Immunity,7.9
#You are immune to anything in reality, trouble, punishment, danger, taxes, physical laws, certain doom, none of them apply to you. This isn't evasion, the things in reality simply cannot touch you at all, you exist within reality but are fundamentally untouchable by it.
4114. Reality Mind,9.5
#Your mind imagines reality, everything that exists, mortals, gods, cosmic entities, the laws of physics, all of it exists as thought-forms within your mentality. What you think of becomes real by your own will, and the totality of existence is the psychological makeup of your mind. You are not just a reality warper, you are the reality everyone else lives inside.
4115. Reality Power Link,5.6
#Your powers are directly linked to and fueled by reality energy, allowing them to be strengthened and utilized on higher levels than they normally would be capable of. You don't gain new powers from this, but whatever you already have becomes significantly more potent. May require a specific state of mind, and unstable reality energy can cause your powers to go haywire.
4116. Reality Separation,9.3
#You exist outside the concept of reality itself, making you immune to almost anything that could affect or harm you. Changes to space, time or reality simply do not touch you, and any damage made to you is instantly rectified. You are also aware of every change made to reality, knowing the difference between the original and any alteration. Absolute and conceptual attacks may still reach you.
4117. Reality Symbiosis,7.0
#You share a symbiotic bond with a reality warping entity, allowing you to alter reality through the connection. The strength of the effects depends entirely on the strength of the entity you are bonded with, ranging from personal tricks to universal rewrites. Be careful, the entity may attempt to take over your mind or body, and channeling its power may harm you.
4118. Reanimated Object Physiology,3.6
#You either are or can transform into a reanimated inanimate object such as a wrecked vehicle, a broken statue, a puppet or a battered machine. Despite being damaged or in pieces you keep moving and functioning, zombie-like, with abilities tied to whatever object you take form of. You may need to feed on other objects to keep going.
4119. Rearrangement Adaptation,3.8
#You can adapt to having your body parts and bodily functions rearranged or scrambled. If your brain gets rewired so you jump when you try to run, you simply adjust. If someone relocates your arms to your back, you learn to use them there. Some rearrangements are harder to adapt to than others, and the adaptation may wear off.
4120. Recessive Genetics,2.5
#You carry recessive genetic codes for superpowers that can easily be overridden by the genes of another. You may be affected, a carrier, or unaffected, and any children of yours have a chance of inheriting the abilities. The gene may also come with a nasty secondary effect such as a curse, and descendants can manifest the powers unexpectedly.
4121. Recoil Immunity,2.8
#You are completely immune to the effects of recoil, no longer pushed back by exerting force. You can fire a cannon one-handed without flinching or kick off a boat without going flying yourself, Newton's Third Law simply does not apply to your end of the interaction. The force that would have caused the recoil can still hurt you directly.
4122. Absolute Recovery Speed,9.3
#You recover from any and all negative effects instantly, no matter the severity or the source. Poison, dismemberment, conceptual erasure, it doesn't matter - the moment harm touches you it's already undone. This power cannot be removed or negated by any means.
4123. Enhanced Recovery Speed,2.8
#You recover from wounds, fatigue, poisons, and other negative effects far faster than the average person. A broken bone might heal in days, a hangover in minutes. Cannot save you if you are outright killed.
4124. Supernatural Recovery Speed,5.2
#You recover from practically any negative effect in a fraction of a second, your restorative abilities surpassing nearly any other being in your universe. Severed limbs reattach, poisons burn away, exhaustion evaporates. Still cannot save you from a killing blow.
4125. Peak Recovery Speed,2.0
#You possess peak human recovery time, able to shake off stuns, poisons, flinches, fatigue, and unconsciousness faster than any regular person. You get back up before your opponent even registers you went down.
4126. Recreation Empowerment,3.5
#You become stronger, faster and more durable whenever something is recreated or restored, whether by you or others. Standing near a field regrowing after fire or a city being rebuilt makes you flourish, and you may even slow your aging by drawing on recreation itself.
4127. Red Lady Physiology,4.0
#You are a Red Lady, a ghostly woman in red born from the souls of those who suffered lust and objectification in life. Unlike most vengeful spirits, you are generally neutral or even benevolent toward the living, and possess a ghost's usual array of haunting abilities. You remain trapped between worlds until your unfinished task is complete.
4128. Red Panda Physiology,2.1
#You either are or can transform into a red panda, fully or partially. Incredibly cute and surprisingly nimble climbers, though their combat utility is about what you'd expect. At least you'll be adored everywhere you go.
4129. Superior Redcap Physiology,5.3
#You are a Superior Redcap, a greater variant of the murderous border-folklore goblin with heightened magic and demonic influence. You are virtually immortal, surviving in a weakened state even when your blood runs dry, and you can form powerful pacts with evil sorcerers and warlocks. Still vulnerable to divine magic and prayers.
4130. Redcap Physiology,3.6
#You are or can transform into a redcap, a short, thickset goblin with fiery red eyes, long teeth, taloned fingers, iron boots and a cap stained crimson from the blood of your victims. You are unaffected by mortal strength but must constantly soak your cap in fresh blood - if it ever dries, you die. Vulnerable to sunlight and holy items.
4131. Reflection Appearance,2.3
#You are only visible through reflective surfaces - mirrors, still water, polished metal. To the naked eye you do not exist, but anyone glancing at a mirror will see you plain as day. A very specific kind of invisibility.
4132. Reflection Empowerment,3.4
#You become stronger, faster and more durable the more reflections surround you, drawing power from every mirror and reflective surface in your vicinity. In a hall of mirrors you become a force of nature; in a pitch-black cave with nothing to reflect, you are diminished.
4133. Reflectionlessness,2.9
#You cast no reflection regardless of light or surface, making you completely immune to Reflection Interaction, Reflection Destruction, Catoptric Replication and Mirror Teleportation. You cannot turn this off, ever, and may still be vulnerable to being physically trapped inside a mirror.
4134. Reflex Immunity,2.7
#You are immune to your own reflexes, meaning you never automatically sneeze, blink, flinch, cough, shiver, or duck unless you consciously choose to. Fantastic for stealth and discipline, but extremely dangerous in practice - your reflexes exist for survival reasons, and going without them is its own hazard.
4135. Absolute Reflexes,8.4
#Your reflexes are limitless, capable of responding to any stimulus regardless of how fast it comes at you. Bullets, lasers, even attacks from beings with supernatural speed are reacted to as easily as you would swat a fly. Note that without a body capable of keeping up, your reactions may outpace your ability to execute them.
4136. Enhanced Reflexes,3.2
#Your reflexes are drastically enhanced, letting you dodge bullets, catch flies in mid-air, block thrown knives and react to things ordinary people would never see coming. Users of Supernatural or Absolute Speed will still blitz you.
4137. Supernatural Reflexes,5.2
#Your reaction speeds are unnaturally superior to anything in your universe, pushed well beyond what nature should allow. You react faster than any ordinary being, though objects moving at absurd speeds may still be too fast to dodge and Absolute Speed users will outmatch you.
4138. Reforming,6.0
#Should your body be broken down, shattered, torn apart or scattered, you will reform completely, reconstructing every piece back to its former state. Useless against attacks that leave no trace, such as Nothingness Manipulation or true Destruction.
4139. Refrigerator Mimicry,1.6
#You are, or can transform into, a refrigerator. A machine used for keeping things cold. You may not be able to move while in fridge form, but on the upside, your leftovers will never spoil.
4140. Absolute Regeneration,9.2
#You can heal from absolutely anything. Gamma ray bursts, spiritual annihilation, conceptual attacks, narrative erasure, supernovas, quasars — it all heals as though it never happened. Your healing factor is intelligent enough to detect threats and undo them before they land, keeping you at absolute peak condition forever.
4141. Enhanced Regeneration,3.4
#You possess an enhanced healing factor, allowing you to rapidly recover from mild to moderate injuries in seconds or minutes, while severe injuries take hours. Lost limbs, organs and nerves can all be regenerated given enough time. Cannot reverse Irreversible Destruction.
4142. Nigh-Absolute Regeneration,8.6
#Your regeneration reaches beyond cells to virtually every fundamental aspect of your existence. Your body, mind, soul, history, information, concept and even your place in the narrative can be restored after being erased. Only Absolute Erasure, Absolute Character Erasure or Irreversible Destruction can bring you down for good.
4143. Supernatural Regeneration,5.8
#Your healing factor is supernatural, letting you recover from virtually anything that doesn't result in instant death. As long as your core remains undamaged you can rebuild, and you cease to age thanks to constant cellular rejuvenation. Only One Hit Kill attacks or total body destruction can truly kill you.
4144. Regenerative Durability,5.0
#As your body regenerates from damage it becomes progressively more resistant to that kind of damage, so the longer a fight drags on, the harder you are to hurt. Each wound healed makes the next one harder to inflict.
4145. Regenerative Empowerment,6.2
#You grow stronger from taking and recovering from damage, developing progressively more powerful forms to overwhelm anything that can harm you. The more an enemy hurts you, the stronger you become, culminating in forms capable of overcoming whatever wounded you in the first place. Vulnerable to neutralization methods that deal no damage.
4146. Regenerative Growth,4.6
#Every time you regenerate, you grow larger and stronger. Damage that would kill an ordinary being only makes you a more imposing threat, healing back bigger than before with each wound you receive.
4147. Regenerative Replication,6.6
#Your regeneration is so extreme that severed body parts each regrow into a full body as powerful as the original, all connected together in a hive mind. You become effectively a biological immortal swarm, impossible to kill by damage alone. Vulnerable to sealing and binding powers which restrain without causing harm.
4148. Reincarnation Empowerment,4.2
#You grow stronger, faster and more durable with every act of rebirth, whether your own or those around you. Each reincarnation fuels your body, slows your aging, and may awaken latent abilities tied to your previous lives.
4149. Absolute Reincarnation,9.3
#You reincarnate infinitely and perfectly, reborn the instant you die, are obliterated, or even just feel like it, into a wholly new and often superior version of yourself. You retain every memory and capability from every prior lifetime, and nothing short of total concept erasure can stop the cycle.
4150. Reincarnation,4.6
#You can survive death by being reborn into a new life, potentially retaining memories, abilities, and fragments of your previous existence. How much carries over depends on the nature of each rebirth, sometimes you remember everything, sometimes you wake as a baby with only dreams of who you used to be.
4151. Reindeer Physiology,2.3
#Allows you to transform into a reindeer or a reindeer hybrid form. You gain enhanced stamina, cold resistance, sharp antlers, and a keen sense of smell. Santa may or may not take interest.
4152. Relationship Embodiment,5.4
#You are the living embodiment of relationships in all their forms, friendship, love, rivalry, kinship, enmity. You draw power from every bond that exists in the world and can wield abilities themed after any type of connection. The stronger the bonds around you, the stronger you become.
4153. Relationship Empowerment,3.6
#You grow stronger, faster, and more durable through your relationships with others. The deeper and more numerous your bonds, the more power flows into you, and severed or poisoned relationships can weaken you just as much.
4154. Relative Appearance Alteration,5.1
#Your appearance shifts based on who is looking at you, shaped by their tastes, fears, memories, and expectations. To one viewer you may appear as their dearest friend, to another as their most hated enemy, and you have no control over what they see. Your true form can only be perceived by Reality Perception.
4155. Relative Momentum,3.2
#Your overall body momentum is independent of how your limbs move. You can swing a massive weapon mid-sprint without losing balance, throw punches at lightspeed while standing still, or kick off a wall without your torso caring. Your center of mass moves exactly how you want it to, regardless of what the rest of you is doing.
4156. Relative Strength Perception,5.7
#You become as powerful as you are perceived to be. If your enemies see you as a world-ending monster, you become one, if they see you as pathetic, you become weak. A good reputation and a loud legend are your greatest weapons, and self-doubt is your deadliest enemy.
4157. Relativistic Immunity,5.3
#You are immune to the effects of relativistic velocities. Time dilation, length contraction, mass increase at lightspeed, none of it affects you. You could travel at the speed of light and still experience time normally, and your mass would remain constant no matter how fast you go.
4158. Reliability Embodiment,4.3
#You are the living embodiment of reliability, honesty, and trust. People instinctively believe you and want to follow you, and the more they rely on you the stronger you become. In a world without trust, however, this power is worthless.
4159. Reliant Immortality,5.6
#You are immortal so long as a specific object, person, soul fragment, or concept continues to exist. As long as the anchor remains, nothing can kill you, but destroy the anchor and you either die outright or become mortal again. Choose your anchor wisely.
4160. Reliant Invulnerability,5.8
#You are invulnerable as long as a specific object, soul, person, or concept exists. The more anchors you have, the more layered and ensured your invulnerability becomes. Lose them all and you become as fragile as any mortal.
4161. Reliant Resurrection,5.4
#Whenever you die, you are eventually resurrected as long as a specific object, place, person, soul fragment, or concept still exists. The anchor determines how quickly you come back, and destroying it is the only way to keep you down for good.
4162. Religion Embodiment,5.0
#You are the living embodiment of religion itself, every organized faith and set of beliefs about the sacred and the divine. You draw strength from the faith of believers and can channel holy or ritual power from any religion that has ever been practiced. Without religion anywhere in the world, your power vanishes.
4163. Remote Control Mimicry,0.7
#You are or can transform into a remote control, capable of operating the functions of whatever device you are paired with. Hope someone points you at a TV.
4164. Rephaite Physiology,5.2
#You are one of the Rephaim, the biblical tribe of giants. You stand much larger than an ordinary human with immense strength and durability to match, though you are vulnerable to prayer and faith due to your corrupt nature. Still smaller than the Anakim or Elioud, but terrifying to ordinary mortals.
4165. Replication Empowerment,4.7
#You grow stronger, faster and more durable whenever you clone or replicate yourself, each copy feeding power back into the whole. Some users draw sustenance or even slow their aging from this affinity, but being stripped of your clones leaves you painfully weakened.
4166. Replication Regeneration,5.4
#You regenerate through replication, either by spreading your wounds out across your clones to heal faster or by spawning fresh duplicates and absorbing them back into yourself. Makes you incredibly difficult to put down as long as you still have the energy to clone.
4167. Reproductive Fluid Mimicry,3.2
#(Nsfw) Your body is made of or can transform into reproductive fluids and cells, retaining your anatomical shape but made entirely of the substance. In this form you still have all your organs and some vulnerabilities remain, though you can also go homogeneous to spread out the damage.
4168. Reptile Companionship,2.2
#You have a natural connection to reptiles, making it far easier for you to bond with and train them. The bond between you and your scaly companions is unbreakable, though not every reptile will take to you without some effort.
4169. Reptiloid Physiology,3.8
#You are a reptiloid, a humanoid creature bearing the traits of lizards, snakes or other reptilians. Your form varies wildly between near-human with faint scales and features to fully resembling a lizard or frog on two legs, with physical abilities to match.
4170. Reptoid Physiology,4.2
#You are a reptoid, a lizard-like alien from either deep space or the hollow earth, wielding advanced tech and an unsettling xenophobic air of superiority. Your physical capabilities are well above a human's and you have access to the racial knowledge base of your kind, though you can still die to conventional violence.
4171. Responsibility Embodiment,5.7
#You are the personification of responsibility itself. Any task you take on, you see through with absolute commitment, knowledge, and skill, and your sheer sense of duty lends weight to everything you do. Irresponsibility Embodiment can directly counter you.
4172. Restoration Embodiment,8.1
#You are the living embodiment of restoration itself. You possess every form of healing, repairing, resurrecting and curing imaginable, and every time something somewhere in existence is returned to its proper state, you grow stronger. The more broken the world, the more there is for you to feed on.
4173. Resurrection Empowerment,5.4
#What kills you makes you stronger, literally. Every time you die and come back, your strength, stamina and powers are all increased. The effects may not always be permanent and there may be a hard cap on how many times you can cash in, but for as long as it lasts, dying is just another training arc.
4174. Resurrective Rebirth,7.4
#Every time you die and are resurrected, you come back as a newer, better, more refined version of yourself. Body, mind, soul, powers and nature are all enhanced and corrected with every rebirth, unlocking latent potential you never knew you had. Death is less an ending and more a forge.
4175. Retractable Body,2.6
#You can retract parts of your body into yourself to evade incoming attacks, making it look for a moment like your limbs have been cleanly cut off. Terrifying to watch, very useful for dodging.
4176. Retractable Eyes,2.1
#You can retract your own eyes into their sockets to avoid incoming attacks to the face. Deeply unsettling to witness, but it beats losing an eye.
4177. Retractable Head,2.8
#You can retract your own head into your body to evade incoming attacks, making it look for a horrifying second like you've been decapitated. A fantastic way to end a conversation early.
4178. Retractable Limbs,2.7
#You can retract your arms and legs into your body to avoid incoming attacks, making it look like your limbs have been severed. Great for dodging, great for scaring the hell out of opponents.
4179. Retroactive Immortality,6.3
#You are immortal in the sense that death simply doesn't stick. You can still be killed by trauma, poison, decapitation, anything really, but you will always come back, whether by instant resurrection, rebirth, or soul transfer into a fresh body. May be limited to a set number of revivals, and certain negations can strip it from you entirely.
4180. Retroscience,7.8
#You know everything about the past. The creation of the universe, its possible creators, every path history has ever taken, all of it is yours to recall. With every passing second, infinite new knowledge pours into you as that second joins the past. You are a living, ever-growing archive of everything that has ever happened.
4181. Retrospective Intelligence,4.2
#You have perfect retrospective recall, able to access every memory and piece of knowledge you've ever accumulated across this life and any past lives. Anything you've seen, read, or experienced can be pulled up instantly and analyzed against what's in front of you. Only useless when the relevant knowledge was never learned in the first place.
4182. Superior Revenant Physiology,6.2
#You are a superior revenant, a deathless soul who has ascended beyond the ordinary undead state. Your physical and spiritual stats are greatly amplified, you command lesser undead and revenants as their alpha and can grow a swarm of deathless followers that can plague entire countries. Still vulnerable to undead slayers and ranks below true deities.
4183. Revenant Physiology,4.1
#You are a revenant, a visible ghost or animated corpse returned from the grave to haunt the living. Your body no longer requires the needs of the living, you possess enhanced physical abilities and can spread disease or drain blood from those who wronged you. Decapitation, removal of the heart or a sufficiently powerful Resurrection can end you.
4184. Reversed Aging,3.3
#Your aging process runs backwards, you were born in an elderly body and will physically grow younger as you reach maturity. Mentally you develop normally, but your appearance, strength and vitality all sharpen the older you chronologically get.
4185. Rhinoceros Beetle Physiology,2.7
#You are or can transform into a rhinoceros beetle, either partially or fully. Your exoskeleton is incredibly tough, your strength relative to your size is massive and your horn can be used to pry, gore and lift far more than your frame should allow.
4186. Rhinofolk Physiology,3.2
#You are a rhinofolk, a humanoid race with the traits of a rhinoceros. You possess the raw strength, durability and charging power of the beast while retaining the dexterity and intelligence of a humanoid. Your horn makes for a natural weapon and your thick hide shrugs off most mundane attacks.
4187. Rhythmic Heartbeat,1.4
#Your heartbeat naturally carries a musical rhythm, pleasant to hear and oddly soothing to those who press their ear to your chest. Some combat techniques may synchronize with it, but missing a beat can cost you dearly.
4188. Ribbon Mimicry,3.6
#You are made of or can transform your body into ribbons. In this form you can squeeze through tight gaps, bind and ensnare targets, and reform from cuts as long as your core ribbons remain intact. Unfortunately ribbons aren't very resilient and you share all the weaknesses of the material.
4189. Rice Mimicry,2.2
#You are made of or can transform your body into rice. You can reform from scattered grains and squeeze through tight spaces, but being made of food you can be eaten, cooked or otherwise consumed by a determined opponent.
4190. Ring Empowerment,3.5
#Wearing rings makes you stronger. Certain rings amplify your existing powers, others grant entirely new abilities, and cursed rings can bind you to unearthly forces in exchange for massive power boosts. If your rings are removed or destroyed, you lose the bonuses instantly.
4191. Ritual Empowerment,4.8
#You grow stronger, faster, and more durable from ritualistic practice. Whether through sacrifice, occult ceremonies, feeding on supernatural sources, or soul transfers, each ritual permanently enhances you and may unlock new abilities. Some users stop aging entirely with enough rituals, but may become dependent on them to sustain vitality.
4192. Rivalry Empowerment,4.1
#Having a rival makes you stronger. The more you compete with, clash against, or measure yourself against your rival, the more you grow, possibly unlocking new powers and slowing your aging. Without a worthy rival, you stagnate, and the rival needs to be roughly comparable to you for the empowerment to kick in.
4193. River Otter Physiology,2.5
#You can transform into a river otter, partially or fully. Excellent swimmer, adorable, surprisingly vicious bite, and a natural affinity for freshwater environments. Also, you are now legally cute.
4194. Ro-langs Physiology,3.9
#You are a ro-langs, a Tibetan zombie from tantric folklore. Your limbs are perpetually stiff, preventing you from bending or entering low doorways, but your touch can spread plague-level disease and your body no longer obeys the rules of the living. Each ro-langs variant has its own specific destruction method written into its existence.
4195. Robe Mimicry,2.2
#You can transform your body into a robe or a set of robes, retaining your anatomy or becoming homogeneous fabric. Perfect for ambushing someone who tries to put you on. Robes aren't very resilient though, so watch out for scissors.
4196. Robin Physiology,2.4
#You can transform into a robin, partially or fully. As a robin you possess excellent flight, sharp vision, and in some folklores the bird has ties to storms and holiness, granting minor blessings of good fortune to those who see you.
4197. Robotic Body Parts,4.0
#Parts of your body, or possibly all of them, are programmable mechanical prostheses that can be reconfigured, upgraded, and assembled into various forms of technology. Run system checks on your own arm, swap out your leg for a cannon, rebuild yourself as needed. May require a power source and vulnerable to EMP.
4198. Robotic Leg,2.1
#You possess a programmable mechanical leg that can be customized and upgraded to fit your needs. Grants enhanced kicking power and durability compared to a flesh leg, and can be disassembled for system checks. Vulnerable to EMPs and may require a power source.
4199. Robotic Neck,1.6
#You possess a programmable mechanical neck that holds your head steady no matter what. Can be upgraded with swivel range, shock absorption and reinforced armor. Vulnerable to EMPs and may need a power source.
4200. Robust Activity,3.6
#Your body produces absurd amounts of force with minimal muscle activity, letting you move and strike with strength far beyond what your physique suggests. A skinny nerd with this trait could bench press a car. You can still tire from overuse.
4201. Rocky Terrain Adaptation,2.0
#Your body is perfectly adapted to rocky environments. You can scale, leap and navigate jagged landscapes with ease, resist injury from sharp stone, and endure the harsh conditions of mountains and badlands without strain.
4202. Room Mimicry,3.3
#You either are or can transform into a room. In transformed form your body contains all your organs in anatomically identical placements, just made of the room, making you somewhat vulnerable to structural weakening. Movement is difficult while transformed.
4203. Rope Mimicry,3.0
#You are or share the traits of a rope, letting you wrangle and bind people with your body, stretch to great lengths, and tie yourself into knots no contortionist could manage.
4204. Rotation Adaptation,2.5
#You can rotate in any position no matter how strenuous or unusual, performing fast spins mid-yoga pose or while balanced on one finger. No matter the contortion, your rotation stays perfectly stable.
4205. Rotational Empowerment,4.1
#You become stronger, faster and more durable from rotation and rotational energy, growing more powerful the more things spin around you. You may even draw sustenance from rotational energy or slow your aging, but without rotation, you weaken.
4206. Rougarou Physiology,3.8
#You are or can transform into a Rougarou, the Cajun werewolf of the Louisiana swamps. You gain enhanced physical abilities, wolf-like senses and a taste for blood. Vulnerable to fire and decapitation, and some say they can be repelled by salt or a hexagon.
4207. Rough Armor,3.1
#Your body is covered in a defensive layer of spikes, sharp scales or jagged fur that not only absorbs attacks but injures anyone who makes contact with it. Grapplers and unarmed fighters learn to regret touching you.
4208. Rubber Mimicry,4.2
#Your body is made of or can transform into rubber, granting you the elastic, bouncy physiology that made a certain straw-hatted pirate famous. Blunt attacks do nothing, but cutting weapons, fire and cold are still serious threats.
4209. Rumor Empowerment,3.6
#You grow stronger, faster and tougher the more rumors circulate about you, whether they are flattering or vile. A juicy piece of gossip spreading through a city can push your abilities to frightening heights, but if the rumors are disproven or dismissed, you weaken accordingly.
4210. Runestone Mimicry,3.0
#You are or can transform into a raised stone with a runic inscription. In this form your body is incredibly durable and carries the quiet weight of the Viking Age, and many users passively pick up minor rune magic as a side effect of being a runestone.
4211. Enhanced Running,2.6
#You can run far faster than a peak human, with effortless control, efficiency and traction. Your natural top speed lands somewhere between 40 and 380 MPH depending on training, and you can maintain it without the wear and tear a normal body would suffer.
4212. Supernatural Running,4.6
#You run obviously, glaringly, unnaturally faster than any other being in your universe. Cars are slow. Jets are slow. Unless you also have the durability and senses to handle those speeds, however, you risk tearing your own body apart the moment you really open up.
4213. Rusalka Physiology,4.3
#Slavic Mythology - You are or can transform into a rusalka, a water spirit of Slavic folklore. You possess unnatural beauty, water affinity, and the power to charm mortals into the depths. You must stay near water or you will dry up and die, and you are averse to wormwood, lovage and garlic.
4214. Sabre Mimicry,2.8
#You are or can transform into a sabre or a body made of sabres. In this form you are razor-edged across your entire silhouette, and depending on the material you may be extraordinarily durable. Some users get stuck in this form if they are not careful.
4215. Saci Physiology,4.0
#Brazilian Folklore - You are or can transform into a Saci, a one-legged mischievous youngster with holes in his palms, a pipe in his mouth and a magical red cap that lets him vanish and reappear inside a dust devil. You can travel via whirlwinds and grant wishes when cornered, but if your cap is removed much of your power is lost, and crossing water on the wind slows you down.
4216. Sack Man Physiology,4.2
#Iberian Folklore - You are or can transform into the Sack Man, an impossibly ugly and skinny old figure who wanders the land with a large sack searching for naughty children. You possess supernatural stealth, an unending sack that can hold victims many times its size, and the dread aura of a childhood nightmare. You grow weaker when no one fears you.
4217. Sacrifice Aspect Manifestation,5.4
#You embody one of the sacrifice aspects, essential archetypes that manifest as the powers and traits of a chosen offering. Your aspect is either a mirror of your own deepest character or assigned to you by a higher entity, and its abilities scale with how fully you accept the name of the sacrifice you carry.
4218. Sacrifice Empowerment,4.4
#You grow stronger, faster and more durable from sacrifices, whether your own or those made by others in your name. Acts of martyrdom and offering fuel your abilities, and devoted users can draw sustenance from sacrifices alone, slowing or even halting their aging entirely.
4219. Sacrificial Creation Physiology,4.6
#You are a being born from sacrifice, possessing traits and powers derived from whatever was offered to create you. You may require continued offerings to sustain your existence, and the nature of your original sacrifice influences your body and mind in subtle and not so subtle ways.
4220. Sadness Empowerment,3.5
#Your strength, speed, and durability all scale with sadness, either your own or that of those around you. In a room full of grief you could be unstoppable, but surround you with happiness and you become ordinary. Extreme sorrow may cloud your judgement.
4221. Sagari Physiology,3.1
#You are a Sagari, a yokai born from the unhappy soul of a discarded horse, manifesting as a large horse head that hangs from trees. Your unnatural cries can startle and inflict fever upon those who hear them. Vulnerable to Shinto rituals, prayers and the relics of shrine maidens.
4222. Salamander Physiology,4.1
#You are or can transform into a salamander, the legendary fire-lizard of myth. Your body is so cold it can live unharmed in flames and extinguish the hottest fires, and your skin secretes a poison potent enough to contaminate a well just by falling in. Your body also produces the legendary salamander wool.
4223. Saliva Mimicry,3.4
#Your body is made of saliva, or can transform into it at will. You can liquefy to slip through gaps, reform from splatters, and shrug off physical attacks that would harm solid flesh. Extreme temperatures are dangerous, and most people will not want to touch you.
4224. Salmon of Knowledge Physiology,6.5
#Celtic Myth - You are or can transform into the Salmon of Knowledge, the legendary fish that ate nine hazelnuts from the Well of Wisdom and gained all the knowledge in the world. In this form you possess omniscient awareness of all things, and the first being to eat your flesh would inherit that knowledge in turn.
4225. Salmonidae Physiology,2.0
#You are or can transform into a member of the salmonid family, including salmon, trout, char, grayling and freshwater whitefish. You gain the ability to breathe underwater, swim upstream against tremendous currents, and leap remarkable distances out of the water.
4226. Salt Mimicry,3.8
#Your body is composed of salt and you can shift freely between human and salt form. While you can reform from scattered grains, salt isn't particularly durable and large amounts of water will literally melt you away.
4227. Salt Shaker Mimicry,1.1
#Your body is made of salt shakers, or you can transform into one. Yes, just salt shakers. You are extremely vulnerable to being picked up and used at dinner.
4228. Samebito Physiology,4.2
#Japanese Mythology - You are or can transform into a Samebito, a humanoid shark yokai with inky black skin and emerald eyes. You possess aquatic supremacy, enhanced physical stats and your tears literally turn into jewels. You can be controlled by shark manipulators and banished by Shinto deities.
4229. Samsara Embodiment,7.8
#You are the living embodiment of Samsara, the eternal cycle of birth, death and rebirth. Your very presence pulls souls through the wheel of existence, and you wield absolute authority over reincarnation itself. To kill you is meaningless, you are the cycle.
4230. Sanctiscience,8.7
#You possess absolute knowledge of all things spiritual. Every soul, every spirit world, every afterlife, every divine truth is laid bare before your mind. You know the true nature of existence beyond the physical, and can navigate the spiritual realm as easily as reading a book.
4231. Sand Embodiment,5.7
#You are the physical embodiment of sand itself. You have limitless control over and complete immunity to all forms of sand, from desert dunes to glassmaker's silica. Water, earth and air-based powers may pose some trouble for your domain.
4232. Sand Mimicry,4.6
#Your body is made of sand and you can shift freely between human and sand form. Incredibly flexible with Water Mimicry-like mutability, you can pour yourself through any gap and reform at will. Water makes you heavier and harder to control, and fire can melt you into glass.
4233. Sand Symbiosis,4.6
#You host a sand-based entity within your body, whether an elemental force, a silica spirit, or a being of living granules. In exchange for potent sand-based powers, the entity may try to take over your mind or body if your will falters.
4234. Sandwich Mimicry,2.8
#Your body is completely composed of sandwich matter, either retaining your original anatomy with organs made of bread and filling or becoming a homogenous sandwich blob. You are oddly vulnerable to rot and hungry predators.
4235. Sandworm Physiology,4.8
#You are or can transform into a sandworm, a gigantic carnivorous worm-like creature that swims through sand like water. Your jaws can rend anything in the desert and your presence alone makes the ground tremble.
4236. Sanitized Metabolism,2.2
#Your metabolism is flawlessly sanitized, ensuring your body remains perpetually clean and free of waste, sweat, dead skin, and odor. You don't gain any actual immunity from this, but you'll never need a shower, and you still smell faintly pleasant even after a hard workout. You can still get dirty from outside sources though.
4237. Sansei Physiology,3.3
#You are a Sansei, a mountain-dwelling yokai resembling a small humanoid spirit with a single backwards-bent limb. You are master of the mountain animals and possess minor yokai powers, though you are vulnerable to Shinto rituals and prayers from shrine maidens.
4238. Sap Empowerment,3.1
#You grow stronger, faster, and more durable when in contact with plant sap, drawing sustenance and vitality from it. With enough exposure you may even slow your aging or draw power directly from trees, but consuming too much could poison or kill you.
4239. Sapient Organite Consciousness,7.4
#Your body houses a collective consciousness of sentient organite, trillions of self-aware bio-computers that bond with you as their primary host. They respond to your every thought as a hive, can store infinite genetic information, and grant you superhuman adaptability and regeneration through their gestalt intelligence.
4240. Sarugami Physiology,3.6
#You are a Sarugami, a clever and dangerous yokai monkey with human-level intelligence, the ability to speak, and the cunning to wield weapons. You possess yokai powers and a knack for raiding and mischief, though you can still be slain by mortal blades and are vulnerable to Shinto rites.
4241. Sasabonsam Physiology,3.9
#You are a Sasabonsam, a blood-draining ogre from African folklore resembling a large humanoid with iron teeth and hooked claws. Living in trees, you use your claws to snatch prey from below, and your cruelty makes you a terror of the canopy. Vulnerable to rites and prayers of the African pantheons.
4242. Sash Mimicry,2.8
#Your body is made of sashes, long ribbons of silk and cloth woven into a vaguely human shape. You can unravel and reform at will, slipping through narrow gaps, but you are only as durable as the fabric you're made of.
4243. Sasquatch Physiology,3.8
#You are a sasquatch, the missing link between man and ape. Your physical strength, endurance and senses are far beyond those of a normal human, and your thick fur and tough hide grant you natural resilience to both the elements and physical harm.
4244. Satellite Mimicry,4.6
#You either are or can transform into a satellite, gaining orbital observation, surveillance arrays, microelectronic stealth, and potentially weapon systems and shielding. Entering and exiting orbit under your own power may be challenging.
4245. Satori Physiology,4.2
