#You are a satori, a monkey-like yokai that haunts mountain huts. You can read the surface thoughts of anyone you lock eyes with, and your ape-like body grants you agility and strength beyond a normal human. A hungry instinct lurks at the edges of your mind.
4246. Satyr Physiology,3.9
#You are a satyr or faun, a half-man half-goat creature of the wild. You possess supernatural endurance, a natural affinity with nature and animals, and an enchanting musical talent that can charm listeners into dancing. Your presence lifts spirits - or breaks them.
4247. Sauropod Physiology,4.3
#You are a sauropod, the long-necked titans of the dinosaur age. Your sheer size and mass make you almost unstoppable through blunt force alone, and a casual swing of your tail could flatten a building. You are not particularly agile, nor bright.
4248. Sausage Mimicry,1.0
#Your body is made entirely of sausage links. You can reform and reshape at will, but you are soft, vulnerable, and carnivores within a mile will be unusually interested in you.
4249. Saw Mimicry,3.1
#Your body is or can become a massive spinning sawblade. You are cuttingly dangerous but depending on your material you may be vulnerable, and some users find themselves stuck as a giant circular saw permanently.
4250. Saxophone Mimicry,1.3
#Your body is or can transform into a saxophone. You produce beautiful music when air is blown through you, but you may be unable to move on your own while transformed.
4251. Sazae-Oni Physiology,4.7
#You are a Sazae-Oni, a shapeshifting sea yokai born from a turban snail that has lived for thirty years. You can take the form of a beautiful woman to lure sailors to their doom, possess inhuman strength and aquatic adaptations, and can regrow from your shell if your body is destroyed.
4252. Scarecrow Mimicry,3.5
#Your body is that of a living scarecrow, near-weightless and non-living. You feel no pain, need no food, and can take absurd punishment from blunt force, but fire is a lethal threat and a single torch could end you. Straw bodies also come with an uncanny wisdom.
4253. Scarf Empowerment,2.6
#You become stronger, faster and more durable whenever you are in contact with scarves. The longer and finer the scarf, the greater the boost, and at higher levels you may even draw sustenance from them.
4254. Scent Sight,2.4
#You can see scents as visible trails in the air, colored and shaped by their source. Perfect for tracking, identifying individuals and spotting things hidden from normal sight. Inodorous targets are invisible to you.
4255. Science Embodiment,9.2
#You are the physical embodiment of science itself, not just a scientist but the living personification of every law, principle and potential the discipline holds. Every experiment ever conducted, every theorem ever proven and every machine ever built is an extension of your being, granting you limitless control over all forms of science.
4256. Science Empowerment,3.3
#You become stronger, faster and more durable when in contact with scientific forces, whether that be electricity, radiation, chemical reactions or machinery. At higher levels you can draw sustenance from them and unlock new abilities tied to the affinity.
4257. Science Fiction Embodiment,7.6
#You are the living embodiment of science fiction itself, the concept of conceptual exploration and research woven into a person. Any technology, theory or phenomenon native to the genre becomes something you can invoke, from FTL drives to uplifted hiveminds, so long as you can frame it as 'exploring the unknown through science'.
4258. Science Immunity,4.2
#You are immune to all things science, science-based powers and technology simply refuse to function on you. Bullets may still hit you as pure kinetic impact, but anything labelled 'scientific' slides right off. Does nothing against magic or the supernatural, and you can still be hurt from within.
4259. Science Lock,8.4
#You exist entirely outside of science, independent of its laws, logic and principles in any form. No scientific power, formula or phenomenon can touch you, you simply are not subject to that framework of reality. Only those wielding Almighty or Meta Science can reach you.
4260. Scientific Power Link,5.4
#Your scientific nature is directly linked to your powers, fueling and strengthening them through your science-based essence. The stronger your scientific core, the more potent your abilities become. Unstable scientific force can cause your powers to rampage, and Science Negation can shut you down entirely.
4261. Scientific Power,5.7
#You possess scientific power, a hyper-adaptive natural force drawn from the source of all science. It produces endless levels of energy from mundane or cosmic sources, and grants you a wide variety of science-related abilities, either all at once or growing with time. Science Negation is your greatest weakness.
4262. Scientific Self-Restoration,5.8
#You can heal, regenerate and even resurrect your own body through advanced scientific means. Nanotechnology knits wounds, cybernetic interfaces replace organs, genetic engineering regrows limbs, and exotic energy can reboot you from death itself. Informational corruption and Crash! effects can disrupt the process.
4263. Scissor Mimicry,2.4
#You can transform your body into scissors, either retaining a humanoid anatomy made of scissor-metal or dissolving into homogenous blade-matter. Durability depends on the quality of metal you are made of.
4264. Sciuromorph Physiology,2.2
#You either are or can transform into a sciuromorph, the rodent family of squirrels, chipmunks, marmots, flying squirrels and prairie dogs. Comes with the associated agility, cheek storage, and in some cases, the ability to glide.
4265. Scorching Presence,3.1
#You project a field of heat around you, constantly raising the temperature of the surrounding area to scorching levels. Useful for intimidation and area denial, though without heat immunity you will cook yourself too, and it may not be something you can turn off.
4266. Scorpinoid Physiology,3.7
#You are or can transform into a scorpinoid, a fictional humanoid scorpion race. You possess a human-like torso with chitinous armor, clawed hands, and a venomous tail strong enough to pierce through metal plating.
4267. Scorpion Man Physiology,4.1
#You either are or can transform into an aqrabuamelu, the scorpion men of Babylonian mythology who guard the gates of the sun. You possess the torso and arms of a man atop the enormous body of a scorpion, with a presence so terrible that your gaze was said to mean death in the old stories.
4268. Scorpion Monster Physiology,3.8
#You either are or can transform into a scorpion monster, some massive hulking arthropod nightmare with armor, claws, and a venom that kills gods. Unfortunately you are also vulnerable to Monster Manipulation and Monster Slayer users.
4269. Scorpion Physiology,2.6
#You either are or can transform into a scorpion, granting you a venomous stinger, hardened exoskeleton and the ability to survive in extreme environments. Beware of mongoose, centipedes and bats.
4270. Sculpture Mimicry,2.5
#You can transform your body into a sculpture of any material, whether marble, bronze, wood or clay, retaining your anatomical form but made of the chosen substance. Durability depends on the material, and you may need an essence to keep yourself animate.
4271. Scylla Physiology,6.2
#Greek Mythology - You are or can transform into Scylla, the legendary sea monster of the strait. You possess six long serpentine necks with grisly heads, twelve tentacle-like legs, and a body ringed with the barking heads of hounds. Any ship or creature that passes within your reach is doomed, your multiple heads striking faster than the eye can follow.
4272. Scythe Mimicry,3.8
#You can transform your body, partially or wholly, into living scythes. In this form your limbs become curving blades and your body takes on the sharpness and density of forged steel, though your organs remain and you are still vulnerable to being broken.
4273. Sea Monster Physiology,5.8
#You are or can transform into an aquatic monster with an innate connection to the sea. Your form depends on the gacha's whim - kraken, leviathan, deep one, or something nameless - but all share immense physical power, aquatic adaptation, and a terrifying presence that unnerves sailors from miles away.
4274. Sea Nymph Physiology,5.2
#Greek Mythology - You are or can transform into a sea nymph, a minor goddess of the salt waters. You possess graceful beauty, hydrokinetic command over the tides, the ability to breathe underwater and communicate with sea life, and a fragment of divinity inherited from your mythic parentage.
4275. Sea Otter Physiology,1.6
#You can transform into a sea otter, either partially or fully. You gain excellent swimming ability, cold resistance from a thick coat of fur, and the dexterity to crack shellfish on a rock resting on your belly. Mostly just adorable.
4276. Sea Serpent Physiology,5.4
#You are or can transform into a sea serpent, a colossal serpentine monster of legend. Your body stretches for hundreds of meters, your scales shrug off harpoons, and your jaws can snap a galleon in half. You are most powerful in deep water but can survive on land for short periods.
4277. Sea Turtle Physiology,1.8
#You can transform into a sea turtle, either partially or fully. You gain a heavy protective shell, the ability to hold your breath for hours, and a natural sense of oceanic navigation that lets you find your way across any sea.
4278. Seagull Physiology,1.4
#You can transform into a seagull, either partially or fully. You gain flight, keen eyesight, and an unbreakable instinct for stealing french fries from beachgoers. Not very fast on land and you cannot dive very deep.
4279. Sealed Form,5.0
#You exist in an undeveloped state, with your true powers locked away and slowly manifesting as you mature. The process is unpredictable - each breakthrough might grant you a minor utility or shake the foundations of the world. Others may have placed the lock on you, and breaking it early could be catastrophic.
4280. Sealing Empowerment,4.5
#You grow stronger, faster and more durable the more seals or sealed entities are near you, drawing sustenance directly from confinement itself. A user standing in a vault full of sealed artifacts could be a minor god, while one with nothing to feed on is only slightly above human.
4281. Sealing Symbiosis,5.0
#You host a sealing entity bound to your body and soul, granting you potent sealing abilities such as confining beings, powers, and weapons within vessels. As with all symbiosis, the entity may try to take you over or burn your body out if pushed too hard.
4282. Season Embodiment,7.6
#You are the living incarnation of the four seasons, wielding divine authority over Winter, Spring, Summer, and Autumn and everything they represent, from death and decay to light and rebirth. Your presence alone can throw weather patterns into chaos if you aren't careful.
4283. Seaweed Physiology,2.2
#Your body is made of seaweed, or can transform into it at will. You are slimy, flexible, and difficult to get a grip on, though you remain vulnerable to anything that would hurt ordinary seaweed.
4284. Seduction Immunity,2.3
#You are completely immune to normal and supernatural seduction, as well as all sexually-based powers. Succubi, sirens, and charming magical girls all bounce off you like rain on a roof.
4285. Seductive Magnetism,5.2
#You possess an effortless, otherworldly allure that goes far beyond mere beauty, a primal pull that stirs fascination, admiration and quiet hunger in nearly anyone who comes close. It is always active, though you can regulate its intensity, and some may be naturally immune.
4286. Seductive Pheromones,4.0
#(Nsfw) Your body constantly emits intensely seductive pheromones laced with aphrodisiacs, awakening a raw, instinctive erotic hunger in those who breathe them in. Filters and masks will shut it down entirely, and the strong-willed are resistant.
4287. Segben Physiology,4.3
#Philippine Mythology - You are or can transform into a segben, a fearsome werewolf-like predator from Philippine mythology. Your tongue instantly kills anything it touches, letting you feast on your prey at leisure, though spices can keep you at bay and sharp knives can harm you.
4288. Segmented Wings,3.5
#You possess or can form wings made up of many individual objects or small creatures working in unison. They grant you flight and can be broken apart mid-fight to attack or defend.
4289. Seismic Energy Immunity,3.4
#You are completely immune to vibrations and seismic force. No earthquake, shockwave, or body-shattering resonance can harm you directly, though indirect effects like falling rubble will still get you.
4290. Selective Appearance,2.1
#You are only visible through certain mediums, like mirrors, cameras, or specific types of light. You still physically exist though, so sand and dust can still give away your position.
4291. Selective Heaviness,4.1
#You are simultaneously weighted and weightless, allowing you to walk on quicksand without sinking and step on pressure plates without triggering them, yet still knock over heavy objects or carry massive loads. Physics treats you as a walking contradiction and doesn't ask questions.
4292. Selective Immunity,3.8
#You are completely immune to a specific power, element, attack, object, or abstract concept of your choosing. The more specific the immunity the stronger it is, but anything outside of that narrow band can still harm you as normal.
4293. Selective Inertia,5.1
#You have both high and low inertia at the same time, high in regards to everything that isn't you, low in regards to yourself. It is extremely hard for anything external to change your motion, yet you can start, stop, or change direction effortlessly. Makes you essentially invulnerable to physical attacks while letting you punch with the force of a freight train.
4294. Selective Invincibility,3.6
#You are absolutely unbeatable in a specific activity, field, or use of a specific power. No one will ever defeat you in your chosen speciality, be it chess, swordsmanship, or cooking ramen, but you can still be beaten in anything else. The more niche the field, the more absolute the invincibility.
4295. Selective Lightness,4.0
#You are simultaneously lightweight and not lightweight, letting you activate heavy pressure switches and break through hard floors by having weight, while being light enough to not topple fragile objects when you want to carry them. The perfect counterpart to Selective Heaviness.
4296. Selective Limb Empowerment,3.9
#You possess at least one body part that houses its own supernatural powers, making that limb vastly stronger or more capable than the rest of your body. Your left arm might be able to shatter mountains while the rest of you is peak human. If the limb is removed, the power goes with it.
4297. Selective Momentum,5.1
#You have both high and low momentum simultaneously, letting you resist being moved by any external force while freely changing your own velocity and direction. Similar to Selective Inertia but focused on motion rather than mass and rest, a bullet train hitting you will bounce off while you casually turn mid-air.
4298. Selective Omnipresence,8.5
#You exist everywhere some specific subject and anything related to it exists. If your subject is death, you are present at every dying breath across the entirety of creation. You perceive and can act through all of it simultaneously, bound only by the scope of your chosen domain.
4299. Selective Omniscience,8.4
#You know everything about a specific subject and everything connected to it. If your subject is art, you know every artist past present and future, every composition ever made, and every technique and theory down to the infinite. Outside that sphere you know only what a normal person would.
4300. Self Empowerment,5.0
#You become stronger, faster, and more durable simply by being yourself. Walking, eating, sleeping, all of it passively empowers you over time, and with enough growth you may even unlock new abilities or slow your aging by drawing sustenance from your own existence. Infinity Negation can shut this down.
4301. Self Power Link,4.5
#Some core aspect of yourself (your element, your emotions, your spirit, or mystical nature) is directly linked to your powers and fuels them. The stronger the aspect the stronger your powers, but if either the aspect or the power is destroyed while linked, you may lose both the ability and your life.
4302. Self-Adaptation,6.2
#Your existence reactively adapts to virtually anything you face, gaining whatever traits or abilities are needed to survive or overcome the situation. The speed and extent of adaptation are limited only by your own preferences, allowing you to tailor how your body and powers evolve against any threat.
4303. Self-Affection,2.1
#You are able to affect and influence yourself with your own powers, bypassing the common limitation of abilities that cannot target their wielder. A subtle but surprisingly useful passive for those whose powers would otherwise be unusable on themselves.
4304. Self-Contained Existence,7.6
#You are complete unto yourself, drawing everything you need for your existence from within. You no longer require air, food, or external energy, your lifespan is untouched by outside forces, and you exist distinct from the rest of creation. It does not grant mastery over yourself, just freedom from anything outside you.
4305. Self-Destruction Embodiment,6.4
#You embody the idea of self-destruction, self-harm, and suicidal ideation itself. You can represent and draw power from the deathwishes of individuals or entire groups, feeding on despair and the urge to end oneself. A dark and uncomfortable existence, but a conceptually potent one.
4306. Self-Expressive Capability,5.4
#Your powers, capabilities and physiology develop to represent your own identity, drawn from your experiences, ideals, hobbies, treasured objects and inner character. As you use these capabilities you come to know yourself more fundamentally, on a journey of true self-recognition. What specifically you develop is unpredictable.
4307. Self-Harm Empowerment,4.4
#The more damage you inflict on yourself, the stronger, faster and more durable you become, potentially unlocking new abilities and even slowing your aging. A masochist's dream, requiring immense willpower to wield since you still feel every wound and dying from your own hands ends the loop.
4308. Self-Power Immunity,3.3
#You are immune to the negative ill effects of your own powers, so your fire can't burn you and your poison can't poison you. Indirect consequences still apply - if you drop a building, it crushes you like anyone else - and the same power used by someone else will still hit normally.
4309. Self-Power Resistance,2.1
#You are resistant, though not immune, to the negative effects of your own powers. If you push hard enough, you can still burn yourself with your own fire, but casual use won't hurt you.
4310. Self-Retention,6.3
#You can keep your sense of self intact no matter what happens to you - if you are converted into a monster, an object, or a soul in the afterlife, you remain you. Advanced users are perfectly and permanently unchanged in every way, fully immune to conversion-based powers. Only Omni-Conversion can break this.
4311. Self-Sufficiency,7.8
#You are completely self-sufficient and can overcome any obstacle without outside help of any kind. You have no need for air, food, water, shelter or any other external thing, and at the highest level you may exist separate and transcendent from creation itself, needing nothing from reality to keep on being.
4312. Self-Supremacy,7.0
#You are fully aware of and in complete control over everything that composes you - every cell, every breath, every thought, every emotion, every subconscious twitch. Nothing in your body, mind or soul does anything you don't want it to, granting you powerful immunity to powers that try to control any part of you. The constant awareness can be overwhelming.
4313. Self-Sustenance,4.7
#Your physical and metabolic needs are greatly reduced or completely eliminated - you may no longer need food, water, air, sleep, warmth, shelter, or waste excretion. This lets you survive in inhospitable environments like the vacuum of space or the deep ocean. You may still feel the psychological pangs of hunger even if your body no longer requires it.
4314. Selkie Physiology,3.5
#You are a Selkie, a seal in the water who sheds their coat to walk on land as a striking and seductive human. You swim like you were born to it and your presence is magnetic to those dissatisfied with their lives. If your seal coat is stolen, you may be unable to return to your true form, and extended separation from the sea is deeply depressing, even deadly.
4315. Sensation Immunity,2.9
#You are immune to any and all sensations - pain, pleasure, tickling, itching, tingling, all of it. You still take physical damage as normal, you just don't feel anything from it. Immunity bypassing and power negation are the perfect counters.
4316. Absolute Sight,8.7
#Your eyes are no longer bound by mortal perception. You can see everything happening across the world, the galaxy, or even the entire universe at once. You can gaze into the thoughts of any being and pierce the veil of time to witness past and future events. The only thing you cannot see is something hidden by a power greater than sight itself.
4317. Enhanced Sight,2.6
#Your vision is pushed beyond the peak of your species, granting you incredible clarity, distance, and color perception. You can see in the dark, underwater, magnify distant objects, and perceive things too small for the naked eye. Your accuracy and precision are significantly improved.
4318. Supernatural Sight,4.6
#Your sight is on a supernatural level, allowing you to see details tens of kilometres away, potentially around corners or over the horizon. You can see in all directions at once, pierce absolute darkness, track things too fast for the normal eye and distinguish the faintest details. Weak against Blindness Inducement and susceptible to sensory overload.
4319. Peak Human Sight,1.9
#Your eyesight is pushed to the absolute peak of human capability, 20/5 vision equivalent to a bird of prey. You can see from 20 feet away what others need to be 5 feet away to see, and your eyes can pick out detail in complete darkness. Still, it is not superhuman and can be overwhelmed.
4320. Absolute Smell,8.5
#Your nose transcends mortal limitation. You can smell everything that occurs across the world, the galaxy, or even the entire universe. You can smell the thoughts of any living being and even bypass time itself to catch the scent of the past and future. Essentially omniscience through the nose.
4321. Enhanced Smell,2.4
#You can detect specific people, objects, substances or locations by scent alone, tracking them from their origin with nothing but your nose. You can detect lies, illnesses, and even tumours by the hormones a target excretes. Does not work on odourless materials or targets using Scent Shifting.
4322. Supernatural Smell,4.4
#Your sense of smell is so unnaturally acute that you can smell anything over any distance, including through space itself. You can distinguish individual molecules and atoms by scent alone. Weak against Anosmia Inducement and Sensory Overload, and may be constantly active with no way to turn it off.
4323. Peak Human Smell,2.0
#Your sense of smell is pushed to the limits of human perfection, rivalling that of wolves. You gain blindsight through scent, lie detection through released chemicals, pregnancy detection through pheromones, and even rudimentary empathy through emotional pheromones. Shapeshifters cannot hide their true form from your nose.
4324. Enhanced Taste,2.3
#Your sense of taste is sharp enough to accurately identify harmful and beneficial substances at a glance. You can tell what someone has eaten or drunk recently by tasting their saliva or sweat, and with training you may even taste things from a short distance without physical contact. Strong flavours may overwhelm you.
4325. Supernatural Taste,4.3
#Your sense of taste is unnaturally acute, letting you identify unknown substances simply by tasting them and remotely taste everything in your environment from a great distance. You can distinguish chemical compounds at a molecular level. Food allergies may still affect you with disproportionate severity.
4326. Peak Human Taste,1.8
#Your sense of taste is pushed to the highest limits of human perfection. You can tell how old something is, what ingredients were added first, and identify the chemical compounds within any dish. A perfect skill for chefs, sommeliers and poison detectors.
4327. Enhanced Touch,2.6
#Your sense of touch is exceptional, allowing you to detect specific persons, objects or places by feel alone. You can sense the thinnest invisible cracks on any surface, feel vibrations through solids, liquids and air, and track targets with the tip of your fingers. Can be countered by Intangibility.
4328. Supernatural Touch,4.7
#Your sense of touch is so unnaturally acute you can feel impressions left on intangible things like light waves, gravity, layers of space-time, and even the fabric of reality itself. You can touch and feel individual molecules, atoms and subatomic particles, and perceive the internal workings of your own body and anything that touches it.
4329. Peak Human Touch,1.9
#Your sense of touch is pushed to the peak of human perfection. You can feel the ink on a printed page, sense another person's breathing, pulse and heartbeat through the air, and detect vibrations through solid substances and air-pressure changes. Not superhuman, but uncannily precise.
4330. Absolute Senses,9.0
#Your senses ascend to an infinite scale, letting you perceive all of existence with unmatched clarity. You can see anything, hear the faintest whispers across creation, and smell or taste across infinite distance. You perceive conceptual forces, ethereal beings, thoughts, instincts, and non-physical aspects of reality as easily as a mortal perceives the room around them. An aspect of omnipotence.
4331. Supernatural Senses,5.3
#Every one of your five senses is pushed to a super-unnatural level. You see thousands of miles away in immense resolution, hear through walls and pick up the faintest vibrations from afar, smell and taste individual molecules, and feel the slightest disturbances in air, earth and water. May be constantly active and unblockable.
4332. Peak Human Senses,2.4
#All five of your senses are pushed to the peak of human capability. 20/5 vision, vision in total darkness and ultraviolet, hearing from 10hz to 40khz, touch that can feel another's heartbeat through the air, and smell and taste that rival a wolf's. Not superhuman, but you are as perfect an organism as your species allows.
4333. Sensorimotor Synchrony,5.4
#Your body is perfectly synchronised with your mind. There is no delay between thought and action, no gap between intention and execution. Neural transmission speed, muscle response time and biological processing lag simply do not apply to you. Your body is a direct extension of your will, though opponents fast enough can still blitz you before your mind has anything to react to.
4334. Sensory Adaptation,3.9
#Your senses automatically adapt to suit any environment, allowing you to survive situations that would overwhelm, damage or deceive a normal sensory system. Blinding light, deafening sound, toxic stench - your body adjusts on the fly. Adaptations may be temporary depending on the situation.
4335. Sensory Attacks Immunity,4.0
#You are immune to any sense-suppressing or sensory-attack ability. Flashbangs, blinding lights, deafening noises, sensory overload, sensory deprivation - none of it affects you. Your five senses are naturally shielded against anything that would interfere with them, though immunity bypassing or power negation can still get through.
4336. Sensory Regeneration,3.6
#Your senses and sensory organs regenerate if harmed. Gouged eyes, ruptured eardrums, severed tongues or destroyed noses all grow back fully functional. You can even regenerate sensory organs you have never had before. Opposed by Anti-Regeneration and Healing Erasure.
4338. Sentience Development,3.0
#You possess sentience and the capacity to develop it further, growing your awareness, perception and subjective experience over time. A nice baseline if you were previously an object or simple construct, but nothing special for anyone already conscious.
4339. Sentient Brain,3.3
#Your brain has a sentience of its own, distinct from your own consciousness, and you can hold conversations with it inside your head. Useful for second opinions and calculations, but your brain may occasionally try to seize the driver's seat.
4340. Sentient Force Empowerment,5.0
#You draw strength, speed, and durability from sentient forces, with your existing powers amplified and new abilities potentially unlocked based on the affinity. You may even draw sustenance from them, slowing or stopping your aging. If the subtle body you feed from is absent, you grow weaker.
4341. Sephirot Mimicry,7.5
#Your body is made of or can become the Kabbalistic Tree of Life itself, each limb and organ an emanation of the Sephirot. You embody the divine blueprint of creation in physical form, granting you access to its primal forces as an extension of your own physiology.
4342. Sequenced Motion,3.5
#You can move normally even when the internal process behind your movement is heavily sequential, such as when your body parts act in smaller subordered stages or your nervous system requires multiple steps to produce a single action. Also works on cognitive processes, keeping your thoughts smooth regardless of how many subroutines they require. Can still be slightly slow even when sped up.
4343. Seraph Physiology,7.8
#You are a seraph, an upper-level angel infused with the holy fires of heaven, possessing six wings, multiple faces and eyes covering every inch of your body. Your divine brightness is so intense that most beings who lay eyes on you are instantly incinerated, and you stand at the highest tier of the angelic hierarchy, answering only to the supreme divine.
4344. Serpentine Tail,3.2
#Your lower body is or can transform into a long muscular snake tail, replacing your legs. The tail is strong enough to whip opponents into the air, coil around and restrain them, or let you slither at decent speed. Forming the tail takes a moment if you weren't already in that form.
4345. Serving Empowerment,3.9
#You grow stronger, faster and more durable the more faithfully you serve a cause, person, country or ideal of your choosing. Deep service may even slow your aging or let you draw sustenance from the act itself. Betraying or abandoning the thing you serve collapses the empowerment instantly.
4346. Sewing Equipment Mimicry,2.9
#You either are or can transform into sewing equipment, whether that be fabric, thread, needles, pins or even a full sewing machine. You may retain your anatomy in this form or shift into homogeneous material, becoming essentially a living pincushion or spool.
4347. Sex Empowerment,3.5
#(Nsfw) You grow stronger, faster and more durable through sexuality, drawing power from arousal, intimacy and sexual acts. Prolonged engagement may unlock related abilities, slow your aging or even let you feed on the act itself instead of food.
4348. Sex Vampire Physiology,5.2
#(Nsfw) You are a tantric vampire, the most beautiful and seductive of all vampire kinds. You feed on both blood and pure sexual energy, possess unearthly beauty and hypnotic charm, and your healing factor and supernatural abilities outpace those of common vampires. Vampire slayers and those embodying chastity can still resist you.
4349. Sextupedalism,2.1
#You can move and run using six limbs in a sextupedal fashion, whether that's four arms and two legs, four legs and two arms, or any combination. Running on all sixes grants you surprising speed and stability on rough terrain.
4350. Sexuality Embodiment,7.6
#(Nsfw) You are the physical embodiment of sex and sexuality in all its forms, not just lust but the entire concept. You wield every sexual power in existence, emotional, physical and spiritual, and every sexual being in creation is bound to you in some way. You are the ultimate sexual being, a living avatar of the act itself.
4351. Shade Physiology,4.6
#You are or can become a shade, the shadowy spirit of a dead person residing in the underworld. As a shade you are incorporeal, largely immune to physical harm, and tied to the realm beyond the veil. You exist in a liminal state between life and death, drifting through the world as a ghost of what once was.
4352. Shadowlessness,2.1
#You have no shadow regardless of the light around you. This makes you completely immune to shadow-based abilities like shadow pinning, shadow marionette, and animated shadows, since there is nothing of yours for them to latch onto.
4353. Shamanism Empowerment,4.2
#You grow stronger, faster and more durable the more you engage in shamanistic practice. Rituals, trances and communion with spirits feed your body directly, and with enough dedication you can slow your aging and unlock latent spiritual abilities. In spirit-dead environments you weaken noticeably.
4354. Shame Empowerment,2.3
#You grow stronger, faster and more durable the more shame, embarrassment and humiliation exists around you. Your own shame works too, so a particularly cringe-inducing memory can briefly turn you into a powerhouse. The more mortifying the situation, the stronger you become.
4355. Shapeshifting Awareness,3.5
#You can see through any shapeshifter's disguise, perceiving their true form regardless of what they currently look like. Doppelgangers, skinwalkers, and transformed beings cannot hide from your gaze, though sense manipulation powers far beyond your level may still fool you.
4356. Sharp Body,2.9
#Your body is razor sharp all over, capable of cutting or impaling anything that touches you. Grapples and embraces become hazardous affairs, and you may need cutting immunity or careful control to avoid slicing through your own clothes and bedsheets constantly.
4357. Sharp Nose,0.8
#Your nose is abnormally sharp, pointed enough to actually stab things if you headbutt them with enough force. Mostly a novelty, but surprisingly effective in a pinch.
4358. Sharp Tail,2.2
#You possess a razor sharp, barbed tail capable of impaling enemies with a swift strike. Great for stabbing people who think you are unarmed, and a very effective surprise weapon in close quarters.
4359. Sharp Tongue,1.4
#Your tongue is supernaturally sharp, capable of slashing and stabbing like a blade. Good luck eating spicy food without nicking your own gums.
4360. Shaved Ice Mimicry,2.8
#Your body is made of or can be transformed into shaved ice. You are delicious but easily melted, and taking a hit from a flamethrower is a very real existential threat.
4361. Shedim Physiology,5.7
#You possess the traits of a Shedim, the spirits and foreign gods of Jewish myth. You are not inherently evil, merely non-divine, and you possess demonic strength, supernatural senses and the ability to influence mortals as a minor god of your own domain. Vulnerable to divine force and holy light.
4362. Sheep Physiology,1.6
#You either are or can transform into a sheep. Your wool is cozy, your bleating is authentic, and you are unfortunately not very high on the food chain.
4363. Sheepsquatch Physiology,3.8
#You either are or can transform into a Sheepsquatch, the horned woolly cryptid of West Virginia folklore. As a Sheepsquatch, you possess immense physical strength, clawed front paws, hooved hind legs and a terrifying presence that sends witnesses fleeing into the hills.
4364. Shen Physiology,5.6
#Chinese Mythology - You are a Shen, a shapeshifting dragon or giant clam-like sea monster famed for creating mirages and phantom cities over the ocean. You possess the physical power of a dragon, the ability to breathe illusory worlds from your mouth, and the capacity to shift between draconic and shellfish forms at will.
4365. Shidaidaka Physiology,2.7
#You are a shidaidaka, a humanoid yokai that appears on lonely roads. The more someone looks up at you, the taller you grow, and if you are looked down upon you shrink. If no one is watching you slowly tower higher and higher on your own.
4366. Shield Mimicry,2.8
#Your body is made of or can transform into a shield. Your durability depends entirely on what material you are made from, and shield penetration abilities are your worst nightmare.
4368. Shikigami Physiology,4.0
#You are a shikigami, a servant-spirit of onmyōdō, usually invisible to mortal eyes and able to take human or animal forms. You can possess, bewitch, and harm those your master points you at, with your power scaling to the spiritual force of whoever you are bound to.
4369. Shinchū Physiology,6.3
#You are a Shinchū, a divine silk moth yokai of Japanese Buddhist cosmology with saucer-eyes, eight legs, and a long stinger. You devour demons and plague-spirits, and your presence alone halts epidemics and ushers recovery. Your hunger for demons can become insatiable.
4370. Shinigami Physiology,6.5
#You are a shinigami, a Japanese death spirit responsible for guiding souls to judgement. You are immortal and preternaturally attractive, wielding unique death-based abilities, and must either cause or witness death to sustain yourself. Those with supernatural senses can always pick you out of a crowd.
4371. Shinso Physiology,6.8
#Tsukihime - You are a Shinso, a True Ancestor vampire born of nature itself. Your body is modeled after humans only because nature judged it the most efficient form, and you can reshape the world around you according to your thoughts. Your bloodlust is purely psychological, and only conceptual attacks can truly harm you.
4372. Shiofuki Physiology,2.8
#You are a shiofuki, an aquatic yokai with an elephant-like trunk and salt-crusted hair. You can spray forceful jets of water from your trunk and are most comfortable deep underwater. Shrine maidens and Shinto priests can ward you off with the right rituals.
4373. Shirime Physiology,1.4
#You are a shirime, a faceless yokai with a glowing eye where your rear should be. Your great power is approaching travelers at night, politely asking for their time, and then dramatically flashing them. Deeply unsettling, mostly useless.
4374. Shiro-uneri Physiology,2.2
#You are a shiro-uneri, a tsukumogami born from an old dust cloth that takes the form of a long white dragon. You can fly freely and love wrapping your dirty body around people's faces and necks. Mostly mischievous, rarely lethal.
4375. Shiryo Physiology,3.6
#You are a shiryo, a malevolent ghost of the recently dead who haunts family and friends. Weaker than an onryo or goryo, but still capable of manifesting, tormenting your targets, and in the worst cases dragging them into the afterlife with you. Shrine-based rituals can banish you.
4376. Shisa Physiology,5.2
#You are a shisa, an Okinawan guardian lion of stone and spirit descended from Buddhist tradition. You possess supernatural physical attributes, warding presence, and the mystic authority of a guardian beast, capable of protecting an entire household or village from evil simply by existing at its gate.
4377. Shitanaga Uba Physiology,3.3
#You are a Shitanaga Uba, a yokai-hag with a four-foot tongue used to lick victims down to shriveled husks of blood and meat. You often hunt in pairs with Shunobon to ambush lone travelers. Divine magic and shrine rituals can put you down for good.
4378. Shoulder Spirit Physiology,3.8
#You are a Shoulder Spirit, a minor angel or devil that perches on mortals' shoulders and whispers them toward righteous or wicked paths. You possess the lesser powers of your celestial or infernal order and exist largely to guide decisions, though you are vulnerable to slayers from the opposing alignment.
4379. Shrunken Head Mimicry,2.1
#You are or can transform into a shrunken head, a preserved effigy with eyes and mouth sewn shut to trap the soul within. You gain minor curse-based abilities and resistance to spiritual harm, but getting around without limbs or a body is quite the challenge.
4380. Shunobon Physiology,3.2
#You are or can transform into a Shunobon, a one-eyed yokai that terrorizes lonely travelers by inducing such overwhelming fright that weaker victims faint or even die outright. You gain enhanced physicality and a fear aura but are vulnerable to divine magic, prayers, and holy relics.
4381. Sideway Eyelids,0.4
#Your eyelids close sideways instead of up and down. Congratulations, you look like a lizard when you blink.
4382. Sigil Empowerment,4.2
#You grow stronger, faster and more durable when near sigils, with some sigils even unlocking related abilities or slowing your aging. Without a sigil nearby you are just a regular person, and in anti-magic zones you are completely cut off from your power source.
4383. Sign Mimicry,2.2
#You are or can transform into a sign or signs of various kinds. In transformed form you retain your internal organs and remain somewhat vulnerable, or you can alternatively become homogeneous sign matter at the cost of potentially being inanimate.
4384. Signal Empowerment,3.7
#You grow stronger, faster, and more durable in the presence of signals such as radio waves, wi-fi, cellular, and the like, and may unlock related abilities based on the signal types around you. In low-signal or dead zones you are powerless, making rural getaways a tactical disaster.
4385. Silah Physiology,5.2
#You are or can transform into a Silah, a mage-class jinn from Arabian folklore, known as talented shapeshifters aligned with sexuality and witchcraft. 4386. Silence Adaptation,2.3
#You can survive and function perfectly in environments with zero sound, whether because sound has been nullified or because you have been made completely deaf. Your sense of balance and spatial awareness remain unaffected. You may become more sensitive to loud sounds when they do happen.
4387. Silicon-Based Physiology,5.4
#Your body is built on silicon biochemistry rather than carbon, making you fundamentally alien to all terrestrial life. You are highly resistant to heat, radiation, and most poisons designed for carbon-based organisms, and your tissues are harder and more crystalline. However, you may require unusual nutrients and higher temperatures to remain comfortable.
4388. Siluriform Physiology,1.6
#You are or can transform into a catfish, gaining whiskers, slick skin and a bottom-dweller's senses of taste and smell. You can breathe underwater and detect chemicals in the water with remarkable precision. On dry land you will not last long, and a particularly rude fisherman might simply scoop you up.
4389. Silver Mimicry,4.1
#Your body is made of or can transform into silver, either retaining your anatomy in silvered form or becoming homogeneous living metal. Your flesh conducts heat and electricity almost perfectly and carries silver's natural bane against evil creatures. As silver is soft, stronger blows can still deform you.
4390. Simulacrum Physiology,3.2
#You are or can transform into a simulacrum, an artificial lesser imitation of a real being. You can take on the forms of those you mimic, though you remain a diminished copy and may still need to eat, sleep and breathe. Your weaknesses depend on whatever you are made of.
4391. Simultaneous Timing,4.6
#You can act, move and think without pause, ending one action and beginning the next in the exact same instant. This gives you unbroken flow in combat and makes it nearly impossible for opponents to read your rhythm or catch you between motions. It does not increase your raw speed, only your continuity.
4392. Simurgh Physiology,6.5
#You are or can transform into a Simurgh, the benevolent mythical bird of Iranian legend, gigantic enough to carry off elephants and whales. You possess immense wisdom accumulated across ages, healing powers in your feathers, and the strength to cross continents in a single flight. Your sheer size may make discretion difficult.
4393. Sin Empowerment,4.0
#You grow stronger, faster and tougher in the presence of sin, drawing power from the pride, lust, wrath and greed of yourself and others. The more depraved the environment, the more monstrous you become. Virtuous places and holy beings leave you weakened.
4394. Sin Immunity,3.5
#You are incapable of sinning and immune to any ability that would induce vice upon you. Temptation simply slides off of you. The downside is that you cannot sin even when doing so would save your life or the lives of others.
4395. Sincerity Embodiment,6.3
#You are the living incarnation of sincerity itself, free from pretense, deceit and hypocrisy on a conceptual level. You can feed on the sincerity of others to sustain yourself, potentially ceasing to age entirely, and convert it into energy for use as a weapon or life-extension. Apathetic beings and those with indomitable will are resistant.
4396. Single Eye,1.4
#You possess only a single eye, granting you exceptional focus and accuracy when aiming, though your depth perception and peripheral awareness suffer. The placement of the eye can vary wildly depending on luck, from a simple cyclopean forehead eye to something far more inconvenient.
4397. Singular Power Use,2.8
#You possess multiple powers but can only have one active at any given time, needing to consciously switch between them. Switching takes a moment of focus, making it difficult to juggle abilities in the heat of battle.
4398. Singular Reality Existence,3.0
#You exist in only one reality, with no alternate selves or parallel versions across any dimension, timeline or universe. You are immune to any ability that targets or draws from other versions of you, because there are none. Time travel can still produce older or younger versions of you from your own timeline.
4399. Singularity Empowerment,5.4
#You grow stronger, faster and more durable when near singularities, whether natural black holes, artificial spatial rifts, or dimensional tears. You can feed off their gravitational pull and may slow or halt your aging entirely while within range. Spatial closure abilities weaken you considerably.
4400. Singularity,8.1
#You are absolutely one of a kind. You cannot be cloned, mimicked, replicated, illusioned, or impersonated; anyone who tries will always fall short of the ineffable something that makes you, you. No alternate version of you exists in any reality. Those who know you will always recognize the real you over any imitation, no matter how perfect the ruse.
4401. Siphonaptera Physiology,2.1
#You are or can transform into a flea or flea-hybrid. You gain absurd jumping ability relative to your size, a durable chitinous body, and the parasitic ability to feed off blood. Not the most glamorous transformation but surprisingly hard to catch or squash.
4402. Siren Mimicry,4.4
#You can transform into a siren or make your body from sirens entirely, gaining their enchanting voice and aquatic physiology. In homogeneous form no part of your body is more vital than any other, granting extreme resilience. Silencing your song weakens the form considerably.
4403. Siren Physiology,4.5
#Greek Mythology - You are or can transform into a siren, the mythical bird-women who lured sailors to their doom with song and beauty. Your voice carries an irresistible, reality-bending charm and your hybrid physiology grants flight and heightened senses. The Muses are your natural enemies and without your voice or beauty you lose most of your power.
4404. Sirenia Physiology,1.6
#You are or can transform into a sirenian such as a manatee or dugong. You gain a peaceful, rotund aquatic body, the ability to eat absurd quantities of seagrass, and surprising buoyancy. Not fast, not agile, but adorable and hard to stress out.
4405. Situational Intelligence,5.7
#Your intellect automatically adjusts to become exactly as sharp as it needs to be in any given moment, with situational awareness and processing speed scaling to the demands of the problem in front of you. In a crisis you are a genius; in a casual conversation you are just yourself. You may require a stimulus to trigger the adjustment.
4406. Situational Power,6.8
#Your power level automatically adjusts to exactly what you need to accomplish whatever you are trying to do at any given moment. Against a mugger you are strong enough to stop a mugger; against a god you become strong enough to contend with a god. Boosts are temporary and beings with adaptation immunity are unaffected.
4407. Situational Speed,5.8
#Your speed automatically scales to exactly what you need at any given moment to accomplish the task at hand. If a bullet is in the air and you need to dodge it, you will move fast enough to dodge it. Boosts are only temporary and fade once the situation passes.
4408. Situational Strength,5.8
#Your strength automatically scales to exactly what you need in the moment, like a mother lifting a car off her child, but whenever, however. Need to break a chain, punch through a wall or hold up a collapsing ceiling? Your body delivers exactly enough. Boosts fade the moment the need passes.
4409. Situational Synchronicity,7.0
#You exist in a state of perfect context with whatever situation you find yourself in, always being in the right place at exactly the right time. You have unnatural levels of luck, intuition guiding you to the correct action, the right ally appearing when you need them, and fatal injuries simply fail to land on you during accidents. Luck negation and conscious self-sabotage still get through.
4410. Size Defiance,4.3
#You can ignore the consequences of your size no matter how large or small you become, moving with the same speed, grace and coordination as a regular-sized person. The square-cube law simply does not apply to you, within reason. You may not be able to ignore all physical factors entirely.
4411. Skeleton Animal Physiology,3.1
#You are or can transform into an undead skeletal animal of your choosing, retaining none of the usual biological weaknesses but keeping the creature's predatory instincts. You possess no flesh, no pain, and no need to rest. You inherit the weaknesses of both the undead and the chosen animal.
4412. Skeleton Dinosaur Physiology,4.2
#You are or can transform into an undead dinosaur with a skeletal physiology. As a skele-saur your bones are as dense as reinforced steel and you possess the terrifying physical might of a prehistoric predator without any of the flesh that would slow you down. Blunt attacks may prove particularly effective against you.
4413. Skeleton Dragon Physiology,5.4
#You are or can transform into a dracolich, an undead dragon reduced to its skeletal frame. You possess the immense size, strength and breath weapon of a dragon while also being immune to pain, fatigue and most biological harm. Your intelligence may be dulled by the undead condition.
4414. Skeleton Physiology Superior,5.2
#You are a metaskeleton, a superior form of skeleton that stands far above the common bone-walker. You possess all the usual undead immunities to pain, fatigue and environmental harm, but are stronger, faster and more intelligent than any ordinary skeleton. With enough power you may rise to become an alpha undead lording over lesser bones.
4415. Skeleton Physiology,3.9
#You are or can transform into a skeleton, a physically manifested undead with no flesh and no biological weaknesses. You feel no pain, need no rest, and fear no poison or sickness. Your senses are maintained through mystical means, but blunt attacks and holy magic may prove particularly devastating.
4416. Skill Adaptation,6.2
#Your body and mind automatically and instantly develop whatever skills are needed to deal with any given situation. Thrown into a sword fight? You develop Enhanced Swordsmanship. Facing a calculus problem? You instantly become a mathematician. Facing a history quiz? You become a scholar. These adaptations may only be temporary and are often tied to an immediate threat or need.
4417. Skill Immunity,5.5
#You are immune to all, or certain, skills and techniques directed at you. Master martial artists would find their perfected forms have no effect on you, expert marksmen would watch their bullets miss, master chefs could not even get you to enjoy their food. Skill immunity can be bypassed by those sufficiently above you in power.
4419. Skin Mimicry,3.0
#Your body is made entirely of skin, either retaining your normal anatomy or existing as homogeneous dermal matter. You can reshape and stretch freely but are vulnerable to heat, cold and cutting attacks.
4420. Skinlessness,2.6

4421. Skull Mimicry,2.9

4422. Skunk Ape Physiology,3.3

4423. Skunkfolk Physiology,2.7

4424. Skvader Physiology,2.2

4425. Sky Embodiment,8.3

4426. Sky Mimicry,4.8

4427. Skyfish Physiology,3.4

4428. Slayer Companionship,4.0

4431. Sleep Embodiment,6.5

4432. Sleep Empowerment,3.2

4435. Sleepless Strength,3.4

4436. Sleeplessness,2.8

4437. Sleih Beggey Physiology,4.2

4439. Slime Empowerment,2.9

4443. Sliver Cat Physiology,3.6

4447. Sluagh Physiology,5.7

4452. Smoke Bomb Mimicry,2.9

4453. Smoke Embodiment,6.2

4458. Snake Physiology,3.7
#You are or can transform into a snake, gaining scaled defence, potent venom, seismic sensing and flexible physical capabilities. You may be deaf, and mongooses, weasels and birds of prey are natural enemies now.
4459. Snow Leopard Physiology,3.2
#You are or can transform into a snow leopard, either partially or fully. You gain incredible agility, silent stalking abilities, a thick insulating coat that shrugs off the cold, and the raw physical prowess of one of the most elusive predators in the world.
4460. Snow Mimicry,4.4
#Your body is made of snow, flexible and shapeless where ice would be rigid. You can shift from solid to snow-cloud, reform limbs, and slip through gaps as drifting powder. Fire and heat are devastating against you and detached limbs can be broken off or lost.
4461. Snow Monster Mimicry,4.0
#You are or can transform into a towering snow monster, gaining immense physical strength, a hulking icy frame, and command over the cold that radiates from your body. Fire and heat-based opponents can melt you down to nothing if given the chance.
4462. Snowcraft Mimicry,2.6
#You are or can transform into snow vehicles such as snowmobiles, snowcats, and winter service vehicles. You gain the speed, traction, and utility of whichever form you take, perfectly suited for arctic terrain.
4463. Snowman Mimicry,2.2
#You are a snowman, a magical blend of childhood wonder and packed snow topped with whatever trinkets you've been given. You can rearrange your body parts at will and shrug off damage that would kill a flesh-and-blood being, but fire and heat are an existential threat.
4464. Soap Mimicry,2.4
#Your body is made of soap, slippery, malleable, and capable of dissolving into lather at will. You are vulnerable to heat and water, and some users struggle to return to their original form once shifted.
4465. Sobriety Empowerment,2.8
#As long as you remain sober, you become stronger, faster, more durable, and may even unlock new abilities tied to clarity of mind. Some users can draw nourishment from sobriety itself or slow their aging. The moment you're intoxicated, you lose it all.
4466. Soccer Ball Mimicry,1.7
#You are or can transform into one or several soccer balls. Your transformed form can contain all your organs as a vulnerable anatomical copy, or be homogeneous matter where no part matters more than another. Wind and sphere-based powers are not your friend.
4467. Social Embodiment,6.5
#You are the embodiment of social values themselves, the invisible glue that lets people get along with one another. Your presence naturally soothes tensions, fosters cooperation and dampens conflict. Harming the concept of you harms the fabric of civilization itself.
4468. Social Luck,4.0
#Luck actively favors you in all social situations. You always get the best seat, the best treatment, the first pick, and the benefit of the doubt. People are inexplicably nicer to you no matter how you behave, and social consequences just seem to slide off you.
4469. Society Adaptation,4.1
#You automatically adapt to any society you find yourself in, absorbing its norms, laws, languages, etiquette, economics, and unwritten rules as easily as breathing. Drop you in medieval Kyoto or a space station and within a day you are a functioning local.
4470. Sock Mimicry,1.4
#You can transform into a sock or a sock puppet with full sentience intact. In puppet form you are surprisingly expressive but also, unavoidably, a sock. Expect to be mocked.
4471. Soda Mimicry,3.6
#Your body is made of soda, or can transform into it at will. In liquid form you are fizzy, sticky, and largely immune to blunt force, but spilling yourself on a hot day is an existential crisis. Do not let anyone drink you.
4472. Soil Consumption,1.7
#You can consume and digest dirt and soil for sustenance and to fuel your powers. Taste varies wildly, clay is chalky, topsoil is earthy, and loam is apparently quite good. You may need to sift out the rocks first.
4473. Soil Mimicry,3.5
#You can transform your body into soil, either as an anatomically identical dirt version of yourself or as a homogeneous heap of loam. Water-based attacks turn you to mud and may seriously harm you.
4474. Solar Capacitor,4.6
#Your body functions as a biological solar battery, with your skin acting as a high-efficiency photovoltaic surface that drinks in ambient radiation even in low light. Unlike users who just channel solar energy in real time, you bank it, allowing you to unleash stored reserves to fuel any superhuman ability you possess. Your power reserves are always full as long as you have seen the sun recently.
4475. Solar Embodiment,8.4
#You are the sun, or at least an embodiment of it. You possess near-limitless control over solar energies and all that comes with them, from heat and light to gravity and nuclear fusion. Your presence alone warps the sky, and you can unleash a fraction of the sun's fury with a thought.
4476. Solar Empowerment,4.0
#Whenever you are exposed to sunlight you grow stronger, faster and more durable, with your other abilities being significantly enhanced. With enough sun exposure you may even slow or stop your aging and draw sustenance from its rays alone. Not much use at night or on cloudy days though.
4477. Solar Energy Mimicry,5.7
#You can transform your body partially or fully into living solar energy. In this form you take on the properties of a walking star, with energy flowing through your being and reinforcing your cells. The transformation grants you flight, durability and a range of solar abilities depending on how deeply you commit to the form.
4478. Solar Immunity,3.5
#You are immune to solar energy, being completely unaffected by its direct and indirect effects. Sunburn, UV-induced cancer, solar radiation, and even the heat of the sun itself cannot harm you. Esoteric Sun Manipulation may still ignore this immunity.
4479. Solar Independence,2.8
#You have no need for the sun whatsoever. You can survive indefinitely without sunlight, no longer needing it for Vitamin D, warmth or as a power source for any sun-based abilities you possess. Handy if you ever end up stranded in deep space or trapped underground.
4480. Solar Presence,4.8
#Your very presence radiates the effects of a sun. Plants grow where you walk, heat and light pour off you, and in anger you may scorch your surroundings without meaning to. Difficult to switch off and emotional states bleed into the effect.
4481. Solid Defiance,4.3
#You ignore the mass and force of solid objects entirely. Steel boxes, walls, anchored pillars - none of it stops or slows you, and thrown solids simply bounce off. Gas and liquid currents can still push you around and gravity still applies.
4482. Solid Mimicry,4.6
#Your body is composed of or can transform into solid matter, either keeping your original anatomy intact or shifting into a homogeneous form. As the heaviest state of matter, the form tires you out quickly and Matter Transmutation can wreak havoc on your physiology.
4483. Somatic Pain Immunity,2.3
#Your body ignores the discomfort of awkward positions, sharp pressure points, and unnatural postures. You could balance on a needle with one finger, sleep on a bed of nails, or contort into positions that would cripple others, all without pain or postural damage.
4484. Sonokinetic Regeneration,4.2
#Your body regenerates using sound as fuel. The louder or more constant the sound around you, the faster you heal - meaning a noisy battlefield keeps you knitting wounds in seconds, while silence leaves you vulnerable.
4485. Soot Mimicry,3.6
#Your body is made of or can turn into soot, letting you scatter, reform, and shrug off physical attacks by dispersing. Strong wind is a nightmare for you and can blow chunks of you away, potentially making reformation difficult.
4486. Soul Anchoring,6.2
#Your soul is completely beyond the reach of soul manipulation. It cannot be observed, absorbed, destroyed, sealed, or converted by any means short of Absolute Soul Manipulation. This protects only your soul and to a lesser extent your mind, your body is still fair game.
4487. Soul Embodiment,8.1
#You are the living embodiment of the soul itself, the spiritual essence of all life personified. You have limitless control over souls and complete immunity to soul-based attacks. You may need to draw spiritual energy from other souls to sustain your form.
4488. Soul Immunity,5.8
#You are completely immune to souls and soul-based attacks, whether from spirits themselves or abilities that target the soul directly. Unlike Soul Anchoring this protects you from the souls and their attacks, not from manipulation of your own soul. May only apply to certain kinds of souls.
4489. Soul Metabolization,4.1
#You sustain yourself and your powers by feeding on souls, drawing them into your body as fuel. If you do not feed you will start to starve, and particularly potent or pure souls may be impossible for you to stomach.
4490. Soul Power,4.6
#All your supernatural capabilities are fueled directly by your own soul rather than any external mana or energy source. This makes your powers intrinsic and impossible to cut off externally, but overexertion can wound or even kill you outright, and a soulless person with this trait is utterly powerless.
4491. Soul Regeneration,4.7
#Your soul regenerates from damage the same way flesh heals from cuts, reverting mutilations and rejoining split fragments on its own. Complete soul destruction is still a hard stop, and major wounds may require concentration to mend.
4492. Soullessness,5.4
#You possess no soul whatsoever, making you emotionless, untrackable by mystical means, and immune to Soul Manipulation, Necromancy, Soul Absorption, Penance Stare, and the powers of Heaven and Hell alike. Without emotions to cloud your ambition you make an exceptional killer, but Soul Restoration can still undo your condition.
4493. Sound Capacitor,3.4
#Your body acts as a living sonic battery, absorbing sound from your surroundings and storing it indefinitely for later use. You can channel the stored energy for any purpose you can imagine, unleashing it whenever you need it.
4494. Sound Embodiment,7.3
#You are the physical manifestation of sound itself, wielding limitless dominion over every noise, vibration and acoustic phenomenon in existence. From the whisper of a dying star to the roar of a collapsing galaxy, all of it is an extension of you.
4495. Sound Empowerment,3.3
#You become stronger, faster and tougher the louder your surroundings are, drawing sustenance from ambient noise and potentially slowing your ageing in concerts or battlefields. Silence renders you powerless, and Silence Manipulation is your hard counter.
4496. Sound Immunity,2.8
#You are completely immune to the effects of sound waves, shrugging off sonic booms, deafening screams and vibration-based attacks without flinching. Beneficial sound-based effects also won't work on you.
4497. Sound Mimicry,5.4
#Your body is made of living sound, allowing you to transform into a fully homogeneous acoustic state. You can act as a walking sonic boom, disorienting opponents and shattering objects just by moving, though soundproof containers can trap you.
4498. Soundwave Perception,2.6
#You can see sound waves with your eyes, perceiving them as rippling patterns in the air that reveal their source, frequency and intensity. In extremely loud environments your vision may become overloaded.
4499. Soy Mimicry,2.0
#Your body is made of soy and all soy-based products including tofu, letting you transform into homogeneous soy matter at will. You retain your shape and function but are particularly vulnerable to Mold Manipulation.
4500. Space Embodiment,8.9
#You are the embodiment of space itself, possessing infinite dominion over all spatial forces. You can teleport matter and beings across any distance, open portals to other dimensions, warp the fabric of reality at will, and be everywhere and anywhere at once as a natural consequence of your existence.
4501. Space Hole Defiance,4.2
#You can ignore the pull and expulsion of space holes, including black holes and white holes. You will not be dragged in by the former nor flung out by the latter, and you can enter or leave them as you please. You are not necessarily immune to the other effects of being inside one.
4502. Space Rock Defiance,3.3
#You can ignore space rocks, including asteroids, comets, meteors, and even planet-sized bodies moving at relativistic speeds. They do not impede you the way they would others, though you can still have trouble pushing through particularly dense or massive ones.
4503. Space Rock Empowerment,3.1
#You become stronger, faster, and more durable when in contact with space rocks or their energies. Proximity to meteorites, comet fragments, or asteroid fields grants you enhanced stats, possibly unlocking related abilities and even slowing your aging for as long as the affinity is fed.
4504. Space Rock Mimicry,4.7
#Your body is made of or can transform into space rock energy and substance, either retaining your anatomy or becoming homogeneous cosmic matter. You inherit the durability and destructive mass of a meteor, though the fast-moving nature of your form may be dangerous to bystanders and gravity manipulators may find you easy to stop.
4505. Space Rock Power Link,4.0
#Your powers are directly linked to and fueled by space rock essence within you, whether comet, meteor, or asteroid in origin. As long as your shooting star essence is stable, your abilities are strengthened and sustained by it, though instability may cause your powers to spiral out of control.
4506. Space Wind Defiance,3.1
#You can defy and ignore space winds and turbulence, from solar winds to galactic winds, interstellar gas, nebula currents, and the storms on gas giants. These relativistic gales of plasma, dust, and charged particles do not shove you around the way they do others, though truly violent turbulence may still slow you.
4507. Space-Time Embodiment,9.3
#You are the space-time continuum made flesh, the personification of the fabric in which reality exists. You possess limitless control over both space and time, and everything that happens, happens within you. Nothing short of beings that stand outside of space-time entirely can meaningfully threaten you.
4508. Space-Time Empowerment,5.2
#You grow stronger, faster, and more durable when fed by space-time curvatures and power, possibly unlocking affinities and enhancing existing abilities. You can draw sustenance directly from distortions in the continuum and even slow your own aging, though a region devoid of space-time curvature will weaken you.
4509. Space-Time Mimicry,7.3
#Your body is made of spacetime itself, sending parts of your form out of the third dimension and into the fourth, allowing you to occupy physical space without a physical form. You can remain anatomically whole or dissolve into homogeneous four-dimensional matter. Untrained users may flicker in and out of corporeal form uncontrollably.
4510. Spacecraft Mimicry,5.2
#You either are or can transform into a spacecraft, granting you the ability to traverse the void of space under your own power. Some with this ability take on fighter-ship traits, gaining offensive weaponry and hasty maneuvering capabilities as part of their transformed form.
4511. Spaghetti Mimicry,1.1
#You are or can transform into spaghetti, either keeping your anatomy intact but made of noodles or dissolving into homogeneous pasta matter. Vulnerable to attack, sauce, and being eaten.
4512. Spark Mimicry,3.8
#Your body is made of or can transform into sparks, letting you disperse and reform while retaining your anatomy. Takes practice to move fluidly in this state, and energy drain attacks are particularly devastating to you.
4513. Spatial Adaptation,3.6
#Your body adapts to the space around you, adjusting to different physical laws, gravitational conditions or exotic dimensions you find yourself in. May only apply to certain aspects of space, and severe environments still take time to fully adapt to.
4514. Spatial Empowerment,4.2
#You grow stronger, faster and more durable when in contact with space or spatial energies, with your existing powers enhanced and new spatial abilities unlocking over time. You may even draw sustenance from space itself, slowing your aging in the process.
4515. Spatial Immunity,5.4
#You are immune to all spatial/space-based powers. You cannot be displaced, banished, warped, duplicated, devoured, closed in, sliced apart by spatial cuts, or have the space around you controlled by other manipulators. Does not protect against temporal powers and can be overcome by Higher-Spatial Manipulation.
4516. Spatial Independence,6.5
#You are able to function and operate without the existence of space. You can move, act, and perform your normal tasks even if space itself were stripped away from you, making you untouchable to almost all spatial attacks and effects. Temporal powers still affect you normally.
4517. Spatial Mimicry,6.4
#Your body is made of or can transform into pure space, shifting parts of your form out of the third dimension into subspace voids. This allows you to become intangible, phase through anything, and occupy space in ways matter cannot. Untrained users may flicker in and out of corporeality, and you may need to drop the form to attack.
4518. Spatial Omnipresence,8.6
#You are present throughout all of space at once, existing at every point in the universe and even alternate dimensions simultaneously. You can be anywhere you wish to be because you are already there, and the constant sensory feed grants you boundless knowledge of reality's most hidden corners. The information stream can overwhelm untrained minds, and you are not present through time.
4519. Spatial Transcendence,8.5
#You exist beyond the concept of space entirely, making you immune to all physical attacks and every spatial power from Spatial Slicing to Remote Teleportation. You transcend distance, dimensions and length themselves, potentially allowing you to exist anywhere or everywhere at once, and you can squeeze into spaces that should be far too small to hold you. Temporal powers and Concept Manipulation still reach you, and you still age.
4520. Spatial-Temporal Transcendence,9.3
#You exist beyond the concepts of time and space. If time stops, you keep moving; if reality rewrites itself, you remember both versions; if the planet beneath you vanishes, you do not. Only Absolute Character Erasure, Absolute Death Inducement, Logic Manipulation or top-tier reality warping can still touch you.
4521. Speaker Mimicry,3.4
#You can transform your body partially or fully into speakers, still retaining your organs underneath or becoming homogeneous speaker-matter at higher mastery. You can pump soundwaves out of any part of yourself. Sound immunity and deafness are perfect counters.
4522. Spear Power Link,4.2
#Your spear-based nature is linked directly to your powers, letting the bladed essence fuel and strengthen everything you do. The more in tune you are with your spear-self, the more potent your abilities become. Weapon Negation can cripple you entirely.
4523. Spear Symbiosis,5.0
#You are symbiotically bonded to a living spear, a non-biological entity that grants you supernatural abilities based on its inherent nature. The bond is powerful but dangerous — the spear may try to take over your mind, body, or both if your will falters.
4524. Specialized Personalities,4.5
#You possess multiple distinct personalities in your mind, each specializing in a different area of expertise. You can swap between them to tackle any situation — one for combat, one for negotiation, one for engineering, and so on. Each personality may not share the same powers as the others.
4525. Species Force Empowerment,4.7
#You grow stronger, faster and more durable when you come into contact with forces tied to your species. You may unlock new abilities, enhance old ones, draw sustenance from the force, or even slow your aging. Inherently limited to those sharing your racial DNA.
4526. Species Power Link,3.6
#Your racial essence is directly wired into your powers, fueling and amplifying them through the very nature of your species. The more in tune you are with what you are, the stronger your abilities grow. DNA-altering powers can cripple you outright.
4527. Speculopresence,7.4
#You exist simultaneously everywhere mirrors and reflective surfaces exist. Every polished blade, every puddle, every window at night, all of them are you looking out. Absolute Light or Darkness can sever the connection, and you may find yourself bound only to reflective spaces.
4528. Speech Embodiment,7.8
#You are the embodiment of speech itself, wielding limitless dominion over language, communication and everything that flows from the spoken word. Your voice can command reality and nature, and your words carry weight that mortals cannot refuse. You may find yourself tied to one language above all others.
4529. Speed Infinitum,7.5
#Your speed increases over time and training without any upper limit. There is no ceiling, no cap, no theoretical maximum, only the horizon you have not yet reached. With training you can dial your pace down for situations that demand precision, but pushing the growth too fast may cause your body to degrade or collapse. Infinity Negation is the perfect counter.
4530. Speed Maintenance,4.6
#Whatever speed you are moving at is maintained across every action you perform. If you start running at 60 km/h, your punches, kicks, dodges, and even writing all carry that same speed, defying inertia and friction. The downside is that stopping yourself at high speeds can be genuinely difficult.
4531. Spell Empowerment,4.3
#Your body and abilities become stronger, faster and more durable when exposed to spells, growing more potent the more magic is in the air. You may even draw sustenance from spells cast nearby. Overreliance on this empowerment may lead to dependency or magical addiction.
4532. Spell Immunity,5.2
#You are invulnerable to spells cast upon you, rendering most magical effects useless against your body. Curses slide off, enchantments fail to take hold, and offensive spells fizzle on contact. You may still be vulnerable to indirect magical effects like illusions or environmental spells.
4533. Spell Mimicry,5.7
#Your body is made of or can transform into raw spellcraft, allowing you to become a living embodiment of magic. In this form you can reshape yourself, phase through physical matter, and suffuse your being with spell effects. Users of Magic Immunity are particularly dangerous to you, as they may ignore you entirely.
4534. Spherical Body,1.1
#Your body is naturally round like a sphere. Great for rolling down hills, bad for climbing stairs. Finding clothes that fit is its own adventure.
4535. Spike Immunity,2.2
#You are completely immune to spikes, both direct and indirect. Walking across a bed of nails, getting impaled by a porcupine or falling into a spike pit all leave you without a scratch. Other sharp objects like blades, however, are fair game.
4536. Spike Protrusion,2.9
#Your body possesses razor-sharp spikes that can protrude at will, covering your skin as both armour and weapon. You can bristle defensively like a hedgehog or line your limbs with blades for offense. Spikes can be broken off, but will regrow over time.
4537. Spinelessness,3.5
#You can survive and function without a spine, making you immune to paralysis, spine-based powers and every classic execution that targets the backbone. Movement may be a bit loose without the vertebrae, but you adapt.
4538. Spinning Maw,2.5
#Your mouth and teeth can rotate at will, functioning like a chainsaw when you bite. Makes for truly terrifying dental hygiene and absolutely no first dates.
4539. Spirit Divinity,7.4
#You are a divine spirit by nature, possessing immense raw power beyond the mundane. Your very existence is holy and godlike, granting you spiritual authority and abilities far above ordinary beings, though you remain vulnerable to divinity nullification and spirit destruction.
4540. Spirit Physiology,5.0
#You are a spirit, an incorporeal and immaterial being that can materialize by shifting into a solid form or possessing a vessel. You gain the full suite of spirit traits including intangibility and invisibility, but you are vulnerable to exorcism, spirit barriers and soul destruction.
4541. Spiritual Adaptation,4.5
#Your soul adapts to spiritual changes and threats, mutating at an essential level to circumvent irreparable damage. Your essence evolves to survive whatever spiritual environment or danger you are exposed to, though some adaptations may only be temporary.
4542. Spiritual Animal Physiology,4.3
#You are a spiritual animal, either a spirit that takes the form of a beast, a creature wielding spiritual power, or the ghost of a deceased animal. You possess spiritual traits alongside the natural abilities of your chosen form.
4543. Spiritual Awareness,2.8
#You possess heightened sensitivity to the paranormal, letting you see and sense entities like spirits, ghosts, angels and demons that are normally invisible to human eyes. A classic medium's sense, useful for anyone dealing with the supernatural.
4544. Spiritual Blood,4.2
#Your blood carries etheric spiritual properties, granting healing, enhanced physical condition and a variety of soul-affecting abilities. The exact nature of your blood depends on where your spirit originates from.
4545. Spiritual Empowerment,3.6
#Contact with spiritual energy makes you stronger, faster and tougher, and may unlock latent soul-based abilities. Sustained exposure can slow your aging or even sustain you in place of food, though overuse can turn into dependency.
4546. Spiritual Machine Physiology,5.7
#You are or can become a machine born of spiritual origin, a cyborg or robot whose frame runs on soul-power rather than electricity. Your mechanical body is reinforced by the spirits bound within it, granting abilities far beyond any ordinary machine.
4547. Spiritual Perfection,8.9
#Your soul is perfect, flawless and beyond the comprehension of other spiritual beings. You have absolute control over your own soul and the souls of others, and you wield every type of spiritual power known and unknown, including the sinful and evil ones.
