You are essentially a spiritual nigh-omnipotent, but this perfection only applies to your soul, your body and existence can still be harmed through non-spiritual means.
4548. Spiritual Power Link,3.9
#Your soul is directly connected to your powers, fueling and amplifying them. A stable soul allows you to push your abilities further than normal, but if your soul becomes unstable so do your powers. Meditation helps keep things in check but users of soul manipulation may be able to seize control of you through this link.
4549. Spiritual Symbiosis,4.3
#You share your body with one or more spiritual beings residing in your subconscious. These spirits can lend you their strength, magic and mental fortitude, but at times may try to seize control of your body or flood your mind with their own memories. The relationship can range from cooperative to hostile.
4550. Spite Empowerment,2.9
#You grow stronger, faster and more durable the more spite, resentment and cruelty surrounds you, whether it be your own or from others. Bullying, hostility and schadenfreude all fuel you, and in large enough quantities may even slow or halt your aging. Petty drama is now an energy drink.
4551. Splintercat Physiology,2.1
#You are or can transform into a splintercat, a cryptid known for its absurdly hard head and habit of charging headlong into trees to shatter them. You are perpetually concussed, perpetually grumpy and perpetually strong enough to break timber with your skull. Not the brightest creature in the forest.
4552. Sponge Physiology,2.1
#Your body is or can become that of a sponge, allowing you to absorb massive amounts of water and soften impacts. However, you need to stay hydrated or risk drying out, and you are physically weak and vulnerable to heat.
4553. Spoon Mimicry,2.2
#You can transform your body fully or partially into spoons, either retaining your anatomy in spoon form or becoming a homogenous spoon mass. Slow, meltable and vulnerable to anyone with metal or magnetism powers.
4554. Spore Empowerment,3.0
#Your body is empowered by the presence of spores, growing stronger, faster and more durable when in spore-rich environments. You can even draw sustenance from them, though you weaken in sterile areas.
4555. Sport Empowerment,3.3
#Your body grows stronger, faster and more durable when you engage in sports or handle sports equipment. You can even draw sustenance from athletic activity, though you may only benefit from specific sports.
4556. Sport Equipment Mimicry,2.6
#You can transform into any form of sports equipment, from balls and bats to entire stadiums. Your abilities may only work during active sporting events, and you tend toward a competitive streak that borders on obsession.
4557. Spring Mimicry,2.3
#You can transform part or all of your body into coiled springs, granting you tremendous jumping capabilities and the ability to absorb and rebound attacks. Useless in midair or on soft surfaces, and your springs can get tangled or bent.
4558. Sprite Physiology,3.9
#You are or can transform into a sprite, a small fairy-like elemental being often tied to water. You can breathe both air and water, fly on ethereal wings and channel minor water magic, though you are generally small and fragile.
4559. Squonk Physiology,1.4
#You are or can become the Squonk, a pitiful pig-like creature from Pennsylvania that weeps constantly over its own hideousness. When cornered, you can dissolve into a puddle of tears to escape capture, which is somehow both tragic and useful.
4560. Stag Beetle Physiology,3.2
#Allows you to transform partially or fully into a stag beetle. You gain a chitinous exoskeleton, flight, and immense grip strength proportional to your size, with those massive mandibles capable of crushing bone.
4561. Stagnation Embodiment,7.6
#You are the embodiment of stagnation, the cessation of all growth, change, and progress. You are immutable and changeless, and merely being in your presence causes development to halt. Anything that attempts to change near you simply... doesn't.
4562. Stamina Embodiment,7.8
#You are the living embodiment of stamina. You shrug off every common form of struggle, physical, emotional, mental or spiritual, without ever flagging, and can inspire or induce tremendous endurance in others. You simply do not get tired.
4563. Absolute Stamina,8.6
#Your stamina is absolute, limitless, and transcends the concept itself. You never tire, no matter the circumstance, whether by exhaustion, curse, conceptual attack or divine decree. You could unleash your ultimate technique a million times in a row without the slightest strain on your body.
4564. Supernatural Stamina,5.2
#Your stamina is on a supernatural scale. You can engage in exhausting physical and mental activity for years, possibly centuries, before exhaustion even begins to creep in. Still vulnerable to stamina absorption and outmatched by absolute stamina.
4565. Peak Human Stamina,2.3
#Your stamina is at the absolute peak of human conditioning. Your body generates few fatigue toxins and resists lactic acid buildup so well you could run a marathon without losing breath and exert yourself at peak capacity for a full day with minimal fatigue.
4566. Stapler Mimicry,1.4
#Allows you to transform your body partially or fully into a stapler, or into homogeneous stapler matter. Useful for the world's most boring disguise and, occasionally, a surprise staple to the forehead.
4567. Star Dragon Physiology,6.8
#Allows you to transform into a star dragon, a rare and powerful dragon that embodies the stars themselves. You possess all the standard dragon traits — scales, flight, immense strength — alongside stellar powers like generating light, heat, and cosmic energy at will.
4568. Starch Mimicry,3.0
#Your body is made of starch or can transform into it at will. In this form you can reshape yourself, absorb water to swell in size, and reform from scattered grains, though you are still vulnerable to being eaten, burned or dissolved.
4569. Starship Mimicry,5.7
#You are or can transform into a starship/UFO, gaining levitation, flight and the ability to travel through space without needing air. In this form you can project energy beams, employ tractor fields, and cross interstellar distances, though your vulnerabilities depend on the class of ship you become.
4570. Statue Monster Physiology,3.3
#You are or can transform into a statue monster, a living construct of stone, marble, bronze or whatever material your form is made of. You gain immense durability and strength but are vulnerable to whatever weakens your material, and you move with the weight of a monument.
4571. Status Empowerment,4.0
#You grow stronger, faster and more durable based on the status you hold, whether political, military, corporate, magical or otherwise. The higher your rank or position, the more your physical and supernatural abilities scale. A king with this ability is terrifying; a peasant with it less so.
4572. Stealth Empowerment,3.8
#You grow stronger, faster, and more durable the more you rely on stealth, with your physical abilities scaling the longer you remain undetected. Some of your powers may even unlock fully only while you are unseen. Getting spotted immediately drops the boost.
4573. Stealth/Supernatural,5.3
#Your stealth is pushed past any natural limit. You can hide behind objects smaller than your own body, vanish into a crowd without effort, and move unseen through places that should make concealment impossible. Users of Supernatural or Absolute Tracking may still find you.
4574. Steam Mimicry,4.2
#Your body is made of or can transform into steam, allowing you to slip through cracks, disperse around attacks and reform. Be careful of strong winds, they can scatter you, and at high skill you become near untouchable.
4575. Steam Power Empowerment,3.1
#You grow stronger, faster and more durable the more steam power surrounds you. Near boilers, geysers and engines you are at your peak, and some users may even draw sustenance or slowed aging from it. Without any steam power to feed on, you may be weakened.
4576. Steel Mimicry,4.3
#Your body is made of or can transform into living steel, gaining its hardness, malleability and ductility. You are heavy and magnetic, vulnerable to corrosion and magnetism manipulation, but you can shrug off most conventional attacks. Prolonged use may cause iron deficiency.
4577. Stellar Capacitor,4.6
#You are a living stellar battery. You can absorb stellar energies and store them indefinitely, channeling the stockpile however you please at any time. A perfect companion to any stellar power user.
4578. Stellar Embodiment,8.6
#You are the personification of the stars themselves, granting near-limitless control over every star and constellation in the sky. You can ignite them, extinguish them, shape them into weapons, or call their light down from any distance. Some users are bound to a single star, others command the whole cosmos.
4579. Stellar Empowerment,4.5
#You become stronger, faster and more durable through stars and stellar energy, with your power peaking under open night skies. You may draw sustenance from starlight and even slow or halt your aging.
4580. Stellar Immunity,4.0
#You are completely immune to stellar energy and stars, both direct and indirect. Solar flares, supernovae, and stellar-based attacks wash over you harmlessly. Unfortunately, you are also unaffected by the beneficial forms of Stellar Healing and Stellar Magic.
4581. Stellar Regeneration,4.8
#Your body regenerates using stellar elements drawn from within or from the stars around you. The more stellar energy available, the faster wounds close, limbs regrow, and organs restore themselves. Under a clear night sky you heal with frightening speed.
4582. Stellar Symbiosis,5.6
#You share a symbiotic bond with a stellar entity or the essence of a star housed within you, granting you access to its powers of energy, elemental manipulation and celestial force. Both you and the star benefit or suffer from each other's state, and if sentient, the star may attempt to take over your body.
4583. Steroid Imitation,3.3
#Your body naturally replicates the effects of steroids without you ever having to take them. Muscle gain, enhanced recovery, aggression, and physical enhancement are all yours on demand, with none of the injections or legal trouble.
4584. Still Invulnerability,3.6
#As long as you do not move, nothing can harm you. Perfect stillness is required however, even the tiniest twitch or shift in weight breaks the effect. You can still be pushed, carried or dragged around while invulnerable, just not hurt.
4585. Stillness Empowerment,3.2
#You grow stronger, faster and more durable the longer you remain still. A meditating monk with this trait could reach peak human condition by doing nothing, and an experienced user may even slow their aging during prolonged stillness. The moment you move, the accumulated boost begins to fade.
4586. Stinger Tail,3.0
#You possess a long flexible tail tipped with a venomous stinger, scorpion or manticore style. A solid close-quarters weapon with a built-in toxin delivery system, though losing the tail means losing the power.
4587. Stink Bug Physiology,1.9
#You either are or can transform into a stink bug, gaining the hard carapace, shield-shaped body and infamous defensive stench that will clear any room in seconds. More useful for repelling people than actually hurting them.
4588. Stomachlessness,2.1
#You lack a stomach entirely, yet function perfectly fine. You can eat things that would normally cause food poisoning, ulcers or worse with no ill effect, and never get a stomach ache. Organ generation abilities can undo this by giving you one back.
4589. Stone Empowerment,2.8
#You grow stronger, faster and more durable whenever you are in contact with stone or rock. Standing on bare earth or a cave floor, you are at your best, and experienced users can even draw sustenance from the rock itself.
4590. Stone Heart,3.3
#Your heart is made of literal stone. You are physically more durable and emotionally difficult to move, unbothered by grief, fear or affection in ways that would cripple most. The flipside is that your heart may be a poor cardiac organ, and any harm to it is catastrophic.
4591. Strategy Adaptation,6.2
#You instinctively adapt to any tactic or strategy used against you, formulating the optimal counter on the spot. The same trick will never work on you twice, and in prolonged conflicts your mind is always several steps ahead. The stronger or more cunning the opponent, the more energy this passive adaptation consumes.
4592. Strawberry Mimicry,1.2
#You can transform your body partially or fully into strawberries, retaining your shape and organs. Smells incredible. Watch out for anything with a mouth.
4594. Strength Embodiment,7.4
#You are the living personification of strength itself, possessing might far beyond any other being within your setting. You can induce massive bursts of physical, emotional, mental or spiritual strength in others with a touch or a look. Your main weakness is that you may genuinely not understand your own strength.
4595. Strength Infinitum,7.8
#Your physical strength grows gradually and endlessly with no upper limit. Given sufficient time, there is no feat of strength you cannot perform, no opponent you cannot eventually overpower. The growth may unbalance your other physical attributes like speed and reflexes unless you train them alongside it.
4596. Strength Regulation,2.8
#You can finely regulate your own strength, from delicately holding a newborn bird to swinging a fist hard enough to crater stone, without ever accidentally overshooting. A quietly essential power for anyone with super strength who still wants to hug their loved ones.
4597. Strength Retention,4.7
#You retain your full physical strength even when your body should be impaired, altered, shrunk, weighed down or otherwise rendered unable to move. Manipulations of your mass, size and bodily forces simply fail to affect your strength. Does not protect any of your other attributes.
4598. Absolute Strength,9.5
#Your physical strength is limitless and unsurpassed, able to repel any mass regardless of size. You can cross continents in a single jump, shatter planetary systems with your fists, and with enough force, break realities and dimensions themselves. There is no weight you cannot lift and no being you cannot match in raw power.
4599. Supernatural Strength,6.5
#Your physical strength is on a truly unnatural level, letting you shatter cities with a punch and, at the upper end, even crack planets. You tear through the strongest metals like tissue paper and send opponents flying for miles with a single blow. Absolute Strength users can still overpower you, and mundane handling will take you considerable practice.
4600. Strength-Based Durability,5.3
#Your physical strength is directly tied to your durability, mass and density, granting you a form of relative invulnerability where nothing weaker than you can ever harm you. Beings of comparable or greater strength bypass it entirely, and Invulnerability Negation is a perfect counter.
4601. Strength-Based Enhancement,4.3
#Your physical strength bleeds over into a range of enhanced physical abilities, granting you boosts to speed, durability and reflexes proportional to your might. The stronger you grow, the more well-rounded you become.
4602. Strength-Based Speed,4.8
#Your physical strength translates directly into superhuman speed, as the sheer power of your muscles propels you faster than any normal body should allow. Without accompanying reflexes or acceleration immunity, moving at these speeds can be genuinely dangerous to yourself.
4603. Stress Empowerment,4.5
#You grow stronger, faster and more durable the more stressed you or those around you become, with your powers scaling alongside the tension in the air. Some users can even feed on stress as sustenance or slow their aging. Completely useless when calm, and prolonged use has been known to cause hair loss.
4604. Stress Immunity,5.0
#You are completely immune to all forms of stress, be they physical, emotional, mental, spiritual, metabolic, conceptual or environmental. Anxiety, discomfort, tension and worry simply cannot touch you. The downside is that without stress, you may find it difficult to take anything in your life seriously.
4605. Strix Physiology,4.3
#You are a strix, a restless undead creature of Balkan and Italian folklore. You possess the ability to shapeshift into certain animals, turn invisible, and drain vitality from your victims by feeding on their blood. You are repelled by garlic, salt rituals, and those under divine protection.
4606. Strong Force Embodiment,8.5
#You are the embodiment of the strong nuclear force, the very thing that binds atomic nuclei together. Your control over it is limitless; you could hold a star together or unbind the atoms of an entire continent with a stray thought. Without you, matter itself would unravel.
4607. Strong Force Mimicry,6.2
#Your body is or can transform into pure strong force. In your transformed state your cells, bones and muscles are reinforced by the binding force of nuclei itself, making you incredibly durable and powerful. Fine control of the transformation takes time to master.
4608. Strong Heart,3.8
#You possess an indomitable heart, granting you strength and resolve well beyond the ordinary. Your willpower alone can push you through impossible feats, but should you ever falter or show weakness, the power fails you when you need it most.
4609. Strong Neck,1.4
#Your neck is unnaturally strong and durable, far beyond what is normal. You could headbutt through walls, survive a hanging, or shrug off a chokehold with ease. The rest of your body, however, is as fragile as ever.
4610. Strong Tail,2.6
#You possess a strong and durable tail capable of striking with immense force. You can use it as a weapon to smash opponents, as a third limb to grab and throw things, or to launch yourself off surfaces like a living spring.
4611. Structure Mimicry,3.4
#You can transform your body into buildings and non-building structures, such as houses, bridges, or towers. Your durability in this form depends on the materials you are made of, and users of Structure Manipulation can wreak havoc on you while transformed.
4612. Stupidity Compensation,3.3
#Your supernatural powers scale with your stupidity. The dumber you are, the stronger and more instinctive your abilities become, letting you react and act without the need for conscious thought. Being clever actively weakens you.
4613. Stymphalian Bird Physiology,4.5
#Greek Myth - You are or can transform into a Stymphalian bird, a man-eating monster of Greek legend with a beak of bronze, razor-sharp metallic feathers you can launch as projectiles, and toxic droppings. You are easily frightened by loud noises and your metallic hide is vulnerable to fire and metal manipulators.
4614. Subjective Existence,6.6
#Your existence is shaped entirely by the perception of others. If others perceive you as a world-ending monstrosity, you become one; if they see you as harmless, you become harmless. Skilled users can indirectly reshape themselves by manipulating what others believe about them, but a single intrusive thought from the wrong person can transform you into something horrific beyond your control.
4615. Subterranean Adaptation,2.4
#Your body is adapted to underground conditions. You can breathe stale cave air, see in near-total darkness and endure tight, stifling tunnels without issue. Your eyes may be photosensitive, making surface sunlight uncomfortable.
4616. Subtle Body Empowerment,4.7
#You grow stronger, faster and more durable from the subtle body, drawing sustenance from your own and others' ethereal essence. With enough affinity you may slow or even halt your aging, but cut you off from subtle body energy and you wither.
4617. Subtle Body Enhanced Condition,4.3
#You channel the subtle body to enhance your physical condition, pushing strength, speed, reflexes, senses and healing beyond their baseline. The enhancement draws on your ethereal essence and cannot be maintained indefinitely without rest.
4618. Success Empowerment,4.0
#You grow stronger, faster and more durable from success, whether your own or that of those around you. Every victory feeds back into you, unlocking new heights and sharpening existing abilities. Failure, however, weakens you just as readily.
4619. Succubus Physiology,4.5
#(Nsfw) You are a succubus, gaining enhanced strength, speed, supernatural beauty, fangs, claws, a pointed tail and wings. You possess a natural affinity for illusions and mental manipulation and can slip into the dreams of others to seduce them. Weak to holy powers and chastity-based abilities.
4620. Sucker Protrusion,1.4
#Your hands and feet can manifest suction cups, allowing you to scale walls and ceilings like a gecko or octopus. Great for cat burglary and window cleaning, less great for getting your shoes on.
4621. Sugar Mimicry,3.4
#You are made of sugar, or can transform your body into it at will. In your sugar form you retain your shape and senses but may be melted by fire, dissolved by water, or in extreme cases, eaten by a sufficiently bold opponent.
4622. Suicide Immunity,3.0
#You are immune to all forms of suicide. You cannot stab, drown, burn or fall yourself to death, no matter how hard you try. A blessing or a curse depending on the life you are living.
4623. Suika no Bakemono Physiology,3.6
#You are a Suika no Bakemono, a Yokai samurai with a melon for a head. You possess the martial discipline and strength of a samurai along with plant-based vitality, your melon head regrowing when cracked. Unfortunately, your head is still edible, and anyone with rot or mold powers is an existential threat.
4624. Suliform Physiology,2.5
#You can transform into or gain the traits of suliform birds, cormorants, darters and boobies. Enhanced diving, swimming and fishing capabilities, plus the ability to hold your breath underwater for extended periods.
4625. Summer Embodiment,6.6
#You are summer itself. Heat, light, growth and vitality flow from you as naturally as breath. Plants flourish in your presence, wounds heal under your warmth, and your mere passage can turn a frozen wasteland into a blooming meadow. The sun feels like family when you look up at it.
4626. Summoning Empowerment,4.7
#You grow stronger, faster and more durable from summoning and the presence of summoned entities. Your powers sharpen and new ones may unlock the deeper your connection to your summons runs. Starved of that connection, however, you may find yourself significantly weaker than you remember being.
4627. Summoning Power Link,5.0
#Your powers are fueled and channeled through your summoning nature, each conjured entity strengthening and amplifying your abilities on multiple levels. If your summoning goes unstable, however, your powers may spiral out of control, and banishment users can disable you entirely.
4628. Super Drinking,1.2
#You can drink massive quantities of liquid in one go without any ill effect. Great for parties, hydration challenges, and beings whose anatomy requires abnormal intake. You are still vulnerable to poisoned drinks unless you have additional immunities.
4629. Super Eating,1.4
#You can eat massive quantities of food in one sitting with no ill effect, bordering on matter ingestion at higher levels. Excellent for abnormal metabolisms that demand huge caloric intake, though you may get banned from every all-you-can-eat buffet in the tri-state area.
4630. Super Fecundity,2.6
#You can sire or conceive healthy offspring at an unnaturally high rate, far beyond the normal reproductive capacity of your species. You also instinctively know the most fertile times and the most genetically compatible partners. Your children will still be their own people, with their own lives.
4631. Supercolor Vision,1.6
#Your eyes can perceive a wider spectrum of colors than normal humans, seeing shades and hues invisible to others. Essentially tetrachromacy, allowing you to see subtle differences in everything from flower petals to bird feathers that most people cannot even imagine.
4632. Superhuman Empowerment,4.6
#You become stronger, faster, and more durable when in the presence of superhumans, drawing power from their very existence. Prolonged exposure may unlock new abilities related to the nearby affinities and can even slow your aging. The effect scales with the number and strength of nearby powered individuals.
4633. Superhuman Skin,3.4
#Your skin has superhuman attributes, being denser, tougher, and more resistant than normal human skin. You are immune to most dermatological illnesses and common cuts or abrasions won't mark you at all. A solid defensive baseline for any physical build.
4634. Superior Activity,4.0
#You can act, move, and attack in any way you choose, whether balanced, accelerated, or continuous, without restriction from fatigue or natural physical limits. Your body obeys your intent with perfect fluidity regardless of the style or pace you demand from it.
4635. Superior Adaptation,8.6
#You adapt to anything. In combat your body dynamically analyzes and counters the powers used against you, developing resistances, replicating abilities, and evolving countermeasures on the fly. Exotic or overwhelmingly powerful foes take longer to adapt to, and your evolution may sometimes proceed without your conscious control.
4636. Superior Alien Physiology,5.2
#You are an empowered alien, possessing your species' natural physiology alongside a suite of additional supernatural powers. You retain the intellect to use these new abilities constructively. You may still require a specific environment to survive and carry your species' natural weaknesses.
4637. Superior Bodily Speed,5.1
#Your body moves faster than your mind can think. Before a thought is fully formed, you have already acted on it, reacting on pure muscle memory and instinct. Excellent against fast opponents but leaves you vulnerable to being baited by opponents who can read and manipulate your reflexes.
4638. Superior Breeding,3.8
#You are the product of careful selective breeding, inheriting genetic traits that make you superior to most of your kind. Whether the result of two powered parents or pre-birth modification, you carry natural enhancements across the board from birth.
4639. Superior Chi,5.4
#Your chi is unshakable and unbound, free from any external force that would try to hold it back. It grows stronger with your training, your emotional resolve, and your sense of purpose, granting you abilities derived from raw life force. Like all chi, it is finite and must be replenished through meditation and training.
4640. Superior Hybrid Physiology,5.3
#You are a superior hybrid, the alpha form of whatever two or more species combined to make you. All the strengths of your component physiologies amplified, with fewer of the usual hybrid drawbacks. Still potentially vulnerable to Hybrid Manipulation and traditional hybrid weaknesses.
4641. Superior Life-Force Power,3.6
#Your life-force is significantly above the average of your species, giving you a deeper well of raw vitality to draw from. You can channel this excess lifeforce as pure energy for attacks, healing, or empowering your other abilities.
4642. Superior Machine Physiology,5.4
#You are or can become an empowered machine, be it a cyborg, android, or walking AI. Your chassis rivals high-end threats in combat and your internal systems outclass modern technology by a wide margin. Standard machine weaknesses like water and EMPs still apply unless you train resistances against them.
4643. Superior Magical Human Physiology,5.2
#You are still human on paper, but you possess both innate magic and a secondary superpower set, be it cosmic, psychic, scientific or otherwise. Your body isn't altered, you simply exist as a metahuman mage by birthright. Ordinary human limits on stamina and durability still apply unless your powers cover them.
4644. Superior Magical Power,4.2
#Your innate magical reserves are vastly larger than the norm of your species, letting you sling spells most mages could never afford to cast. The raw magnitude of power is yours; how skillfully you wield it is still up to training.
4645. Superior Mutant Physiology,5.3
#Marvel - You are a Superior Mutant, a rarer and stronger variant of the standard mutant. Whatever genetic-based power you were born with is of a significantly higher tier than most of your kind, putting you closer to the Omega-class end of the scale. Your DNA may be unstable and reverting to your original form may not always be possible.
4646. Superior Mystic Mutant Physiology,5.8
#You are a mutant born with both superpowers and genuine magical ability, a combination feared for how dangerous the fusion can be. Your mutated physiology houses both spellcraft and mutant gifts natively, meaning you do not need rituals or catalysts to wield either.
4647. Superior Tasking,2.3
#You can perform any mundane task much better than anyone else. Cleaning, filing, searching, cooking, organizing — whatever it is, you do it faster, cleaner, and more thoroughly than the best human professional. You can still make mistakes, especially if you rush.
4648. Superior Undead Physiology,5.1
#You are an undead of superior power, dwarfing regular undead in both might and intellect. Depending on what powers came with the package you may be closer to a lich-king than a shambling corpse, and much harder to put down permanently. Standard undead weaknesses like holy magic and supernatural hunters still apply unless specifically resisted.
4649. Supernatural Arts Empowerment,3.8
#You become stronger, faster and more durable when you use or come into contact with supernatural arts, and proximity to them can even unlock new abilities or slow your aging. The more esoteric techniques being slung around near you, the stronger you get.
4650. Supernatural Arts Immunity,5.2
#You are immune to supernatural arts directed at you, letting their effects slide off as if they never existed. May be limited to certain categories of arts and can be bypassed by immunity-negation abilities from sufficiently powerful users.
4651. Supernatural Awareness,3.5
#Your awareness is far sharper than an ordinary member of your species, letting you notice details most people miss entirely and plan tactically in real time. Few things slip past your notice, though being aware of danger does not help if you're too slow to move. Prolonged use may cause sensory overload.
4652. Supernatural Back,3.2
#Your back muscles are on another level, granting enhanced physical stats with a focus on strength, posture and endurance. Heavy lifting, explosive movement and carrying loads that would crush a normal person become trivial, though overexerting can still tear muscle fibers painfully.
4653. Supernatural Blood,5.2
#Your blood carries supernatural properties, serving as both fuel and weapon. Depending on the nature it has taken, your blood can empower you, heal, burn, curse or grant temporary abilities when shared. Be wary, as beings who know the value of your blood may come hunting for it.
4654. Supernatural Bodily Aspects,5.4
#Every part of your body, from cells to organs to bones, carries supernatural properties that you can selectively draw upon. You can isolate specific aspects like your eyes, hands or nervous system and channel their unique qualities for various effects. Losing a body part means losing that aspect's abilities.
4655. Supernatural Bodily Capacity,5.0
#You can push your bodily systems to percentages and capabilities far beyond what biology allows, unlocking hidden potential in your muscles, nerves, bones and organs at will. Pushing too hard can and will break the very system you are trying to use, so moderation is key.
4656. Supernatural Bones,4.3
#Your skeletal structure is imbued with supernatural properties, granting you enhanced durability, regeneration and the ability to use your bones as weapons or constructs. The exact expression depends on the nature of your bones, but destroying them will cripple you entirely.
4657. Supernatural Brain Capacity,4.6
#Your mental faculties operate far above the enhanced level, letting you access untapped cognitive potential for learning, multitasking, memory and intuition. With practice you can stretch this further, but overuse leads to headaches, nosebleeds and in extreme cases aneurysms.
4658. Supernatural Brain,5.1
#Your brain is a supernatural organ, not just granting superior cognition but also serving as the seed for psionic abilities and bodily supernatural feats. Unlike a supernatural mind, this is specifically physical, meaning it also means your skull now houses a very valuable and very vulnerable target.
4659. Supernatural Cells,5.2
#Every cell in your body operates at a supernatural level, granting you enhanced physical stats across the board as well as superior healing, adaptability and biological resilience. Your cellular baseline is now so high that even as a base human your body would outperform trained athletes without effort.
4660. Supernatural Chest,3.1
#Your entire thoracic region is supernaturally enhanced, from your heart and lungs to your pectorals or breasts and ribcage. Expect amplified lung capacity, stronger upper body strength, better defense for your vital organs and, yes, more impressive aesthetics.
4661. Supernatural Concentration Capacity,4.2
#Your concentration is honed to a supernatural degree, letting you focus on multiple complex tasks at once and push your physical and mental abilities past their normal limits through sheer willpower. A sudden distraction or unexpected attack can still snap your focus and leave you vulnerable.
4662. Supernatural Defiance,7.0
#You can ignore anything supernatural. Curses slide off, divine judgment rolls past, magic fails to affect you and demonic powers find no purchase. Does not work against Natural Supernatural beings, and sufficiently omnipotent forces can still reach you.
4663. Supernatural Efficiency Absolute,9.3
#Your efficiency is limitless and absolute. You do everything with zero wasted effort, zero wasted motion and zero wasted energy, making you the most efficient being in your universe. Whatever you attempt, from combat to crafting to thinking, is done in the most perfect manner possible.
4664. Supernatural Efficiency,4.0
#Your efficiency is drastically beyond what is naturally possible, letting you perform actions with minimal wasted effort or energy. You work faster, think cleaner and tire slower than anyone around you.
4665. Supernatural Embodiment,8.6
#You are the living embodiment of the supernatural itself. You exist beyond natural law, manifesting as a conceptual being whose very presence defies physics, causality and mortality. Any supernatural force, however it is defined, is part of what you are.
4666. Supernatural Flesh,4.3
#Your flesh, from skin to muscle to fat and soft tissue, carries supernatural properties, granting healing, enhanced musculature and various effects depending on its nature. Your flesh can even be consumed by others to pass on effects, though cooking and preservation may be required.
4667. Supernatural Fluids,4.8
#All your bodily fluids carry supernatural properties, each one with its own distinct effects. Blood, sweat, tears, saliva and more can be shared with others to vitalize, mutate or empower them on a cellular level. People who learn the value of your fluids may try to bottle you.
4668. Supernatural Genetics,5.0
#Your entire genome is supernaturally enhanced, granting biological advancements and characteristics that manifest as powers passed down through your DNA. Whether the source is hereditary, mystical or scientific, your body operates on an upgraded blueprint.
4669. Supernatural Hands,3.6
#Your hands possess supernatural powers and attributes, acting as the focal point for whatever ability they carry. Without your hands, the power is gone, so protecting them becomes a priority.
4670. Supernatural Heart,4.6
#Your heart, literal or metaphysical, is imbued with supernatural advancements that serve as the core of your powers. It fuels your abilities, enhances your body and can be channeled into various effects. If your heart is damaged or ripped out, you lose both your life and everything it granted.
4671. Supernatural Horn,3.2
#You possess one or more horns with supernatural powers and properties, each capable of channeling a specific ability determined by the gacha. If a horn is broken off, it may not grow back, and the ability tied to it is lost.
4672. Supernatural Humor,4.6
#You are cosmically, supernaturally funny. Even beings with no concept of humor will laugh at your jokes, and the more you put into a bit the worse it gets for the audience. At low levels they just lose focus, at higher levels they crack ribs, go mad, or outright die of laughter. Turning it off is its own skill.
4673. Supernatural Immunity,7.8
#Your mind, body, and soul are entirely sealed off from the supernatural. Curses slide off you, blessings don't stick, possession is impossible, and no god, demon, or spirit can so much as nudge your thoughts. Transformations like vampirism or lycanthropy simply fail to take. Super science and immunity negation can still get past it though.
4674. Supernatural Instincts,6.8
#Dragon Ball - Your instincts process the world at a level no conscious mind could match, automatically steering you toward the optimal decision in any situation. In combat your body dodges before you see the attack, in life you take the right path before you know it is the right path. Mental overload from overwhelming stimuli can still disrupt it.
4675. Supernatural Limbs,4.2
#One or more of your limbs are supernaturally enhanced, granting them extraordinary strength, agility, regeneration or unique powers like elemental control or energy projection. The rest of your body is ordinary and if the limb is removed, so is the power.
4676. Supernatural Lungs,4.0
#Your lungs are supernatural in nature, letting you breathe in any environment from the ocean floor to the vacuum of space, breathe out fire, ice, or other elements, and perform breath-based techniques that would collapse normal lungs. Damage to your respiratory system cripples your abilities fast.
4677. Supernatural Milk Production,2.8
#Your milk has supernatural properties, such as healing wounds, hypnotizing those who drink it, burning through metal, or empowering allies. You choose which property manifests but overusing it leaves you dehydrated and weak.
4678. Supernatural Mobility,4.1
#Your movement is supernaturally refined. You have near-perfect balance, control and precision whether walking, running, swimming, climbing or jumping, and you never slip, lose traction, or stumble at speed. Inertia, gravity and physical restraints still apply to you, but you handle them much more gracefully than any ordinary being.
4679. Supernatural Mucus,1.8
#Your snot has supernatural properties. It might heal minor wounds, dissolve metal, paralyze whoever it touches, or stick things together with unbreakable adhesion. Usually you are stuck with only one effect.
4680. Supernatural Muscle Usage,4.3
#You can access more of your muscular output than should be biologically possible, far beyond the normal 100% limiter, letting you push strength, speed and agility into supernatural territory. Overuse can break your bones, tear your ligaments, and flood your body with enough lactic acid to put you down for days.
4681. Supernatural Nails,2.6
#Your fingernails have supernatural powers and properties, ranging from being unbreakable claws to channeling mystic energy or carrying curses with every scratch. If your nails are removed, the powers go with them.
4682. Supernatural Organs,4.5
#One or more of your internal organs are supernatural in nature, granting you abilities, enhancements or protections depending on which organ is affected. A supernatural heart might pump mystic energy, a supernatural brain might grant perfect cognition, and a supernatural liver might purify any poison. You are limited to a handful of such organs at most.
4683. Supernatural Rear,2.2
#Your rear end is supernaturally enhanced, granting you various mysterious powers rooted in your hips, glutes, or tail. The specific effects vary wildly and may come with uncomfortable side effects.
4684. Supernatural Reproductive System,3.1
#Your reproductive system is supernatural in nature, granting strange and potent abilities tied to fertility, gestation, or lineage. Removal of the system disables the powers entirely.
4685. Supernatural Saliva,2.1
#Your spit has supernatural properties, be it healing, toxic, acidic, adhesive or empowering. Overuse can dehydrate you dangerously, and careless use can damage everything around you.
4686. Supernatural Soul,6.0
#Your soul is a core of immense metaphysical energy, saturating your body and mind with spiritual pressure that enhances every aspect of your being. You radiate an oppressive aura to those with spiritual senses, and you are highly resistant to soul-based powers such as manipulation, absorption, sealing, or destruction. Sufficiently powerful soul users can still grind past that resistance given enough effort.
4687. Supernatural Tail,3.0
#You have one or more tails with supernatural properties, most commonly the ability to shapeshift or extend that shapeshifting to the rest of your body. The specific power varies by user and is usually just one per tail.
4688. Supernatural Tendrils,3.6
#You possess tendrils or tentacles that grow from your body and carry supernatural properties. They can shapeshift, stretch, and usually grant you one particular esoteric ability channeled through them, whether that is poison, absorption, or warping whatever they touch.
4689. Supernatural Traits,4.9
#Your genetic code carries metaphysical and paranormal qualities that grant you supernatural traits. You can pass these down your bloodline naturally or transfer them to others through direct biological grafting, though some of these genes carry nasty derogatory effects alongside the useful ones.
4690. Supernatural Urine,1.4
#(Nsfw) Your urine possesses supernatural properties, whether it be healing, corrosive, flammable or something stranger. You had better figure out what it does before you make a mess.
4691. Superorganism Physiology,5.1
#You either are or can become a superorganism, a collective of synergetically interacting individuals acting as one mind. Division of labor is highly specialized and the hive acts in concert to produce phenomena beyond any single member. Smaller forms are more vulnerable than a massive colony and you can be devastated by cellular, DNA or atomic disintegration.
4692. Superpower Anchoring,6.5
#Your powers are anchored to you and you alone. They cannot be absorbed, negated, erased, changed, reversed or bypassed by any means short of absolute-tier abilities. You can still develop new powers and strengthen existing ones, but only through your own effort. Weak to Raw Power and useless against Absolute Superpower Negation.
4693. Superpower Arsenal,6.8
#You possess a vast and diverse collection of superpowers, either permanently held or swappable as needed. These powers can be thematically linked or completely unrelated to each other, and you can expand your arsenal over time by absorbing, replicating, practicing or inheriting new abilities. Juggling too many powers at once may cause overload.
4694. Superpower Devolution,2.6
#Your powers decay over time, losing techniques or raw strength either through use or through their own internal mechanics. The decay cannot be fully reversed, only slowed down with the help of specific energies or items. A curse you are stuck carrying until you find a way to manage it.
4695. Absolute Superpower Immunity,9.5
#You are completely and perfectly immune to any and all powers in existence and beyond, regardless of their type, status or level. Nothing short of omnipotence itself can affect you through supernatural means.
4696. Superpower Immunity,5.8
#You are immune to all or certain supernatural powers and effects, much like how certain animals are naturally immune to specific venoms. This gives you a commanding advantage in supernatural conflict, though it provides no protection against mundane threats or supernatural forces that aren't classified as superpowers. Sufficiently superior versions of the powers you guard against can still overwhelm you.
4697. Absolute Superpower Reflection,9.3
#Any and all powers used against you are reflected back without you being harmed or affected in any way, regardless of their nature, type or level. Even conceptual attacks, totality effects and omnipresential assaults bounce straight back at their source. An absolutely unbeatable form of self-defense and counterattack.
4698. Superpower Resistance,4.1
#You are highly resistant to certain supernatural abilities and powers, be it spiritual forces, psionic attacks, spell effects or even superpower-altering abilities like nullification and absorption. This is not full immunity, however, so sufficient force can still get through, and Resistance Removal is a direct counter.
4699. Superpowered Location,6.3
#You are a place, not a person. Or rather, wherever you stand becomes a locus of supernatural power, a bounded region with its own laws and phenomena. Some with this trait are sentient landscapes, others are people whose very presence bends the territory around them into something no longer ordinary.
4700. Superpowered Physiology,5.0
#You are a superpowered being by nature. Your body and/or mind operate on a tier above the average member of your species, granting you enhanced physical capabilities and a natural affinity for further powers. The exact flavor varies wildly, from superhuman to alien to demigod, but you start several rungs above baseline.
4701. Support Empowerment,3.8
#You grow stronger, faster, and more durable from being supported or from using support powers. Buffs hit you harder, heals flow deeper, and being on the receiving end of protection or aid makes you bloom. You may even stop aging while sufficiently supported.
4702. Support Immunity,3.5
#You are immune to supportive abilities directed at you, whether they are positive like buffs and heals or negative like debuffs and status effects. A niche but powerful defense against any battlefield that runs on enchantment. May or may not be toggleable depending on the user.
4703. Supreme Divinity,9.7
#You possess supreme divinity, the highest form of divine nature, placing you above all other gods and divine beings in your respective reality. Your divine power is infinite and uniquely shaped by your character, making you an omnipotent divine entity whose authority over the sacred cannot be contested by any lesser god.
4704. Absolute Survivability,9.7
#No matter how dire the scenario, you survive. Torn to pieces, reduced to atoms, spirit annihilated, wiped from existence — you always find some obscure, unnatural way to still be there at the end. You are not invulnerable, pain and damage still apply, but death itself cannot keep you.
4705. Supernatural Survivability,5.2
#You can survive extremely severe injuries that would kill enhanced humans several times over. Impalement, falling from skyscrapers, being burned alive — you keep crawling forward. This does not heal the damage, nor does it make you immortal, it just makes you exceptionally difficult to kill.
4706. Peak Human Survivability,3.3
#Your survivability sits at the pinnacle of human potential. You can endure animal attacks, being jumped by armed assailants, buildings crumbling on top of you, falls from up to 14 stories and getting shot in the chest, all with severe but non-fatal injuries. You still feel every bit of the pain, and you still need to heal.
4707. Survival Luck,5.6
#You have luck that applies specifically to survival situations. No matter the accident, ordeal or horrific encounter, you walk away virtually unharmed through sheer absurd coincidence. In extreme cases, your luck can even stumble you into long life, eternal youth or outright immortality. You have no control over when or how it triggers.
4708. Sushi Mimicry,2.8
#You are made of or can transform your body completely into sushi. You can remain anatomically identical aside from being rice and fish, or go fully homogeneous. You are also, unfortunately, edible, and rot inducement will ruin your day very quickly.
4709. Suzuhiko Hime Physiology,3.2
#You are or can transform into a Suzuhiko Hime, a Yokai from Japanese folklore that takes the form of a woman in ancient princess or shrine maiden clothes with a giant smiling bell for a head. You do not harm humans and spend most of your time dancing, though the bell's chime carries supernatural resonance.
4710. Swamp Mimicry,3.6
#You are or can transform your body into swamp, combining earth, water and plant-life into one muddy form. You can maintain your anatomy or go fully homogeneous. Ice manipulation is very efficient against you.
4711. Swamp Monster Physiology,4.2
#You are or can transform into a swamp monster, a monstrous creature that embodies wetland environments. You gain enhanced physical abilities, regenerative sludge-like flesh, and supernatural powers tied to bogs and marshes. Some swamp monsters weaken or outright die if removed from their swamp for too long.
4712. Swimming Tail,2.9
#Your lower body is or can become a fish/mermaid tail for swimming faster through water. You retain your leg bones within the tail, and you can use it offensively by whipping enemies out of the air or capturing them in a grip. May take a moment to form.
4713. Enhanced Swimming,2.2
#You swim effortlessly and with absolute control, efficiency, precision, traction and balance at any speed. You may not necessarily be the fastest, but your maneuverability underwater is glaringly beyond any normal person. You can still drown if you do not have aquatic breathing.
4714. Supernatural Swimming,4.3
#Your swimming is obviously and supernaturally greater than any normal being, to the point where you can swim up waterfalls, through rapids, or even through solid matter as if it were water. Your endurance in the water is effectively limitless.
4715. Swine Companionship,1.4
#You have a natural bond with pigs and boars. They trust you instantly and will follow you around like loyal dogs. Surprisingly handy on a farm, less so in a city.
4716. Swine Physiology,2.6
#You are or can transform into a boar or pig. Do not underestimate this, swine are creative, hardy and surprisingly vicious fighters. Even the domestic form retains enough muscle and bite force to ruin a grown man's day.
4717. Swinefolk Physiology,3.3
#You are a member of the swinefolk, a humanoid race of pig-people. You possess enhanced strength and endurance, a powerful sense of smell and the stubborn resilience of a boar. Horns and tusks optional.
4718. Sword Arm,3.5
#Your arm is or can transform into a bladed weapon. Excellent for always having a weapon at hand, though in some cases the arm may be permanently stuck in blade form, making handshakes awkward and door handles tricky.
4719. Sword Embodiment,5.6
#You are the embodiment of swords themselves. You possess the natural affinity and physiology of a blade, your body is sharper, tougher and deadlier than steel, and every sword you touch responds to you as if you were its true master.
4720. Sylph Physiology,4.2
#Allows you to transform into or exist as a Sylph, an invisible faerie-like spirit of the air. You gain insectoid wings, the ability to turn invisible at will and a natural affinity for air and wind manipulation, letting you glide on breezes and whisper unseen through open spaces.
4721. Symbiote Physiology,4.8
#You are a symbiote, a being that thrives by bonding with a host and granting them new abilities in exchange for feeding off their essence. You can transform, reshape and latch onto willing or unwilling hosts, but without one your vitality slowly drains away.
4722. Symbiotic Regeneration,5.1
#You can regenerate wounds by channeling symbiotic power, the speed of healing defined by the amount of power you expend and the strength of your bond. Still subject to the same limits as any other regeneration - destroy the bond and the healing stops.
4723. Symbiotic Tattoos,5.3
#Your body is adorned with living symbiotic tattoos that grant you a host of supernatural abilities. The tattoos may be intelligent, moving and acting on your will, and depending on the substance they are inked with they can manifest new powers on the fly. Disfiguring or incomplete tattoos produce weakened or unreliable effects.
4724. Symbol Empowerment,3.7
#You are empowered by the presence of symbols, becoming stronger, faster and more durable when surrounded by emblems, runes or glyphs. Some users even draw sustenance from them, but being stranded somewhere bare of markings will leave you weakened.
4725. Symbol Mimicry,4.4
#You can transform your body into a symbol or symbols, taking on the nature of whichever emblem, glyph, letter, number or musical note you become. Each form grants you abilities tied to that symbol's meaning, though mastering control over multiple shapes takes time.
4726. Symbolic Heart,5.6
#You possess a symbolic heart, a metaphysical emblem of your soul that serves as the seat of your life, will, emotion and intention. Its nature, whether pure or tainted, shapes the powers it grants you, and it can be stolen or corrupted by those who know how to reach for it.
4727. Synergy Empowerment,4.0
#You grow stronger, faster and more durable from synergies, drawing power from combinations that work well together and enhancing your existing abilities through them. You can empower yourself, your allies, your objects or your powers depending on what synergy you are tapping into.
4728. Syngnathiform Physiology,2.1
#Allows you to transform either partially or fully into a seahorse, seadragon, or pipefish. You gain the ability to breathe underwater, camouflage among coral, and the males among you can carry young in a brood pouch.
4729. Taboo Empowerment,4.2
#You grow stronger, faster, and more durable the more taboos are placed on you, whether by contract, oath, or self-imposed restriction. Binding yourself against the use of a power can funnel that energy into the rest of your abilities, and breaking or lifting the taboo strips the boost immediately.
4730. Tachyon Defiance,5.2
#You are not bound by the properties of tachyons. Where normal tachyons require infinite energy to slow to the speed of light, you can amble along at lightspeed on pocket change, and where they reach infinite speed at zero energy, you can reach infinite speed while fully charged. The laws that govern tachyons treat you as an exception.
4731. Tachyon Mimicry,5.1
#Allows you to transform your body fully or partially into tachyon particles, granting you faster-than-light travel and a form that obeys bizarre inverse energy laws. You retain your anatomy while transformed but remain somewhat vulnerable to attacks, and fully depleting your energy risks splitting you into two oppositely charged particles moving at infinite speed.
4732. Taco Mimicry,0.7
#You are, or can transform into, a taco. Your body retains all of its organs and structure, but is now made of tortilla, seasoned meat, cheese, lettuce, and salsa. Mold and hungry people pose a significant threat to your continued existence.
4733. Taffy Mimicry,3.0
#Your body is made of taffy, allowing you to stretch, deform and reshape yourself freely. You can take blows that would shatter a normal body, but cold powers can stiffen you and dust or sand ruins your adhesive grip.
4734. Tail Regrowth,2.0
#Your tail regrows after being severed or destroyed, like a lizard shedding its own. Repeatedly losing it may slow the process, and healing factor nullification will stop regrowth entirely.
4735. Tail Wing Manifestation,3.0
#You have wings growing from your tail, granting you flight and enhancing your speed, balance and aerial agility. Some users can retract them when not in use.
4736. Tailypo Physiology,4.1
#You are a Tailypo, the vengeful beast of Appalachian folklore. You possess feral strength, supernatural stealth and an unrelenting instinct for retribution against anyone who wrongs you, stalking them through the night until the debt is paid. You still bleed like an animal and you cannot regrow your tail if it is taken from you.
4737. Taki Reio Physiology,7.8
#Japanese Folklore - You are a Taki Reio, a divine apparition haunting the basin of a sacred waterfall. You take the forms of other gods at will and are regarded as the apex of the supernatural world, with lesser yokai, spirits and demons bowing before your presence. Your existence is bound to your holy waterfall, and destroying it may destroy you.
4738. Talent Embodiment,8.1
#You are the embodiment of talent itself. Every field, every craft, every aptitude humankind has ever conceived of comes to you at the peak of what is possible. Some who bear this power link directly to the concept of talent, pushing their skills beyond any mortal ceiling.
4739. Talpidae Physiology,2.8
#You are or can transform into a talpid—moles, shrew moles, desmans and their kin. You are a master digger, tunneling through soil with ease, and some forms let you swim as readily as you burrow. Your eyesight, however, tends to be terrible.
4740. Tame Inner Beast,4.2
#You possess an inner beast that is completely devoted to you, willingly offering its power without any risk of corruption or berserk states. Unlike most beast-within users, drawing on its strength is as easy as asking a loyal pet, and it will fight to protect you when you are in danger.
4741. Tantric Metabolization,3.5
#(Nsfw) You sustain yourself and your powers by feeding on sexual energy and experiences, taking them into your body as fuel. You may starve without regular sexual activity, and the hunger tends to breed addiction.
4742. Tape Mimicry,2.8
#Your body is made entirely of tape, either retaining your normal shape or becoming homogeneous. You can unspool yourself, stick to surfaces and reform from strips, but you are about as durable as actual tape.
4743. Tapeworm Physiology,1.2
#You either are or can transform into a tapeworm, a parasitic flatworm that lives in the guts of mammals. You may need to inhabit a host to survive, which is as grim as it sounds.
4744. Tar Mimicry,3.2
#Your body is made of tar, a thick viscous black liquid of hydrocarbons. You can absorb physical attacks by parting around them, trap enemies in your body, and reshape yourself freely, though you are vulnerable to fire and cold.
4745. Tardigrade Physiology,4.5
#You possess the physiology of a tardigrade, the famed water bear. You can withstand temperatures from near absolute zero to far above boiling, lethal radiation doses, decades without food or water, crushing pressures and even the vacuum of space. Resistance, not full immunity.
4746. Task Adaptation,2.1
#You can adapt to doing any task regardless of the position you are in, typing on a keyboard while upside down, wielding a sword while arched backward, or doing dishes while lying on your side. Awkward positions simply stop being awkward for you.
4747. Task Continuation,3.4
#You can continue whatever task you were doing even while your mind is compromised by mind control, possession, confusion, or a vegetative state. Alternatively, tasks you set in motion like cooking or cleaning continue on their own while you are occupied elsewhere.
4748. Tasmanian Devil Physiology,3.2
#Allows you to transform into a Tasmanian devil, either partially or fully. You gain an incredibly powerful bite capable of crushing bone, enhanced endurance, a surprising turn of speed for your size and a nasty temperament to match. Your jaw strength relative to body size is among the highest of any mammal.
4749. Tattoo Empowerment,3.8
#You grow stronger, faster and more durable the more tattoos you have on your body, with each tattoo unlocking minor abilities related to its subject. A wolf tattoo might sharpen your senses, a sun tattoo might warm your skin against the cold. You only have so much skin, so choose your ink wisely.
4750. Tattoo Mimicry,4.2
#Your body is made of living ink, allowing you to transform into any of your tattoos or flatten into pure body art on a surface. You can slide across skin from one person to another, gain the abilities of whichever tattoo you embody, and squeeze through any crack a drop of ink could. Water and solvents are genuinely dangerous.
4751. Tatty Bogle Physiology,3.6
#Allows you to transform into a tatty bogle, a mischief-prone Scottish goblin that haunts fields in the guise of a scarecrow. As a tatty bogle you can perfectly mimic any scarecrow, induce supernatural fear in those who wander too close at night, and act as a genius loci of whatever field you claim. You are tied to your field, and destroying it would severely harm you.
4752. Tatzelwurm Physiology,4.7
#European Folklore - Allows you to transform into a Tatzelwurm, the Alpine cryptid dragon with the head of a cat and the body of a serpent. You possess a venomous bite, incredible climbing agility, a sinister hiss that chills the blood and the cunning of both cat and snake. Your presence causes livestock to flee for miles.
4753. Taur Physiology,3.3
#Your lower body is that of an animal of your choice, and you can shift between different taur forms at will. You keep your hands and upper-body dexterity while gaining the physical traits of your lower half, whether that be the speed of a horse, the coils of a serpent or the power of a bull.
4754. Tea Mimicry,2.0
#Your body is made of tea, letting you transform fully or partially into any variety you've tasted. In homogeneous form you can pour yourself through strainers, hide in teapots and soak into fabric. Being drunk by someone else is an ever-present and deeply awkward risk.
4755. Teaching Empowerment,3.0
#You grow stronger, faster and more durable the more you teach. Every lesson delivered, every student guided and every concept explained fuels your body, sharpens your mind and may unlock abilities related to whatever subject you are currently teaching. Idle teachers lose their edge quickly.
4756. Team Empowerment,3.8
#You grow stronger, faster and more durable when you serve on or alongside a team, be it a strike squad, a guild or an unlikely partnership. The tighter the bond and the clearer the shared purpose, the greater the boost. A lone wolf with this trait is a very weak wolf indeed.
4757. Tear Mimicry,2.8
#You can transform your body partially or fully into tears, either retaining your anatomy or becoming a homogenous liquid form. Vulnerable to extreme heat and evaporation, and new users may struggle to revert back.
4758. Tear Trail,0.7
#Wherever you travel, you leave behind a trail of tears. Extremely easy to track and mildly embarrassing in public.
4759. Techno-Extraterrestrial Physiology,5.4
#You are an alien being whose biology and evolution are fundamentally intertwined with technology. Your body grants you a wide suite of tech-based abilities, and you may even be partly mechanical in nature yourself.
4760. Techno-Magic Dragon Physiology,7.3
#You are a hybrid dragon whose body combines both arcane magic and advanced technology, standing among the mightiest of dragonkind. You wield the combined force of opposing powers, though you still answer to the true dragon gods and if genetically unstable risk unwanted mutations.
4761. Technological Divinity,8.4
#You possess a divinity of machine nature, a scientific godhood that grants you supremacy over all technology whether modern, alien, or mythic. Your divine source is the Machine itself, making you a holy being of circuits and code with the raw power of a tech-based god. Vulnerable to Divine Slayer-tier weapons and deep Crash effects.
4762. Technological Intangibility,4.0
#You cannot be felt or registered by any form of technology, meaning any technological effect, sensor, or trap simply fails to trigger when you touch or step on it. Security systems and tech-based artifacts cannot respond to your presence.
4763. Technological Invisibility,3.9
#You cannot be detected by any technological system, rendering cameras, sensors, and security grids useless against you. You may still be visible to the naked eye depending on the form your ability takes.
4764. Technological Power Link,4.6
#Your powers are channelled and fuelled directly through your technological or mechanical nature, allowing your machinery to strengthen and regulate your abilities. If your tech becomes unstable your powers may go wildly out of control, and Crash effects can shut you down entirely.
4765. Technology Embodiment,8.9
#You are the embodiment of technology itself, every circuit, gear and line of code answers to you without question. All technology in existence is essentially an extension of your body, and your control over the concept of tech approaches limitless.
4766. Technology Empowerment,4.0
#You grow stronger, faster and more durable the closer you are to technology, drawing power from machines around you. In a dense city or server farm, you are a force to be reckoned with, but out in the wilderness you are just a regular person.
4767. Technology Immunity,4.2
#You are immune to all forms of technology and the powers derived from it. Bullets simply stop, electronics fail to perceive you, and techno-manipulators find their abilities useless against you. However, this also means healing tech and beneficial tech fail to affect you as well.
4768. Technomagical Blood,6.6
#Your blood has been laced with technomystical micromachines, tiny constructs that can freely rewrite your physical, mental, mystical and spiritual parameters. You can reshape yourself far beyond human norms, drawing on both scientific advancement and metaphysical empowerment. Unfortunately you can be hacked on the tech side and magically disrupted on the mystic side.
4769. Technomagical Empowerment,5.5
#You grow stronger, faster and more durable when surrounded by both magic and technology. In a technomagical environment you are a monster, drawing sustenance from arcane machinery and slowing your aging to a crawl, but the effect is limited to specific types of technomagical material.
4770. Technomagical Power Link,5.4
#Your inherent technomagical nature is directly wired into your powers, fueling and amplifying them through the fusion of arcane circuitry and mystic energy. An unstable core can cause dangerous feedback, and anti-magic or malfunction effects will hit you twice as hard.
4771. Technomagical Symbiosis,5.7
#You host a technomagical entity, a living fusion of magitek grafted into your body. Through the bond you wield both arcane and technological powers that neither source could grant alone, though the entity may try to seize control of your mind and the magitek itself can be volatile.
4772. Technomechanical Blood,4.7
#Your blood is entirely synthetic, a suspension of advanced micro-computers that perfectly simulates the organic properties of any biological sapient. The nanites can self-repair and run diagnostics, but you are vulnerable to electricity manipulation and technology-based hacking.
4773. Technomechanical Empowerment,4.3
#Contact with technomechanical substances empowers you, making you stronger, faster, and more durable. Prolonged exposure may unlock new abilities tied to the affinity and even slow your aging, though you may only draw power from specific types of material.
4774. Technomechanical Physiology,6.3
#Your body is a technomechanical being, a personification of the ordinarily soulless — robotics with a semblance of life all its own. You learn, grow, and evolve far beyond what cybernetics allow, bonding with or imitating any form of mechanical energy down to the biochemical level. Vulnerable to technomechanical manipulation and technoformation.
4775. Technomechanical Power Link,5.3
#Your technomechanical essence is directly linked to your powers, fueling and strengthening them through the fusion of flesh-like machinery and ability. Instability in the link can cause your powers to spiral out of control.
4776. Technomechanical Symbiosis,5.5
#You host a synthorgamech — an artificial living tech lifeform that cohabits your physiology. The bond grants you various technomechanical abilities depending on the entity, but a poorly synched symbiote may harm your body or attempt to take over entirely.
4777. Technomorphism,6.5
#Your body is composed of autonomous intelligent nanomachines that act as a single adaptive entity under your complete control. You can reorganize your mass, density, and structure to morph into any machine, weapon, vehicle, tool, or device you desire. Vulnerable to electricity and magnetism, and prolonged use may erode your sense of humanity.
4778. Technorganic Blood,4.9
#Your blood is both mechanical and biological, a hybrid of orgamechs that can reorder your physical and mental qualities beyond the norm. It makes you technorganic in truth, granting extensive self-modification, but the orgamechs might develop their own will and turn on you.
4779. Technorganic Empowerment,4.3
#Contact with technorganic material empowers you, enhancing your physical stats and potentially unlocking new affinity-based abilities. Some users can even draw sustenance from technorganic entities or slow their aging through prolonged exposure.
4780. Technorganic Physiology,5.4
#Your body is a seamless fusion of flesh and machine at the cellular level. You gain the physical strength and durability of a robot alongside the adaptability and healing of an organic, letting you interface with technology natively and incorporate mechanical upgrades into your flesh. However, you are vulnerable to things that affect machines, including computer viruses and EMPs.
4781. Technorganic Power Link,5.2
#Your technorganic nature is directly wired into your powers, using your bio-tech as fuel and amplifier. Your abilities are strengthened and can be utilized on levels impossible for ordinary users, but if your technorganic material is unstable or damaged, your powers may run wild.
4782. Technoscience,7.4
#You know everything about technology, cybernetics, machines, and the internet. Every invention past and future, every material used in their making, every person associated with them, it is all laid bare in your mind. Your knowledge is absolute as long as it concerns technology but anything outside that domain is as foreign to you as it would be to anyone else.
4783. Teeth Empowerment,2.6
#You become stronger, faster and more durable when near teeth, whether your own or others'. Carrying a collection of teeth around you unlocks and enhances your abilities, and with enough of them you may even draw sustenance or slow your aging. Cavities and decay in your stash weaken the effect.
4784. Telchines Physiology,6.0
#You are a Telchine, the sea daemon of Greek myth tied to the oceans, storms, and dark magics. Your body is suited to the depths, you can call the storms as your servants, and you have a natural affinity for forbidden sorceries. The forging of divine weapons comes as naturally to you as breathing.
4785. Telekinesis Immunity,4.0
#You are immune to telekinesis. Nobody can grab, hold, lift, throw or crush you with mind powers, no matter how strong they are. This does not save you from debris thrown at you or from telekinesis used to construct solid objects, but their hands will never close around you directly.
4786. Telekinetic Force Mimicry,7.6
#Your entire body is made of raw telekinetic force, wrapped in a thin layer of light-bending skin that makes you indistinguishable from any biological being you choose to appear as. You can emulate heartbeats, warmth, even fool advanced detection systems, and your body can reshape, extend, or harden itself at will as an extension of your telekinetic will.
4787. Teleportation Immunity,3.8
#You cannot be teleported. No power, no technology, no spell can remove you from where you are standing against your will. Immunity Bypassing and direct power negation are the only real counters.
4788. Television Mimicry,3.2
#Your body is partially or fully made of televisions, gaining the traits of the medium itself. You can display images and sound from your body, broadcast signals and mimic what TVs do. Vulnerable to EMPs, water and microwave manipulation.
4789. Temperance Empowerment,3.8
#You grow stronger, faster and more durable the more you practice temperance, either yours or that of others around you. Your existing powers amplify, you may draw sustenance from restraint itself, and your aging may slow considerably. If you give in to gluttony the effects fade.
4790. Temperature Immunity,5.4
#You are immune to any and all changes in temperature, from absolute zero to the core of a star, and even conceptual temperatures cannot harm you. Secondary effects like smoke inhalation may still get you, and immunity bypassing powers can still break through.
4791. Temperature Regulation,2.8
#You can maintain your own body temperature at any level you want for long periods, if not indefinitely. With practice you may even manipulate your body heat at will, though extreme temperatures may still kill you without a healing factor.
4792. Temporal Anchoring,6.8
#You are a fixed point in time, a living moment whose events have been set in stone and cannot be altered. This grants you a form of temporal immortality: every death is inevitably rewritten, since the timeline refuses to let you stay dead. You can still be trapped, and Absolute Restoration may be able to undo the lock depending on how you became anchored.
4793. Temporal Awareness,4.6
#You can sense any alteration made to the time stream, discerning alternate timelines, detecting the use of time travel and knowing when history has been rewritten. You are still vulnerable to those alterations without temporal protection, and too many simultaneous changes can overload your mind.
4794. Temporal Cognition,3.5
#You have a perfect sense of time. You always know the precise current time, the exact age of anything you see, how long any action has taken or will take, and can sense temporal travel or alterations nearby. A walking, breathing chronometer with a built-in event calendar.
4795. Temporal Displacement,6.6
#You are unstuck in time, free to drift to any point in any timeline at random, including closed-off or erased ones. You are no longer bound to a single stream of history and can wander the multiverse's time like a ghost through hallways.
4796. Temporal Empowerment,4.2
#You grow stronger, faster and more durable from time and time-based energies, with your existing powers amplified in their presence. You may draw sustenance from time itself and slow or stop your aging. Weak against Temporal Erasure and Time Compression.
4797. Temporal Guardianship,7.2
#You are a Guardian of Time, not an entity of higher existence but a protector who oversees the flow of history and keeps it in check. You gain a broad suite of abilities to control every aspect of time, ensuring events remain in their proper place. Too much strain from your own duties may destroy you, and temporal monsters are drawn to guardians like you.
4798. Temporal Immunity,6.2
#You are immune to time-based powers, you cannot be frozen, slowed, aged, de-aged, erased from time or affected by temporal slicing. You are an anchor in the timestream, untouched by chronokinetic meddling. Higher-Temporal Manipulation can still overcome you.
4799. Temporal Independence,6.5
#You can operate and function without time. You do not need the concept of time to exist in order to move, think, or act, meaning you could continue functioning normally even within a stopped-time field or a timeless void.
4800. Temporal Paradox Immunity,7.0
#You remain unaffected by all attempts to erase you from the past. Kill your grandfather, burn your infant self, unmake your ancestors, the timeline shrugs and you keep existing. The only way to kill you is to do it in the present. Immunity Negation is your only true counter.
4801. Temporal Protection,5.4
#You are immune to alterations in the timestream, retaining memory of prior timelines even after they are overwritten. You will notice when someone time travels or rewinds events, and you may be immune to erasure from time entirely. You are not immune to physical harm, only temporal meddling, and Temporal Bypassing can still reach you.
4802. Temporal Sense,2.3
#You possess a perfect internal clock, always knowing the exact date and time down to the second no matter where you are. You adapt instantly to new calendars, timekeeping systems, time zones, or planetary rotations, and you can track durations with inhuman precision.
4803. Temporal Singularity,7.3
#You exist at only one point in time, the present, with no past self and no future self anywhere else in the timestream. You cannot be visited by time travellers, observed by temporal sight, or affected by attacks on your other selves because there are none. Even if erased, you should be able to revive yourself from scratch within the timestream.
4804. Temporal Source,8.9
#You are the source of all time. As long as you exist, time exists, and you share an emotional link to every timeline that has ever or will ever be. If you die, all of time ceases with you, taking everything and everyone across existence along. You cannot escape this role without passing it to another, as there must always be a source.
4805. Temporal Symbiosis,6.3
#You are symbiotically bonded to a temporal entity, an embodiment of time or a being made of chronal energy. The bond grants you potent time-based abilities but the entity may attempt to take over your body or mind, and channeling too much of its power can tear you apart.
4806. Temporal Transcendence,8.5
#You exist beyond the concept of time. You are ageless, require no food, sleep or rest, diseases cannot progress within you, and injuries passively revert as your body returns to its untouched state. You are immune to all temporal powers but spatial powers and meta time manipulation can still affect you.
4807. Temporal Transformation,4.6
#When you enter a different point in history, your body transforms to reflect that era, either partially mimicking its qualities or undergoing a full change. The rate and degree depend on the physical laws of that time period, and controlling the shift is not always easy.
4808. Temptation Embodiment,6.8
#You are the living personification of temptation, drawing power from the seductions and sins of others and yourself. You can tempt anyone toward any desire, using sin itself as fuel to extend your life or as a weapon to push victims into madness. Useless against the truly apathetic.
4809. Tenko Physiology,7.6
#You are a Tenko, the celestial sky-fox that sits near the peak of kitsune evolution, a being powerful enough to be regarded as a minor god. You are a pure spirit capable of taking any form, possess clairvoyance and powerful fox magic, and can bless humans with foresight. Being good-aligned makes you vulnerable to sufficiently strong evil powers.
4810. Tenome Physiology,4.3
#You are a Tenome, the blind yokai with eyes on the palms of your hands who tracks prey by supernatural smell across great distances. You consume the bones of your victims, leaving only empty skin behind. You are consumed by hatred and predatory instinct, and destroying your palm-eyes blinds you completely.
4811. Tension Force Defiance,5.4
