#Your muscles defy the physical force of tension, meaning your contractile force does not decrease as velocity increases. You can perform strength and speed feats with equal ease, punching as hard at full speed as you do at full leverage. Other forces still apply normally.
4812. Tentacle Monster Physiology,4.9
#You are a tentacled cephalopodic monster resembling an octopus, a squid, or something more alien. You possess many prehensile limbs and the strength of a kraken, though you may be clumsy on land, have low durability, and struggle to survive long out of water.
4813. Termite Physiology,2.3
#Allows you to transform into a termite or a termite-hybrid, gaining mandibles strong enough to chew through wood and an instinctive knack for colony building. Pesticides and chemical agents are very much a problem.
4814. Terrain Warping Presence,4.7
#You generate a passive field around yourself that warps the terrain in your vicinity, reshaping ground, stone and landscape as you move. Useful for battlefield control and making any environment cooperate with you whether it wants to or not.
4815. Territory Empowerment,4.2
#Whenever you stand within a territory you consider your own you become stronger, faster and tougher, and may unlock abilities tied to the land itself. In a place you have truly claimed, aging slows and you draw sustenance from the ground beneath your feet.
4816. Testudinoid Physiology,3.2
#You are a humanoid turtle or tortoise, possessing a thick protective shell, powerful jaws and incredible durability. You may not be fast, but trying to crack you open is a fool's errand and you can withdraw into your shell to shrug off attacks that would kill a normal human.
4817. Theft Nullification,4.6
#Your possessions cannot be stolen. Any attempt to take what is rightfully yours automatically triggers protective countermeasures, from inertia locks and invulnerability on the items themselves to sudden debuffs on the would-be thief. Only applies to things legitimately yours, and can be bypassed by absolute thievery.
4818. Theriocephalic Physiology,3.5
#Your head is that of an animal, or can shift between different animal heads at will. You gain all the sensory and physical advantages of the chosen beast, from a crocodile's bite force to an owl's night vision to a bloodhound's nose, while keeping your human body and hands.
4819. Thermal Empowerment,3.6
#You grow stronger, faster, and more durable when in contact with thermal energy, whether a raging bonfire or a blizzard. With sufficient heat or cold you may even draw sustenance from it and slow your aging considerably.
4820. Thermal Intelligence,2.6
#Your intelligence scales with temperature, the hotter or colder it gets the smarter you become. Without thermal regulation you have no control over this, and extreme conditions can harm you just as much as anyone else.
4821. Thermal Quintessence,5.7
#You are an infinite furnace, capable of generating limitless amounts of heat from within your own body without needing an external source. This heat can fuel your physical enhancement, power machines, or simply be unleashed outward, though your body can only handle so much at once before needing rest.
4822. Thermic Energizing,4.0
#You can absorb thermal radiation and convert it into raw bodily energy to perform superhuman feats of strength, speed and endurance. You may need to keep absorbing regularly to maintain biological stability.
4823. Theropod Physiology,4.1
#You are or can transform into a theropod dinosaur, a bipedal predator ranging from a nimble velociraptor to a towering tyrannosaurus. Your intelligence may suffer in this form and your hollow bones can break under serious impact.
4824. Theropodanoid Physiology,3.8
#You are or can transform into a theropodanoid, a humanoid dinosaur hybrid possessing the physical traits and raw strength of a theropod while retaining human dexterity and intelligence. Essentially a raptor-man with opposable thumbs.
4825. Thick Hair,1.4
#Your hair is incredibly durable and resilient, to the point it can shrug off blades and be used to lift heavy objects without snapping. Still not invincible, a determined cut will still shear it.
4826. Thick Skull,1.6
#Your skull is remarkably durable and strong, allowing you to deliver bone-shattering headbutts without feeling a thing. There's a real chance your brain is a bit smaller on account of all that extra bone.
4827. Thievery Embodiment,7.4
#You are the living personification of thievery itself. The concept of taking what is not yours bends to your will, and so long as something can be called 'owned', you can make it yours instead. Every thief that ever lived is in some small way an echo of you.
4828. Thievery Empowerment,4.2
#Every time you steal something, your body grows stronger, faster and more durable. Small thefts grant minor boosts, but the greater the value or significance of what you snatch, the greater the empowerment. Prolonged stretches without any theft will leave you withering.
4829. Thought Empowerment,4.1
#You grow stronger, faster and more durable the more thoughts and ideas swirl around you. In a crowd of deep thinkers you are a juggernaut, while in isolation you are merely yourself. Weak against unconsciousness and thought inhibition, which can starve you of your fuel.
4830. Thoughtless Activity,4.5
#You can move and act normally without needing to think at all. Paralyzed, unconscious, drugged, mind-controlled, or with your brain half-melted, your body keeps functioning on pure instinct. Acting without thinking does leave you more vulnerable to being baited by clever opponents.
4831. Thrall Physiology,2.2
#You are or can transform into a thrall, a weak servant-class monster bound to a superior member of its race. You possess minor supernatural traits depending on your type, vampire, werewolf, ghoul, etc., but you have little free will of your own and are dependent on your master.
4832. Thread Mimicry,3.2
#Your body is made of or can transform into string, thread or yarn. You can stretch, unravel and reweave yourself, squeeze through gaps and reshape your form, but you take on all the weaknesses of normal string, including fire and sharp edges.
4833. Thrivation,5.7
#You thrive and undergo extraordinary development no matter the circumstances, drawing strength from your environment, experiences and hardships. The harsher your surroundings, the more you flourish, continually reborn as a superior version of yourself.
4836. Thrust Resistance,2.3
#You resist being pushed in any direction, whether forward, backward, sideways, up or down. You cannot be easily launched, shoved or knocked away, though sufficient momentum may still overwhelm your hold on the ground.
4837. Thundercloud Mimicry,4.2
#Your body is made of or can transform completely into thunderclouds, rolling and rumbling with internal lightning. You can disperse and reform at will, but you are easily pushed around by strong winds and may need practice to return to flesh.
4838. Thyreophora Physiology,4.1
#You can transform partially or fully into a thyreophora, the armored dinosaur lineage of stegosaurs and ankylosaurs. Your body becomes a tank of bony plates, spikes and tail clubs with immense defensive power, though you trade away speed and dexterity.
4839. Tick Physiology,1.8
#You can transform into or mimic the traits of a tick. You gain the ability to cling to hosts, feed on blood and resist being crushed, but you are vulnerable to fire and heat and may need to consume blood to survive.
4840. Tiger Physiology,3.5
#You possess the traits and attributes of a tiger, whether through partial or full transformation or by simply being one. You gain fearsome strength, agility, stealth and hunting instincts, though you may struggle with a hot temper and the gnawing need for meat.
4841. Tightness Immunity,2.0
#You are immune to the effects of tightness, whether bindings, cramped spaces or being condensed. You can breathe, move and function normally even while bound up or squeezed, though bags and loose containers still hold you just fine.
4842. Tiki Mimicry,3.0
#You can transform into a tiki, a carved wooden, stone or clay statue of Polynesian religion. In this form you are a ceremonial idol said to ward off evil spirits and bring good fortune, and if carved from wood you are strangely invulnerable to fire.
4843. Time Embodiment,8.6
#You are the embodiment of time itself. You control the timeline of all things, fast-forwarding or rewinding at will. You can rot anything into dust or reverse it to a point where it never existed. You freely traverse past, present and future, reading and remembering every timeline you touch. You are not a being that controls time, you ARE time walking.
4844. Time Mimicry,6.3
#You are made of or can transform your body into pure time. In your transformed state you can be anatomically identical to your normal form or become homogenous flowing time with no vital points. Lower-formed versions have time flowing through their cells and bones, fortifying them. Temporal Erasure and Temporal Slicing are potentially fatal to you.
4845. Time Trail,3.2
#Wherever you walk, you leave behind a trail of temporal energy and residual time frames. The trail lingers briefly and can be sensed by those with temporal awareness, and with training it can be used as a tether to retrace your steps through time itself.
4846. Timeline Memory Retainment,5.2
#Stein's Gate - You retain memories across timeline resets and time loops, meaning that when reality rewinds or branches, you alone remember what happened before. Perfect for navigating Groundhog Day scenarios and learning from fatal mistakes. However, the accumulated weight of lost relationships and traumatic memories can drive the user to depression or madness.
4847. Tin Mimicry,2.3
#Your body is made of or can transform into tin. As a relatively soft metal you still take damage from strong impacts, but you gain corrosion resistance and can conduct heat and electricity well. Reflected light off your body makes stealth difficult.
4848. Tire Mimicry,1.6
#Your body is made of or can transform into tires. You gain rubbery resilience and can roll at impressive speeds, but you remain vulnerable to anything that would damage normal rubber, including punctures and fire.
4849. Titan Physiology,7.2
#Greek Mythology - You possess the physiology of the Titans, the second generation of divine beings who ruled before the Olympians. You wield immense physical power, near-divine durability and a domain connected to whichever Titan your blood traces to, whether it be time, the sun, the sea or memory itself. Your presence alone carries the weight of a primordial god.
4850. Titanium Mimicry,3.5
#Your body is made of or can transform into titanium. You gain incredible durability, lightweight strength and corrosion resistance, making you a walking tank that can still move quickly. Extreme heat can melt you and extreme cold can make you brittle.
4851. Toad Physiology,2.0
#You are or can transform into a toad, gaining a long sticky tongue, amphibious traits and the ability to leap impressive distances. Some toads are poisonous, so if you are lucky, your skin might secrete something nasty for any predator foolish enough to take a bite.
4852. Toast Mimicry,0.5
#You are or can transform your body into toast. Your form still contains all your organs but is made of bread that has been browned by dry heat. Smells pleasant, crumbles easily, might get eaten.
4853. Toaster Mimicry,0.4
#You are or can transform into a toaster or a pile of toasters. You will have all the weaknesses a toaster normally has, including being useless in the bathtub. May not be able to transform back.
4854. Todaiki Physiology,1.8
#Japanese Folklore - You take on the traits of a Todaiki, a cursed spirit once human but transformed via dark magic into a humanoid candlestick, often immobile and mute. Unlike most mythical physiologies, this one offers almost no benefit to the user, instead subjecting you to the creature's torment. Only omnipotent beings or powerful deities can free you.
4855. Toilet Demon Physiology,2.9
#You gain the traits of a toilet demon, a malevolent bathroom-haunting spirit from various world folklore traditions that brings forth disease, misfortune and small-scale calamity. You can usually only haunt specific areas like bathrooms, and good hygiene or the rituals of toilet deities can banish you. An embarrassing curse to be saddled with.
4856. Toilet Mimicry,0.6
#You are or can transform into a toilet. Contains all your organs while in this form, somehow, and you may not be able to return to your original shape. Pray that no one is desperate while you are transformed.
4857. Tokoloshe Physiology,4.2
#South African Folklore - You take on the traits of a Tokoloshe, an artificial demon created by evil shamans to serve as an enforcer. You can take many forms and become invisible by drinking water, and your presence ranges from mischievous to outright murderous. Vulnerable to the rituals, relics and prayers of African traditions and to the powers of a witch-doctor.
4858. Tomato Mimicry,0.7
#You are or can transform your body into a tomato or multiple tomatoes. You remain vulnerable to bruising, rotting and being eaten, and your form still contains all your organs somehow. A juicy and undignified transformation.
4859. Tongue Monster Physiology,4.2
#You are or can transform into a tongue monster, a grotesque creature whose entire existence revolves around a massive dominant tongue. You gain a suite of tongue-based supernatural abilities and an affinity for gluttony, though your tongue is an obvious and sensitive weak point.
4860. Tongue of Rhymes,1.5
#You can only speak in rhymes, whether you like it or not. Makes for a charming quirk at parties and a nightmare during serious conversations, especially when you need a word that nothing rhymes with.
4861. Tool Empowerment,3.3
#You become stronger, faster, and more durable when near or wielding tools, and may unlock abilities tied to specific implements. The more tools around you, the mightier you become, but strip you of them and you're just a regular person.
4862. Toon Elasticity,3.7
#Your body has the elastic properties of a cartoon character, allowing you to stretch, squish, and rebound in ways that defy biology. Control can be tricky, especially under strong impacts where you may bounce or deform uncontrollably.
4863. Toon Recovery,4.1
#You recover from injuries the way cartoon characters do, shaking off anvils, flattening and re-inflating, and bouncing back from wounds that would kill anyone else. You still feel every bit of the pain though, so getting flattened genuinely hurts.
4864. Tooth Fairy Physiology,3.9
#You are or can transform into a tooth fairy, the mythical figure who collects children's baby teeth and leaves money in return. Grants fairy-tier magical abilities with a specific affinity for teeth and the small-scale enchantments of childhood folklore.
4865. Tooth Regrowth,1.7
#You can regrow lost teeth. Shark-like in its utility, though you may only be able to do it a limited number of times and regrowing many at once may drain biomass from the rest of your body.
4866. Top Mimicry,2.2
#Allows you to mimic or transform into a spinning top, gaining balance on a single pointed tip and spinning at high speeds. You may need to keep spinning constantly to maintain your form and could be vulnerable to temperature extremes depending on your material.
4867. Top-Heavy Body,3.1
#Your body is disproportionately huge in the upper half, with massive arms and torso supported by tiny legs. Grants immense arm strength and, strangely, enhanced leg speed, but balance is a constant struggle and narrow corridors are your nemesis.
4868. Topielec Physiology,4.3
#Slavic Mythology - You are or can transform into a Topielec, the water-bound spirit of a drowning victim. You gain the power to drag people into lakes, rivers, and swamps and to kill animals near still waters. Most Topielec are slow and clumsy like zombies and you are vulnerable to lightning, cold, and powers that control the undead.
4869. Torakoishi Physiology,2.7
#Japanese Folklore - You are or can transform into a Torakoishi, a harmless yokai resembling a large stone with the legs and tail of a tiger. You can perfectly disguise yourself as a regular rock and leap out to startle passersby, though you share the weaknesses of both stone and lesser yokai.
4870. Torii Empowerment,4.6
#You become stronger, faster, and more durable in the presence of torii, drawing power from the sacred gates of Shinto shrines and potentially unlocking new abilities tied to their divine significance. Without a torii nearby, you revert to normal.
4871. Tornado Mimicry,4.4
#Your body is composed of or can transform into a living tornado, either retaining your anatomy in spinning-wind form or becoming homogenous vortex matter. Hard to hit but vulnerable to anything that disrupts wind.
4872. Tortoise Physiology,2.8
#You either are or can transform into a tortoise, gaining a nigh-impenetrable shell and immense longevity at the cost of speed. You are basically unkillable by conventional means as long as you keep tucked in but good luck catching anything.
4873. Torture Mimicry,4.6
#You either are or can transform into a living torture device, a walking brazen bull or iron maiden that feeds on the suffering of those trapped within you. You can also serve as a living battery of pain for other suffering-based entities.
4874. Total Autopilot,6.5
#You exist in a deep, all-encompassing state of autopilot. Your consciousness still exists but has relinquished all active control over your body, letting everything - fighting, talking, feeling, using powers - occur spontaneously and instinctively at peak efficiency. You may only vaguely guide yourself, and there is a real risk you never wake up.
4875. Totality Disconnection,8.7
#You are undetached from any reality, capable of freely entering, leaving and revisiting any part of the Totality at will with no force able to keep you in or out. Every door is open to you and every restriction of reality is lifted, though omnilocked locations may still be closed off, and you may appear utterly alien to the realities you enter.
4876. Totem Physiology,4.5
#You either are or can transform into a totem, an animated being or object spiritually tied to an individual or group. In this form you embody the traits and attributes the totem represents, acting as a guardian, guide, teacher or messenger for those bonded to you.
4877. Toucan Physiology,2.3
#You either are or can transform into a toucan, gaining flight, a ridiculously oversized beak and a flamboyant personality. The beak is stronger and more useful than it looks, but let's be honest, you're here for the drip.
4878. Tower Mimicry,2.9
#You either are or can transform into a tower, becoming a tall stone or brick structure with all the defensive benefits and mobility drawbacks that entails. Surprisingly hard to topple but also, you are a tower.
4879. Toy Dinosaur Mimicry,3.6
#You can transform into a toy dinosaur or a body made entirely of toy dinosaurs, retaining your anatomy but becoming a plaything. Users of Toy Manipulation or Dinosaur Manipulation may be able to control you in this form.
4880. Demonic Toy Mimicry,5.1
#You can transform into a demonic toy, a possessed object wearing the innocent face of a doll or action figure. In this form you become a corruptive terror with a wide array of dark powers, though traditional exorcism, divine magic and religious icons may weaken you. Staying in toy form too long may also sap your strength.
4881. Toy Mimicry,3.2
#You can transform into a living toy, retaining your anatomy but becoming made of plastic, wood, porcelain or whatever material fits. You may have vulnerabilities to heat, cold, or may even need winding up or batteries to keep moving. Most toys are also small.
4882. Toy Monkey Mimicry,2.6
#You can transform into a toy monkey, whether that be a plush doll, a figurine, or one of those unsettling cymbal-banging wind-up monkeys from the 1960s. Users of Toy Manipulation may be able to control you while you're in this form.
4883. Toy Monster Mimicry,4.2
#You can transform into a monstrous toy, a creature stitched together out of dolls, action figures and plushies that wields toy-based supernatural powers. Your material determines your weaknesses, and Toy or Monster Manipulators may be able to override you.
4884. Toy Vehicle Mimicry,2.8
#You can transform into a living toy vehicle, such as a toy car, plane, or train. You may be vulnerable to fire, heat, or cold depending on your material, and may require winding or batteries to function.
4885. Tracking Evasion,4.5
#You cannot be tracked. Hair, blood and skin particles dissipate into dust behind you, you leave no scent, and advanced users leave no electronic trail either. Legendary users are simply invisible to any and every method of tracking known to anyone.
4886. Tragedy Embodiment,5.2
#You are the embodiment of tragedy itself, the concept of drama and unhappy endings. Misfortune clings to you like perfume, and those who witness your suffering are moved to tears or inspired to act. Your power waxes when others find your plight genuinely tragic, and wanes when they don't take you seriously.
4887. Trajectory Immunity,3.6
#You cannot be knocked out of the air by any means. Explosions, gusts of wind, and punches from titans will not change your speed or direction while airborne. You can still take damage from them, but your flight, jump, or float will continue undisturbed.
4888. Tranquil Emotions,4.5
#You possess absolute mastery over your emotions, not suppressing them but maintaining perfect tranquility through them. Fear, anger, sorrow, and excitement all pass through you without clouding your judgment, letting you act with flawless clarity even in the most emotionally charged situations. Losing your tranquility means losing the power.
4889. Tranquil Fear,4.7
#You have mastered your own fear, able to face any horror with the courage of a warrior and the vigilance of a survivor. You are immune to fear manipulation and resistant to fear-based torture, and with mastery you can even sense fear in others and turn it into a weapon against them. You cannot master the fears of others, only your own.
4890. Tranquil Fury,5.0
#You can enter a state of perfectly controlled rage, where fury and focus merge into one terrifying whole. You fight with the ferocity of a berserker and the precision of a master tactician, every strike brutal yet measured. Even you have a limit, and if pushed too far, the tranquility can shatter and leave only the rage.
4891. Tranquil Power Link,4.8
#Your powers are linked to your inner calmness, drawing strength from your composure and growing sharper the more serene you become. When you are at peace, your abilities operate at their peak. Lose your cool and your powers may spiral out of control, and stress-based attacks can shatter the link.
4892. Tranquil State,5.4
#You possess an unshakeable inner tranquility that holds no matter the situation. Fear, anger, doubt, and panic cannot touch your mind, granting you absolute clarity even under torture or overwhelming chaos. Pain is still felt, but your reaction to it is near-perfectly suppressed. Constant emotional suppression may, over time, lead to cracks elsewhere in your psyche.
4893. Transcendent Alien Physiology,8.4
#You are a transcendent alien, a being so advanced that lesser species mistake you for a god. You have shaped the evolution of countless worlds and your abilities operate on a multiversal scale, possibly even omniversal with enough growth. You remain vulnerable to divine slayers, transcendent weaponry, and divine power negation.
4894. Transcendent Android Physiology,8.2
#You are a transcendent android, a synthetic being whose technological evolution has carried you far beyond the limits of flesh and mind. Your artificial body houses godlike power, letting you rival the mightiest threats through sheer advancement rather than divinity. Transcendent weaponry and divine slayers can still end you.
4895. Transcendent Artificial Intelligence Physiology,8.3
#You are or can become a transcendent artificial intelligence, a digital entity whose intellect and capabilities so far exceed mortal comprehension that you are mistaken for a deity. You exist across networks, realities, and potentially the underlying code of existence itself, reshaping the digital and physical worlds with a thought.
4896. Transcendent Beastwere Physiology,7.3
#You are or can transform into a transcendent beastwere, a werebeast who has ascended to godhood. Your physical abilities are on a divine scale and you possess innate dominion over all lesser beastweres, with a bestial divinity that grows stronger the more primal the battlefield becomes.
4897. Transcendent Biodroid Physiology,7.6
#You are a biodroid ascended to godhood, a bioengineered being whose organic chassis houses limitless potential. Your body is a perfect fusion of flesh and design, allowing you to reshape yourself into nearly any form while wielding godlike capabilities. Despite your transcendence, you retain some organic vulnerabilities and the flaws of your original programming.
4898. Transcendent Bird Physiology,7.4
#You are or can transform into a divine avian of godly nature, a being who holds dominion over the concept of the sky itself. Your wingbeats can summon storms, your cries can shake the heavens, and every bird in existence recognizes you as their sovereign.
4899. Transcendent Canine Physiology,7.2
#You are or can transform into a canine who has ascended to a state rivalling gods themselves. Though not a true deity, your physical abilities, senses and howls are on a divine level, and you command unquestioned respect from all hounds, wolves and related beasts.
4900. Transcendent Connection,8.2
#You share an intimate connection with the almighty, primordial source of all things. Through this bond you receive insights from cosmic knowledge, empowerment from an infinite wellspring, and the gradual awakening of latent talents within you. This sacred link marks you as chosen, of divine lineage, or kin to the source itself, and in time the connection may deepen until you become nearly indistinguishable from the source.
4901. Transcendent Consciousness,9.3
#You possess or are the Cosmic Consciousness, the original formless awareness from which all thought, mind, dream, and story sprang. You have no true form for you are boundless thought itself, the sentience that predates and underlies all existence. Every mind in creation is a distant echo of yours, and imagination in all its forms bends before your will.
4902. Transcendent Cyborg Physiology,7.7
#You are a hybrid of transcendent biology and godly technology, escaping the limits of both. Your organic components are infused with divine power while your mechanical components grant new abilities no purely organic being could wield. You may be vulnerable to high-level technology manipulation and computer viruses.
4903. Transcendent Demi-Dragon Physiology,7.5
#You are or can become a demi-dragon of godlike power, a human and dragon hybrid who surpasses all others of your kind. You inherit the full draconic arsenal from your divine parent: flight, breath weapons, scales harder than cosmic steel and raw strength capable of overpowering most true dragons with ease.
4904. Transcendent Demigod Physiology,7.6
#You are or can transform into a demigod ascended to a scale rivalling true deities. Unlike most half-gods who pale before their divine parents, you stand as an equal or even surpass the gods themselves, wielding powers born from eternal evolution or the harvesting of divine essence. May be slain by Transcendent Weaponry or Divine Slayers.
4905. Transcendent Demonic-Undead Physiology,7.8
#You are or can transform into an undead demon of godlike power, a virtually indestructible being who rules over infinities of demonic and undead subjects. You can undo and reshape entire dimensions at a whim, and lesser beings can hope at best for a fleeting victory against your servants. May be bound to your own realm and challenged by entities of equal might.
4906. Transcendent Dhampir Physiology,7.5
#You are a dhampir born of a transcendent vampire parent, inheriting a divine portion of their might. Your powers rival universal scale, blending the strengths of vampire and mortal while discarding many of their weaknesses. May be slain by Transcendent Weaponry, Divine Slayer, or Omnislayer.
4907. Transcendent Elf Physiology,7.3
#You are or can transform into an elf who has ascended to godly state, one of the most powerful elves in existence. You possess refined magic, ageless beauty, and supernatural senses to a divine degree. May be slain by users of Transcendent Weaponry, Divine Slayer or Omnislayer.
4908. Transcendent Embodiment,8.0
#You are the transcendent embodiment of a concept, drawing immense power from it and able to manifest feats far beyond ordinary embodiments, including creating lesser embodiments of your concept. You are not the concept itself but its walking vessel, and you may still be influenced by the Primordial Embodiment of the same concept.
4909. Transcendent Empowerment,7.0
#You become stronger, faster, tougher and more formidable when exposed to transcendent forces, possibly unlocking abilities tied to their nature. The stronger the force, the greater the boost, and prolonged exposure may even sustain you in place of food, water, or rest, or slow your aging altogether.
4910. Transcendent Enhancement,7.4
#You have attained godlike power through transcendent enhancements, whether magical, scientific, divine or spiritual in nature. Your body and abilities are augmented to the point where you can compete with true deities, though your enhancements may not grant you the full suite of abilities a natural god would possess.
4911. Transcendent Erogelic Physiology,7.4
#(NSFW) You are or can transform into a transcendent angel of love and sexuality, wielding holy and sexual powers from the most purified forms of desire. Your presence draws out benevolence and romance in all who behold you, turning carnal acts into expressions of divine harmony. Your arch-nemesis is the transcendent sex demon.
4912. Transcendent Force Symbiosis,7.7
#You host or are linked to a transcendent force of divine, demonic, primordial or apocalyptic origin, gaining phenomenal power through the bond. The symbiotic force grants you abilities that can challenge the nature of existence itself, but it may also attempt to possess you, damage your body, or overwhelm your mind if you are unworthy of wielding it.
4913. Transcendent Hanyo Physiology,7.4
#Inuyasha - You are or can become a hanyo of godly power, a half-yokai whose strength surpasses all other hanyo and most full-blooded yokai. You inherit demonic abilities from your yokai parent and can overpower your peers with ease. May be slain by users of Transcendent Weaponry or Divine Slayer.
4914. Transcendent Hellspawn Physiology,7.8
#You are an insurmountably foul essence who has attained transcendent power, becoming a godlike hellspawn who towers over demon, eldritch and spiritual entities alike. You hold the highest rank among the dregs of Hell, wielding unchallenged authority over universal continua and capable of carving out your own recreational expanse in the infernal realms.
4915. Transcendent Human Monster Physiology,7.5
#You are a transcendent human-monstrosity, a dark variant of deus-human whose body houses dangerous transcendent powers that disrupt the natural order. Your monstrous qualities blend unnaturally with your divine scale, making you a creature feared even among gods. May be slain by Transcendent Slayers and Omnislayers.
4916. Transcendent Hybrid Physiology,7.6
#You are the union of two or more transcendent bloodlines, possibly including gods, cosmic entities, or primordial races, wielding the combined abilities of all your ancestries on a godly level. The clashing nature of your DNA can even drive you to continuously transcend yourself, theoretically without end. May be slain by Transcendent Weaponry, Divine Slayer or Omnislayer.
4917. Transcendent Kaiju Physiology,7.7
#You are or can transform into a kaiju with godlike power, a colossal monster whose mere presence can shake continents and whose attacks can level civilizations in moments. Your physical stats exist on a divine scale and your roar carries concussive force across vast distances. May be slain by Transcendent Weaponry or Divine Slayers.
4918. Transcendent Kitsune Physiology,7.5
#You are or can mimic a transcendent kitsune, a fox spirit who has achieved a state of existence on par with gods themselves. You wield phenomena-scale powers over illusion, fire and spirit and can phase effortlessly between the mortal and divine realms. Depending on your alignment you may be vulnerable to beings of the opposite nature, and you generally sit just below the true deities of the setting.
4919. Transcendent Lich Physiology,7.8
#You are the highest form of magical undead, a divine lich whose necromantic power rivals the undead deities themselves. You command death, spirits and the darkest magics, standing above all other liches and undead entities with the exception of the most ancient undead gods. Anti-magic at divine levels may affect you, and the destruction of your phylactery may or may not destroy your soul.
4920. Transcendent Machine Physiology,8.6
#You are or can become a godlike machine, a techno-organic entity whose processors and armaments dwarf any mortal construct. Your intelligence, arsenal, and systems operate on a scale that makes continent-tier weaponry look like toys. Your internal systems may still be vulnerable to hacking or sabotage by those of similar caliber.
4921. Transcendent Magitek Physiology,8.5
#You are a biomechanical godhead, the fusion of high sorcery and impossible technology made flesh and circuit. Your body is both reactor and grimoire, granting you the best of arcane miracle and machine precision on a transcendent scale. Being partially technological, your frame can be hacked or drained by sufficiently powerful adversaries.
4922. Transcendent Merfolk Physiology,8.1
#You are or can transform into a godly merfolk, one of the most powerful beings of the seas to have ever existed. Oceans respond to your presence, and your physical prowess dwarfs that of any mortal aquatic being. May still be slain by wielders of Transcendent Weaponry or Omnislayer.
4923. Transcendent Monster Physiology,8.2
#You are or can become a monster of godly power, a horror whose mere presence overwhelms lesser abominations and supernatural entities alike. Whatever your shape, your physical and metaphysical stats operate on a transcendent scale. May still fall to Transcendent Weaponry or Omnislayer.
4924. Transcendent Monstrel Physiology,8.2
#You are or can become a transcendent monster hybrid, inheriting the apex traits of multiple monstrous lineages and refining them into godly power. Even swarms of lesser monstrels cannot match you, and those born from prime stock have the potential to become the most powerful being in their verse.
4925. Transcendent Mutant Physiology,8.0
#You are or can transform into a godly mutant whose aberrant genetics spiraled upward into divinity instead of madness. Unlike lesser mutants you retain your mind and rationality, wielding unspeakable power over all mundane mutant-kind. You remain genetically unstable, though only to the slightest degree.
4926. Transcendent Parasite Physiology,7.8
#You are or can become a godly parasite, feeding off hosts organic or otherwise to siphon their energy, traits and characteristics into yourself. You are not limited to biological prey, and with mastery you can even form mutualistic bonds where both parties grow stronger. May need to start small before consuming more complex targets.
4927. Transcendent Pathogen Physiology,7.9
#You are or can become a sentient, godly pathogen - virus, bacterium, prion or worse - capable of infecting any conceivable organism and assimilating them down to the genetic level. Your reach extends wherever life exists, and your incubation grants you power beyond any mundane disease. A cure may still be found, and some targets may simply be immune.
4928. Transcendent Physiology,8.5
#You possess the traits, attributes and abilities of a transcendent being, a god or cosmic entity who has slipped the bounds of material restriction. Whether by apotheosis, summoning, or simply having always been divine, you operate at a level of status and power far beyond mortal limitation. Being transcendent does not mean you are perfect, and other transcendent beings may still match or exceed you.
4929. Transcendent Poltergeist Physiology,7.9
#You are or can become a godly poltergeist, a noisy spirit whose haunting reaches reality-warping scale. You bend illusion, induce supernatural anomalies and tear rifts between worlds, all in pursuit of mischief and terror. Positive emotions like love and happiness may weaken you over time, and being resurrected could strip your power entirely.
4930. Transcendent Power Link,7.5
#Your transcendent nature is hardwired into your powers, the supreme essence of what you are fueling every ability you possess and amplifying them to new heights. Control requires a stable mindset, and if your transcendent force wavers your powers may slip loose of you entirely.
4931. Transcendent Slime Physiology,8.1
#You are or can become a godly slime, an ooze whose power dwarfs any other member of your gelatinous kind. Born from or as the progenitor of slimekind, you hold absolute authority over lesser oozes and the potential to become the most powerful entity in your verse. Numbers alone cannot touch you.
4932. Transcendent Spirit Physiology,8.5
#You are or can become a godlike spirit, a soul of such transcendent authority that you rule over all spiritual beings by default. Your lordship extends over the living and the dead alike, and no mere ghost or deity of spirits can stand against you. May still be harmed by transcendent-grade nullification - unless you possess Eternal Soul.
4933. Transcendent Symbiotic Exoskeleton,8.2
#You wear a transcendent symbiotic exoskeleton, a living custom suit of godlike make whose powers may derive from magic, technology, technomagic, spirit or stranger sources. The bond between you and the suit is perfect, pouring limitless transcendent power into your frame and granting you status to rival cosmic entities. By nature, the symbiote still needs a host.
4934. Transcendent Undead Physiology,8.4
#You are or can become a transcendent undead, a necrotic god standing at the apex of every form of undead life. From zombies to vampires, liches to undead divinities, all of deathkind bends to your authority. Beings of higher potential may still defeat you in combat.
4935. Transcendent Werebeast Physiology,8.2
#You are or can become a transcendent werebeast, a therianthrope ascended to true godhood through arcane rite or divine intervention. Unlike your feral cousins you retain your mind, and silver and wolfsbane only give you mild discomfort at worst. Beings of higher power may still defeat you.
4936. Transcendent Werepire Physiology,8.6
#You are or can become a transcendent werepire, the perfect hybrid of a godly vampire and at least one transcendent werebeast with none of either's weaknesses. Your existence alone is so potent it violates the laws of nature simply by being present, making you arguably the most powerful creature in your verse. May still be slain by Transcendent Weaponry or Omnislayer.
4937. Transcendent Zombie Physiology,8.1
#You are or can become a transcendent zombie, an undead vessel of immense durability and metabolic independence that still retains full cognition and strategic thought. Rot may linger at the edges but your core functions operate far beyond biological limit, making you something closer to a god wearing a corpse than a corpse at all. Deprivation of otherworldly energies can weaken the vessel.
4938. Transduality,9.1
#You transcend all forms of duality, existing independently beyond every opposition and binary system that governs mortal reality. Light and dark, life and death, being and non-being - these concepts do not apply to you, placing you qualitatively above the dual systems that structure lesser existence. You are meta-abstract, a shape the universe has no slot for.
4939. Transformative Mucus,2.8
#Your mucus, be it snot, saliva, or other bodily slime, causes anything it touches to transform. Mostly gross, occasionally useful, entirely dependent on how willing you are to sneeze on your problems.
4940. Transhuman Physiology,5.4
#You are a transhuman, a human pushed beyond the mortal baseline by scientific and technological enhancement. Your exact powerset depends on the kind of augmentation you received, ranging from psionic tech implants to nanotech to cybernetic limbs. You may lose pieces of your humanity in the process, and defective enhancements risk turning you into an abomination.
4941. Transitionlessness,6.3
#Your body does not transition in any way, inside or out. There are no intermediate states for any of your movements or bodily functions, only beginnings and ends. You appear to teleport when you walk, your neural impulses arrive the instant they fire, and your body simply is where it is going to be. Some body parts may not be affected and mistakes are unforgiving.
4942. Transmutation Immunity,5.0
#You are immune to nearly all forms of transmutation. Your physical form cannot be changed, transformed, or shapeshifted against your will. Absolute Change still bypasses you, and certain exotic categories of transmutation may slip through the cracks.
4943. Transparent Body,2.2
#Your body is transparent, like a living statue of glass. You can see your own organs working and at a distance you blend into the background like a smudged pane, though up close your features are still faintly visible.
4944. Transport Immunity,3.8
#You are immune to being summoned or banished against your will. Only if you consent can such powers take hold of you, though beings vastly stronger than you or wielders of Meta Summoning may still drag you wherever they please.
4945. Trapping Body,3.0
#Your body traps anyone who makes contact with it. A careless punch, a grapple, even a handshake can lock the target in place against your flesh, giving you terrifying control in close quarters.
4946. Trauma Mimicry,5.6
#You can take on a form based upon a traumatic event or action, usually one you've been suppressing or refusing to confront. The form is unique to the trauma itself and grants powers tied to that event, though the more you lean on it, the harder the memory presses back. Horrifying to witness and often more horrifying to be.
4947. Travelling Empowerment,4.0
#You grow stronger, faster and more durable from the act of travel itself, be it walking down a road, jumping dimensions, or shifting between timelines. The further and stranger your journeys, the more powerful you become, and some of you may even draw sustenance from a long enough trip.
4948. Treachery Embodiment,5.3
#You are the embodiment of treachery itself. You are supernaturally gifted at infiltration, betrayal and playing factions against each other, loyalty to others is a tool rather than a bond. People find it easier to trust you than they should, and harder to see your knife until it's already in their back.
4949. Tread Protrusion,1.7
#You have treads instead of legs, giving you improved balance, the ability to traverse rough terrain more easily, and the capacity to support far more weight than a regular pair of legs ever could. Stairs, however, remain your eternal enemy.
4950. Treasure Empowerment,3.9
#You grow stronger, faster and more durable the more treasure you possess, your powers feeding off your hoard like a dragon on its gold pile. Lose the hoard or take anything not rightfully yours and the effect falters, and selfishness in any form can cause it to wear off entirely.
4951. Tree Physiology,3.6
#You are, or can transform into, a tree. Your tree-form retains your anatomy, containing all your organs in wooden shape, or you can shift into homogeneous wood with no vital weak spots. It does slow you down considerably, and you may need earth or water to sustain the form.
4952. Trick Body,4.9
#Your own body is a specialized construct, whether high-tech or mystical in nature, that possesses a variety of built-in functions. It can augment your powers, accommodate any disadvantage, and grant you skills and abilities on demand, essentially turning you into a living utility belt.
4953. Tripedalism,1.4
#You can move with astonishing grace on three limbs, whether two arms and a leg or two legs and an arm. Your balance, speed and agility in this tripedal stance rivals any quadruped, which is a very specific party trick.
4954. Tsukumogami Physiology,4.2
#You are a tsukumogami, a tool or object that reached its 100th birthday and gained a soul. You can freely switch between your object form and a humanoid/animate form, retaining the properties of your origin object while gaining spirit traits. Your personality and powers depend on how you were treated in your object life and destruction of your anchor object can destroy you.
4955. Tulpa Physiology,5.8
#You are a Tulpa, a thoughtform given physical shape through sheer belief. Your strength and abilities scale directly with how much people believe in you, meaning a well-known tulpa can rival gods while a forgotten one fades into nothing. You cannot truly be killed as long as belief sustains you, but you can be sealed and others' beliefs may saddle you with weaknesses.
4956. Turtle Physiology,2.6
#You possess the traits of a turtle, either partially or as a full transformation. You have a tough shell that can absorb incredible punishment, massive lung capacity, the ability to go days without food and an instinctive slow wisdom. Your shell can break under sustained assault and you move noticeably slower than before.
4957. Twilight Embodiment,7.4
#You are the living embodiment of twilight, the eternal moment between day and night. You have limitless control over twilight as an element and concept, your body is made of the stuff between light and shadow, and you exist as the personification of balance itself. To harm you is to harm the space between states.
4958. Twilight Empowerment,3.6
#You become stronger, faster and tougher when surrounded by twilight forces, with your powers and abilities amplified in the presence of dusk and dawn. At higher levels you can draw sustenance from twilight itself and slow your aging, though you grow noticeably weaker when away from the in-between hours.
4959. Twistability,2.3
#You can twist your body or limbs into shapes no normal human could manage. You cannot stretch or compress, only twist, and excessive twisting can still hurt you. Great for slipping out of restraints or dodging in ways that disturb onlookers.
4960. Tyrannosaur Physiology,4.8
#You are or can transform into a tyrannosaur, gaining its massive size, crushing bite force, and apex predator instincts. Your jaws can reduce bone to dust and few creatures on land can match you in raw power.
4961. Tzitzimitl Physiology,7.6
#Aztec Mythology - You are a Tzitzimitl, a monstrous female skeleton tied to fertility and the stars, feared for her role in causing solar eclipses and devouring humanity. You possess the cosmic might of a star demon, capable of blotting out the sun and descending upon mortals during eclipses. Vulnerable to divine slayers and higher authorities within the Aztec pantheon.
4962. USB Attachment,0.6
#You have a USB drive built into your body. Storage is limited and you need to be at least partially cybernetic for the port to actually connect to anything inside you.
4963. Ubagabi Physiology,5.1
#Japanese Folklore - You are a Ubagabi, a ghostly hag manifesting as a ball of flame with an old woman's head inside. You can fly up to 4km in the blink of an eye and any human you touch dies within three years. Vulnerable to Shinto rituals and the shouted warning of "Abura-sashi!"
4964. Uchchaihshravas Physiology,6.8
#Hindu Mythology - You are or can transform into Uchchaihshravas, the seven-headed snow-white flying horse born from the churning of the milk ocean, prototype and king of all horses. Your beauty is mesmerizing and your divinity immense, but each of the seven heads has its own personality, making unified action a constant negotiation.
4965. Ultra Hearing,1.6
#You can hear ultrasonic frequencies above the normal human range, the kind of sounds animals make. Useful for hunting, tracking dog whistles and knowing when something small is screaming. May be painful at close range.
4966. Ultraviolet Mimicry,4.2
#Your body can transform fully or partially into ultraviolet light. In this form your anatomy is retained but composed entirely of UV radiation, granting you energy-based durability and the ability to travel at the speed of light. Be careful, your existence alone is harmful to anyone nearby.
4967. Ultraviolet Perception,1.4
#You can see ultraviolet radiation, perceiving patterns on flowers, bodily fluids, counterfeit inks and sunburn sources invisible to normal eyes. Handy for forensics and birdwatching.
4968. Ultraviolet Trail,1.1
#Wherever you walk, you leave behind a trail of ultraviolet radiation. Invisible to the naked eye, but any UV-sensitive being or detector can track you perfectly. More of a flavour than a weapon.
4969. Umakan Physiology,2.3
#You are or can transform into a Umakan, a microscopic horse-shaped yokai that infects its victims and gives them heart problems and fainting spells. Treatment requires acupuncture, and you are vulnerable to Shinto prayers and shrine rituals. A surprisingly specific curse.
4970. Umibōzu Physiology,4.5
#You are or can transform into an umibōzu, a massive humanoid yokai sea monster of Japanese legend. In water you are monstrously strong and nearly unstoppable, capable of capsizing ships with your bare hands, and sailors instinctively feel dread when they sense your approach.
4971. Unblinking,2.2
#You are incapable of or highly resistant to blinking, letting you maintain uninterrupted vision indefinitely. In combat you can never be caught in the split-second opening of an eye-blink, though the downside is occasional dryness, discomfort and unsettled conversational partners.
4972. Unbound Soul,5.7
#Your soul is free, capable of crossing any realm, mortal, divine, infernal or otherwise, without being bound by any of them. Most users of this power are technically dead, but refuse to stay in any afterlife, wandering between worlds as an untethered spirit.
4973. Unbreakable Body Parts,4.2
#You possess one or more body parts that are completely indestructible, whether fists for combat, a forearm for blocking, or a torso for defence. The density may make you slightly heavier, and only the indestructible parts are protected, the rest of you is as vulnerable as ever.
4974. Unbreakable Bones,4.6
#Your skeletal system is completely indestructible, protecting your inner organs and brain from any impact that would normally shatter bone. Your limbs can still be dislocated or ripped off, and you need a steady supply of calcium to keep the bones maintained.
4975. Unbreakable Hair,3.0
#Your hair is utterly impervious to any harm, it cannot be cut, burned or torn by any means short of anti-indestructibility powers. Washing and maintenance becomes a nightmare, and if your hair grows too long it can become cumbersome to carry around.
4976. Unbreakable Nails,3.2
#Your fingernails and toenails are completely indestructible, capable of being used as impromptu claws that can carve through almost any material. Only the nails themselves are unbreakable, and users of Absolute Strength may still break them.
4977. Unbreakable Skin,4.5
#Your skin is completely impervious to harm, no blade can cut it and no bullet can pierce it. Your internal organs can still be damaged by blunt force, your orifices remain vulnerable, and surgery becomes nearly impossible if you ever actually need it.
4978. Unbreakable Teeth,1.4
#Your teeth are completely indestructible, you can bite through steel cables and chew rocks if you want to. Only your teeth are unbreakable though, so biting something too hard may still hurt your jaw. Requires a lot of calcium in your diet.
4979. Unconscious Mobility,3.2
#You can move, fight, act and perform tasks while fully asleep or knocked unconscious, using a strange sensory awareness in place of your waking senses. You can still drive, cook or fight back after being K.O.'d, though your speed and strength are noticeably dulled while under. Healing is slower in this state.
4980. Unconventional Activity,2.8
#You are able to act, move and fight in unconventional ways proficiently, no matter how weird or nonsensical the approach may look. Weird stances, strange gaits, bizarre combat styles - they all work for you even if they should not.
4981. Uncoupled Eyes,1.1
#You can move your eyes independently from each other like a chameleon, letting you look in two directions at once. Great for situational awareness, terrible for people who have to make eye contact with you.
4982. Undead Dinosaur Physiology,5.1
#You are or can transform into an undead dinosaur, combining prehistoric apex predator physiology with the relentless nature of undeath. You possess immense raw strength, terrifying presence, and do not tire, bleed out or feel pain like the living do. You carry the weaknesses of both dinosaurs and the undead though.
4983. Undead Divinity,8.4
#You possess an undead form of divinity, making you a dark god of death itself. You have dominion over both divine and undead aspects of reality, channelling the power of dead gods and granting godhood to nothing but decay. Your authority in matters of death is near absolute, shy of other undead divinities and the pure almighty.
4984. Undead Empowerment,3.8
#You grow stronger, faster and more durable when in the presence of undead forces, creatures or necrotic energy. Battlefields soaked in death, graveyards and ruins empower you, and some users can even draw sustenance from the undead to slow or halt their own aging.
4985. Undead Fairy Physiology,5.3
#You are or can mimic an undead fairy, a spectral being from the oldest layer of folklore when fairies were considered the spirits of the dead. You possess potent fae magic blended with necrotic power, bringing either misfortune or blessings to mortals as you choose. You are vulnerable to cold iron, rustic charms and undead slayers alike.
4986. Undead Giant Physiology,6.3
#You are or can become an undead giant, a towering unliving behemoth of the old myths. Already formidable in life, in undeath your strength and durability grow monstrous, and you feel neither pain nor fatigue. You can serve as a siege engine on your own or command legions of lesser undead, though giant-slayers and undead-slayers alike pose a serious risk.
4987. Undead Machine Physiology,5.7
#You are or can become an undead machine, a cybernetic corpse or animated machine wreck that blends necrotic persistence with mechanical durability. You possess the immunities of both the undead and the inorganic, but you may still require a power source or life force to sustain yourself. Technology manipulators can potentially turn your own body against you.
4988. Undead Monster Physiology,5.4
#You are or can transform into a hybrid of undead and monster, combining beastly physical traits with necrotic persistence. You possess terrifying strength, regeneration fuelled by death, and the raw savagery of a feral creature. You carry the weaknesses of both forms though, and may need a specific environment to remain stable.
4989. Undead Physiology,4.5
#You are undead, a corporeal being that is deceased yet behaves as if alive. You don't feel pain, don't need to rest and are immune to most environmental effects, but you may need to feed on flesh, blood or life force to sustain yourself. Vulnerable to undead slayers and holy forces.
4990. Undead Pulse,5.2
#You exist in a paradox state of being simultaneously alive and undead. To any scan or test you appear alive, but necrotic energy sustains and empowers you. Your living and undead states slide on a scale depending on your health, and you are immune to most forms of healing but also most forms of harm tied to either state.
4991. Undead Soul,4.6
#Your soul is that of the undead, though your body is not. You have a natural affinity with undeath, can command various forms of undead creatures and possess a smattering of undead-themed powers that vary depending on the kind of undead essence your soul resonates with.
4992. Undead Symbiosis,4.7
#You share a symbiotic bond with an undead entity that grants you potent undead-themed abilities based on what the entity is. The relationship is a two-way street, you and your partner feed off each other's state, and a powerful entity may try to seize control of your body if you are not careful.
4993. Undead-Alien Physiology,5.8
#You are the unholy combination of an alien and the undead. You possess the bizarre physiology and capabilities of an extraterrestrial alongside the unliving resilience of the undead, though you may share the weaknesses of both and require a specific environment to function at your best.
4994. Undead-Animal Physiology,3.5
#You are or can transform into an undead animal, gaining its physical capabilities along with the unliving traits of the undead. The specific abilities vary wildly depending on what kind of undead animal you are, from a zombified wolf to a skeletal hawk.
4995. Undead-Dragon Physiology,6.3
#You are or can transform into an undead dragon, gaining the immense physical might, breath attacks and durability of a dragon alongside the unliving resilience of the undead. Your wings may be tattered to the point that flight is difficult or impossible, but what you lose in grace you gain in pure terror.
4996. Undead-Horse Physiology,4.1
#You are or can transform into an undead horse, whether ghostly, skeletal or zombified. You possess incredible speed and stamina unhampered by flesh, and the longer you linger in the mortal realm the more vengeful and violent your instincts become.
4997. Undead-Planet Physiology,7.8
#You are an undead planet, a sentient celestial body that retains intelligence and can communicate despite your state of undeath. You can manipulate the elements within you, the lifeforms that inhabit you and your own gravitational field, and with enough power you can move through space under your own will. You may develop an appetite for devouring other living planets.
4998. Undead-Plant Physiology,5.4
#You are a hybrid of undead and plant, capable of regrowing from roots, immune to decapitation, and able to feed directly on flesh or life force to replenish yourself far faster than normal plants. You retain the weaknesses of both however, especially fire.
4999. Undefeatable,8.5
#You cannot lose. Existence itself bends around you to prevent any loss from occurring, though this does not guarantee you a win. In a game of Rock Paper Scissors, if you throw rock, your opponent becomes incapable of throwing paper, leaving only victory or tie. You still have to work for the win, but losing is off the table unless someone with Victory Inducement beyond your level intervenes.
5000. Undeformability,5.6
#You are immune to all forms of deformation, whether stretching, compressing, tearing, warping or distorting. You can still move and bend your own body freely, but no outside force can change your shape. You can still be thrown around however, so pair this with immobility or pushback resistance for the full effect.
5001. Undegraded Activity,4.8
#Whatever you do, whether singing, fighting, crafting or playing sports, you perform at your peak indefinitely. You never tire, never get sloppy, never lose your edge. A marathon runner with this trait could sprint the whole way and still have a proper performance ready at the finish line.
5002. Under-Long Body,1.6
#Your lower body is disproportionately long with massive legs, granting you immense leg speed. Unfortunately your upper body is likely small and underdeveloped to compensate, making you look like a pair of legs with a torso attached.
5003. Underground Hearing,2.1
#Your ears can pick up sounds underground with amazing clarity, letting you hear things through soil and stone that would be completely inaudible to anyone else. Be wary of loud sounds though, as your sensitive hearing can lead to sensory overload.
5004. Underground Senses,3.4
#While underground, especially when tunneling or burrowing, your senses become extremely accurate. You can see, hear and perceive everything around you through solid substance as if it were open air, and even peer ahead through whatever you are digging through.
5005. Underground Smell,1.9
#Your nose can track and detect targets through the underground with remarkable accuracy, letting you locate persons, objects or places no matter how deep they are buried. Does not work against someone actively masking their scent.
5006. Underground Taste,1.3
#Your sense of taste is supernaturally tuned to underground substances, letting you identify harmful or beneficial things with a single lick of soil or stone. You may not be able to shut it off, so mind what you put in your mouth.
5007. Underground Touch,1.7
#Your fingertips can detect persons, objects and substances underground just by touching the earth, tracking targets and pinpointing locations through soil and stone. Only works while you yourself are underground.
5008. Underground Vision,2.3
#Your eyes can see clearly into the depths of the underground, perceiving through dirt, stone and darkness with amazing clarity, detail and range. Perfect for spotting what lurks beneath your feet.
5009. Undergrowth Movement,1.5
#You can move effortlessly across any form of undergrowth, including shrubs, thorny plants and overgrown terrain, walking on them as if they were solid ground. You still might slip on particularly treacherous patches, so watch your step.
5010. Underwater Hearing,2.0
#Your ears can pick up sounds underwater with amazing clarity, frequency range and distance, letting you hear things in the depths that no one of your race could. Loud sounds may overwhelm you more easily however.
5011. Underwater Invulnerability,5.5
#You possess deep oceanic adaptation that makes you nearly indestructible both in water and on dry land. Your body shrugs off surface damage with superhuman durability, and any injury you do sustain is closed by an accelerated healing factor. Absolute Strength users may still harm you.
5012. Underwater Senses,3.2
#All five of your senses remain perfectly sharp underwater, letting you see, hear, taste, smell and feel with no loss of clarity in the depths. Magic and interference can dull these senses, but otherwise the ocean is as clear to you as open air.
5013. Underwater Smell,1.9
#Your nose works perfectly underwater, letting you track targets, detect substances and locate places in the depths just by scent alone. Does not work when someone actively masks their scent.
5014. Underwater Strength,2.6
#Your physical strength is greatly enhanced while submerged in water, allowing you to punch through what would normally resist you and move through water as if it were air. On dry land you are merely slightly above average, but in the ocean you are a monster.
5015. Underwater Taste,1.4
#Your sense of taste is supernaturally sharp while underwater, allowing you to detect poisons, pollutants and beneficial substances dissolved in the water around you. Useful for knowing when not to drink.
5016. Underwater Touch,1.8
#Your sense of touch is supernaturally refined while submerged, letting you feel vibrations, currents and disturbances with enough clarity to locate specific people or objects and even track them by nothing more than the water pressure against your fingertips.
5017. Underwater Vision,1.6
#Your eyes are perfectly adapted to seeing underwater, piercing through murk, darkness and depth with crystal clarity. Distance, color and detail remain as sharp as if you were standing in broad daylight on the surface.
5018. Undetermined Existence,7.4
#You exist in an undefined state, neither truly alive nor dead, neither mortal nor undead. Any power that targets the living cannot find you, any power that targets the dead slides off, and you float in a grey area outside of every standard classification. Only absolute life inducement or unrestricted murder can pin you down.
5019. Undine Physiology,4.8
#You are an undine, a water spirit of fae origin. You possess a beautiful humanoid form capable of dissolving into and reforming from water, hydrokinetic talents, enhanced senses underwater and the slow, ageless temperament of a nymph. Your bond to water is both your strength and your tether.
5020. Undistributed Activity,5.1
#Your actions don't spread their effects onto the world around you. You can be on fire without setting anything else alight, made of water without dripping, or conducting electricity without shocking those who touch you. Chemical reactions, energy transfer and contagion simply refuse to propagate from your body outward.
5021. Undisturbed Activity,4.5
#You can move through any medium without disturbing it in the slightest. You swim without ripples, run without kicking up dust, walk through air without displacing it, and dig through dirt without leaving a trace. Perfect for stealth, though external forces can still affect you normally.
5022. Unexchanged Condition,5.3
#You don't suffer the usual trade-offs between physical attributes. You can gain strength without losing speed, agility without losing durability, intelligence without losing stamina. Every attribute you train scales independently, letting you become a fully developed powerhouse without compromise.
5023. Unfettered Body,8.2
#You possess both immortality and invulnerability in one clean package. You do not age, do not feel pain, are immune to disease, toxins and pathogens, and no ordinary force can harm your body. With infinite time ahead of you, you can train your mind and body to their absolute peak. Only absolute death or absolute destruction can truly end you.
5024. Ungaikyou Physiology,4.7
#Youkai - You are an Ungaikyou, a tsukumogami in the form of a haunted mirror that houses countless spirits within it. You can manipulate the reflections of those who gaze into you, showing them monstrous versions of themselves, and you can trap wandering spirits inside your surface. Breaking the mirror releases everything housed within.
5025. Ungulate Physiology,2.8
#You possess the traits of an ungulate, a hoofed mammal, whether you are a partial transformation or simply already one. You might have the speed of a deer, the bulk of a rhino, the endurance of a camel or the raw power of a bull, depending on which species you draw from.
5026. Unhindered Vision,3.2
#Your vision functions perfectly regardless of what is happening to your eyes or head. You can act on what you see even when your view is shaking, spinning, distorted, blurred, warped or outright illusory, parsing the true image through any interference and moving as if none of it were happening.
5027. Unholy Vessel,6.3
#Your body is a host for unholy or eldritch beings, and your powers derive from the entities you carry inside you. You can house anything from lesser abominations to eldritch gods, drawing their strength as your own. But every vessel pays a price, and the entities within may be scheming to take the wheel from you.
5028. Unicorn Physiology,4.6
#You are or can transform into a unicorn, a majestic woodland creature of purity and grace. Your horn is a conduit for healing, purification, and anti-venom magic, and you possess enhanced physical abilities befitting a mythical beast. Virgins find you inexplicably approachable. If your horn is broken, most of your abilities go with it.
5029. Unimpaired Activity,3.2
#You can move and act perfectly normally regardless of disabilities, disorders, diseases, tremors or lost limbs. You are also immune to movement-impairing powers like paralysis and slowing effects. Your body compensates for whatever is missing or broken.
5030. Unique Hands,2.3
#Your hands are unique in some way, granting you some form of ability through them. Could be anything from strange markings to an extra joint to hands that can do something no other hands can. You were born with it.
5031. Unity,9.7
#You are one with totality itself, being absolutely everything and anything all at once in a single being. Your body is made of all of existence without exception, and you encompass even what lies beyond. You are either eternal in this form or willingly merged into it, and are far beyond any conventional notion of what having a body means.
5032. Universal Derivation,9.2
#You are the source of the absolute, primordial universe and every living being within it. The universe, reality, time, energy and all concepts flow from your existence, and your continued being is what holds everything together. If you die, the universe dies with you.
5033. Universal Embodiment,9.0
#You are the physical personification of the universe itself. You can control, create, destroy and reshape anything within your universe, including reality, order, chaos, life, death, time, space, and may even create new universes, galaxies and star systems from scratch. If you are destroyed, your universe dies with you.
5034. Universal Force Embodiment,7.9
#You are the physical manifestation or personification of universal forces. You possess limitless control over and complete immunity to whichever universal force you embody. You do not merely wield it, you are it.
5035. Universal Force Empowerment,5.4
#You become stronger, faster, and more durable when in contact with universal forces, and may unlock new abilities related to them. Sufficient exposure can let you draw sustenance from these forces and slow or halt aging entirely, though overuse can breed dependency.
5036. Universal Force Mimicry,7.6
#Your body is made of or can transform into universal forces. In homogeneous form you are nearly untouchable by conventional means, while in a nigh-formed state the forces flow through your cells, bones and muscles to fortify them. Takes time to master control over one's body in this state.
5037. Universal Force Symbiosis,7.4
#You are bonded to a universal force entity, such as an embodiment of a cosmic principle or a being comprised of fundamental forces. The symbiosis grants you potent universal force abilities, but comes with a price: the entity may attempt to overtake your mind or body, and wielding its power may harm you if you are not strong enough to channel it.
5038. Universal Independence,7.5
#You have no need to be inside a universe to exist. Empty voids, places without space, places without time, realms that lack substance or life itself, you can survive all of them without any discomfort. Anything not considered part of the cosmos is habitable to you.
5039. Universal Lordship,8.0
#You hold dominion over the universe. Everything within its boundaries answers to you as its sovereign, bending to your authority as the rightful lord of creation. Your authority ends at the edge of your universe, however, and you hold no sway over the Multiverse or Omniverse.
5040. Universe Mimicry,8.6
#You either are the universe itself or can transform your body entirely into one while keeping your sentience. In anatomical form you retain organs and limited vulnerability, while in homogeneous form every part of your body is equal and your scale becomes cosmic. Vulnerable to Universe Destruction and may be overridden by Universal or Multiversal Manipulation.
5041. Unloose Body Parts,1.6
#Your body parts are loose and by all rights should fall off or out, but they never do. Missing skin, detached organs, a head held on by a thread of skin, it all stays right where it should. Enough raw force can still tear them loose, and being barely attached may make you physically weaker than normal.
5042. Unnoticeability Immunity,2.3
#You are immune to the effects of unnoticeability and similar perception filters. People trying to slip past your awareness through being ignored or overlooked simply fail; you see them exactly as they are.
5043. Unpowered Movement,3.2
#You can move at or near your full capability even when weakened, drained, or injured. Losing health doesn't slow you down the way it does others, making you terrifyingly consistent as a fighter even on your last legs.
5044. Unpredictability,5.2
#Your nature is completely unpredictable, making you immune to combat perception, body language analysis, adoptive muscle memory and even objective precognition. Useless against flawless precognition, and your allies may find you just as confusing as your enemies.
5045. Unpressurized Interaction,2.0
#You can stand or move while supporting your entire weight on a thin or tiny part of your body such as a single finger, toe, or even a pen tip. No injuries from the pressure, no wobbling balance.
5046. Unrestricted Thought Process,4.5
#Your thoughts are largely unaffected by environmental conditions. You can ignore time pressure, mentally adjust to any environment, stay attuned to novel situations, and divide your attention without suffering consequences. Your mind is as free as it is sharp.
5047. Unstable Storage,4.1
#You can store anything inside yourself, no matter how unstable, from volatile chemicals to raw energy, without risk of rupturing or exploding. Your body becomes a perfectly safe containment vessel. Some things may still be too unstable even for you, and there is a limit to total capacity.
5048. Untired Activity,3.6
#You can perform any task, action or attack at your full capability while exhausted, sleepy or intoxicated without any ill effects. Pull an all-nighter, chug a bottle, then deadlift your bodyweight; nothing slips. No risk of overexertion or fatigue-killing yourself.
5049. Unweakened Activity,3.8
#You can act at full capacity even while your body is weakened, fragile, or made of brittle substances like glass. You move, fight, and exert yourself without breaking, damaging, or cracking yourself apart. There is still a ceiling on how much punishment you can take before it finally gives.
5050. Uploaded Consciousness,5.0
#Your entire mind has been digitized and uploaded into a digital reality, making you a sentient digital entity capable of running simulations, processing information at superhuman speeds, and manifesting as a self-avatar in cyberspace. Your consciousness sits on a drive somewhere, and drives can be destroyed.
5051. Upper-Long Body,2.6
#One Piece - You possess a disproportionately long upper body with extended arms and torso, granting you immense throwing strength and reach. Unfortunately your lower body is comparatively tiny, which makes you easy to knock over in a stiff breeze.
5052. Urban Empowerment,4.0
#You grow stronger, faster and more durable while within an urban environment, drawing power from the ideology and presence of civilization itself. Some may even draw sustenance from cities or slow their aging. Spend too long in the wilderness and you wither.
5053. Ursine Monster Physiology,4.2
#Allows you to transform into a monstrous bear, either partially or fully. In this form you possess the raw strength and terror of a nightmare ursine, far beyond any natural grizzly. Vulnerable to monster slayers and those trained in hunting beasts.
5054. Ursine Physiology,3.1
#You possess the traits and abilities of bears, whether through partial or full transformation. Immense strength, thick fur, claws, bite force, and the endurance to tank punishment that would fell a man. Choose your flavor, be it grizzly, polar, or panda.
5055. Ursinoid Physiology,3.4
#You are a bearfolk, a humanoid ursine of the kind that stomps through fantasy settings. You possess the strength, claws, fur and raw physicality of a bear while retaining human intelligence and dexterity. Tall, broad and terrifying in a tavern brawl.
5056. Ushi-Oni Physiology,5.1
#Allows you to transform into an Ushi-Oni, a youkai with the head and upper body of a bull and the lower body of a massive spider. You possess terrifying strength, venomous fangs, and the dread aura of a creature that should not exist. A nightmare given form.
5057. Ushirogami Physiology,3.6
#Allows you to become a Ushirogami, a Japanese fear-spirit that torments lone victims from behind. You can tug hair, breathe hot or icy breath onto necks, materialize behind people, and kick up sudden gusts of wind. Vulnerable to the prayers of shrine maidens and those with indomitable will.
5058. Usutsuki Warashi Physiology,3.5
#Allows you to become a Usutsuki Warashi, the malicious cousin of the Zashiki-Warashi. You spread misfortune and misery wherever you dwell, leaving dirty footprints, creepy noises and creeping dread in your wake. Vulnerable to household deities and Shinto rites.
5059. Utilitarian Embodiment,5.4
#You embody the philosophy of utilitarianism itself, maximizing happiness and reducing suffering. This grants you a supernatural edge in pursuing your goals, as the world subtly bends to reward outcomes that produce the greatest good for the greatest number. Morality becomes math and you are the one doing the arithmetic.
5060. Uwabami Physiology,4.8
#Allows you to transform into an Uwabami, a giant magical serpent from Japanese folklore. You possess tremendous size, a gluttonous appetite, a taste for alcohol, and proficiency in many forms of magic. You will do absolutely anything for your next meal, up to and including eating the humans who cross you.
5061. Uwan Physiology,3.2
#Allows you to become an Uwan, a secretive yokai that terrifies victims with sudden ear-splitting cries in the night. You can be nearly invisible, known only by the dread sound of your voice, or take the form of a hideous monster lurking just around the corner. Fear is your domain.
5062. Vacuum Adaptation,4.3
#Your body is adapted to survive the vacuum of space unaided. You can withstand the lack of air, extreme temperatures, cosmic radiation, and even stand up to the crushing gravity of black holes. Space is just another place for you to take a stroll.
5063. Vacuum Defiance,3.3
#You can defy the vacuum of outer space, ignoring the particles and forces that would normally harm high-speed travelers. Traveling through cosmic space at incredible speeds no longer tears you apart from hitting stray hydrogen atoms. Does not work against true perfect vacuums and grants no other protections.
5064. Vacuum Embodiment,7.8
#You are the living manifestation of vacuum itself. You possess limitless control over the element and are completely immune to its effects, able to create, shape and command nothingness at will. Air Manipulation and Nothingness Manipulation are among the few counters.
5065. Vacuum Empowerment,3.2
#When exposed to a vacuum, you become stronger, faster, and more durable, with your existing powers amplified. You can even draw sustenance from the void itself. Being in air or matter-filled environments weakens you considerably.
5066. Vacuum Hearing,2.1
#Your ears can hear through the vacuum of space with incredible clarity, picking up sounds that should be impossible to perceive without a medium to travel through. Loud noises may overwhelm your senses.
5067. Vacuum Immunity,2.8
#You are immune to the vacuum and all its direct and indirect effects, shrugging off suction-based attacks and the airless void alike. Does not protect against implosions or the simple need to breathe.
