5068. Vaerabbit Physiology,2.4
#You are or can transform into a vaerabbit, a peculiar hybrid of vampire and rabbit. Cute, fluffy, and thirsty for blood. Still burns in the sun, still won't appear in mirrors.
5069. Vaesnake Physiology,3.1
#You are or can transform into a vaesnake, a hybrid of vampire and serpent. You gain the venom, flexibility, and hunting instincts of a snake alongside classic vampiric traits.
5070. Vaewolf Physiology,4.6
#You are or can transform into a Vaewolf, a hybrid of vampire and werewolf that inherits traits from both parents. You possess magnified versions of each species' abilities and may even overcome some of their signature weaknesses, though blood hunger and the full moon still pull at you.
5071. Valley Adaptation,2.2
#You possess remarkable survival skills tailored to valleys, canyons, and gorges. You can navigate steep terrain, find resources, and thrive whether the land is dry and rocky or lush and fertile.
5072. Valravn Physiology,5.4
#European Folklore - You are or can transform into a Valravn, a chimeric scavenger with the traits of corvids and wolves. You ascend your state by consuming the hearts of fallen kings, gaining superhuman abilities at the cost of a malicious hunger that may lead the hapless astray.
5073. Superior Vampire Physiology,6.2
#You are an empowered or evolved vampire, your abilities pushed far beyond normal vampiric potential through evolution, experimentation, or enchantment. You are more dangerous than any standard vampire, though the classic weaknesses may still linger unless you've developed immunities.
5074. Transcendent Vampire Physiology,8.6
#You are a Transcendent Vampire, the supreme paragon of the vampiric race, possessing power enough to rival gods or even be one yourself. You are revered as the source of your kind, the first and strongest, and you may ascend to become the absolute ruler of all vampires. Some weaknesses may still faintly affect you, and beings of equal power can still challenge you.
5075. Vampire Physiology,4.3
#You possess the traits and abilities of a vampire, subsisting on the life essence of the living, usually blood. You gain enhanced strength, speed, senses, and regeneration, though you must feed to maintain your power and you remain vulnerable to hunters, sunlight, and dhampir toxicity.
5076. Vampiric Animal Physiology,3.6
#You are or can transform into a vampire animal of your choosing, be it a vampire bat, wolf, or panther. You gain enhanced physical abilities, a healing factor fueled by blood, and the predatory instincts of both beast and undead. You also inherit their weaknesses to sunlight and silver.
5077. Vampiric Dragon Physiology,6.8
#You are or can transform into a vampiric dragon, a hybrid of two of the most feared predators in myth. You possess immense strength, flight, and a devastating bite that can shred or transform its victims, healing rapidly through the consumption of blood. Few creatures in any mythology can match what you are.
5078. Vampiric Machine Physiology,5.8
#You are or can transform into a cybernetic vampire, a fusion of undead horror and mechanical precision. You gain the physical prowess of a vampire backed by machine-level durability, onboard weaponry, and system-level processing. You also inherit the weaknesses of both, so sunlight, silver, and EMPs are all things to watch out for.
5079. Vampiric Reincarnation,5.6
#You are the reincarnation of a vampiric entity from a prior life, and as such you possess a fraction of its powers from the moment you are born. With training and awakening, more of your past life's capabilities can return to you, though it may take a lifetime to regain them all.
5080. Vampiric Toxicity,4.5
#A Certain Magical Index - Your blood is toxic to vampires, rendering you immune to vampirism and killing any lesser vampire that so much as tastes you. Stronger or transcendent vampires may resist but will still be weakened, and psychic vampires bypass this entirely.
5081. Vampiric-Alien Physiology,6.2
#You are or can transform into a vampiric alien, a being of the stars that feeds on blood. You possess supernatural vampire powers alongside the advanced biology and technological mastery of an alien race, allowing you to spread your curse across worlds. You share the weaknesses of both forms, but the sheer versatility more than compensates.
5082. Vampirism Immunity,2.6
#You are immune to vampirism, meaning nothing can transform you into a vampire. No bite, no blood exchange, no ritual will work on you. You are however not immune to anything else vampires can do, so being drained dry is still very much on the table.
5083. Vanara Physiology,6.9
#Hindu Mythology - You are or can transform into a Vanara, one of the semi-divine shapeshifting ape-folk who fought alongside Rama against Ravana in the Ramayana. You possess tremendous physical prowess, shapeshifting abilities, and divine attributes, with the potential for Hanuman-tier abilities if you train hard enough. Balancing your human and ape natures is the real challenge.
5084. Vanilla Mimicry,2.3
#Your body is or can transform entirely into vanilla, whether Madagascar, Indian, Tonga, or any other variety. The type of vanilla you are made of may grant slightly different properties. Unfortunately, this also makes you edible and sensitive to heat.
5085. Vapor Embodiment,6.2
#You are the physical embodiment of vapor, fog and mist are not elements to you but extensions of your being. You have limitless control over vapor in all its forms and are completely immune to it, able to dissolve into drifting mist or reform at will. Strong winds and water-based attacks can disperse and disrupt you.
5086. Vapor Symbiosis,5.3
#You host a vapor entity within your body, a mist-spirit or fog embodiment that bonds with you to grant powerful vapor-based abilities. The stronger the entity, the greater the power, but they may try to wrest control of your body or burn your insides with their ethereal presence. A dangerous partnership with equally dangerous rewards.
5087. Varanoidea Physiology,3.7
#You are or can transform into a varanoid, the most advanced lineage of lizards, including monitor lizards, Komodo dragons, and the extinct mosasaurs. You gain immense size, powerful jaws, toxic saliva, and a cunning intelligence rare among reptiles.
5088. Varied Inertia,4.6
#Your inertial mass responds differently to different forces, meaning no two forces have the same effect on you. Gravity may barely move you while a gentle push sends you flying, or bullets may stop dead while wind carries you like a feather. Wildly unpredictable but hard for enemies to exploit consistently.
5089. Varied Reproduction,3.3
#You possess a unique reproductive physiology that allows you to give birth to beings of virtually any race or species, from humans to demons to monsters to extraterrestrials. What emerges from a pregnancy is anyone's guess. Usually still requires a partner.
5090. Vector Defiance,5.2
#You can ignore any and all vectors acting upon you, defying how forces add up and combine. Gravity, momentum, impact forces, none of them affect you as they should unless you allow them. You simply do not have to obey the math that governs everyone else's movement.
5091. Veganism Empowerment,2.9
#You become stronger, faster and more durable the more strictly you adhere to a vegan diet, potentially unlocking plant-affinity powers and even slowing your aging. Break the diet even once with animal products and your powers may vanish until you atone.
5092. Vegetable Fairy Physiology,3.1
#You take on the traits of a vegetable fairy, a small nature-spirit aligned with the fruits and greens of the earth. You possess fairy-like abilities, resilience, and an affinity for plant life, but you are physically small and typically rely on allies for frontline combat.
5093. Vehicle Empowerment,3.6
#Being in or around vehicles makes you stronger, faster and tougher, and suppresses pain to a ridiculous degree. As long as there is an engine humming nearby, fatigue and even aging slow to a crawl.
5094. Vehicle Mimicry,5.0
#You can transform into any vehicle you can think of, from a humble bicycle to a starship, including hybrid humanoid forms wielding the abilities of transportation. You share the weaknesses of whatever you become, and reverting to human shape isn't always easy.
5095. Vehicle Monster Physiology,5.7
#You can transform into a monstrous vehicle, a living, snarling amalgam of engine and beast with powers that vary with your chosen chassis. You run on fuel of some kind and may be vulnerable to both Vehicle and Monster Manipulation.
5096. Vehicular Symbiosis,5.2
#You share a symbiotic bond with a living or semi-living vehicle, drawing sustenance, healing and enhanced abilities from it whenever you drive. You don't need food, sleep or rest behind the wheel, but the vehicle has a mind of its own and may try to take yours.
5097. Velocity Adaptation,3.8
#Your body instinctively adapts to any velocity you travel at, letting you avoid obstacles and perform precise tasks at any speed. Running at mach speeds through a crowded street feels no harder than a casual jog.
5098. Velocity Empowerment,3.7
#You grow stronger, faster and more durable the more you move, with every step, run, or gust of wind enhancing your powers and body. Standing still will gradually weaken you, but moving keeps you thriving and may even slow your aging.
5099. Velocity Immunity,5.4
#You are immune to any speed or velocity-based power used against you, including speed theft, speed dampening, friction and even cancellation of motion itself. Nothing short of Immunity Negation can slow you down once you get going.
5100. Vending Machine Mimicry,1.4
#You can become a vending machine, dispensing snacks, drinks and lottery tickets to anyone willing to feed you cash or cards. Whether the items come from nowhere or from your own mysterious inventory is anyone's guess, but you probably can't move in this form.
5101. Venom Secretion,3.3
#Your skin, claws, tongue or fangs secrete venom with effects ranging from sedation and paralysis to mutation and instant death. You may or may not be immune to your own toxins, so handle yourself with care.
5102. Venomous Claws,2.8
#Your claws secrete natural venom that enters any wound you inflict, with effects ranging from paralysis to instant death. Poison Immunity users are unaffected, and a good Regeneration can heal off the toxin.
5103. Venomous Fangs,2.8
#Your teeth are coated in or secrete natural venom, delivering pain, paralysis, cell death or worse with a single bite. You must be able to bite through a target's skin first, and against armored foes your fangs may simply break.
5104. Venomous Tongue,2.5
#Your tongue secretes natural venom that transfers on contact, capable of sedating, paralysing or killing outright. Perfect for a sneaky kiss of death, if the target isn't immune to poison.
5105. Ventriloquist Dummy Mimicry,2.0
#You can transform into a ventriloquist dummy, your anatomy replaced by painted wood and hinged joints. Unfortunately, in this form you become vulnerable to Doll and Toy Manipulation, which can puppet you against your will.
5106. Venusian Physiology,4.2
#You are or can transform into a Venusian, an alien species from Venus in fictional universes. The exact nature of your powers depends on which Venusian mythology you belong to, ranging from psychic warriors to gas giant shapeshifters.
5107. Verbal Power Activation,2.3
#Your powers need a spoken word or catchphrase to activate. It looks cool and adds a nice bit of flair to your battles, but if someone silences you or clamps your mouth shut, your powers are useless.
5108. Vertigo Immunity,1.6
#You are completely immune to vertigo in all its forms. Motion sickness, dizziness, disorientation, nausea and lightheadedness simply do not affect you. Great for pilots, sailors and people who really enjoy rollercoasters.
5109. Vetala Physiology,5.4
#You are a Vetala, a vampiric demon-bat spirit of Hindu origin that possesses corpses to torment the living. You possess enhanced physical abilities, can inhabit recently deceased bodies and are a powerful seer with knowledge of both past and future. You are vulnerable to prayer songs and funerary rites.
5110. Vibration Defiance,3.1
#You can ignore any vibrations affecting your body, moving and acting freely even during earthquakes, sonic attacks or shockwave barrages. Things that would normally stagger or knock you down simply fail to disrupt you.
5111. Vibration Empowerment,3.8
#Your body and powers grow stronger in the presence of vibrations, shockwaves and tremors. Being near earthquakes, loud noises or seismic events enhances your speed, strength and durability, and with enough exposure you may even slow your aging by feeding on ambient oscillations.
5112. Vibration Mimicry,5.3
#Your body is made of or can transform into vibrations, allowing you to shift between a physical form and a state of pure oscillation. In your transformed state most conventional attacks pass through you harmlessly, and you can channel vibrations through your cells to greatly enhance your physical abilities. Counter Vibration is highly effective and potentially fatal to you.
5113. Vibration Power Link,4.8
#Your powers are directly linked to your vibratory nature, with seismic energy fueling and amplifying every ability you possess. When stable, this lets you wield your powers at incredible levels, but if your vibrations go out of control you risk your powers running wild alongside them.
5114. Victory Embodiment,7.4
#You are the embodiment of victory and glory itself. You can grant others triumph in any contest they engage in, and deny your enemies the satisfaction of winning against anyone. Whether you yourself can partake of this victory depends on your nature as an embodiment.
5115. Video Empowerment,2.7
#You grow stronger, faster, and tougher whenever you are in contact with videos, and you can draw sustenance from them. Surrounded by screens and streams you may even slow or halt your aging entirely.
5116. Video Game Body,4.5
#Your body obeys video game rules. Losing a limb or taking a bullet to the head barely inconveniences you, your body shrugging off wounds as if they never happened, but you have a hidden Health Bar that ticks down with each blow. If it reaches zero, you die.
5117. Video Mimicry,3.8
#Your body is made of or can transform into living video, a walking display of shifting footage. While in this form you can slip through screens and cables, though you remain vulnerable to data corruption and video absorption.
5118. Video Static Mimicry,3.4
#Your body is made of or can transform into swirling video static, a crawling mass of grey noise. In this form you are hard to perceive clearly, hard to photograph, and deeply unsettling to look at for too long.
5119. Videogame Console Mimicry,2.8
#Your body is made of or can transform into a videogame console. In this form your organs are replaced by circuit boards and cartridge slots, and you can run and project games, though you are as fragile as the plastic shell suggests.
5120. Vigorous Activity,3.5
#Your movements can be performed with explosive power, combining great strength and speed in dynamic bursts. You can leap farther, strike harder, and move more dramatically than your baseline stats suggest, though sustained use still drains your stamina and wears on your joints over time.
5121. Vigorous Heart,3.0
#Your heart is a powerhouse of a muscle, pumping blood with incredible force and efficiency. This grants you enhanced physical conditioning across the board and can extend your lifespan considerably, though misuse can still trigger heart attacks if you push it recklessly.
5122. Vine Physiology,3.3
#Your body is made of or can transform into living vines, a tangled mass of green tendrils in anatomical shape. In this form you can stretch, grip and grow, but you remain as vulnerable to fire and herbicide as any other plant.
5123. Violence Embodiment,6.2
#You are the embodiment of violence itself, growing more powerful the more brutally you fight. Your presence radiates bloodlust, compelling living things around you to want to kill and maim. If you ever lose your will to commit violence, the power leaves you.
5124. Violence Empowerment,4.1
#You grow stronger, faster, and tougher from violence, both the violence you commit and the violence committed near you. Existing powers are amplified and new combat-oriented abilities may unlock. In the absence of violence, you feel sluggish and weak.
5125. Violin Mimicry,1.4
#Your body is made of or can transform into a violin. In this form you likely cannot move on your own, and the best thing you can hope for is that someone picks you up and plays you well.
5126. Virtue Empowerment,4.2
#Your body and soul draws strength from virtues, both your own and those of others around you. Chastity, charity, kindness, patience and the rest make you faster, stronger, tougher and may unlock new abilities tied to whichever virtue you embody most. In the presence of great sin or vice users you may be rendered powerless.
5127. Virus Immunity,2.1
#You are completely immune to all forms of viruses, be they biological, digital or supernatural. Pandemics are simply weather patterns to you.
5128. Visor Retraction,2.3
#You possess a special visor that can retract at will, made from whatever material suits your aesthetic, from sleek plastic to bone to shimmering energy. It covers your eyes or face, looking incredibly cool, and offers some defensive benefit. It can still be broken with sufficient force.
5129. Visual Powers,3.5
#Your eyes can perceive any spectrum or effect beyond ordinary eyesight, including the full electromagnetic spectrum, emotions, auras, other planes of existence and more. The exact range depends on your training and focus. Rendered useless by blindness.
5130. Vitaliscience,7.6
#You know everything about life, the living, and everything related to it. Every secret of biology, every hidden mechanism of the soul, every rule of how life is supposed to work is laid bare to your mind. Your knowledge stops the moment the subject moves beyond the living.
5131. Void Embodiment,8.4
#You are the living embodiment of nothingness, oblivion and the abyss. Your presence alone erodes existence and your abilities naturally lean toward erasure and emptiness. You may find yourself compelled to clash with anyone who embodies Existence.
5132. Void Symbiosis,6.2
#You are symbiotically linked to a void entity, an embodiment of oblivion or a being of null energy. The bond grants you potent nothingness-based abilities, but the entity may try to possess you or the void power itself may start to corrode your body.
5133. Volatile Empowerment,4.2
#You grow stronger, faster and tougher the more volatile forces surround you, drawing power from explosions, implosions and pyrotechnics. Existing powers are enhanced when you're near detonations and you may even slow your aging with enough blasts, though an overdose of volatile force can still be lethal.
5134. Volatile Power Link,5.4
#Your other powers are linked to and fueled by your volatile nature, with detonative force strengthening and amplifying them. The more unstable you are, the stronger you become, but if you lose control of your volatile core everything goes up with you.
5135. Volatile Symbiosis,6.0
#You are symbiotically bonded to a volatile entity, a living explosion or an embodiment of violent energetic release. The bond grants you explosion, implosion and pyrotechnic abilities, but the entity may try to possess you and its presence may slowly tear your body apart.
5136. Volcanic Adaptation,2.8
#You are perfectly adapted to volcanic fields, able to survive extreme heat, toxic gases, flying rocks and hazardous terrain. Lava splashes don't faze you and eruptions are just inconvenient weather.
5137. Volcano Mimicry,5.8
#Your body takes on the traits of a living volcano, with a molten core, stone skin, and the ability to erupt at will. You can vent lava, spew ash, and release pyroclastic blasts from your body as naturally as breathing.
5138. Voodoo Doll Mimicry,3.6
#You either are or can transform into a living voodoo doll. Whatever damage you inflict on your own body is transferred to a target you have a link to, but depending on your material you may be vulnerable to fire, heat, or cold and can only take so much self-inflicted damage before needing repair.
5139. Voodoo Zombie Physiology,3.3
#You take on the traits of a Haitian voodoo zombie, a cursed corpse separated from its soul. You feel no pain, need no rest and obey the will of whoever raised you with tireless servitude. Vulnerable to Voodoo rituals and prayers, and feeding you salt will free you from the curse and return you to proper death.
5140. Vortex Defiance,3.0
#You can defy and ignore vortexes of any kind, from tornadoes and whirlpools to space-time vortexes. You can still struggle against particularly thick or powerful vortexes, and this does not extend to other forces like gravity.
5141. Vulpes Physiology,2.9
#You either are or can transform into a fox, either partially or fully. In fox form you gain sharp senses, agility and cunning, though you may find yourself with an instinctive fear or hatred of dogs.
5142. Vulture Physiology,2.7
#You either are or can transform into a vulture, either old world or new world varieties. You gain keen eyesight capable of spotting carrion from miles away, soaring flight and a digestive system that can handle even the most rotten of meals.
5143. Wa Nyudo Physiology,6.2
#Japanese Folklore - You either are or can transform into a Wa Nyudo, a wicked demon manifesting as a human head trapped in a burning ox-cart wheel. You are an agent of Hell itself tasked with capturing souls, trapping them in your burning form to drag to the underworld. Even catching a glimpse of you is said to bring ruin. Vulnerable to rituals and prayers of Shrine Maidens and Shinto Priests.
5144. Waffle Mimicry,0.4
#You either are or can transform into a waffle. Fluffy, gridded and delicious, you may find yourself vulnerable to syrup, being eaten, and mold.
5145. Walking Tree Physiology,4.3
#You are or can transform into a walking tree, an ent or treant. You possess the durability and strength of old growth timber, moving on roots that become legs or already possessing limbs of your own. Vulnerable to Plant Manipulation, wood rot and plant-based diseases.
5146. Wall Mimicry,2.8
#You either are or can transform into a wall, your form either retaining its organs and vulnerabilities or becoming uniform matter. Useful for hiding in plain sight, though you may become temporarily inanimate and can only take so much damage before crumbling.
5147. Walrus Physiology,2.3
#You either are or can transform into a walrus, partially or fully. You gain immense blubbery bulk, sharp tusks capable of hauling your bodyweight up from ice, and the ability to dive and swim in frigid waters with ease.
5148. Wampus Cat Physiology,3.5
#You either are or can transform into the Wampus Cat, a six-legged big-cat cryptid of American folklore. Your form can be frightful or comical depending on how you manifest, possessing enhanced physical prowess and an unsettling presence. Vulnerable to Feline and Cryptid Manipulation.
5149. War Empowerment,4.0
#You grow stronger, faster and more durable the more conflict surrounds you, be it physical, mental, spiritual or conceptual. In the middle of a warzone you are a monster, but in times of peace you are only slightly above average and may even weaken if true serenity is enforced around you.
5150. Warg Physiology,4.7
#You are a warg, a mythological wolf-beast far larger and fiercer than any natural wolf. You possess the size and power of a horse-sized predator with claws and fangs that tear through steel, acute intelligence beyond common wolves, and the capacity to form deep bonds with those you deem worthy.
5151. Warped Structure Adaptation,3.2
#You are naturally adapted to moving across warped surfaces and structures, such as walking on ceilings, navigating looping pathways, squeezing through irregular passages and traversing bumpy or twisting terrain. You may need to keep moving to stay oriented in the stranger ones.
5152. Warship Personification,4.8
#Kantai Collection - You are a shipgirl, the personification of a specific warship in humanoid form. You carry rigging, weapons and armaments that mirror those of the original ship, possess supernatural physical condition, and wield abilities tied to the feats and history of the vessel you embody.
5153. Warthog Physiology,1.9
#You are or can transform into a warthog, a stocky tusked pig of the African savanna. You gain the tough hide, short temper and surprisingly fast charge of the animal, along with tusks that can gore a predator if they get too close.
5154. Wasp Physiology,2.8
#You are or can transform partially or fully into a wasp, gaining flight, a chitinous exoskeleton, compound eyes and, if female, a venomous stinger. In hybrid form you retain your mind and size while gaining the wasp's weapons and aerial mobility.
5155. Water Elemental Physiology,4.3
#You are a water elemental, a creature born of and attuned to water itself. Your body can shift between liquid, solid, and mist forms at will, and you possess innate hydrokinetic abilities. Your strength and intelligence depend on the nature of your elemental spark.
5156. Water Embodiment,8.3
#You are the physical personification of water itself, gaining absolute control over water in all its forms across your universe. Every ocean, every raindrop, every bead of sweat answers to you. You are less a being with water powers and more the concept of water given form.
5157. Water Empowerment,3.1
#You grow stronger, faster, and more durable when in contact with water, and your existing abilities are amplified. Standing in the rain is a buff, swimming in the ocean is a transformation, and you may even be able to draw sustenance from water alone.
5158. Water Hag Physiology,4.6
#You are a Water Hag, a spirit of nature bound to a specific body of water. Within your domain you wield considerable hydrokinetic and mystical power, luring the unwary and defending your waters from intruders. Outside of it, your strength wanes considerably.
5159. Water Immunity,2.8
#You are completely immune to the direct and indirect effects of water. Tidal waves cannot knock you over, tsunamis cannot drown you, and slippery surfaces hold your grip like dry stone. A narrow but reliable defense.
5160. Water Maneuverability,2.3
#You move through and across water with the grace of a dolphin, pulling off acrobatics and swimming feats no human could match. Does not grant underwater breathing so you can still drown, and you may feel noticeably clumsier on dry land.
5161. Water Soul,4.9
#Your soul is made of water, and you can manifest it outside your body or channel its currents into a wide range of hydrokinetic abilities. This kind of elemental soul is typically the domain of nymphs, genies, water deities and angelic beings, placing you in very strange company.
5162. Water Symbiosis,4.6
#You host a water-based entity within your body, whether an elemental spirit, hydrous being or embodiment of water itself, and draw power from the bond. The entity may try to possess you outright, the force may overwhelm your body, and you inherit the elemental's weaknesses, such as vulnerability to electricity.
5163. Waterfowl Physiology,2.2
#You possess the traits of a waterfowl, either fully transforming into or gaining the attributes of ducks, geese, swans and the like. Despite the cute exterior, your bite force and wing strikes are capable of breaking bones, and you are naturally territorial and aggressive when provoked.
5164. Watermelon Mimicry,1.5
#You can transform your body partially or fully into watermelon matter, either retaining your anatomy in melon form or becoming homogeneous fruit pulp. Delicious, refreshing, and carrying the terrifying risk of being eaten while transformed.
5165. Wave Capacitor,4.5
#Your body functions as a living battery for waves of all kinds, allowing you to absorb and store vast amounts of waveform energy for later use. You can channel the stored energy for any purpose, from powering devices to fueling your own abilities.
5166. Wave Empowerment,3.9
#You grow stronger, faster, and more durable in the presence of waves, whether they be oceanic, sonic, or electromagnetic. Prolonged exposure may unlock new abilities, draw sustenance from the waves themselves, and even slow or halt your aging.
5167. Waveform Empowerment,3.8
#You become stronger, faster and more durable when in contact with waveforms of any kind, unlocking latent abilities tied to your wave affinity. Some users draw sustenance directly from ambient waveforms and age slower as a result.
5168. Wax Mimicry,3.6
#Your body is made of wax or can be transformed into it at will. You can reshape yourself, plug wounds by remolding, and squeeze through gaps, but heat is your natural enemy and a strong enough flame could leave you a formless puddle.
5169. Wax Monster Physiology,4.2
#Allows you to transform into a wax monster, a hulking candle-fleshed horror with supernatural wax and flame-based abilities. Your physical stats are greatly enhanced and you can reshape your wax body freely, though fire and heat are devastating against you.
5170. Weak Force Embodiment,8.3
#You are the embodiment of the weak force itself, the fundamental force behind radioactive decay and stellar fusion. You wield limitless control over all radiation and nuclear fission, your existence tied to the very interaction that lets stars burn.
5171. Weak Force Mimicry,6.5
#Your body is made of or can transform into pure weak force, the fundamental interaction that governs radioactive decay. In this form you can channel the weak force through your cells, bones and muscles, becoming a walking reactor capable of nuclear-scale attacks.
5172. Weakness Embodiment,6.8
#You are the embodiment of weakness itself. You feed off the frailties of others, both physical and spiritual, growing stronger the more flaws you consume. You can induce weakness in anyone, their bodies, their minds, their wills crumbling at your presence.
5173. Weakness Immunity,6.4
#You are immune to all of the weaknesses natural to your race or species, completely unaffected by the limitations everyone else of your kind has to endure. A vampire with this trait would feel nothing under sunlight or holy water. Can still be undone by Weakness Creation.
5174. Weakness Resistance,4.7
#You are highly resistant to the weaknesses of your own race. Where others of your kind would be crippled by their natural vulnerabilities, you can push through them. Not outright immunity, but enough of a buffer to turn an exploitable flaw into a mere inconvenience.
5175. Weapon Companionship,4.7
#You share a sacred bond with your weapons, treating them as living companions that protect and empower you in return for your care. This bond lets you synchronize with them to unlock abilities neither of you could use alone. The death of a bonded weapon hits you like losing a limb.
5176. Weapon Dragon Physiology,6.3
#You are a weapon dragon, a dragon whose body is composed of or sprouts weapons at will. You possess the full physical might of a dragon combined with a body that can reshape itself into blades, cannons or any armament you can think of. Dragon-slaying weapons still work on you and dragon gods will still outclass you.
5177. Weapon Empowerment,3.6
#You become stronger, faster and tougher when near or wielding weapons, with the boost scaling to how many are in your vicinity. Masters can draw sustenance from weapons and even slow their aging by sleeping in an armory. In an empty room you are just a regular person.
5178. Weapon Immunity,5.8
#You are completely immune to weapons of all kinds, from the simplest knife to cursed and divine armaments. Fists, teeth, magic, and elements still affect you normally, but no weapon ever forged can leave a mark on your skin. Almighty-tier weapons and immunity negation remain the hard counters.
5179. Weapon Mimicry,4.2
#You can transform into a weapon or weapons, either retaining organs and vulnerable spots or converting your entire body into homogeneous weapon-matter. In your transformed state you may need a wielder to be used to full effect, but a skilled partner can make you terrifying.
5180. Weapon Power Link,4.2
#Your object-based nature is linked directly to your powers, letting your weapons fuel and amplify your abilities on multiple levels. The stronger your bond with your armaments, the more your powers flourish. If your weapon grows unstable, so do you, and Weapon Negation hits you twice as hard.
5181. Weapon Soul,5.2
#Soul Eater - Your soul itself is composed of weaponry, granting you innate resistance against soul-devouring entities and soul manipulation. You can manifest your soul-weapon outward for offense and even partially transform your body into a weapon. The cost is that your temperament tends toward sharpness and aggression.
5182. Weaponized Body,5.7
#Your body has been experimented on to the point that it is now a living arsenal. Retractable blades, bullet-firing mechanisms, laser cutters, tentacles, heat and cold emitters, whatever you need for the situation, your body can produce it. At the highest level, every part of you is lethal and your body adapts its weaponry on the fly.
5183. Weaponized Tail,3.0
#You have a tail that has been weaponized in some way, whether a scorpion sting, a bladed tip, a mace-like club, or something more exotic. The tail may or may not be prehensile, and losing it in combat would be devastating.
5184. Weaponized Tongue,2.6
#Your tongue has been weaponized somehow, whether sharpened into a blade, coated in corrosive saliva, elongated into a whip, or something else entirely. Losing the tongue renders the power useless, so protect your mouth.
5185. Weather Immunity,2.3
#Weather has no effect on you whatsoever. You do not feel extreme cold or heat, wind does not buffet you, rain does not wet you, and lightning refuses to strike. Your senses and movement remain unaffected regardless of conditions.
5186. Weather Mimicry,5.4
#You can transform your body completely into weather phenomena, whether wind, cloud, storm, or fog. In homogeneous form you become near-impossible to damage through conventional means, while anatomical form retains your organs but gains elemental resistances.
5187. Weather Symbiosis,5.2
#You share your body with a meteorological entity, granting you potent atmospheric powers ranging from elemental techniques to pressure and temperature control. The entity benefits from your body and you benefit from its power, but a strong enough storm spirit may start pushing for control of the wheel.
5188. Weatherly Presence,4.6
#Your mere presence projects a field of weather into the surrounding area. Whether it is perpetual rainclouds following you, a halo of clear skies, or a creeping frost wherever you step, the weather obeys your aura whether you want it to or not.
5189. Webbed Digits,1.3
#Your fingers and/or toes are webbed, giving you improved swimming ability and a significantly better grip in water. Makes buying gloves a bit of a pain.
5190. Weight Defiance,3.4
#You can ignore the weight of objects, lifting and carrying things far beyond what your body should reasonably handle, and your own weight feels lighter when you jump or move. You are still bound by friction, inertia and everything else, just not the heaviness of things.
5191. Weight Immunity,4.2
#You and anything you touch are immune to weight and weight-based abilities. Extra weight, reduced weight, weight redirected as a vector force, none of it affects you. Magic and fatigue-based powers can still get through, however.
5192. Werebeast Physiology,4.1
#You are a werebeast, capable of transforming into a bestial or humanoid animal form with greatly enhanced physical attributes, heightened senses and a healing factor. Your transformations may be tied to the full moon and the shift can be painful, with the beast sometimes clouding your human mind.
5193. Werebeast Symbiosis,5.2
#Your body hosts a werebeast within, granting you immense powers drawn from its nature. The stronger the beast, the greater the gifts, but a powerful werebeast may attempt to seize your mind or tear apart your body from the inside. Keeping control is a constant struggle.
5194. Wereboar Physiology,3.6
#You are a wereboar, capable of transforming into a hulking porcine humanoid with monstrous strength, thick hide and razor tusks. Your charge can shatter walls and your endurance is brutal. May be weak to silver and tied to the lunar cycle.
5195. Werecat Physiology,4.0
#You are a werecat, free to transform fully or partially into any feline, domestic or extinct, from housecat to sabretooth. Unlike werewolves you are not bound to the moon nor weak to silver, and you possess the natural grace, stealth and senses of cats amplified. Many werecats are also natural magic-users.
5196. Werecoyote Physiology,3.7
#You are a werecoyote, able to shift into a coyote or anthropomorphic hybrid with enhanced strength, speed, stamina and heightened senses. You share most of the typical werewolf weaknesses and may lose self control under the full moon.
5197. Werecrocodile Physiology,3.9
#You can transform into a crocodilian or crocodile humanoid, gaining armored scales, crushing jaws and the patience of an ambush predator. Your bite force is monstrous and you thrive in water. Transformations may be painful and tied to the lunar cycle.
5198. Weredinosaur Physiology,5.0
#You are a weredinosaur, able to transform into a prehistoric saurian of your particular species or a dinosaur humanoid. Whether raptor, tyrant or horned behemoth, your bestial form carries the raw power of the Mesozoic with you. Transformations may be painful and sometimes permanent if overused.
5199. Weredog Physiology,3.4
#You are a weredog, able to transform into a domestic dog or dog-humanoid hybrid with enhanced senses, stamina and loyalty-fueled strength. You are often stronger and faster than natural dogs, but silver and gold may wound you like any other werebeast. Werewolves may not take kindly to you.
5200. Weredragon Physiology,5.8
#You are a weredragon, capable of transforming into a dragon or dragon-humanoid with scaled hide, enormous strength and typically some form of breath weapon. You gain the senses, agility and raw power of a dragon, though you may inherit their fundamental weaknesses and the transformation can be painful.
5201. Werefish Physiology,2.9
#You are a werefish, able to transform into a fish or fish-humanoid hybrid, gaining aquatic adaptations, gills and enhanced swimming. You are effectively at home underwater but somewhat awkward on land in your hybrid form.
5202. Werefox Physiology,3.8
#You are a werefox, able to shift into a fox or fox-humanoid with enhanced senses, speed and the cunning of a kitsune. You are often quicker and cleverer than other werebeasts and may possess a trickster's knack for illusion. Silver still hurts and werewolves may dislike you.
5203. Werefrog Physiology,3.0
#You are a wereamphibian, able to transform into a frog or frog humanoid with sticky tongue, leaping legs and permeable skin. Your eating habits change considerably and you may require ambient heat or cold to regulate your body.
5204. Werehyena Physiology,3.9
#You are a werehyena, capable of transforming into a hyena or hyena-humanoid with bone-crushing bite force, enhanced stamina and an unsettling vampiric streak. Many werehyenas are independent of the moon's cycle, though transformations can still be painful.
5205. Wereinsect Physiology,3.5
#You are a wereinsect, able to transform into a particular insect or insectoid humanoid, gaining chitinous armor, extra limbs and whatever natural weapons your chosen species possesses. Silver hurts you like any werebeast, and pesticides may affect you.
5206. Werejaguar Physiology,4.1
#You are a werejaguar, able to shift into a jaguar or hybrid form with crushing bite force, stealth and explosive agility. You have no weakness to silver or the moon, and your predatory nature makes you a devastating ambush hunter.
5207. Wereleopard Physiology,4.0
#You are a wereleopard, able to shift into a leopard or hybrid form with unmatched stealth, climbing ability and pouncing strength. Free from the moon's grip and silver's bite, you are an apex stalker that can drag prey twice your size into the treetops.
5208. Werelion Physiology,4.3
#You are a werelion, capable of transforming into a lion or lion-humanoid with the pride, roar and raw strength of the savanna king. Your physicality far exceeds that of common werebeasts, and you are free of the moon's cycle and silver's wound.
5209. Werepanther Physiology,4.1
#You are a werepanther, able to shift into a panther or hybrid form with shadow-clad stealth, enhanced senses and deadly agility. You have no weakness to silver or the moon and move like living darkness through any environment.
5210. Werepire Physiology,6.3
#You are a werepire, a hybrid of vampire and werebeast wielding the full powers of both parents and often using them to enhance one another. You are immune to many of the classic weaknesses of either species - silver, gold and sunlight all fail on you - but decapitation and complete disintegration will still end you.
5211. Wereprimate Physiology,4.4
#Dragon Ball - You are a wereprimate, capable of transforming into a primate or primate-humanoid with tremendous strength, agility and the raw savagery of an Oozaru. Your instincts may cloud your judgment and if you possess a tail, it is dangerously sensitive.
5212. Wererabbit Physiology,3.5
#You are a wererabbit, a humanoid rabbit with greatly enhanced strength, speed, agility and durability. Your bestial form is feral and ravenous, kicking and biting with enough force to break bones. Some wererabbits are vulnerable to pure gold bullets.
5213. Werereptile Physiology,3.7
#You are a werereptile, able to transform into a reptile or reptilian humanoid with scaled hide, cold-blooded endurance and whatever natural weapons your chosen reptile carries. Transformations may be painful or tied to the lunar cycle and become permanent if overused.
5214. Wererodent Physiology,3.2
#You are a wererodent, able to transform into a rat, mouse or other rodent-humanoid, gaining gnawing teeth, disease resistance and the ability to slip into the smallest cracks. You often come with a pack of smaller rodents that heed your presence. Silver and pesticides still hurt you.
5215. Wereshark Physiology,4.2
#You are a wereshark, capable of transforming into a shark or shark-humanoid with rows of regenerating teeth, tireless swimming and a bite that tears through steel. You are terrifying in water and still dangerous on land. Transformations can be painful and risk becoming permanent.
5216. Weretiger Physiology,4.5
#You are a weretiger, able to transform into a tiger or tiger-humanoid with immense strength, predatory grace and often innate magical affinity. Applied electricity, medicine or enzymes may suppress your transformation, and your personality may shift alongside your body.
5217. Superior Werewolf Physiology,6.2
#You are a superior werewolf, an evolved strain well beyond the typical lycanthrope through genetic experimentation, enchantment or raw training. Your physical capabilities dwarf those of ordinary werewolves and you may wield additional powers that make you truly monstrous. Still, beings like vaewolves and superior vampires may outclass you.
5218. Transcendent Werewolf Physiology,8.4
#You are a transcendent werewolf, a lycanthrope who has ascended to true godhood through divine intervention or overwhelming magical feats. Your strength, senses and supernatural potency rival those of gods and the classic weaknesses of silver and wolfsbane are at most mild discomforts. Beings of higher tier may still challenge you.
5219. Western Dragon Physiology,5.9
#You are or can transform into a European dragon - an enormous fire-breathing, scaled beast with leathery wings, rending claws and a long muscular tail. You possess terrifying physical power, armored hide and your blood carries magical properties. A hoard tends to follow naturally.
5220. Wetland Adaptation,2.2
#You are perfectly adapted to wetlands, moving through swamps, marshes and bogs with ease. You can wade through mud and water without tiring, and resist diseases and poisons native to these environments. You dehydrate faster than normal in dry climates.
5221. Wheel Mimicry,2.2
#You are or can transform into a being made of wheels. Your anatomy is preserved but made of wheel material, and you can roll at considerable speeds when in this form.
5222. Wheeled Locomotion,1.9
#You have wheels on all your limbs, allowing you to move around like a vehicle across any surface. Getting up stairs is a bit of a challenge though.
5223. White Dragon Physiology,6.5
#You are or can transform into a White Dragon, the divine dragon of the heavens, symbol of benevolence and purity. You possess immense physical power, command over light and creation, and a noble presence that affects all who meet you. Red and black dragons are your natural enemies.
5224. White Hole Mimicry,6.4
#Your body is made of or can transform into a white hole. In this form energy constantly flows out of you, fortifying your cells and muscles, and you can channel this outward force into devastating blasts. Extended use drains your reserves.
5225. White Lady Physiology,4.6
#You are or can become a White Lady, a world-wide type of ghost manifesting as a woman in white, a harbinger of misfortune and death. You possess the standard ghostly traits of intangibility, possession and fear induction, and your presence foretells doom. You are bound between worlds until an unfinished task is completed.
5226. Whole Acceleration,3.2
#You and everything you are carrying or wearing ignore inertia when you change speed or direction. You can pull hairpin turns at fighter-jet speeds without your body or gear tearing itself apart. May not apply to everything you are holding if your grip is loose.
5227. Whole Body Exertion,2.8
#When any part of your body exerts force, the entire body is moved as if the force applied everywhere at once. Running, jumping, and throwing are more efficient and coordinated, though the forces may occasionally act beyond your intended duration.
5228. Whole Body Unison,2.6
#Your body moves as a single unit, every limb and muscle shifting at the exact same instant rather than one part leading and the rest catching up. Makes you feel far less sluggish and more coordinated, though it does not actually make you faster.
5229. Wild Inner Beast,4.5
#There is a savage beast living inside you, granting you overwhelming strength and ferocity when you draw upon it. You take on the aspects of wild and diseased animals and almost nothing can stop you in a rampage. But if you lose control, the beast takes over and you become a mindless killing machine driven by bloodlust.
5230. Will Empowerment,4.3
#Your willpower and determination directly fuel your body and abilities. The stronger your resolve, the faster, stronger and more durable you become, and sufficiently strong will may even slow your aging. Doubt and fear will cripple you just as surely as belief empowers you.
5231. Willful Ascendancy,8.9
#You grow in power simply by willing or believing that you can. There is no ceiling, no traditional limit, no training arc required; if you are convinced you should be stronger, you are. In the most extreme cases, a mere thought or wish elevates your abilities to new heights. If your faith in yourself ever falters, so does your power.
5232. Willpower Embodiment,7.4
#You are the living embodiment of willpower itself, feeding on the resolve of every being around you, yourself included. You can convert that will into raw energy to extend your life, fuel your abilities or unleash as a weapon. You may never age and may be immune to death, as long as willpower exists to sustain you.
5233. Willpower Link,4.4
#Your powers are directly linked to your willpower, letting your ambition and resolve fuel and amplify every ability you possess. The stronger your will at any given moment, the more potent your powers become. If your will wavers, so do they, and if it breaks they may spiral out of your control.
5234. Window Mimicry,2.0
#Allows you to transform your body into living windows, your form retaining its shape while being made entirely of glass panes and frames. You are somewhat fragile in this state, and you may not always be able to turn back.
5235. Wing Barriers,2.8
#You possess armored wings that can fold around your body to serve as shields, blocking attacks that would otherwise tear through flesh. They also grant you some degree of flight, though heavy plating makes you less agile than a normal winged flier.
5236. Wing Blades,3.2
#Your wings are tipped with razor-sharp blades, letting you slash through enemies mid-flight or in close quarters. They also grant some degree of flight, though the added weight of the blades limits finesse.
5237. Wing Claws,3.0
#Your wings are tipped with razor-sharp talons that can rend flesh and armor in close combat. Especially deadly when you dive on an opponent from above, driving all your weight into the claws.
5238. Winged Cat Physiology,3.1
#You are, or can transform into, a winged cat of the kind depicted in prehistoric artwork. You gain feline grace and reflexes along with a pair of wings that grant flight, though break the wings and you are grounded until they heal.
5239. Winged Monster Physiology,4.4
#You are, or can transform into, a winged monster possessing flight and a suite of flight-based supernatural powers. The exact abilities vary with the monster you become, but most winged beasts share a fatal weakness to drowning since few of them swim well.
5240. Wire Mimicry,4.6
#You are or can transform into wire, either keeping your anatomical form made of strung metal or melting into a homogeneous coil. In the homogeneous state you become far harder to meaningfully damage, though you are affected by anything that would harm normal thread.
5241. Absolute Wisdom,9.1
#Your intellectual faculties, memory, calculation, learning and creativity transcend virtually every other sentient being in your universe. You always make the wisest possible decision regardless of the situation and simply do not make mistakes. This is not omniscience, you still must learn things, but once you know them you apply them perfectly.
5242. Enhanced Wisdom,3.6
#You possess wisdom far beyond the peak of your species, with deep understanding of concepts, people and situations and the emotional control to act on that understanding. You still make poor decisions from time to time, but far less often than a merely peak-human sage would.
5243. Supernatural Wisdom,6.2
#You are glaringly, obviously and unnaturally wiser than almost any being in your universe, your judgment pushed beyond the natural level entirely. People who speak with you often come away feeling as though they had consulted an oracle, even when you were only telling them what they already knew.
5244. Wisdom,2.3
#You possess peak human wisdom, able to apply perception, judgment and knowledge in keeping with a deep understanding of the world. You have control over your own passions, so reason tends to prevail, though you are still capable of making bad decisions from time to time.
5245. Wish Dragon Physiology,7.0
#You are or can transform into a wish dragon, a rare breed of dragon capable of granting wishes to others and even to itself. Alongside the standard suite of dragon abilities you wield wish-based powers of the sort only whispered about in legend, though anti-wish powers remain your main weakness.
5246. Wish Embodiment,8.6
#You become the physical manifestation and personification of wishes themselves, able to grant any and all wishes without limit. As long as beings continue to make wishes, your power is effectively boundless, but should the world ever stop wishing you begin to fade away into nothing.
5247. Wishpoosh Physiology,5.4
#You are or can transform into the Wishpoosh, a monstrous beaver of Native American folklore large enough to devour whales whole and level mountains. Your physical strength and durability are immense in this form, and your jaws can shatter stone and crush leviathans with ease.
5248. Absolute Wits,9.0
#Your thinking capacity is limitless, your foresight uncanny. You can instantly think your way in, out of, around or through any situation, adapting to any change and countering any twist with effortless grace. You generate infinite plans on the fly, outwit anyone beneath the conceptual level, and remain perfectly calm no matter the stakes.
5249. Enhanced Wits,3.6
#Your wits are sharpened beyond the human norm. You are quick on your feet, clever, adaptable, and hard to surprise or impress. You automatically analyze any environment you find yourself in and deduce the optimal course of action, letting you think your way through most situations. Can still be outwitted by those with supernatural or absolute levels.
5250. Supernatural Wits,5.8
#Your cleverness and cunning are glaringly beyond the natural limit. You adapt to changing situations with unnatural ease, keep your cool in any crisis, and your strategic mind outpaces even the most gifted mortal thinkers. Only those with Absolute Wits can reliably outmaneuver you.
5251. Peak Human Wits,2.6
#Your wits are as sharp as a human mind can be without crossing into the supernatural. You adapt quickly, think on your feet, and can talk or maneuver your way through almost any ordinary situation. You rarely get caught flat-footed, though anyone with enhanced wits can still outthink you.
5252. Wolf Physiology,3.3
#You possess the traits and physical abilities of a wolf, including enhanced senses, stamina, bite force and pack instincts. You can transform fully into a wolf or take a hybrid form, and you move with the grace and predatory awareness of a born hunter.
5253. Wolfwere Physiology,4.0
#You are a wolfwere, the mirror of a werewolf; a wolf that takes human or hybrid form rather than a human that becomes a wolf. Your base form is lupine, your human shape is the disguise, and you retain the strength, senses and ferocity of a predator in every form.
5254. Wolpertinger Physiology,3.5
#You are a wolpertinger, a Bavarian folklore creature with the head of a rabbit, the body of a squirrel, the antlers of a deer and the wings of a pheasant. You possess the agility, flight, and chimeric resilience of the creature, and your strange appearance carries a subtle fae glamour.
5255. Wolverine Physiology,3.4
#You either are or can transform into a wolverine, gaining their astonishing strength-to-size ratio, ferocity, stamina, and the willingness to fight creatures many times their size. Your jaws can crack frozen bone and your claws dig through ice and wood with ease.
5256. Wolverinefolk Physiology,3.9
#You are a wolverinefolk, a humanoid hybrid of human and wolverine. You possess the ferocity, stamina and raw strength of a wolverine in a form that can still wield weapons and walk among people, and your temper is famously hard to cool once provoked.
5257. Wombat Physiology,2.1
#You either are or can transform into a wombat. Your hindquarters are so densely boned that predators that bite them break their teeth, and you can block a burrow with your armored rump. Cute, stubborn, and surprisingly hard to kill.
5258. Wood Mimicry,3.3
#Your body is made of wood or can transform into it at will. Your wooden form retains all your organs, making it vulnerable to attacks the same way your flesh would be, although you are far more resistant to blunt force. Dehydrates faster than flesh and may require contact with soil or water.
5259. Wool Mimicry,2.1
#Your body is made of wool or can transform into it at will. Soft, warm, and surprisingly resilient to impacts, but weak against fire and anything that can shear. If knocked unconscious you may revert to flesh automatically.
5260. Word Mimicry,2.4
#You are a word or can transform into one. In word form you exist as pure written or spoken language, able to slip into sentences, hide in books, or echo through conversations unnoticed.
5261. World Connection,6.2
#You share a deep physical, mental, emotional, and spiritual connection with an entire world and everything within it. You can sense anything that happens on your world, commune with its elements and lifeforms, and understand its nature intuitively. However, the destruction of your world could kill you, and ascending to higher planes may be impossible.
5262. World Turtle Physiology,7.4
#You are the World Turtle, the legendary cosmic beast upon whose back the entire world is carried. Your shell is durable enough to bear continents, your lifespan stretches across eons, and you command the slow, unshakable gravity of a being that holds civilizations in place. You are as slow as you are eternal.
5263. Worm Physiology,2.8
#You either are or can transform into a worm, ranging from earthworms and roundworms to flatworms, bootlace worms, and arrow worms. You gain incredible flexibility, regeneration from being cut in half, and the ability to squeeze through the tiniest of spaces. Weak to extreme heat and hungry predators.
5264. Wormhole Mimicry,7.2
#Your body is composed of or can transform into wormholes, a trans-reality manifold wearing the shape of a person. In this form attacks pass through you into distant points in spacetime, and you can redirect any force or projectile to anywhere you've been. Lower-level users need focus and have time limits on the transformation.
5265. Worship Empowerment,5.8
#You grow stronger, faster and more durable the more you are worshipped, with prayer, ritual and devotion fueling your body and unlocking new abilities related to your divine affinity. Sufficient faith can sustain you without food and halt your aging entirely, but disbelief and abandonment leave you powerless.
5266. Worshipping Empowerment,4.6
#You grow stronger, faster and more durable by worshipping something else, with prayer and ritual devotion fueling your body. Unlike being worshipped yourself, this empowerment flows from your own faith, meaning as long as you have something to kneel to you remain powerful.
5267. Wraith Physiology,5.6
#You are or can transform into a wraith, an incorporeal spirit of the netherworld that sustains itself by draining the life energy and souls of mortals. You appear as a shadowy cloaked form, phase through matter, and leech vitality with a touch. May be vulnerable to sunlight or dissipate on contact with water.
5268. Wrath Derivation,8.9
#You are the source of all wrath in the cosmos, the primordial force from which every flash of anger, rage, fury and berserker frenzy in every living being flows. All powers related to wrath answer to you absolutely. Should you ever die, all anger in existence dies with you, and should you wish to be free of this burden you must pass the role to another.
5269. Wrath Embodiment,7.3
#You are the physical manifestation of wrath in your reality, drawing power from the rage of yourself and others. You can weaponize endless fury, extend your lifespan through it, and become nearly immune to death so long as anger exists. Releasing or losing your rage leaves you weakened, and when enraged you may not be able to distinguish friend from foe.
5270. Writing Implement Mimicry,2.6
#You can transform into writing implements or a homogeneous mass of them, retaining your anatomy in an altered form. You're no more invulnerable than a pen is, and the threat of being snapped in half is very real.
5271. Wulver Physiology,3.6
#You are or can transform into a wulver, a benevolent Scottish fairy resembling a humanoid wolf. You gain enhanced physical abilities, a peaceful temperament and an intuition for helping those in need, but you carry the standard fairy weaknesses to cold iron and religious icons.
5272. Xenarthra Physiology,2.4
#You are or can transform into a xenarthran such as an anteater, sloth or armadillo, gaining their traits like armored hide, a ridiculously long tongue or incredible climbing ability. Eyesight tends to be poor and sloth-based forms are very slow.
5273. Xenarthranoid Physiology,3.0
#You are or can transform into a xenarthranoid — a humanoid hybrid of anteater, sloth or armadillo — gaining the traits of these beasts in a more combat-functional body. Armored armadillo-men make for surprisingly solid frontline fighters.
5274. Xian Physiology,7.8
#Chinese Mythology - You are or can transform into a Xian, a human who has achieved immortality, supernatural power and harmony with the Tao. Your body transcends mortal limitations, granting vast longevity, spiritual mastery and the ability to wield Taoist arts as easily as breathing. You represent the ultimate goal of Taoist self-cultivation, an ascended being walking amongst mortals.
5275. Xiangliu Physiology,6.3
#Chinese Mythology - You are or can transform into Xiangliu, the venomous nine-headed serpent who brings floods and devastation wherever he goes. Your body exudes ecological ruin, your venom is calamitous, and your nine heads each demand feeding, making you a walking disaster for any land you linger in.
5276. Xiezhi Physiology,5.7
#Chinese Mythology - You are or can transform into a xiezhi, the legendary lion-dog guardian of justice and order. You have the innate ability to sense guilt, wrongdoing and prejudice, and would instinctively gore the wronging party with your horn. Your physique is formidable and you can consume fire as though it were food.
5277. Xylokinetic Regeneration,4.1
#Naruto - You regenerate wounds by absorbing wood and woody plants, either fueling your healing or directly converting the plant matter into your own flesh. Without access to wood the regeneration stalls, and cellular-disruption abilities can shut it down entirely.
5278. Yak Physiology,2.2
#You are or can transform into a yak, domestic or wild, gaining their immense shaggy bulk, powerful horns and tolerance for brutal high-altitude cold. Surprisingly resilient, genuinely strong, and very, very fluffy.
5279. Yale Physiology,3.1
#Grants you the body of a yale, a medieval beast the size of a hippo with a goat's body, elephant's tail and boar's jaws. Your long horns can swivel in any direction, letting you parry and gore foes from impossible angles. Your horns can still be broken however.
5280. Yarn Mimicry,1.6
#Your body takes on the properties of yarn, letting you unravel yourself into strands, stretch and loop your form, and reform at will. Some users find themselves unable to return fully to their original body.
5281. Yazata Physiology,6.5
#Persian Mythology - You possess the physiology of a yazata, a worshipful angelic being of Zoroastrian faith that embodies light, order, and righteousness. You gain divine strength, holy presence, and dominion over an aspect of creation of your choosing, serving as a lesser ally to Ahura Mazda himself.
5282. Yin & Yang Empowerment,4.5
#You grow stronger, faster, and more durable when exposed to yin and yang essence, potentially unlocking new abilities tied to the affinity and enhancing existing powers. With enough exposure you may even draw sustenance from duality itself and slow your aging.
5283. Yin & Yang Mimicry,6.5
#Your body is composed of yin and yang essence itself, letting you exist as the fundamental duality of reality. You can keep a human shape or dissolve into homogeneous primordial matter, and attacks that target one polarity are counterbalanced by the other.
5284. Yin & Yang Power Link,4.2
#Your yin and yang aspects are directly linked to your powers, fueling and strengthening them from within. As long as your dualities remain balanced, your abilities are amplified and far more stable than they would be otherwise.
5285. Yobuko Physiology,2.8
#You are or can transform into a yobuko, a one-legged yokai child with a large face and a straw rain hat. You dwell well in mountainous terrain and can mimic any voice you've heard to call people back to you, causing echoes that confuse and lure targets deeper into the wild.
5286. Yoga Empowerment,4.1
#Yoga makes you stronger, faster, and more durable the more you practice it, unlocking latent abilities tied to the discipline. Dedicated practitioners may slow their aging or sustain themselves entirely from yogic energy, but without practice to feed on you weaken.
5287. Yogurt Mimicry,2.3
#Your body is composed of yogurt, either keeping a humanoid shape with fully functional organs or dissolving into homogeneous cultured dairy. You are vulnerable to Yogurt Manipulation and may, on a bad day, find yourself stuck as strawberry flavor.
5288. Superior Yokai Physiology,6.3
#You are a Superyokai, an empowered variant of an ordinary yokai with brand new abilities stacked on top of your base physiology. Your intellect allows you to use these granted powers with far more precision and creativity than a regular yokai ever could.
5289. Transcendent Yokai Physiology,7.8
#You are or can transform into a transcendent yokai, a yokai elevated to godly power. Your physical, spiritual and mystical capabilities rival those of lesser deities, though divine slayers and transcendent weaponry remain a genuine threat.
5290. Yokai Physiology,4.5
#You are or can transform into a yokai, a supernatural spirit or monster from Japanese folklore. Depending on which yokai you embody, your abilities range widely from mischief and minor fortune to outright monstrous power. Vulnerable to Shinto rites and spiritual cleansing.
5291. Yonaki Baba Physiology,4.4
#You are or can become a Yonaki Baba, a hag yokai who appears at the homes of those who have suffered tragedy and weeps through the night. Your weeping drives listeners deeper into despair and signals further misfortune. Vulnerable to divine magic and prayer.
5292. Yosei Physiology,4.3
#You are or can transform into a yosei, the Japanese equivalent of a fairy or bewitching spirit. You possess supernatural grace and charm, and according to old belief, you can even bring the dead back to life under the right circumstances.
5293. Yosuzume Physiology,3.3
#You are or can transform into a yosuzume, a night sparrow yokai that chirps in the dark along mountain trails. You grant or steal luck from those who cross your path, and your chirps are an omen that more dangerous yokai may be following close behind.
5294. Youth Embodiment,6.5
#You are the living personification of youth itself, able to manipulate the concept and restore others to the first bloom of youthfulness and beauty. Your mere presence radiates vitality and can reverse aging in those around you, temporarily or permanently.
5295. Youth Mimicry,2.3
#You naturally appear as a child regardless of your actual age. Your deceptively innocent look lets you slip past suspicion in many situations, though your small stature can be turned against you and it is hard to be taken seriously in adult matters.
5296. Yowie Physiology,3.5
#You are or can transform into a Yowie, the hulking hairy humanoid of Australian folklore. You possess massive strength, endurance and a violent disposition, being considered Australia's answer to the Bigfoot or Yeti. Intelligence in this form is limited.
5297. Yuki-Onna Physiology,5.2
#You are or can transform into a Yuki-Onna, a snow woman yokai of terrible beauty who haunts snowy nights. You can float over snow without leaving footprints, dissolve into mist, freeze mortals with your breath or gaze, and command the cold itself. Vulnerable to fire.
5298. Yukinko Physiology,3.4
#You are or can transform into a Yukinko, a small child-like snow yokai said to be the offspring of Yuki-Onna. You possess ice and snow powers and a hardiness against cold, though you are vulnerable to fire-based attacks.
5299. Yule Cat Physiology,5.0
#You are or can transform into the Jólakötturinn, the monstrous Yule Cat of Icelandic folklore. As a house-sized man-eating cat, you prowl on Christmas Eve hunting those who have not received new clothes, with terrifying strength, senses and predatory instinct.
5300. Zana Physiology,4.9
#You are or can transform into a Zana, a benevolent Albanian fairy akin to a fairy godmother. You possess the power to aid the lost and injured, bestow gifts of beauty, grace and luck upon others, and in rare cases even grant life and blessings to the unborn. Vulnerable to iron and fey wards.
5301. Zaratan Physiology,5.6
#You are or can transform into a Zaratan, a mythical turtle so enormous its shell is routinely mistaken for an island. Your size, weight and durability are colossal, though your speed and agility predictably suffer for it.
5302. Zashiki-Warashi Physiology,4.0
#You are or can transform into a Zashiki-Warashi, a child-like yokai that inhabits homes and plays harmless pranks. Those who see you are blessed with good fortune, and your continued presence in a household brings it prosperity for as long as you remain.
5303. Zburator Physiology,4.8
#You are or can transform into a Zburator, a Romanian demon that appears as a wolf-headed dragon or as a handsome man. You seduce mortals in the night and drain their lifeforce, leaving them pale and wasted. Vulnerable to monotheistic rites and dragon slayers.
5304. Zebra Physiology,1.6
#You are or can transform into a zebra. You gain the speed, stamina and kick of the equid as well as its distinctive striped coat, which oddly provides decent camouflage in tall grass.
5305. Zero Motion Resistance,5.5
#Your body experiences zero resistance to motion. Friction, inertia, rotational mass, gravity and weight all behave as though they are zero when acting on you, yet you still move and act normally in defiance of physics. Impacts can still hurt you, and you cannot extend this property to others.
5306. Zero-Gravity Immunity,2.8
#You are immune to the long-term effects of zero gravity. No bone loss, no muscle atrophy, no fluid shifts; you can live indefinitely in orbit or deep space without ever hitting the treadmill. Meta gravity powers can still bypass this.
5307. Zhenniao Physiology,4.5
#Chinese Mythology - You are or can transform into a Zhenniao, a poisonous mythical bird of ancient Southern China with purple abdomen and green-tipped feathers. Your entire body carries Zhen venom, and a single feather dipped in wine is enough to kill. You are immune to poisons that would fell any other creature.
5308. Zinc Mimicry,2.9
#Your body is made of or can transform into zinc. You gain the properties of the metal including decent conductivity and malleability when heated, but you are also brittle in the cold and vulnerable to anything that would damage ordinary zinc.
5309. Zipper Empowerment,2.3
#You become stronger, faster and more durable the closer you are to zippers. A single zipper on your jacket gives a modest boost, but walking into a clothing factory turns you into a monster. Strip you naked and you are painfully average.
5310. Zipper Mimicry,3.4
#You can transform your body, partially or fully, into zippers. In homogeneous form you can unzip and reform yourself to dodge attacks or squeeze through tight spaces, but your zipper-form shares all the vulnerabilities of a normal zipper and isn't exactly durable.
5311. Ziz Physiology,6.8
#You are a Ziz, the primordial unconquerable monster of the sky from Abrahamic lore. As a Ziz you possess a colossal avian form whose wingspan can blot out the sun, immense divine physical power, and dominion over storms and the heavens. You weaken significantly if kept away from the sky for too long.
5312. Zodiac Empowerment,3.6
#You become stronger, faster and more durable around zodiac power and signs, possibly drawing sustenance from them and slowing your aging. Usually tied to a single sign, and the boost can surge involuntarily when the stars align with your affinity.
5313. Zodiac Mimicry,5.5
#You can transform into any zodiac sign of any known system, Western, Chinese, Mayan, and beyond. Each form grants the traits, elements and mythological capabilities of the sign you assume, and with mastery you can blend traits from multiple signs at once.
5314. Zodiac Power Link,4.1
#Your powers are directly linked to your zodiac sign, which fuels and strengthens them through the horoscope. When your sign is in favorable alignment your abilities surge, but an unstable or eclipsed sign can send them spiralling out of control.
5315. Zodiac Symbiosis,5.3
#A zodiac entity lives inside your body, granting you access to its powers in exchange for hosting it. The entity may fight you for control, damage you when it exerts itself, and a sufficiently powerful sign can destroy its host outright if the bond isn't balanced.
5316. Zombie Dragon Physiology,5.7
#You are a zombie dragon, bearing the immense physical power, scale and breath weapon of a dragon alongside the undying resilience and fearlessness of a zombie. You carry the weaknesses of both, and your tattered wings may or may not still be able to carry you aloft.
5317. Superior Zombie Physiology,4.6
#You are a metazombie, a zombie of superior power with enhanced strength, durability and often genuine intelligence. Unlike the shambling masses, you retain your mind well enough to become an alpha undead, lording over lesser zombies. Your genetic instability may express as unwanted mutations, and you still share most of a regular zombie's weaknesses.
5318. Zombie Physiology,3.0
#You either are or can transform into a zombie, an animated corpse free of hunger, pain, fatigue and most other mortal needs. Your body is dead and possibly decomposing, but it keeps moving regardless. Vulnerable to supernatural hunters, necromancers, and anyone with Zombie Manipulation.
5319. Zombification Immunity,2.6
#You are immune to zombification by any means — dark magic, parasites, spores, viruses, curses. No matter how the apocalypse starts, you won't be joining the shambling masses. Their claws and teeth can still hurt you like any other wound though.
5320. Zombified Alien Physiology,4.7
#You are a zombified alien, possessing both the undying resilience of a zombie and the exotic bodily composition and adaptability of an alien species. You don't need to eat, sleep or breathe, and your biology is strange enough to shrug off things that would kill either parent species. The zombification may have dulled your intellect, and old undead impulses like hunger and animalism still gnaw at you.
5321. Zombified Animal Physiology,3.3
#You either are or can transform into a zombified animal, combining the physical traits of a beast with the undying persistence of the undead. You may end up with the weaknesses of both, but also the instincts and enhanced senses of the animal alongside zombie durability.
5322. Zompire Physiology,5.4
#You are a zompire, a bizarre hybrid combining the worst traits of vampires and zombies. You possess vampiric strength, speed and intelligence alongside the ferocious hunger and resilience of the undead, making you far more dangerous than either parent species. You still need life-force to keep functioning, and supernatural hunters, acidic blood and vampiric toxicity can all take you down.
5323. Zuijin Physiology,5.7
#You either are or can transform into a Zuijin, a Shinto warrior-kami who stands guard at shrine gates to ward off evil spirits. You possess divine strength, keen awareness of malicious presences, and the authority to repel or banish evil from any place you have claimed as your watch. Your protective aura shelters those under your guard, though divine power negation and absorption can bypass your warding.
